papers.title: The Dynamics of Networks and Homophily
papers.authors: Matthew O. Jackson, Stephen M. Nei, Erik Snowberg, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: We examine friendships and study partnerships among university students over several years. At the aggregate level, connections increase over time, but homophily on gender and ethnicity is relatively constant across time, university residences, and different network layers. At the individual level, homophilous tendencies are persistent across time and network layers. Furthermore, we see assortativity in homophilous tendencies. There is weaker, albeit significant, homophily over malleable characteristics---risk preferences, altruism, study habits, and so on. We find little evidence of assimilation over those characteristics. We also document the nuanced impact of network connections on changes in Grade Point Average.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EH, LS, POL；JEL：D85, I21, J15, J16, Z13
papers.zh_title: 网络与同质性的动态变化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大学生在数年间的友谊和学习伙伴关系。在总体层面，联系随时间增加，但基于性别和种族的同质性在不同时间、大学宿舍以及不同网络层级中相对稳定。在个体层面，同质性倾向在时间和网络层级上具有持续性。此外，我们观察到同质性倾向存在同配性。在可塑性特征（如风险偏好、利他主义、学习习惯等）上，同质性较弱但依然显著。我们几乎没有发现这些特征同化的证据。我们还记录了网络联系对平均绩点变化的微妙影响。

papers.title: Disparities in Pollution Capitalization Rates: The Role of Direct & Systemic Discrimination
papers.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Gregor Singer
papers.abstract: We examine how exogenous changes in air pollution exposure over the past two decades have altered disparities in home values between Black and White homeowners. We find that air quality capitalization rates are significantly lower for Black homeowners, so much lower that, despite secular reductions in the Black-White pollution exposure gap, housing value disparities increased. An exploration of mechanisms suggests 60% of this difference is attributable to seller race and 40% to racial neighborhood composition, robust to a range of seller, property and neighborhood characteristics. We discuss our findings through the lens of direct and systemic discrimination in housing markets.
papers.zh_title: 污染资本化率的差异：直接歧视与系统性歧视的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了过去二十年空气污染暴露的外生变化如何改变了黑人和白人房主之间房屋价值的差异。我们发现，黑人房主的空气质量资本化率显著较低。事实上，这一差异如此之大，以至于尽管黑人与白人之间的污染暴露差距在长期内有所缩小，但住房价值的差距在此期间反而扩大了。对机制的研究表明，这种差异中约60%源于直接歧视，其余40%可归因于系统性歧视。

papers.title: The Effects of Recreational Marijuana Legalization on Employment and Earnings
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Yang Liang, Caterina Muratori, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Despite nearly 70 percent of the American public supporting legalization of recreational marijuana, opponents argue that increased marijuana use may diminish motivation, impede cognitive function, and harm health, each of which could adversely affect adults’ economic wellbeing. This study is the first to explore the impacts of recreational marijuana laws (RMLs) on employment and wages. Difference-in-differences estimates show little evidence that RMLs adversely affect labor market outcomes among most working-age individuals. Rather, our estimates show that RML adoption is associated with an increase in agricultural employment, consistent with the opening of a new licit market. A causal interpretation of our findings is supported by (1) event-study analyses using dynamic difference-in-differences estimates designed to expunge bias due to heterogeneous and dynamic treatment effects, and (2) alternative policy estimates generated using a synthetic control design.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H71, I12
papers.zh_title: 娱乐用大麻合法化对就业和收入的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管近70%的美国公众支持娱乐用大麻合法化，但反对者认为，大麻使用增加可能会削弱动力、损害认知功能并危害健康，这些都可能对成年人的经济福祉产生不利影响。本研究首次探讨了娱乐用大麻法律对就业和工资的影响。双重差分估计显示，几乎没有证据表明娱乐用大麻法律对大多数劳动年龄个体的劳动力市场结果产生不利影响。相反，我们的估计表明，娱乐用大麻法律的实施与农业就业的增加相关，这与新合法市场的开放一致。我们研究结果的因果解释得到了以下两点的支持：（1）使用动态双重差分估计的事件研究分析，旨在消除因异质性和动态处理效应导致的偏差；（2）使用合成控制设计生成的替代政策估计。

papers.title: Fundamentally Reforming the DI System: Evidence from German Notch Cohorts
papers.authors: Yaming Cao, Bjoern Fischer, Johannes Micha Geyer, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
papers.abstract: In 2001, Germany abolished public occupational disability insurance (ODI)—the second tier of public DI—for post-1960 cohorts. First, overall DI inflows decreased by a third in the long run. Second, representative data show at best modest increases in private ODI take-up in an individual risk-rated market without guaranteed issue. Third, an equilibrium model featuring interactions between the safety net, the first tier of public DI, and the private market illustrates that coverage denials and weak insurance demand due to complementary social insurance produce modest private ODI take-up with steep gradients by income and health. Finally, we simulate complementary reforms.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H53, H55, I10, I14, I18, J14, J21, J26
papers.zh_title: 从根本上改革伤残保险体系：来自德国断点队列的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2001年，德国废除了针对1960年后出生队列的公共职业伤残保险——公共伤残保险的第二层级。首先，长期来看，总体伤残保险流入减少了三分之一。其次，代表性数据显示，在个人风险定价且无保证发行的市场中，私人职业伤残保险的参保率最多只有适度增长。第三，一个包含安全网、公共伤残保险第一层级和私人市场之间相互作用的均衡模型表明，由于补充性社会保险导致的承保拒绝和保险需求疲软，使得私人职业伤残保险的参保率较低，且按收入和健康水平呈现陡峭梯度。最后，我们模拟了补充性改革。

papers.title: Changes in International Immigration and Internal Native Mobility after Covid-19 in the US
papers.authors: Giovanni Peri, Reem Zaiour
papers.abstract: From the beginning of the Covid-19 pandemic to late 2021, international immigration flows to the US decreased significantly. We document the timing and the characteristics of these significant changes in flows, their evolution until late 2022 and their geographic and sector distribution. We consider, in a similar way, changes in internal native mobility in the US, before and after Covid-19. We then connect cross-state native mobility to foreign immigration, the emergence of remote-work options, and changes in labor demand, before and after Covid. In spite of the large changes in labor markets and international migration, we do not measure any significant changes in native internal mobility. Then, using a panel regression and a shift-share IV, we find that the post-Covid drop in immigration and differential increase in remote-work options across sectors and states were not associated with changes in natives' cross-state mobility. We discuss possible implications of the decline in immigration and low native mobility on unfilled jobs in local labor markets.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情后美国国际移民流入与国内本地人口流动的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 从新冠疫情开始到2021年底，流入美国的国际移民显著减少。我们记录了这些流量显著变化的时间、特征、直至2022年底的演变情况，以及其地理和行业分布。我们以类似方式考察了新冠疫情前后美国国内本地人口流动的变化。然后，我们联系新冠疫情前后各州之间的本地人口流动与外国移民、远程工作选项的出现以及劳动力需求的变化。尽管劳动力市场和国际移民发生了巨大变化，但我们并未发现本地人口流动有任何显著变化。接着，使用面板回归和份额转移工具变量，我们发现，新冠疫情后移民的减少以及不同行业和州之间远程工作选项的差异化增加，与本地人口跨州流动的变化无关。我们讨论了移民减少和本地人口流动低迷对地方劳动力市场空缺职位的可能影响。

papers.title: Getting on the Map: The Impact of Online Listings on Business Performance
papers.authors: Michael Luca, Abhishek Nagaraj, Gauri Subramani
papers.abstract: We evaluate the extent to which small businesses maintain an online presence, looking at restaurant listings on a major online review platform. While the majority of restaurants have an online presence, we find that roughly 18 percent in our sample have no presence as of the end of 2017, despite being able to list their business for free. Using temporal variation in a restaurant's online presence as well as a natural experiment arising from a data acquisition that led over a thousand businesses to be added to the platform, we find that maintaining an online presence is valuable for small businesses. Establishing an online presence leads to a 5% revenue increase. Using data on customer reviews post-add, we explore potential channels that could explain why restaurants continue to remain offline despite potential benefits from digital representation. Consistent with models of voluntary disclosure, we find that businesses that had stayed offline until the acquisition ended up having lower ratings, on average, than those that added themselves or were added by customers.
papers.zh_title: 登上地图：在线列表对企业绩效的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了小企业维持在线存在的程度，重点关注一个主要在线评论平台上的餐厅列表。虽然大多数餐厅都有在线存在，但我们发现样本中约18%的餐厅截至2017年底没有任何在线存在，尽管它们可以免费列出自己的业务。利用餐厅在线存在的时间变化，以及一次导致超过一千家企业被添加到平台的数据收购所产生的自然实验，我们发现维持在线存在对小企业是有价值的。建立在线存在导致收入增加5%。利用添加后的客户评论数据，我们探讨了可能解释为什么餐厅尽管有数字化的潜在好处却仍保持离线的渠道。与自愿披露模型一致，我们发现，在收购前一直保持离线的企业，其平均评分低于那些自行添加或被客户添加的企业。

papers.title: Estimating Gravity from the Short to the Long Run: A Simple Solution to the 'International Elasticity Puzzle'
papers.authors: James E. Anderson, Yoto V. Yotov
papers.abstract: We propose a simple and flexible reduced-form econometric approach to estimate gravity models in the short and the long run. The theoretical lens for interpreting our methods amends the canonical Lucas-Prescott adjustment formulation to allow for time-interval-varying depreciation-cum-adjustment. A time-varying trade elasticity in the structural gravity model is implied. Our methods explain the 'international elasticity puzzle,' the discrepancy between trade elasticity estimates from the trade literature and the international real business cycle literature. The same theory-motivated estimating equation applied to the same data generates a distribution of trade elasticity estimates that vary from 0.4 in the short run to 4.8 in the long run. The results offer support for some existing theories of dynamic adjustment in trade costs and imply that the long-run equilibrium in our sample is reached in about 16 to 17 years.
papers.zh_title: 从短期到长期估计引力模型：解决“国际弹性之谜”的简单方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种简单且灵活的简化形式计量经济学方法，用于估计短期和长期的引力模型。解释我们方法的理论视角修正了经典的卢卡斯-普雷斯科特调整公式，允许时间间隔变化的折旧-调整参数。这隐含了结构性引力模型中随时间变化的贸易弹性。我们的方法解释了“国际弹性之谜”，即贸易文献与国际实际商业周期文献中贸易弹性估计值之间的差异。将同一理论驱动的估计方程应用于同一数据，会产生一系列贸易弹性估计值，从短期的0.4变化到长期的4.8。这些结果为一些现有的贸易成本动态调整理论提供了支持，并表明我们样本中的长期均衡大约在16到17年内达到。

papers.title: Dividend Taxation and Firm Performance with Heterogeneous Payout Responses
papers.authors: Katarzyna A. Bilicka, Irem Guceri, Evangelos Koumanakos
papers.abstract: We analyze the short and long-run performance of firms that were differentially affected by a new tax on dividends in the lead-up to the Global Financial Crisis. We use exogenous policy variation for firms with different legal statuses and financial year-end dates to causally identify the policy impact. Consistent with intertemporal tax arbitrage, immediately-affected firms significantly reduce payouts. At a time of severe liquidity shortage, the average firm uses the undistributed cash to pay back debt. In the long run, the allocation of undistributed cash to investment, retained earnings, and debt repayment predicts growth and the likelihood of bankruptcy.
papers.zh_title: 股息税与企业绩效：基于异质性派息反应的分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在全球金融危机前夕，受新股息税影响程度不同的企业的短期和长期绩效。我们利用不同法律地位和财务年度截止日期企业的外生政策变化来因果识别政策影响。与跨期税收套利一致，立即受影响的企业显著减少了派息。在严重流动性短缺时期，平均而言，企业将未分配的现金用于偿还债务。长期来看，未分配现金用于投资、留存收益和债务偿还的分配方式预测了企业增长和破产可能性。

papers.title: Non-parametric Gravity
papers.authors: James E. Anderson
papers.abstract: Non-parametric gravity as deﬁned in this paper encompasses previous parametric forms. The model generates non-parametric suﬃcient statistics for arbitrage gains from trade and terms of trade, and a non-parametric elasticity of terms of trade with respect to supply. For world manufacturing trade 2000-2014, China’s gains rose 2%yearly and terms of trade fell 8.3%. US gains fell 2% yearly and terms of trade rose 5.5%. Counterfactual industrial policy that raises US 2014 world sales share by 1% lowers US gains per unit 0.72%, leaving a surplus of 0.28%. A novel minimum distance estimator generates the CES trade elasticity required.
papers.zh_title: 非参数引力模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文定义的非参数引力模型涵盖了以往的参数形式。该模型为贸易套利收益和贸易条件生成了非参数的充分统计量，并给出了贸易条件相对于供给的非参数弹性。针对2000-2014年全球制造业贸易，中国的收益每年增长2%，而贸易条件下降了8.3%。美国的收益每年下降2%，贸易条件上升了5.5%。反事实的产业政策若将美国2014年全球销售份额提高1%，则会使美国单位收益下降0.72%，产生0.28%的盈余。一种新颖的最小距离估计量能够估算出所需的CES贸易弹性。

papers.title: Negotiations of Oil and Gas Auxiliary Lease Clauses: Evidence from Pennsylvania’s Marcellus Shale
papers.authors: Max Harleman, Pramod Manohar, Elaine L. Hill
papers.abstract: Oil and gas lease negotiations provide mineral owners the opportunity to negotiate for both compensation and clauses that may protect their health and the enjoyment of their properties. We use optical character recognition to assemble the most comprehensive dataset to date on royalty rates and clauses in nearly 60,000 leases signed in Pennsylvania’s Marcellus Shale. We leverage our data to produce three descriptive findings. First, we find a positive relationship between royalty rates and the prevalence of protective clauses. Second, we find that as development of the shale play progressed over time, royalty rates rose and leases became more likely to contain several protective clauses. Third, we find that royalty rates and the presence of protective clauses bear a weak relationship with the geologic productivity of nearby wells, explained by few firms competing in geographically segregated leasing markets. Some leases simultaneously containing higher royalty rates and more protective clauses suggests that there is a bargaining surplus in leasing markets, but the division of this surplus does not depend on the productivity of the mineral estate. Instead, it may reflect differing preferences, as well as differing negotiating skills, legal resources, and access to information. By documenting 43 clauses found in shale leases and their prevalence—more than double the number identified in past research—we provide critical information that can help mineral owners overcome information asymmetries and increase transparency and equity in leasing markets.
papers.zh_title: 油气辅助租赁条款的谈判：来自宾夕法尼亚州马塞勒斯页岩的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 油气租赁谈判为矿权所有者提供了就补偿以及可能保护其健康和财产享受的条款进行谈判的机会。我们利用光学字符识别技术，构建了迄今为止最全面的数据集，涵盖了宾夕法尼亚州马塞勒斯页岩地区近6万份已签署租赁合同中的特许权使用费率和条款。我们利用这些数据得出了三个描述性发现。第一，我们发现特许权使用费率与保护性条款的普遍性之间存在正相关关系。第二，我们发现，随着页岩气开发随时间推移而推进，特许权使用费率上升，且租赁合同更可能包含若干保护性条款。第三，我们发现，特许权使用费率和保护性条款的存在与附近井的地质生产力关系微弱，这可以解释为在地理上分割的租赁市场中，只有少数公司参与竞争。一些租赁合同同时包含更高的特许权使用费率和更多的保护性条款，这表明租赁市场存在谈判盈余，但该盈余的分配并不取决于矿产权益的生产力。相反，它可能反映了不同的偏好，以及不同的谈判技巧、法律资源和信息获取渠道。通过记录页岩租赁合同中发现的43种条款及其普遍性——这一数量是过去研究中识别出的两倍多——我们提供了关键信息，有助于矿权所有者克服信息不对称，提高租赁市场的透明度和公平性。

papers.title: Growing the Efficient Frontier on Panel Trees
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Guanhao Feng, Jingyu He, Xin He
papers.abstract: We develop a new class of tree-based models (P-Trees) for analyzing (unbalanced) panel data using economically guided, global (instead of local) split criteria that guard against overfitting while preserving sparsity and interpretability. To generalize security sorting and better estimate the efficient frontier, we grow a P-Tree top-down to split the cross section of asset returns to construct test assets and re-cover the stochastic discount factor under the mean-variance efficient framework, visualizing (asymmetric) nonlinear interactions among firm characteristics. When applied to U.S. equities, boosted (multi-factor) P-Trees significantly advance the efficient frontier relative to those constructed with established factors and common test assets. P-Tree test assets are diversified and exhibit significant unexplained alphas against benchmark models. The unified P-Tree factors outperform most known observable and latent factor models in pricing cross-sectional returns, delivering transparent and effective trading strategies. Beyond asset pricing, our framework offers a more interpretable and computationally efficient alternative to recent machine learning and AI models for analyzing panel data through goal-oriented, high-dimensional clustering.
papers.zh_title: 在面板树上增长有效前沿
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一类新的基于树的模型（P-Trees），用于分析（非平衡）面板数据。该模型采用经济引导的、全局（而非局部）的分裂准则，以防止过拟合，同时保持稀疏性和可解释性。为了推广证券分类并更好地估计有效前沿，我们自上而下地生长一棵P-Tree，以分割资产收益的横截面，从而构建测试资产，并在均值-方差有效框架下恢复随机贴现因子，可视化公司特征之间（非对称的）非线性交互作用。当应用于美国股票时，增强型（多因子）P-Trees相对于使用已建立因子和常见测试资产构建的有效前沿，显著推进了有效前沿。P-Tree测试资产是多样化的，并且相对于基准模型表现出显著无法解释的阿尔法。统一的P-Tree因子在定价横截面收益方面优于大多数已知的可观测和潜在因子模型，提供了透明且有效的交易策略。除了资产定价之外，我们的框架通过目标导向的高维聚类，为分析面板数据提供了一种比近期机器学习和人工智能模型更具可解释性和计算效率的替代方案。

papers.title: Picture This: Social Distance and the Mistreatment of Migrant Workers
papers.authors: Toman Barsbai, Vojtech Bartos, Victoria Licuanan, Andreas Steinmayr, Erwin Tiongson, Dean Yang
papers.abstract: International migrant workers are vulnerable to abuses by their employers. We implemented a randomized controlled trial of an intervention to reduce mistreatment of Filipino women working as domestic workers (DWs) by their household employers in Hong Kong and Saudi Arabia. The intervention -- encouraging DWs to show their employers a photo of their family while providing a small gift when starting employment -- caused DWs to experience less mistreatment, have higher satisfaction with the employer, and be more likely to stay with the employer. DWs' families in the Philippines also come to view international labor migration more positively, while they generally remain unaware of the intervention. An online experiment with potential employers in Hong Kong and the Middle East suggests that a mechanism behind the treatment effect is a reduction in the employer's perceived social distance from the employee.
papers.zh_title: 想象一下：社会距离与对移民工人的虐待
papers.zh_abstract: 国际移民工人容易受到雇主的虐待。我们实施了一项随机对照试验，评估一项旨在减少在香港和沙特阿拉伯担任家政工人的菲律宾女性遭受其家庭雇主虐待的干预措施。该干预措施——鼓励家政工人在开始工作时向雇主展示其家人的照片并赠送小礼物——导致家政工人遭受的虐待减少，对雇主的满意度提高，并且更有可能继续为雇主工作。在菲律宾的家政工人家庭也因此对国际劳务移民的看法更加积极，尽管他们通常不知道这项干预措施。一项针对香港和中东潜在雇主的在线实验表明，处理效应背后的一个机制是雇主感知到的与雇员之间的社会距离减小。

papers.title: Urban Renewal and Inequality: Evidence from Chicago's Public Housing Demolitions
papers.authors: Milena Almagro, Eric Chyn, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: This paper studies one of the largest spatially targeted redevelopment efforts implemented in the United States: public housing demolitions sponsored by the HOPE VI program. Focusing on Chicago, we study welfare and racial disparities in the impacts of demolitions using a structural model that features a rich set of equilibrium responses. Our results indicate that demolitions had notably heterogeneous effects where welfare decreased for low-income minority households and increased for White households. Counterfactual simulations explore how housing policy mitigates negative effects of demolitions and suggest that increased public housing site redevelopment is the most effective policy for reducing racial inequality.
papers.zh_title: 城市更新与不平等：来自芝加哥公共住房拆除的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国实施的最大规模的空间定向再开发项目之一：由HOPE VI计划资助的公共住房拆除。以芝加哥为研究对象，我们利用一个包含丰富均衡反应的结构模型，研究了拆除对福利和种族差异的影响。我们的结果表明，拆除产生了显著异质性的影响，其中低收入少数族裔家庭的福利下降，而白人家庭的福利上升。反事实模拟探讨了住房政策如何减轻拆除的负面影响，并表明增加公共住房场地再开发是减少种族不平等的最有效政策。

papers.title: Language Environment and Maternal Expectations: An Evaluation of the LENA Start Program
papers.authors: Flavio Cunha, Marsha Gerdes, Qinyou Hu, Snejana Nihtianova
papers.abstract: Research documents that parental beliefs influence early investments in children, which, in turn, determine early human capital and, eventually, other skills children acquire in later stages of the lifecycle, such as literacy. Our paper reports the results of an experimental evaluation of the LENA Start Program, a group- and center-based parenting program that teaches the science of early language development, models verbal interaction behaviors with children, and provides objective feedback to improve the early language environment. The intervention changes parental beliefs and impacts the quantity and quality of parental linguistic input.
papers.zh_title: 语言环境与母亲期望：LENA Start项目评估
papers.zh_abstract: 研究表明，父母的信念会影响对儿童的早期投资，而这又决定了早期人力资本，并最终影响儿童在生命周期后期阶段获得的其他技能，例如读写能力。本文报告了LENA Start项目的实验评估结果，该项目是一个以小组和中心为基础的育儿项目，教授早期语言发展的科学知识，示范与儿童进行语言互动的行为，并提供客观反馈以改善早期语言环境。该干预措施改变了父母的信念，并影响了父母语言输入的数量和质量。

papers.title: Willingness to Accept, Willingness to Pay, and Loss Aversion
papers.authors: Jonathan Chapman, Mark Dean, Pietro Ortoleva, Erik Snowberg, Colin Camerer
papers.abstract: We use four incentivized representative surveys to study the endowment effect for lotteries in 4,000 U.S. adults. We replicate the standard finding of an endowment effect—the divergence between Willingness to Accept (WTA) and Willingness to Pay (WTP), but document three new findings. First, we find little evidence that the endowment effect is related to loss aversion for risky prospects, counter to predictions of popular theories in economics. Second, WTA and WTP not only diverge, but are, at best, weakly correlated. Third, WTA and WTP strongly relate to other aspects of risk preferences. The structure of these behaviors points to different theories of the endowment effect.
papers.zh_title: 意愿接受、意愿支付与损失厌恶
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用四项激励相容的代表性调查，研究了4000名美国成年人对彩票的禀赋效应。我们复制了禀赋效应的标准发现——意愿接受（WTA）与意愿支付（WTP）之间的差异，但记录了三个新发现。首先，我们发现几乎没有证据表明禀赋效应与风险前景的损失厌恶有关，这与经济学中流行理论的预测相反。其次，WTA和WTP不仅存在差异，而且充其量只是弱相关。第三，WTA和WTP与风险偏好的其他方面密切相关。这些行为的结构指向了关于禀赋效应的不同理论。

papers.title: Water Treatment And Child Mortality: A Meta-Analysis And Cost-effectiveness Analysis
papers.authors: Michael Kremer, Stephen P. Luby, Ricardo Maertens, Brandon Tan, Witold Więcek
papers.abstract: Randomized controlled trials (RCTs) of water treatment are typically powered to detect effects on caregiver-reported diarrhea but not child mortality, as detecting mortality effects requires prohibitively large sample sizes. To increase statistical power, we conducted a systematic review and meta-analysis. We replicated search and selection criteria from previous meta-analyses of RCTs aimed at improving water quality to prevent diarrhea in low- or middle-income countries which included children under 5 years old. We identified 52 RCTs and then obtained child mortality data from each study for which these data were collected and available, contacting authors of the study where necessary; this resulted in 18 studies. Frequentist and Bayesian methods were used to estimate the intent-to-treat effect of water treatment on child mortality among included studies. We estimated a mean cross-study reduction in the odds of all-cause under-5 mortality of 24-27% (frequentist odds ratio, OR, 0.76; 95% CI 0.63 to 0.93; Bayes OR 0.73; 95% CI 0.52 to 0.95). The results were qualitatively similar under alternative modeling and data inclusion choices. Taking into account heterogeneity across studies, the expected reduction in a new study is 23%. We used the results to examine the cost-effectiveness of three water treatment approaches, point-of-collection chlorine dispensers, inline chlorination, and a program providing free chlorine solution through maternal and child health (MCH) services. After accounting for delivery costs, we estimate a cost per expected DALY averted due to water treatment between USD 28 and USD 72, depending on approach. This suggests that water treatment is one of the most cost-effective health programs available.
papers.zh_title: 水处理与儿童死亡率：一项荟萃分析与成本效益分析
papers.zh_abstract: 水处理的随机对照试验（RCT）通常以检测看护者报告的腹泻效应为统计功效设计目标，而非儿童死亡率，因为检测死亡率效应需要过大的样本量。为了提高统计功效，我们进行了系统综述和荟萃分析。我们复制了先前旨在改善中低收入国家5岁以下儿童饮用水质量以预防腹泻的RCT荟萃分析中的检索和筛选标准。我们识别出52项RCT，然后从每项收集并提供了儿童死亡率数据的研究中获取这些数据，必要时联系了研究作者；最终得到18项研究。我们使用频率学派和贝叶斯方法估计了纳入研究中水处理对儿童死亡率的意向性治疗效应。我们估计，跨研究平均而言，全因5岁以下儿童死亡率的比值降低了24-27%（频率学派比值比OR为0.76，95%置信区间0.63至0.93；贝叶斯比值比OR为0.73，95%置信区间0.52至0.95）。在替代建模和数据纳入选择下，结果定性相似。考虑到研究间的异质性，一项新研究中预期的降低幅度为23%。我们利用这些结果检验了三种水处理方法的成本效益：取水点氯分配器、管道氯化以及通过妇幼保健服务免费提供氯溶液的项目。在考虑交付成本后，我们估计因水处理而避免的每预期伤残调整生命年（DALY）的成本在28美元至72美元之间，具体取决于方法。这表明水处理是可用的最具成本效益的健康项目之一。

papers.title: An Anatomy of Crypto-Enabled Cybercrimes
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Campbell R. Harvey, Daniel Rabetti, Zong-Yu Wu
papers.abstract: While the advent of cryptocurrencies and digital assets holds promise for improving and disrupting financial systems by offering cheap, quick, and secure transfer of value, it also opens up new payment channels for cybercrimes. A prerequisite to solving a problem is understanding the nature of the problem. Assembling a diverse set of public, proprietary, and hand-collected data, including dark web conversations in Russian, we conduct the first detailed anatomy of crypto-enabled cybercrimes and highlight relevant economic issues. Our analyses reveal that a few organized ransomware gangs dominate the space and have evolved into sophisticated corporate-like operations with physical offices, franchising, and affiliation programs. Their techniques have also become more aggressive over time, entailing multiple layers of extortion and reputation management. Blanket restrictions on cryptocurrency usage may prove ineffective in tackling crypto-enabled cybercrime and hinder innovations. Instead, blockchain transparency and digital footprints enable effective forensics for tracking, monitoring, and shutting down dominant cybercriminal organizations.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, PR；JEL：H56, K24, O30
papers.zh_title: 加密货币网络犯罪剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管加密货币和数字资产的出现有望通过提供廉价、快速和安全的价值转移来改善和颠覆金融体系，但它也为网络犯罪开辟了新的支付渠道。解决问题的前提是理解问题的本质。通过整合包括俄语暗网对话在内的多种公开、专有和手工收集的数据，我们首次对加密货币网络犯罪进行了详细的剖析，并强调了相关的经济问题。我们的分析显示，少数有组织的勒索软件团伙主导了这一领域，并且已经演变成类似企业的复杂运作模式，拥有实体办公室、特许经营和联盟计划。随着时间的推移，他们的技术也变得更加激进，涉及多层勒索和声誉管理。对加密货币使用的全面限制可能无法有效打击加密货币网络犯罪，反而会阻碍创新。相反，区块链的透明度和数字足迹能够为追踪、监控和打击主要网络犯罪组织提供有效的取证手段。

papers.title: Where Are the Workers? From Great Resignation to Quiet Quitting
papers.authors: Dain Lee, Jinhyeok Park, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: To better understand the tight post-pandemic labor market in the US, we decompose the decline in aggregate hours worked into the extensive (fewer people working) and the intensive margin changes (workers working fewer hours). Although the pre-existing trend of lower labor force participation especially by young men without a bachelor's degree accounts for some of the decline in aggregate hours, the intensive margin accounts for more than half of the decline between 2019 and 2022. The decline in hours among workers was larger for men than women. Among men, the decline was larger for those with a bachelor's degree than those with less education, for prime-age workers than older workers, and also for those who already worked long hours and had high earnings. Workers' hours reduction can explain why the labor market is even tighter than what is expected at the current levels of unemployment and labor force participation.
papers.zh_title: 工人在哪里？从“大辞职潮”到“安静辞职”
papers.zh_abstract: 为了更好地理解美国疫情后紧张的劳动力市场，我们将总工作时间的下降分解为广延边际（工作人数减少）和集约边际（工人工作时间减少）的变化。尽管劳动力参与率下降的既有趋势（尤其是没有学士学位的年轻男性）解释了总工作时间下降的一部分原因，但集约边际解释了2019年至2022年间下降的一半以上。工人工作时间的减少在男性中比女性更大。在男性中，拥有学士学位的男性比受教育程度较低的男性减少得更多，壮年工人比老年工人减少得更多，而且那些已经工作时间长、收入高的人减少得也更多。工人工作时间的减少可以解释为什么劳动力市场比当前失业率和劳动力参与率水平所预期的更加紧张。

papers.title: Unstable Prosperity: How Globalization Made the World Economy More Volatile
papers.authors: Enrique G. Mendoza, Vincenzo Quadrini
papers.abstract: The sharp, secular decline in the world real interest rate of the past thirty years suggests that the surge in global demand for financial assets outpaced the growth in their supply. We argue that this phenomenon was driven by: (i) faster growth in emerging markets, (ii) changes in the financial structure of both emerging and advanced economies, and (iii) changes in demand and supply of public debt issued by advanced economies. We then show that the low-interest-rate environment made the world economy more vulnerable to financial crises. These findings are the quantitative predictions of a two-region model in which privately-issued financial assets (i.e., inside money) provide productive services but can be defaulted on.
papers.zh_title: 不稳定的繁荣：全球化如何使世界经济更加波动
papers.zh_abstract: 过去三十年世界实际利率急剧的长期下降表明，全球对金融资产的需求激增超过了其供给的增长。我们认为，这一现象是由以下因素驱动的：（i）新兴市场增长加快，（ii）新兴经济体和发达经济体金融结构的变化，以及（iii）发达经济体发行的公共债务需求和供给的变化。然后我们表明，低利率环境使世界经济更容易受到金融危机的影响。这些发现是一个两区域模型的定量预测，在该模型中，私人发行的金融资产（即内部货币）提供生产性服务，但可能发生违约。

papers.title: The Unintended Consequences of Test-Based Remediation
papers.authors: David N. Figlio, Umut Özek
papers.abstract: School systems around the world use achievement tests to assign students to schools, classes, and instructional resources, including remediation. Using a regression discontinuity design, we study a Florida policy that places middle school students who score below a proficiency cutoff into remedial classes. Students scoring below the cutoff receive more educational resources, but they are also placed in classes that are more segregated by race, socio-economic status, and prior achievement. Increased tracking occurs not only in the remedial subject, but also in other core subjects. These tracking effects are significantly larger and more likely to persist beyond the year of remediation for Black students.
papers.zh_title: 基于测试的补救措施的非预期后果
papers.zh_abstract: 世界各地的学校系统使用学业成就测试将学生分配到学校、班级和教学资源（包括补救措施）中。利用断点回归设计，我们研究了佛罗里达州的一项政策，该政策将成绩低于熟练度截止分数的中学生安排到补习班。分数低于截止分数的学生获得了更多的教育资源，但他们也被安排到按种族、社会经济地位和先前学业成就划分的更加隔离的班级中。增加的追踪不仅发生在补习科目上，也发生在其他核心科目上。对于黑人学生来说，这些追踪效应显著更大，并且更有可能持续到补习年份之后。

papers.title: International Spillover Effects of Air Pollution: Evidence from Mortality and Health Data
papers.authors: Seonmin Will Heo, Koichiro Ito, Rao Kotamarthi
papers.abstract: We study the international spillover effects of air pollution by developing a framework that integrates recent advances in atmospheric science into econometric estimation with microdata on mortality and health. Combining transboundary particle trajectory data with the universe of individual-level mortality and emergency room visit data in South Korea, we find that transboundary air pollution from China significantly increases mortality and morbidity in South Korea. Using these estimates, we show that a recent Chinese environmental policy “war on pollution” generated a substantial international spillover benefit. Finally, we examine China’s strategic pollution reductions and provide their implications for the potential Coasian bargaining.
papers.zh_title: 空气污染的国际溢出效应：来自死亡率和健康数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过开发一个框架来研究空气污染的国际溢出效应，该框架将大气科学的最新进展整合到使用死亡率和健康微观数据的计量经济学估计中。将跨境颗粒物轨迹数据与韩国个人层面的死亡率和急诊就诊数据相结合，我们发现来自中国的跨境空气污染显著增加了韩国的死亡率和发病率。利用这些估计值，我们表明中国最近的“污染防治攻坚战”环境政策产生了巨大的国际溢出效益。最后，我们考察了中国战略性的污染减排，并提供了其对潜在科斯式谈判的启示。

papers.title: A Simple Approach to Valuing Intangibles and Rents
papers.authors: Wan-Chien Chiu, Ravi Jagannathan, Yo-Lan Lin, Kevin Tseng
papers.abstract: We decompose the gap between a firm’s market and book values into capitalized-intangible-assets and a residual, consisting of value of capacity-adjustment-costs, economic-rents and potential mispricing. Our estimated parameter-values for capitalizing expenditures creating intangible-assets are consistent with values reported in the literature, even though we use a different approach. Firms with higher residuals have higher profitability and markups, lower labor share, face fewer product market threats, exhibit less sensitivity of investment to traditional as well as intangibles-adjusted Tobin’s Q, and benefited more from globalization during this century. This is consistent with there being a significant ex post rents-component in the residual.
papers.zh_title: 评估无形资产和租金的一种简单方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将公司市场价值与账面价值之间的差距分解为资本化的无形资产和剩余部分，剩余部分包括产能调整成本的价值、经济租金和潜在的错误定价。我们用于资本化创造无形资产的支出的估计参数值与文献中报告的值一致，尽管我们使用了不同的方法。剩余部分较高的公司具有更高的盈利能力和加成率、更低的劳动份额、面临更少的产品市场威胁、对传统以及无形资产调整后的托宾Q的投资敏感性较低，并且在本世纪从全球化中受益更多。这与剩余部分中存在显著的ex post租金成分是一致的。

papers.title: Price Destabilizing Speculation: The Role of Strategic Limit Orders
papers.authors: Suman Banerjee, Ravi Jagannathan, Kai Wang
papers.abstract: Using a two-period model of a commodity market with a large number of atomistic consumers and two strategic sellers, we show that a speculator with access to storage can lower the market price while buying and raise the price while selling by clever use of limit, stop-loss, and market orders. The speculator profits from it. This creates price volatility even though there is no demand or supply uncertainty, and all market participants act rationally. Prices are more volatile when the speculator has access to free disposal. Such speculative activity makes the strategic sellers worse off and consumers better off. Our results are robust to introducing demand uncertainty, having more than one large speculator, and more than two strategic sellers. When there are multiple strategic sellers consumers can be worse off.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G0, G1, G10, G12, G18, G19
papers.zh_title: 价格不稳定的投机：战略限价订单的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 使用一个包含大量原子消费者和两个战略卖家的商品市场两期模型，我们表明，一个能够使用仓储的投机者可以通过巧妙使用限价订单、止损订单和市价订单，在买入时压低市场价格，在卖出时抬高价格。投机者从中获利。即使没有需求或供给的不确定性，并且所有市场参与者都理性行事，这也会造成价格波动。当投机者可以免费处置时，价格波动更大。这种投机活动使战略卖家境况变差，消费者境况变好。我们的结果在引入需求不确定性、存在多个大型投机者和超过两个战略卖家时是稳健的。当存在多个战略卖家时，消费者可能境况变差。

papers.title: Reducing Bullying: Evidence from a Parental Involvement Program on Empathy Education
papers.authors: Flavio Cunha, Qinyou Hu, Yiming Xia, Naibao Zhao
papers.abstract: According to UNESCO, one-third of the world’s youths are victims of bullying, which deteriorates academic performance and mental health, and increases suicide ideation and the risk of committing suicide. This paper analyzes a four-month parent-directed intervention designed to foster empathy in middle schoolers in China. Our implementation and evaluation study enrolled 2,246 seventh and eighth graders and their parents, whom we assigned, at the classroom level, to the control or intervention condition randomly. We measured, before and after the intervention, parental investments, children’s empathy, and self-reported bullying perpetration and victimization incidents. Our analyses show that the intervention increased investments and empathy and reduced bullying incidents. In addition, we measured costs and found that it costs $12.50 for our intervention to reduce one bullying incident. Our study offers a scalable and low-cost strategy that can inform public policy on bullying prevention in other similar settings.
papers.zh_title: 减少欺凌：一项关于共情教育的家长参与项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 根据联合国教科文组织的数据，全球三分之一的青少年是欺凌的受害者，这会导致学业成绩和心理健康恶化，并增加自杀意念和自杀风险。本文分析了一个为期四个月的、旨在培养中国中学生共情能力的家长导向干预项目。我们的实施和评估研究招募了2246名七年级和八年级学生及其家长，我们在班级层面将他们随机分配到控制组或干预组。我们在干预前后测量了家长投入、孩子的共情能力以及自我报告的欺凌实施和受害事件。我们的分析表明，干预增加了投入和共情能力，并减少了欺凌事件。此外，我们测量了成本，发现我们的干预每减少一起欺凌事件花费12.50美元。我们的研究提供了一种可扩展且低成本的策略，可以为其他类似环境下的欺凌预防公共政策提供信息。

papers.title: Too Many Managers: The Strategic Use of Titles to Avoid Overtime Payments
papers.authors: Lauren Cohen, Umit Gurun, N. Bugra Ozel
papers.abstract: We find widespread evidence of firms avoiding overtime payments through the strategic use of “managerial” titles. Exploiting a federal mandate in the Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA), we find an almost five-fold increase in managerial title usage just over the regulatory threshold to avoid overtime payment, including suspect managerial listings such as “Directors of First Impression,” whose jobs are otherwise equivalent (in this case, to a front desk clerk). Overtime avoidance is more pronounced when firms have stronger bargaining power and employees have weaker rights. Moreover, firms utilize this more when they face financial constraints, as well as when their labor has weaker outside options. Lastly, firms make more use of overtime avoidance tactics in occupations with more volatility in labor demand and when there is more uncertainty in labor scheduling. We find no evidence of long-term employees benefits of these fake titles in terms of future wages or future career progression. In sum, our results are strongly consistent with firms using this flexible tool to their advantage where – and when – the tradeoff is most in their favor to do so. Our prediction dynamics align with litigation realizations and actions taken by the Department of Labor for workplace violations around wage theft precisely to this end. Moreover, the wages avoided are substantial - we estimate that firms avoid roughly 13.5% in compensation costs for each strategic “manager” hired.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：G30, G38, M51, M54
papers.zh_title: 太多经理：利用头衔策略性地避免加班费
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现了企业通过策略性地使用“管理”头衔来避免支付加班费的广泛证据。利用《公平劳动标准法》中的一项联邦规定，我们发现，刚好超过避免加班费监管门槛的管理头衔使用量增加了近五倍，包括可疑的管理职位列表，例如“第一印象总监”，其工作内容在其他方面是等同的（在这种情况下，等同于前台职员）。当企业拥有更强的议价能力且员工权利较弱时，加班费规避更为明显。此外，当企业面临财务约束以及其劳动力的外部选择较弱时，企业会更多地利用这一点。最后，在劳动力需求波动较大的职业以及劳动力排班不确定性较高时，企业会更多地使用加班费规避策略。我们没有发现这些虚假头衔在长期工资或未来职业发展方面对员工有利的证据。总之，我们的结果强烈表明，企业在那些——以及那些时候——权衡最有利于它们的地方和时间，利用这一灵活工具为自己谋利。我们的预测动态与围绕工资盗窃的职场违规行为的诉讼实现和劳工部采取的行动相一致，正是为了达到这一目的。此外，被规避的工资数额巨大——我们估计，每策略性地雇佣一名“经理”，企业大约可以避免13.5%的薪酬成本。

papers.title: Biased Memory and Perceptions of Self-Control
papers.authors: Afras Y. Sial, Justin R. Sydnor, Dmitry Taubinsky
papers.abstract: Using field-experimental data on gym attendance, we analyze the relationship between imperfect memory and people’s awareness of their limited self-control. We develop a model that generates predictions about how imperfect recall is linked to forecasts and demand for behavior change, and we develop techniques for testing whether recall is selective. Empirically, we find that people overestimate both past and future attendance, and are more likely to recall attendances than absences. Larger overestimation of past attendance is associated with (i) more overestimation of future attendance, (ii) a lower willingness to pay to motivate higher future attendance, and (iii) a smaller gap between goal and forecasted attendance. Additionally, we find suggestive evidence that memory is motivated. We link biased memory to structural estimates of quasi-hyperbolic discounting with naivete.
papers.zh_title: 有偏记忆与自我控制感知
papers.zh_abstract: 利用健身房出勤的实地实验数据，我们分析了不完美记忆与人们对自身有限自我控制认知之间的关系。我们构建了一个模型，用于预测不完美回忆如何与行为改变的预测和需求相关联，并开发了检验回忆是否具有选择性的技术。实证发现，人们会高估过去和未来的出勤率，并且更容易回忆起出勤而非缺席。对过去出勤率的高估程度越大，与以下现象相关：(i) 对未来出勤率的高估程度也越大，(ii) 为激励未来更高出勤率而支付的意愿越低，以及 (iii) 目标与预测出勤率之间的差距越小。此外，我们发现了暗示记忆具有动机性的证据。我们将有偏记忆与包含天真预期的准双曲贴现的结构性估计联系起来。

papers.title: The Impact of Privatization: Evidence from the Hospital Sector
papers.authors: Mark Duggan, Atul Gupta, Emilie Jackson, Zachary S. Templeton
papers.abstract: Privatization has been shown to increase the growth and profitability of government-owned firms. However, the effects on consumers have been understudied. We study potential trade- offs in the US hospital sector, where government control of capacity declined by 42% over 1983–2019. Private operators may improve hospitals’ financial viability and reduce the need for subsidies, but a focus on profitability may adversely affect access for unprofitable low-income patients and care quality. Combining multiple patient- and hospital-level administrative datasets with national hospital survey data, we study 258 hospital privatizations during the 2000–2018 period. Private operators increase profitability through a reduction in employment and an increase in the mean revenue per patient. The latter is achieved by cream-skimming more profitable patients and services, as well as by increasing prices. However, we detect an increase in mortality rates among elderly (aged 65+) patients, suggesting a decline in care quality. We also find a decrease in aggregate admissions of low-income patients at the market level and an increase in mortality among the near-elderly (ages 55–64), particularly in low-income markets. Overall, we estimate that the 258 hospital privatizations led to approximately 920 additional deaths per year and $694 million in annual savings for local governments by the end of our study period.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE, PR；JEL：H11, I11, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 私有化的影响：来自医院部门的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 已有研究表明，私有化能提高政府所有企业的增长和盈利能力。然而，其对消费者的影响研究不足。我们研究了美国医院部门中潜在的权衡，该部门在1983年至2019年间政府控制的能力下降了42%。私营运营商可能改善医院的财务可行性并减少补贴需求，但对盈利能力的关注可能对无利可图的低收入患者的可及性和护理质量产生不利影响。结合多个患者和医院层面的行政数据集以及全国医院调查数据，我们研究了2000年至2018年期间的258次医院私有化。私营运营商通过减少就业和增加每位患者的平均收入来提高盈利能力。后者是通过筛选更有利可图的患者和服务以及提高价格来实现的。然而，我们发现老年（65岁以上）患者的死亡率上升，表明护理质量下降。我们还发现，在市场层面，低收入患者的总体入院人数减少，且接近老年（55-64岁）人群的死亡率上升，尤其是在低收入市场中。总体而言，我们估计，到研究期末，这258次医院私有化每年导致约920例额外死亡，并为地方政府节省了6.94亿美元。

papers.title: Monopsony, Job Tasks, and Labor Market Concentration
papers.authors: Samuel Dodini, Michael F. Lovenheim, Kjell G. Salvanes, Alexander Willén
papers.abstract: This paper extends the literature on monopsony and labor market concentration by taking a task-based approach and estimating the causal effect of concentration in the demand for skills on labor market outcomes. The prior literature has focused on industry and occupation concentration and likely overstates the degree of monopsony power, since worker skills are substitutable across different firms, occupations, and industries. Exploiting linked employer-employee data that cover the universe of Norwegian workers over time, we find that our job task-based measure shows lower degrees of concentration than the conventional industry-and occupation-based measures. We also find that the gender gap in concentration is substantially larger using this measure. Exploiting mass layoffs and establishment closures as exogenous shocks to local labor demand, we show that workers who experience a mass separation have substantially worse subsequent labor market outcomes when they are in more concentrated labor markets defined by skill clusters. Our results point to the existence of employer market power in the economy that is driven by the concentration of skill demand across firms.
papers.zh_title: 买方垄断、工作任务与劳动力市场集中度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过采用基于任务的方法，并估计技能需求集中度对劳动力市场结果的因果效应，扩展了关于买方垄断和劳动力市场集中度的文献。先前的研究侧重于行业和职业集中度，可能夸大了买方垄断力量的程度，因为工人技能在不同企业、职业和行业之间是可替代的。利用覆盖挪威工人全体的长期关联雇主-雇员数据，我们发现，基于工作任务测度的集中度低于传统的基于行业和职业的测度。我们还发现，使用该测度时，性别集中度差距显著更大。利用大规模裁员和企业关闭作为地方劳动力需求的外生冲击，我们表明，经历大规模失业的工人在技能集群定义的更集中劳动力市场中，其后续劳动力市场结果显著更差。我们的结果指向经济中存在由跨企业技能需求集中度驱动的雇主市场力量。

papers.title: The Beta-Delta-DELTA Sweet Spot
papers.authors: David Laibson, Peter Maxted
papers.abstract: When solving discrete-time consumption models with present-biased time preferences, backwards induction generates equilibria that are non-robust in the sense that policy functions are often sensitive to parameter choices, including the modeler's choice of the time-step. The current paper identifies a range of "sweet-spot" time-steps that (i) contains the psychologically relevant present bias horizons, and, (ii) generates numerically indistinguishable (i.e., robust) policy functions. This sweet spot includes both a computationally feasible range of discrete-time cases and the limiting continuous-time case (Harris and Laibson, 2013). Accordingly, researchers modeling present bias in buffer stock models can choose either discrete-time cases calibrated to be in the sweet spot or the analytically tractable continuous-time case; these approaches yield essentially identical policy functions.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：C6, D15, D9, D99, E03, E21, E7, G51
papers.zh_title: Beta-Delta-DELTA 最佳区间
papers.zh_abstract: 在求解具有现时偏好的离散时间消费模型时，逆向归纳产生的均衡是非稳健的，因为策略函数通常对参数选择（包括建模者对时间步长的选择）敏感。本文确定了一个“最佳”时间步长范围，该范围 (i) 包含心理学上相关的现时偏好时间跨度，并且 (ii) 生成数值上无法区分（即稳健）的策略函数。这个最佳区间既包括计算上可行的离散时间情况，也包括极限的连续时间情况（Harris 和 Laibson, 2013）。因此，在缓冲库存模型中建模现时偏好的研究者可以选择校准到最佳区间的离散时间情况，或者解析上易处理的连续时间情况；这些方法产生本质上相同的策略函数。

papers.title: Why Did Gender Wage Convergence in the United States Stall?
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Benjamin Posmanick
papers.abstract: During the 1980s, the wage gap between white women and white men in the US declined by approximately 1 percentage point per year. In the decades since, the rate of gender wage convergence has stalled to less than one-third of its previous value. An outstanding puzzle in economics is "why did gender wage convergence in the US stall?" Using an event study design that exploits the timing of state and federal family-leave policies, we show that the introduction of the policies can explain 94% of the reduction in the rate of gender wage convergence that is unaccounted for after controlling for changes in observable characteristics of workers. If gender wage convergence had continued at the pre-family leave rate, wage parity between white women and white men would have been achieved as early as 2017.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：J16, J31, J32
papers.zh_title: 美国性别工资趋同为何停滞？
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪80年代，美国白人女性与白人男性之间的工资差距每年下降约1个百分点。在此后的几十年里，性别工资趋同的速度已放缓至不到之前的三分之一。经济学中的一个突出难题是“美国性别工资趋同为何停滞？”利用利用州和联邦家庭休假政策实施时间的事件研究设计，我们表明，在控制了工人可观测特征的变化后，这些政策的引入可以解释性别工资趋同速度下降中未被解释部分的94%。如果性别工资趋同以家庭休假政策实施前的速度继续，白人女性与白人男性之间的工资平等最早可能在2017年实现。

papers.title: Information Cascades and Threshold Implementation: Theory and An Application to Crowdfunding
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Yizhou Xiao
papers.abstract: Economic interactions, such as crowdfunding, often involve sequential actions, observational learning, and contingent project implementation. We incorporate all-or-nothing thresholds in a canonical model of information cascades. Early supporters effectively delegate their decisions to a "gatekeeper," resulting in uni-directional cascades without herding on rejections. Project proposers consequently can charge higher prices. Proposal feasibility, project selection, and information aggregation all improve, even when agents can wait. Equilibrium outcomes depend on the crowd size, and project implementation and information aggregation achieve efficiency in the large-crowd limit. Our key insights remain robust under thresholds in dollar amounts, alternative equilibrium selection, among other model extensions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PR；JEL：D81, D83, G12, G14
papers.zh_title: 信息级联与门槛实施：理论及众筹应用
papers.zh_abstract: 经济互动（例如众筹）通常涉及顺序行动、观察性学习和有条件项目执行。我们将全有或全无门槛纳入信息级联的经典模型中。早期支持者有效地将决策委托给一个“看门人”，导致单向级联，而不会出现对拒绝的从众行为。因此，项目发起人可以收取更高的价格。即使代理人可以等待，提案可行性、项目选择和信息聚合都会得到改善。均衡结果取决于群体规模，并且在群体规模趋于无穷大时，项目执行和信息聚合达到效率。我们的关键见解在美元金额门槛、替代均衡选择以及其他模型扩展下仍然稳健。

papers.title: The Fiscal Consequences of Missing an Inflation Target
papers.authors: Michele Andreolli, Hélène Rey
papers.abstract: The European Central Bank is unique in setting monetary policy for several sovereign states with heterogeneous debt levels and different maturity structures. The monetary-fiscal nexus is central to the functioning of the euro area. We focus on one particular aspect of that nexus, the effect the reliability of the European Central Bank's monetary policy on public finances. We show that when the ECB misses its inflation target this has large heterogeneous fiscal consequences for Euro Area countries. For comparison we also estimate the fiscal consequences of the Federal Reserve and the Bank of England missing their inflation targets. They are also sizeable.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E31, E44, E52, E60, F45, H63
papers.zh_title: 未达到通胀目标的财政后果
papers.zh_abstract: 欧洲央行在为多个拥有不同债务水平和不同期限结构的主权国家制定货币政策方面是独一无二的。货币-财政关系是欧元区运作的核心。我们关注该关系的特定方面，即欧洲央行货币政策的可靠性对公共财政的影响。我们表明，当欧洲央行未达到其通胀目标时，这会对欧元区国家产生巨大的异质性财政后果。为了比较，我们还估计了美联储和英格兰银行未达到其通胀目标的财政后果。这些后果也相当可观。

papers.title: Revisiting the Connection Between State Medicaid Expansions and Adult Mortality
papers.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Jordan W. Jones, Antonios M. Koumpias, Daniela Zapata
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of Medicaid expansions to parents and childless adults on adult mortality. Specifically, we evaluate the long-run effects of eight state Medicaid expansions from 1994 through 2005 on all-cause, healthcare-amenable, non-healthcare-amenable, and HIV-related mortality rates using state-level data. We utilize the synthetic control method to estimate effects for each treated state separately and the generalized synthetic control method to estimate average effects across all treated states. Using a 5% significance level, we find no evidence that Medicaid expansions affect any of the outcomes in any of the treated states or all of them combined. Moreover, there is no clear pattern in the signs of the estimated treatment effects. These findings imply that evidence that pre-ACA Medicaid expansions to adults saved lives is not as clear as previously suggested.
papers.zh_title: 重新审视州级医疗补助扩展与成人死亡率之间的联系
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了医疗补助扩展至父母和无子女成年人对成人死亡率的影响。具体而言，我们利用州级数据评估了1994年至2005年间八次州级医疗补助扩展对全因死亡率、医疗可避免死亡率、非医疗可避免死亡率以及HIV相关死亡率的长期影响。我们采用合成控制法分别估计每个处理州的效果，并使用广义合成控制法估计所有处理州的平均效果。在5%的显著性水平下，我们没有发现证据表明医疗补助扩展对任何处理州或所有处理州合并后的任何结果产生影响。此外，估计处理效应的符号也没有明确的模式。这些发现意味着，关于《平价医疗法案》前医疗补助扩展至成年人能挽救生命的证据并不像之前所表明的那样清晰。

papers.title: Target Retirement Fund: A Variant on Target Date Funds that uses Deferred Life Annuities rather than Bonds to Reduce Risk as Retirement Approaches
papers.authors: John B. Shoven, Daniel B. Walton
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates a new variant of the popular target date funds used in employer-based retirement savings plans. We call this new variant a “target retirement plan.” Instead of increasing the allocation to bond funds as retirement approaches, a target retirement fund gradually purchases deferred life annuities beginning at age 50. In the particular straw model target retirement fund examined in the paper, the defined contribution participant makes deferred life annuity purchases at ages 50, 52, 54, 56, 58, 60 and 62. We compare how a target retirement fund participant would fare compared with someone who stays with a traditional TDF until retirement and then buys an immediate life annuity. We examine 1,000 possible 30-year futures for stock returns, bond fund returns and Treasury interest rates. The main result from this paper is that buying a retirement annuity in advance (by accumulating deferred life annuities) is superior to sticking with a Target Date Fund until retirement and then buying an immediate annuity in most scenarios of future stock returns, interest rates and bond returns.
papers.zh_title: 目标退休基金：一种目标日期基金的变体，利用递延终身年金而非债券来降低临近退休时的风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了雇主型退休储蓄计划中流行的目标日期基金的一种新变体。我们将这种新变体称为“目标退休计划”。与临近退休时增加债券基金配置不同，目标退休基金从50岁开始逐步购买递延终身年金。在本文考察的特定稻草人模型目标退休基金中，固定缴款计划参与者在50岁、52岁、54岁、56岁、58岁、60岁和62岁时进行递延终身年金购买。我们比较了目标退休基金参与者与坚持传统目标日期基金直至退休、然后购买即期终身年金的参与者的表现。我们考察了股票回报、债券基金回报和国债利率的1000种可能的30年期未来情景。本文的主要结论是：在大多数未来股票回报、利率和债券回报情景下，提前购买退休年金（通过积累递延终身年金）优于坚持目标日期基金直至退休、然后购买即期年金。

papers.title: Man vs. Machine: Technological Promise and Political Limits of Automated Regulation Enforcement
papers.authors: Oliver Browne, Ludovica Gazze, Michael Greenstone, Olga Rostapshova
papers.abstract: New technologies allow perfect detection of environmental violations at near-zero marginal cost, but take-up is low. We conducted a field experiment to evaluate enforcement of water conservation rules with smart meters in Fresno, CA. Households were randomly assigned combinations of enforcement method (automated or in-person inspections) and fines. Automated enforcement increased households’ punishment rates from 0.1 to 14%, decreased summer water use by 3%, and reduced violations by 17%, while higher fine levels had little effect. However, automated enforcement also increased customer complaints by 1,102%, ultimately causing its cancellation and highlighting that political considerations limit technological solutions to enforcement challenges.
papers.zh_title: 人与机器：自动化监管执法的技术承诺与政治限制
papers.zh_abstract: 新技术能够以接近零的边际成本完美检测环境违规行为，但采用率很低。我们在加利福尼亚州弗雷斯诺进行了一项实地实验，评估利用智能水表执行节水规定的效果。家庭被随机分配执法方式（自动化或人工检查）与罚款金额的组合。自动化执法将家庭的处罚率从0.1%提高到14%，夏季用水量减少3%，违规行为减少17%，而更高的罚款水平影响甚微。然而，自动化执法也使客户投诉增加了1102%，最终导致其被取消，这凸显了政治因素限制了执法挑战的技术解决方案。

papers.title: Achieving Universal Health Insurance Coverage in the United States: Addressing Market Failures or Providing a Social Floor?
papers.authors: Katherine Baicker, Amitabh Chandra, Mark Shepard
papers.abstract: The United States spends substantially more on health care than most developed countries, yet leaves a greater share of the population uninsured. We suggest that incremental insurance expansions focused on addressing market failures will propagate inefficiencies and are not likely to facilitate active policy decisions that align with societal coverage goals. By instead defining a basic bundle of services that is publicly financed for all, while allowing individuals to purchase additional coverage, policymakers could both expand coverage and maintain incentives for innovation, fostering universal access to innovative care in an affordable system.
papers.zh_title: 在美国实现全民健康保险覆盖：解决市场失灵还是提供社会底线？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国在医疗保健上的支出远高于大多数发达国家，但却有更大比例的人口没有保险。我们认为，专注于解决市场失灵的渐进式保险扩张将传播低效率，并且不太可能促进与社会覆盖目标一致的积极政策决策。相反，通过定义一个由公共资金为所有人提供的基本服务包，同时允许个人购买额外保险，政策制定者既可以扩大覆盖范围，又可以保持创新激励，从而在一个可负担的系统中促进全民获得创新医疗服务。

papers.title: Fixed and Variable Longevity Annuities in Defined Contribution Plans: Optimal Retirement Portfolios Taking Social Security into Account
papers.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: This paper investigates retirees’ optimal purchases of fixed and variable longevity income annuities using their defined contribution (DC) plan assets and given their expected Social Security benefits. As an alternative, we also evaluate using plan assets to boost Social Security benefits through delayed claiming. We determine that including deferred income annuities in DC accounts is welfare enhancing for all sex/education groups examined. We also show that providing access to well-designed variable deferred annuities with some equity exposure further enhances retiree wellbeing, compared to having access only to fixed annuities. Nevertheless, for the least educated, delaying claiming Social Security is preferred, whereas the most educated benefit more from using accumulated DC plan assets to purchase deferred annuities.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：D91, G11, G14, G22, G53
papers.zh_title: 固定与可变长寿年金在固定缴款计划中的应用：考虑社会保障的最优退休投资组合
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了退休人员如何利用其固定缴款计划资产，并在考虑预期社会保障福利的情况下，最优地购买固定和可变长寿收入年金。作为替代方案，我们还评估了通过延迟领取社会保障来利用计划资产增加福利的效果。我们确定，在固定缴款账户中包含递延收入年金对所有性别/教育群体都有福利提升作用。我们还表明，与仅能获得固定年金相比，提供具有部分股票敞口的精心设计的可变递延年金能进一步提高退休人员的福祉。然而，对于受教育程度最低的人群，延迟领取社会保障更受青睐，而受教育程度最高的人群则更能从使用积累的固定缴款计划资产购买递延年金中受益。

papers.title: Predicting and Preventing Gun Violence: An Experimental Evaluation of READI Chicago
papers.authors: Monica P. Bhatt, Sara B. Heller, Max Kapustin, Marianne Bertrand, Christopher Blattman
papers.abstract: Gun violence is the most pressing public safety problem in American cities. We report results from a randomized controlled trial (N = 2, 456) of a community-researcher partnership called the Rapid Employment and Development Initiative (READI) Chicago. The program offered an 18-month job alongside cognitive behavioral therapy and other social support. Both algorithmic and human referral methods identified men with strikingly high scope for gun violence reduction: for every 100 people in the control group, there were 11 shooting and homicide victimizations during the 20-month outcome period. Fifty-five percent of the treatment group started programming, comparable to take-up rates in programs for people facing far lower mortality risk. After 20 months, there is no statistically significant change in an index combining three measures of serious violence, the study’s primary outcome. Yet there are signs that this program model has promise. One of the three measures, shooting and homicide arrests, declines 65 percent (p = 0.13 after multiple testing adjustment). Because shootings are so costly, READI generates estimated social savings between $182,000 and $916,000 per participant (p = 0.03), implying a benefit-cost ratio between 4:1 and 18:1. Moreover, participants referred by outreach workers—a pre-specified subgroup—show enormous declines in both arrests and victimizations for shootings and homicides (79 and 43 percent, respectively) that remain statistically significant even after multiple testing adjustments. These declines are concentrated among outreach referrals with higher predicted risk, suggesting that human and algorithmic targeting may work better together.
papers.zh_title: 预测与预防枪支暴力：READI芝加哥项目的实验评估
papers.zh_abstract: 枪支暴力是美国城市最紧迫的公共安全问题。我们报告了一项名为“快速就业与发展倡议”芝加哥项目的社区-研究者合作随机对照试验（N=2,456）的结果。该项目提供为期18个月的工作，同时提供认知行为疗法和其他社会支持。算法和人工推荐方法都识别出男性中枪支暴力减少潜力极高的人群：对照组中每100人就有11人在20个月的结果期内成为枪击和凶杀受害者。55%的治疗组开始参与项目，这与针对死亡风险低得多人群的项目的参与率相当。20个月后，作为研究主要结果的、结合了三种严重暴力衡量指标的指数没有统计学显著变化。然而，有迹象表明这种项目模式具有前景。其中一项衡量指标——枪击和凶杀逮捕——下降了65%（多重检验调整后p=0.13）。由于枪击事件代价高昂，READI项目为每位参与者带来了估计在182,000美元至916,000美元之间的社会节省（p=0.03），意味着效益成本比在4:1至18:1之间。此外，由外展工作人员推荐的参与者——一个预先指定的子群体——在枪击和凶杀的逮捕与受害方面均显示出巨大下降（分别为79%和43%），即使在多重检验调整后仍具有统计学显著性。这些下降集中在预测风险较高的外展推荐人群中，表明人工和算法定位可能协同作用更好。

papers.title: Mandatory Seatbelt Laws and Traffic Fatalities: A Reassessment
papers.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Yang Liang, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Using data from the Fatality Analysis Reporting System for the period 1983-1997, Cohen and Einav (Review of Economics and Statistics 2003; 85(4): 828–843) found that mandatory seatbelt laws were associated with a 4 to 6 percent reduction in traffic fatalities among motor vehicle occupants. After successfully replicating their two-way fixed effects estimates, we (1) add 22 years of data (1998-2019) to capture additional seatbelt policy variation and observe a longer post-treatment period, (2) employ the interaction-weighted estimator proposed by Sun and Abraham (2021) to address potential bias due to heterogeneous and dynamic treatment effects, and (3) estimate event-study models to investigate pre-treatment trends and explore lagged post-treatment effects. Consistent with Cohen and Einav (2003), our updated estimates show that primary seatbelt laws are associated with a 5 to 9 percent reduction in fatalities among motor vehicle occupants. Estimated effects of secondary seatbelt laws are smaller in magnitude and sensitive to model choice.
papers.zh_title: 强制安全带法与交通事故死亡：重新评估
papers.zh_abstract: Cohen和Einav（《经济学与统计学评论》2003；85(4): 828–843）使用1983-1997年期间致命事故分析报告系统的数据发现，强制安全带法与机动车乘员交通事故死亡人数减少4%至6%相关。在成功复制他们的双向固定效应估计后，我们（1）增加了22年（1998-2019年）的数据以捕捉额外的安全带政策变化并观察更长的处理后期，（2）采用Sun和Abraham（2021）提出的交互加权估计量来解决因异质性和动态处理效应导致的潜在偏差，以及（3）估计事件研究模型以调查处理前趋势并探索滞后的处理后效应。与Cohen和Einav（2003）一致，我们更新的估计显示，主要安全带法与机动车乘员死亡人数减少5%至9%相关。次要安全带法的估计效应幅度较小，且对模型选择敏感。

papers.title: A Simple Rational Expectations Model of the Voltage Effect
papers.authors: Omar Al-Ubaydli, Chien-Yu Lai, John A. List
papers.abstract: The “voltage effect” is defined as the tendency for a program’s efficacy to change when it is scaled up, which in most cases results in the absolute size of a program’s treatment effects to diminish when the program is scaled. Understanding the scaling problem and taking steps to diminish voltage drops are important because if left unaddressed, the scaling problem can weaken the public’s faith in science, and it can lead to a misallocation of public resources. There exists a growing literature illustrating the prevalence of the scaling problem, explaining its causes, and proposing countermeasures. This paper adds to the literature by providing a simple model of the scaling problem that is consistent with rational expectations by the key stakeholders. Our model highlights that asymmetric information is a key contributor to the voltage effect.
papers.zh_title: 电压效应的一个简单理性预期模型
papers.zh_abstract: “电压效应”被定义为项目在扩大规模时其有效性发生变化的趋势，在大多数情况下，这会导致项目处理效应的绝对规模在项目扩大时减小。理解规模问题并采取措施减少电压下降非常重要，因为如果不加以解决，规模问题会削弱公众对科学的信心，并可能导致公共资源的错配。已有越来越多的文献说明了规模问题的普遍性，解释了其原因，并提出了对策。本文通过提供一个与关键利益相关者理性预期相一致的简单规模问题模型，为文献做出了贡献。我们的模型强调，信息不对称是电压效应的一个关键促成因素。

papers.title: The Aggregate Effects of Global and Local Supply Chain Disruptions: 2020–2022
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Shafaat Y. Khan, Armen Khederlarian, Carter B. Mix, Kim J. Ruhl
papers.abstract: We study the aggregate effects of supply-chain disruptions in the post-pandemic period in a heterogeneous-firm, general equilibrium model with input-output linkages and a rich set of supply chain frictions: uncertain shipping delays, fixed order costs, and storage costs. Firms optimally hold inventories that depend on the source of supply, domestic or imported. Increases in shipping times are contractionary, raise prices, and increase stockouts, particularly for goods intensive in delayed inputs. These effects are larger when inventories are already at low levels. We fit the model to the U.S. and global economies from 2020–2022 and estimate large aggregate effects of supply disruptions. Our model predicts that the boost in output from reducing delays will be smaller than the contraction from the waning effects of stimulus.
papers.zh_title: 全球与局部供应链中断的总体效应：2020–2022年
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了后疫情时期供应链中断在异质性企业一般均衡模型中的总体效应，该模型包含投入产出关联以及一系列供应链摩擦：不确定的运输延误、固定订单成本和仓储成本。企业根据国内或进口供应来源，最优地持有库存。运输时间的增加具有紧缩效应，推高价格，并加剧缺货，尤其是对于依赖延迟投入的商品。当库存已处于低位时，这些效应更为显著。我们将模型拟合至2020–2022年的美国和全球经济，并估计出供应中断的巨大总体效应。我们的模型预测，减少延误带来的产出提升将小于刺激措施效应消退所导致的产出收缩。

papers.title: Suboptimal Household Investment and Information-Processing Frictions: Evidence from 529 College Savings Plans
papers.authors: James J. Li, Olivia S. Mitchell, Christina Zhu
papers.abstract: We use the 529 college savings plan setting to investigate whether and why households make suboptimal choices to invest in local assets. We estimate that 67% of open accounts between 2010 and 2020 were located suboptimally, due to the plans’ tax inefficiencies and high expenses. Over the accounts’ projected lifetimes, such investments yielded expected losses of 8% on average, or $15.6 billion in 2020 alone. We then investigate why suboptimal investment is so prevalent. Consistent with households’ lack of understanding of state-level tax benefits, we find that a meaningful proportion of households does not account for the potential tax benefits and costs of local versus nonlocal 529 investment. Household financial literacy and plan disclosure complexity appear to explain suboptimal investment patterns, which further supports the role of information-processing frictions. Our study presents novel evidence on individuals’ preferences for local assets and how information-processing frictions shape their investment decisions, reducing their financial well-being.
papers.zh_title: 家庭次优投资与信息处理摩擦：来自529大学储蓄计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用529大学储蓄计划这一场景，研究家庭是否以及为何做出投资本地资产的次优选择。我们估计，2010年至2020年间，67%的开立账户因计划的税收低效和高费用而处于次优位置。在账户的预计存续期内，此类投资平均造成8%的预期损失，仅2020年就达156亿美元。随后，我们探究次优投资为何如此普遍。与家庭缺乏对州级税收优惠的理解相一致，我们发现相当一部分家庭并未考虑本地与非本地529投资的潜在税收收益和成本。家庭金融素养和计划披露的复杂性似乎解释了次优投资模式，这进一步支持了信息处理摩擦的作用。我们的研究提供了关于个人对本地资产偏好的新证据，以及信息处理摩擦如何塑造其投资决策并降低其财务福祉。

papers.title: Like an Ink Blot on Paper: Testing the Diffusion Hypothesis of Mass Migration, Italy 1876-1920
papers.authors: Yannay Spitzer, Ariell Zimran
papers.abstract: To explain the evolution of mass migration from Italy (1876--1920), we introduce the diffusion hypothesis, which augments traditional models of migration by allowing the spatial diffusion of migration over social networks in the country of origin. We test and validate the predictions of this theory using a new and comprehensive municipality- and district-level panel of emigration data over four decades. Italian migration began in a few separate epicenters from which it expanded gradually over time in an orderly spatial movement that dominated local push factors. While the main patterns that we document are parsimoniously explained by the diffusion hypothesis, they are difficult to rationalize by alternative theories. Confirming the diffusion hypothesis in the Italian case suggests that networks may be far more important than is commonly understood in shaping other movements of mass migration and may shape them in ways that have not previously been understood.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS；JEL：F22, J61, N33, N34
papers.zh_title: 如墨渍在纸上：检验大规模移民的扩散假说，意大利1876-1920年
papers.zh_abstract: 为解释意大利（1876–1920年）大规模移民的演变，我们提出了扩散假说，该假说通过允许移民在原籍国社会网络中的空间扩散，对传统移民模型进行了补充。我们利用跨越四十年的全新、全面的市镇和地区层面移民面板数据，检验并验证了这一理论的预测。意大利移民始于几个独立的中心，随后随着时间的推移，以一种有序的空间运动逐渐扩展，主导了当地的推力因素。虽然我们记录的主要模式被扩散假说简洁地解释，但它们很难通过其他理论得到合理化。在意大利案例中确认扩散假说表明，网络在塑造其他大规模移民运动中的重要性可能远超普遍认知，并且可能以先前未被理解的方式塑造这些运动。

papers.title: The Health of Democracies During the Pandemic: Results from a Randomized Survey Experiment
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Luca Braghieri, Sarah Eichmeyer, Minjeong Joyce Kim, Stefanie Stantcheva, David Y. Yang
papers.abstract: Concerns have been raised about the “demise of democracy”, possibly accelerated by pandemic-related restrictions. Using a survey experiment involving 8,206 respondents from five Western democracies, we find that subjects randomly exposed to information regarding civil liberties infringements undertaken by China and South Korea to contain COVID-19 became less willing to sacrifice rights and more worried about their long-term-erosion. However, our treatment did not increase support for democratic procedures more generally, despite our prior evidence that pandemic-related health risks diminished such support. These results suggest that the start of the COVID-19 crisis was a particularly vulnerable time for democracies.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间民主的健康状况：来自随机调查实验的结果
papers.zh_abstract: 人们对“民主的消亡”表示担忧，这可能因疫情相关限制而加速。通过对来自五个西方民主国家的8206名受访者进行一项调查实验，我们发现，随机接触到有关中国和韩国为遏制COVID-19而采取的侵犯公民自由信息的受试者，变得更不愿意牺牲权利，并更担心权利的长期侵蚀。然而，尽管我们先前有证据表明疫情相关的健康风险削弱了对民主程序的支持，但我们的处理并未普遍增加对民主程序的支持。这些结果表明，COVID-19危机的开始对民主国家来说是一个特别脆弱的时期。

papers.title: The Strange and Awful Path of Productivity in the U.S. Construction Sector
papers.authors: Austan Goolsbee, Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: Aggregate data show a large and decades-long decline in construction sector productivity. This decline in such a large sector has had a material effect on secular productivity growth for the economy as a whole. Prior work has focused on the role of potential measurement problems in construction, particularly output deflators in the measurement of productivity. This paper brings some new evidence to bear on the industry’s measured productivity problems and suggests that measurement error is probably not the sole source of the stagnation. First, using measures of physical productivity in housing construction, productivity is falling or, at best, stagnant over multiple decades. Second, there has been a noticeable decline over time in the efficiency with which construction firms translate materials inputs into output, and a corresponding shift toward more value-added-intensive production. Third, using state-level data, we do not find evidence of patterns of within-industry reallocation that might be expected of efficiently operating input and output markets. States with more productive construction sectors do not see growth in their shares of total U.S. construction activity; if anything, their shares fall. This may point to frictions in these markets that slow or stop what is in many other markets an important channel for productivity growth.
papers.zh_title: 美国建筑业生产率奇怪而可怕的路径
papers.zh_abstract: 总体数据显示，建筑业生产率出现了长达数十年的巨大下滑。这一庞大部门的下滑对整个经济的长期生产率增长产生了实质性影响。先前的研究侧重于建筑业中潜在的衡量问题，特别是生产率衡量中的产出平减指数。本文为行业衡量的生产率问题提供了一些新证据，并表明测量误差可能并非停滞的唯一来源。首先，使用住房建筑中的实物生产率衡量指标，生产率在数十年间呈下降趋势，或充其量停滞不前。其次，建筑企业将材料投入转化为产出的效率随时间显著下降，并相应转向更依赖增加值的生产。第三，利用州级数据，我们没有发现行业内重新配置模式的证据，而这种模式在高效运作的投入和产出市场中是可以预期的。生产率较高的建筑业的州，其在美国建筑活动总量中的份额并未增长；如果有的话，它们的份额反而下降。这可能表明这些市场存在摩擦，减缓或阻止了在许多其他市场中成为生产率增长重要渠道的进程。

papers.title: Interest Rates and World Trade: An 'Austrian' Perspective
papers.authors: Pol Antràs
papers.abstract: This paper develops a framework to study the interplay between world trade and interest rates. The model incorporates an explicit notion of time and of production length, along the lines of the ‘Austrian’ tradition of Böhm-Bawerk (1889). Changes in the interest rate affect production lengths, labor productivity, and the financial costs of exporting. I decompose the response of the volume of world trade to changes in the interest rate into four components: (i) a labor productivity effect, (ii) a propensity to consume out of labor income effect, (iii) a temporal dimension of variable trade costs effect, and (iv) a selection into exporting effect.
papers.zh_title: 利率与国际贸易：一个“奥地利学派”视角
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个研究国际贸易与利率之间相互作用的框架。该模型沿袭了Böhm-Bawerk（1889）的“奥地利学派”传统，纳入了时间和生产长度的明确概念。利率的变化会影响生产长度、劳动生产率和出口的财务成本。我将世界贸易量对利率变化的响应分解为四个组成部分：（i）劳动生产率效应，（ii）劳动收入中消费倾向效应，（iii）可变贸易成本的时间维度效应，以及（iv）出口选择效应。

papers.title: Two Decades of Social Security Claiming
papers.authors: Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: Twenty years ago, the adjustment to monthly Social Security benefits for early or delayed claiming was, on average, roughly actuarially fair, although some subsets of individuals could gain from delay. Since then, delaying claiming has become much more attractive thanks to three factors: a more generous delayed retirement credit, improvements in mortality, and historically low real interest rates. In this article, I examine how these three factors influence optimal claiming behavior. I also discuss empirical patterns of claiming across individuals and over time, as well as explanations for these patterns. I argue that although many people appear to claim suboptimally early, this behavior may be changing as information spreads about the importance of the claiming decision. Finally, I discuss policy towards claiming and the impact that an increase in strategic claiming could have on Social Security’s finances.
papers.zh_title: 社会保障申领的二十年
papers.zh_abstract: 二十年前，对提前或延迟申领月度社会保障福利的调整，平均而言大致是精算公平的，尽管某些人群可能从延迟中获益。自那以后，由于三个因素，延迟申领变得更具吸引力：更慷慨的延迟退休积分、死亡率的改善以及历史低位的实际利率。在本文中，我考察了这三个因素如何影响最优申领行为。我还讨论了个人之间和随时间变化的申领经验模式，以及对这些模式的解释。我认为，尽管许多人似乎过早地申领，但这种情况可能随着关于申领决策重要性的信息传播而改变。最后，我讨论了针对申领的政策，以及战略性申领增加可能对社会保障财务状况产生的影响。

papers.title: Internalizing Externalities through Public Pressure: Transparency Regulation for Fracking, Drilling Activity and Water Quality
papers.authors: Pietro Bonetti, Christian Leuz, Giovanna Michelon
papers.abstract: The rise of shale gas and tight oil development has triggered a major debate about hydraulic fracturing (HF). In an effort to bring light to HF practices and their potential risks to water quality, many U.S. states have mandated disclosure for HF wells and the fluids used. We employ this setting to study whether targeting corporate activities that have dispersed externalities with transparency reduces their environmental impact. Examining salt concentrations that are considered signatures for HF impact, we find significant and lasting improvements in surface water quality between 9-14% after the mandates. Most of the improvement comes from the intensive margin. We document that operators pollute less per unit of production, cause fewer spills of HF fluids and wastewater and use fewer hazardous chemicals. Turning to how transparency regulation works, we show that it increases public pressure and enables social movements, which facilitates internalization.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, POL；JEL：D62, G38, K22, K32, L71, L72, M41, M48, Q53
papers.zh_title: 通过公众压力内部化外部性：水力压裂透明度监管、钻井活动与水质
papers.zh_abstract: 页岩气和致密油开发的兴起引发了关于水力压裂（HF）的重大辩论。为了揭示水力压裂实践及其对水质的潜在风险，美国许多州已强制要求披露水力压裂井及其使用的压裂液。我们利用这一场景，研究针对具有分散外部性的企业活动实施透明度监管，是否能减少其环境影响。通过考察被视为水力压裂影响标志的盐浓度，我们发现强制披露后地表水质量显著且持久地改善了9-14%。大部分改善来自集约边际。我们记录到，运营商单位产量的污染减少，水力压裂液和废水的泄漏减少，并且使用的危险化学品减少。关于透明度监管如何发挥作用，我们表明它增加了公众压力并促进了社会运动，从而有助于外部性的内部化。

papers.title: Feedback and Contagion through Distressed Competition
papers.authors: Hui Chen, Winston Wei Dou, Hongye Guo, Yan Ji
papers.abstract: Firms tend to compete more aggressively when facing financial distress. This intensified competition reduces profit margins, pushing them further into distress and adversely affecting their industry peers. To study such feedback and contagion effects, we incorporate strategic competition in a dynamic model with long-term defaultable debt, exploring various peer interactions such as predation and price wars. The feedback effect represents a novel source of financial distress costs associated with leverage, which helps explain the negative profitability-leverage relation across industries. Owing to the contagion effect, firms’ optimal leverage is often excessively high from an industry perspective, undermining the industry’s financial stability.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, LE, PR；JEL：C73, D43, G12, L13, O33
papers.zh_title: 困境竞争中的反馈与传染效应
papers.zh_abstract: 企业在财务困境中往往竞争更为激烈；这种加剧的竞争反过来会降低利润率，使企业自身进一步陷入困境，并对行业内的其他企业产生不利影响。为了研究这种反馈与传染效应，我们将战略竞争纳入一个包含长期可违约债务的动态模型中，探讨了掠夺性定价和价格战等多种同业互动形式。反馈效应代表了与杠杆相关的一种新的财务困境成本来源，这有助于解释跨行业观察到的盈利与杠杆之间的负相关关系。由于传染效应，从行业角度来看，企业的最优杠杆水平往往过高，从而损害了行业的金融稳定性。

papers.title: Opiates of the Masses? Deaths of Despair and the Decline of American Religion
papers.authors: Tyler Giles, Daniel M. Hungerman, Tamar Oostrom
papers.abstract: In recent decades, death rates from poisonings, suicides, and alcoholic liver disease have dramatically increased in the United States. We show that these "deaths of despair" began to increase relative to trend in the early 1990s, that this increase was preceded by a decline in religious participation, and that both trends were driven by middle-aged white Americans. Using repeals of blue laws as a shock to religiosity, we confirm that religious practice has significant effects on these mortality rates. Our findings show that social factors such as organized religion can play an important role in understanding deaths of despair.
papers.zh_title: 大众的鸦片？绝望之死与美国宗教的衰落
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，美国因中毒、自杀和酒精性肝病导致的死亡率急剧上升。我们表明，这些“绝望之死”相对于趋势的上升始于20世纪90年代初，而在此之前，宗教参与度已经下降，并且这两种趋势都是由中年美国白人推动的。利用蓝色法规的废除作为对宗教信仰的冲击，我们证实了宗教实践对这些死亡率具有显著影响。我们的发现表明，有组织的宗教等社会因素在理解绝望之死方面可以发挥重要作用。

papers.title: Economics and Measurement: New measures to model decision making
papers.authors: Ingvild Almås, Orazio Attanasio, Pamela Jervis
papers.abstract: Most empirical work in economics has considered only a narrow set of measures as meaningful and useful to characterize individual behavior, a restriction justified by the difficulties in collecting a wider set. However, this approach often forces the use of strong assumptions to estimate the parameters that inform individual behavior and identify causal links. In this paper, we argue that a more flexible and broader approach to measurement could be extremely useful and allow the estimation of richer and more realistic models that rest on weaker identifying assumptions. We argue that the design of measurement tools should interact with, and depend on, the models economists use. Measurement is not a substitute for rigorous theory, it is an important complement to it, and should be developed in parallel to it. We illustrate these arguments with a model of parental behavior estimated on pilot data that combines conventional measures with novel ones.
papers.zh_title: 经济学与测量：用于建模决策的新方法
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学中的大多数实证工作只考虑了一小部分被认为有意义且有用的测量指标来刻画个体行为，这种限制是由于收集更广泛数据的困难而导致的。然而，这种方法常常迫使研究者使用强假设来估计反映个体行为的参数并识别因果联系。在本文中，我们认为，采用更灵活、更广泛的测量方法可能极为有用，并能够估计出更丰富、更现实的模型，这些模型依赖于更弱的识别假设。我们认为，测量工具的设计应与经济学家使用的模型相互作用并依赖于这些模型。测量并非严谨理论的替代品，而是其重要的补充，并且应与理论并行发展。我们通过一个基于试点数据估计的父母行为模型来阐述这些论点，该模型结合了传统测量方法与新颖测量方法。

papers.title: Labor Supply Shocks and Capital Accumulation: The Short and Long Run Effects of the Refugee Crisis in Europe
papers.authors: Lorenzo Caliendo, Luca David Opromolla, Fernando Parro, Alessandro Sforza
papers.abstract: European countries experienced a large increase in labor supply due to the influx of Ukrainian refugees after the 2022 Russia invasion. We study its dynamic effects in a spatial model with forward-looking households of different skills, trade, and endogenous capital accumulation. We find that real GDP increases in Europe in the long term, with large distributional effects across countries and skill groups. In the short run, an increase in the supply of labor strains the use of capital structures that takes time to build. Over time, countries that build capital structures increase output, resulting in potential long run benefits.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力供给冲击与资本积累：欧洲难民危机的短期与长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2022年俄罗斯入侵后，乌克兰难民涌入导致欧洲国家劳动力供给大幅增加。我们在一个包含不同技能的前瞻性家庭、贸易和内生资本积累的空间模型中研究了其动态影响。我们发现，长期来看，欧洲实际GDP增长，但各国和技能群体之间存在巨大的分配效应。短期内，劳动力供给的增加给需要时间建设的资本结构的使用带来了压力。随着时间的推移，建设资本结构的国家增加了产出，从而带来潜在的长期收益。

papers.title: Rationing Medicine Through Bureaucracy: Authorization Restrictions in Medicare
papers.authors: Zarek C. Brot-Goldberg, Samantha Burn, Timothy Layton, Boris Vabson
papers.abstract: High administrative costs in U.S. health care have provoked concern among policymakers over potential waste, but many of these costs are generated by managed care policies that trade off bureaucratic costs against reductions in moral hazard. We study this trade-off for prior authorization restriction policies in Medicare Part D, where low-income beneficiaries are randomly assigned to default plans. Beneficiaries who face restrictions on a drug reduce their use of it by 26.8%. Approximately half of marginal beneficiaries are diverted to another related drug, while the other half are diverted to no drug. These policies generated net financial savings, reducing drug spending by $96 per beneficiary-year (3.6% of drug spending), while only generating approximately $10 in paperwork costs. Revealed preference approaches suggest that the cost savings likely exceed beneficiaries’ willingness to pay for foregone drugs.
papers.zh_title: 通过官僚机构配给药品：Medicare中的授权限制
papers.zh_abstract: 美国医疗保健的高行政成本引发了政策制定者对潜在浪费的担忧，但许多这些成本是由管理式医疗政策产生的，这些政策在官僚成本与道德风险减少之间进行权衡。我们研究了Medicare D部分中事先授权限制政策的这种权衡，其中低收入受益人被随机分配到默认计划。面临某种药物限制的受益人将其使用量减少了26.8%。大约一半的边际受益人转向了另一种相关药物，而另一半则未使用任何药物。这些政策产生了净财务节省，将药品支出减少了每位受益人每年96美元（占药品支出的3.6%），同时仅产生了约10美元的文书工作成本。显示性偏好方法表明，成本节省可能超过了受益人对放弃药物的支付意愿。

papers.title: More Roads or Public Transit? Insights from Measuring City-Center Accessibility
papers.authors: Lucas J. Conwell, Fabian Eckert, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak
papers.abstract: We propose a theory-inspired measure of the accessibility of a city's center: the size of the surrounding area from which it can be reached within a specific time. Using publicly available optimal-routing software, we compute these "accessibility zones" for the 109 largest US and European cities, separately for cars and public transit commutes. Compared with European cities, US cities are half as accessible via public transit and twice as accessible via cars. Car accessibility zones are always larger than public transit zones, making US cities more accessible overall. However, US cities' car orientation comes at the cost of less green space, more congestion, and worse health and pollution externalities.
papers.zh_title: 更多道路还是公共交通？来自衡量城市中心可达性的见解
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于理论的城市中心可达性衡量指标：在特定时间内可从其到达的周边区域面积。利用公开可用的最优路径规划软件，我们分别针对汽车和公共交通通勤，计算了美国与欧洲109个最大城市的这些“可达性区域”。与欧洲城市相比，美国城市的公共交通可达性低一半，而汽车可达性高一倍。汽车可达区域总是大于公共交通区域，这使得美国城市的整体可达性更高。然而，美国城市的汽车导向是以更少的绿地、更严重的拥堵以及更差的健康和污染外部性为代价的。

papers.title: Investing in Influence: Investors, Portfolio Firms, and Political Giving
papers.authors: Marianne Bertrand, Matilde Bombardini, Raymond Fisman, Francesco Trebbi, Eyub Yegen
papers.abstract: Institutional ownership of U.S. corporations has increased ten-fold since 1950. We examine whether these new concentrated owners influence portfolio firms’ political activities, as a window into the larger question of whether institutional investors can wield their control to extract benefits from portfolio firms. We find that after the acquisition of a large stake, a firm’s political action committee (PAC) giving mirrors more closely that of the acquiring investment management company (in our preferred specification, a 31 percent increase in comovement). This pattern is observed for acquisitions driven by new index inclusions, which suggests that our findings result from a causal effect of acquisitions rather than other correlated shifts in political agendas. We argue that investors drive the convergence in giving - the effects are driven by more “partisan” investors, and we show that firms shift their giving more around acquisitions than investors do. Overall, our findings suggest that corporations’ political business strategies are likely dictated by broader considerations than simple profit, and modeling corporate influence should take into account how corporations are governed.
papers.zh_title: 投资影响力：投资者、投资组合公司与政治捐赠
