papers.zh_abstract: 自1950年以来，美国公司的机构所有权增长了十倍。我们考察这些新的集中所有者是否影响投资组合公司的政治活动，以此作为探究机构投资者能否利用其控制权从投资组合公司获取利益这一更大问题的窗口。我们发现，在收购大量股权后，公司的政治行动委员会（PAC）捐赠与收购投资管理公司的捐赠更加趋同（在我们的首选规范中，协同运动增加了31%）。这种模式在新指数纳入驱动的收购中也被观察到，这表明我们的发现源于收购的因果效应，而非政治议程的其他相关变化。我们认为投资者推动了捐赠的趋同——这种效应由更“党派化”的投资者驱动，并且我们表明，与投资者相比，公司在收购前后捐赠的变化更大。总体而言，我们的发现表明，企业的政治商业策略可能更多地由更广泛的考量而非单纯利润所决定，并且对企业影响力的建模应考虑企业的治理方式。

papers.title: The Economics of Cities: From Theory to Data
papers.authors: Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: Economic activity is highly unevenly distributed within cities, as reflected in the concentration of economic functions in specific locations, such as finance in the Square Mile in London. The extent to which this concentration reflects natural advantages versus agglomeration forces is central to a range of public policy issues, including the impact of local taxation and transport infrastructure improvements. This paper reviews recent quantitative urban models, which incorporate both differences in natural advantages and agglomeration forces, and can be taken directly to observed data on cities. We show that these models can be used to estimate the strength of agglomeration forces and evaluate the impact of transportation infrastructure improvements on welfare and the spatial distribution of economic activity.
papers.zh_title: 城市经济学：从理论到数据
papers.zh_abstract: 经济活动在城市内部高度不均匀分布，这体现在经济功能集中在特定地点，例如伦敦金融城中的金融业。这种集中在多大程度上源于自然优势与集聚力量，对于一系列公共政策问题至关重要，包括地方税收和交通基础设施改善的影响。本文回顾了最近的定量城市模型，这些模型既包含了自然优势的差异，也包含了集聚力量，并且可以直接应用于城市的观测数据。我们表明，这些模型可用于估计集聚力量的强度，并评估交通基础设施改善对福利和经济活动空间分布的影响。

papers.title: Sprouting Cities: How Rural America Industrialized
papers.authors: Fabian Eckert, John Juneau, Michael Peters
papers.abstract: We study the joint process of urbanization and industrialization in the US economy between 1880 and 1940. We show that only a small share of aggregate industrialization is accounted for by the relocation of workers from remote rural areas to industrial hubs like Chicago or New York City. Instead, most sectoral shifts occurred within rural counties, dramatically transforming their sectoral structure. Most industrialization within counties occurred through the emergence of new "factory" cities with notably higher manufacturing shares rather than the expansion of incumbent cities. In contrast, today's shift towards services seems to benefit large incumbent cities the most.
papers.zh_title: 萌芽中的城市：美国农村如何工业化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1880年至1940年间美国经济中城市化和工业化的联合过程。我们表明，只有一小部分总体工业化是由工人从偏远农村地区迁移到芝加哥或纽约等工业中心所解释的。相反，大多数部门转移发生在农村县内部，极大地改变了它们的部门结构。县内的大部分工业化是通过新兴“工厂”城市（其制造业份额显著更高）的出现，而非现有城市的扩张来实现的。相比之下，当前向服务业的转变似乎最有利于现有的大型城市。

papers.title: Rationalizable Learning
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, Daniel J. Martin, Philip Marx
papers.abstract: The central question we address in this paper is: what can an analyst infer from choice data about what a decision maker has learned? The key constraint we impose, which is shared across models of Bayesian learning, is that any learning must be rationalizable. To implement this constraint, we introduce two conditions, one of which refines the mean preserving spread of Blackwell (1953) to take account for optimality, and the other of which generalizes the NIAC condition (Caplin and Dean 2015) and the NIAS condition (Caplin and Martin 2015) to allow for arbitrary learning. We apply our framework to show how identification of what was learned can be strengthened with additional assumptions on the form of Bayesian learning.
papers.zh_title: 可理性化的学习
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨的核心问题是：分析师能从选择数据中推断出决策者学到了什么？我们施加的关键约束是，任何学习都必须是可理性化的，这一约束在贝叶斯学习模型中普遍存在。为实施这一约束，我们引入了两个条件：一个条件细化了布莱克威尔（1953）的均值保留展形，以考虑最优性；另一个条件则推广了卡普林和迪恩（2015）的NIAC条件以及卡普林和马丁（2015）的NIAS条件，以允许任意形式的学习。我们应用这一框架，展示了如何通过对贝叶斯学习形式施加额外假设，来增强对所学内容的识别能力。

papers.title: Do Technology Standards Induce Innovation in Environmental Technologies When Coordination is Important?
papers.authors: Myriam Gregoire-Zawilski, David Popp
papers.abstract: If further decarbonization of electricity systems is to continue, a next generation of innovation in transformative grid modernization and renewables integration technologies will be needed. Few studies have investigated the policy determinants of innovation in this sector to glean insights on how government may support the development and deployment of these technologies. We argue that policies that were successful at supporting the first wave of renewables innovation may not be sufficient to produce similar results in the next wave of green innovation since those face higher coordination bottlenecks. We investigate the effects of interoperability standards - an instrument that may facilitate coordination - on patenting using smart grid as an example of a technology that has high interoperability requirements. We find that standards decrease patenting at the extensive and intensive margins, but these results vary across types of firms. We find that this negative effect is driven by large firms, whereas standards increase entry by firms without prior smart grid innovation experience. We interpret this result as an information effect: standards provide useful information to new entrants and may help diversify the range of players innovating in this space.
papers.zh_title: 当协调至关重要时，技术标准会催生环境技术创新吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 如果电力系统要进一步脱碳，就需要下一代变革性的电网现代化和可再生能源整合技术的创新。很少有研究探讨该领域创新的政策决定因素，以洞察政府如何支持这些技术的开发和部署。我们认为，成功支持第一波可再生能源创新的政策，可能不足以在下一波绿色创新中产生类似效果，因为后者面临更高的协调瓶颈。我们以具有高互操作性要求的智能电网技术为例，研究了互操作性标准（一种可能促进协调的工具）对专利活动的影响。我们发现，标准在广延边际和集约边际上都减少了专利活动，但这些结果因企业类型而异。我们发现，这种负面效应是由大型企业驱动的，而标准则促进了此前没有智能电网创新经验的企业进入。我们将这一结果解读为信息效应：标准为新进入者提供了有用信息，并可能有助于使该领域的创新主体更加多元化。

papers.title: Local Labor Market Impacts of the Energy Transition: Prospects and Policies
papers.authors: Gordon H. Hanson
papers.abstract: Society’s transition toward more sustainable energy sources is well underway. But substantially reducing the use of fossil fuels to generate electricity, to power vehicles, and to manufacture the stuff of everyday life will profoundly disrupt the communities that currently dedicate themselves to carbon-intensive industries. In this paper, I consider the potential for adverse labor market consequences from the energy transition and the suitability of existing policies to counteract them. Top of mind in this discussion is to avoid repeating the painful adjustment to globalization and automation, which in recent decades brought concentrated job loss and long-lasting economic distress to local labor markets that had been specialized in manufacturing. I begin by mapping the spatial distribution of employment in fossil-fuel-intensive activities across US commuting zones from 2000 forward. Then, using the labor market consequences of the post-1980 decline of coal as a backdrop, I discuss policy options for easing adjustment to the energy transition, including letting market forces work, reinforcing the social safety net, and expanding place-based policies.
papers.zh_title: 能源转型对地方劳动力市场的影响：前景与政策
papers.zh_abstract: 社会向更可持续能源来源的转型正在顺利进行。但大幅减少化石燃料在发电、车辆动力以及日常用品制造中的使用，将深刻颠覆当前专注于碳密集型产业的社区。在本文中，我考虑了能源转型可能带来的不利劳动力市场后果，以及现有政策在应对这些后果方面的适用性。讨论中首要关注的是避免重蹈过去几十年全球化与自动化带来的痛苦调整，这些调整曾导致制造业专业化地区出现集中的就业损失和长期的经济困境。我首先描绘了2000年以来美国通勤区中化石燃料密集型活动就业的空间分布。然后，以1980年后煤炭行业衰退的劳动力市场后果为背景，我讨论了缓解能源转型调整的政策选项，包括让市场力量发挥作用、强化社会安全网以及扩大基于地方的政策。

papers.title: Changing the Odds: Student Achievement after Introduction of a Middle School Math Intervention
papers.authors: Julian R. Betts, Andrew C. Zau, Karen Volz Bachofer, Dina Polichar
papers.abstract: The paper evaluates math performance at four high-need middle schools during a four-year intervention, which was designed to help math teachers diagnose students’ areas of need and to design lesson plans responsive to those needs. Before the intervention began, the researchers pre-selected four comparison schools by matching based on achievement and also on demographics. A difference-in-difference analysis finds a significant increase of about 0.11 standard deviation in test scores per year for students in the program schools. Supplementary event study and synthetic control analyses to detect year-by-year effects lack precision but are weakly suggestive of a smaller impact in year 1 than later years. A cost analysis considers the affordability of extending similar programs.
papers.zh_title: 改变概率：引入初中数学干预后的学生成绩
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了四所高需求初中在为期四年的干预中的数学成绩表现。该干预旨在帮助数学教师诊断学生的需求领域，并设计针对这些需求的教案。在干预开始前，研究人员根据成绩和人口统计数据匹配，预先选定了四所对比学校。双重差分分析发现，项目学校学生的考试成绩每年显著提高约0.11个标准差。用于检测逐年效应的补充事件研究和合成控制分析缺乏精确性，但微弱地暗示第一年的影响小于后续年份。一项成本分析考虑了推广类似项目的可负担性。

papers.title: Connected Lending of Last Resort
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Eric Monnet
papers.abstract: Because of secrecy, little is known about the political economy of central bank lending. Utilizing a novel, hand-collected historical daily dataset on loans to commercial banks, we analyze how personal connections matter for lending of last resort, highlighting the importance of governance for this core function of central banks. We show that, when faced with a banking panic in November 1930, the Banque de France (BdF) lent selectively rather than broadly, providing substantially more liquidity to connected banks – those whose board members were BdF shareholders. The BdF’s selective lending policy failed to internalize a negative externality – that lending would be insufficient to arrest the panic and that distress via contagion would spillover to connected banks. Connected lending of last resort fueled the worst banking crisis in French history, caused an unprecedented government bailout of the central bank, and resulted in loss of shareholder control over the central bank.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ME, POL；JEL：E4, E58, G01, G32, G38, N1, N24
papers.zh_title: 关联性最后贷款人贷款
papers.zh_abstract: 由于保密性，人们对央行贷款的政治经济学知之甚少。利用一份手工收集的历史每日数据集（涵盖对商业银行的贷款），我们分析了个人关系如何影响最后贷款人贷款，突显了治理对于央行这一核心职能的重要性。我们表明，在1930年11月面临银行恐慌时，法兰西银行（BdF）并非广泛放贷，而是选择性放贷，向关联银行（即董事会成员为BdF股东的银行）提供了显著更多的流动性。BdF的选择性贷款政策未能内化一种负外部性——即贷款不足以遏制恐慌，且通过传染导致的困境会波及关联银行。关联性的最后贷款人贷款加剧了法国历史上最严重的银行危机，引发了前所未有的政府对央行的救助，并导致股东对央行控制权的丧失。

papers.title: A Survey of Private Debt Funds
papers.authors: Joern Block, Young Soo Jang, Steven N. Kaplan, Anna Schulze
papers.abstract: Despite its large and increasing size in the U.S. and Europe, there is relatively little research on the private debt (PD) market, particularly compared to the bank and syndicated loan markets. Accordingly, in this paper, we survey U.S. and European investors with private debt assets under management (AuM) of over $300 billion. These investors are primarily direct lending funds. We ask the general partners (GPs) how they source, select, and evaluate deals, how they think of private debt relative to bank and syndicated loan financing, how they monitor their investments, how they interact with private equity (PE) sponsors and how they view the future of the market. The respondents provide primarily cash flow-based loans and believe that they finance companies and leverage levels that banks would not fund. The direct lending funds target unlevered returns that appear high relative to their risk. They use leverage in their funds, but appreciably less than banks and collateralized loan obligation funds (CLOs). They use and negotiate for both financial and incurrence covenants to monitor their investments. The presence of PE sponsors helps them lend more and craft more effective covenants. U.S. and European funds are similar on many dimensions, but the European funds rely less on PE sponsors and compete more with banks. Overall, the private debt market is both different from, but shares characteristics with the bank loan and syndicated loan markets.
papers.zh_title: 私募债务基金调查
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管私募债务（PD）市场在美国和欧洲规模庞大且不断增长，但相关研究相对较少，尤其是与银行贷款市场和银团贷款市场相比。因此，在本文中，我们调查了美国和欧洲管理私募债务资产超过3000亿美元的投资者。这些投资者主要是直接贷款基金。我们向普通合伙人（GP）询问他们如何寻找、筛选和评估交易，如何看待私募债务相对于银行贷款和银团贷款融资，如何监控投资，如何与私募股权（PE）发起人互动，以及如何看待市场未来。受访者主要提供基于现金流的贷款，并认为他们为银行不会提供融资的公司和杠杆水平提供资金。直接贷款基金的目标无杠杆回报率相对于其风险而言似乎较高。他们在基金中使用杠杆，但明显低于银行和担保贷款凭证基金（CLOs）。他们使用并协商财务契约和发生契约来监控投资。PE发起人的存在帮助他们发放更多贷款并制定更有效的契约。美国和欧洲的基金在许多方面相似，但欧洲基金对PE发起人的依赖较少，与银行的竞争更多。总体而言，私募债务市场既不同于银行贷款和银团贷款市场，又与之共享一些特征。

papers.title: Bank Stress Testing, Human Capital Investment and Risk Management
papers.authors: Thomas Schneider, Philip Strahan, Jun Yang
papers.abstract: This paper studies banks’ investment in risk management practices following the Global Financial Crisis and the advent of stress testing. Banks that experienced greater losses during the Crisis exhibit stronger demand for risk management talents. Banks increase their demand for highly skilled stress test labor in anticipation of a test and following poor performance on a test. Following this higher demand, banks exhibit lower systematic risk and lower profitability. While stress testing has modernized banks’ internal risk management by spurring the acquisition of highly skilled risk management talent, recent changes to the tests could erode its efficacy.
papers.zh_title: 银行压力测试、人力资本投资与风险管理
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了全球金融危机及压力测试出现后银行在风险管理实践方面的投资。在危机期间遭受更大损失的银行，对风险管理人才的需求更强。银行在预期即将进行压力测试或在上一次测试中表现不佳后，会增加对高技能压力测试劳动力的需求。在这种更高需求之后，银行表现出更低的系统性风险和更低的盈利能力。尽管压力测试通过刺激银行获取高技能风险管理人才，推动了银行内部风险管理的现代化，但近期对测试的修改可能会削弱其效力。

papers.title: Time Savings When Working from Home
papers.authors: Cevat Giray Aksoy, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Mathias Dolls, Pablo Zarate
papers.abstract: We quantify the commute time savings associated with work from home, drawing on data for 27 countries. The average daily time savings when working from home is 72 minutes in our sample. We estimate that work from home saved about two hours per week per worker in 2021 and 2022, and that it will save about one hour per week per worker after the pandemic ends. Workers allocate 40 percent of their time savings to their jobs and about 11 percent to caregiving activities. People living with children allocate more of their time savings to caregiving.
papers.zh_title: 居家办公节省的时间
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用27个国家的数据，量化了居家办公所节省的通勤时间。在我们的样本中，居家办公平均每天节省72分钟。我们估计，在2021年和2022年，居家办公为每位工人每周节省了约两小时；疫情结束后，它将为每位工人每周节省约一小时。工人将节省时间的40%用于工作，约11%用于照护活动。与儿童同住的人将更多节省时间用于照护。

papers.title: China in Tax Havens
papers.authors: Christopher Clayton, Antonio Coppola, Amanda Dos Santos, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: We document the rise of China in offshore capital markets. Chinese firms use global tax havens to access foreign capital both in equity and bond markets. In the last twenty years, China's presence went from raising a negligible amount of capital in these markets to accounting for more than half of equity issuance and around a fifth of global corporate bonds outstanding in tax havens. Using rich micro data, we show that a range of Chinese firms, including both tech giants and SOEs, use these offshore centers. We conclude by discussing the macroeconomic and financial stability implications of these patterns.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：F3, G10, G30, H87
papers.zh_title: 中国在避税天堂
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了中国在离岸资本市场的崛起。中国企业利用全球避税天堂在股权和债券市场获取外国资本。在过去二十年中，中国在这些市场的资本筹集从微不足道增长到占避税天堂股权发行的一半以上和全球公司债券存量的约五分之一。利用丰富的微观数据，我们表明包括科技巨头和国有企业在内的各类中国企业都使用这些离岸中心。最后，我们讨论了这些模式对宏观经济和金融稳定性的影响。

papers.title: New Measurement of Export Participation in U.S. Manufacturing
papers.authors: Christoph Boehm, Aaron B. Flaaen, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: We measure export participation rates in the U.S. manufacturing sector using a new administrative dataset and compare them to participation rates constructed from the commonly used Census of Manufacturers (CM). Both at the establishment and firm level export participation rates are near 40 percent in the administrative data, almost twice as high as in the CM. The discrepancy appears to result predominantly from under-counting of small exporters in the CM. Our findings call for reconsidering the conventional wisdom that around 20 percent of manufacturing firms export.
papers.zh_title: 美国制造业出口参与度的新测量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个新的行政数据集测量美国制造业的出口参与率，并将其与常用制造业普查构建的参与率进行比较。在行政数据中，企业和机构层面的出口参与率均接近40%，几乎是制造业普查的两倍。这种差异似乎主要源于制造业普查对小型出口商的低估。我们的发现要求重新审视约20%的制造企业出口的传统观点。

papers.title: Boomerang Children and Parental Retirement Outcomes
papers.authors: Grant M. Seiter, Mary J. Lopez, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: As the share of U.S. adult children living with their parents increases, it is important to understand how children who “boomerang” back home impact their parents in their pre-retirement and post-retirement years. We use data from the Health and Retirement Study (HRS) to examine the effects of boomerang children on their parents’ labor market expectations and choices, as well as on their wealth, health, and life satisfaction. Event study analysis suggests that boomerang children return home due to short-term instabilities, such as negative shocks to marriage, income, and employment. We find that boomerang children are associated with a small increase in their parents’ subjective probability of working after age 65. However, there is no clear statistically significant evidence that they impact parents’ current or future labor market choices; nor is there any evidence that they affect parents’ wealth, health, or life satisfaction.
papers.zh_title: 回巢子女与父母退休结果
papers.zh_abstract: 随着美国成年子女与父母同住的比例增加，了解“回巢”子女如何影响父母在退休前和退休后的生活变得重要。我们使用健康与退休研究的数据，考察回巢子女对父母劳动力市场预期和选择，以及财富、健康和生活满意度的影响。事件研究分析表明，回巢子女因短期不稳定因素（如婚姻、收入和就业的负面冲击）返回家中。我们发现回巢子女与父母在65岁后工作的主观概率小幅增加相关。然而，没有明确的统计显著证据表明它们影响父母当前或未来的劳动力市场选择；也没有证据表明它们影响父母的财富、健康或生活满意度。

papers.title: Ethnic Remoteness Reduces the Peace Dividend from Trade Access
papers.authors: Klaus Desmet, Joseph F. Gomes, Diego Malo Rico
papers.abstract: This paper shows that ethnically remote locations do not reap the full peace dividend from increased market access. Exploiting the staggered implementation of the Africa Growth and Opportunity Act (AGOA) and using high-resolution data on ethnic composition, violent conflict, and sectoral specialization for sub-Saharan Africa, we find that in the wake of improved trade access conflict declines less in locations that are ethnically remote from the rest of the country. We hypothesize that ethnic remoteness acts as a barrier that hampers participation in the global economy. Consistent with this, satellite-based luminosity data show that income gains from improved trade access are smaller in ethnically remote locations, and survey data indicate that ethnically more distant individuals do not benefit equally from positive income shocks when exposed to increased market access. These results underscore the importance of ethnic barriers when analyzing which locations and groups might be left behind by globalization.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, POL；JEL：D74, F13, F6, O12, O55, R11, Z1
papers.zh_title: 民族距离削弱贸易准入的和平红利
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，民族上偏远的地区无法充分享受市场准入增加带来的和平红利。利用非洲增长与机会法案的分阶段实施，以及撒哈拉以南非洲地区民族构成、暴力冲突和部门专业化的高分辨率数据，我们发现，在贸易准入改善后，与国内其他地区民族距离较远的地区冲突减少较少。我们假设民族距离作为阻碍参与全球经济的障碍。与此一致，基于卫星的亮度数据显示，民族偏远地区从贸易准入改善中获得的收入增长较小，而调查数据表明，当面临市场准入增加时，民族距离较远的个体并未平等受益于正向收入冲击。这些结果强调了在分析哪些地区和群体可能被全球化抛在后面时，民族障碍的重要性。

papers.title: Parameter Recovery Using Remotely Sensed Variables
papers.authors: Jonathan Proctor, Tamma Carleton, Sandy Sum
papers.abstract: Remotely sensed measurements and other machine learning predictions are increasingly used in place of direct observations in empirical analyses. Errors in such measures may bias parameter estimation, but it remains unclear how large such biases are or how to correct for them. We leverage a new benchmark dataset providing co-located ground truth observations and remotely sensed measurements for multiple variables across the contiguous U.S. to show that the common practice of using remotely sensed measurements without correction leads to biased parameter point estimates and standard errors across a diversity of empirical settings. More than three-quarters of the 95% confidence intervals we estimate using remotely sensed measurements do not contain the true coefficient of interest. These biases result from both classical measurement error and more structured measurement error, which we find is common in machine learning based remotely sensed measurements. We show that multiple imputation, a standard statistical imputation technique so far untested in this setting, effectively reduces bias and improves statistical coverage with only minor reductions in power in both simple linear regression and panel fixed effects frameworks. Our results demonstrate that multiple imputation is a generalizable and easily implementable method for correcting parameter estimates relying on remotely sensed variables.
papers.zh_title: 利用遥感变量进行参数恢复
papers.zh_abstract: 遥感测量和其他机器学习预测越来越多地用于替代实证分析中的直接观测。此类测量中的误差可能导致参数估计偏差，但目前尚不清楚这些偏差有多大或如何纠正。我们利用一个新的基准数据集，该数据集提供了美国本土多个变量的共位地面真实观测和遥感测量，以表明在多种实证环境中，未经校正使用遥感测量的常见做法会导致参数点估计和标准误的偏差。我们使用遥感测量估计的95%置信区间中，超过四分之三不包含真实的感兴趣系数。这些偏差源于经典测量误差和更结构化的测量误差，我们发现后者在基于机器学习的遥感测量中很常见。我们表明，多重插补——一种标准统计插补技术，在此背景下尚未测试——能有效减少偏差并提高统计覆盖率，在简单线性回归和面板固定效应框架中仅轻微降低功效。我们的结果证明，多重插补是一种通用且易于实施的方法，用于校正依赖遥感变量的参数估计。

papers.title: News Diffusion in Social Networks and Stock Market Reactions
papers.authors: David Hirshleifer, Lin Peng, Qiguang Wang
papers.abstract: We study how the social transmission of public news influences investors’ beliefs and securities markets. Using data on social networks, we find that earnings announcements from firms in higher-centrality counties generate stronger immediate price, volatility, and trading volume reactions. Post-announcement, such firms experience weaker price drift and faster volatility decay but higher and more persistent volume. These findings indicate that greater social connectedness promotes timely incorporation of news into prices, but also opinion divergence and excessive trading. We propose the social churning hypothesis, which is confirmed using granular data from StockTwits messages and household trading records.
papers.zh_title: 社交网络中的新闻扩散与股票市场反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究公共新闻的社会传播如何影响投资者信念和证券市场。利用社交网络数据，我们发现来自更高中心性县的公司盈利公告会引发更强的即时价格、波动性和交易量反应。公告后，这些公司经历更弱的价格漂移和更快的波动衰减，但更高且更持久的交易量。这些发现表明，更强的社会联系促进了新闻及时纳入价格，但也导致了意见分歧和过度交易。我们提出社会搅动假说，并通过StockTwits消息和家庭交易记录的细粒度数据得到确认。

papers.title: A Theory of Payments-Chain Crises
papers.authors: Saki Bigio
papers.abstract: This paper introduces an endogenous network of payments chains into a business cycle model. Agents order production in bilateral relations. Some payments are executed immediately. Other payments, chained payments, are delayed until other payments are executed. Because production starts only after orders are paid, chained payments induce production delays. In equilibrium, agents choose the amount of chained payments given interest rates and access to internal funds or credit lines. This choice determines the payments-chain network and aggregate total-factor productivity (TFP). The paper characterizes equilibrium dynamics and their innate inefficiencies. Agents internalize the direct costs of their payment delays, but do not internalize the costs induced onto others. This externality produces novel policy insights and rationalizes permanent reductions in TFP under excessive debt.
papers.zh_title: 支付链危机理论
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将内生支付链网络引入商业周期模型。代理人在双边关系中安排生产。一些支付立即执行。其他支付，即链式支付，被延迟直到其他支付执行。由于生产仅在订单支付后开始，链式支付导致生产延迟。在均衡中，代理人根据利率和内部资金或信贷额度获取情况选择链式支付的数量。这一选择决定了支付链网络和全要素生产率。本文刻画了均衡动态及其内在低效率。代理人内化其支付延迟的直接成本，但不内化对他人造成的成本。这种外部性产生了新颖的政策见解，并解释了过度债务下全要素生产率的永久性下降。

papers.title: Does Greater Public Scrutiny Hurt a Firm’s Performance?
papers.authors: Benjamin Bennett, René M. Stulz, Zexi Wang
papers.abstract: Public attention to a firm may provide valuable monitoring, but it may also have a dark side by constraining management’s decisions and distracting it. We use inclusion in the S&P 500 index as a positive shock to public attention. Media coverage, Google searches, SEC downloads, SEC comment letters, shareholder proposals, analyst coverage, and lawsuits increase following inclusion. Post-inclusion performance falls and is negatively related to the increase in attention. Included firms’ investment and payout policies become more similar to those of index peers and the increase in similarity is positively related to the size of the attention increase.
papers.zh_title: 更大的公众监督会损害公司绩效吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 公众对公司的关注可能提供有价值的监督，但也可能通过约束管理层决策和分散注意力而产生负面影响。我们使用纳入标普500指数作为公众关注的正向冲击。纳入后，媒体报道、谷歌搜索、SEC下载、SEC评论信、股东提案、分析师覆盖和诉讼增加。纳入后的绩效下降，且与关注度增加负相关。纳入公司的投资和支付政策变得更类似于指数同行，且相似性增加与关注度增加幅度正相关。

papers.title: The Potential Impact of Artificial Intelligence on Healthcare Spending
papers.authors: Nikhil Sahni, George Stein, Rodney Zemmel, David M. Cutler
papers.abstract: The potential of artificial intelligence (AI) to simplify existing healthcare processes and create new, more efficient ones is a major topic of discussion in the industry. Yet healthcare lags other industries in AI adoption. In this paper, we estimate that wider adoption of AI could lead to savings of 5 to 10 percent in US healthcare spending—roughly $200 billion to $360 billion annually in 2019 dollars. These estimates are based on specific AI-enabled use cases that employ today’s technologies, are attainable within the next five years, and would not sacrifice quality or access. These opportunities could also lead to nonfinancial benefits such as improved healthcare quality, increased access, better patient experience, and greater clinician satisfaction. We further present case studies and discuss how to overcome the challenges to AI deployments. We conclude with a review of recent market trends that may shift the AI adoption trajectory toward a more rapid pace.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能对美国医疗支出的潜在影响
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能简化现有医疗流程并创造更高效新流程的潜力，是行业内讨论的主要话题。然而，医疗行业在人工智能采用方面落后于其他行业。在本文中，我们估计，更广泛地采用人工智能可使美国医疗支出节省5%至10%——按2019年美元计算，每年约为2000亿至3600亿美元。这些估计基于特定的、采用当今技术的人工智能应用案例，这些案例在未来五年内可以实现，并且不会牺牲质量或可及性。这些机会还可能带来非财务效益，例如提高医疗质量、增加可及性、改善患者体验以及提高临床医生满意度。我们进一步提供案例研究，并讨论如何克服人工智能部署中的挑战。最后，我们回顾了近期可能加速人工智能采用轨迹的市场趋势。

papers.title: Market Incompleteness and Exchange Rate Spill-over
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang
papers.abstract: Financial variables in third countries explain a significant fraction of bilateral exchange rate movements, even after local variables and common factors are controlled for. This paper proposes an explanation of this exchange rate spill-over pattern based on market incompleteness, which arises when agents in different countries bear different exposures to foreign risks, while the asset space is not complete enough to hedge out these risks. This mechanism weakens the link between exchange rates and local fundamentals, and generates additional exchange rate variations and comovements. To study bilateral exchange rates, it is not sufficient to consider only the local conditions.
papers.zh_title: 市场不完全性与汇率溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 即使在控制了本地变量和共同因素之后，第三国的金融变量也能解释双边汇率变动的很大一部分。本文基于市场不完全性提出了一种解释这种汇率溢出模式的理论。当不同国家的代理人对国外风险承担不同的敞口，而资产空间又不足以完全对冲这些风险时，市场不完全性就会出现。这种机制削弱了汇率与本地基本面之间的联系，并产生了额外的汇率变动和联动性。要研究双边汇率，仅考虑本地条件是不够的。

papers.title: Deterrence or Backlash? Arrests and the Dynamics of Domestic Violence
papers.authors: Sofia Amaral, Gordon B. Dahl, Victoria Endl-Geyer, Timo Hener, Helmut Rainer
papers.abstract: There is a vigorous debate on whether arrests for domestic violence (DV) will deter future abuse or create a retaliatory backlash. We study how arrests affect the dynamics of DV using administrative data for over 124,000 DV emergency calls (999 calls) for West Midlands, the second most populous county in England. We take advantage of conditional random assignment of officers to a case by call handlers, combined with systematic differences across police officers in their propensity to arrest suspected batterers. We find that an arrest reduces future DV calls in the ensuing year by 51%. This reduction is not driven by reduced reporting due to fear of retaliation, but instead a decline in repeat victimization. We reach this conclusion based on a threshold reporting model and its testable implications regarding (i) the severity of repeat DV calls and (ii) victim versus third-party reporting. Exploring mechanisms, we find that arrest virtually eliminates the large spike in re-victimization which occurs in the 48 hours after a call, consistent with arrest facilitating a cooling off period during a volatile, at-risk time. In the longer run, we estimate a sizeable deterrence effect. Substantiating this, arrest increases the probability an offender is charged with a crime. Our findings suggest that if the goal is to lower the number of domestic violence incidents, police should lower their threshold for arrest, not decriminalize domestic violence.
papers.zh_title: 威慑还是报复？逮捕与家庭暴力的动态变化
papers.zh_abstract: 关于家庭暴力逮捕是否会阻止未来的虐待行为或引发报复性反弹，存在激烈的争论。我们利用英格兰人口第二大郡西米德兰兹郡超过12.4万次家庭暴力紧急呼叫（999电话）的行政数据，研究逮捕如何影响家庭暴力的动态变化。我们利用了呼叫处理员将案件有条件随机分配给警官的做法，以及不同警官在逮捕嫌疑施暴者倾向上的系统性差异。我们发现，逮捕使未来一年内的家庭暴力呼叫减少了51%。这种减少并非由于害怕报复而减少报告，而是由于重复受害的减少。我们基于一个阈值报告模型及其关于（i）重复家庭暴力呼叫的严重性和（ii）受害者与第三方报告的可检验含义得出了这一结论。在探索机制时，我们发现逮捕几乎消除了呼叫后48小时内出现的重复受害大幅激增现象，这与逮捕在动荡、高风险时期促进冷静期的作用一致。从长期来看，我们估计出相当大的威慑效应。证实这一点的是，逮捕增加了罪犯被指控犯罪的可能性。我们的研究结果表明，如果目标是减少家庭暴力事件的数量，警方应降低逮捕门槛，而不是将家庭暴力非刑事化。

papers.title: Inflationary Effects of Fiscal Support to Households and Firms
papers.authors: Galina Hale, John C. Leer, Fernanda Nechio
papers.abstract: Fiscal support measures in response to the COVID-19 pandemic varied in their targeted beneficiaries. Relying on variability across 10 large economies, we study differences in the inflationary effects of fiscal support measures targeting consumers or businesses. Because conventional measures of real activity were distorted, we control for the underlying state of the real economy using households sentiment data. We find that fiscal support measures to consumers, but not firms, had inflationary effects that manifested 5 weeks following the announcement and peaked at 12 weeks. The magnitude of the effect was larger in an environment of improving consumer sentiment.
papers.zh_title: 对家庭和企业财政支持的通货膨胀效应
papers.zh_abstract: 针对COVID-19疫情的财政支持措施在目标受益者上有所不同。利用10个大型经济体的差异性，我们研究了针对消费者或企业的财政支持措施在通货膨胀效应上的差异。由于传统的实际经济活动指标被扭曲，我们使用家庭情绪数据来控制实体经济的潜在状态。我们发现，针对消费者的财政支持措施（而非针对企业的措施）具有通货膨胀效应，这种效应在公告后5周显现，并在12周达到峰值。在消费者情绪改善的环境下，这种效应的规模更大。

papers.title: The Marginal Disutility from Corruption in Social Programs: Evidence from Program Administrators and Beneficiaries
papers.authors: Arya Gaduh, Rema Hanna, Benjamin A. Olken
papers.abstract: Concerns about fraud in welfare programs common arguments worldwide against such programs. We conducted a survey experiment with over 28,000 welfare program administrators and over 19,000 beneficiaries in Indonesia to elicit the ‘marginal disutility from corruption,’ i.e., the trade-between more generous social assistance and losses due to corruption and fraud. Merely mentioning corruption reduced perceived program success, equivalent to distributing more than 20 percent less aid. However, respondents were not sensitive to the amount of corruption—respondents were willing to trade off $2 of additional losses for an additional $1 distributed to beneficiaries. Program administrators and beneficiaries had similar assessments.
papers.zh_title: 社会项目中腐败的边际负效用：来自项目管理员和受益者的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 对福利项目欺诈的担忧是全球范围内反对此类项目的常见论点。我们在印度尼西亚对超过28,000名福利项目管理员和超过19,000名受益者进行了一项调查实验，以引出“腐败的边际负效用”，即在更慷慨的社会援助与腐败和欺诈造成的损失之间的权衡。仅仅提及腐败就会降低感知的项目成功率，相当于减少了超过20%的援助分配。然而，受访者对腐败金额并不敏感——受访者愿意为每额外分配给受益者1美元而承受2美元的额外损失。项目管理员和受益者的评估相似。

papers.title: Trading Places: Mobility Responses of Native and Foreign-Born Adults to the China Trade Shock
papers.authors: David Autor, David Dorn, Gordon H. Hanson
papers.abstract: Previous research finds that the greater geographic mobility of foreign than native-born workers following economic shocks helps to facilitate local labor market adjustment to shifting regional economic conditions. We examine the role that immigration may have played in enabling U.S. commuting zones to respond to manufacturing job loss caused by import competition from China. Although population headcounts of the foreign-born fell by more than those of the native-born in regions exposed to the China trade shock, the overall contribution of immigration to labor market adjustment in this episode was small. Because most U.S. immigrants arrived in the country after manufacturing regions were already mature, few took up jobs in industries that would later see increased import penetration from China. The foreign-born share of the working-age population in regions with high trade exposure was only three-fifths that in regions with low exposure. Immigration thus appears more likely to aid adjustment to cyclical shocks, in which job loss occurs in regions that had recent booms in hiring, rather than facilitating adjustment to secular regional decline, in which hiring booms occurred in the more distant past.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：E24, F14, F16, J23, J31, L60, O47, R12, R23
papers.zh_title: 互换位置：本土和外国出生成年人对中国贸易冲击的流动性反应
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究发现，在经济冲击后，外国出生工人的地理流动性高于本土出生工人，这有助于促进地方劳动力市场对区域经济状况变化的调整。我们考察了移民在帮助美国通勤区应对由中国进口竞争导致的制造业岗位流失方面可能发挥的作用。尽管在遭受中国贸易冲击的地区，外国出生人口数量下降幅度大于本土出生人口，但移民在这一事件中对劳动力市场调整的总体贡献很小。因为大多数美国移民是在制造业地区已经成熟之后才抵达美国的，很少有人从事后来中国进口渗透率增加的行业。在贸易暴露度高的地区，外国出生人口占劳动年龄人口的比例仅为低暴露度地区的五分之三。因此，移民似乎更可能有助于应对周期性冲击（即岗位流失发生在近期招聘繁荣的地区），而不是促进对长期区域衰退（即招聘繁荣发生在更久远的过去）的调整。

papers.title: Peak-Hour Road Congestion Pricing: Experimental Evidence and Equilibrium Implications
papers.authors: Gabriel Kreindler
papers.abstract: Developing country megacities suffer from severe road traffic congestion, yet the level of congestion is not a direct measure of equilibrium inefficiency. I study the peak-hour traffic congestion equilibrium in Bangalore. To measure travel preferences, I use a model of departure time choice to design a field experiment with congestion pricing policies and implement it using precise GPS data. Commuter responses in the experiment reveal moderate schedule inflexibility and a high value of time. I then show that in Bangalore, traffic density has a moderate and linear impact on travel delay. My policy simulations with endogenous congestion indicate that optimal congestion charges would lead to a small reduction in travel times, and small commuter welfare gains. This result is driven primarily by the shape of the congestion externality. Overall, these results suggest limited commuter welfare benefits from peak-spreading traffic policies in cities like Bangalore.
papers.zh_title: 高峰时段道路拥堵定价：实验证据与均衡含义
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的大城市饱受严重道路交通拥堵之苦，然而拥堵水平并非均衡无效率的直接衡量指标。我研究了班加罗尔的高峰时段交通拥堵均衡。为了衡量出行偏好，我使用了一个出发时间选择模型来设计一个包含拥堵定价政策的实地实验，并使用精确的GPS数据实施该实验。实验中通勤者的反应揭示了中度的日程不灵活性和较高的时间价值。然后我表明，在班加罗尔，交通密度对出行延误有适度且线性的影响。我的包含内生拥堵的政策模拟表明，最优拥堵收费将导致出行时间的小幅减少和通勤者福利的小幅增加。这一结果主要由拥堵外部性的形状驱动。总体而言，这些结果表明，在班加罗尔这样的城市，错峰交通政策带来的通勤者福利收益有限。

papers.title: Exposure to Economic Distress during Pregnancy and Birth Outcomes
papers.authors: Mevlude Akbulut-Yuksel, Seyit M. Cilasun, Erdal Tekin, Belgi Turan

papers.title: An 'Austrian' Model of Global Value Chains
papers.authors: Pol Antràs

papers.title: The Trickling Up of Excess Savings
papers.authors: Adrien Auclert, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: We provide a simple framework connecting the distribution of excess savings across households to the dynamics of aggregate demand. Deficit-financed fiscal transfers generate excess savings. The poorest households with the highest MPCs spend down their excess savings the fastest, increasing other households’ incomes and their excess savings. This leads to a long-lasting increase in aggregate demand until, ultimately, excess savings have “trickled up” to the richest savers with the lowest MPCs, raising wealth inequality.
papers.zh_title: 超额储蓄的涓滴效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个简单的框架，将家庭间超额储蓄的分布与总需求动态联系起来。赤字融资的财政转移支付产生了超额储蓄。拥有最高边际消费倾向的最贫困家庭最快地花掉他们的超额储蓄，从而增加了其他家庭的收入和他们的超额储蓄。这导致总需求持续增长，直到最终超额储蓄“涓滴”到拥有最低边际消费倾向的最富裕储蓄者手中，从而加剧了财富不平等。

papers.title: The Market for CEOs: Evidence from Private Equity
papers.authors: Paul A. Gompers, Steven N. Kaplan, Vladimir Mukharlyamov

papers.title: Corporate Valuation: An Empirical Comparison of Discounting Methods
papers.authors: Nicolas Hommel, Augustin Landier, David Thesmar
papers.abstract: The key purpose of corporate finance is to provide methods to compute the value of projects. The baseline textbook recommendation is to use the Present Value (PV) formula of expected cash flows, with a discount rate based on the CAPM. In this paper, we ask what is, empirically, the best discounting method. To do this, we study listed firms, whose actual prices and expected cash flows can be observed. We compare different discounting approaches on their ability to predict actual market prices. We find that discounting based on expected returns (such as variants on the CAPM or multi-factor model), performs very poorly. Discounting with an Implied Cost of Capital (ICC), imputed from comparable firms, obtains much better results. In terms of pricing methods, significant, but small, improvements can be obtained by allowing, in a simple and actionable way, for a more flexible term structure of expected returns. We benchmark all of our results with flexible, purely statistical models of prices based on Random Forest algorithms. These models do barely better than NPV-based methods. Finally, we show that under standard assumptions about the production function, the value loss from using the CAPM can be sizable, of the order of 10%.
papers.zh_title: 公司估值：贴现方法的实证比较
papers.zh_abstract: 公司金融的核心目的是提供计算项目价值的方法。教科书的基本建议是使用预期现金流的现值公式，贴现率基于资本资产定价模型。本文从实证角度探讨哪种贴现方法最佳。为此，我们研究上市公司，其实际价格和预期现金流可被观测。我们比较不同贴现方法预测实际市场价格的能力。我们发现，基于预期收益（如资本资产定价模型或多因子模型的变体）的贴现方法表现非常差。使用从可比公司推算出的隐含资本成本进行贴现，可获得更好的结果。在定价方法方面，通过一种简单且可操作的方式，允许预期收益的期限结构更具灵活性，可以带来显著但微小的改进。我们以基于随机森林算法的灵活纯统计价格模型作为所有结果的基准。这些模型的表现仅略优于基于净现值的方法。最后，我们证明，在关于生产函数的标准假设下，使用资本资产定价模型造成的价值损失可能相当大，约为10%。

papers.title: A Theory of Fear of Floating
papers.authors: Javier Bianchi, Louphou Coulibaly
papers.abstract: Many central banks whose exchange rate regimes are classified as flexible are reluctant to let the exchange rate fluctuate. This phenomenon is known as “fear of floating”. We present a simple theory in which fear of floating emerges as an optimal policy outcome. The key feature of the model is an occasionally binding borrowing constraint linked to the exchange rate that introduces a feedback loop between aggregate demand and credit conditions. Contrary to the Mundellian paradigm, we show that a depreciation can be contractionary, and letting the exchange rate float can expose the economy to self-fulfilling crises.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E52, F33, F34, F36, F41, F45, G01
papers.zh_title: 浮动恐惧理论
papers.zh_abstract: 许多汇率制度被归类为浮动的中央银行，却不愿让汇率波动。这一现象被称为“浮动恐惧”。我们提出一个简单理论，其中浮动恐惧作为最优政策结果出现。模型的关键特征是一个与汇率相关的、偶尔具有约束力的借贷约束，它在总需求和信贷条件之间引入了反馈循环。与蒙代尔范式相反，我们证明贬值可能具有紧缩效应，而让汇率浮动可能使经济暴露于自我实现的危机之中。

papers.title: The Cost of Curbing Externalities with Market Power: Alcohol Regulations and Tax Alternatives
papers.authors: Christopher Conlon, Nirupama L. Rao
papers.abstract: Products with negative externalities are often subject to regulations that limit competition. The single-product case may suggest that it is irrelevant for aggregate welfare whether output is re-stricted via corrective taxes or limiting competition. However, when products are differentiated, curbing consumption through market power can be costly. Firms with market power may not only reduce total quantity, but distort the purchase decisions of inframarginal consumers. We examine a common regulation known as post-and-hold (PH) used by a dozen states for the sale of alcoholic beverages. Theoretically, PH eliminates competitive incentives among wholesalers selling identical products. We assemble unique data on distilled spirits from Connecticut, including matched man-ufacturer and wholesaler prices, to evaluate the welfare consequences of PH. For similar levels of ethanol consumption, PH leads to substantially lower consumer welfare (and government revenue) compared to simple taxes, because it distorts consumption choices away from high-quality/premium brands and towards low-quality brands. Replacing PH with volumetric or ethanol-based taxes could reduce consumption by 10-11% without reducing consumer surplus, and roughly triple tax revenues.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PE；JEL：D6, H21, H23, L13, L5, L66
papers.zh_title: 利用市场势力抑制外部性的成本：酒精监管与税收替代方案
papers.zh_abstract: 具有负外部性的产品通常受到限制竞争的监管。单一产品案例可能表明，通过矫正性税收还是限制竞争来限制产出，对总福利而言无关紧要。然而，当产品存在差异化时，通过市场势力抑制消费可能代价高昂。拥有市场势力的企业不仅可能减少总数量，还会扭曲边际内消费者的购买决策。我们研究了一种常见的监管措施，即“报价并持有”，美国有十几个州在酒精饮料销售中采用该措施。从理论上讲，“报价并持有”消除了销售相同产品的批发商之间的竞争激励。我们收集了康涅狄格州蒸馏酒的独特数据，包括匹配的制造商和批发商价格，以评估“报价并持有”的福利后果。在乙醇消费水平相似的情况下，与简单的税收相比，“报价并持有”导致消费者福利（和政府收入）大幅降低，因为它将消费选择从高质量/高端品牌扭曲到低质量品牌。用基于体积或乙醇的税收取代“报价并持有”，可以在不减少消费者剩余的情况下将消费量减少10-11%，并使税收收入大约增加两倍。

papers.title: Beyond Burnout: from Measuring to Forecasting
papers.authors: Bart Blackburn, Tiffany Chan, Elizabeth Cherot, Richard B. Freeman, Xi Hu, Eric Matt, C. Aubrey Rhodes
papers.abstract: Burnout of physicians and other medical personnel is a major problem in the economics of healthcare systems, potentially costing billions of dollars. Knowledge of the determinants and costs of burnout at the organization level is sparse, making it difficult to assess the net benefits of interventions to reduce burnout at the level where arguably the greatest change can be affected. In this paper, we use data from a midsize healthcare organization with about 500 clinicians in 2021-22 to advance analysis of clinical burnout in two ways. First, we estimate the costs of clinician burnout beyond the widely studied losses due to turnover. Including hard-to-measure and potentially long-term costs that arise from reduced patient satisfaction and lower productivity of burnt-out clinicians at work, our analysis suggests a much higher cost of burnout per clinician than previous estimates that exclude these costs. Second, we use standard medical billing and administrative operating data to forecast turnover and productivity of clinicians to serve as an early warning system. Accurate estimates of both the cost of burnout now and of likely future costs should help decision-makers be proactive in their approach to solving the burnout crisis currently affecting the healthcare industry. While our empirical analysis relates to a particular healthcare organization, the framework for quantifying the costs of burnout can be used by other organizations to assess the cost-effectiveness of ameliorative policies.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS；JEL：I1, I19, I3, I30, I31
papers.zh_title: 超越倦怠：从衡量到预测
papers.zh_abstract: 医生和其他医疗人员的倦怠是医疗系统经济学中的一个主要问题，可能造成数十亿美元的损失。关于组织层面倦怠的决定因素和成本的知识很少，这使得在可能产生最大变革的层面上评估减少倦怠干预措施的净收益变得困难。在本文中，我们使用一家中型医疗机构（2021-22年约有500名临床医生）的数据，以两种方式推进临床倦怠的分析。首先，我们估算了临床医生倦怠的成本，超出了广泛研究的因离职造成的损失。包括因患者满意度降低和倦怠临床医生工作效率下降而产生的难以衡量且可能长期存在的成本，我们的分析表明，每位临床医生的倦怠成本远高于排除这些成本的先前估计。其次，我们使用标准的医疗计费和行政运营数据来预测临床医生的离职率和生产力，作为早期预警系统。对当前倦怠成本和未来可能成本的准确估计，应有助于决策者在解决当前影响医疗行业的倦怠危机时采取积极主动的方法。虽然我们的实证分析涉及特定的医疗机构，但量化倦怠成本的框架可被其他组织用于评估改善政策的成本效益。

papers.title: Self-Preferencing at Amazon: Evidence from Search Rankings
papers.authors: Chiara Farronato, Andrey Fradkin, Alexander MacKay
papers.abstract: We study whether Amazon engages in self-preferencing on its marketplace by favoring its own brands (e.g., Amazon Basics) in search. To address this question, we collect new micro-level consumer search data using a custom browser extension installed by a panel of study participants. Using this methodology, we observe search positions, search behavior, and product characteristics. We find that Amazon branded products are indeed ranked higher than observably similar products in consumer search results. The prominence given to Amazon brands is 30% to 60% of the prominence granted to sponsored products.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D12, D83, L13, L15, L81
papers.zh_title: 亚马逊的自我优待：来自搜索排名的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究亚马逊是否在其市场上通过偏爱自有品牌（例如Amazon Basics）进行自我优待。为了解决这个问题，我们使用一个由研究参与者小组安装的自定义浏览器扩展程序，收集了新的微观层面消费者搜索数据。通过这种方法，我们观察了搜索位置、搜索行为和产品特征。我们发现，亚马逊品牌产品在消费者搜索结果中的排名确实高于外观相似的产品。亚马逊品牌获得的突出程度是赞助产品所获突出程度的30%至60%。

papers.title: The Stock Connect to China
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Yuehan Wang, Xiaoquan Zhuo
papers.abstract: As a bridge between Chinese mainland and international financial markets, the Stock Connect program allows investors on both sides to gain mutual access. By analyzing how cross-border flows respond to macro-related shocks, we show that compared with possibly homemade foreign investors, genuine foreign investors are more likely affected by the U.S. monetary shocks, the exchange rate risk, the U.S. market performance as well as the cross-market valuation disparity. The paper highlights the importance of profiling different groups of cross-border participants over market integration.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：E50, F65, G23, O16
papers.zh_title: 通往中国的股票互联互通
papers.zh_abstract: 作为中国内地与国际金融市场之间的桥梁，股票互联互通机制允许双方投资者相互进入。通过分析跨境资金流如何应对宏观相关冲击，我们表明，与可能属于本土的外国投资者相比，真正的外国投资者更可能受到美国货币政策冲击、汇率风险、美国市场表现以及跨市场估值差异的影响。本文强调了在市场一体化过程中对不同跨境参与者群体进行画像的重要性。

papers.title: Quantifying the Inflationary Impact of Fiscal Stimulus Under Supply Constraints
papers.authors: Julian di Giovanni, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Alvaro Silva, Muhammed A. Yildirim
papers.abstract: This paper builds on Baqaee and Farhi (2022) and di Giovanni et al. (2022) to quantify the contribution of fiscal policy on U.S. inflation over the Dec-2019 to June-2022 period. Model calibrations show that aggregate demand shocks explain roughly two-thirds of total model-based inflation, and that the fiscal stimulus contributed half or more of the total aggregate demand effect.
papers.zh_title: 在供给约束下量化财政刺激的通胀影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于Baqaee和Farhi（2022）以及di Giovanni等人（2022）的研究，量化了2019年12月至2022年6月期间财政政策对美国通胀的贡献。模型校准显示，总需求冲击解释了约三分之二的模型总通胀，而财政刺激贡献了总需求效应的一半或更多。

papers.title: Real Exchange Rate and International Reserves in the Era of Financial Integration
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Sy-Hoa Ho, Luu Duc Toan Huynh, Jamel Saadaoui, Gazi Salah Uddin
papers.abstract: The global financial crisis has brought increased attention to the consequences of international reserves holdings. In an era of high financial integration, we investigate the relationship between the real exchange rate and international reserves using nonlinear regressions and panel threshold regressions over 110 countries from 2001 to 2020. Our study shows the level of financial-institution development plays an essential role in explaining the buffer effect of international reserves. Countries with a low development of their financial institutions may manage the international reserves as a shield to deal with the negative consequences of terms-of-trade shocks on the real exchange rate. We also find the buffer effect is stronger in countries with intermediate levels of financial openness.
papers.zh_title: 金融一体化时代的实际汇率与国际储备
papers.zh_abstract: 全球金融危机使人们更加关注持有国际储备的后果。在金融高度一体化的时代，我们使用2001年至2020年110个国家的非线性回归和面板门槛回归，研究了实际汇率与国际储备之间的关系。我们的研究表明，金融机构的发展水平在解释国际储备的缓冲效应方面起着重要作用。金融机构发展水平较低的国家可能将国际储备作为盾牌，以应对贸易条件冲击对实际汇率的负面影响。我们还发现，在金融开放程度处于中等水平的国家，这种缓冲效应更强。

papers.title: Measuring the Share of Imports in Final Consumption
papers.authors: Emmanuel Dhyne, Ayumu Ken Kikkawa, Magne Mogstad, Felix Tintelnot
papers.abstract: We use Belgian data on domestic firm-to-firm transactions and ask how the measurement of the share of imports in final consumption is affected when one uses data recorded at higher levels of aggregation. We find that aggregating detailed firm-to-firm transaction data to the firm level and imposing homogeneity assumptions in the composition of firms’ input and output do not substantially affect the measurement of the share of imports in final consumption. However, using the national IO tables alone may understate the share of imports in final consumption and, thereby, the gains from trade.
papers.zh_title: 衡量最终消费中的进口份额
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用比利时国内企业间交易数据，探究当使用更高聚合层级记录的数据时，最终消费中进口份额的衡量会受到何种影响。我们发现，将详细的企业间交易数据聚合到企业层面，并对企业投入和产出的构成施加同质性假设，并不会显著影响最终消费中进口份额的衡量。然而，仅使用国家投入产出表可能会低估最终消费中的进口份额，从而低估贸易收益。

papers.title: The Effects of Competition on Physician Prescribing
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Anran Li, Molly Schnell
papers.abstract: This study investigates how competition influences the prescribing practices of physicians. U.S. state law changes granting nurse practitioners (NPs) the authority to prescribe controlled substances without physician oversight generate exogenous increases in competition by expanding patients’ options when seeking care. In response, we find that general practice physicians (GPs)—the physician specialty that competes most directly with NPs—significantly increase their prescribing of opioids and controlled anti-anxiety medications. GPs also increase their co-prescribing of opioids and benzodiazepines, a practice that violates prescribing guidelines. These effects are more pronounced in areas with more NPs per GP at baseline and lead to sizable increases in fatal drug overdoses. In contrast, we observe no changes in prescribing among physician specialties that do not compete with NPs, nor in the prescribing of drug classes not directly affected by the law changes. Our findings are consistent with a simple model of physician behavior in which competition for patients leads physicians to move toward the preferences of marginal patients. These results demonstrate that more competition will not always lead to improvements in patient care and can instead lead to excessive service provision.
papers.zh_title: 竞争对医生处方行为的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨竞争如何影响医生的处方行为。美国州法律变更赋予执业护士（NPs）在无需医生监督的情况下开具受控物质的权力，这通过扩大患者寻求护理时的选择范围，外生地增加了竞争。我们发现，全科医生（GPs）——与NPs竞争最直接的医生专科——显著增加了阿片类药物和受控抗焦虑药物的处方量。全科医生还增加了阿片类药物与苯二氮卓类药物的联合处方，这种做法违反了处方指南。这些效应在基线时每名全科医生对应更多NPs的地区更为显著，并导致致命药物过量事件大幅增加。相比之下，我们观察到不与NPs竞争的医生专科在处方行为上没有变化，也未受法律变更直接影响的药物类别处方也无变化。我们的发现与一个简单的医生行为模型一致，在该模型中，对患者的竞争促使医生转向边缘患者的偏好。这些结果表明，更多竞争并不总能改善患者护理，反而可能导致过度服务提供。

papers.title: Measuring Returns to Experience Using Supervisor Ratings of Observed Performance: The Case of Classroom Teachers
papers.authors: Courtney A. Bell, Jessalynn K. James, Eric S. Taylor, James Wyckoff
papers.abstract: We study the returns to experience in teaching, estimated using supervisor ratings from classroom observations. We describe the assumptions required to interpret changes in observation ratings over time as the causal effect of experience on performance. We compare two difference-in-differences strategies: the two-way fixed effects estimator common in the literature, and an alternative which avoids potential bias arising from effect heterogeneity. Using data from Tennessee and Washington, DC, we show empirical tests relevant to assessing the identifying assumptions and substantive threats—e.g., leniency bias, manipulation, changes in incentives or job assignments—and find our estimates are robust to several threats.
papers.zh_title: 利用主管对观察绩效的评分衡量经验回报：以课堂教师为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究教学经验的回报，使用来自课堂观察的主管评分进行估计。我们描述了将观察评分随时间的变化解释为经验对绩效的因果效应所需满足的假设。我们比较了两种双重差分策略：文献中常见的双向固定效应估计量，以及另一种避免因效应异质性而产生潜在偏差的替代方法。利用田纳西州和华盛顿特区的数据，我们展示了与评估识别假设和实质性威胁（例如，宽大偏差、操纵、激励或工作分配的变化）相关的实证检验，并发现我们的估计对若干威胁具有稳健性。

papers.title: International Capital Flow Pressures and Global Factors
papers.authors: Linda S. Goldberg, Signe Krogstrup
papers.abstract: The risk sensitivity of international capital flow pressures is explored using a new Exchange Market Pressure index that combines pressures observed in exchange rate adjustments with model-based estimates of incipient pressures that are masked by foreign exchange interventions and policy rate adjustments. The sensitivity of capital flow pressures to risk sentiment including for so-called safe haven currencies, evolves over time, varies significantly across countries, and differs between normal time and extreme stress events. Across countries, risk sensitivities and safe haven status are associated with self-fulfilling exchange rate expectations and carry trade funding currencies. In contrast, association with more traditional macroeconomic country characteristics is weak.
papers.zh_title: 国际资本流动压力与全球因素
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个新的汇率市场压力指数探讨国际资本流动压力的风险敏感性，该指数结合了汇率调整中观察到的压力与通过外汇干预和政策利率调整掩盖的潜在压力的模型估计值。资本流动压力对风险情绪（包括所谓的避险货币）的敏感性随时间演变，在不同国家间差异显著，并在正常时期与极端压力事件之间有所不同。跨国来看，风险敏感性和避险货币地位与自我实现的汇率预期和套利交易融资货币相关。相比之下，与更传统的宏观经济国家特征的关联较弱。

papers.title: Algorithmic Writing Assistance on Jobseekers’ Resumes Increases Hires
papers.authors: Emma Wiles, Zanele T. Munyikwa, John J. Horton
papers.abstract: There is a strong association between writing quality in resumes for new labor market entrants and whether they are ultimately hired. We show this relationship is, at least partially, causal: in a field experiment in an online labor market with nearly half a million jobseekers, treated jobseekers received algorithmic writing assistance on their resumes. Treated jobseekers were hired 8% more often. Contrary to concerns that the assistance takes away a valuable signal, we find no evidence that employers were less satisfied. We present a model where better writing does not signal ability but helps employers ascertain ability, rationalizing our findings.
papers.zh_title: 求职者简历的算法写作辅助能提高录用率
papers.zh_abstract: 新进入劳动力市场的求职者简历写作质量与其最终是否被录用之间存在强关联。我们证明这种关系至少部分是因果性的：在一个拥有近50万求职者的在线劳动力市场实地实验中，受处理的求职者获得了简历的算法写作辅助。受处理的求职者被录用的频率高出8%。与担心辅助会消除有价值信号的担忧相反，我们没有发现雇主满意度降低的证据。我们提出了一个模型，其中更好的写作并不传递能力信号，而是帮助雇主确定能力，从而合理化我们的发现。

papers.title: Reducing Administrative Barriers Increases Take-up of Subsidized Health Insurance Coverage: Evidence from a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Keith Marzilli Ericson, Timothy J. Layton, Adrianna McIntyre, Adam Sacarny
papers.abstract: Administrative barriers to social insurance program take-up are pervasive, including in subsidized health insurance. We conducted a randomized controlled trial with Massachusetts’ Affordable Care Act marketplace to reduce these barriers and other behavioral frictions. We find that a “check the box” streamlined enrollment intervention raises enrollment by 11%, more than personalized reminder letters (7.9% increase) or generic reminder letters (4.5% increase). Effects are concentrated among individuals eligible for zero-premium plans, who faced no further administrative burdens of setting up payments. Producing this enrollment effect through premium reduction would cost about $6 million in subsidies, highlighting the importance of these burdens.
papers.zh_title: 减少行政障碍能提高补贴健康保险的参保率：来自实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社会保险计划参保中的行政障碍普遍存在，包括在补贴健康保险中。我们与马萨诸塞州的《平价医疗法案》市场合作进行了一项随机对照试验，以减少这些障碍和其他行为摩擦。我们发现，一种“勾选即办”的简化参保干预使参保率提高了11%，高于个性化提醒信（提高7.9%）或通用提醒信（提高4.5%）。效应集中在有资格获得零保费计划的个人中，他们无需面临设立支付方面的进一步行政负担。通过保费削减产生这种参保效应将花费约600万美元的补贴，凸显了这些负担的重要性。

papers.title: Criminal Charges, Risk Assessment, and Violent Recidivism in Cases of Domestic Abuse
papers.authors: Dan A. Black, Jeffrey Grogger, Tom Kirchmaier, Koen Sanders
papers.abstract: Domestic abuse is a pervasive global problem. Here we analyze two approaches to reducing violent DA recidivism. One involves charging the perpetrator with a crime; the other provides protective services to the victim on the basis of a formal risk assessment carried out by the police. We use detailed administrative data to estimate the average effect of treatment on the treated using inverse propensity-score weighting (IPW). We then make use of causal forests to study heterogeneity in the estimated treatment effects. We find that pressing charges substantially reduces the likelihood of violent recidivism. The analysis also reveals substantial heterogeneity in the effect of pressing charges. In contrast, the risk-assessment process has no discernible effect.
papers.zh_title: 刑事指控、风险评估与家庭虐待案件中的暴力再犯
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭虐待是一个普遍的全球性问题。本文分析了两种减少暴力家庭虐待再犯的方法。一种涉及对施暴者提起刑事指控；另一种则基于警方进行的正式风险评估，为受害者提供保护服务。我们利用详细的行政数据，通过逆概率加权（IPW）估计处理对受处理者的平均效应。然后，我们利用因果森林研究估计处理效应的异质性。我们发现，提起指控显著降低了暴力再犯的可能性。分析还揭示了提起指控效应的显著异质性。相比之下，风险评估过程没有可察觉的效应。

papers.title: Wildfire Influence on Recent US Pollution Trends
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Marissa L. Childs, Brandon De la Cuesta, Minghao Qiu, Jessica Li, Carlos F. Gould, Sam Heft-Neal, Michael Wara
papers.abstract: Steady improvements in ambient air quality in the US over the past several decades have led to large public health benefits, and the policies that helped drive these improvements are considered landmarks in successful environmental policymaking. However, recent trends in PM2.5 concentrations, a key pollutant, have stagnated or begun to reverse throughout much of the US. We quantify the contribution of wildfire smoke to these trends and find that since 2016, wildfire smoke has significantly slowed or reversed previous improvements in average annual PM2.5 concentrations in two-thirds of US states, eroding 23% of previous gains on average in those states (equivalent to 3.6 years of air quality progress) and over 50% in multiple western states. Smoke influence on trends in extreme PM2.5 concentrations is detectable by 2010 and is concentrated in a dozen western states. Wildfire-driven increases in ambient PM2.5 concentrations are unregulated under current air pollution law, and, absent additional intervention, wildfire's contribution to regional and national air quality trends is likely to grow as the climate continues to warm.
papers.zh_title: 野火对美国近期污染趋势的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 过去几十年来，美国环境空气质量的稳步改善带来了巨大的公共健康效益，推动这些改善的政策被视为成功环境政策制定的里程碑。然而，美国大部分地区关键污染物PM2.5浓度的近期趋势已停滞或开始逆转。我们量化了野火烟雾对这些趋势的贡献，发现自2016年以来，野火烟雾显著减缓或逆转了美国三分之二州之前年均PM2.5浓度的改善，平均侵蚀了这些州先前23%的改善成果（相当于3.6年的空气质量进步），并在多个西部州超过50%。烟雾对极端PM2.5浓度趋势的影响在2010年即可检测到，并集中在十几个西部州。野火导致的PM2.5浓度增加在现行空气污染法律下不受监管，且在没有额外干预的情况下，随着气候持续变暖，野火对区域和国家空气质量趋势的贡献可能会增加。

papers.title: Data Union and Regulation in a Data Economy
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Simon Mayer
papers.abstract: In a model of data-driven firm competition, data are jointly produced by users, buying firms’ services and contributing data, and firms, investing in data infrastructure and collection. Data collection improves services, benefiting users, but may reduce competition, harming users. Dispersed users do not internalize the impact of their data contribution on (i) service quality, (ii) competition, and (iii) firms’ investment incentives, causing inefficient data over- or underinvestment. Unlike data sharing, user privacy protection policies, or data markets, a data union — which coordinates users’ data contributions — or data trust — which intermediates data sales — can address these inefficiencies.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：L10, L41, L50, O30
papers.zh_title: 数据经济中的数据联盟与监管
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个数据驱动的企业竞争模型中，数据由用户（通过购买企业服务并贡献数据）和企业（通过投资数据基础设施与收集）共同生产。数据收集能改善服务，使用户受益，但也可能削弱竞争，损害用户利益。分散的用户不会内化其数据贡献对（i）服务质量、（ii）竞争以及（iii）企业投资激励的影响，从而导致数据投资过度或不足的低效率。与数据共享、用户隐私保护政策或数据市场不同，数据联盟（协调用户的数据贡献）或数据信托（中介数据销售）能够解决这些低效率问题。

papers.title: Representation and Hesitancy in Population Health Research: Evidence from a COVID-19 Antibody Study
papers.authors: Deniz Dutz, Michael Greenstone, Ali Hortaçsu, Santiago Lacouture, Magne Mogstad, Azeem M. Shaikh, Alexander Torgovitsky, Winnie van Dijk
papers.abstract: We examine why minority and poor households are often underrepresented in studies that require active participation. Using data from a serological study with randomized participation incentives, we find large participation gaps by race and income when incentives are low, but not when incentives are high. We develop a framework for using randomized incentives to disentangle the roles of hesitancy and non-contact in driving the participation gaps, and find that hesitancy is the predominant factor. Hesitancy rates strongly correlate with hospitalization rates and COVID-19 risk, suggesting that individuals facing higher health risks may be underrepresented in studies with low incentives.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：C40, C42, C83, I1, I14, I30, O31
papers.zh_title: 人口健康研究中的代表性与犹豫：来自COVID-19抗体研究的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了为何少数族裔和贫困家庭在需要主动参与的研究中往往代表性不足。利用一项带有随机参与激励的血清学研究数据，我们发现当激励较低时，种族和收入之间存在巨大的参与差距，但当激励较高时则不存在。我们开发了一个利用随机激励来区分犹豫和非接触在导致参与差距中作用的框架，并发现犹豫是主要因素。犹豫率与住院率和COVID-19风险高度相关，这表明面临更高健康风险的个体在低激励研究中可能代表性不足。

papers.title: Do Conflict of Interests Disclosures Work? Evidence from Citations in Medical Journals
papers.authors: Christian Leuz, Anup Malani, Maximilian Muhn, Laszlo Jakab
papers.abstract: Financial ties between drug companies and medical researchers are thought to bias studies published in medical journals. To enable readers to account for such bias, most medical journals require authors to disclose potential conflicts of interest. We examine whether disclosure reduces article citations, indicating a discount. A challenge to estimating this effect is selection as drug companies may seek out higher quality authors. Our analysis confirms this positive association. Including observable controls for article and author quality attenuates but does not eliminate this relation. We perform three tests. First, we show that the positive association is weaker for review articles, which are more susceptible to bias. Second, we examine article recommendations to family physicians among articles that are a priori more homogenous in quality. We find a significantly negative association between disclosure and expert recommendations, consistent with discounting. Third, we conduct an analysis within author and article, exploiting journal policy changes that result in conflict disclosure by an author. We examine the effect of this disclosure on citations to a previously published article by the same author. This analysis reveals a negative citation effect. Overall, our evidence is consistent with the notion that other researchers discount articles with disclosed conflicts.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EH, LE；JEL：D83, D84, G18, K20, L51, M40, O31
papers.zh_title: 利益冲突披露有效吗？来自医学期刊引用的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 制药公司与医学研究人员之间的财务关系被认为会偏倚医学期刊发表的研究。为使读者能够考虑这种偏倚，大多数医学期刊要求作者披露潜在的利益冲突。我们考察披露是否会减少文章引用，从而表明存在折扣。估计这一效应的挑战在于选择性问题，因为制药公司可能寻求更高质量的作者。我们的分析证实了这种正相关关系。纳入文章和作者质量的可观测控制变量会减弱但不会消除这种关系。我们进行了三项检验。首先，我们表明，对于更容易受偏倚影响的综述文章，这种正相关关系较弱。其次，我们在先验质量更同质的文章中，考察了向家庭医生推荐的文章。我们发现，披露与专家推荐之间存在显著的负相关关系，这与折扣效应一致。第三，我们在作者和文章内部进行分析，利用导致作者披露利益冲突的期刊政策变化。我们考察了这种披露对同一作者先前发表文章引用的影响。该分析揭示了负面的引用效应。总体而言，我们的证据与其他研究者对披露冲突的文章打折扣的观点一致。

papers.title: Harm Reduction: When Does It Improve Health, and When Does it Backfire?
papers.authors: John Cawley, Davide Dragone
papers.abstract: Some harm reduction strategies encourage individuals to switch from a harmful addictive good to a less harmful addictive good; examples include e-cigarettes (substitutes for combustible cigarettes) and methadone and buprenorphine (substitutes for opioids). These have proven to be controversial. Advocates argue that people struggling with addiction benefit because they can switch to a less harmful substance, but opponents argue that this could encourage abstainers to begin using the harm-reduction method or even, eventually, the original addictive good. This paper builds on theories of addiction to model the introduction of a harm reduction method, and demonstrates the conditions under which each side is correct.
papers.zh_title: 减害：何时改善健康，何时适得其反？
papers.zh_abstract: 一些减害策略鼓励个体从有害成瘾品转向危害较小的成瘾品；例如电子烟（可燃香烟的替代品）以及美沙酮和丁丙诺啡（阿片类药物的替代品）。这些策略已被证明存在争议。支持者认为，挣扎于成瘾问题的人可以转而使用危害较小的物质而受益，但反对者认为，这可能会鼓励原本不使用者开始使用减害方法，甚至最终使用原始成瘾品。本文基于成瘾理论，对减害方法的引入进行建模，并论证了每一方观点成立的条件。

papers.title: Which Firms Gain from Digital Advertising? Evidence from a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Weijia Dai, Hyunjin Kim, Michael Luca
papers.abstract: Measuring the returns of advertising opportunities continues to be a challenge for many businesses. We design and run a field experiment in collaboration with Yelp across 18,294 firms in the restaurant industry to understand which types of businesses gain more from digital advertising. We randomly assign 7,209 restaurants to freely receive Yelp’s standard ads package for three months. The scale of the experiment gives us a unique opportunity to assess the heterogeneity in advertising effectiveness across a variety of business attributes. We find that restaurants that receive advertising on Yelp observe on average a 7-19% increase in a wide range of purchase intention outcomes, as well as a 5% increase in customer reviews. We find that gains are heterogeneous across firms, with independent and higher-rated businesses observing larger gains, as well as those with more reviews and higher pre-experiment organic traffic.
papers.zh_title: 哪些企业从数字广告中获益？来自实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 衡量广告机会的回报对许多企业来说仍然是一个挑战。我们与Yelp合作，在餐饮行业的18294家企业中设计并开展了一项实地实验，以了解哪些类型的企业从数字广告中获益更多。我们随机分配7209家餐厅免费获得Yelp的标准广告套餐三个月。实验的规模为我们评估广告效果在不同企业属性间的异质性提供了独特机会。我们发现，在Yelp上投放广告的餐厅，在一系列购买意愿指标上平均增长了7-19%，同时客户评论数量增加了5%。我们发现，收益在企业间存在异质性，独立经营和评分较高的企业收益更大，评论数量较多以及实验前自然流量较高的企业也是如此。

papers.title: New Institutional Economics and Cliometrics
papers.authors: Eric C. Alston, Lee J. Alston, Bernardo Mueller
papers.abstract: The New Institutional Economics (NIE) has its early roots in Cliometrics. Cliometrics began with a focus on using neoclassical theory to develop and test hypotheses in economic history. But empirical consideration of economic and political development within and across countries is limited, absent consideration of the institutional context. The NIE as applied in economic history first focused on the roles of transaction costs and property rights. From this micro-institutional perspective, the NIE expanded its focus to the role of institutions and norms on economic development as well as how economic forces along with political institutional variance influences outcomes both within and across countries. This involves considering both forces that impede and promote economic and political convergence across countries as well the forces that determine a transition to a new economic or political trajectory altogether. Testing for the determinants of economic and political development is plagued with omitted variables and endogeneity concerns, a constraint which has recently prompted scholars to draw on complexity theory to further supplement the NIE and Cliometrics.
papers.zh_title: 新制度经济学与计量史学
papers.zh_abstract: 新制度经济学（NIE）的早期根源在于计量史学。计量史学最初侧重于运用新古典理论来提出和检验经济史中的假说。但若不考虑制度背景，对国内及跨国经济与政治发展的实证研究就会受到限制。应用于经济史的NIE首先关注交易成本和产权的作用。从这种微观制度视角出发，NIE将其关注点扩展到制度与规范对经济发展的作用，以及经济力量与政治制度差异如何共同影响国内及跨国结果。这涉及考虑阻碍和促进各国经济与政治趋同的力量，以及决定向全新经济或政治轨迹转型的力量。检验经济与政治发展的决定因素受到遗漏变量和内生性问题的困扰，这一限制近期促使学者们借鉴复杂性理论，以进一步补充NIE和计量史学。

papers.title: Bitcoin Mining Meets Wall Street: A Study of Publicly Traded Crypto Mining Companies
papers.authors: Hanna Halaburda, David Yermack
papers.abstract: This paper studies the operations and financial valuations of 13 cryptocurrency mining companies that are listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange and have facilities in North America. We find that miners using Texas wind power are offline more than other miners, in a more erratic pattern. Yet, despite having relatively low activity levels, these Texas miners are more profitable than those using more stable sources of energy such as hyrdo power or solar power, as reflected in significantly higher enterprise values. Our model shows that miners using sustainable energy may be more profitable than those using conventional sources, despite the shutdowns, as they benefit from extremely low prices when there is oversupply of sustainable energy (e.g., strong winds). The model also shows that it may be beneficial for the electric utility to offer miners compensation for curtailment of their activity when there is undersupply of energy (e.g. lack of wind), which we also observe in our sample. This compensation further increases profits of the miners. We find a negative and significant beta between crypto mining stocks and an index of electric utilities, suggesting that ownership of a crypto mining company might provide a useful channel for risk management in the electric power industry.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, ME, PR；JEL：G23, L23, L94
papers.zh_title: 比特币挖矿遇上华尔街：对上市加密矿企的研究
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了13家在纳斯达克上市且设施位于北美的加密货币挖矿公司的运营和财务估值。我们发现，使用德克萨斯州风电的矿工比其他矿工离线时间更长，且模式更不稳定。然而，尽管活动水平相对较低，这些德克萨斯州的矿工比使用水电或太阳能等更稳定能源的矿工更盈利，这体现在显著更高的企业价值上。我们的模型表明，使用可持续能源的矿工可能比使用传统能源的矿工更盈利，尽管存在停机，因为他们受益于可持续能源（如强风）供应过剩时的极低价格。该模型还表明，当能源供应不足（如无风）时，电力公司向矿工提供补偿以削减其活动可能是有益的，我们在样本中也观察到了这一点。这种补偿进一步增加了矿工的利润。我们发现加密挖矿股票与电力公用事业指数之间存在显著负贝塔值，这表明持有加密挖矿公司的股份可能为电力行业提供有用的风险管理渠道。

papers.title: Distorted Innovation: Does the Market Get the Direction of Technology Right?
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu
papers.abstract: In the presence of markup differences, externalities and other social considerations, the equilibrium direction of innovation can be systematically distorted. This paper builds a simple model of endogenous technology, which generalizes existing comparative static results and characterizes potential distortions in the direction of innovation. I show that empirical findings across a number of different areas are consistent with this framework's predictions and I use data from several studies to estimate its key parameters. Combining these numbers with rough estimates of differential externalities and markups, I provide suggestive evidence that equilibrium distortions in the direction of technology can be substantial in the context of industrial automation, health care, and energy, and correcting these distortions could have sizable welfare benefits.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, LS, PR；JEL：C65, J23, J24, L65, O14, O31, O33
papers.zh_title: 扭曲的创新：市场能否正确引导技术方向？
papers.zh_abstract: 在存在加价差异、外部性及其他社会考量的情况下，创新的均衡方向可能被系统性扭曲。本文构建了一个简单的内生技术模型，该模型概括了现有的比较静态结果，并刻画了创新方向上的潜在扭曲。我表明，多个不同领域的实证发现与该框架的预测一致，并利用多项研究的数据估计了其关键参数。将这些数字与差异外部性和加价的粗略估计相结合，我提供了提示性证据，表明在工业自动化、医疗保健和能源领域，技术方向的均衡扭曲可能相当严重，而纠正这些扭曲可能带来可观的福利收益。

papers.title: Back to the 1980s or Not? The Drivers of Inflation and Real Risks in Treasury Bonds
papers.authors: Carolin Pflueger
papers.abstract: I use nominal and real bond risks as new moments to discipline a New Keynesian asset pricing model, where supply shocks, demand shocks, and monetary policy are the fundamental drivers of inflation. Endogenously time-varying risk premia imply that nominal bond risks—as measured by their stock market beta—are a forward-looking indicator of stagflation risks. Calibrating the model separately for the 1980s and the 2000s, I show that positive nominal bond betas in the 1980s resulted from a “perfect storm” of supply shocks and a reactive monetary policy rule, but not from either supply shocks or monetary policy in isolation.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E0, E31, E40, G10, G12
papers.zh_title: 回到1980年代还是并非如此？国债通胀风险与真实风险的驱动因素
papers.zh_abstract: 我使用名义和真实债券风险作为新的矩条件来约束一个新凯恩斯主义资产定价模型，其中供给冲击、需求冲击和货币政策是通胀的基本驱动因素。内生时变的风险溢价意味着名义债券风险——以其股票市场贝塔值衡量——是滞胀风险的前瞻性指标。分别针对1980年代和2000年代校准模型后，我表明，1980年代的正名义债券贝塔值是由供给冲击和反应性货币政策规则的“完美风暴”共同导致的，而非供给冲击或货币政策单独作用的结果。

papers.title: Digital Hermits
papers.authors: Jeanine Miklós-Thal, Avi Goldfarb, Avery M. Haviv, Catherine Tucker
papers.abstract: When a user shares multi-dimensional data about themselves with a firm, the firm learns about the correlations of different dimensions of user data. We incorporate this type of learning into a model of a data market in which a firm acquires data from users with privacy concerns. User data is multi-dimensional, and each user can share no data, only non-sensitive data, or their full data with the firm. As the firm collects more data and becomes better at drawing inferences about a user’s privacy-sensitive data from their non-sensitive data, the share of new users who share no data (“digital hermits”) grows. At the same time, the share of new users who share their full data also grows. The model therefore predicts a polarization of users’ data sharing choices away from non-sensitive data sharing to no sharing and full sharing.
papers.zh_title: 数字隐士
papers.zh_abstract: 当用户向企业分享关于自身的多维数据时，企业会学习用户数据不同维度之间的相关性。我们将这种学习行为纳入一个数据市场模型，在该模型中，企业从有隐私担忧的用户那里获取数据。用户数据是多维的，每个用户可以选择不分享任何数据、仅分享非敏感数据或分享全部数据给企业。随着企业收集更多数据并更擅长从用户的非敏感数据推断其隐私敏感数据，不分享任何数据的新用户（“数字隐士”）比例会增长。同时，分享全部数据的新用户比例也会增长。因此，该模型预测用户的数据分享选择会出现两极分化，从分享非敏感数据转向不分享和分享全部数据。

papers.title: Task Mismatch and Salary Penalties: Evidence from the Biomedical PhD Labor Market
papers.authors: Holden A. Diethorn, Gerald R. Marschke
papers.abstract: We use the labor market for doctorates in the biomedical sciences, where career dislocation is common, as a case study of skill-task mismatch and its consequences. Using longitudinal, worker-level data on biomedical doctorates, we investigate mismatch as an explanation for the negative pecuniary returns to postdoc training. Our data contain unique worker-level job task information that allows us to compare the skills acquired in the years just after graduation to the tasks required in later employment. Our findings reveal a postdoc salary penalty when task mismatch is high, which is frequent, and a salary premium when skills align with tasks. Differences in accumulated task-specific human capital explain the between-sector heterogeneity in the returns to postdoctoral training, including the large and persistent salary penalties from postdoctoral training in industry, and the penalty overall. Task mismatch as a cost of pursuing risky careers in science and in other fields requiring large upfront investments in task-specific human capital has received little attention in the empirical labor literature.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：I26, J24, J31, J44
papers.zh_title: 任务错配与薪资惩罚：来自生物医学博士劳动力市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们以生物医学科学博士的劳动力市场（其中职业错位很常见）作为技能-任务错配及其后果的案例研究。利用生物医学博士的纵向个体层面数据，我们研究错配作为博士后培训负货币回报的解释。我们的数据包含独特的个体层面工作任务信息，使我们能够比较毕业几年后获得的技能与后续就业中所需的任务。我们的发现揭示了当任务错配程度高时（这种情况很常见）存在博士后薪资惩罚，而当技能与任务匹配时则存在薪资溢价。累积的任务特定人力资本差异解释了博士后培训回报的部门间异质性，包括产业界博士后培训带来的巨大且持久的薪资惩罚以及总体上的惩罚。任务错配作为追求科学及其他需要大量前期投资于任务特定人力资本的冒险职业的成本，在实证劳动文献中很少受到关注。

papers.title: Financial Crisis in a Socialist Setting: Impact on Political Behavior, Social Trust, and Economic Values
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Netanel Ben-Porath, Victor Lavy, Michal Palgi
papers.abstract: Research on the political and social impacts of financial crises has focused chiefly on free market economies, hindering our understanding of their effects in other settings. We exploit an episode of a financial crisis that hit the Israeli kibbutzim to study its impact in a socialist context. Contrary to findings in capitalistic economies, the crisis led to increased support of liberalized labor markets and reduced support for leftist political parties. These effects persisted in the long run, especially among the young. The crisis also reduced trust in leadership, but trust was restored shortly after agreements to settle the debt were signed, relieving the severity of the crisis. Our findings suggest that economic shocks may have different effects in a free market and socialist systems, in both cases leading individuals to question their current system.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, POL；JEL：J0, P00
papers.zh_title: 社会主义背景下的金融危机：对政治行为、社会信任和经济价值观的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 关于金融危机政治和社会影响的研究主要集中于自由市场经济，这阻碍了我们对其他背景下其影响的理解。我们利用一场袭击以色列基布兹的金融危机事件，研究其在社会主义背景下的影响。与资本主义经济中的发现相反，这场危机导致对自由化劳动力市场的支持增加，并减少了对左翼政党的支持。这些影响在长期内持续存在，尤其是在年轻人中。危机还降低了对领导层的信任，但在签署债务清偿协议以缓解危机严重性后不久，信任得以恢复。我们的发现表明，经济冲击在自由市场和社会主义体系中可能产生不同影响，在两种情况下都会导致个体质疑他们当前的体系。

papers.title: Reversals and the Returns to Liquidity Provision
papers.authors: Wei Dai, Mamdouh Medhat, Robert Novy-Marx, Savina Rizova
papers.abstract: Different aspects of liquidity impact the performance of short-run reversals in different ways, consistent with the predictions of microstructure models. Higher volatility is associated with faster, initially stronger reversals, while lower turnover is associated with more persistent, ultimately stronger reversals. These facts also hold outside the US and explain several seemingly disparate results in the literature.
papers.zh_title: 反转与流动性供给的回报
papers.zh_abstract: 流动性的不同方面以不同方式影响短期反转的表现，这与微观结构模型的预测一致。较高的波动性与更快、初始更强的反转相关，而较低的换手率与更持久、最终更强的反转相关。这些事实在美国以外也成立，并解释了文献中几个看似不同的结果。

papers.title: Missing Discussions: Institutional Constraints in the Islamic Political Tradition
papers.authors: A. Arda Gitmez, James A. Robinson, Mehdi Shadmehr
papers.abstract: Institutional constraints to prevent abuses of power have been considered essential in the West. An intellectual tradition emerged to justify them. We identify a puzzle: such an intellectual tradition did not exist in the Islamic world, despite the recognition of potential for abuse. We develop a model to explain this difference in normative traditions. Islamic law was more encompassing than divine law in the West, making it easier for citizens to identify and address abuses of power through collective action. Islamic tradition’s core assumptions made the collective action approach to accountability preferable to the institutional approach favored in the West.
papers.zh_title: 缺失的讨论：伊斯兰政治传统中的制度约束
papers.zh_abstract: 防止权力滥用的制度约束在西方被认为至关重要，并产生了一种为其辩护的知识传统。我们识别出一个谜题：在伊斯兰世界，尽管认识到滥用的可能性，但这样的知识传统并不存在。我们开发了一个模型来解释这种规范传统的差异。伊斯兰法比西方的神法更具包容性，这使得公民更容易通过集体行动识别和应对权力滥用。伊斯兰传统的核心假设使得集体行动的问责方法比西方偏好的制度方法更受青睐。

papers.title: Growth and Risk: A View from International Trade
papers.authors: Pravin Krishna, Andrei A. Levchenko, Lin Ma, William F. Maloney
papers.abstract: This paper studies the cross-country patterns of risky innovation and growth through the lens of international trade. We use a simple theoretical framework of risky quality upgrading by firms under varying levels of financial development to derive two predictions. First, the mean rate of quality growth and the corresponding cross-sectional variance of quality growth in a country are positively correlated. Second, both the mean and variance of quality changes are positively correlated with the country's level of financial development. We then test these two hypotheses using data on disaggregated (HS10) bilateral exports to the United States. The patterns in the data are consistent with the theory. The mean and the variance of quality growth are strongly positively correlated with each other. Countries with greater financial depth are systematically characterized by higher mean and higher variance in the growth of product quality. Our findings suggest a mean-variance trade-off in product quality improvements along the development path. Increases in financial depth do not imply lower variability of changes in the product space.
papers.zh_title: 增长与风险：来自国际贸易的视角
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过国际贸易的视角研究各国风险创新与增长的跨国模式。我们使用一个简单的理论框架，描述企业在不同金融发展水平下进行风险质量升级的行为，从而得出两个预测。首先，一个国家质量增长的平均率与相应的质量增长横截面方差呈正相关。其次，质量变化的均值和方差都与该国的金融发展水平呈正相关。然后，我们利用美国分产品（HS10）双边出口数据检验这两个假设。数据中的模式与理论一致。质量增长的均值和方差彼此强烈正相关。金融深度更大的国家在产品质量增长方面系统性地表现出更高的均值和更高的方差。我们的发现表明，在发展路径上，产品质量改进存在均值-方差权衡。金融深度的增加并不意味着产品空间变化波动性的降低。

papers.title: Florida (Un)Chained
papers.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Matthew S. Jaremski
papers.abstract: Excessively easy bank credit – visible in unusually small credit risk spreads and rapid loan growth – is often posited as a root cause of unsustainable asset price booms. This paper considers whether an increase in bank risk tolerance drove high loan growth that coincided with Florida’s land boom of the mid-1920s, the first Florida housing boom in which buyers from around the nation participated. Estimates suggest that an astounding 20 million lots were offered for sale in Florida at that time. Our detailed narrative and empirical evidence suggest that the facts do not require the assumption of increased risk appetite during the boom. We find that most Florida banks that failed were associated with the Manley-Anthony chain and did not exhibit increases in observable indicators of risk during the boom. Instead, their increases in risk mainly reflected hidden choices either to lend to bank insiders on a preferential basis or to fund other banks that were engaged in such risky and often fraudulent activities.
