Bank regulators seem to have been complicit in the hidden risk-taking. Even informed investors would have been left in the dark about the amount of risk that was growing in Florida.
papers.zh_title: 佛罗里达（未）被束缚
papers.zh_abstract: 过度宽松的银行信贷——表现为异常小的信用风险利差和快速的贷款增长——常被认为是不可持续资产价格繁荣的根本原因。本文探讨银行风险容忍度的提高是否推动了高贷款增长，而这一增长恰逢1920年代中期佛罗里达的土地繁荣，这是第一次有全国买家参与的佛罗里达住房繁荣。估计显示，当时佛罗里达有惊人的2000万块地块被挂牌出售。我们详细的叙述和实证证据表明，事实并不需要假设繁荣期间风险偏好增加。我们发现，大多数倒闭的佛罗里达银行都与曼利-安东尼连锁银行有关，并且在繁荣期间并未表现出可观察风险指标的上升。相反，它们的风险增加主要反映了隐藏的选择，即要么以优惠条件向银行内部人士放贷，要么为从事此类高风险且往往欺诈活动的其他银行提供资金。银行监管机构似乎对这些隐藏的风险承担行为默许。即使是有信息的投资者也无法了解佛罗里达州不断增长的风险规模。

papers.title: Blockchain for Timely Transfer of Intellectual Property
papers.authors: Dongling Cai, Yi Qian, Ning Nan
papers.abstract: This article examines how blockchain technology can facilitate innovation by streamlining the licensing process of intellectual property (IP). In the traditional world, there can be tension between inventors and developers when it comes to licensing IP before a patent is granted. Developers need more information about the IP in order to estimate its value, while inventors are hesitant to disclose too much information for fear that developers will use it to develop and commercialize the IP without licensing it. The blockchain's ability to create a transparent and secure record of the inventing process can alleviate these concerns. On the one hand, blockchain's traceability helps protect IP from infringement, encouraging inventors to disclose more information about their high-value IP. On the other hand, developers have more incentive to license IP rather than infringe on it because of the risk of punishment. The size of the community maintaining the blockchain is a crucial factor in ensuring the validity of the blockchain. A community that is too large or too small would not be able to reach equilibrium. These findings provide insights into how blockchain can be used to improve the economics and marketing of IP.
papers.zh_title: 用于知识产权及时转让的区块链
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了区块链技术如何通过简化知识产权（IP）的许可流程来促进创新。在传统世界中，在专利授予之前许可知识产权时，发明人和开发者之间可能存在紧张关系。开发者需要更多关于知识产权的信息来评估其价值，而发明人则不愿披露过多信息，担心开发者会利用这些信息在未获得许可的情况下开发和商业化该知识产权。区块链创建透明且安全的发明过程记录的能力可以缓解这些担忧。一方面，区块链的可追溯性有助于保护知识产权免受侵权，鼓励发明人披露更多关于其高价值知识产权的信息。另一方面，由于存在惩罚风险，开发者更有动力许可知识产权而非侵权。维护区块链的社区规模是确保区块链有效性的关键因素。社区过大或过小都无法达到均衡。这些发现为如何利用区块链改善知识产权的经济学和营销提供了见解。

papers.title: Scaling Smart Contracts via Layer-2 Technologies: Some Empirical Evidence
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Xiang Hui, Catherine Tucker, Luofeng Zhou
papers.abstract: Blockchain-based smart contracts can potentially replace certain traditional contracts through decentralized enforcement and reduced transaction costs. However, scalability is a key bottleneck hindering their broader application and adoption, often leading to concentrated or exclusive networks. To avoid falling short of the original promise of the technology, firms actively explore "layer-2" methods for scaling. We provide some initial evidence on the economic implications of a layer-2 scaling solution, which moves information aggregation from on-chain to off-chain peer-to-peer networks. A parallel-system experiment allows clean identification because we observe the same unit in the treatment and control systems at the same time. We find that this scaling solution reduces operating costs by 76%, and importantly, leads to decentralization with lower market concentration and more participation, which in turn improves data accuracy. The findings provide initial evidence of how blockchain and smart contracting technologies evolve towards achieving decentralized and scalable trust.
papers.zh_title: 通过二层技术扩展智能合约：一些实证证据
papers.zh_abstract: 基于区块链的智能合约有可能通过去中心化执行和降低交易成本来取代某些传统合约。然而，可扩展性是阻碍其更广泛应用和采纳的关键瓶颈，常常导致网络集中或排他。为了避免偏离该技术的原始承诺，企业积极探索用于扩展的“二层”方法。我们提供了一些关于二层扩展方案经济影响的初步证据，该方案将信息聚合从链上转移到链下的点对点网络。一个平行系统实验允许清晰的识别，因为我们同时观察了处理系统和对照系统中的同一单位。我们发现，这种扩展方案将运营成本降低了76%，并且重要的是，它导致了去中心化，表现为更低的市场集中度和更高的参与度，这反过来又提高了数据准确性。这些发现提供了关于区块链和智能合约技术如何朝着实现去中心化和可扩展信任演进的初步证据。

papers.title: The Internet, Search Frictions and Aggregate Unemployment
papers.authors: Manudeep Bhuller, Domenico Ferraro, Andreas R. Kostøl, Trond C. Vigtel
papers.abstract: How has the internet affected search and hiring, and what are the implications for aggregate unemployment? Answering these questions empirically has proven difficult due to selection in internet use and difficulty in measuring the search activities of both sides of the labor market. This paper overcomes these challenges by combining plausibly exogenous variation in the availability of high-speed internet in Norway with large-scale survey and administrative data on hiring firms, job seekers, and vacancies. Our empirical analysis shows that the internet expansion led more firms to recruit online and caused 9% shorter vacancy durations and 13% fewer unsuccessful hiring attempts. While the expansion increased job-finding rates by 2.4% and starting wages by 6% among the unemployed, we find no evidence of changes in job-to-job mobility or wage growth for employees. To interpret these findings, we develop and calibrate an equilibrium search model with endogenous job creation and destruction where workers decide how much search effort to exert on and off the job. Through the lens of the calibrated model, we find that better search technology is the main driving force behind our quasi-experimental evidence. Our calculations indicate that the steady-state unemployment rate fell by as much as 14% due to the broadband internet expansion.
papers.zh_title: 互联网、搜索摩擦与总体失业
papers.zh_abstract: 互联网如何影响了搜索和招聘，以及对总体失业有何影响？由于互联网使用中的选择性问题以及难以衡量劳动力市场双方的搜索活动，对这些问题的实证研究一直很困难。本文通过将挪威高速互联网可用性的看似外生变化与关于招聘企业、求职者和职位空缺的大规模调查和行政数据相结合，克服了这些挑战。我们的实证分析表明，互联网扩张导致更多企业进行在线招聘，并使职位空缺持续时间缩短了9%，招聘失败尝试减少了13%。虽然扩张使失业者的工作找到率提高了2.4%，起薪提高了6%，但我们没有发现证据表明员工的工作转换或工资增长发生了变化。为了解释这些发现，我们开发并校准了一个具有内生工作创造和破坏的均衡搜索模型，在该模型中，工人决定在在职和离职状态下投入多少搜索努力。通过校准模型的视角，我们发现更好的搜索技术是我们准实验证据背后的主要驱动力。我们的计算表明，由于宽带互联网的扩张，稳态失业率下降了多达14%。

papers.title: Dynamic Inconsistency in Risky Choice: Evidence from the Lab and Field
papers.authors: Rawley Z. Heimer, Zwetelina Iliewa, Alex Imas, Martin Weber
papers.abstract: We document a robust dynamic inconsistency in risky choice. Using a unique brokerage dataset and a series of experiments, we compare people's initial risk-taking plans to their subsequent decisions. Across settings, people accept risk as part of a “loss-exit” strategy—planning to continue taking risk after gains and stopping after losses. Actual behavior deviates from initial strategies by cutting gains early and chasing losses. More people accept risk when offered a commitment to their initial strategy. Our results help reconcile seemingly contradictory findings on risk-taking in static versus dynamic contexts. We explore implications for theory and welfare.
papers.zh_title: 风险选择中的动态不一致性：来自实验室和实地证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一种稳健的风险选择动态不一致性。利用一个独特的经纪数据集和一系列实验，我们比较了人们最初的风险承担计划与其后续决策。在不同情境下，人们将风险承担作为“损失退出”策略的一部分——计划在盈利后继续承担风险，在亏损后停止。实际行为偏离了初始策略，表现为过早了结盈利并追逐亏损。当被提供承诺执行初始策略时，更多人接受风险。我们的结果有助于调和关于静态与动态情境下风险承担看似矛盾的发现。我们探讨了对理论和福利的启示。

papers.title: Societal Disruptions And Child Mental Health: Evidence From ADHD Diagnosis During The COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Seth M. Freedman, Kelli R. Marquardt, Dario Salcedo, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: We study how the societal disruptions of the COVID-19 pandemic impacted diagnosis of a prevalent childhood mental health condition, Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD). Using both nationwide private health insurance claims and a single state’s comprehensive electronic health records, we compare children exposed to the pandemic to same aged children prior to the pandemic. We find the pandemic reduced new ADHD diagnoses by 8.6% among boys and 11.0% among girls nationwide through February 2021. We further show that higher levels of in-person schooling in Fall 2020 dampened the decline for girls but had no moderating effect for boys.
papers.zh_title: 社会动荡与儿童心理健康：来自COVID-19疫情期间ADHD诊断的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了COVID-19大流行的社会动荡如何影响一种普遍的儿童心理健康状况——注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）的诊断。利用全国性的私人健康保险索赔数据和一个州的综合电子健康记录，我们将暴露于大流行期间的儿童与大流行前同龄儿童进行比较。我们发现，截至2021年2月，大流行使全国范围内男孩的新ADHD诊断减少了8.6%，女孩减少了11.0%。我们进一步表明，2020年秋季更高水平的线下教学减弱了女孩诊断下降的趋势，但对男孩没有调节作用。

papers.title: Child Labor Standards in Regional Trade Agreements: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Ryan M. Abman, Clark C. Lundberg, John McLaren, Michele Ruta
papers.abstract: We study the impact of child labor standards in Regional Trade Agreements (RTAs) on a variety of child labor market outcomes, including employment, education, and household inequality. We develop a stylized general equilibrium model of child labor in an economy open to international trade and consider the impact of RTAs with and without child labor bans. We empirically investigate the effects of these clauses in trade agreements in a broad international panel of 101 developing countries using harmonized survey microdata. Exploiting quasi-experimental methods to obtain plausibly causal estimates, we find that RTAs without child-labor bans lead to reductions in child employment and increases in school enrollment, particularly for older children aged 14--17. Child labor bans in RTAs perversely increase child employment among 14--17 year olds and decrease school enrollment for both young and older children. These effects appear to decrease inter-household income inequality through increased child earnings. Our findings are consistent with theoretical predictions from our model and the literature on child labor bans.
papers.zh_title: 区域贸易协定中的童工标准：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了区域贸易协定（RTA）中的童工标准对一系列童工市场结果的影响，包括就业、教育和家庭不平等。我们构建了一个对国际贸易开放的经济体中童工的简约一般均衡模型，并考虑了有和没有童工禁令的RTA的影响。我们利用协调的调查微观数据，在包含101个发展中国家的广泛国际面板数据中，实证研究了这些贸易协定条款的影响。通过使用准实验方法获得看似因果的估计，我们发现没有童工禁令的RTA导致儿童就业减少和入学率增加，特别是对于14-17岁的较大儿童。RTA中的童工禁令反而增加了14-17岁儿童的就业，并降低了年幼和较大儿童的入学率。这些效应似乎通过增加儿童收入来降低家庭间收入不平等。我们的发现与我们的模型以及关于童工禁令文献的理论预测一致。

papers.title: Bank Funding Risk, Reference Rates, and Credit Supply
papers.authors: Harry R. Cooperman, Darrell Duffie, Stephan Luck, Zachry Z. Wang, Yilin Yang
papers.abstract: Corporate credit lines are drawn more heavily when funding markets are more stressed. This covariance elevates expected bank funding costs. We show that credit supply is dampened by the associated debt-overhang cost to bank shareholders. Until 2022, this impact was reduced by linking the interest paid on lines to credit-sensitive reference rates such as LIBOR. We show that transition to risk-free reference rates may exacerbate this friction. The adverse impact on credit supply is offset if drawdowns are expected to be left on deposit at the same bank, which happened at some of the largest banks during the COVID recession.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：E4, E43, G00, G01, G02, G20, G21
papers.zh_title: 银行融资风险、参考利率与信贷供给
papers.zh_abstract: 企业信贷额度在融资市场压力更大时被更多地提取。这种协方差提高了银行的预期融资成本。我们表明，信贷供给因相关的银行股东债务积压成本而受到抑制。直到2022年，通过将额度支付的利息与信用敏感型参考利率（如LIBOR）挂钩，这种影响得以减轻。我们表明，向无风险参考利率的过渡可能会加剧这种摩擦。如果预期提取的资金会存放在同一家银行（这在COVID-19衰退期间一些最大的银行中发生过），那么对信贷供给的不利影响将被抵消。

papers.title: Loose Monetary Policy and Financial Instability
papers.authors: Maximilian Grimm, Òscar Jordà, Moritz Schularick, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: Do periods of persistently loose monetary policy increase financial fragility and the likelihood of a financial crisis? This is a central question for policymakers, yet the literature does not provide systematic empirical evidence about this link at the aggregate level. In this paper we fill this gap by analyzing long-run historical data. We find that when the stance of monetary policy is accommodative over an extended period, the likelihood of financial turmoil down the road increases considerably. We investigate the causal pathways that lead to this result and argue that credit creation and asset price overheating are important intermediating channels.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E52, E58, G01, G21, N10
papers.zh_title: 宽松货币政策与金融不稳定
papers.zh_abstract: 持续宽松的货币政策时期是否会增加金融脆弱性和金融危机的可能性？这是政策制定者面临的一个核心问题，然而文献并未在总体层面提供关于这种联系的系统性经验证据。在本文中，我们通过分析长期历史数据来填补这一空白。我们发现，当货币政策立场在较长时期内保持宽松时，未来发生金融动荡的可能性会显著增加。我们研究了导致这一结果的因果路径，并认为信贷创造和资产价格过热是重要的中介渠道。

papers.title: Language Models and Cognitive Automation for Economic Research
papers.authors: Anton Korinek
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT have the potential to revolutionize research in economics and other disciplines. I describe 25 use cases along six domains in which LLMs are starting to become useful as both research assistants and tutors: ideation, writing, background research, data analysis, coding, and mathematical derivations. I provide general instructions and demonstrate specific examples for how to take advantage of each of these, classifying the LLM capabilities from experimental to highly useful. I hypothesize that ongoing advances will improve the performance of LLMs across all of these domains, and that economic researchers who take advantage of LLMs to automate micro tasks will become significantly more productive. Finally, I speculate on the longer-term implications of cognitive automation via LLMs for economic research.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：A10, B41, J23, O3
papers.zh_title: 语言模型与经济学研究的认知自动化
papers.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）有潜力彻底改变经济学及其他学科的研究。我描述了六个领域的25个用例，在这些领域中，大型语言模型作为研究助手和导师开始变得有用：构思、写作、背景研究、数据分析、编码和数学推导。我提供了通用指令，并展示了如何利用每个用例的具体示例，将大型语言模型的能力从实验性分类到高度有用。我假设持续的进步将提高大型语言模型在所有领域的表现，并且利用大型语言模型自动化微观任务的经济学研究者将变得显著更高效。最后，我推测了通过大型语言模型实现认知自动化对经济学研究的长期影响。

papers.title: The Economic Opportunity Cost of Green Recovery Plans
papers.authors: Timothy Fitzgerald, Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Advocates in several countries have promoted a “green recovery” from the pandemic, with an emphasis on measures to address climate objectives. We evaluate proposals for the United States and find that as stated, ambitious plans to further cut emissions from transportation and electricity will require more inputs to produce the same outputs, resulting in recurring costs of up to $483 billion per year. We forecast that real GDP and consumption will be 2-3 percent less in the long run if policies are implemented as stated, underscoring the opportunity costs of achieving green objectives when resources might be more efficiently deployed.
papers.zh_title: 绿色复苏计划的经济机会成本
papers.zh_abstract: 多个国家的倡导者推动从疫情中进行“绿色复苏”，重点在于应对气候目标的措施。我们评估了美国的提案，发现按照所述，进一步削减交通和电力排放的雄心勃勃计划将需要更多投入来生产相同产出，导致每年高达4830亿美元的经常性成本。我们预测，如果政策按所述实施，长期内实际GDP和消费将减少2-3%，这突显了当资源可能被更有效配置时实现绿色目标的机会成本。

papers.title: Estimating Causal Effects of Fertility on Life Course Outcomes: Evidence Using A Dyadic Genetic Instrumental Variable Approach
papers.authors: Boyan Zheng, Qiongshi Lu, Jason Fletcher
papers.abstract: The causal effects of fertility are a central focus in the social sciences, but the analysis is challenged by the endogeneity of fertility choices. Earlier work has proposed several “natural experiments” from twin births or gender composition of earlier births to assess whether having more children affects adults’ outcomes, though there are limitations to using rare (twins) and weak (gender composition) instrumental variables for fertility. This paper proposes a new “natural experiment” approach to assessing the causal effects of fertility by measuring the combination of couples’ genetics in predicting fertility—a dyadic genetic instrumental variable, where the key idea (exclusion restriction) is that the interactions of the couple’s genetics that shift the likelihood of fertility is unknown to the couples. We use a nationally representative sample of couples to examine the long-lasting effects of fertility on older adults’ life outcomes, including labor market outcomes, personality traits, and subjective wellbeing. We find that fertility reduces females’ extraversion and years of working and some evidence indicates that fertility reduces both males’ and females’ lifetime number of jobs worked.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：J10, J13, J22, J29
papers.zh_title: 估计生育对生命历程结果的因果效应：基于二元遗传工具变量方法的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 生育的因果效应是社会科学的焦点，但分析因生育选择的内生性而面临挑战。早期研究提出了几种来自双胞胎出生或先前出生性别构成的“自然实验”，以评估生育更多孩子是否影响成人结果，尽管使用罕见（双胞胎）和弱（性别构成）的工具变量来研究生育存在局限性。本文提出了一种新的“自然实验”方法，通过测量夫妻基因组合来预测生育——一种二元遗传工具变量，其关键思想（排除限制）是，夫妻基因相互作用改变生育可能性的情况对夫妻而言是未知的。我们使用一个全国代表性的夫妻样本来考察生育对老年人生活结果的长期影响，包括劳动力市场结果、人格特质和主观幸福感。我们发现，生育降低了女性的外向性和工作年限，一些证据表明生育减少了男性和女性一生中从事的工作数量。

papers.title: Production Network Formation, Trade, and Welfare
papers.authors: Costas Arkolakis, Federico Huneeus, Yuhei Miyauchi
papers.abstract: We study the aggregate implications of endogenous production network formation in a multi-location general equilibrium trade model. Firms form supplier and buyer linkages under matching frictions, generating a gravity structure of production networks. We analytically characterize the welfare gains from trade cost reductions relative to a benchmark model with fixed production networks. We calibrate the model to Chilean firm-to-firm data and show that it matches observed domestic and international network responses to tariff reductions. We find that endogenous networks substantially increase the welfare gains from trade, due to inefficiently low equilibrium networks and amplification effects through relationship-formation costs.
papers.zh_title: 生产网络形成、贸易与福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了多区位一般均衡贸易模型中内生生产网络形成的总体影响。企业在匹配摩擦下形成供应商和买家联系，产生生产网络的引力结构。我们相对于一个固定生产网络的基准模型，分析性地刻画了贸易成本降低带来的福利收益。我们将模型校准到智利企业间数据，并表明它匹配了观察到的国内和国际网络对关税削减的反应。我们发现，由于均衡网络效率低下以及通过关系形成成本的放大效应，内生网络显著增加了贸易带来的福利收益。

papers.title: Measuring Domestic Factor Content in Bilateral and Sectoral-Level Trade Flows
papers.authors: Zhi Wang, Shang-Jin Wei, Kunfu Zhu
papers.abstract: Measuring country origins of factor content in bilateral or sector-level exports is important to understand evolution of regional and global value chains and the roles of individual country-sectors in these chains. This paper proposes a method to distinguish between measures based on backward and forward linkages and between net and gross factor content. It is consistent with the System of National Account Standard and has the adding-up property. In comparison, these properties do not hold for the “hypothetical extraction method” proposed by Los et al. (2016). We show a number of examples involving disaggregated trade in which the two methods diverge.
papers.zh_title: 衡量双边和部门层面贸易流中的国内要素含量
papers.zh_abstract: 衡量双边或部门层面出口中要素含量的国家来源，对于理解区域和全球价值链的演变以及单个国家-部门在这些链条中的作用至关重要。本文提出了一种方法，以区分基于后向联系和前向联系的衡量指标，以及净要素含量和总要素含量。该方法与国民账户体系标准一致，并具有可加性。相比之下，这些性质对于Los等人（2016）提出的“假设提取法”并不成立。我们展示了涉及细分贸易的几个例子，其中两种方法存在差异。

papers.title: Dynamic Pricing Regulation and Welfare in Insurance Markets
papers.authors: Naoki Aizawa, Ami Ko
papers.abstract: While the traditional role of insurers is to provide protection against individuals’ idiosyncratic risks, insurers themselves face substantial uncertainties due to aggregate shocks. To prevent insurers from passing these aggregate risks onto consumers, governments have increasingly adopted dynamic pricing regulations, which limit insurers’ ability to change premiums over time. We evaluate dynamic pricing regulation using an equilibrium model of the U.S. long-term care insurance market, featuring insurers’ lack of commitment and endogenous market structures. We find that stricter dynamic pricing regulation has a limited impact on improving consumer welfare, while it reduces insurer profits and increases market concentration.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：D14, G22, I13, L11, L51
papers.zh_title: 保险市场中的动态定价监管与福利
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然保险公司的传统角色是为个人特有的风险提供保障，但保险公司自身也面临着由总体冲击带来的巨大不确定性。为了防止保险公司将这些总体风险转嫁给消费者，政府越来越多地采用动态定价监管，限制保险公司随时间调整保费的能力。我们利用一个美国长期护理保险市场的均衡模型来评估动态定价监管，该模型考虑了保险公司缺乏承诺以及内生市场结构的特点。我们发现，更严格的动态定价监管对改善消费者福利的影响有限，同时会降低保险公司利润并增加市场集中度。

papers.title: Direct and Spillover Effects of Provider Vaccination Facilitation
papers.authors: Julie Berry Cullen, Maria K. Humlum, Agne Suziedelyte, Peter Rønø Thingholm
papers.abstract: We explore physicians’ role in moderating compliance with recommended vaccinations. Using administrative data on the universe of Danish children and their healthcare providers, we first construct and validate a measure of providers’ propensities to facilitate recommended vaccinations from birth to age 6 based on a two-way fixed effects model. We then show that the measure meaningfully affects uptake of the human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccine among adolescent patients and speeds recovery from a media-induced crisis to perceived HPV vaccine safety. Providers affect decisions beyond those of their own patients, influencing the uptake of patients’ younger cousins by one-fifth as much as own patients’ uptake.
papers.zh_title: 医疗服务提供者促进疫苗接种的直接效应与溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了医生在调节推荐疫苗接种依从性方面的作用。利用涵盖所有丹麦儿童及其医疗保健提供者的行政数据，我们首先基于一个双向固定效应模型，构建并验证了一个衡量医疗服务提供者从出生到6岁期间促进推荐疫苗接种倾向的指标。然后，我们表明该指标显著影响了青少年患者对人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）疫苗的接种率，并加速了因媒体引发的对HPV疫苗安全性信任危机后的恢复。医疗服务提供者的影响超出了其自身患者的范围，他们对患者表亲接种率的影响程度相当于对自身患者接种率影响程度的五分之一。

papers.title: The Effect of R&D on Quality, Productivity, and Welfare
papers.authors: Mons Chan, Amil Petrin, Frederic Warzynski
papers.abstract: In this paper we provide a methodology that jointly studies production and demand for multi-product firms using detailed firm-product level data from Denmark. We estimate marginal cost by combining production function estimation with a cost function that allows for quasi-fixed inputs. We use a discrete choice demand model that extends insights from Berry, Levinsohn and Pakes (1995) to obtain a measure of the demand shock (quality). We estimate the relationship between product (process) R&D and quality (efficiency), and find strong evidence that process innovation is related to higher efficiency, while product innovation is associated with higher product quality. We discuss the welfare implications of these two distinct innovation activities.
papers.zh_title: 研发对质量、生产率和福利的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提供了一种方法论，利用来自丹麦的详细企业-产品层面数据，联合研究多产品企业的生产与需求。我们通过将生产函数估计与允许准固定投入的成本函数相结合来估计边际成本。我们使用一个离散选择需求模型，该模型扩展了Berry、Levinsohn和Pakes（1995）的见解，以获得需求冲击（质量）的度量。我们估计了产品（过程）研发与质量（效率）之间的关系，并发现强有力的证据表明过程创新与更高的效率相关，而产品创新则与更高的产品质量相关。我们讨论了这两种不同创新活动的福利含义。

papers.title: Inclusion and Democratization Through Web3 and DeFi? Initial Evidence from the Ethereum Ecosystem
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Ke Tang, Yanxin Wang, Xi Zhao
papers.abstract: Web3 and DeFi are widely advocated as innovations for greater financial inclusion and democratization. We assemble the most comprehensive dataset to date on the largest Web3 ecosystem and use large-scale computing to conduct an initial investigation. We describe Ethereum’s network structure, time trends, and distributions of transactions, mining, and ownership. Mining income and Ether ownership are concentrated in exchanges and a few individual nodes. Network activities evolve from peer-to-peer to user-DApps/DeFi interactions, with significantly more transactions by large players. Moreover, high percentage transaction fees, congestion-induced fluctuation of gas prices, suboptimal reserve setting, and large return volatility of tokens present particular challenges for small, poor, unsophisticated, and new nodes, not to mention that the high failure rates hurt all users. Finally, we present suggestive causal evidence that base-fee burning mechanisms (e.g., EIP-1559) and airdrop programs (e.g., OmiseGo Airdrop) facilitate inclusion through token monetary redistribution.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME, PR；JEL：D63, E50, G29, H23, L14
papers.zh_title: 通过Web3和DeFi实现包容性与民主化？来自以太坊生态系统的初步证据
papers.zh_abstract: Web3和DeFi被广泛倡导为促进金融包容性和民主化的创新。我们汇集了迄今为止关于最大Web3生态系统的最全面数据集，并使用大规模计算进行了初步调查。我们描述了以太坊的网络结构、时间趋势以及交易、挖矿和所有权的分布。挖矿收入和以太币所有权集中在交易所和少数个体节点。网络活动从点对点演变为用户与DApps/DeFi的交互，大型参与者的交易显著增多。此外，高比例的交易费用、拥堵导致的Gas价格波动、次优的储备设置以及代币收益的大幅波动，对小型、贫困、缺乏经验和新的节点构成了特殊挑战，更不用说高失败率对所有用户造成的损害。最后，我们提出了提示性因果证据，表明基础费用燃烧机制（例如EIP-1559）和空投计划（例如OmiseGo空投）通过代币货币再分配促进了包容性。

papers.title: Donor Contracting Conditions and Public Procurement: Causal Evidence from Kenyan Electrification
papers.authors: Catherine Wolfram, Edward Miguel, Eric Hsu, Susanna B. Berkouwer
papers.abstract: There is limited causal evidence on the effects of different public procurement regulations on project quality and value-for-money for projects funded by national governments and foreign aid donors. This paper uses policy and experimental variation to study how two key contracting features—namely, contract bundling and monitoring—affect outcomes of a large economic development project. We leverage an unusual feature of Kenya’s nationwide electrification program: the quasi-random allocation of multilateral funding sources across nearby villages. African Development Bank (AfDB) projects used bundled contracts while the World Bank (WB) employed unbundled contracts together with strengthened inspections. To measure impacts, we collect on-the-ground engineering assessments, power quality data, household surveys, and analyze original contracts. The analysis suggests a stark trade-off: WB procedures delayed construction completion by 16 months relative to AfDB sites but improved construction quality by a sizeable 0.6 standard deviations. To disentangle the effects of contract bundling versus monitoring, we conducted randomized audits that enhanced monitoring. The audits improve household connectivity, network size, and voltage at AfDB sites, but have no impact at WB sites, suggesting monitoring and unbundling contracts may be substitutes. Given the apparent trade-off, we investigate how net benefits depend on policymaker time preferences and infrastructure longevity.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO, PE；JEL：D73, F35, H5, L94, O19
papers.zh_title: 捐助者合同条件与公共采购：来自肯尼亚电气化的因果证据
papers.zh_abstract: 关于不同的公共采购法规对由国家政府和外国援助捐助者资助的项目质量和性价比的影响，目前因果证据有限。本文利用政策变化和实验变异，研究两个关键的合同特征——即合同捆绑和监控——如何影响一个大型经济发展项目的结果。我们利用了肯尼亚全国电气化计划的一个不寻常特点：多边资金来源在邻近村庄之间的准随机分配。非洲开发银行（AfDB）的项目使用捆绑合同，而世界银行（WB）则采用非捆绑合同并加强检查。为了衡量影响，我们收集了实地工程评估、电能质量数据、家庭调查，并分析了原始合同。分析表明存在明显的权衡：与AfDB项目点相比，世界银行的程序使建设完工延迟了16个月，但将建设质量提高了0.6个标准差，幅度相当大。为了区分合同捆绑与监控的影响，我们进行了随机审计以加强监控。审计提高了AfDB项目点的家庭连接率、网络规模和电压，但对世界银行项目点没有影响，这表明监控与非捆绑合同可能是替代品。鉴于这种明显的权衡，我们研究了净收益如何取决于政策制定者的时间偏好和基础设施的寿命。

papers.title: Ideas Mobilize People: The Diffusion of Communist Ideology in China
papers.authors: Ying Bai, Ruixue Jia, Runnan Wang
papers.abstract: Can ideas mobilize people into collective action? We provide a positive answer to this question by studying how exposure to the Communist ideology shaped an individual’s choice to join the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) during the party’s formative stage. The individuals we focus on are cadets at the Whampoa Military Academy, who subsequently fought in 20th-century China’s most important wars. Our identification strategy exploits the locality-time-content variation in the circulation of the New Youth magazine—the major platform to promote Communism after the Treaty of Versailles in 1919—as well as the variation in an individual’s location over time. By comparing the Whampoa cadets living in a locality with post-1919 New Youth available against those who had lived in the same locality but missed this channel, we demonstrate that the former were significantly more likely to join the CCP. In future political struggles, those whose party choice was more influenced by this ideology channel were less likely to quit the CCP and more likely to sacrifice their lives. Additionally, we document that family background cannot predict the party choice of these political pioneers but social networks can complement ideology exposure.
papers.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：D70, D71, D83, N45, O12, P30
papers.zh_title: 思想动员人民：共产主义意识形态在中国的传播
papers.zh_abstract: 思想能否动员人们参与集体行动？我们通过研究接触共产主义意识形态如何影响个人在党的形成阶段选择加入中国共产党（CCP），为这个问题提供了肯定答案。我们关注的个体是黄埔军校的学员，他们随后参加了20世纪中国最重要的战争。我们的识别策略利用了《新青年》杂志（1919年凡尔赛条约后推广共产主义的主要平台）发行量在地区、时间和内容上的变化，以及个体随时间所处地点的变化。通过比较生活在有1919年后《新青年》可获取地区的黄埔学员与曾生活在同一地区但错过了这一渠道的学员，我们证明前者加入中国共产党的可能性显著更高。在未来的政治斗争中，那些政党选择受此意识形态渠道影响更大的个体，更不可能退出中国共产党，并且更有可能牺牲生命。此外，我们记录到家庭背景无法预测这些政治先驱的政党选择，但社会网络可以补充意识形态接触的影响。

papers.title: Unsupervised Machine Learning for Explainable Health Care Fraud Detection
papers.authors: Shubhranshu Shekhar, Jetson Leder-Luis, Leman Akoglu
papers.abstract: The US spends more than 4 trillion dollars per year on health care, largely conducted by private providers and reimbursed by insurers. A major concern in this system is overbilling, waste and fraud by providers, who face incentives to misreport on their claims in order to receive higher payments. In this work, we develop novel machine learning tools to identify providers that overbill insurers. Using large-scale claims data from Medicare, the US federal health insurance program for elderly adults and the disabled, we identify patterns consistent with fraud or overbilling among inpatient hospitalizations. Our proposed approach for fraud detection is fully unsupervised, not relying on any labeled training data, and is explainable to end users, providing reasoning and interpretable insights into the potentially suspicious behavior of the flagged providers. Data from the Department of Justice on providers facing anti-fraud lawsuits and case studies of suspicious providers validate our approach and findings. We also perform a post-analysis to understand hospital characteristics, those not used for detection but associate with a high suspiciousness score. Our method provides an 8-fold lift over random targeting, and can be used to guide investigations and auditing of suspicious providers for both public and private health insurance systems.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：C19, D73, I13, K42, M42
papers.zh_title: 用于可解释医疗欺诈检测的无监督机器学习
papers.zh_abstract: 美国每年在医疗保健上的支出超过4万亿美元，主要由私人提供者执行并由保险公司报销。该系统的一个主要问题是提供者存在过度收费、浪费和欺诈行为，因为他们有动机在索赔中虚报以获取更高的赔付。在这项工作中，我们开发了新颖的机器学习工具来识别向保险公司过度收费的提供者。利用来自美国联邦医疗保险（Medicare，为老年人和残疾人提供的联邦健康保险计划）的大规模索赔数据，我们识别出住院治疗中与欺诈或过度收费一致的模式。我们提出的欺诈检测方法完全是无监督的，不依赖于任何标记的训练数据，并且对最终用户是可解释的，为被标记提供者的潜在可疑行为提供推理和可解释的见解。来自司法部关于面临反欺诈诉讼的提供者的数据以及对可疑提供者的案例研究验证了我们的方法和发现。我们还进行了事后分析，以了解医院特征——那些未用于检测但与高可疑评分相关的特征。我们的方法相比随机定位提供了8倍的提升，可用于指导公共和私人医疗保险系统对可疑提供者的调查和审计。

papers.title: Hobbesian Wars and Separation of Powers
papers.authors: Weijia Li, Gérard Roland, Yang Xie
papers.abstract: This paper formalizes the principle that persecution power of government may generate violent contests over it. We show that this principle yields a large set of theoretical insights on different separation-of-powers institutions that can help to preempt such contests under different socio-economic conditions. When socio-economic cohesion is low, the risk of contests can be eliminated only by individual veto against persecution. Moreover, such unanimity rule is resilient to autocratic shocks only when the chief executive does not control the legislative agenda, i.e., the executive and legislative branches are separate. When socio-economic cohesion is high, the risk of violent contests can be eliminated without individual veto, but only by a persecution-reviewing judiciary whose members cannot join the executive branch in the future, i.e., when the executive and judicial branches are separate. Our results shed light on the evolution of separation of powers in European history.
papers.zh_title: 霍布斯式战争与权力分立
papers.zh_abstract: 本文形式化了这样一个原则：政府的迫害权力可能引发围绕该权力的暴力争夺。我们表明，这一原则产生了大量关于不同权力分立制度的理论见解，这些制度有助于在不同的社会经济条件下预防此类争夺。当社会经济凝聚力较低时，只有通过个人对迫害的否决权才能消除争夺的风险。此外，这种全体一致规则只有在行政首脑不控制立法议程时才能抵御专制冲击，即行政和立法部门是分离的。当社会经济凝聚力较高时，无需个人否决权即可消除暴力争夺的风险，但只能通过一个其成员未来不能加入行政部门的迫害审查司法机构来实现，即行政和司法部门是分离的。我们的研究结果揭示了欧洲历史上权力分立的演变。

papers.title: Catching Up by ‘Deglobalizing’: Capital Account Policy and Economic Growth
papers.authors: Paul Bergin, Woo Jin Choi, Ju H. Pyun
papers.abstract: While substantial empirical research has evaluated the question of whether capital account openness promotes economic growth, this paper finds empirical evidence for cases where the opposite is true—that a policy of capital controls can promote economic growth, when combined with a policy of reserve accumulation. Using panel data from 45 countries from 1985–2019, we find that capital controls combined with reserve accumulation—strategic capital account policy—contribute to growth in real GDP and TFP. This effect is stronger for emerging markets and prior to the global financial crisis. We show that the policy is strongly associated with enlarging the scale of the manufacturing sector and productivity, and is consistent with theories of learning-by-doing through exporting.
papers.zh_title: 通过“去全球化”实现赶超：资本账户政策与经济增长
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管大量实证研究评估了资本账户开放是否促进经济增长，本文发现了相反情况的实证证据——即资本管制政策与储备积累政策相结合时，可以促进经济增长。利用1985年至2019年45个国家的面板数据，我们发现资本管制与储备积累相结合（即战略性资本账户政策）有助于实际GDP和全要素生产率的增长。这种效应在新兴市场以及全球金融危机之前更为显著。我们表明，该政策与制造业规模和生产率的大幅提升密切相关，并且与通过出口实现“干中学”的理论相一致。

papers.title: The Economics of Digital Privacy
papers.authors: Avi Goldfarb, Verina F. Que
papers.abstract: There has been increasing attention to privacy in the media and in regulatory discussions. This is a consequence of the increased usefulness of digital data. The literature has emphasized the benefits and costs of digital data flows to consumers and firms. The benefits arise in the form of data-driven innovation, higher quality products and services that match consumer needs, and increased profits. The costs relate to intrinsic and instrumental values of privacy. Under standard economic assumptions, this framing of a cost-benefit tradeoff might suggest little role for regulation beyond ensuring consumers are appropriately informed in a robust competitive environment. The empirical literature thus far has focused on this direct cost-benefit assessment, examining how privacy regulations have affected various market outcomes. However, an increasing body of theory work emphasizes externalities related to data flows. These externalities, both positive and negative, suggest benefits to the targeted regulation of digital privacy.
papers.zh_title: 数字隐私的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 媒体和监管讨论中对隐私的关注日益增加。这是数字数据实用性增强的结果。文献强调了数字数据流对消费者和企业的收益与成本。收益以数据驱动的创新、更符合消费者需求的高质量产品和服务以及利润增长的形式出现。成本则与隐私的内在价值和工具性价值相关。在标准经济假设下，这种成本收益权衡的框架可能表明，除了在稳健的竞争环境中确保消费者得到充分知情外，监管的作用微乎其微。迄今为止的实证文献主要关注这种直接的成本收益评估，考察隐私法规如何影响各种市场结果。然而，越来越多的理论工作强调了与数据流相关的外部性。这些外部性，无论是正面的还是负面的，都表明对数字隐私进行有针对性的监管是有益的。

papers.title: To Starve or to Stoke? Understanding Whether Divestment vs. Investment Can Steer (Green) Innovation
papers.authors: Jacquelyn Pless
papers.abstract: More than 1,500 organizations and investors representing over $40 trillion in assets have committed to fossil fuel divestment to combat climate change. Will it work? This chapter explores whether divestment might induce green innovation, a critical component of transitioning to a cleaner economy. Divestment could theoretically steer innovation by increasing the cost of capital for "dirty firms," but it is unclear whether the effects will be large enough to significantly reduce investment opportunities. I argue that continuing to invest in dirty industries could drive green innovation conditional on investors being socially-conscious and governing through "voice." This hinges upon understanding which firm strategies actually foster green innovation, though, and the commonly-used ESG indicators come with several limitations. I demonstrate how decomposing them and using alternative approaches to measuring environmental performance can improve investment, strategy, and management decision-making and policy design. I examine the relationship between 14 specific practices and whether large firms in 16 pollution-intensive sectors are on track for meeting the Paris Agreement emissions targets ("carbon performance"). I find no correlation between carbon performance and the most basic practices, like disclosing emissions, but a positive correlation for five more explicit strategies: setting long-term quantitative emissions targets, having a third party verify emissions data, incorporating environmental performance into executive remuneration policies, supporting governmental climate change efforts, and setting an internal price of carbon. I construct a new best practices score based on these results and find that it has a much higher correlation with carbon performance than some other composite measures.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PR；JEL：G30, O32, O35, Q4, Q5
papers.zh_title: 是扼杀还是激励？理解撤资与投资能否引导（绿色）创新
papers.zh_abstract: 超过1500家组织和投资者，代表超过40万亿美元的资产，已承诺进行化石燃料撤资以应对气候变化。这会奏效吗？本章探讨撤资是否可能引发绿色创新，这是向更清洁经济转型的关键组成部分。理论上，撤资可以通过提高“污染企业”的资本成本来引导创新，但目前尚不清楚其效果是否足以显著减少投资机会。我认为，如果投资者具有社会意识并通过“发声”进行治理，那么继续投资于污染行业反而可能推动绿色创新。然而，这取决于理解哪些企业战略实际上促进了绿色创新，而常用的ESG指标存在若干局限性。我展示了如何分解这些指标以及使用替代方法来衡量环境绩效，从而改进投资、战略、管理决策和政策设计。我考察了16个污染密集型行业中的大型企业，分析了14项具体实践与其是否符合《巴黎协定》排放目标（即“碳绩效”）之间的关系。我发现，碳绩效与最基本实践（如披露排放量）之间没有相关性，但与五项更明确的策略呈正相关：设定长期量化排放目标、由第三方验证排放数据、将环境绩效纳入高管薪酬政策、支持政府气候变化努力以及设定内部碳价格。基于这些结果，我构建了一个新的最佳实践评分，并发现该评分与碳绩效的相关性远高于其他一些综合指标。

papers.title: The Impact of COVID-19 on Workers’ Expectations and Preferences for Remote Work
papers.authors: Yuting Chen, Patricia Cortés, Gizem Koşar, Jessica Pan, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We study how COVID-19 affected the prevalence, expectations, and attitudes toward remote work using specially designed surveys. The incidence of remote work remains higher than pre-pandemic levels and both men and women expect this to persist post-pandemic. Workers also report increased preference for remote work as a result of the pandemic. These changes are strongly correlated with individuals’ exposure to the pandemic induced work-from-home shock, indicating that experience with remote work during the pandemic likely shaped expectations and preferences toward WFH. The magnitude of the effects on preferences and expectations are similar across gender, marital status, and presence of children.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对工人远程工作期望和偏好的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用专门设计的调查，研究了COVID-19如何影响远程工作的普及程度、期望和态度。远程工作的发生率仍高于疫情前水平，男性和女性都预计这种情况将在疫情后持续。工人还报告称，由于疫情，他们对远程工作的偏好有所增加。这些变化与个人因疫情引发的居家办公冲击的暴露程度密切相关，表明疫情期间的远程工作经历可能塑造了对WFH的期望和偏好。偏好和期望的影响程度在性别、婚姻状况以及是否有孩子方面相似。

papers.title: Varying Impacts of Letters of Recommendation on College Admissions
papers.authors: Eli Ben-Michael, Avi Feller, Jesse Rothstein
papers.abstract: In a pilot program during the 2016-17 admissions cycle, the University of California, Berkeley invited many applicants for freshman admission to submit letters of recommendation. This proved controversial within the university, with concerns that this change would further disadvantage applicants from disadvantaged groups. To inform this debate, we use this pilot as the basis for an observational study of the impact of submitting letters of recommendation on subsequent admission, with the goal of estimating how impacts vary across pre-defined subgroups. Understanding this variation is challenging in an observational setting because estimated impacts reflect both actual treatment effect variation and differences in covariate balance across groups. To address this, we develop balancing weights that directly optimize for “local balance” within subgroups while maintaining global covariate balance between treated and control units. Applying this approach to the UC Berkeley pilot study yields excellent local and global balance, unlike more traditional weighting methods, which fail to balance covariates within subgroups. We find that the impact of letters of recommendation increases with applicant strength. However, we find little average difference for applicants from disadvantaged groups, although this result is more mixed. In the end, we conclude that soliciting letters of recommendation from a broader pool of applicants would not meaningfully change the composition of admitted undergraduates.
papers.zh_title: 推荐信对大学录取的不同影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在2016-17学年招生周期的一项试点项目中，加州大学伯克利分校邀请了许多新生申请者提交推荐信。这在大学内部引发了争议，有人担心这一变化会进一步使来自弱势群体的申请者处于不利地位。为了给这场辩论提供信息，我们以此试点为基础，进行了一项关于提交推荐信对后续录取影响的观察性研究，旨在估计影响如何在预定义的子群体间变化。在观察性研究中理解这种变化具有挑战性，因为估计的影响既反映了实际处理效应的差异，也反映了各组间协变量平衡的差异。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了平衡权重，该权重直接优化子组内的“局部平衡”，同时保持处理组和对照组之间的全局协变量平衡。将这种方法应用于加州大学伯克利分校的试点研究，取得了出色的局部和全局平衡，而传统的加权方法则无法在子组内平衡协变量。我们发现，推荐信的影响随着申请者实力的增强而增加。然而，我们发现来自弱势群体的申请者平均差异很小，尽管这一结果更为复杂。最终，我们得出结论，向更广泛的申请者征集推荐信不会显著改变被录取本科生的构成。

papers.title: How the Internet Changed the Market for Print Media
papers.authors: Manudeep Bhuller, Tarjei Havnes, Jeremy McCauley, Magne Mogstad
papers.abstract: Combining comprehensive data from the Norwegian media market on newspaper circulation, readership, revenues, factor inputs, and product characteristics with plausibly exogenous variation in the availability and adoption of broadband internet, this paper provides causal evidence on how the internet affected the traditional print media market. Household adoption of broadband internet triggered large reductions in print readership and circulation and equally large increases in online news readership. Despite strong substitution from print to online news consumption, newspaper firms’ revenues fell by almost 30%. Newspaper firms responded by dramatically cutting costs, either by shedding labor inputs or by reducing the physical size of newspaper sheets, and in doing so avoided meaningful losses in profits. The printed newspaper product available to customers also changed, as newspapers shifted content away from tabloid to more serious news. This paper offers a case study on how an adverse technology shock transmits through firms with multiple margins of adjustment, and provides an explanation for the economic resilience of newspapers.
papers.zh_title: 互联网如何改变了印刷媒体市场
papers.zh_abstract: 本文结合挪威媒体市场中关于报纸发行量、读者数量、收入、要素投入和产品特征的全面数据，以及宽带互联网可用性和普及率中看似外生的变化，提供了关于互联网如何影响传统印刷媒体市场的因果证据。家庭采用宽带互联网引发了印刷版读者数量和发行量的大幅下降，以及在线新闻读者数量的同等大幅增长。尽管从印刷新闻消费到在线新闻消费存在强烈的替代效应，报纸公司的收入却下降了近30%。报纸公司通过大幅削减成本来应对，要么裁减劳动力投入，要么减少报纸的物理版面尺寸，从而避免了利润的重大损失。提供给客户的印刷报纸产品也发生了变化，因为报纸将内容从小报转向了更严肃的新闻。本文提供了一个案例研究，说明不利的技术冲击如何通过拥有多种调整手段的企业进行传导，并为报纸的经济韧性提供了解释。

papers.title: Frames, Incentives, and Education: Effectiveness of Interventions to Delay Public Pension Claiming
papers.authors: Franca Glenzer, Pierre-Carl Michaud, Stefan Staubli
papers.abstract: In many retirement income systems, people forgo a higher stream of public pension income by claiming early. We provide both survey-experimental and quasi-experimental evidence that the timing of public pension claiming is relatively inelastic to changes in financial incentives. Using the survey experiment, we evaluate the effect of two different educational interventions and different ways of framing the decision on the present value of participants' expected pension payments. While all three types of interventions induce delays, these interventions have heterogeneous financial consequences. Educating participants leads to claiming ages with higher pension wealth. In contrast, framing and financial incentives do not improve, and even worsen, financial outcomes. Understanding the impact of various policy tools on expected pension wealth is essential for designing policies to delay claiming.
papers.zh_title: 框架、激励与教育：延迟公共养老金申领的干预措施效果
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多退休收入体系中，人们因提前申领而放弃了更高额的公共养老金收入。我们提供了调查实验和准实验证据，表明公共养老金申领时间对财务激励变化的弹性相对较小。通过调查实验，我们评估了两种不同的教育干预措施以及不同的决策框架方式对参与者预期养老金支付现值的影响。虽然所有三种类型的干预措施都导致了延迟，但这些干预措施产生了不同的财务后果。教育参与者导致了具有更高养老金财富的申领年龄。相比之下，框架和财务激励并未改善，甚至恶化了财务结果。理解各种政策工具对预期养老金财富的影响，对于设计延迟申领的政策至关重要。

papers.title: The Cyclicality of Births and Babies’ Health, Revisited: Evidence from Unemployment Insurance
papers.authors: Lisa J. Dettling, Melissa Schettini Kearney
papers.abstract: We revisit the cyclical nature of birth rates and infant health and investigate to what extent the relationship between aggregate labor market conditions and birth outcomes is mitigated by the consumption smoothing income assistance delivered through unemployment insurance (UI). We introduce a novel empirical test of standard neoclassical models of fertility that directly tests the prediction of opposite-signed income and intertemporal substitution effects of business cycles by examining the interaction of the aggregate unemployment rate with a measure of potential income replacement from UI. Our results show that as UI benefit generosity reaches 100 percent income replacement, there is no effect of the unemployment rate on fertility rates. This implies that the well-documented cyclical nature of fertility rates is about access to liquidity. We also provide novel evidence that infant health is countercyclical based on timing of conception, but procyclical based on time in utero. The negative relationship between the in utero aggregate unemployment rate and infant health also disappears when potential UI replacement rates reach 100 percent. Our results indicate that the social insurance provided by UI has a pro-natalist effect and improves babies’ health.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, I18, J11, J13, J18
papers.zh_title: 出生率的周期性与婴儿健康再探：来自失业保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了出生率和婴儿健康的周期性特征，并研究了失业保险提供的收入平滑援助在多大程度上缓解了总体劳动力市场状况与生育结果之间的关系。我们引入了一种新颖的实证检验方法，用于检验标准新古典主义生育模型，该方法通过考察总体失业率与失业保险潜在收入替代率衡量指标之间的交互作用，直接检验了商业周期中收入效应和跨期替代效应符号相反的预测。我们的结果表明，当失业保险福利慷慨程度达到100%的收入替代率时，失业率对生育率没有影响。这意味着，有充分证据表明的生育率周期性特征与流动性获取有关。我们还提供了新的证据，表明基于受孕时间，婴儿健康是逆周期的，但基于子宫内时间，则是顺周期的。当潜在的失业保险替代率达到100%时，子宫内总体失业率与婴儿健康之间的负相关关系也消失了。我们的结果表明，失业保险提供的社会保险具有促进生育的效果，并改善了婴儿的健康状况。

papers.title: Does School Choice Increase Crime?
papers.authors: Andrew Bibler, Stephen B. Billings, Stephen Ross
papers.abstract: While prior evidence suggests that school choice lottery winners have lower adult criminality, there is little evidence on how school choice lotteries impact non-applicants. We leverage variation in actual lottery winners, conditional on expected lottery winners, to link the displacement of middle school peers to adult criminal outcomes. We find that non-applicant, lower-risk boys are more likely to be arrested as adults when lottery applicants from their neighborhood do not attend their assigned middle school. Our estimated effects of an applicant’s departure on students left behind are similar in magnitude to the positive effects experienced by a lottery winner.
papers.zh_title: 择校会增加犯罪吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管先前的证据表明，通过择校抽签获得入学资格的学生成年后犯罪率较低，但关于择校抽签如何影响非申请者的证据却很少。我们利用实际抽签中签者的变化（在控制预期中签者的条件下），将初中同学的流失与成年后的犯罪结果联系起来。研究发现，当来自同一社区的中签者未就读其被分配的初中时，那些非申请者中风险较低的男孩在成年后更有可能被捕。我们估计，中签者离开对留守学生的影响程度，与中签者自身获得的积极效应在量级上相似。

papers.title: On the Effectiveness of Foreign Exchange Reserves During the 2021-22 U.S. Monetary Tightening Cycle
papers.authors: Rashad Ahmed, Joshua Aizenman, Jamel Saadaoui, Gazi Salah Uddin
papers.abstract: This paper examines whether the size of foreign exchange (FX) reserves can explain cross-country differences in foreign currency depreciation observed over the 2021-22 Federal Reserve monetary policy tightening that led to a sharp appreciation of the US dollar. Across a broad sample of countries, we document that an additional 10 percentage points of FX reserves/GDP held ex-ante were associated with 1.5 to 2 percent less exchange rate depreciation and this buffer effect was larger among less financially developed economies. Effects were more pronounced for large-reserve countries that sold reserves to intervene than for large-reserve countries that did not intervene, lending support to the presence of both balance sheet and intervention channels. Higher ex-ante policy rates were also associated with less depreciation especially among financially open economies. An analysis of daily currency movements following the June 2021 FOMC meeting corroborates these results. These findings suggest that FX reserves may promote monetary policy independence in the presence of global spillovers.
papers.zh_title: 2021-2022年美国货币紧缩周期中外汇储备的有效性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了在2021-2022年美联储货币政策紧缩（导致美元大幅升值）期间，外汇储备规模能否解释各国本币贬值幅度的差异。在涵盖广泛国家的样本中，我们发现，事前持有的外汇储备占GDP比重每增加10个百分点，与汇率贬值幅度减少1.5%至2%相关，且这一缓冲效应在金融欠发达经济体中更为显著。对于拥有大量储备并出售储备进行干预的国家，其效应比拥有大量储备但未干预的国家更为明显，这支持了资产负债表渠道和干预渠道同时存在的观点。事前较高的政策利率也与较小的贬值幅度相关，尤其是在金融开放的经济体中。对2021年6月联邦公开市场委员会会议后每日汇率变动的分析进一步证实了这些结果。这些发现表明，在全球溢出效应存在的情况下，外汇储备可能有助于促进货币政策独立性。

papers.title: Preferences for Firearms and Their Implications for Regulation
papers.authors: Sarah Moshary, Bradley Shapiro, Sara Drango
papers.abstract: This paper estimates consumer demand for firearms with the aim of predicting the likely impacts of firearm regulations on the number and types of guns in circulation. We first conduct a stated-choice-based conjoint analysis and estimate an individual-level demand model for firearms. We validate our estimates using aggregate moments from observational data. Next, we use our estimates to simulate changes in the number and types of guns in circulation under alternative regulations. Importantly, we find that bans or restrictions that specifically target “assault weapons” increase demand for handguns, which are associated with the vast majority of firearm-related violence. We provide distributions of consumer surplus under counterfactuals and discuss how those distributions could be useful for crafting policy.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, POL；JEL：C11, C83, H23, I18, L50, L51, M31, M38
papers.zh_title: 对枪支的偏好及其对监管的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了消费者对枪支的需求，旨在预测枪支法规对流通中枪支数量和类型的可能影响。我们首先进行了一项基于陈述选择的联合分析，并估计了个人层面的枪支需求模型。我们利用观测数据中的总体矩对估计结果进行了验证。接着，我们利用估计结果模拟了在不同法规下流通中枪支数量和类型的变化。重要的是，我们发现，专门针对“攻击性武器”的禁令或限制会增加对手枪的需求，而手枪与绝大多数枪支相关暴力事件有关。我们提供了反事实情境下消费者剩余的分布，并讨论了这些分布如何有助于政策制定。

papers.title: Life After Death: A Field Experiment with Small Businesses on Information Frictions, Stigma, and Bankruptcy
papers.authors: Shai Bernstein, Emanuele Colonnelli, Mitchell Hoffman, Benjamin Iverson
papers.abstract: In an RCT with US small businesses, we document that a large share of firms are not well-informed about bankruptcy. Many assume that bankruptcy necessarily entails the death of a business and do not know about Chapter 11, where debts are renegotiated so that the business can continue operating. Firms also exhibit bankruptcy-related stigma, believing that bankruptcy is embarrassing, a sign of failure, and a negative signal to employees and customers. Short educational videos that address information or stigma increase knowledge and decrease stigma, both immediately and durably over 4 months. Videos increase reported interest in using Chapter 11 bankruptcy and increase intended debt and investment. However, we do not observe long-term real effects. A survey of bankruptcy attorneys and judges points to entrepreneurs’ overconfidence and, to a lesser extent, excessive perceived legal fees as first-order frictions explaining the limited real impact of treatments that only address information and stigma.
papers.zh_title: 死后余生：关于信息摩擦、污名化与破产的小企业实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 在一项针对美国小企业的随机对照试验中，我们发现很大一部分企业对破产了解不足。许多人认为破产必然意味着企业死亡，并且不了解第11章破产（即通过债务重组使企业得以继续运营）。企业还表现出与破产相关的污名化，认为破产令人尴尬、是失败的标志，并向员工和客户传递负面信号。针对信息或污名化的简短教育视频能够立即且持久地（超过4个月）提高知识水平并减少污名化。这些视频增加了受访者对使用第11章破产的兴趣，并提高了预期的债务和投资水平。然而，我们并未观察到长期的实质性影响。对破产律师和法官的调查表明，企业家的过度自信，以及在较小程度上过高的法律费用感知，是解释仅针对信息和污名化的处理措施产生有限实际影响的首要摩擦因素。

papers.title: The Benefits of Revealing Race: Evidence from Minority-owned Local Businesses
papers.authors: Abhay Aneja, Michael Luca, Oren Reshef
papers.abstract: Is there latent demand to support Black-owned businesses? To explore, we analyze a new feature that made it easier to identify Black-owned restaurants on a large online platform. We find that labeling restaurants as “Black-owned” increased customer engagement and firm performance, as measured by online traffic, calls, orders, and in person visits. These effects are most pronounced in left-leaning areas characterized by lower bias against racial minorities, as measured by regional variation in voting patterns and IAT scores. Restaurants that receive the label also see an increase in the fraction of reviews that are left by White customers.
papers.zh_title: 揭示种族的益处：来自少数族裔本地企业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 是否存在支持黑人拥有的企业的潜在需求？为了探究这一点，我们分析了一个大型在线平台上的新功能，该功能使得识别黑人拥有的餐厅变得更加容易。我们发现，将餐厅标记为“黑人拥有”增加了客户参与度和企业绩效，具体表现为在线流量、电话、订单和到店访问量的增加。这些效应在左倾地区最为显著，这些地区的特点是（根据投票模式和内隐联想测验分数的地区差异衡量）对少数族裔的偏见较低。获得该标签的餐厅还发现，白人顾客留下的评论比例有所增加。

papers.title: Paying Moms to Stay Home: Short and Long Run Effects on Parents and Children
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Tuomas Kosonen, Kristiina Huttunen
papers.abstract: We study the impacts of a policy designed to reward mothers who stay at home rather than join the labor force when their children are under age three. We use regional and over time variation to show that the Finnish Home Care Allowance (HCA) decreases maternal employment in both the short and long term. The effects are large enough for the existence of home care benefit system to explain the higher short-term child penalty in Finland than comparable nations. Home care benefits also negatively affect the early childhood cognitive test results of children, decrease the likelihood of choosing academic high school, and increase youth crimes. We confirm that the mechanism of action is changing work/home care arrangements by studying a day care fee reform that had the opposite effect of raising incentives to work – with corresponding opposite effects on mothers and children compared to HCA. Our findings suggest that shifting child care from the home to the market increases labor force participation and improves child outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 付钱让妈妈待在家里：对父母和孩子的短期与长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项旨在奖励在孩子三岁以下时待在家里而非加入劳动力市场的母亲的政策的影响。我们利用地区和时间上的差异表明，芬兰的家庭护理津贴在短期和长期内都降低了母亲的就业率。其影响足够大，以至于家庭护理福利制度的存在可以解释芬兰比同类国家更高的短期育儿惩罚。家庭护理福利还对儿童的早期认知测试结果产生负面影响，降低了选择学术型高中的可能性，并增加了青少年犯罪。通过研究一项日托费用改革（该改革产生了提高工作激励的相反效果，并对母亲和孩子产生了与家庭护理津贴相反的效应），我们确认了其作用机制是改变工作/家庭护理安排。我们的研究结果表明，将儿童保育从家庭转移到市场可以提高劳动力参与率并改善儿童发展结果。

papers.title: Structuring Cash Transfers: Cash Flow Preferences, Seasonality, and Financial Decisions in Rural Kenya
papers.authors: Carolina Kansikas, Anandi Mani, Paul Niehaus
papers.abstract: We examine the preferences of low-income households in Kenya over the structure of unconditional cash transfers. Most preferred lumpy transfers, and some preferred deferred receipt—in contrast to the typical structures of safety-net programs, but consistent with evidence on the financial challenges of poverty. Turning to consequences, receiving transfers later in the year raised income 1.5 years later—but willingness to defer receipt was sensitive to small changes in cash flow around the time of decision-making. Taken together, these results illustrate how adapting cash transfer design to the decision-making environment of those in poverty could improve financial choices and outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 结构化现金转移：肯尼亚农村地区的现金流偏好、季节性与财务决策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了肯尼亚低收入家庭对无条件现金转移支付结构形式的偏好。大多数人偏好一次性大额转移，有些人偏好延迟领取——这与安全网项目的典型结构形成对比，但与关于贫困财务挑战的证据一致。转向后果方面，在一年中较晚时间收到转移支付，使一年半后的收入有所增加——但延迟领取的意愿对决策时点附近现金流的微小变化很敏感。综合来看，这些结果说明了如何根据贫困人口的决策环境调整现金转移支付设计，以改善财务选择和结果。

papers.title: Crowding in Private Quality: The Equilibrium Effects of Public Spending in Education
papers.authors: Tahir Andrabi, Natalie Bau, Jishnu Das, Naureen Karachiwalla, Asim Ijaz Khwaja
papers.abstract: We estimate the equilibrium effects of a public-school grant program administered through school councils in Pakistani villages with multiple public and private schools and clearly defined catchment boundaries. The program was randomized at the village-level, allowing us to estimate its causal impact on the market. Four years after the start of the program, test scores were 0.2 sd higher in public schools. We find evidence of an education multiplier: test scores in private schools were also 0.2 sd higher in treated markets. Consistent with standard models of product differentiation, the education multiplier is greater for those private schools that faced a greater threat to their market power. Accounting for private sector responses increases the program's cost-effectiveness by 85% and affects how a policymaker would target spending. Given that markets with several public and private schools are now pervasive in low- and middle-income countries, prudent policy requires us to account for private sector responses to public policy, both in their design and in their evaluation.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED；JEL：H44, H52, I22, I25, I28, O12, O15
papers.zh_title: 挤入私立质量：教育公共支出的均衡效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一项通过学校委员会在巴基斯坦村庄实施的公立学校补助金项目的均衡效应，这些村庄拥有多所公立和私立学校，并有明确的招生区域边界。该项目在村庄层面进行了随机化，使我们能够估计其对市场的因果影响。项目启动四年后，公立学校的考试成绩提高了0.2个标准差。我们发现了教育乘数的证据：在受处理的市场中，私立学校的考试成绩也提高了0.2个标准差。与标准的产品差异化模型一致，对于那些面临更大市场势力威胁的私立学校，教育乘数更大。考虑私营部门的反应，使该项目的成本效益提高了85%，并影响了政策制定者如何确定支出目标。鉴于拥有多所公立和私立学校的市场在中低收入国家已普遍存在，审慎的政策要求我们在设计和评估公共政策时，必须考虑私营部门的反应。

papers.title: The Impact of Vertical Integration on Physician Behavior and Healthcare Delivery: Evidence from Gastroenterology Practices
papers.authors: Soroush Saghafian, Lina D. Song, Joseph P. Newhouse, Mary Beth Landrum, John Hsu
papers.abstract: US healthcare is undergoing a period of substantial change, with many hospitals vertically integrating with physician practices. Such integration could improve quality by promoting care coordination, but could also worsen it by impacting care delivery. Evidence on how physicians alter their behavior from the changes in financial ownership and the incentive structures of the integrated organizations is scant. We examine Medicare patients treated by gastroenterologists, a specialty with a recent increase in vertical integration. Using a causal model and large-scale patient-level national panel data that include 2.6 million patient visits across 5,488 physicians, we examine changes in various measures of care delivery. We find that physicians significantly alter care processes (e.g., in using anesthesia with deep sedation) after they vertically integrate, and that patients' post-procedure complications increase substantially. We provide evidence that the financial incentive structure of the integrated practices is the main reason for the changes in physician behavior, since it discourages the integrated practices from allocating expensive resources to relatively unprofitable procedures. Although integration improves operational efficiency measured by physicians' throughput, it negatively affects quality and overall spending. We note some potential policy levers through which policymakers could mitigate the negative consequences of vertical integration.
papers.zh_title: 纵向整合对医生行为与医疗服务的影响：来自胃肠病学实践的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国医疗体系正经历重大变革，许多医院与医生诊所进行纵向整合。这种整合可能通过促进护理协调来提高质量，但也可能通过影响医疗服务提供而降低质量。关于医生如何因财务所有权变化及整合组织的激励结构而改变其行为的证据很少。我们研究了由胃肠病医生治疗的Medicare患者，该专科近期纵向整合有所增加。利用包含5488名医生、260万次患者就诊的全国性患者层面面板数据，并采用因果模型，我们考察了医疗服务提供各项指标的变化。我们发现，医生在纵向整合后显著改变了护理流程（例如，在深度镇静麻醉的使用上），且患者术后并发症显著增加。我们提供的证据表明，整合诊所的财务激励结构是医生行为变化的主要原因，因为它阻碍整合诊所将昂贵资源分配给相对不盈利的诊疗项目。尽管整合提高了以医生吞吐量衡量的运营效率，但它对质量和总体支出产生了负面影响。我们指出了一些潜在的政策杠杆，政策制定者可通过这些杠杆减轻纵向整合的负面后果。

papers.title: Automating Automaticity: How the Context of Human Choice Affects the Extent of Algorithmic Bias
papers.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Diag Davenport, Jens Ludwig, Sendhil Mullainathan
papers.abstract: Consumer choices are increasingly mediated by algorithms, which use data on those past choices to infer consumer preferences and then curate future choice sets. Behavioral economics suggests one reason these algorithms so often fail: choices can systematically deviate from preferences. For example, research shows that prejudice can arise not just from preferences and beliefs, but also from the context in which people choose. When people behave automatically, biases creep in; snap decisions are typically more prejudiced than slow, deliberate ones, and can lead to behaviors that users themselves do not consciously want or intend. As a result, algorithms trained on automatic behaviors can misunderstand the prejudice of users: the more automatic the behavior, the greater the error. We empirically test these ideas in a lab experiment, and find that more automatic behavior does indeed seem to lead to more biased algorithms. We then explore the large-scale consequences of this idea by carrying out algorithmic audits of Facebook in its two biggest markets, the US and India, focusing on two algorithms that differ in how users engage with them: News Feed (people interact with friends' posts fairly automatically) and People You May Know (people choose friends fairly deliberately). We find significant out-group bias in the News Feed algorithm (e.g., whites are less likely to be shown Black friends' posts, and Muslims less likely to be shown Hindu friends' posts), but no detectable bias in the PYMK algorithm. Together, these results suggest a need to rethink how large-scale algorithms use data on human behavior, especially in online contexts where so much of the measured behavior might be quite automatic.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：A12, D63, D83
papers.zh_title: 自动化自动性：人类选择背景如何影响算法偏见的程度
papers.zh_abstract: 消费者选择越来越多地由算法中介，这些算法利用过去选择的数据来推断消费者偏好，然后策划未来的选择集。行为经济学指出了这些算法经常失败的一个原因：选择可能系统性地偏离偏好。例如，研究表明偏见不仅源于偏好和信念，还源于人们做出选择时的背景。当人们自动行事时，偏见就会潜入；仓促的决定通常比缓慢、深思熟虑的决定更具偏见，并可能导致用户自身并未有意识想要或意图的行为。因此，基于自动行为训练的算法可能会误解用户的偏见：行为越自动，错误就越大。我们在实验室实验中实证检验了这些想法，发现更自动的行为确实似乎会导致更具偏见的算法。然后，我们通过对其两个最大市场（美国和印度）的Facebook进行算法审计，探讨了这一想法的大规模后果，重点关注用户参与方式不同的两种算法：新闻推送（人们相当自动地与朋友的帖子互动）和“你可能认识的人”（人们相当审慎地选择朋友）。我们在新闻推送算法中发现了显著的群体外偏见（例如，白人不太可能看到黑人朋友的帖子，穆斯林不太可能看到印度教朋友的帖子），但在PYMK算法中没有发现可检测到的偏见。这些结果共同表明，需要重新思考大规模算法如何使用人类行为数据，尤其是在线上环境中，因为其中大量被测量的行为可能相当自动。

papers.title: Mutual Fund Flows and the Supply of Capital in Municipal Financing
papers.authors: Manuel Adelino, Sophia Chiyoung Cheong, Jaewon Choi, Ji Yeol Jimmy Oh
papers.abstract: This paper identifies the impact of fluctuations in the supply of capital from mutual funds on municipal bond financing and makes three contributions to the literature. First, we develop an identification strategy based on the Morningstar rating methodology at the moment that funds reach 5 years in operation. This approach isolates supply-side effects that are orthogonal to both fund and issuer fundamentals and can be applied in a broad range of settings. Second, we show that exogeneous fund flows lead to more municipal bond issuances and raise bond prices, but only when funds, issuers, and underwriters are connected through existing relationships. This result highlights the role of relationship lending in the context of municipal bond financing. Third, our results suggest that municipal bond issuers exploit favorable financing conditions to issue bonds with shorter delays and lower transaction costs, such as non-general-obligation bonds that require no voter approval and non-green bonds. These frictions can limit the impact of capital-supply shocks on municipal financing.
papers.zh_title: 共同基金流动与市政融资中的资本供给
papers.zh_abstract: 本文识别了共同基金资本供给波动对市政债券融资的影响，并对文献做出了三项贡献。首先，我们基于晨星评级方法在基金运营满5年时的特点，开发了一种识别策略。该方法分离出与基金和发行人基本面均正交的供给侧效应，并可广泛应用于多种场景。其次，我们表明，外生的基金流动会导致更多的市政债券发行并推高债券价格，但这仅当基金、发行人和承销商通过现有关系连接时才成立。这一结果突显了关系贷款在市政债券融资背景下的作用。第三，我们的结果表明，市政债券发行人利用有利的融资条件，发行延迟更短、交易成本更低的债券，例如无需选民批准的非一般义务债券和非绿色债券。这些摩擦可能限制资本供给冲击对市政融资的影响。

papers.title: The Nature of Long-Term Unemployment: Predictability, Heterogeneity and Selection
papers.authors: Andreas I. Mueller, Johannes Spinnewijn
papers.abstract: This paper studies the predictability of long-term unemployment (LTU) using rich administrative data from Sweden. We establish substantial heterogeneity in LTU risk across individuals, accounting for both observed and unobserved heterogeneity using a wide range of observable predictors and multiple spell outcomes respectively. We apply our prediction algorithm to study the dynamics of job finding over the unemployment spell and the business cycle. Selection effects can explain most of the decline in average job finding over the unemployment spell, but little of its cyclicality. We also find sizeable heterogeneity in the profiles of job finding over the unemployment spell, but not so over the business cycle.
papers.zh_title: 长期失业的本质：可预测性、异质性与选择效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用瑞典丰富的行政数据研究长期失业的可预测性。我们通过分别使用广泛的可观测预测因子和多次失业结局，来考虑观测和未观测的异质性，从而确立了不同个体之间长期失业风险的显著异质性。我们应用预测算法来研究失业期间和工作周期中工作寻找的动态变化。选择效应可以解释失业期间平均工作寻找率下降的大部分原因，但对其周期性变化解释甚少。我们还发现，在失业期间的工作寻找率轨迹上存在相当大的异质性，但在工作周期中则不然。

papers.title: Relational Contracts: Recent Empirical Advancements and Open Questions
papers.authors: Rocco Macchiavello, Ameet Morjaria
papers.abstract: Relational contracts - informal self-enforcing agreements sustained by repeated interactions - are ubiquitous both within and across organizational boundaries. This review highlights recent empirical contributions in selected areas. We begin by reviewing some recent work that explicitly takes the dynamic incentive compatibility constraints that underpin relational contract models to the data. We then discuss the relationship between relational contracting and firms' performance. We conclude pointing in directions that we consider to be particularly ripe for future work.
papers.zh_title: 关系契约：近期实证进展与未解问题
papers.zh_abstract: 关系契约——由重复互动维持的非正式自我执行协议——在组织边界内外无处不在。本综述重点介绍了选定领域的最新实证贡献。我们首先回顾了一些近期工作，这些工作明确地将支撑关系契约模型的动态激励相容约束应用于数据。然后，我们讨论了关系契约与企业绩效之间的关系。最后，我们指出了我们认为特别适合未来研究的方向。

papers.title: The Slow Diffusion of Earnings Inequality
papers.authors: Isaac Sorkin, Melanie Wallskog
papers.abstract: Over the last several decades, rising pay dispersion between firms accounts for the majority of the dramatic increase in earnings inequality in the United States. This paper shows that a distinct cross-cohort pattern drives this rise: newer cohorts of firms enter more dispersed and stay more dispersed throughout their lives. A similar cohort pattern drives a variety of other closely related facts: increases in worker sorting across firms on the basis of pay, education, and age, and increasing productivity dispersion across firms. We discuss two important implications. First, these cohort patterns suggest a link between changes in firm entry associated with the decline in business dynamism and the rise in earnings inequality. Second, cohort effects imply a slow diffusion of inequality: we expect inequality to continue to rise as older and more equal cohorts of firms are replaced by younger and more unequal cohorts. Back of the envelope calculations suggest that this momentum could be substantial with increases in between-firm inequality in the next two decades almost as large as in the last two.
papers.zh_title: 收入不平等的缓慢扩散
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去的几十年里，美国收入不平等急剧上升，其中企业间薪酬差异的扩大是主要原因。本文表明，一种独特的跨队列模式驱动了这一上升：较新的企业队列在进入时更加分散，并且在其整个生命周期中保持更加分散。类似的队列模式还驱动了其他一系列密切相关的事实：基于薪酬、教育和年龄的工人跨企业分类增加，以及企业间生产率差异的扩大。我们讨论了两个重要含义。首先，这些队列模式表明，与商业活力下降相关的企业进入变化与收入不平等加剧之间存在联系。其次，队列效应意味着不平等的缓慢扩散：我们预计不平等将继续上升，因为更老、更平等的企业队列将被更年轻、更不平等的企业队列所取代。粗略计算表明，这种势头可能相当大，未来二十年企业间不平等的增幅几乎与过去二十年一样大。

papers.title: Similarities and Differences in the Adoption of General Purpose Technologies
papers.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
papers.abstract: Economic models provide little insight into when the next big idea and its associated productivity dividend will come along. Once a general purpose technology (GPT) is identified, the economist’s toolkit does provide an understanding when firms will adopt a new technology and for what purpose. The focus of the literature has been on commonalities across each type of GPT. This focus is natural, given that the goal of the literature has been to identify generalizable insights across technologies. Broadly, this literature emphasizes heterogeneity in co-invention costs across firms. Each GPT, however, provides a distinct benefit. Steam provided a new power source. The internet facilitated communication. The differences between GPTs are important for understanding adoption patterns. Using the examples of the internet and artificial intelligence, we discuss how both co-invention costs and distinct benefits determine the adoption of technology. For both technologies, we demonstrate that discussions of the impact of a GPT on productivity and growth need to emphasize the benefits as well as the costs. The goal of this paper is therefore to link the literature on co-invention costs with an understanding of the distinct benefits of each GPT.
papers.zh_title: 通用目的技术采纳中的相似性与差异性
papers.zh_abstract: 经济模型对于下一个重大创意及其带来的生产率红利何时出现几乎无法提供洞见。然而，一旦某种通用目的技术（GPT）被识别出来，经济学工具箱确实能够帮助理解企业何时以及为何采纳新技术。现有文献的焦点在于各类GPT之间的共性。鉴于该领域的目标是识别跨技术的可推广洞见，这种聚焦是自然的。总体而言，这些文献强调企业间共同发明成本的异质性。然而，每种GPT都提供了独特的益处：蒸汽提供了新的动力源，互联网促进了沟通。GPT之间的差异对于理解采纳模式至关重要。以互联网和人工智能为例，我们讨论了共同发明成本和独特益处如何共同决定技术的采纳。对于这两种技术，我们论证了关于GPT对生产率和增长影响的讨论需要同时强调收益与成本。因此，本文的目标是将关于共同发明成本的文献与对每种GPT独特益处的理解联系起来。

papers.title: Government Audits
papers.authors: Martina Cuneo, Jetson Leder-Luis, Silvia Vannutelli
papers.abstract: Audits are a common mechanism used by governments to monitor public spending. In this paper, we discuss the effectiveness of auditing with theory and empirics. In our model, the value of audits depends on both the underlying presence of abuse and the government’s ability to observe it and enforce punishments, making auditing most effective in middling state-capacity environments. Consistent with this theory, we survey all the existing credibly causal studies and show that government audits seem to have positive effects mostly in middle-state-capacity environments like Brazil. We present new empirical evidence from American city governments, a high-capacity and low-impropriety environment. Using a previously unexplored threshold in federal audit rules and a dynamic regression discontinuity framework, we estimate the effects of these audits on American city finance and find no marginal effect of audits.
papers.zh_title: 政府审计
papers.zh_abstract: 审计是政府用于监督公共支出的常见机制。在本文中，我们结合理论与实证研究讨论审计的有效性。在我们的模型中，审计的价值既取决于滥用行为的潜在存在程度，也取决于政府观察滥用行为并执行惩罚的能力，这使得审计在中等国家能力环境中最为有效。与这一理论一致，我们调查了所有现有的可信因果研究，并表明政府审计似乎在中等国家能力环境（如巴西）中大多产生积极效果。我们提供了来自美国城市政府（一个高能力、低不当行为的环境）的新实证证据。利用联邦审计规则中一个此前未被探索的阈值以及动态断点回归框架，我们估计了这些审计对美国城市财政的影响，并发现审计没有边际效应。

papers.title: Effects of Enhanced Legal Aid in Child Welfare: Evidence from a Randomized Trial of Mi Abogado
papers.authors: Ryan Cooper, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Andrés P. Hojman
papers.abstract: Children spend years in foster care, and there are concerns that bureaucratic hurdles contribute to unnecessarily long stays. In a novel approach to policy making, the Chilean government randomized the introduction of a program aimed at reducing these delays in order to evaluate its effects on child well-being. Mi Abogado (My Lawyer) provides legal aid and social services to foster children living in institutions. Using administrative data linked across government registries, we find the program reduced the length of stay in foster care with no increase in subsequent placement, resulting in savings that are substantially greater than the cost of the program. The program also led to a reduction in criminal justice involvement and an improvement in school attendance. The results demonstrate that investment in the quality of foster care services can improve child well-being.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H4, K40
papers.zh_title: 增强儿童福利领域法律援助的效果：来自Mi Abogado随机试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童在寄养机构中度过数年，人们担忧官僚障碍导致不必要的长期寄养。智利政府采用一种新颖的政策制定方法，随机引入一项旨在减少这些延迟的项目，以评估其对儿童福祉的影响。Mi Abogado（我的律师）为生活在机构中的寄养儿童提供法律援助和社会服务。利用跨政府登记册关联的行政数据，我们发现该项目缩短了寄养时长，且未增加后续安置，节省的成本远超项目支出。该项目还导致刑事司法介入减少，并改善了学校出勤率。结果表明，投资于寄养服务质量可以改善儿童福祉。

papers.title: Behavioral Economics in Education Market Design: A Forward-Looking Review
papers.authors: Alex Rees-Jones, Ran Shorrer
papers.abstract: The rational-choice framework for modeling matching markets has been tremendously useful in guiding the design of school-assignment systems. Despite this success, a large body of work documents deviations from the predictions of this framework that appear influenced by behavioral-economic phenomena. We review these findings and the body of behavioral theories that have been presented as possible explanations. Motivated by this literature, we lay out paths for behavioral economists to be directly useful to education market design.
papers.zh_title: 教育市场设计中的行为经济学：前瞻性综述
papers.zh_abstract: 用于建模匹配市场的理性选择框架在指导学校分配系统设计方面极为有用。尽管取得了这一成功，大量研究记录了与该框架预测的偏离，这些偏离似乎受到行为经济学现象的影响。我们回顾了这些发现以及作为可能解释提出的行为理论体系。受此文献启发，我们提出了行为经济学家直接助力教育市场设计的路径。

papers.title: Cross-State Strategic Voting
papers.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Joseph Engelberg, Runjing Lu, William Mullins
papers.abstract: We estimate that 3.1% of US voters, or 6.1 million individuals, were registered to vote in two states in 2020, opening up the possibility for them to choose where to vote. Double registrants are concentrated in the wealthiest zipcodes and respond to both incentives and costs, disproportionately choosing to vote in swing states (higher incentive) and states which automatically send out mail-in ballots (lower cost). We call this behavior Cross-State Strategic Voting. While others have documented strategic incentives on who to vote for, this paper is the first to consider strategic incentives on where to vote.
papers.zh_title: 跨州策略性投票
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计，2020年有3.1%的美国选民（即610万人）在两个州注册投票，这为他们选择投票地点提供了可能性。双重注册者集中在最富裕的邮政编码区，并对激励和成本均做出反应，他们不成比例地选择在摇摆州（更高激励）和自动邮寄选票的州（更低成本）投票。我们将这种行为称为跨州策略性投票。虽然已有文献记录了关于投票给谁的战略激励，但本文首次考虑了关于投票地点的战略激励。

papers.title: State-Dependent Local Projections: Understanding Impulse Response Heterogeneity
papers.authors: James Cloyne, Òscar Jordà, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: An impulse response is the dynamic average effect of an intervention across horizons. We use the well-known Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition to explore a response’s heterogeneity over time and over states of the economy. This can be implemented with a simple extension to the usual local projection specification that nevertheless keeps the model linear in parameters. Using our new decomposition-based approach, we show how to unpack heterogeneity in the fiscal multiplier, an object that at any point in time may depend on a number of potentially correlated factors, including existing economic conditions and the monetary response. In our application, the fiscal multiplier varies considerably with monetary policy: it can be as small as zero, or as large as 2, depending on the degree of monetary offset.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C54, C99, E32, E62, H20, H5
papers.zh_title: 状态依赖的局部投影：理解脉冲响应异质性
papers.zh_abstract: 脉冲响应是干预在不同时间跨度上的动态平均效应。我们利用著名的Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca分解来探索响应随时间和经济状态的异质性。这可以通过对通常的局部投影设定进行简单扩展来实现，同时保持模型在参数上的线性。利用我们基于分解的新方法，我们展示了如何解析财政乘数的异质性——该乘数在任何时点都可能取决于多个潜在相关因素，包括现有经济状况和货币响应。在我们的应用中，财政乘数随货币政策显著变化：根据货币抵消程度的不同，它可能小至零，也可能大至2。

papers.title: Lottery-Based Evaluations of Early Education Programs: Opportunities and Challenges for Building the Next Generation of Evidence
papers.authors: Christina Weiland, Rebecca Unterman, Susan Dynarski, Rachel Abenavoli, Howard Bloom, Breno Braga, Ann-Marie Faria, Erica H. Greenberg, Brian Jacob, Jane Arnold Lincove, Karen Manship, Meghan McCormick, Luke Miratrix, Tomás E. Monarrez, Pamela Morris-Perez, Anna Shapiro, Jon Valant, Lindsay Weixler
papers.abstract: Lottery-based identification strategies offer potential for generating the next generation of evidence on U.S. early education programs. Our collaborative network of five research teams applying this design in early education and methods experts has identified six challenges that need to be carefully considered in this next context: 1) available baseline covariates may not be very rich; 2) limited data on the counterfactual; 3) limited and inconsistent outcome data; 4) weakened internal validity due to attrition; 5) constrained external validity due to who competes for oversubscribed programs; and 6) difficulties answering site-level questions with child-level randomization. We offer potential solutions to these six challenges and concrete recommendations for the design of future lottery-based early education studies.
papers.zh_title: 基于抽签的早期教育项目评估：构建下一代证据的机遇与挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 基于抽签的识别策略为生成美国早期教育项目的下一代证据提供了潜力。我们由五个应用该设计的研究团队和方法专家组成的合作网络，识别出在此新背景下需要仔细考虑的六个挑战：1）可用的基线协变量可能不够丰富；2）反事实数据有限；3）结果数据有限且不一致；4）因损耗导致内部有效性减弱；5）因谁竞争超额订阅项目导致外部有效性受限；6）用儿童层面的随机化回答项目层面问题的困难。我们为这六个挑战提供了潜在解决方案，并为未来基于抽签的早期教育研究设计提出了具体建议。

papers.title: Behavior Mediates the Health Effects of Extreme Wildfire Smoke Events
papers.authors: Sam Heft-Neal, Carlos F. Gould, Marissa Childs, Mathew V. Kiang, Kari Nadeau, Mark Duggan, Eran Bendavid, Marshall Burke
papers.abstract: Air pollution is known to negatively affect a range of health outcomes. Wildfire smoke is an increasingly important contributor to air pollution, yet extreme smoke events are highly salient and could induce behavioral responses that alter health impacts. We combine geolocated data covering the near universe of 127 million emergency department (ED) visits in California with estimates of daily surface wildfire smoke PM2.5 concentrations and quantify how increasingly acute wildfire smoke events affect ED visits. Low or moderate levels of ambient smoke increase total visits by 1-1.5% in the week following exposure, but extreme smoke days reduce total visits by 6-9%, relative to a day with no smoke. Reductions persist for at least a month. Declines during extreme exposures are driven by diagnoses not thought to be acutely impacted by pollution, including accidental injuries, and come disproportionately from less insured populations. In contrast, health outcomes with the strongest physiological link to short-term air pollution increase dramatically: ED visits for asthma, COPD, and cough all increase by 30-110% in the week after one extreme smoke day. Because low and moderate smoke days vastly outweigh extreme smoke days in our sample, we estimate that smoke exposure was responsible for roughly 3,000 additional ED visits per year in CA from 2006-2017.
papers.zh_title: 行为调节极端野火烟雾事件的健康影响
papers.zh_abstract: 已知空气污染对一系列健康结果产生负面影响。野火烟雾是空气污染日益重要的来源，然而极端烟雾事件高度显著，可能引发改变健康影响的行为反应。我们结合覆盖加州近1.27亿次急诊就诊的地理定位数据与每日地表野火烟雾PM2.5浓度估计值，量化日益严重的野火烟雾事件如何影响急诊就诊。低或中等水平的烟雾暴露在暴露后一周内使总就诊量增加1-1.5%，但极端烟雾日相对于无烟日使总就诊量减少6-9%。这种减少持续至少一个月。极端暴露期间的下降主要由被认为不受污染急性影响的诊断（包括意外伤害）驱动，且不成比例地来自保险覆盖较少的人群。相比之下，与短期空气污染生理联系最强的健康结果急剧增加：一次极端烟雾日后一周内，哮喘、慢性阻塞性肺病和咳嗽的急诊就诊量均增加30-110%。由于在我们的样本中低和中等烟雾日远超极端烟雾日，我们估计2006-2017年间，烟雾暴露每年在加州导致约3000次额外急诊就诊。

papers.title: Pediatric Drug Adherence and Parental Attention: Evidence from Comprehensive Claims Data
papers.authors: Josh Feng, Matthew J. Higgins, Elena Patel
papers.abstract: Using comprehensive U.S. drug claims data, we show that adherence to asthma control medication declined during the COVID-19 pandemic. We find that young children exhibited a 40 percent decrease in adherence by the end of 2020. The responses were less negative for older children and positive for adults. We provide additional evidence that parental attention played a role in driving this decrease, based on heterogeneity by pre-pandemic mail order usage and the number of parental scripts. Policy implications for improving pediatric adherence are discussed.
papers.zh_title: 儿科药物依从性与父母关注：来自综合索赔数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国全面的药物索赔数据，我们显示在COVID-19大流行期间，哮喘控制药物的依从性有所下降。我们发现，到2020年底，幼儿的依从性下降了40%。年龄较大儿童的反应负面程度较小，而成年人的反应则为正面。基于大流行前邮购使用情况和父母处方数量的异质性，我们提供了额外证据表明父母关注在推动这一下降中发挥了作用。本文讨论了改善儿科药物依从性的政策含义。

papers.title: RIM-Based Value Premium and Factor Pricing Using Value-Price Divergence
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Nathan Darden George, Guojun Wang
papers.abstract: We document that value-to-price, the ratio of Residual-Income-Model-based valuation to market price, subsumes the power of book-to-market ratio and many other value or quality measures in predicting stock returns. Long-short value-to-price portfolios hedge against momentum, revitalize the seemingly missing value premium over past decades, and generate significant returns after adjusting for common factors. The value-price-divergence (VPD) factor constructed from the average returns of these portfolios within small and big stocks is not spanned by these known factors.
