Max Sharpe ratio and constrained R-squared tests reveal that VPD is a better substitute for the traditional value factor and a four-factor model using the VPD, market, momentum, and size factors outperforms most extant benchmarks in explaining the cross-section of expected equity returns. The findings remain robust under alternative specifications of equity cost of capital.
papers.zh_title: 基于剩余收益模型的价值溢价与使用价值-价格偏离的因子定价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，价值-价格比（基于剩余收益模型的估值与市场价格之比）在预测股票收益方面吸收了账面市值比以及许多其他价值或质量指标的能力。多空价值-价格投资组合对冲了动量效应，重振了过去几十年看似缺失的价值溢价，并在调整常见因子后产生了显著收益。由这些投资组合在小型和大型股票中的平均收益构建的价值-价格偏离（VPD）因子并未被这些已知因子所涵盖。最大夏普比率和约束R平方检验表明，VPD是传统价值因子的更好替代品，而使用VPD、市场、动量与规模因子的四因子模型在解释预期股票收益的横截面方面优于大多数现有基准。在股权资本成本的不同设定下，这些发现依然稳健。

papers.title: Cooling Externality of Large-Scale Irrigation
papers.authors: Thomas Braun, Wolfram Schlenker
papers.abstract: We provide novel evidence that large-scale irrigation heterogeneously shifts the temperature distribution towards cooler temperatures during the months of the growing season relative to the rest of the year. We employ a triple-difference estimator using a 59-year-long panel of weather records paired with the fraction of a county that is irrigated in 393 counties over the Ogallala aquifer. Cooling-by-irrigation propagates downwind and reduces the upper tail of the temperature distribution by up to 3C (5F) during the month of August, which has positive externalities on downwind crop yields ($120 million per year) and temperature-induced excess mortality ($240 million per year) that are of equal magnitude as the direct benefits of irrigation by enhancing heat tolerance ($440 million per year). The observed cooling helps explain why the US has seen less warming, especially of very hot temperatures, than what climate models project. Our findings highlight that weather shocks in highly irrigated areas are not exogenous but are influenced by human responses in the form of irrigation.
papers.zh_title: 大规模灌溉的降温外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了新的证据，表明大规模灌溉在生长季节的月份相对于一年中其他时间，异质性地将温度分布向更凉爽的温度偏移。我们采用三重差分估计量，使用了59年的天气记录面板数据，并结合奥加拉拉含水层上393个县中每个县的灌溉面积比例。灌溉导致的降温向下风方向传播，并在八月份将温度分布的上尾降低多达3°C（5°F），这对下风方向的作物产量（每年1.2亿美元）和温度诱发的超额死亡率（每年2.4亿美元）产生了正外部性，其规模与通过增强耐热性带来的灌溉直接效益（每年4.4亿美元）相当。观察到的降温有助于解释为什么美国经历的变暖，特别是极端高温的变暖，少于气候模型的预测。我们的发现强调，高度灌溉地区的天气冲击并非外生，而是受到人类以灌溉形式做出的反应的影响。

papers.title: Unconditional Cash Transfers for Families with Children in the U.S.: A Scoping Review
papers.authors: Hema Shah, Lisa A. Gennetian
papers.abstract: Children represent the largest indirect beneficiaries of the U.S. social welfare system. Yet, many questions remain about the direct benefits of cash aid to children. The current understanding of the impacts of cash aid in the U.S. is drawn primarily from studies of in-kind benefits, tax credits, and conditional cash aid programs. A corresponding economics literature focuses on the labor supply responses of parents and the role of income, parenting skills, and early education as family investment mechanisms that reduce socioeconomic inequality in children’s well-being. In contrast to the U.S., dozens of low- to middle-income nations use direct cash aid—conditional or unconditional—as a central policy strategy, with demonstrated positive effects across a host of economic and health measures and selected aspects of children’s health and schooling. This paper reviews the economic research on U.S. safety net programs and cash aid to families with children and what existing studies reveal about its impacts on family investment mechanisms and children’s outcomes. We specifically highlight gaps in understanding the impacts of unconditional cash aid on children. We then review nine contemporary unconditional cash transfer programs and discuss their promise and limitations in filling the U.S.-based economic evidence gap about the impact of cash aid on children’s development.
papers.meta: Programs：CH；JEL：H31, H53, H75, I3, I38, J13, J18
papers.zh_title: 美国对有子女家庭的无条件现金转移支付：一项范围综述
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童是美国社会福利体系中最大的间接受益者。然而，关于现金援助对儿童的直接益处仍有许多问题。目前对美国现金援助影响的理解主要来自对实物福利、税收抵免和有条件现金援助项目的研究。相应的经济学文献侧重于父母的劳动供给反应，以及收入、育儿技能和早期教育作为减少儿童福祉社会经济不平等的家庭投资机制的作用。与美国相反，数十个中低收入国家将直接现金援助（有条件或无条件）作为核心政策策略，并在众多经济和健康指标以及儿童健康和教育的特定方面显示出积极效果。本文回顾了关于美国安全网项目和对有子女家庭现金援助的经济学研究，以及现有研究揭示了这些项目对家庭投资机制和儿童结果的影响。我们特别强调了在理解无条件现金援助对儿童影响方面的空白。然后，我们回顾了九个当代的无条件现金转移支付项目，并讨论了它们在填补美国关于现金援助对儿童发展影响的经济证据空白方面的前景和局限性。

papers.title: Parental Education and Invention: The Finnish Enigma
papers.authors: Philippe Aghion, Ufuk Akcigit, Ari Hyytinen, Otto Toivanen
papers.abstract: Why is invention strongly positively correlated with parental income not only in the US but also in Finland which displays low income inequality and high social mobility? Using data on 1.45M Finnish individuals and their parents, we find that: (i) the positive association between parental income and off-spring probability of inventing is greatly reduced when controlling for parental education; (ii) instrumenting for the parents having a MSc-degree using distance to nearest university reveals a large causal effect of parental education on offspring probability of inventing; and (iii) the causal effect of parental education has been markedly weakened by the introduction in the early 1970s of a comprehensive schooling reform.
papers.zh_title: 父母教育与发明：芬兰之谜
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么发明与父母收入呈强烈正相关，不仅在美国如此，在收入不平等程度低且社会流动性高的芬兰也是如此？利用145万芬兰个体及其父母的数据，我们发现：（i）在控制父母教育后，父母收入与子女发明概率之间的正相关关系大幅减弱；（ii）利用到最近大学的距离作为父母拥有硕士学位的工具变量，揭示了父母教育对子女发明概率的巨大因果效应；（iii）20世纪70年代初引入的综合学校教育改革显著削弱了父母教育的因果效应。

papers.title: Beware the Side Effects: Capital Controls, Trade and Misallocation
papers.authors: Eugenia Andreasen, Sofía Bauducco, Evangelina Dardati, Enrique G. Mendoza
papers.abstract: Capital controls are an effective credit-management tool but they have serious side effects. Analyzing a dynamic Melitz-OLG model in which firms face credit constraints, we find that capital controls worsen misallocation and hurt exports. Misallocation worsens through static effects that lower capital-labor ratios and raise firm prices. In addition, changes in saving incentives induce dynamic effects and changes in wages, aggregate demand and the real exchange rate cause general equilibrium effects. A quantitative analysis calibrated to Chile’s capital controls of the 1990s yields a sizable worsening in misallocation, with stronger effects on firms that are exporters, more productive, or far from their optimal scales. Exports and the share of exporting firms fall sharply. Rebating the revenue that capital controls may generate or using loan-to-value regulation instead of capital controls results in sharply weaker effects, but slightly tighter capital controls strengthens them significantly. A set of empirical tests applied to Chilean firm-level data provide robust support for the model’s key predictions.
papers.zh_title: 当心副作用：资本管制、贸易与资源错配
papers.zh_abstract: 资本管制是一种有效的信贷管理工具，但具有严重的副作用。通过分析一个企业面临信贷约束的动态Melitz-OLG模型，我们发现资本管制加剧了资源错配并损害了出口。资源错配通过降低资本劳动比和提高企业价格的静态效应而恶化。此外，储蓄激励的变化引发动态效应，而工资、总需求和实际汇率的变动则产生一般均衡效应。基于20世纪90年代智利资本管制校准的定量分析显示，资源错配显著恶化，对出口企业、生产率较高企业或远离最优规模的企业影响更强。出口和出口企业份额大幅下降。将资本管制可能产生的收入返还给企业，或使用贷款价值比监管替代资本管制，会导致影响显著减弱，但略微收紧资本管制则会显著增强这些影响。一系列应用于智利企业层面数据的实证检验为模型的关键预测提供了有力支持。

papers.title: A Mother’s Voice: Impacts of Spousal Communication Training on Child Health Investments
papers.authors: Martina Bjorkman-Nyqvist, Seema Jayachandran, Celine P. Zipfel
papers.abstract: Building on prior evidence that mothers often have a stronger preference for spending on children than fathers do, we use a randomized experiment to evaluate the impacts of a communication training program for mothers on child health in Uganda. The hypothesis is that the training will enable women to better convey their knowledge and preferences to their husbands and, thereby, boost investments in children's health. We find that the program increases spousal discussion about the family's health, nutrition, and finances. However, this does not increase overall adoption of health-promoting behaviors or improve child anthropometrics. One exception is that the communication training increases women's and children’s intake of protein-rich foods as well as household spending on these foods.
papers.zh_title: 母亲的声音：配偶沟通培训对儿童健康投资的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 基于先前关于母亲通常比父亲更偏好于为孩子支出的证据，我们利用一项随机实验评估了乌干达一项针对母亲的沟通培训项目对儿童健康的影响。假设是，该培训将使女性能够更好地向丈夫传达她们的知识和偏好，从而增加对儿童健康的投资。我们发现，该项目增加了配偶之间关于家庭健康、营养和财务状况的讨论。然而，这并未提高健康促进行为的总体采纳率，也未改善儿童的人体测量指标。一个例外是，沟通培训增加了女性和儿童对富含蛋白质食物的摄入量，以及家庭在这些食物上的支出。

papers.title: Optimal Monetary Policy with Heterogeneous Agents: Discretion, Commitment, and Timeless Policy
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Andreas Schaab
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes optimal monetary policy in a canonical heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian (HANK) model with wage rigidity. Under discretion, a utilitarian planner faces the incentive to redistribute towards indebted, high marginal utility households, which is a new source of inflationary bias. With commitment, i) zero inflation is the optimal long-run policy, ii) time-consistent policy requires both inflation and distributional penalties, and iii) the planner trades off aggregate stabilization against distributional considerations, so Divine Coincidence fails. We compute optimal stabilization policy in response to productivity, demand, and cost-push shocks using sequence-space methods, which we extend to Ramsey problems and welfare analysis.
papers.zh_title: 异质性代理人下的最优货币政策：相机抉择、承诺与永恒政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在一个具有工资刚性的经典异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）模型中刻画了最优货币政策。在相机抉择下，功利主义规划者面临向负债、高边际效用家庭进行再分配的激励，这是一种新的通胀偏差来源。在承诺下，（i）零通胀是最优长期政策，（ii）时间一致的政策需要同时包含通胀惩罚和分配惩罚，（iii）规划者在总体稳定与分配考量之间进行权衡，因此神圣巧合不再成立。我们使用序列空间方法计算了应对生产率、需求和成本推动冲击的最优稳定政策，并将该方法扩展到了拉姆齐问题和福利分析。

papers.title: Immigration, The Long-Term Care Workforce, and Elder Outcomes in the U.S.
papers.authors: David C. Grabowski, Jonathan Gruber, Brian McGarry
papers.abstract: Although debates over immigration remain contentious, one important sector served heavily by immigrants faces a critical labor shortage: nursing homes. We merge a variety of data sets on immigration and nursing homes and use a shift-share instrumental variables analysis to assess the impact of increased immigration on nursing home staffing and care quality. We show that increased immigration significantly raises the staffing levels of nursing homes in the U.S., particularly in full time positions. We then show that this has an associated very positive effect on patient outcomes, particularly for those who are short stayers at nursing homes, and particularly for immigration of Hispanic staff.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I11, I18, J61
papers.zh_title: 移民、长期护理劳动力与美国老年人护理结果
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管关于移民的争论仍然存在争议，但一个严重依赖移民的重要行业正面临严重的劳动力短缺：养老院。我们整合了关于移民和养老院的多个数据集，并使用偏移-份额工具变量分析来评估移民增加对养老院人员配置和护理质量的影响。我们表明，移民增加显著提高了美国养老院的人员配置水平，尤其是在全职岗位上。然后我们证明，这对患者结果产生了非常积极的影响，特别是对于在养老院短期居住的患者，并且尤其体现在西班牙裔员工的移民方面。

papers.title: A Tractable Income Process for Business Cycle Analysis
papers.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Alisdair McKay, Conor B. Ryan
papers.abstract: We estimate an income process that is consistent with key facts on individual income risk and its variation over the business cycle. In particular, the estimated process generates income fluctuations that display (i) flat and acyclical variance, (ii) volatile and procyclical skewness, (iii) very high kurtosis, and (iv) a moderate rise in cross-sectional inequality over the life cycle, all consistent with the US data. Furthermore, the income process captures the predictable nature of business cycle income risk: income changes during a business cycle episode are partly predicted by income levels before that episode. The estimated process features a time-varying distribution of innovations as well as a factor structure for business cycle exposure. Incorporating the estimated process into a business cycle model adds only one state variable—as in the workhorse persistent-plus-transitory income process—making it a tractable option for modelers.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E3, J31
papers.zh_title: 适用于商业周期分析的可处理收入过程
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个收入过程，该过程与关于个人收入风险及其在商业周期中变化的关键事实一致。具体来说，估计的过程产生的收入波动表现出：(i) 平坦且非周期性的方差，(ii) 波动且顺周期的偏度，(iii) 非常高的峰度，以及 (iv) 生命周期内横截面不平等程度的适度上升，所有这些都与美国数据一致。此外，该收入过程捕捉了商业周期收入风险的可预测性质：商业周期事件期间的收入变化部分可由该事件之前的收入水平预测。估计的过程具有时变的创新分布以及商业周期暴露的因子结构。将估计的过程纳入商业周期模型仅增加一个状态变量——如同常用的持久加暂时收入过程——使其成为建模者一个可处理的选择。

papers.title: Endogenous Production Networks with Fixed Costs
papers.authors: Emmanuel Dhyne, Ken Kikkawa, Xianglong Kong, Magne Mogstad, Felix Tintelnot
papers.abstract: This paper presents a tractable model of endogenous production networks with fixed costs associated with the formation of links between firms. The model consists of a finite number of firm types producing differentiated products. Each firm is characterized by firm-specific parameters describing its CES production function, firm-specific domestic and foreign demand shifters, and a firm-specific set of potential suppliers and buyers. We consider versions of the model in which either the buyer or the supplier initiates the formation of links, and versions in which the production network can be cyclic or acyclic. Our main theoretical result is that the closed economy equilibrium is unique if the set of feasible networks consists only of networks that are acyclic and the buyer initiates the link formation while having full bargaining power in price negotiations with the supplier. We provide examples of multiple equilibria if the supplier initiates the link formation in both cyclic and acyclic feasible networks or if the buyer initiates the link formation in a cyclic production network. We take the acyclic production network model to Belgian data on firm-to-firm production networks and show that it approximates well the salient features of the network. The endogenous network model generates substantial churn in domestic firm-to-firm linkages in response to trade shocks. However, the endogenous network model generates only moderately different welfare changes compared to a model with fixed linkages, suggesting that exogenous production networks can approximate the welfare response to trade shocks reasonably well.
papers.zh_title: 具有固定成本的内生生产网络
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个具有固定成本的内生生产网络的可处理模型，该固定成本与企业间链接的形成相关。该模型由有限数量的企业类型组成，这些企业生产差异化产品。每个企业都由描述其CES生产函数的企业特定参数、企业特定的国内和国外需求转移因子，以及企业特定的潜在供应商和买家集合来刻画。我们考虑了模型的几个版本：其中买方或供应商发起链接形成的版本，以及生产网络可以是循环或无环的版本。我们的主要理论结果是，如果可行网络集合仅包含无环网络，并且买方在发起链接形成的同时在与供应商的价格谈判中拥有完全的议价能力，那么封闭经济均衡是唯一的。我们提供了多重均衡的例子：如果供应商在循环和无环可行网络中发起链接形成，或者如果买方在循环生产网络中发起链接形成。我们将无环生产网络模型应用于比利时企业间生产网络的数据，并表明它很好地近似了网络的显著特征。内生网络模型在应对贸易冲击时，国内企业间链接产生了大量的更替。然而，与具有固定链接的模型相比，内生网络模型产生的福利变化仅存在适度差异，这表明外生生产网络可以相当好地近似福利对贸易冲击的反应。

papers.title: Fighting Poverty One Family at a Time: Experimental Evidence from an Intervention with Holistic, Individualized, Wrap-Around Services
papers.authors: William N. Evans, Shawna Kolka, James X. Sullivan, Patrick S. Turner
papers.abstract: Families in poverty face numerous barriers to establishing stable economic footing. This paper examines the effect of a holistic, individualized wrap-around service intervention on outcomes for low-income individuals. The intervention includes a detailed assessment, an individualized service plan, intensive case management administered by a two-person team with small caseloads, and temporary financial assistance used to overcome obstacles to self-sufficiency and incentivize behavior. We evaluate the intervention through a randomized controlled trial among participants seeking assistance at a local social service provider. Results indicate that the program improved labor market and housing outcomes two years after enrollment. Given the customized nature of the services, overall program effects might mask important heterogeneity. Exploratory analysis suggests the program helped employ participants who lacked employment but had stable housing, and that those without stable housing were helped in securing it.
papers.zh_title: 逐户扶贫：一项提供整体性、个性化、全方位服务干预的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 贫困家庭在建立稳定的经济基础方面面临众多障碍。本文考察了一项整体性、个性化的全方位服务干预对低收入个体结果的影响。该干预包括详细评估、个性化服务计划、由两人团队管理且个案量较小的强化个案管理，以及用于克服自给自足障碍和激励行为的临时经济援助。我们通过一项随机对照试验来评估该干预措施，试验对象是在当地社会服务提供者处寻求帮助的参与者。结果表明，该计划在注册两年后改善了劳动力市场和住房结果。鉴于服务的定制化性质，总体计划效果可能掩盖重要的异质性。探索性分析表明，该计划帮助了缺乏就业但有稳定住房的参与者找到工作，而那些没有稳定住房的参与者则在获得住房方面得到了帮助。

papers.title: Organizing for Collective Action: Olson Revisited
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Thomas R. Palfrey
papers.abstract: We study a standard collective action problem in which successful achievement of a group interest requires costly participation by some fraction of its members. How should we model the internal organization of these groups when there is asymmetric information about the preferences of their members? How effective should we expect it to be as we increase the group’s size n? We model it as an optimal honest and obedient communication mechanism and we show that for large n it can be implemented with a very simple mechanism that we call the Voluntary Based Organization. Two new results emerge from this analysis. Independently of the assumptions on the underlying technology, the limit probability of success in the best honest and obedient mechanism is the same as in an unorganized group, a result that is not generally true if obedience is omitted. An optimal organization, however, provides a key advantage: when the probability of success converges to zero, it does so at a much slower rate than in an unorganized group. Because of this, significant probabilities of success are achievable with simple honest and obedient organizations even in very large groups.
papers.zh_title: 为集体行动而组织：重访奥尔森
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究一个标准的集体行动问题，其中成功实现群体利益需要其部分成员付出高昂的参与成本。当关于成员偏好的信息不对称时，我们应该如何对这些群体的内部组织进行建模？随着群体规模n的增加，我们应预期其有效性如何？我们将其建模为一个最优的诚实且服从的沟通机制，并证明对于较大的n，它可以通过一个我们称之为自愿型组织的非常简单的机制来实现。从这个分析中得出两个新结果。无论对基础技术做何假设，在最优诚实且服从的机制下成功的极限概率与无组织群体中的相同，如果忽略服从性，这一结果通常不成立。然而，一个最优组织提供了一个关键优势：当成功概率趋近于零时，它是以比无组织群体慢得多的速度趋近的。因此，即使在非常大的群体中，通过简单的诚实且服从的组织也能实现显著的成功概率。

papers.title: Migration Restrictions Can Create Gender Inequality: The Story of China's Left-Behind Children
papers.authors: Xuwen Gao, Wenquan Liang, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak, Ran Song
papers.abstract: About 11% of the Chinese population are rural-urban migrants with a rural hukou that severely restricts their children's access to urban schools. As a result, 69 million children are left behind in rural areas. We use two regression-discontinuity designs - based on school enrollment age cutoffs and a 2014 policy change that more severely restricted migrants' access to schooling - to document that migrants become discontinuously more likely to leave middle-school-aged daughters (but not sons) behind in poor rural areas without either parent present exactly when schooling becomes expensive and restricted. The effect is larger when the daughter has a male sibling. Migrant parents send significantly less remittances back to daughters than sons. Although China's hukou mobility restrictions are not gender-specific in intent, they have larger adverse effects on girls. Rural residents adjacent to cities that experience shocks to labor demand after China's accession to the WTO are more likely to separate from children to take advantage of new opportunities in cities. Those workers earn much more and advance economically, but longitudinal data reveals that their children complete fewer years of schooling, remain poor, and have worse mental and physical health later in life.
papers.zh_title: 迁移限制可能造成性别不平等：中国留守儿童的故事
papers.zh_abstract: 大约11%的中国人口是城乡移民，他们持有严重限制其子女进入城市学校的农村户口。结果，6900万儿童被留在农村地区。我们利用两个断点回归设计——基于入学年龄截止点和2014年一项更严格限制移民子女入学机会的政策变化——来证明，当教育变得昂贵且受限时，移民父母恰好更有可能将中学年龄的女儿（而非儿子）留在贫困的农村地区，且父母双方均不在身边。当女儿有兄弟时，这种效应更大。移民父母寄给女儿的生活费显著少于儿子。尽管中国的户口迁移限制在意图上并非针对特定性别，但它们对女孩产生了更大的不利影响。在中国加入世贸组织后，邻近城市的农村居民在经历劳动力需求冲击时，更有可能与子女分离，以利用城市的新机会。这些工人收入更高，经济状况得到改善，但纵向数据显示，他们的子女完成的受教育年限更少，仍然贫困，并且在以后的生活中身心健康状况更差。

papers.title: Does the US have an Infrastructure Cost Problem? Evidence from the Interstate Highway System
papers.authors: Matthew Turner, Neil Mehrotra, Juan Pablo Uribe
papers.abstract: We pose the problem of managing the interstate as an optimal capital stock problem and define user cost as the charge per vehicle mile travelled that rationalizes observed investments in lane miles and pavement quality. We find that user cost is the sum of the opportunity cost of lane miles, pavement quality, and depreciation. Each depends on the price of lane miles and pavement quality. We estimate these prices and evaluate user cost. Despite large increases in the price of lane miles and pavement quality, user cost declines almost 50% from 1992-2008 due to lower interest rates and higher usage. Increased materials costs largely explain the increasing price of pavement quality, and we reject several common hypotheses for the increase in the price of lane miles.
papers.zh_title: 美国存在基础设施成本问题吗？来自州际公路系统的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将州际公路的管理问题视为一个最优资本存量问题，并将用户成本定义为每车辆英里行驶里程的收费，该收费使得观察到的车道里程和路面质量投资合理化。我们发现用户成本是车道里程机会成本、路面质量成本和折旧的总和。每一项都取决于车道里程和路面质量的价格。我们估计了这些价格并评估了用户成本。尽管车道里程和路面质量的价格大幅上涨，但由于利率降低和使用量增加，用户成本从1992年到2008年下降了近50%。材料成本的增加在很大程度上解释了路面质量价格的上涨，我们否定了关于车道里程价格上涨的几种常见假设。

papers.title: Long Covid in the United States
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Although yet to be clearly identified as a clinical condition, there is immense concern at the health and wellbeing consequences of long COVID. Using data collected from nearly half a million Americans in the period June 2022-December 2022 in the US Census Bureau’s Household Pulse Survey (HPS), we find 14 percent reported suffering long COVID at some point, half of whom reported it at the time of the survey. It peaks in midlife in the same way as negative affect. Ever having had long COVID is strongly associated with negative affect (anxiety, depression, worry and a lack of interest in things). The effect is larger among those who currently report long COVID, especially if they report severe symptoms. In contrast, those who report having had short COVID report higher wellbeing than those who report never having had COVID. Long COVID is also strongly associated with physical mobility problems, and with problems dressing and bathing. It is also associated with mental problems as indicated by recall and understanding difficulties. Again, the associations are strongest among those who currently report long COVID, while those who said they had had short COVID have fewer physical and mental problems than those who report never having had COVID. Vaccination is associated with lower negative affect, including among those who reported having had long COVID.
papers.zh_title: 美国的长期新冠
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管长期新冠作为一种临床病症尚未被明确识别，但其对健康和福祉的后果引起了极大关注。利用美国人口普查局家庭脉搏调查（HPS）在2022年6月至2022年12月期间从近50万美国人收集的数据，我们发现14%的人报告曾患有长期新冠，其中一半在调查时仍报告有此症状。它在中年时期达到顶峰，与负面情绪类似。曾患长期新冠与负面情绪（焦虑、抑郁、担忧和对事物缺乏兴趣）密切相关。这种效应在目前报告患有长期新冠的人群中更大，尤其是那些报告有严重症状的人。相比之下，报告曾患短期新冠的人比报告从未患过新冠的人幸福感更高。长期新冠还与身体活动能力问题以及穿衣和洗澡问题密切相关。它还与记忆和理解困难等心理问题相关。同样，这些关联在目前报告患有长期新冠的人群中最强，而报告曾患短期新冠的人比报告从未患过新冠的人身体和心理问题更少。疫苗接种与较低的负面情绪相关，包括在报告曾患长期新冠的人群中也是如此。

papers.title: The Welfare Effect of Gender-Inclusive Intellectual Property Creation: Evidence from Books
papers.authors: Joel Waldfogel
papers.abstract: Women have traditionally participated in intellectual property creation at depressed rates relative to men. Book authorship is now an exception. In 1970, women published a third as many books as men. By 2020, women produced the majority of books. Adding new products can have significant welfare benefits, particularly when product quality is unpredictable. Using data on sales of 8.9 million individual titles at Amazon, 2018-2021, along with information on 200 million ratings of 1.8 million books by 800,000 Goodreads users, I develop measures of both the supply of new books by male and female authors, as well as their usage by heterogeneous consumers. I show that growth in female-authored books has delivered a roughly equal proportionate increase in the female-authored shares of consumption, book awards, and other measures of success, indicating both that the additional female-authored books are useful to consumers and that product quality is unpredictable. I calibrate a simple structural model of demand with unpredictable product quality to quantify the welfare benefit from the additional female-authored books. While revenue gains to female authors come partly at the expense of male authors, gains to consumers from inclusive innovation are experienced by a wide range of consumers.
papers.zh_title: 性别包容性知识产权创造的福利效应：来自图书的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 传统上，女性在知识产权创造中的参与率低于男性。图书创作现在是一个例外。1970年，女性出版的图书数量是男性的三分之一。到2020年，女性创作了大部分图书。增加新产品可以带来显著的福利收益，尤其是在产品质量不可预测的情况下。利用2018-2021年亚马逊890万种图书的销售数据，以及80万Goodreads用户对180万种图书的2亿条评分信息，我开发了衡量男性和女性作者新书供应量以及不同消费者使用量的指标。我表明，女性作者图书的增长使得女性作者在消费份额、图书奖项和其他成功指标中的占比大致成比例地增加，这表明新增的女性作者图书对消费者有用，并且产品质量不可预测。我校准了一个具有不可预测产品质量的简单需求结构模型，以量化新增女性作者图书带来的福利收益。虽然女性作者的收入增长部分是以男性作者为代价的，但包容性创新带来的消费者收益则由广泛的消费者群体所享有。

papers.title: Obstetric Unit Closures and Racial/Ethnic Disparity in Health
papers.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Chun-Yu Ho, Xue Wu
papers.abstract: This paper examines whether loss of locally available hospital-based obstetric services affects racial/ethnic disparities in intrapartum care access and birth outcomes in rural areas of the US. To conduct causal inference, we combine difference-in-difference and propensity score matching methods to control for observable and time-invariant unobservable heterogeneity across counties. Using data from Vital Statistics birth certificate records from 2005-2018 from rural counties in the mainland US, our empirical analysis reaches several findings. Women in counties that lost obstetric services are more likely to receive intrapartum care outside their counties of residence and to deliver in an urban county compared to women in matched counties. Nonetheless, there are no consistent effects of obstetric unit closure on maternal and infant health in the full sample. Among Black mothers, however, obstetric unit closure is not associated with delivering in an urban county, and there is a more consistent pattern of negative effects of closure on infant health. Importantly, the adoption of scope-of-practice laws for certified nurse midwives, the adoption of telehealth payment parity laws and the ACA Medicaid expansions have implications for narrowing racial/ethnic disparities in health in response to obstetric unit closures.
papers.zh_title: 产科病房关闭与种族/民族健康差异
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了当地可及的医院产科服务丧失是否会影响美国农村地区在产时护理可及性和出生结果方面的种族/民族差异。为了进行因果推断，我们结合了双重差分法和倾向得分匹配法，以控制各县之间可观测和不可观测的时间不变异质性。利用2005-2018年美国本土农村县的生命统计出生证明记录数据，我们的实证分析得出了若干发现。与匹配县的妇女相比，失去产科服务的县的妇女更有可能在其居住县之外接受产时护理，并在城市县分娩。尽管如此，在全样本中，产科病房关闭对孕产妇和婴儿健康没有一致的影响。然而，在黑人母亲中，产科病房关闭与在城市县分娩无关，并且存在更一致的关闭对婴儿健康产生负面影响的模式。重要的是，针对认证护士助产士的执业范围法律、远程医疗支付平价法律的通过，以及ACA医疗补助扩展，对于缩小因产科病房关闭而产生的种族/民族健康差异具有意义。

papers.title: Distortions, Producer Dynamics, and Aggregate Productivity: A General Equilibrium Analysis
papers.authors: Stephen Ayerst, Loren Brandt, Diego Restuccia
papers.abstract: In less developed economies the allocation of factor inputs to more productive farms is often hindered. To analyze how distortions to factor reallocation affect farm dynamics and agricultural productivity, we develop a model of heterogeneous farms that make cropping choices and invest in productivity improvements. We calibrate the model using detailed farm-level panel data from Vietnam, exploiting regional differences in agricultural institutions and outcomes. We focus on south Vietnam and quantify the effect of higher measured distortions in the North on farm choices and agricultural productivity. We find that the higher distortions in north Vietnam reduce agricultural productivity by 41%, accounting for 61% of the observed 2.5-fold difference between regions. Moreover, two-thirds of the productivity loss is driven by farms’ choice of lower productivity crops and reductions in productivity-enhancing investment, which more than doubles the productivity loss from static misallocation.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：O11, O14, O4, Q12, Q15, Q16
papers.zh_title: 扭曲、生产者动态与全要素生产率：一般均衡分析
papers.zh_abstract: 在欠发达经济体中，生产要素向更高生产率农场的配置常常受到阻碍。为了分析要素重新配置的扭曲如何影响农场动态和农业生产力，我们构建了一个异质性农场模型，这些农场进行作物选择并投资于生产率改进。我们利用越南详细的农场层面面板数据对模型进行校准，并利用各地区农业制度和产出的差异。我们重点关注越南南方，并量化北方地区较高的测量扭曲对农场选择和农业生产力的影响。我们发现，越南北部较高的扭曲使农业生产力降低了41%，这解释了观察到的地区间2.5倍差异的61%。此外，三分之二的生产力损失源于农场选择较低生产率的作物以及减少提升生产率的投资，这使静态错配造成的生产力损失增加了一倍以上。

papers.title: Liquidity, Debt Denomination, and Currency Dominance
papers.authors: Antonio Coppola, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Chenzi Xu
papers.abstract: The international monetary system of the last four centuries has experienced the rise, persistence, and fall of specific currencies as the dominant unit of denomination in global debt contracts. We argue that a liquidity-based theory is necessary to explain this pattern. Firms issue debt that can be extinguished by trading their revenues for financial assets of the same denomination. When asset markets differ in their liquidity, as modeled via endogenous search frictions, firms optimally choose to denominate debt in the unit of the asset that is most liquid. Equilibria with a single dominant currency emerge from a positive feedback cycle whereby issuing in the more liquid denomination endogenously raises the benefits of that denomination. This feedback mechanism has historically been seeded by governments committed to the largest pool of liquid assets in the same denomination. Once a dominant currency emerges, the government hosting the currency endogenously invests more in the liquidity of its financial markets, leading to further entrenchment of that equilibrium. Our theory explains the historical experiences of the Dutch florin, the British pound sterling, the US dollar, and the transitions between them. We rationalize the current dollar-dominant international financial architecture and provide predictions about the potential rise of the Chinese renminbi.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E40, F33, G15, N20
papers.zh_title: 流动性、债务计价与货币主导地位
papers.zh_abstract: 过去四个世纪的国际货币体系经历了特定货币作为全球债务合约主导计价单位的兴起、持续和衰落。我们认为，基于流动性的理论对于解释这一模式是必要的。企业发行债务，这些债务可以通过将其收入交易为相同计价单位的金融资产来清偿。当资产市场在流动性方面存在差异时（通过内生搜索摩擦建模），企业会最优地选择以流动性最强的资产单位来计价债务。单一主导货币的均衡源于一个正反馈循环：以流动性更强的计价单位发行债务会内生地提高该计价单位的收益。从历史上看，这种反馈机制是由致力于提供最大规模同计价单位流动性资产的政府所催化的。一旦主导货币出现，该货币所在国政府会内生地增加对其金融市场流动性的投资，从而导致该均衡的进一步巩固。我们的理论解释了荷兰盾、英镑、美元的历史经验以及它们之间的转换。我们为当前美元主导的国际金融架构提供了合理解释，并对人民币的潜在崛起做出了预测。

papers.title: The Impacts of Same and Opposite Gender Alumni Speakers on Interest in Economics
papers.authors: Arpita Patnaik, Gwyn C. Pauley, Joanna Venator, Matthew J. Wiswall
papers.abstract: What is the impact of male and female alumni speaker interventions in introductory microeconomics courses on student interest in economics? Using student-level transcript data, we estimate the effect of speakers on future course-taking in models which use untreated lectures as control groups, including professor and semester fixed effects and student-level covariates. Alumni speakers increase intermediate economics course take-up by 2.1 percentage points (11%). Students are more responsive to same-gender speakers, with male speakers increasing men’s course take-up by 36% and female speakers increasing women’s course take-up by 40%, implying that the effect of alumni speakers is strongly gendered.
papers.zh_title: 同性与异性校友演讲者对经济学兴趣的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在经济学导论课程中，男性和女性校友演讲者干预对学生经济学兴趣有何影响？利用学生层面的成绩单数据，我们以未接受演讲者干预的课堂作为对照组，在包含教授和学期固定效应以及学生层面协变量的模型中，估计了演讲者对后续课程选择的影响。校友演讲者使中级经济学课程的选修率提高了2.1个百分点（11%）。学生对同性别的演讲者反应更强烈：男性演讲者使男性的课程选修率提高了36%，而女性演讲者使女性的课程选修率提高了40%，这表明校友演讲者的影响具有强烈的性别差异。

papers.title: Ride-Sharing Markets Re-Equilibrate
papers.authors: Jonathan V. Hall, John J. Horton, Daniel T. Knoepfle
papers.abstract: Following Uber-initiated fare increases, drivers make more money per trip and, initially, more per hour-worked. Drivers begin to work more hours. However, this increase in hours-worked—combined with a reduction in demand from a higher fare—has a business stealing effect, with drivers spending a smaller fraction of working hours transporting passengers. This market adjustment brings the hourly earnings rate back to about the rate that prevailed before the fare increase, in roughly two months. Passengers are partially compensated for higher prices by shorter wait times, but during the period covered by our data, fare increases likely reduced passenger welfare.
papers.zh_title: 网约车市场重新均衡
papers.zh_abstract: 在优步（Uber）引发的价格上涨之后，司机每趟行程赚得更多，并且最初每小时工作收入也更高。司机开始工作更长时间。然而，工作时间的增加——加上更高价格导致的需求减少——产生了业务窃取效应，司机用于运送乘客的工作时间比例下降。这种市场调整使小时收入率在大约两个月内回落到价格上涨前的水平。乘客通过更短的等待时间部分补偿了更高的价格，但在我们数据覆盖的时期内，价格上涨可能降低了乘客福利。

papers.title: The Unexpected Compression: Competition at Work in the Low Wage Labor Market
papers.authors: David Autor, Arindrajit Dube, Annie McGrew
papers.abstract: Labor market tightness following the height of the Covid-19 pandemic led to an unexpected compression in the US wage distribution that reflects, in part, an increase in labor market competition. Rapid relative wage growth at the bottom of the distribution reduced the college wage premium and counteracted around one-third of the four-decade increase in aggregate 90/10 log wage inequality. Wage compression was accompanied by rapid nominal wage growth and rising job-to-job separations—especially among young non-college (high school or less) workers. Comparing across states, post-pandemic labor market tightness became strongly predictive of real wage growth among low-wage workers (wage-Phillips curve), and aggregate wage compression. Simultaneously, the wage-separation elasticity—a key measure of labor market competition—rose among young non-college workers, with wage gains concentrated among workers who changed employers. Seen through the lens of a canonical job ladder model, the pandemic reduced employer market power by increasing the elasticity of labor supply to firms in the low-wage labor market. This spurred rapid relative wage growth among young non-college workers, who disproportionately moved from lower-paying to higher-paying and potentially more productive jobs.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E31, J2, J3, J42, J64
papers.zh_title: 意外的压缩：低工资劳动力市场中的竞争效应
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情高峰后的劳动力市场紧张导致美国工资分布出现意外的压缩，这在一定程度上反映了劳动力市场竞争的加剧。工资分布底部的快速相对工资增长降低了大学工资溢价，并抵消了四十年来总体90/10对数工资不平等增长的大约三分之一。工资压缩伴随着名义工资的快速增长和岗位间离职率的上升——尤其是在年轻的非大学（高中或以下学历）工人中。跨州比较显示，疫情后的劳动力市场紧张程度对低工资工人的实际工资增长（工资-菲利普斯曲线）和总体工资压缩具有很强的预测能力。同时，工资-离职弹性——一个衡量劳动力市场竞争的关键指标——在年轻的非大学工人中上升，工资增长集中在更换雇主的工人身上。通过经典工作阶梯模型的视角来看，疫情通过增加低工资劳动力市场中企业面临的劳动力供给弹性，降低了雇主的市场势力。这刺激了年轻非大学工人相对工资的快速增长，他们不成比例地从低薪工作流向高薪且可能生产率更高的工作。

papers.title: Robots and Workers: Evidence from the Netherlands
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Hans R. A. Koster, Ceren Ozgen
papers.abstract: We estimate the effects of robot adoption on firm-level and worker-level outcomes in the Netherlands using a large employer-employee panel dataset spanning 2009-2020. Our firm-level results confirm previous findings, with positive effects on value added and hours worked for robot-adopting firms and negative outcomes on competitors in the same industry. Our worker-level results show that directly-affected workers (e.g., blue-collar workers performing routine or replaceable tasks) face lower earnings and employment rates, while other workers indirectly gain from robot adoption. We also find that the negative effects from competitors' robot adoption load on directly-affected workers, while other workers benefit from this industry-level robot adoption. Overall, our results highlight the uneven effects of automation on the workforce.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：D63, E22, E23, E24, J24, O33
papers.zh_title: 机器人与工人：来自荷兰的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用涵盖2009-2020年的大型雇主-雇员面板数据集，估算了荷兰机器人采用对企业层面和工人层面结果的影响。我们的企业层面结果证实了先前的发现，即机器人采用对采用企业增加值和工作时间有积极影响，而对同行业的竞争对手则产生负面结果。我们的工人层面结果显示，直接受影响的工人（例如，从事常规或可替代任务的蓝领工人）面临更低的收入和就业率，而其他工人则间接从机器人采用中获益。我们还发现，来自竞争对手机器人采用的负面影响主要落在直接受影响的工人身上，而其他工人则从这种行业层面的机器人采用中受益。总体而言，我们的结果突显了自动化对劳动力影响的不均衡性。

papers.title: Input Subsidies and the Destruction of Natural Capital: Chinese Distant Water Fishing
papers.authors: Gabriel Englander, Jihua Zhang, Juan Carlos Villaseñor-Derbez, Qutu Jiang, Mingzhao Hu, Olivier Deschenes, Christopher Costello
papers.abstract: Input subsidies in natural resource sectors are widely believed to cause depletion of the natural capital on which those sectors rely. But identification and data challenges have stymied attempts to empirically estimate the causal effect of subsidies on resource extraction. China’s fishing fleet is the world’s largest, and in 2016 the government changed its fuel subsidy policy for distant water vessels to one that increases with predetermined vessel characteristics. The policy features 25 thresholds at which subsidies discontinuously increase. Using a regression discontinuity design, we estimate that a 1% increase in fuel subsidy increases hours of fishing by 2.2%. Reducing Chinese distant water fuel subsidies by 50% could eliminate biological overfishing in several ocean regions.
papers.zh_title: 投入补贴与自然资本的破坏：中国远洋渔业
papers.zh_abstract: 自然资源部门的投入补贴被广泛认为会导致该部门所依赖的自然资本的枯竭。然而，识别和数据方面的挑战阻碍了实证估计补贴对资源开采因果效应的尝试。中国的捕鱼船队是世界上规模最大的，2016年，政府将其对远洋渔船的燃油补贴政策改为根据预定船舶特征递增的补贴方式。该政策设定了25个阈值，补贴在这些阈值处不连续地增加。利用断点回归设计，我们估计燃油补贴每增加1%，捕鱼时长增加2.2%。将中国远洋燃油补贴减少50%，可以消除多个海洋区域的生物性过度捕捞。

papers.title: Remote Work across Jobs, Companies, and Space
papers.authors: Stephen Hansen, Peter John Lambert, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Raffaella Sadun, Bledi Taska
papers.abstract: The pandemic catalyzed an enduring shift to remote work. To measure this shift, we examine more than 500 million job vacancy postings across five English-speaking countries. Our measurements rely on a large language model (LLM) that we fine-tune with 30,000 human classifications. The model achieves 99% classification accuracy, substantially outperforming dictionary-based approaches and—despite being a fraction of the size—performs on par with frontier AI models. From 2019 to 2025, the share of postings indicating that new employees can work remotely at least one day per week rose more than three-fold in the U.S. and by a factor of five or more in Australia, Canada, New Zealand, and the U.K. These developments are highly non-uniform across and within cities, industries, occupations, and companies. Even when zooming in on employers in the same industry competing for talent in the same occupations, we find large differences in the share of job postings that explicitly offer remote work.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：C55, E24, M54, O33, R3
papers.zh_title: 跨工作、公司和空间的远程工作
papers.zh_abstract: 疫情催化了向远程工作的持久转变。为了衡量这种转变，我们考察了五个英语国家超过5亿个职位空缺公告。我们的测量依赖于一个大型语言模型，我们使用3万个人工分类对其进行了微调。该模型达到了99%的分类准确率，显著优于基于词典的方法，并且尽管规模较小，但其性能与前沿AI模型相当。从2019年到2025年，表明新员工每周至少可以远程工作一天的职位公告份额，在美国增长了三倍多，在澳大利亚、加拿大、新西兰和英国增长了五倍或更多。这些发展在跨城市、跨行业、跨职业和跨公司之间以及内部高度不均匀。即使聚焦于在同一行业争夺同一职业人才的雇主，我们也发现明确提供远程工作的职位公告份额存在巨大差异。

papers.title: Revisiting Productivity Dynamics in Europe: A New Measure of Utilization-Adjusted TFP Growth
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Javier Quintana, Tom G. Schmitz, Antonella Trigari
papers.abstract: We compute new estimates of Total Factor Productivity (TFP) growth in the five largest European economies. Our estimates account for positive profits and use firm surveys to proxy for unobserved changes in factor utilization. These novelties have a major impact: our estimated TFP growth series are substantially less volatile and less cyclical than the ones obtained with standard methods. Based on our approach, we provide annual industry-level and aggregate TFP series, as well as the first estimates of profit and utilization-adjusted quarterly TFP growth in Europe.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM, LS, ME, PR, TWP；JEL：E01
papers.zh_title: 重新审视欧洲的生产率动态：一种新的利用率调整后全要素生产率增长度量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们计算了欧洲五大经济体的全要素生产率增长的新估计值。我们的估计考虑了正利润，并使用企业调查来代理要素利用率的未观测变化。这些创新产生了重大影响：我们估计的全要素生产率增长序列比使用标准方法得到的序列波动性更小、周期性更弱。基于我们的方法，我们提供了年度行业层面和总体的全要素生产率序列，以及欧洲首个经利润和利用率调整后的季度全要素生产率增长估计值。

papers.title: Partial Identification of Treatment-Effect Distributions with Count-Valued Outcomes
papers.authors: John Mullahy
papers.abstract: With count-valued outcomes y in {0,1,...,M} identification and estimation of average treatment effects raise no special considerations beyond those involved in the continuous-outcome case. If partial identification of the distribution of treatment effects is of interest, however, count-valued outcomes present some subtle yet important considerations beyond those involved in continuous-outcome contexts. This paper derives appropriate bounds on the distribution of treatment effects for count-valued outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 计数结果下处理效应分布的部分识别
papers.zh_abstract: 对于计数结果y∈{0,1,...,M}，平均处理效应的识别和估计除了连续结果情形下的考虑外，没有特殊之处。然而，如果关注的是处理效应分布的部分识别，计数结果则带来了一些微妙但重要的考虑，超出了连续结果背景下的问题。本文推导了计数结果下处理效应分布的适当边界。

papers.title: The Global Dollar Cycle
papers.authors: Maurice Obstfeld, Haonan Zhou
papers.abstract: The U.S. dollar’s nominal effective exchange rate closely tracks global financial conditions, which themselves show a cyclical pattern. Over that cycle, world asset prices, leverage, and capital flows move in concert with global growth, especially influencing the fortunes of emerging and developing economies (EMDEs). This paper documents that dollar appreciation shocks predict economic downturns in EMDEs and highlights policies countries could implement to dampen the effects of dollar fluctuations. Dollar appreciation shocks themselves are highly correlated not just with tighter U.S. monetary policies, but also with measures of U.S. domestic and international dollar funding stress that themselves reflect global investors’ risk appetite. After the initial market panic and upward dollar spike at the start of the COVID-19 pandemic, the dollar fell as global financial conditions eased; but the higher inflation that followed has induced central banks everywhere to tighten monetary policies more recently. The dollar has strengthened considerably since mid-2021 and a contractionary phase of the global financial cycle is now under way. Owing to increases in public- and business-sector debts during the pandemic, a strong dollar, higher interest rates, and slower economic growth will be challenging for EMDEs.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：E58, F31, F41, F44, O11
papers.zh_title: 全球美元周期
papers.zh_abstract: 美元的名义有效汇率密切追踪全球金融状况，而全球金融状况本身呈现出周期性模式。在该周期中，世界资产价格、杠杆和资本流动与全球增长同步变动，尤其影响新兴和发展中经济体的命运。本文记录了美元升值冲击预示着新兴和发展中经济体的经济衰退，并强调了各国可以实施以减弱美元波动影响的政策。美元升值冲击本身不仅与美国紧缩的货币政策高度相关，还与衡量美国国内和国际美元融资压力的指标高度相关，而这些指标本身反映了全球投资者的风险偏好。在COVID-19大流行初期市场恐慌和美元飙升之后，随着全球金融状况的缓解，美元下跌；但随后出现的更高通胀已导致各国央行最近收紧货币政策。自2021年中期以来，美元大幅走强，全球金融周期的收缩阶段正在进行中。由于疫情期间公共和商业部门债务的增加，强势美元、更高的利率和更慢的经济增长将对新兴和发展中经济体构成挑战。

papers.title: Asymmetries in Federal Reserve Objectives
papers.authors: Narayana R. Kocherlakota
papers.abstract: This paper uses evidence from the Federal Open Market Committee’s Summary of Economic Projections to show that US monetary policymakers have objectives over unemployment and inflation outcomes that are not well-approximated through a conventional quadratic loss function. Rather, policymakers derive material costs (benefits) from overshooting (undershooting) their long-run inflation and unemployment goals. The trade-off between the resultant downward tilts in unemployment and inflation played a key role in shaping the evolution of monetary policy choices since the Great Recession.
papers.zh_title: 美联储目标的不对称性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用联邦公开市场委员会经济预测摘要的证据表明，美国货币政策制定者对失业和通胀结果的目标并不能通过传统的二次损失函数很好地近似。相反，政策制定者从超出（低于）其长期通胀和失业目标中获得了实质性成本（收益）。由此产生的失业和通胀向下倾斜之间的权衡，在塑造自大衰退以来货币政策选择的演变中发挥了关键作用。

papers.title: Competitive Model Selection in Algorithmic Targeting
papers.authors: Ganesh Iyer, T. Tony Ke
papers.abstract: This paper studies how market competition influences the algorithmic design choices of firms in the context of targeting. Firms face the general trade-off between bias and variance when choosing the design of a supervised learning algorithm in terms of model complexity or the number of predictors to accommodate. Each firm then appoints a data analyst that uses the chosen algorithm to estimate demand for multiple consumer segments, based on which, it devises a targeting policy to maximize estimated profit. We show that competition may induce firms to strategically choose simpler algorithms which involve more bias. This implies that more complex/flexible algorithms tend to have higher value for firms with greater monopoly power.
papers.zh_title: 算法定向中的竞争性模型选择
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在定向背景下，市场竞争如何影响企业的算法设计选择。企业在选择监督学习算法的设计时，面临偏差与方差之间的普遍权衡，这体现在模型复杂度或要容纳的预测变量数量上。然后，每家企业任命一名数据分析师，该分析师使用所选算法来估计多个消费者群体的需求，并据此制定定向策略以最大化估计利润。我们表明，竞争可能诱使企业战略性地选择更简单、包含更多偏差的算法。这意味着更复杂/灵活的算法往往对拥有更大垄断势力的企业具有更高价值。

papers.title: Multidimensional Human Capital and the Wage Structure
papers.authors: David J. Deming
papers.abstract: This paper reviews and synthesizes the literature on the macroeconomic implications of human capital theory. I begin with a review of the canonical model of education and the wage structure pioneered by Tinbergen (1975) and developed more fully by Goldin and Katz (2007). I also review innovations such as the task framework developed by Acemoglu and Autor (2011). The canonical model does a surprisingly good job of predicting changes in the wage structure in the U.S. and other developed countries over the last half-century. Relative to the canonical model, the task framework adopts a more flexible view of technology and does a better job of fitting non-monotonic changes in the wage structure. Yet the task framework does not fully explain why educated workers have done so well since 1980, nor does it explain other recent facts such as flattening returns to cognitive skills and growing returns to non-cognitive, “higher-order” skills such as teamwork. To understand these recent trends, we must move beyond a single index view of human capital, toward richer, multi-dimensional frameworks. I conclude with a discussion of the nascent literature on the implications of multi-dimensional human capital for the wage structure, which raises more questions than it answers.
papers.zh_title: 多维人力资本与工资结构
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾并综合了关于人力资本理论宏观经济含义的文献。我首先回顾了由Tinbergen（1975）开创、并由Goldin和Katz（2007）更充分发展的教育与工资结构的经典模型。我还回顾了诸如由Acemoglu和Autor（2011）发展的任务框架等创新。经典模型在预测过去半个世纪美国及其他发达国家工资结构变化方面表现得出奇地好。相对于经典模型，任务框架采用了更灵活的技术观点，并且在拟合工资结构的非单调变化方面做得更好。然而，任务框架并未完全解释为什么自1980年以来受过教育的工人表现如此出色，也没有解释其他近期事实，例如认知技能回报的趋平以及非认知、“高阶”技能（如团队合作）回报的增长。为了理解这些近期趋势，我们必须超越人力资本的单一指数观点，转向更丰富的多维框架。最后，我讨论了关于多维人力资本对工资结构影响的新兴文献，该文献提出的问题多于其回答的问题。

papers.title: Human Capital and Climate Change
papers.authors: Noam Angrist, Kevin Winseck, Harry A. Patrinos, Joshua S. Graff Zivin
papers.abstract: Addressing climate change requires individual behavior change and voter support for pro-climate policies, yet surprisingly little is known about how to achieve these outcomes. In this paper, we estimate causal effects of additional education on pro-climate outcomes using new compulsory schooling law data across 20 European countries. We analyze effects on pro-climate beliefs and behaviors, as well as novel data on policy preferences and voting for green parties. Results show that a year of education substantially increases pro-climate beliefs, behaviors, and policy preferences.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EEE, PE；JEL：D72, H41, I20, I28, P16, Q01, Q5
papers.zh_title: 人力资本与气候变化
papers.zh_abstract: 应对气候变化需要个人行为改变以及选民对亲气候政策的支持，然而，关于如何实现这些结果，我们知之甚少。本文利用20个欧洲国家新的义务教育法数据，估计了额外教育对亲气候结果的因果效应。我们分析了教育对亲气候信念和行为的影响，以及对政策偏好和投票支持绿党等新颖数据的影响。结果表明，一年的教育显著增加了亲气候信念、行为和政策偏好。

papers.title: When we change the clock, does the clock change us?
papers.authors: Patrick Baylis, Severin Borenstein, Edward A. Rubin
papers.abstract: The practice of standardizing the designation of time is a central device for coordinating activities and economic behaviors across individuals. However, there is nearly always conflict between an individual's goals of coordinating activities with others and engaging in those activities at their own preferred time. When time is standardized across large geographic areas, that tension is enhanced, because norms about the "clock times" of activities conflict with adapting to local environmental conditions created by natural or "solar" time. This tension is at the heart of current state and national debates about adopting daylight saving time or switching time zones. We study this conflict by examining how geographic and temporal variation in solar time within time zones affects the timing of a range of common behaviors in the United States. Specifically, we estimate the degree to which people shift their online behavior (through Twitter), their commute (using data from the Census), and their visits to businesses and other establishments (using foot traffic data). We find that, on average, a one-hour shift in the differential between solar time and clock time -- approximately the width of a time zone -- leads to shifting the clock time of behavior by between 9 and 26 minutes. This result shows that while adapting to local environmental factors significantly offsets the differential between solar time and clock time, the behavioral nudge and coordination value of clock time has the larger influence on activity. We also study how the trade-off differs across different activities and population demographics.
papers.zh_title: 当我们改变时钟时，时钟会改变我们吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 标准化时间指定的做法是协调个体间活动和经济行为的核心机制。然而，个体与他人协调活动的目标与在自身偏好时间进行这些活动之间几乎总是存在冲突。当时间在广大地理区域内被标准化时，这种紧张关系会加剧，因为关于活动“时钟时间”的规范与适应由自然时间或“太阳时”创造的当地环境条件相冲突。这种紧张关系是当前关于采用夏令时或变更时区的州级和国家级辩论的核心。我们通过研究时区内太阳时的地理和时间变化如何影响美国一系列常见行为的时间安排来考察这种冲突。具体来说，我们估计了人们在多大程度上改变其在线行为（通过推特）、通勤（使用人口普查数据）以及访问商业和其他场所（使用人流量数据）的时间。我们发现，平均而言，太阳时与时钟时间之间的差异每偏移一小时——大约相当于一个时区的宽度——会导致行为时钟时间偏移9到26分钟。这一结果表明，虽然适应当地环境因素显著抵消了太阳时与时钟时间之间的差异，但时钟时间的行为助推和协调价值对活动具有更大的影响。我们还研究了这种权衡在不同活动和人口统计特征之间的差异。

papers.title: Restrict the Middleman? Quantitative Models of PBM Regulations and Their Consequences
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: This paper provides the first quantitative economic models of pharmacy benefit management regulation. The price-theoretic models allow for various market frictions and imperfections including market power, coordination costs, tax distortions, and incomplete innovation incentives. A rigorous economic interpretation is provided for what are sometimes called “rebate walls” or “rebate traps.” Applicable types of regulation include rebate rules, such as the HHS rebate rule and the Insulin Act; disclosure requirements such as the PBM Transparency Act of 2023; and pharmacy contract restrictions such as the CMS Medicare rule to take effect in 2024. Utilization of brands and generics, plan spending, cost sharing, spillovers to nonpharmacy medical spending, government budgets, and the pace of drug innovation are among the outcomes tracked by the open-source model.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：D43, D71, I11, I13, L14, L51
papers.zh_title: 限制中间商？药品福利管理监管的量化模型及其后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了首个药品福利管理监管的量化经济模型。这些价格理论模型考虑了多种市场摩擦和不完善之处，包括市场势力、协调成本、税收扭曲和不完全的创新激励。本文对有时被称为“回扣墙”或“回扣陷阱”的现象提供了严谨的经济学解释。适用的监管类型包括回扣规则（如HHS回扣规则和《胰岛素法案》）、披露要求（如2023年《药品福利管理透明度法案》）以及药房合同限制（如CMS将于2024年生效的医疗保险规则）。开源模型追踪的结果包括品牌药和仿制药的使用、计划支出、成本分摊、对非药房医疗支出的溢出效应、政府预算以及药物创新速度。

papers.title: The Independent Contractor Workforce: New Evidence On Its Size and Composition and Ways to Improve Its Measurement in Household Surveys
papers.authors: Katharine G. Abraham, Brad Hershbein, Susan N. Houseman, Beth Truesdale
papers.abstract: Good data on the size and composition of the independent contractor workforce are elusive, with household survey and administrative tax data often disagreeing on levels and trends. We carried out a series of focus groups to learn how self-employed independent contractors speak about their work. Based on these findings, we designed and fielded a large-scale telephone survey to elicit more accurate and complete information on independent contractors, including those who may be coded incorrectly as employees in conventional household survey data and those who are independent contractors in a secondary work activity. We find that, upon probing, roughly one in 10 workers who initially reports working for an employer on one or more jobs (and thus is coded as an employee) is in fact an independent contractor on at least one of those jobs. Incorporating these miscoded workers into estimates of work arrangement on the main job nearly doubles the share who are independent contractors, to about 15 percent of all workers. Young workers, less-educated workers, workers of color, multiple-job holders, and those with low hours are more likely to be miscoded. Taking these workers into account substantively changes the demographic profile of the independent contractor workforce. Our research indicates that probing in household surveys to clarify a worker’s employment arrangement and identify all low-hours work is critical for accurately measuring independent contractor work.
papers.zh_title: 独立承包商劳动力：关于其规模和构成的新证据以及改进家庭调查测量的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 关于独立承包商劳动力规模和构成的可靠数据难以获取，家庭调查和行政税务数据在水平和趋势上常常不一致。我们进行了一系列焦点小组访谈，以了解自雇独立承包商如何描述他们的工作。基于这些发现，我们设计并实施了一项大规模电话调查，以获取关于独立承包商更准确和完整的信息，包括那些在传统家庭调查数据中可能被错误编码为雇员的人，以及那些在次要工作活动中是独立承包商的人。我们发现，经过深入询问，最初报告为受雇于一个或多个雇主（因此被编码为雇员）的工人中，约有十分之一实际上至少在其中一份工作中是独立承包商。将这些被错误编码的工人纳入主要工作安排的估计中，会使独立承包商的比例几乎翻倍，达到所有工人的约15%。年轻工人、受教育程度较低的工人、有色人种工人、多份工作者以及工作时间短的工人更有可能被错误编码。考虑这些工人会实质性地改变独立承包商劳动力的人口统计特征。我们的研究表明，在家庭调查中进行深入询问以澄清工人的就业安排并识别所有低工时工作，对于准确测量独立承包商工作至关重要。

papers.title: The Prices in the Crises: What We Are Learning from Twenty Years of Health Insurance in Low- and Middle-Income Countries
papers.authors: Jishnu Das, Quy-Toan Do
papers.abstract: Governments in many low- and middle-income countries are developing health insurance products as a complement to tax-funded, subsidized provision of health care through publicly operated facilities. This paper discusses two rationales for this transition. First, health insurance would boost fiscal revenues for health care, as post-treatment out-of-pocket payments to providers would be replaced by pre-treatment insurance premia to health ministries. Second, increased patient choice and carefully designed physician reimbursements would increase quality in the health care sector. This essay shows that, at best, these objectives have only been partially met. Despite evidence that health insurance has provided financial protection, consumers are not willing to pay for unsubsidized premia. Health outcomes have not improved despite an increase in utilization. We argue that this is not because there was no room to improve the quality of care but because behavioral responses among health care providers have systematically undermined the objectives of these insurance schemes.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I11, I12, I13, I15, O12
papers.zh_title: 危机中的价格：我们从低收入和中等收入国家二十年健康保险中学到了什么
papers.zh_abstract: 许多低收入和中等收入国家的政府正在开发健康保险产品，作为通过公共运营机构提供税收资助、补贴医疗服务的补充。本文讨论了这一转变的两个理由。首先，健康保险将增加医疗保健的财政收入，因为治疗后的自付费用将被治疗前向卫生部门支付的保险费所取代。其次，增加患者选择和精心设计的医生报销方式将提高医疗保健部门的质量。本文表明，这些目标充其量只是部分实现。尽管有证据表明健康保险提供了财务保护，但消费者不愿意为未补贴的保费付费。尽管利用率有所增加，但健康结果并未改善。我们认为，这并不是因为没有改善护理质量的空间，而是因为医疗服务提供者的行为反应系统地破坏了这些保险计划的目标。

papers.title: Taking Teacher Evaluation to Scale: The Effect of State Reforms on Achievement and Attainment
papers.authors: Joshua Bleiberg, Eric Brunner, Erica Harbatkin, Matthew A. Kraft, Matthew G. Springer
papers.abstract: Federal incentives and requirements under the Obama administration spurred states to adopt major reforms to their teacher evaluation systems. We examine the effects of these reforms on student achievement and attainment at a national scale by exploiting the staggered timing of implementation across states. We find precisely estimated null effects, on average, that rule out impacts as small as 0.015 standard deviation for achievement and 1 percentage point for high school graduation and college enrollment. We also find little evidence that the effect of teacher evaluation reforms varied by system design rigor, specific design features or student and district characteristics. We highlight five factors that may have undercut the efficacy of teacher evaluation reforms at scale: political opposition, the decentralized structure of U.S. public education, capacity constraints, limited generalizability, and the lack of increased teacher compensation to offset the non-pecuniary costs of lower job satisfaction and security.
papers.zh_title: 将教师评价推广至全国：州级改革对学业成就和升学率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 奥巴马政府时期的联邦激励和要求促使各州对其教师评价体系进行重大改革。我们利用各州实施改革的时间差异，在全国范围内考察了这些改革对学生学业成就和升学率的影响。我们发现，平均而言，精确估计的零效应排除了对学业成就影响小至0.015个标准差以及对高中毕业率和大学入学率影响小至1个百分点的情况。我们也几乎没有发现证据表明教师评价改革的效果因系统设计严谨性、具体设计特征或学生及地区特征而异。我们强调了五个可能削弱教师评价改革大规模有效性的因素：政治反对、美国公共教育的分散结构、能力限制、有限的可推广性，以及缺乏增加教师薪酬以抵消因工作满意度和安全感降低而产生的非金钱成本。

papers.title: The US, Economic News, and the Global Financial Cycle
papers.authors: Christoph E. Boehm, T. Niklas Kroner
papers.abstract: We provide evidence for a causal link between the US economy and the global financial cycle. Using intraday data, we show that US macroeconomic news releases have large and significant effects on global risky asset prices. Stock price indexes of 27 countries, the VIX, and commodity prices all jump instantaneously upon news releases. The responses of stock indexes co-move across countries and are large—often comparable in size to the response of the S&P 500. Further, US macroeconomic news explains on average 23 percent of the quarterly variation in foreign stock markets. The joint behavior of stock prices, bond yields, and risk premia suggests that systematic US monetary policy reactions to news do not drive the estimated effects. Instead, the evidence points to a direct effect on investors’ risk-taking capacity. Our findings show that a byproduct of the United States' central position in the global financial system is that news about its business cycle has large effects on global financial conditions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E52, F40, G12, G14, G15
papers.zh_title: 美国、经济新闻与全球金融周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了美国经济与全球金融周期之间存在因果关系的证据。利用日内数据，我们表明美国宏观经济新闻发布对全球风险资产价格具有显著且重大的影响。27个国家的股票价格指数、VIX指数以及大宗商品价格在新闻发布时均会瞬间跳升。股票指数的反应在各国间共同波动，且幅度巨大——通常与标普500指数的反应规模相当。此外，美国宏观经济新闻平均解释了外国股票市场季度变动的23%。股票价格、债券收益率和风险溢价的联合行为表明，系统性的美国货币政策对新闻的反应并非驱动这些估计效应的原因。相反，证据指向了对投资者风险承担能力的直接影响。我们的发现表明，美国在全球金融体系中的核心地位的一个副产品是，关于其商业周期的新闻对全球金融状况具有重大影响。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Effects of ‘Free’ Secondary Schooling in the Developing World
papers.authors: Junichi Fujimoto, David Lagakos, Mitchell VanVuren
papers.abstract: This paper studies the macroeconomic effects of publicly funded (‘free’) secondary schooling in the developing world. Our analysis is based on an over-lapping generations model of human capital accumulation that we estimate to match experimental evidence on the effects of scholarships for poor but talented students in Ghana. The model predicts that nationwide free secondary schooling increases average education levels but reduces GDP per capita in the long run. The human capital gains from free schooling in the model are offset by lost income during schooling years, negative selection of new students, and reductions in fertility by high-ability households.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家“免费”中学教育的宏观经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了发展中国家公共资助（“免费”）中学教育的宏观经济效应。我们的分析基于一个我们估计的人力资本积累重叠世代模型，该模型与加纳针对贫困但有才华学生的奖学金实验证据相匹配。该模型预测，全国性的免费中学教育会提高平均教育水平，但长期内会降低人均GDP。模型中免费教育带来的人力资本收益被受教育年份的收入损失、新生的负向选择以及高能力家庭生育率的下降所抵消。

papers.title: The Race Between Education, Technology, and the Minimum Wage
papers.authors: Jonathan Vogel
papers.abstract: What is the impact of the minimum wage on the college wage premium? I develop a theory that implies that the effect should be small on impact—raising only the wages of workers bound by the minimum wage—and grow over time. Guided by my theory, I present evidence that these dynamic effects are present and powerful. Estimated at the national and state levels, I show that minimum wages—together with supply and demand—play a central role in shaping the evolution of the U.S. college premium and that the elasticity of the college premium to the minimum wage is small on impact and grows dramatically over time. To verify my theory’s mechanisms, I additionally document the dynamic impact of the minimum wage over the full wage distribution: on impact, wages rise only for the lowest centiles (consistent with the literature) but over time this effect spills over up the wage distribution (consistent with my theory and my empirical results on the college premium). On the basis of these results, I conclude that the minimum wage plays a central role in shaping the U.S. college premium and its variation across states, in spite of relatively small effects on impact.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：E24, J0, J2, J3, J42
papers.zh_title: 教育、技术与最低工资之间的竞赛
papers.zh_abstract: 最低工资对大学教育溢价的影响是什么？我发展了一个理论，该理论暗示这种影响在短期内应该很小——仅提高受最低工资约束的工人的工资——并随时间推移而增长。在我的理论指导下，我提供的证据表明这些动态效应存在且强大。在国家和州层面的估计中，我表明最低工资——连同供给和需求——在塑造美国大学教育溢价的演变中发挥着核心作用，并且大学教育溢价对最低工资的弹性在短期内很小，但随时间推移显著增长。为了验证我的理论机制，我还记录了最低工资在整个工资分布上的动态影响：短期内，工资仅对最低百分位数上升（与文献一致），但随着时间的推移，这种效应会向上蔓延至整个工资分布（与我的理论以及关于大学教育溢价的实证结果一致）。基于这些结果，我得出结论，尽管最低工资在短期内影响相对较小，但它在塑造美国大学教育溢价及其在各州之间的差异方面发挥着核心作用。

papers.title: Identification in a Binary Choice Panel Data Model with a Predetermined Covariate
papers.authors: Stéphane Bonhomme, Kevin Dano, Bryan S. Graham
papers.abstract: We study identification in a binary choice panel data model with a single predetermined binary covariate (i.e., a covariate sequentially exogenous conditional on lagged outcomes and covariates). The choice model is indexed by a scalar parameter θ, whereas the distribution of unit-specific heterogeneity, as well as the feedback process that maps lagged outcomes into future covariate realizations, are left unrestricted. We provide a simple condition under which θ is never point-identified, no matter the number of time periods available. This condition is satisfied in most models, including the logit one. We also characterize the identified set of θ and show how to compute it using linear programming techniques. While θ is not generally point-identified, its identified set is informative in the examples we analyze numerically, suggesting that meaningful learning about θ may be possible even in short panels with feedback. As a complement, we report calculations of identified sets for an average partial effect, and find informative sets in this case as well.
papers.zh_title: 具有预定协变量的二元选择面板数据模型中的识别
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有单个预定二元协变量（即，以滞后结果和协变量为条件的序列外生协变量）的二元选择面板数据模型中的识别问题。选择模型由一个标量参数θ索引，而单位特定异质性的分布以及将滞后结果映射到未来协变量实现的反馈过程则不加限制。我们提供了一个简单条件，在该条件下，无论可用的时间周期数有多少，θ都永远无法被点识别。该条件在大多数模型（包括Logit模型）中都得到满足。我们还刻画了θ的识别集，并展示了如何使用线性规划技术计算它。虽然θ通常无法被点识别，但在我们数值分析的例子中，其识别集提供了信息，这表明即使在存在反馈的短面板中，也可能对θ进行有意义的推断。作为补充，我们报告了平均部分效应的识别集计算结果，并发现这种情况下识别集也具有信息量。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of Trade Credit
papers.authors: Luigi Bocola, Gideon Bornstein
papers.abstract: In most countries, suppliers of intermediate goods and services are also major providers of short-term financing to firms. This paper studies the macroeconomic implications of these financial links. In our model, trade credit arises from long-term relationships between firms linked in production and is sustained by reputation: customers repay in order to preserve their relationships with suppliers. These financial links generate a credit multiplier. Suppliers can enforce repayment from their customers and discount receivables with banks to obtain liquidity. This process can either dampen or amplify the output effects of financial shocks, depending on suppliers’ borrowing capacity. Using Italian data, we find that the credit multiplier is sizable and that trade credit substantially amplified the output costs of the Great Recession.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E44, G01, G30
papers.zh_title: 商业信用的宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 在大多数国家，中间产品和服务的供应商也是企业短期融资的主要提供者。本文研究了这些金融联系的宏观经济含义。在我们的模型中，商业信用是生产过程中相互关联的企业之间长期合同的结果，并通过声誉力量在均衡中得以维持，因为客户在违约时会失去与供应商的关系。这些金融联系产生了一个信用乘数：供应商可以强制执行这些借据的偿还，并且可以将这些票据向银行贴现以获得流动性。这个过程可以放大或抑制金融冲击对产出的影响，具体取决于供应商的借贷能力。利用意大利的数据，我们发现信用乘数相当大，并表明商业信用使大衰退的产出成本增加了45%。

papers.title: A Major Shock Makes Prices More Flexible and May Result in a Burst of Inflation or Deflation
papers.authors: Robert E. Hall
papers.abstract: The US and other advanced countries suffered bursts of severe inflation in 2021 and the first half of 2022, followed by declines of inflation later in 2022, in some countries. In times of high volatility of price determinants—cost and productivity—inflation can jump upward and fall downward at high speed, contrary to the uniformly sticky behavior associated with traditional Phillips curves. This paper establishes that sectors with standard New Keynesian price stickiness are vulnerable to rapid transitions from stickiness to flexibility, as sellers elect to reset their prices and abandon anchoring. The paper shows that the cross-industry volatility of price determinants grew substantially in the inflation episode accompanying the pandemic. Volatility remained elevated even in late 2022. The logic of the New Keynesian model of the Phillips curve links inflation to volatility, because a larger fraction of sellers are pushed out of their regions of inaction when volatility is elevated. The New Keynesian Phillips curve becomes much steeper in volatile times.
papers.zh_title: 重大冲击使价格更具弹性，并可能导致通胀或通缩爆发
papers.zh_abstract: 美国和其他发达国家在2021年和2022年上半年经历了严重的通胀爆发，随后在2022年下半年，一些国家的通胀有所下降。在价格决定因素（成本和生产率）高度波动的时期，通胀可能快速上升和下降，这与传统菲利普斯曲线所关联的普遍粘性行为相反。本文证实，具有标准新凯恩斯价格粘性的行业容易从粘性快速过渡到弹性，因为销售者选择重新设定价格并放弃锚定。本文表明，伴随疫情的通胀事件中，价格决定因素的跨行业波动性大幅增长。即使在2022年末，波动性仍然居高不下。新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线的逻辑将通胀与波动性联系起来，因为当波动性升高时，更大比例的销售者被推出其不行动区域。新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线在波动时期变得陡峭得多。

papers.title: International Sanctions and Dollar Dominance
papers.authors: Javier Bianchi, César Sosa-Padilla
papers.abstract: We propose a simple monetary model to investigate the implications of international financial sanctions for the preeminence of the US dollar in the international financial system. We show how the anticipation of financial sanctions can reduce the US dollar convenience yield and the holdings of US dollar assets. We also evaluate the implications for welfare and show that they are generally detrimental for all countries.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E42, F31, F32, F34, F41, P48
papers.zh_title: 国际制裁与美元主导地位
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个简单的货币模型，以研究国际金融制裁对美元在国际金融体系中主导地位的影响。我们展示了金融制裁的预期如何降低美元便利收益以及美元资产的持有量。我们还评估了这些影响对福利的含义，并表明它们通常对所有国家都是不利的。

papers.title: Do Older Adults Accurately Forecast Their Social Security Benefits?
papers.authors: Grant M. Seiter, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: How accurate are older people’s expectations about their future Social Security benefits? Using panel data from the Health and Retirement Study, we compare respondents’ observed Social Security claiming ages and benefits with subjective expectations provided during their 50s and early 60s. We find that, while older adults generally have accurate expectations about their claiming age, they underestimate their annual Social Security income by approximately $1,896 (11.5 percent) on average. However, both accuracy and precision increase with age, and the forecast error for people in their early 60s is not statistically different from zero. Exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in the mailing of Social Security statements, which contain personalized information about future benefits, we show that information provision reduces the forecast error in annual income by $344 (2.1 percent of the average benefit).
papers.zh_title: 老年人能否准确预测其社会保障福利？
papers.zh_abstract: 老年人对其未来社会保障福利的预期有多准确？利用健康与退休研究的面板数据，我们将受访者观察到的社会保障领取年龄和福利与他们50多岁和60岁出头时提供的主观预期进行了比较。我们发现，虽然老年人通常对其领取年龄有准确的预期，但他们平均低估了其年度社会保障收入约1,896美元（11.5%）。然而，准确性和精确度都随年龄增长而提高，并且60岁出头人群的预测误差在统计上与零无显著差异。利用邮寄包含个性化未来福利信息的社会保障对账单这一看似外生的变化，我们表明信息提供使年度收入的预测误差减少了344美元（占平均福利的2.1%）。

papers.title: Biodiversity Finance
papers.authors: Caroline Flammer, Thomas Giroux, Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: We study biodiversity finance—the use of private capital to finance biodiversity conservation and restoration—which is a new practice in sustainable finance. First, we provide a conceptual framework that lays out how biodiversity can be financed by pure private capital and blended financing structures. In the latter, private capital is blended with public or philanthropic capital, whose aim is to de-risk private capital investments. The main element underlying both types of financing is the “monetization” of biodiversity, that is, using investments in biodiversity to generate a financial return for private investors. Second, we provide empirical evidence using deal-level data from a leading biodiversity finance institution. Our findings are consistent with a three-dimensional efficient frontier (return, risk, and biodiversity impact)—deals with a favorable risk-return profile tend to be financed by pure private capital, whereas for other deals the biodiversity impact needs to be sufficiently large for blended finance to be used. Overall, our results suggest that blended finance is an important tool for improving the risk-return profile of these projects, thereby increasing their appeal to private investors and crowding in private capital. Finally, our results suggest that private capital is unlikely to substitute for effective public policies in addressing the biodiversity crisis.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：G11, G23, G3, Q14, Q2, Q5, Q57
papers.zh_title: 生物多样性融资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究生物多样性融资——即利用私人资本为生物多样性保护和恢复提供资金——这是可持续金融中的一种新实践。首先，我们提供了一个概念框架，阐述了生物多样性如何通过纯私人资本和混合融资结构进行融资。在后者中，私人资本与公共或慈善资本混合，其目的是降低私人资本投资的风险。这两种融资类型背后的主要元素是生物多样性的“货币化”，即利用对生物多样性的投资为私人投资者产生财务回报。其次，我们使用来自一家领先的生物多样性融资机构的交易层面数据提供了实证证据。我们的发现与三维有效前沿（回报、风险和生物多样性影响）一致——具有有利风险回报特征的交易往往由纯私人资本融资，而对于其他交易，生物多样性影响需要足够大才能使用混合融资。总体而言，我们的结果表明，混合融资是改善这些项目风险回报状况的重要工具，从而增加其对私人投资者的吸引力并吸引私人资本。最后，我们的结果表明，在应对生物多样性危机方面，私人资本不太可能替代有效的公共政策。

papers.title: Intellectual Property Rights Design and Academic Innovation: Evidence from University Patent Ownership Reform
papers.authors: Jun Wang, Yi Qian
papers.abstract: China has sought to promote the commercialization of patents at universities, notably through the three rights and mixed ownership reforms. These two reforms adopted different models for the allocation of university patent ownership. The three rights reform completely allocates patent ownership to the universities, while the mixed ownership approach allocates the majority of patent ownership to the inventors upon the generation of outcomes. We empirically tested the effects of the two patent ownership allocation models on the patent performance using Chinese patent data and university statistics. We found that external institutional environment influenced the anticipated outcomes of the reform pilot in both reform models. The three rights reform has a significant impact on patent licensing without affecting the quantity or quality of patents, while the mixed ownership reform has significantly increased patent sales and applications while tilting research and development toward research with relatively low creativity. This paper contributes to the literature on innovation policies governing the conditions for effective institutional changes.
papers.zh_title: 知识产权制度设计与学术创新：来自大学专利所有权改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 中国寻求促进大学专利的商业化，特别是通过“三权”改革和混合所有制改革。这两项改革采用了不同的大学专利所有权分配模式。“三权”改革将专利所有权完全分配给大学，而混合所有制方法则在成果产生后将大部分专利所有权分配给发明人。我们利用中国专利数据和大学统计数据，实证检验了两种专利所有权分配模式对专利绩效的影响。我们发现，外部制度环境影响了两种改革模式中改革试点的预期结果。“三权”改革对专利许可有显著影响，但不影响专利数量或质量，而混合所有制改革则显著增加了专利销售和申请，同时将研发转向创造力相对较低的研究。本文为关于有效制度变革条件的创新政策文献做出了贡献。

papers.title: A Trajectories-Based Approach to Measuring Intergenerational Mobility
papers.authors: Yoosoon Chang, Steven N. Durlauf, Seunghee Lee, Joon Y. Park
papers.abstract: This paper develops an approach to intergenerational mobility in which the trajectories of parental incomes during childhood and adolescence are the conditioning objects for characterizing dependence across generations. We use functional regression methods to produce an intergenerational elasticity curve that measures how marginal changes in income at each age affect expected offspring permanent income. Using the PSID, estimates of this curve exhibit near monotonicity with respect to age, so that parental incomes in middle childhood and adolescence have larger marginal effects than incomes in early childhood. When interactions are allowed to occur between incomes at different ages, we find a complex pattern of substitutability between incomes at ages that are close in time versus complementarity between parental incomes for ages early childhood and adolescence. Qualitatively similar results hold for offspring education while we do not find evidence of age-specific effects for occupation. We conclude that important information about the links between parental incomes and children exists beyond the scalar characterization of parental permanent income.
papers.zh_title: 基于轨迹的代际流动性测量方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种代际流动性的方法，其中儿童期和青少年期父母收入的轨迹是描述代际依赖关系的条件对象。我们使用函数回归方法生成一条代际弹性曲线，该曲线衡量每个年龄收入边际变化如何影响预期的后代永久收入。利用PSID数据，该曲线的估计值随年龄呈现近乎单调性，因此童年中期和青少年期的父母收入比童年早期收入具有更大的边际效应。当允许不同年龄收入之间存在交互作用时，我们发现时间上接近的年龄收入之间存在复杂的替代模式，而童年早期和青少年期父母收入之间存在互补性。对于后代教育，结果在性质上相似，而对于职业，我们没有发现年龄特定效应的证据。我们得出结论，关于父母收入与子女之间联系的重要信息超出了父母永久收入的标量特征。

papers.title: Subjective Earnings Risk
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, Victoria Gregory, Eungik Lee, Søren Leth-Petersen, Johan Sæverud
papers.abstract: We introduce a survey instrument to measure earnings risk allowing for the possibility of quitting or being fired from the current job. We find these transitions to be the key drivers of subjective risk. A link with administrative data provides multiple credibility checks for correspondingly aggregated data. Yet it reveals subjective earning risk to be many times smaller than traditional estimates imply even when conditioning richly on demographics and job history. A life-cycle search model calibrated to match data on job transitions and earnings can replicate the distribution of subjective beliefs reported in the survey. Job-match quality, which directly impacts subjective risk but is impossible to identify in administrative data, contributes significantly to earnings risk. This highlights the importance of administratively-linked subjective risk measures.
papers.zh_title: 主观收入风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种调查工具来衡量收入风险，该工具允许从当前工作中辞职或被解雇的可能性。我们发现这些转变是主观风险的关键驱动因素。与行政数据的链接为相应汇总数据提供了多重可信度检查。然而，它揭示了主观收入风险比传统估计所暗示的要小得多，即使在对人口统计特征和工作历史进行丰富条件设定时也是如此。一个校准以匹配工作转换和收入数据的生命周期搜索模型可以复制调查中报告的主观信念分布。工作匹配质量直接影响主观风险，但在行政数据中无法识别，它对收入风险有显著贡献。这凸显了与行政数据相关联的主观风险测量的重要性。

papers.title: The Simple Math of Royalties and Drug Competition During the 180-Day Generic Exclusivity Period
papers.authors: Keith M. Drake, Thomas McGuire
papers.abstract: In agreements settling patent challenges in the drug industry, the plaintiff brand commonly licenses the defendant generic to sell prior to patent expiry. Some agreements require the generic to pay the brand royalties. Despite the superficial flow of profits, royalty terms may function as part of an anticompetitive “reverse payment” made to the generic in exchange for delayed entry. Typically, the brand launches its own authorized generic (AG) during the first-to-file generic’s 180-day exclusivity period so there are two initial generic competitors. A royalty structure that deters the brand’s AG launch reduces the number of entrants to one, conveying net value to the generic and potentially inducing it to delay its entry. Our simple model shows that royalties usually have no place in a brand-generic agreement between rational actors. However, when royalties are conditioned on the brand’s AG launch, a range of royalty rates exists that both conveys net value to the generic and deters the brand from rationally introducing an AG. Declining royalty terms in a brand’s settlement with a first-to-file generic thus raise a red flag that the agreement is a pay-for-delay. Although the numbers are small, empirical analysis based on publicly available materials corroborates this conclusion.
papers.zh_title: 版税与180天仿制药独占期内药品竞争的简单数学
papers.zh_abstract: 在解决药品行业专利挑战的协议中，原告品牌方通常许可被告仿制药公司在专利到期前销售。一些协议要求仿制药公司向品牌方支付版税。尽管利润表面上流动，版税条款可能作为反竞争的“反向支付”的一部分，以换取延迟进入。通常，品牌方在首家仿制药公司的180天独占期内推出自己的授权仿制药，因此存在两个初始仿制药竞争者。一种阻止品牌方推出授权仿制药的版税结构将进入者数量减少到一个，向仿制药公司传递净价值，并可能诱使其延迟进入。我们的简单模型表明，在理性行为者之间的品牌-仿制药协议中，版税通常没有立足之地。然而，当版税以品牌方推出授权仿制药为条件时，存在一系列版税率，既向仿制药公司传递净价值，又阻止品牌方理性地引入授权仿制药。因此，品牌方与首家仿制药公司和解协议中下降的版税条款是一个危险信号，表明该协议是“付费延迟”协议。尽管数字很小，基于公开可用材料的实证分析证实了这一结论。

papers.title: Machine Learning as a Tool for Hypothesis Generation
papers.authors: Jens Ludwig, Sendhil Mullainathan
papers.abstract: While hypothesis testing is a highly formalized activity, hypothesis generation remains largely informal. We propose a systematic procedure to generate novel hypotheses about human behavior, which uses the capacity of machine learning algorithms to notice patterns people might not. We illustrate the procedure with a concrete application: judge decisions about who to jail. We begin with a striking fact: The defendant’s face alone matters greatly for the judge’s jailing decision. In fact, an algorithm given only the pixels in the defendant’s mugshot accounts for up to half of the predictable variation. We develop a procedure that allows human subjects to interact with this black-box algorithm to produce hypotheses about what in the face influences judge decisions. The procedure generates hypotheses that are both interpretable and novel: They are not explained by demographics (e.g. race) or existing psychology research; nor are they already known (even if tacitly) to people or even experts. Though these results are specific, our procedure is general. It provides a way to produce novel, interpretable hypotheses from any high-dimensional dataset (e.g. cell phones, satellites, online behavior, news headlines, corporate filings, and high-frequency time series). A central tenet of our paper is that hypothesis generation is in and of itself a valuable activity, and hope this encourages future work in this largely “pre-scientific” stage of science.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LE, LS, POL, TWP；JEL：B4, C01
papers.zh_title: 机器学习作为假设生成的工具
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然假设检验是一项高度形式化的活动，但假设生成在很大程度上仍然是非正式的。我们提出了一个系统性的程序来生成关于人类行为的新颖假设，该程序利用机器学习算法注意到人们可能注意不到的模式的能力。我们通过一个具体应用来说明该程序：法官关于监禁谁的决定。我们从一个惊人的事实开始：被告的面部本身对法官的监禁决定影响很大。事实上，仅根据被告面部照片像素的算法就解释了高达一半的可预测变异。我们开发了一个程序，允许人类受试者与这个黑箱算法互动，以生成关于面部什么因素影响法官决定的假设。该程序生成的假设既具有可解释性又具有新颖性：它们不能用人口统计特征（例如种族）或现有心理学研究来解释；它们也不是人们甚至专家已经知道的（即使是默会的）。尽管这些结果是具体的，但我们的程序是通用的。它提供了一种从任何高维数据集（例如手机、卫星、在线行为、新闻标题、公司文件和高频时间序列）中产生新颖、可解释假设的方法。我们论文的一个核心原则是，假设生成本身就是一项有价值的活动，并希望这能鼓励未来在这个科学的“前科学”阶段的工作。

papers.title: The Gendered Impacts of Perceived Skin Tone: Evidence from African-American Siblings in 1870–1940
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Jacob Conway, Roy Mill, Luke Stein
papers.abstract: We study differences in economic outcomes by perceived skin tone among African Americans using full-count U.S. decennial census data from the late-19th and early-20th centuries. Comparing children coded as “Black” or “Mulatto” by census enumerators and linking these children across population censuses, we first document large gaps in educational attainment and income among African Americans with darker and lighter perceived skin tones. To disentangle the drivers of these gaps, we identify all 36,329 families in which enumerators assigned same-gender siblings different Black/Mulatto classifications. Relative to sisters coded as Mulatto, sisters coded as Black had lower educational attainment, were less likely to marry, and had lower-earning, less-educated husbands. These patterns are consistent with more severe contemporaneous discrimination against African-American women with darker perceived skin tones.
