In contrast, we find similar educational attainment, marital outcomes, and incomes among differently-classified brothers. Men perceived as African Americans of any skin tone faced similar contemporaneous discrimination, consistent with the “one-drop” racial classification rule that grouped together individuals with any known Black ancestry. Lower incomes for African-American men perceived as having darker skin tone in the general population were driven by differences in opportunities and resources that varied across families, likely reflecting the impacts of historical or family-level discrimination
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：D1, J1, J7, N3, Z13
papers.zh_title: 感知肤色的性别化影响：来自1870–1940年非裔美国兄弟姐妹的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用19世纪末至20世纪初的美国十年一次人口普查完整数据，研究了非裔美国人中因感知肤色不同而导致的经济结果差异。通过比较普查员标记为“黑人”或“混血”的儿童，并在历次人口普查中追踪这些儿童，我们首先发现，在感知肤色较深和较浅的非裔美国人之间，教育程度和收入存在巨大差距。为了厘清这些差距的驱动因素，我们识别出所有36,329个家庭，在这些家庭中，普查员对同性别的兄弟姐妹给予了不同的“黑人/混血”分类。与被归类为“混血”的姐妹相比，被归类为“黑人”的姐妹教育程度较低，结婚可能性较小，且其丈夫收入较低、教育程度也较低。这些模式与当时对感知肤色较深的非裔美国女性存在更严重歧视的现象相一致。相比之下，我们发现被不同分类的兄弟在教育程度、婚姻结果和收入方面相似。任何肤色的非裔美国男性都面临着相似的即时歧视，这与“一滴血”种族分类规则一致，该规则将所有已知有任何非裔血统的个体归为一类。在总人口中，感知肤色较深的非裔美国男性收入较低，这主要是由不同家庭间机会和资源的差异所驱动，很可能反映了历史或家庭层面的歧视影响。

papers.title: Do Government Spending Multipliers Depend on the Sign of the Shock?
papers.authors: Nadav Ben Zeev, Valerie A. Ramey, Sarah Zubairy
papers.abstract: We analyze whether government spending multipliers differ by the sign of the shock. Using aggregate historical U.S. data, we apply Ben Zeev’s (2020) nonlinear diagnostic tests and find evidence of nonlinearities in the impulse response functions of both government spending and GDP. We then extend Ramey and Zubairy’s (2018) framework to allow for asymmetric effects as a type of state dependence to estimate multipliers. While we find differences in the impulse response functions, the resulting multipliers do not differ by sign of the shock. Thus, we find no evidence of asymmetry of government spending multipliers.
papers.zh_title: 政府支出乘数是否取决于冲击的方向？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了政府支出乘数是否因冲击方向的不同而存在差异。利用美国历史总量数据，我们应用Ben Zeev（2020）的非线性诊断检验，发现了政府支出和GDP的脉冲响应函数中存在非线性的证据。随后，我们扩展了Ramey和Zubairy（2018）的框架，允许将非对称效应作为一种状态依赖类型来估计乘数。虽然我们发现脉冲响应函数存在差异，但由此得出的乘数并不因冲击方向而不同。因此，我们没有发现政府支出乘数存在非对称性的证据。

papers.title: A Human Capital Theory of Who Escapes the Grasp of the Local Monopsonist
papers.authors: Matthew E. Kahn, Joseph Tracy
papers.abstract: Over the last thirty years, there has been a rise in several empirical measures of local labor market monopsony power. The monopsonist has a profit incentive to offer lower wages to local workers. Mobile high skill workers can avoid the lower monopsony wages by moving to other more competitive local labor markets featuring a higher skill price vector. We present a Roy Model of heterogeneous worker sorting across local labor markets that has several empirical implications. Monopsony markets are predicted to experience a “brain drain” over time. Using data over four decades we document this deskilling associated with local monopsony power. This means that observed cross-sectional wage gaps in monopsony markets partially reflect sorting on worker ability. Going forward the rise of work from home may act as a substitute for high-skill worker migration from monopsony markets.
papers.zh_title: 谁逃脱了本地买方垄断者的掌控：一个人力资本理论
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去三十年中，衡量本地劳动力市场买方垄断势力的若干实证指标有所上升。买方垄断者有利润动机向本地工人提供更低的工资。流动的高技能工人可以通过迁移到其他更具竞争性、拥有更高技能价格向量的本地劳动力市场，来规避较低的买方垄断工资。我们提出了一个Roy模型，描述异质性工人在不同本地劳动力市场间的分类，该模型具有若干实证含义。预测买方垄断市场会随时间经历“人才流失”。利用跨越四十年的数据，我们记录了这种与本地买方垄断势力相关的技能退化现象。这意味着，在买方垄断市场中观察到的横截面工资差距部分反映了基于工人能力的分类。展望未来，远程办公的兴起可能成为高技能工人从买方垄断市场迁移的替代方案。

papers.title: House Prices and Rents in the 21st Century
papers.authors: Lara Loewenstein, Paul S. Willen
papers.abstract: We study the joint evolution of prices and rents of residential property. After constructing rent and price indices for renter- and owner-occupied properties, we decompose the change in the price of occupant-owned property into (1) changes in rent, (2) changes in the relative prices of investor- and occupant-owned properties, and (3) changes in the price-rent ratio. Via a simple model, we link our decomposition to different sources of variation in house prices. We argue that while the 2000s boom was plausibly driven by exuberant expectations, the boom of the 2020s more likely resulted from a preference shock.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, PE；JEL：E30, E32, H31, R30, R31
papers.zh_title: 21世纪的房价与租金
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了住宅物业价格和租金的联合演变。在构建了租赁和自有住宅的租金与价格指数后，我们将自住物业价格的变化分解为：（1）租金的变化，（2）投资者所有与自住物业相对价格的变化，以及（3）价格-租金比率的变化。通过一个简单模型，我们将分解结果与房价变动的不同来源联系起来。我们认为，虽然2000年代的繁荣似乎是由过度乐观的预期驱动的，但2020年代的繁荣更可能是由偏好冲击导致的。

papers.title: The Great Migration and Educational Opportunity
papers.authors: Cavit Baran, Eric Chyn, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impact of the First Great Migration on children. We use the complete count 1940 Census to estimate selection-corrected place effects on education for children of Black migrants. On average, Black children gained 0.8 years of schooling (12 percent) by moving from the South to North. Many counties that had the strongest positive impacts on children during the 1940s offer relatively poor opportunities for Black youth today. Opportunities for Black children were greater in places with more schooling investment, stronger labor market opportunities for Black adults, more social capital, and less crime.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, J15, J24, N32
papers.zh_title: 大迁徙与教育机会
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了第一次大迁徙对儿童的影响。我们利用1940年完整人口普查数据，估算了经过选择偏差校正后的地点效应，以衡量其对黑人移民子女教育的影响。平均而言，黑人儿童通过从南方迁移到北方，获得了0.8年的额外教育（增幅12%）。许多在1940年代对儿童产生最强积极影响的县，如今为黑人青年提供的机会却相对较差。黑人儿童的机会在那些教育投资更多、黑人成人劳动力市场机会更强、社会资本更丰富以及犯罪率更低的地方更大。

papers.title: Monitoring Harassment in Organizations
papers.authors: Laura E. Boudreau, Sylvain Chassang, Ada Gonzalez-Torres, Rachel M. Heath
papers.abstract: We evaluate secure survey methods designed for the ongoing monitoring of harassment in organizations. We use the resulting data to answer policy relevant questions about the nature of harassment: How prevalent is it? What share of managers is responsible for the misbehavior? How isolated are its victims? To do so, we partner with a large Bangladeshi garment manufacturer to experiment with different designs of phone-based worker surveys. Garbling responses to sensitive questions by automatically recording a random subset as complaints increases reporting of physical harassment by 288%, sexual harassment by 269%, and threatening behavior by 46%. A rapport-building treatment has an insignificant aggregate effect, but may affect men and women differently. Removing team identifiers from survey responses does not significantly increase reporting and prevents the computation of policy-relevant team-level statistics. The resulting data shows that harassment is widespread, that the problem is not restricted to a minority of managers, and that victims are often isolated in teams.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C42, D82, J70, J71, J81, J83, M54
papers.zh_title: 组织中的骚扰监控
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了旨在持续监控组织中骚扰行为的安全调查方法。我们利用由此产生的数据来回答关于骚扰本质的政策相关问题：其普遍程度如何？有多少管理者应对不当行为负责？受害者的孤立程度如何？为此，我们与一家大型孟加拉国服装制造商合作，对基于电话的工人调查的不同设计进行实验。通过自动将随机子集的回答记录为投诉来混淆对敏感问题的回答，使得身体骚扰的报告率增加了288%，性骚扰增加了269%，威胁行为增加了46%。建立融洽关系的处理方式总体效果不显著，但可能对男性和女性产生不同影响。从调查回答中移除团队标识符并未显著增加报告率，反而阻碍了政策相关的团队层面统计数据的计算。由此产生的数据显示，骚扰现象普遍存在，问题并不仅限于少数管理者，而且受害者往往在团队中处于孤立状态。

papers.title: Inflation and Asset Returns
papers.authors: Anna Cieslak, Carolin Pflueger
papers.abstract: The past half-century has seen major shifts in inflation expectations, how inflation comoves with the business cycle, and how stocks comove with Treasury bonds. Against this backdrop, we review the economic channels and empirical evidence on how inflation is priced in financial markets. Not all inflation episodes are created equal. Using in a New Keynesian model, we show how “good” inflation can be linked to demand shocks and “bad” inflation to supply shocks driving the economy. We then discuss asset pricing implications of “good” and “bad” inflation. We conclude by providing an outlook for inflation risk premia in the world of newly rising inflation.
papers.zh_title: 通货膨胀与资产回报
papers.zh_abstract: 过去半个世纪见证了通胀预期、通胀与商业周期联动方式以及股票与国债联动方式的重大转变。在此背景下，我们回顾了通胀如何在金融市场中被定价的经济学渠道和实证证据。并非所有的通胀事件都是相同的。我们利用新凯恩斯主义模型，展示了“好”通胀如何与需求冲击相关联，以及“坏”通胀如何与驱动经济的供给冲击相关联。然后，我们讨论了“好”通胀和“坏”通胀的资产定价含义。最后，我们展望了在新一轮通胀上升的世界中通胀风险溢价的前景。

papers.title: Liquidity Dependence and the Waxing and Waning of Central Bank Balance Sheets
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Rahul S. Chauhan, Raghuram Rajan, Sascha Steffen
papers.abstract: When the Federal Reserve (Fed) expanded its balance sheet via quantitative easing (QE), commercial banks typically financed reserve holdings with uninsured demandable deposits. They also issued credit lines to corporations. In the aggregate, these bank-issued claims on liquidity did not shrink commensurately when the Fed halted QE and turned to quantitative tightening (QT). Consequently, banks that increased liquidity risk exposure – especially small and regional banks – became vulnerable to liquidity shocks, necessitating further liquidity provision by the Fed. The evidence suggests that the expansion and shrinkage of central bank balance sheets has led to liquidity dependence of banks on central banks.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LE, ME, PE, POL；JEL：G21
papers.zh_title: 流动性依赖与中央银行资产负债表的扩张与收缩
papers.zh_abstract: 当美联储通过量化宽松（QE）扩大其资产负债表时，商业银行通常用无保险的活期存款来融资准备金持有。它们还向企业提供信贷额度。总体而言，这些银行发行的流动性债权在美联储停止QE并转向量化紧缩（QT）时并未相应缩减。因此，增加流动性风险敞口的银行——尤其是小型和地区性银行——变得容易受到流动性冲击的影响，需要美联储进一步提供流动性。证据表明，中央银行资产负债表的扩张和收缩导致了银行对中央银行的流动性依赖。

papers.title: How Are Gender Norms Perceived?
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Alexander W. Cappelen, Bertil Tungodden, Alessandra Voena, David H. Yanagizawa-Drott
papers.abstract: This paper provides global evidence on misperceptions of gender norms, drawing on newly collected, nationally representative data from 60 countries. We establish that misperceptions are pervasive across the world. Through a simple conceptual framework, we provide evidence that gender stereotyping and overweighting of minority views are ubiquitous and appear to account for the global structure of misperceptions. Both actual and perceived support are shown to be associated with relevant economic behaviors, including female employment and actions promoting women’s representation in leadership. Our paper suggests that misperceptions are ubiquitous and may shape gender inequality globally.
papers.zh_title: 性别规范是如何被感知的？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于从60个国家新收集的具有全国代表性的数据，提供了关于性别规范误解的全球证据。我们确定误解在世界各地普遍存在。通过一个简单的概念框架，我们提供了证据表明性别刻板印象和对少数观点的过度加权是普遍存在的，并且似乎解释了误解的全球结构。实际支持和感知支持都被证明与相关的经济行为有关，包括女性就业和促进女性在领导层中代表性的行动。我们的论文表明，误解普遍存在，并可能在全球范围内塑造性别不平等。

papers.title: Monetary Tightening and U.S. Bank Fragility in 2023: Mark-to-Market Losses and Uninsured Depositor Runs?
papers.authors: Erica Xuewei Jiang, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: We develop a conceptual framework and an empirical methodology to analyze the effect of rising interest rates on the value of U.S. bank assets and bank stability. We mark-to-market the value of banks’ assets due to interest rate increases from Q1 2022 to Q1 2023, revealing an average decline of 10%, totaling about $2 trillion in aggregate. We present a model illustrating how asset value declines due to higher rates can lead to self-fulfilling solvency runs even when banks’ assets are fully liquid. Banks with high asset losses, low capital, and, critically, high uninsured leverage are most fragile. A case study of the failed Silicon Valley Bank confirms the model insights. Our empirical measures of bank fragility suggest that, in the absence of regulatory intervention, many U.S. banks would have been at risk of self-fulfilling solvency runs.
papers.zh_title: 2023年货币紧缩与美国银行脆弱性：按市值计价的损失与未保险存款人挤兑？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个概念框架和一套实证方法论，用以分析利率上升对美国银行资产价值及银行稳定性的影响。我们对2022年第一季度至2023年第一季度期间因利率上升导致的银行资产价值进行按市值计价，结果显示平均下降了10%，总计约2万亿美元。我们提出了一个模型，说明即使银行资产完全具有流动性，利率上升导致的资产价值下降也可能引发自我实现的偿付能力挤兑。资产损失高、资本金低且关键的是未保险杠杆率高的银行最为脆弱。对硅谷银行倒闭案例的研究证实了该模型的见解。我们的银行脆弱性实证度量表明，若无监管干预，许多美国银行本将面临自我实现的偿付能力挤兑风险。

papers.title: Complexity and Hyperbolic Discounting
papers.authors: Benjamin Enke, Thomas Graeber, Ryan Oprea
papers.abstract: A large literature shows that people discount financial rewards hyperbolically instead of exponentially. While discounting of money has been questioned as a measure of time preferences, it continues to be highly relevant in empirical practice and predicts a wide range of real-world behaviors, creating a need to understand what generates the hyperbolic pattern. We provide evidence that hyperbolic discounting reflects mistakes that are driven by the complexity of evaluating delayed payoffs. In particular, we document that hyperbolicity (i) is strongly associated with choice inconsistency and cognitive uncertainty, (ii) increases in overt complexity manipulations and (iii) arises nearly identically in computationally similar tasks that involve no actual payoff delays. Our results suggest that even if people had exponential discount functions, complexity-driven mistakes would cause them to make hyperbolic choices. We examine which experimental techniques to estimate present bias are (not) confounded by complexity.
papers.zh_title: 复杂性与双曲贴现
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献表明，人们对金钱奖励的贴现方式是双曲型的而非指数型的。尽管对金钱的贴现作为时间偏好的度量方式受到质疑，但它在实证实践中仍高度相关，并能预测广泛的实际行为，因此需要理解是什么导致了双曲贴现模式。我们提供的证据表明，双曲贴现反映了由评估延迟回报的复杂性所驱动的错误。具体而言，我们记录了双曲性（i）与选择不一致性和认知不确定性密切相关，（ii）在显性的复杂性操纵下会增加，并且（iii）在涉及无实际回报延迟的计算相似任务中几乎相同地出现。我们的结果表明，即使人们拥有指数贴现函数，复杂性驱动的错误也会导致他们做出双曲型选择。我们检验了哪些用于估计现时偏好的实验技术（不）会受到复杂性的混淆。

papers.title: Helicopter Drops and Liquidity Traps
papers.authors: Manuel Amador, Javier Bianchi
papers.abstract: During a liquidity trap, increases in the money supply have no real effects, as the nominal interest rate has reached its lower bound. We propose a theory of how helicopter drops of money can be effective during a liquidity trap. We develop a New Keynesian monetary model where the fiscal and monetary authorities are separated, and the latter faces balance sheet constraints. If the monetary authority can commit, helicopter drops are unnecessary in a liquidity trap, even under balance sheet constraints. However, we show that helicopter drops can help stabilize the economy when the monetary authority lacks commitment.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E52, E58, E61, E63
papers.zh_title: 直升机撒钱与流动性陷阱
papers.zh_abstract: 在流动性陷阱期间，由于名义利率已达到下限，货币供应量的增加没有实际效果。我们提出了一种理论，说明直升机撒钱如何在流动性陷阱期间发挥作用。我们构建了一个新凯恩斯主义货币模型，其中财政当局和货币当局是分离的，且后者面临资产负债表约束。如果货币当局能够承诺，即使在资产负债表约束下，流动性陷阱中也不需要直升机撒钱。然而，我们表明，当货币当局缺乏承诺能力时，直升机撒钱有助于稳定经济。

papers.title: From Syringes to Dishes: Improving Food Sufficiency through Vaccination
papers.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Wei Fu, Erdal Tekin, Shijun You
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of COVID-19 vaccination on food insufficiency in the United States, using data from the Household Pulse Survey. Our primary research design exploits variation in vaccine eligibility across states over time as an instrumental variable to address the endogeneity of vaccination decision. We find that vaccination had a substantial impact on food hardship by reducing the likelihood of food insufficiency by 24%, with even stronger effects among minority and financially disadvantaged populations. These results are robust to alternative specifications and the use of regression discontinuity as an alternative identification strategy. We also show that vaccine eligibility had a positive spillover impact on food assistance programs, notably reducing participation in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program and the use of its benefits, suggesting that vaccination policies can help alleviate the government’s fiscal burden during public health crises. Our analysis offers detailed insights into the potential mechanisms linking vaccination to food insufficiency. We demonstrate that vaccination yields changes in both material circumstances and financial expectations. Specifically, vaccination increases the use of regular income for spending needs and reduces reports of insufficient food due to unaffordability. Additionally, we find that vaccination improves financial optimism, reflected in expectations for future employment income loss and the ability to meet mortgage and debt obligations. Our findings are consistent with the notion that this optimism, along with labor market recovery, diminished the need for precautionary savings, reduced reliance on government assistance, and encouraged household spending on essential goods like food, ultimately lowering food insufficiency.
papers.zh_title: 从注射器到餐盘：通过疫苗接种改善食物充足性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用家庭脉搏调查数据，研究了新冠疫苗接种对美国食物不足的影响。我们的主要研究设计利用各州疫苗接种资格随时间变化的差异作为工具变量，以解决疫苗接种决策的内生性问题。我们发现，疫苗接种通过将食物不足的可能性降低24%，对食物困难产生了显著影响，在少数族裔和财务弱势群体中效果更强。这些结果在替代性设定和使用断点回归作为替代识别策略时依然稳健。我们还表明，疫苗接种资格对食物援助计划产生了正向溢出效应，显著减少了补充营养援助计划的参与及其福利使用，表明疫苗接种政策有助于在公共卫生危机期间减轻政府的财政负担。我们的分析详细揭示了疫苗接种与食物不足之间的潜在机制。我们证明，疫苗接种带来了物质状况和财务预期的变化。具体而言，疫苗接种增加了使用常规收入满足支出需求的情况，并减少了因无力负担而导致食物不足的报告。此外，我们发现疫苗接种改善了财务乐观情绪，这体现在对未来就业收入损失以及偿还抵押贷款和债务能力的预期上。我们的发现与以下观点一致：这种乐观情绪，加上劳动力市场的复苏，减少了对预防性储蓄的需求，降低了对政府援助的依赖，并鼓励了家庭在食品等必需品上的支出，最终降低了食物不足。

papers.title: Global High-Resolution Estimates of the United Nations Human Development Index Using Satellite Imagery and Machine-learning
papers.authors: Luke Sherman, Jonathan Proctor, Hannah Druckenmiller, Heriberto Tapia, Solomon M. Hsiang
papers.abstract: The United Nations Human Development Index (HDI) is arguably the most widely used alternative to gross domestic product for measuring national development. This is in large part due to its multidimensional nature, as it incorporates not only income, but also education and health. However, the country-level resolution of the global HDI data released by the Human Development Report Office of the United Nations Development Programme (N=191 countries) has limited its use at the local level. Recent efforts used survey data to produce HDI estimates for first-level administrative units (e.g., states/provinces). Here, we build on recent advances in machine learning and satellite imagery to develop the first global estimates of HDI for second-level administrative units (e.g., municipalities/counties, N = 61,530) and for a global 0.1° × 0.1° grid (N=819,309). To accomplish this we develop and validate a generalizable downscaling technique based on satellite imagery that allows for training and prediction with observations of arbitrary shape and size. This enables us to train a model using provincial administrative data and generate HDI estimates at the municipality and grid levels. Our results indicate that more than half of the global population was previously assigned to the incorrect HDI quintile within each country, due to aggregation bias resulting from lower resolution estimates. We also illustrate how these data can improve decision-making. We make these high-resolution HDI estimates publicly available in the hope that they increase understanding of human wellbeing globally and improve the effectiveness of policies supporting sustainable development. We also make available the satellite features necessary to increase the spatial resolution of any other administrative data that is detectable via imagery.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, EH, PE；JEL：C1, C8, I32, R1
papers.zh_title: 利用卫星图像和机器学习对联合国人类发展指数进行全球高分辨率估算
papers.zh_abstract: 联合国人类发展指数可以说是衡量国家发展方面最广泛使用的国内生产总值替代指标。这在很大程度上归因于其多维性质，因为它不仅包含收入，还包含教育和健康。然而，联合国开发计划署人类发展报告办公室发布的全球人类发展指数数据仅限于国家层面（N=191个国家），这限制了其在地方层面的使用。最近的研究利用调查数据对一级行政单位（如州/省）的人类发展指数进行了估算。在此，我们基于机器学习和卫星图像的最新进展，首次对二级行政单位（如市/县，N=61,530）以及全球0.1°×0.1°网格（N=819,309）的人类发展指数进行了全球估算。为实现这一目标，我们开发并验证了一种基于卫星图像的通用降尺度技术，该技术允许使用任意形状和大小的观测数据进行训练和预测。这使我们能够利用省级行政数据训练模型，并生成市级和网格级的人类发展指数估算值。我们的结果表明，由于低分辨率估算导致的聚合偏差，全球超过一半的人口此前被错误地归入其所在国家内的人类发展指数五分位组。我们还说明了这些数据如何能够改善决策。我们公开提供这些高分辨率的人类发展指数估算值，希望它们能增进全球对人类福祉的理解，并提高支持可持续发展的政策的有效性。我们还提供了必要的卫星特征，以便提高任何可通过图像检测到的其他行政数据的空间分辨率。

papers.title: The Last Mile of Monetary Policy: Inattention, Reminders, and the Refinancing Channel
papers.authors: Shane Byrne, Kenneth Devine, Michael King, Yvonne McCarthy, Christopher Palmer
papers.abstract: Under-refinancing limits the transmission of accommodative monetary policy to the household sector and costs mortgage holders in many countries a significant fraction of income annually. We test whether targeted communication can reduce the attention frictions that inhibit transmission by partnering with a large bank to analyze a field experiment testing messages sent to 12,000 Irish households. While we find only small effects of disclosure design improvements, a reminder letter increases refinancing by 76%, from 8.9% to 15.7%. To interpret this reminder effect, we extend and estimate a mixture model of inattentive financial decision-making to allow for disclosure treatment effects on attention. We find that reminders increase the likelihood mortgage holders are attentive by over 60%, from 24% to 39%. A conservative back-of-the-envelope cost-effectiveness calculation implies that the average reminder letter generated €42 of mortgagor consumption (€605 per refinancing household). Our results illustrate that targeted central bank communication such as refinancing reminders could have a larger effect on refinancing than a standard policy rate cut. Reminders could further strengthen the refinancing channel and stimulate local consumption even when policy rates are at the zero-lower bound or set in a monetary union.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ME；JEL：D83, E58, G21, G28, G51
papers.zh_title: 货币政策的最后一公里：注意力不足、提醒与再融资渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 再融资不足限制了宽松货币政策向家庭部门的传导，并每年使许多国家的抵押贷款持有人损失相当大比例的收入。我们通过与一家大型银行合作，分析一项针对12,000个爱尔兰家庭发送信息的实地实验，检验有针对性的沟通能否减少阻碍传导的注意力摩擦。虽然我们发现披露设计改进的效果很小，但一封提醒信使再融资率从8.9%提高到15.7%，增加了76%。为了解释这种提醒效应，我们扩展并估计了一个注意力不足的金融决策混合模型，以允许披露处理对注意力的影响。我们发现，提醒使抵押贷款持有人保持注意力的可能性从24%提高到39%，增加了60%以上。一项保守的粗略成本效益计算表明，平均每封提醒信为抵押贷款持有人带来了42欧元的消费（每个再融资家庭605欧元）。我们的结果表明，有针对性的央行沟通（如再融资提醒）对再融资的影响可能大于标准的政策利率下调。即使在政策利率处于零下限或由货币联盟设定的情况下，提醒也能进一步加强再融资渠道并刺激本地消费。

papers.title: Pivotal or Popular: The Effects of Social Information and Feeling Pivotal on Civic Actions
papers.authors: Laura K. Gee, Anoushka Kiyawat, Jonathan Meer, Michael J. Schreck
papers.abstract: We examine the combined effects of popularity and feelings of being important to reaching a goal by testing how people react to situations in which their own behavior is pivotal or not, as well as the popularity of the action. We conduct a laboratory experiment to cleanly fix beliefs about the person's likelihood of being pivotal in reaching a donation threshold that triggers a matching gift, varying both the pivotality and the number of other donors (popularity). The results are striking, with those whose action is pivotal being more than twice as likely to make a donation. We then conduct two field experiments to test these findings in real-world settings. Our results suggest that pivotality is a more important determinant of prosocial behavior.
papers.zh_title: 关键还是受欢迎：社会信息与感觉关键对公民行为的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过测试人们在自身行为是否关键以及行为受欢迎程度不同情况下的反应，来研究受欢迎程度和感觉对达成目标的重要性两者的综合效应。我们进行了一项实验室实验，以清晰地固定人们对自身在达到触发配捐的捐赠门槛时是否关键的信念，同时改变关键性和其他捐赠者的数量（受欢迎程度）。结果令人瞩目，那些行为关键的人进行捐赠的可能性是其他人的两倍以上。随后，我们进行了两项实地实验，以在现实世界中检验这些发现。我们的结果表明，关键性是亲社会行为的更重要决定因素。

papers.title: Personality Differences and Investment Decision-Making
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Cameron Peng, Hongjun Yan
papers.abstract: We survey thousands of affluent American investors to examine the relationship between personalities and investment decisions. The Big Five personality traits correlate with investors' beliefs about the stock market and economy, risk preferences, and social interaction tendencies. Two personality traits, Neuroticism and Openness, stand out in their explanatory power for equity investments. Investors with high Neuroticism and those with low Openness tend to allocate less investment to equities. We examine the underlying mechanisms and find evidence for both standard channels of preferences and beliefs and other nonstandard channels. We show consistent out-of-sample evidence in representative panels of Australian and German households.
papers.zh_title: 人格差异与投资决策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对数千名富裕的美国投资者进行了调查，以研究人格与投资决策之间的关系。大五人格特质与投资者对股市和经济的信念、风险偏好以及社交互动倾向相关。其中，神经质和开放性这两个人格特质在解释股权投资方面尤为突出。神经质高和开放性低的投资者倾向于将较少的投资配置于股票。我们考察了潜在机制，并发现了偏好和信念的标准渠道以及其他非标准渠道的证据。我们在澳大利亚和德国家庭的代表性面板数据中展示了一致的样本外证据。

papers.title: A User's Guide to Inference in Models Defined by Moment Inequalities
papers.authors: Ivan Canay, Gastón Illanes, Amilcar Velez
papers.abstract: Models defined by moment inequalities have become a standard modeling framework for empirical economists, spreading over a wide range of fields within economics. From the point of view of an empirical researcher, the literature on inference in moment inequality models is large and complex, including multiple survey papers that document the non-standard features these models possess, the main novel concepts behind inference in these models, and the most recent developments that bring advances in accuracy and computational tractability. In this paper we present a guide to empirical practice intended to help applied researchers navigate all the decisions required to frame a model as a moment inequality model and then to construct confidence intervals for the parameters of interest. We divide our template into four main steps: (a) a behavioral decision model, (b) moving from the decision model to a moment inequality model, (c) choosing a test statistic and critical value, and (d) accounting for computational challenges. We split each of these steps into a discussion of the “how” and the “why”, and then illustrate how to take these steps to practice in an empirical application that studies identification of expected sunk costs of offering a product in a market.
papers.zh_title: 矩不等式定义模型推断的用户指南
papers.zh_abstract: 由矩不等式定义的模型已成为实证经济学家的标准建模框架，广泛覆盖经济学内的多个领域。从实证研究者的角度来看，关于矩不等式模型推断的文献庞大且复杂，包括多篇综述论文，这些论文记录了这些模型所具有的非标准特征、这些模型推断背后的主要新概念，以及带来准确性和计算易处理性进步的最新发展。在本文中，我们提供了一份实证实践指南，旨在帮助应用研究者驾驭将模型构建为矩不等式模型所需的所有决策，然后为感兴趣的参数构建置信区间。我们将模板分为四个主要步骤：(a) 行为决策模型，(b) 从决策模型过渡到矩不等式模型，(c) 选择检验统计量和临界值，以及 (d) 应对计算挑战。我们将每个步骤分解为“如何做”和“为什么做”的讨论，然后通过一个实证应用来说明如何将这些步骤付诸实践，该应用研究在市场中提供产品的预期沉没成本的识别。

papers.title: Fortunate Families? The Effects of Wealth on Marriage and Fertility
papers.authors: David Cesarini, Erik Lindqvist, Robert Östling, Anastasia Terskaya
papers.abstract: We estimate the effects of large, positive wealth shocks on marriage and fertility in a sample of Swedish lottery players. For male winners, wealth increases marriage formation and reduces divorce risk, suggesting wealth increases men’s attractiveness as prospective and current partners. Wealth also increases male fertility. The only discernible effect on female winners is that wealth increases their short-run (but not long-run) divorce risk. Our results for divorce are consistent with a model where the wealthier spouse retains most of his/her wealth in divorce. In support of this assumption, we show divorce settlements in Sweden often favor the richer spouse.
papers.zh_title: 幸运的家庭？财富对婚姻和生育的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞典彩票中奖者样本，估计了巨大的正向财富冲击对婚姻和生育的影响。对于男性中奖者，财富增加了婚姻形成并降低了离婚风险，这表明财富提高了男性作为潜在和现任伴侣的吸引力。财富也增加了男性的生育率。对女性中奖者唯一可观察到的影响是，财富增加了其短期（而非长期）离婚风险。我们的离婚结果与一个模型一致，在该模型中，较富有的配偶在离婚时保留其大部分财富。为支持这一假设，我们表明瑞典的离婚协议通常偏向较富有的配偶。

papers.title: Longevity, Health and Housing Risks Management in Retirement
papers.authors: Pierre-Carl Michaud, Pascal St. Amour
papers.abstract: Annuities, long-term care insurance and reverse mortgages remain puzzlingly unpopular to manage post-retirement longevity, health and housing price risks. We analyze the lack of interest using a flexible life-cycle model structurally estimated with a unique stated-preference survey experiment of Canadian households. High risk aversion, preference for early resolution of uncertainty, strong discounting of valuation in disability states, housing substitutability and bequest motives play key roles in explaining most of the limited demand. The remaining disinterest is accounted for by information frictions and inertia. We also document evidence of public crowding out, spousal co-insurance and of responsiveness to products bundling.
papers.zh_title: 退休后的长寿、健康与住房风险管理
papers.zh_abstract: 年金、长期护理保险和反向抵押贷款在管理退休后的长寿、健康和住房价格风险方面仍然出奇地不受欢迎。我们利用一个独特的加拿大家庭陈述偏好调查实验，通过结构估计的灵活生命周期模型来分析这种缺乏兴趣的原因。高风险厌恶、对不确定性早期解决的偏好、对残疾状态估值的强烈折现、住房可替代性以及遗赠动机，在解释大部分有限需求方面起着关键作用。剩余的不感兴趣则由信息摩擦和惯性来解释。我们还记录了公共挤出效应、配偶共同保险以及对产品捆绑的响应性的证据。

papers.title: Exploring European Regional Trade
papers.authors: Marta A. Santamaría, Jaume Ventura, Uğur Yeşilbayraktar
papers.abstract: We use the new dataset of trade flows across 269 European regions in 24 countries constructed in Santamaría et al. (2020) to systematically explore for the first time trade patterns within and across country borders. We focus on the differences between home trade, country trade and foreign trade. We document the following facts: (i) European regional trade has a strong home and country bias, (ii) geographic distance and national borders are important determinants of regional trade, but cannot explain the strong regional home bias and (iii) the home bias is heterogeneous across regions and seems to be driven by political regional borders.
papers.zh_title: 探索欧洲区域贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用Santamaría等人（2020）构建的涵盖24个国家269个欧洲区域的贸易流新数据集，首次系统地探索了国家边界内外的贸易模式。我们重点关注国内贸易、国家内贸易和国外贸易之间的差异。我们记录了以下事实：(i) 欧洲区域贸易具有强烈的国内和国家偏向，(ii) 地理距离和国家边界是区域贸易的重要决定因素，但无法解释强烈的区域国内偏向，以及 (iii) 国内偏向在不同区域间存在异质性，似乎由政治区域边界驱动。

papers.title: Information Favoritism and Scoring Bias in Contests
papers.authors: Shanglyu Deng, Hanming Fang, Qiang Fu, Zenan Wu
papers.abstract: Two potentially asymmetric players compete for a prize of common value, which is initially unknown, by exerting efforts. A designer has two instruments for contest design. First, she decides whether and how to disclose an informative signal of the prize value to players. Second, she sets the scoring rule of the contest, which varies the relative competitiveness of the players. We show that the optimum depends on the designer’s objective. A bilateral symmetric contest—in which information is symmetrically distributed and the scoring bias is set to offset the initial asymmetry between players—always maximizes the expected total effort. However, the optimal contest may deliberately create bilateral asymmetry—which discloses the signal privately to one player, while favoring the other in terms of the scoring rule—when the designer is concerned about the expected winner’s effort. The two instruments thus exhibit complementarity, in that the optimum can be made asymmetric in both dimensions even if the players are ex ante symmetric. Our results are qualitatively robust to (i) affiliated signals and (ii) endogenous information structure. We show that information favoritism can play a useful role in addressing affirmative action objectives.
papers.zh_title: 竞赛中的信息偏袒与评分偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 两个潜在不对称的参与者通过付出努力，竞争一个最初未知的共同价值奖品。设计者拥有两个竞赛设计工具。首先，她决定是否以及如何向参与者披露关于奖品价值的信息信号。其次，她设定竞赛的评分规则，该规则改变参与者的相对竞争力。我们表明，最优方案取决于设计者的目标。双边对称竞赛——其中信息对称分布，且评分偏差被设定以抵消参与者之间的初始不对称——总是最大化预期总努力。然而，当设计者关注预期获胜者的努力时，最优竞赛可能故意制造双边不对称——即私下向一个参与者披露信号，同时在评分规则上偏袒另一个参与者。因此，这两个工具表现出互补性，因为即使参与者在事前是对称的，最优方案也可能在两个维度上都是不对称的。我们的结果在定性上对 (i) 关联信号和 (ii) 内生信息结构是稳健的。我们表明，信息偏袒可以在解决平权行动目标方面发挥有益作用。

papers.title: Dying or Lying? For-Profit Hospices and End of Life Care
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, David H. Howard, Jetson Leder-Luis, Theodore L. Caputi
papers.abstract: The Medicare hospice program is intended to provide palliative care to terminal patients, but patients with long stays in hospice are highly profitable, motivating concerns about overuse among the Alzheimer’s and Dementia (ADRD) population in the rapidly growing for-profit sector. We provide the first causal estimates of the effect of for-profit hospice on patient spending using the entry of for-profit hospices over twenty years. We find hospice has saved money for Medicare by offsetting other expensive care among ADRD patients. As a result, policies limiting hospice use including revenue caps and anti-fraud lawsuits are distortionary and deter cost-saving admissions.
papers.zh_title: 临终或谎言？营利性临终关怀与临终护理
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗保险临终关怀项目旨在为临终患者提供姑息治疗，但长期住院的临终关怀患者利润丰厚，这引发了人们对阿尔茨海默病和相关痴呆症（ADRD）人群在快速增长的营利性部门中过度使用的担忧。我们利用二十多年来营利性临终关怀机构的进入，首次提供了关于营利性临终关怀对患者支出影响的因果估计。我们发现，临终关怀通过抵消ADRD患者其他昂贵的护理费用，为医疗保险节省了资金。因此，限制临终关怀使用的政策，包括收入上限和反欺诈诉讼，具有扭曲性，并阻碍了节省成本的入院。

papers.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Lifespan in the US
papers.authors: Sandra E. Black, Neil Duzett, Adriana Lleras-Muney, Nolan G. Pope, Joseph Price
papers.abstract: We examine the transmission of lifespan across generations using a unique dataset containing more than 26 million individuals born between 1880 and 1920. We document new facts about the absolute and relative mobility in lifespan. On average across cohorts, 47% of men and 57 percent of women lived longer than their parents, though this varied across cohorts. Relative measures show higher mobility, with substantially less variation across time and subpopulations. The intergenerational correlation in lifespan (a measure of persistence rather than mobility) is about 0.09 for both sexes – this low correlation is observed across races, education groups, cohorts, and birth states. Finally, we document that the intergenerational persistence of lifespan is much smaller than the persistence in socio-economic status. Moreover, correlations in lifespan and in education are largely independent of each other, suggesting that mobility in well-being may be larger than measures of income alone suggest.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I1, I30, J6
papers.zh_title: 美国寿命的代际传递
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含超过2600万出生于1880年至1920年间个体的独特数据集，考察了寿命的代际传递。我们记录了关于寿命绝对和相对流动性的新事实。平均而言，在各队列中，47%的男性和57%的女性比其父母活得更长，尽管这在不同队列间存在差异。相对指标显示出更高的流动性，且随时间及子人群的变化显著较小。寿命的代际相关性（衡量持续性而非流动性）对两性而言约为0.09——这种低相关性在种族、教育群体、队列和出生州中均被观察到。最后，我们记录了寿命的代际持续性远小于社会经济地位的持续性。此外，寿命和教育中的相关性在很大程度上相互独立，这表明福祉的流动性可能比仅用收入衡量的指标所显示的要大。

papers.title: Information Heterogeneity and the Demand for Healthcare: Evidence from GPs in England
papers.authors: Zach Y. Brown, Christopher Hansman, Jordan Keener, Andre F. Veiga
papers.abstract: Do different patient choices reflect what they value or what they know? We study this question using variation created by rounded star ratings for GP practices, which changes the information about providers that patients can publicly observe. Differences in the demand response to these ratings indicate that some groups—notably high-income patients—are better informed about provider quality. We develop an empirical demand model that allows both information and preferences to vary across patients and find that heterogeneity in choice overwhelmingly reflects differences in information. Standard full-information demand models underestimate the gains from improving providers by more than 50%, and fail to capture the incidence of those gains. Low-income and other low-information groups benefit substantially from such improvements even when their observed demand for highly-rated GPs is weak.

papers.title: Weighted Median Inflation Around the World: A Measure of Core Inflation
papers.authors: Laurence M. Ball, Carlos Carvalho, Christopher Evans, Luca Antonio Ricci
papers.abstract: The standard measure of core or underlying inflation is the inflation rate excluding food and energy prices. This paper constructs an alternative measure, the weighted median inflation rate, for 38 advanced and emerging economies using subclass level disaggregation of the CPI over 1990-2021, and compares the properties of this measure to those of standard core. For quarterly data, we find that the weighted median is less volatile than standard core, more closely related to economic slack, and more closely related to headline inflation over the next year. The weighted median also has a drawback: in most countries, it has a lower average level than headline inflation. We therefore also consider a measure of core inflation that eliminates this bias, which is based on the percentile of sectoral inflation rates that matches the sample average of headline CPI inflation.
papers.zh_title: 全球加权中位数通胀：一种核心通胀衡量指标
papers.zh_abstract: 衡量核心通胀或潜在通胀的标准指标是剔除食品和能源价格后的通胀率。本文利用1990-2021年期间38个发达经济体和新兴经济体的CPI子类细分数据，构建了另一种衡量指标——加权中位数通胀率，并将其性质与标准核心通胀进行了比较。对于季度数据，我们发现加权中位数通胀比标准核心通胀波动性更小，与经济疲软程度的相关性更强，并且与未来一年的整体通胀相关性更强。加权中位数通胀也存在一个缺点：在大多数国家，其平均水平低于整体通胀。因此，我们还考虑了一种消除这种偏差的核心通胀衡量指标，该指标基于与整体CPI通胀样本均值相匹配的行业通胀率百分位数。

papers.title: Sentiment, Productivity, and Economic Growth
papers.authors: George M. Constantinides, Maurizio Montone, Valerio Potì, Stella Spilioti
papers.abstract: Previous research finds correlation between sentiment and future economic growth, but disagrees on the channel that explains this result. In this paper, we shed new light on this issue by exploiting cross-country variation in sentiment and market efficiency. We find that sentiment shocks in G7 countries increase economic activity, but only temporarily and without affecting productivity. By contrast, sentiment shocks in non-G7 countries predict prolonged economic growth and a corresponding increase in productivity. The results suggest that sentiment can indeed create economic booms, but only in less advanced economies where noisy asset prices make sentiment and fundamentals harder to disentangle.
papers.zh_title: 情绪、生产率与经济增长
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究发现情绪与未来经济增长之间存在相关性，但对于解释这一结果的传导渠道存在分歧。在本文中，我们通过利用情绪和市场效率的跨国差异，为这一问题提供了新的见解。我们发现，七国集团国家的情绪冲击会增加经济活动，但只是暂时的，且不影响生产率。相比之下，非七国集团国家的情绪冲击预示着持续的经济增长以及相应的生产率提升。结果表明，情绪确实可以创造经济繁荣，但仅限于那些资产价格噪音较大、使得情绪与基本面更难区分的欠发达经济体。

papers.title: Market Size and Trade in Medical Services
papers.authors: Jonathan I. Dingel, Joshua D. Gottlieb, Maya Lozinski, Pauline Mourot
papers.abstract: We uncover substantial interregional trade in medical services and investigate the contribution of regional increasing returns. In Medicare, one-fifth of production involves a doctor treating a patient from another region. Larger regions produce greater quantity, quality, and variety of medical services, which they “export” to patients from elsewhere, especially smaller regions. We estimate regional quality based on patients’ travel choices, and these revealed-preference estimates align with clinical outcomes. Demographic-based instruments and a case study show that greater local demand increases quality and exports, consistent with economies of scale. We study counterfactual policies that lower travel costs rather than relocating production.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, ITI, PE, PR；JEL：F12, F14, I11, R12

papers.title: The March 2023 Bank Interventions in Long-Run Context – Silicon Valley Bank and beyond
papers.authors: Andrew Metrick, Paul Schmelzing
papers.abstract: U.S. and European banking institutions were hit by a wave of distress in March 2023. Policymakers on both sides of the Atlantic reacted with an array of interventions, some targeting individual institutions, others designed to shore up the banking sector as a whole. This paper contextualizes events using a new long-run database on banking-sector policy interventions over the last eight centuries. On that basis, recent actions have already been unusual in their policy mix and size – in the database, the vast majority of events with the same pattern of interventions ultimately evolved into “systemic” bank-distress episodes.
papers.zh_title: 2023年3月银行干预措施的长期背景——硅谷银行及其后
papers.zh_abstract: 美国和欧洲的银行机构在2023年3月遭遇了一波困境。大西洋两岸的政策制定者采取了一系列干预措施，有些针对个别机构，有些旨在支撑整个银行业。本文利用过去八个世纪银行业政策干预的新长期数据库，将这些事件置于背景中。基于此，近期的行动在其政策组合和规模上已经不同寻常——在该数据库中，绝大多数具有相同干预模式的事件最终演变成了“系统性”银行困境事件。

papers.title: Information Technology, Firm Size, and Industrial Concentration
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Wang Jin, Georgios Petropoulos, Xiupeng Wang
papers.abstract: Information technologies (IT) have the potential to reshape the organization of firms and the structure of markets. In this paper, we develop a Cournot competition model in which IT enables firms to replicate the routines of their most efficient establishment across locations. This leads to a decline in marginal cost production and the “scale without mass” outcome: because of IT adoption, firms’ revenue grows faster than employment. Drawing on US Census microdata covering a panel of about 5000 firms, we confirm that greater investment in IT is associated with increases in sales and market concentration, with smaller and more ambiguous effects on employment. Results from instrumental variables and long-difference models suggest that the association is causal. Because the effect of IT is more pronounced on sales than employment, it compresses the labor share. We also show that IT disproportionately benefits larger firms by enhancing their ability to scale and replicate their operational processes across multiple establishments, markets, and industry segments. By pinpointing how firms operationalize IT gains through replicating high-efficiency routines across establishments, our model and analysis deepen our understanding of the micro-foundation behind recent macro evidence on rising concentration and declining labor share in the digital era.
papers.zh_title: 信息技术、企业规模与产业集中度
papers.zh_abstract: 信息技术（IT）有可能重塑企业组织和市场结构。本文构建了一个古诺竞争模型，在该模型中，IT使企业能够将其效率最高的工厂的运营流程复制到各个地点。这导致了边际生产成本的下降和“无规模扩张”的结果：由于IT的采用，企业收入的增长快于就业的增长。利用涵盖约5000家企业面板数据的美国人口普查微观数据，我们证实，IT投资增加与销售额和市场集中度的上升相关，而对就业的影响则较小且更不明确。工具变量和长期差分模型的结果表明，这种关联是因果性的。由于IT对销售额的影响比就业更显著，它压低了劳动收入份额。我们还表明，IT通过增强大型企业跨多个工厂、市场和行业细分领域扩展和复制其运营流程的能力，使其不成比例地受益。通过精确指出企业如何通过跨工厂复制高效运营流程来实现IT收益，我们的模型和分析加深了我们对数字时代集中度上升和劳动收入份额下降等近期宏观证据背后微观基础的理解。

papers.title: The Value of Ratings: Evidence from their Introduction in Securities Markets
papers.authors: Asaf Bernstein, Carola Frydman, Eric Hilt
papers.abstract: We study the effects of the first-ever ratings for corporate securities. In 1909, John Moody published a book that partitioned the majority of listed railroad bonds into letter-graded ratings based on his assessments of their credit risk. These ratings had no regulatory implications and were largely explainable using publicly available information. Despite this, we find that lower than market-implied ratings caused a rise in secondary market bond yields. Using an instrumental-variables design, we show that bonds that were rated experienced a substantial decline in their bid-ask spreads, which is consistent with reduced information asymmetries and improved liquidity. Our findings suggest that ratings can improve information transmission, even in settings with the highest monetary stakes, and highlight their potential value for the functioning of financial markets.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DAE；JEL：G24, G28, N21, N81
papers.zh_title: 评级的价值：来自证券市场引入评级的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了公司证券首次评级的效应。1909年，约翰·穆迪出版了一本书，根据他对信用风险的评估，将大多数上市铁路债券划分为字母等级评级。这些评级没有监管含义，并且很大程度上可以用公开信息来解释。尽管如此，我们发现，低于市场隐含评级的评级导致了二级市场债券收益率的上升。利用工具变量设计，我们表明，获得评级的债券其买卖价差出现了显著下降，这与信息不对称减少和流动性改善是一致的。我们的研究结果表明，即使在货币利益最高的环境中，评级也能改善信息传递，并突显了其对金融市场运作的潜在价值。

papers.title: Difference-in-Differences with Unequal Baseline Treatment Status
papers.authors: Alisa Tazhitdinova, Gonzalo Vazquez-Bare
papers.abstract: We study a difference-in-differences (DiD) framework where groups experience unequal treatment statuses in the pre-policy change period. This approach is commonly employed in empirical studies but it contradicts the canonical model's assumptions. We show that in such settings, the standard DiD approach fails to recover the average treatment effect (ATT), unless the treatment effect is immediate and constant over time. Furthermore, the usual parallel trends test is invalid, meaning one may find pre-trends when the parallel trends assumption holds, and vice versa. We discuss two solutions. First, we show that including a linear term trend will recover the ATT if the differences in trends are constant over time (both in unequal baseline and canonical DiD settings) but not otherwise. Second, estimation in reverse also recovers the ATT if the potential outcomes do not depend on past treatments and post-policy statuses are converging.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C21, C23
papers.zh_title: 基线处理状态不等的双重差分法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个双重差分（DiD）框架，其中各群体在政策变化前时期经历了不平等的处理状态。这种方法在实证研究中常用，但与经典模型的假设相矛盾。我们表明，在这种情况下，除非处理效应是即时且随时间恒定的，否则标准的DiD方法无法恢复平均处理效应（ATT）。此外，通常的平行趋势检验是无效的，这意味着当平行趋势假设成立时可能发现事前趋势，反之亦然。我们讨论了两种解决方案。首先，我们表明，如果趋势差异随时间恒定（无论是在不平等基线还是经典DiD设定中），则包含线性趋势项将恢复ATT，否则不行。其次，如果潜在结果不依赖于过去的处理且政策后状态趋于收敛，则反向估计也能恢复ATT。

papers.title: The Characteristics and Geographic Distribution of Robot Hubs in U.S. Manufacturing Establishments
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Cathy Buffington, Nathan Goldschlag, J. Frank Li, Javier Miranda, Robert Seamans
papers.abstract: We use data from the Annual Survey of Manufactures to study the characteristics and geography of investments in robots across U.S. manufacturing establishments. We find that robotics adoption and robot intensity (the number of robots per employee) is much more strongly related to establishment size than age. We find that establishments that report having robotics have higher capital expenditures, including higher information technology (IT) capital expenditures. Also, establishments are more likely to have robotics if other establishments in the same Core-Based Statistical Area (CBSA) and industry also report having robotics. The distribution of robots is highly skewed across establishments’ locations. Some locations, which we call Robot Hubs, have far more robots than one would expect even after accounting for industry and manufacturing employment. We characterize these Robot Hubs along several industry, demographic, and institutional dimensions. The presence of robot integrators and higher levels of union membership are positively correlated with being a Robot Hub.
papers.zh_title: 美国制造业企业机器人中心的特征与地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用制造业年度调查的数据来研究美国制造业企业在机器人投资方面的特征和地理分布。我们发现，机器人采用率和机器人强度（每名员工对应的机器人数量）与企业规模的相关性远强于与企业年龄的相关性。我们发现，报告拥有机器人的企业具有更高的资本支出，包括更高的信息技术（IT）资本支出。此外，如果同一核心统计区（CBSA）和行业内的其他企业也报告拥有机器人，那么企业更有可能拥有机器人。机器人的分布在企业所在地之间高度偏斜。一些我们称之为机器人中心的地点，即使在考虑了行业和制造业就业后，其机器人数量也远超预期。我们从行业、人口和制度等多个维度描述了这些机器人中心的特征。机器人集成商的存在和更高的工会成员比例与成为机器人中心呈正相关。

papers.title: Is Pay Transparency Good?
papers.authors: Zoe B. Cullen
papers.abstract: Countries around the world are enacting pay transparency policies to combat pay discrimination. 71% of OECD countries have done so since 2000. Most are enacting transparency horizontally, revealing pay between co-workers of similar seniority within a firm. While these policies have narrowed co-worker wage gaps, they have also lead to counterproductive peer comparisons and caused employers to bargain more aggressively, lowering average wages. Other pay transparency policies, without directly targeting discrimination, have benefited workers by addressing broader information frictions in the labor market. Vertical pay transparency policies reveal to workers pay differences across different levels of seniority. Empirical evidence suggests these policies can lead to more accurate and more optimistic beliefs about earnings potential, increasing employee motivation and productivity. Cross-firm pay transparency policies reveal wage differences across employers. These policies have encouraged workers to seek jobs at higher paying firms, negotiate higher pay, and sharpened wage competition between employers. We discuss the evidence on pay transparency’s effects, and open questions.
papers.zh_title: 薪酬透明化是好事吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 世界各国正在制定薪酬透明化政策以打击薪酬歧视。自2000年以来，71%的经合组织国家已经这样做了。大多数国家正在横向实施透明化，即揭示公司内部资历相近的同事之间的薪酬差异。虽然这些政策缩小了同事间的工资差距，但它们也导致了适得其反的同伴比较，并促使雇主更积极地讨价还价，从而降低了平均工资。其他薪酬透明化政策，虽然没有直接针对歧视，但通过解决劳动力市场中更广泛的信息摩擦而使工人受益。纵向薪酬透明化政策向工人揭示了不同资历层级之间的薪酬差异。实证证据表明，这些政策可以导致对收入潜力更准确和更乐观的信念，从而提高员工的积极性和生产力。跨企业薪酬透明化政策揭示了不同雇主之间的工资差异。这些政策鼓励工人到薪酬更高的企业求职，协商更高的薪酬，并加剧了雇主之间的工资竞争。我们讨论了关于薪酬透明化效应的证据以及未解决的问题。

papers.title: Capital Gains Realizations
papers.authors: James R. Hines, Jr., Daniel Schaffa
papers.abstract: Evidence that high tax rates significantly depress capital gains realizations is inconsistent with the implications of neoclassical investment models in unchanging economic environments. Higher tax rates reduce after-tax investment returns, thereby encouraging investors to sell capital assets earlier. For a given investment horizon, higher tax rates need not reward accumulating unrealized gains over long periods – and even if they do, longer accumulations can lead to earlier realizations. Consequently, the sizeable observed effects of capital gains taxes likely reflect investor anticipations of future tax rate changes, rather than the time value of money.
papers.zh_title: 资本利得的实现
papers.zh_abstract: 高税率显著抑制资本利得实现的证据与不变经济环境中新古典投资模型的含义不一致。较高的税率降低了税后投资回报，从而鼓励投资者更早地出售资本资产。对于给定的投资期限，较高的税率不一定奖励长期积累未实现收益——即使如此，更长的积累期也可能导致更早的实现。因此，观察到的资本利得税的显著效应可能反映了投资者对未来税率变化的预期，而不是货币的时间价值。

papers.title: Natural Resources and Sovereign Risk in Emerging Economies: A Curse and a Blessing
papers.authors: Franz Hamann, Juan Camilo Mendez-Vizcaino, Enrique G. Mendoza, Paulina Restrepo-Echavarria
papers.abstract: Emerging economies that are large oil producers have sizable external debt, their sovereign risk rises when oil prices fall, and many of them have defaulted in the past. Interestingly, oil output reduces country risk on impact and in the long-run, but oil reserves increase it in the long-run and reduce it only marginally on impact. We propose a model of sovereign default and oil extraction and derive analytic and quantitative findings consistent with these observations. The sovereign manages oil reserves strategically to make default less painful, and hence its sustainable debt falls. Reserves rise in the run-up to a default and the co-movement of reserves and country risk in response to oil-price shocks switches from negative initially to positive afterwards. These results extend to a setup with rare, large and uncertain oil discoveries. Defaults occur with less severe drops in GDP and oil prices but after long dry spells in discoveries.
papers.zh_title: 新兴经济体的自然资源与主权风险：诅咒与祝福
papers.zh_abstract: 作为大型石油生产国的新兴经济体拥有大量外债，其主权风险在油价下跌时上升，并且其中许多国家过去曾发生过违约。有趣的是，石油产出在当期和长期内降低了国家风险，但石油储备在长期内增加了国家风险，而在当期仅略微降低风险。我们提出了一个主权违约和石油开采模型，并得出了与这些观察结果一致的分析和定量结论。主权国家战略性地管理石油储备以使违约不那么痛苦，因此其可持续债务下降。储备在违约前夕上升，而储备与国家风险对油价冲击的联动关系从最初的负相关转变为之后的正相关。这些结果扩展到了包含罕见、大规模且不确定的石油发现的设定中。违约发生在GDP和油价跌幅不那么严重的情况下，但发生在长期没有新发现的时期之后。

papers.title: Dynamic Banking with Non-Maturing Deposits
papers.authors: Urban Jermann, Haotian Xiang
papers.abstract: The majority of bank liabilities are deposits typically not withdrawn for extended periods. We propose a dynamic model of banks in which depositors forecast banks’ leverage and default decisions, and withdraw optimally by trading off current against future liquidity needs. Endogenous deposit maturity creates a time-varying dilution problem that has major effects on bank dynamics. Interest rate cuts produce delayed increases in bank risk which are stronger in low rate regimes. Deposit insurance can exacerbate the deposit dilution and amplify the increase in bank risk.
papers.zh_title: 具有非到期存款的动态银行业务
papers.zh_abstract: 银行负债的大部分是通常不会在短期内被提取的存款。我们提出了一个银行的动态模型，其中存款人预测银行的杠杆和违约决策，并通过权衡当前与未来的流动性需求来最优地提取存款。内生存款期限创造了一个随时间变化的稀释问题，这对银行动态产生了重大影响。利率下调会导致银行风险的延迟增加，这种效应在低利率制度下更为强烈。存款保险可能加剧存款稀释并放大银行风险的增加。

papers.title: The Long Run Effects of a Comprehensive Teacher Performance Pay Program on Student Outcomes
papers.authors: Sarah Cohodes, Ozkan Eren, Orgul Ozturk
papers.abstract: This paper examines the effects of a comprehensive performance pay program for teachers implemented in high-need schools on students’ longer-run educational, criminal justice, and economic self-sufficiency outcomes. Using linked administrative data from a Southern state, we leverage the quasi-randomness of the timing of program adoption across schools to identify causal effects of the school reform. The program improved educational attainment and reduced both criminal activity and dependence on government assistance in early adulthood. We find little scope for student sorting or changes in the composition of teacher workforce, and that program benefits far exceeded its costs. We propose mechanisms for observed long-run effects and provide evidence consistent with these explanations. Several robustness checks and placebo tests support our findings.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I21, J32, J45
papers.zh_title: 综合性教师绩效薪酬计划对学生成果的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在需求高的学校实施的综合性教师绩效薪酬计划，对学生长期教育、刑事司法和经济自给自足成果的影响。利用美国南部一个州的关联行政数据，我们借助各校采用该计划时间的准随机性来识别学校改革的因果效应。该计划提高了教育成就，并减少了成年早期的犯罪活动和对政府援助的依赖。我们发现学生分类或教师队伍构成变化的可能性很小，且计划收益远超其成本。我们提出了观察到的长期效应的机制，并提供了与这些解释一致的证据。多项稳健性检验和安慰剂检验支持了我们的发现。

papers.title: The Offshore World According to FATCA: New Evidence on the Foreign Wealth of U.S. Households
papers.authors: Niels Johannesen, Daniel Reck, Max Risch, Joel Slemrod, John Guyton, Patrick Langetieg
papers.abstract: This paper uses account-level information, reported to the IRS by foreign financial institutions under the Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA), to produce new evidence on the foreign financial wealth of U.S. households. We find that U.S. taxpayers hold around $4 trillion in foreign accounts, almost half in jurisdictions usually considered tax havens. Combining the FATCA reports with other administrative tax data and tracing account ownership through partnerships, we document a steep income gradient in the propensity to hold assets in foreign financial institutions. Specifically, more than 60% of the individuals in the top 0.01% of the income distribution own foreign accounts, the vast majority in tax havens and more than half through a partnership. We discuss the likely implications of these findings for the overall impact of FATCA on tax compliance and government revenue.
papers.zh_title: 根据FATCA的离岸世界：美国家庭外国财富的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用外国金融机构根据《外国账户税收合规法案》（FATCA）向美国国税局报告的账户级信息，提供了关于美国家庭外国金融财富的新证据。我们发现美国纳税人在外国账户中持有约4万亿美元，其中近一半位于通常被视为避税天堂的司法管辖区。通过将FATCA报告与其他行政税收数据相结合，并追踪通过合伙企业的账户所有权，我们记录了在外国金融机构持有资产的倾向随收入梯度急剧上升。具体而言，收入分布前0.01%的个人中超过60%拥有外国账户，绝大多数在避税天堂，且超过一半通过合伙企业持有。我们讨论了这些发现对FATCA在税收合规和政府收入方面整体影响的可能含义。

papers.title: What Purpose Do Corporations Purport? Evidence from Letters to Shareholders
papers.authors: Raghuram Rajan, Pietro Ramella, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: Using natural language processing, we identify corporate goals stated in the shareholder letters of the 150 largest companies in the United States from 1955 to 2020. Corporate goals have proliferated, from less than one on average in 1955 to more than 7 in 2020. While in 1955, profit maximization, market share growth, and customer service were dominant goals, today almost all companies proclaim social and environmental goals as well. We examine why firms announce goals and when. We find goal announcements are associated with management’s responses to the firm’s (possibly changed) circumstances, with the changing power and preferences of key constituencies, as well as from management’s attempts to deflect scrutiny. While executive compensation is still overwhelmingly based on financial performance, we do observe a rise in bonus payments contingent on meeting social and environmental objectives. Firms that announce environmental and social goals tend to implement programs intended to achieve those goals, although their impact on outcomes is unclear. The evidence is consistent with firms focusing on shareholder interests while incorporating stakeholder interests as interim goals. Goals also do seem to be announced opportunistically to deflect attention and alleviate pressure on management.
papers.zh_title: 公司声称的目的是什么？来自致股东信的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用自然语言处理，我们识别了1955年至2020年美国150家最大公司致股东信中陈述的公司目标。公司目标已从1955年平均不到一个激增至2020年的超过七个。虽然1955年利润最大化、市场份额增长和客户服务是主导目标，但如今几乎所有公司也宣称社会和环境目标。我们考察了公司为何以及何时宣布目标。我们发现目标公告与管理层对公司（可能变化）情况的回应、关键利益相关方权力和偏好的变化，以及管理层试图转移审查有关。尽管高管薪酬仍主要基于财务绩效，但我们确实观察到基于实现社会和环境目标的奖金支付有所增加。宣布环境和社会目标的公司倾向于实施旨在实现这些目标的计划，尽管其对成果的影响尚不明确。证据与公司专注于股东利益同时将利益相关者利益作为中期目标的做法一致。目标似乎也确实被机会主义地宣布，以转移注意力并减轻管理层的压力。

papers.title: Is Income Inequality Linked to Infectious Disease Prevalence? A Hypothesis-Generating Ecological Study Using Tuberculosis
papers.authors: Jay Bhattacharya, Joydeep Bhattacharya, Minkyong Kim
papers.abstract: We study the association between infectious disease prevalence and income inequality. We hypothesize that random social mixing in an income-unequal society brings into contact a) susceptible and infected poor and b) the infected-poor and the susceptible-rich, raising infectious disease prevalence. We investigate this association by examining whether countries with elevated levels of income inequality have higher rates of pulmonary Tuberculosis (TB) incidence per capita. We analyzed publicly available country-level panel data for a large cross-section of countries between 1995 and 2013. A “negative control” using anemia (a non-communicable disease, and hence impervious to the hypothesized mechanism) is also applied. We find that elevated levels of income inequality were positively associated with tuberculosis prevalence. All else equal, countries with income-Gini coefficients 10% apart are a statistically significant 4% different in tuberculosis incidence. Income inequality had a null effect on anemia, the negative control. Our cross-country regression results suggest that income inequality may create conditions where TB spreads more easily.
papers.zh_title: 收入不平等与传染病流行率相关吗？一项以结核病为例的假设生成生态学研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了传染病流行率与收入不平等之间的关联。我们假设，在收入不平等的社会中，随机社会混合使以下人群接触：a) 易感且已感染的穷人，以及 b) 已感染的穷人和易感的富人，从而提高了传染病流行率。我们通过考察收入不平等程度较高的国家是否人均肺结核发病率更高来研究这种关联。我们分析了1995年至2013年间大量国家横截面的公开国家层面面板数据。还使用了贫血症（一种非传染性疾病，因此不受假设机制影响）作为“阴性对照”。我们发现收入不平等程度较高与结核病流行率呈正相关。在其他条件相同的情况下，收入基尼系数相差10%的国家，结核病发病率在统计上显著相差4%。收入不平等对阴性对照贫血症没有影响。我们的跨国回归结果表明，收入不平等可能创造了结核病更容易传播的条件。

papers.title: Combining Risk Adjustment with Risk Sharing in Health Plan Payment Systems: Private Health Insurance in Australia
papers.authors: Josefa Henriquez, Richard C. van Kleef, Andrew Matthews, Thomas McGuire, Francesco Paolucci
papers.abstract: Health plan payment systems with community-rated premiums typically include risk adjustment, risk sharing or both to compensate insurers for predictable profits (on young and healthy people) and predictable losses (on the elderly and chronically ill). This paper shows how a payment system based only on risk sharing (like in Australia), is improved by combining risk sharing with risk adjustment. Using Australia’s private health insurance market as a case study, we compare and assess the current risk sharing based payment system against alternative systems which combine risk adjustment and risk sharing. Specifically, we develop outcome measures to compare the models in terms of incentives for risk selection and incentives for cost control. We find that a payment system composed of risk adjustment based on simple risk-adjustor variables, supplemented with outlier risk sharing outperforms the current system based solely on risk sharing. Our results show that as more and better data become available, reliance on risk sharing can be reduced whilst the use of risk adjustment can be expanded. In an additional analysis, we show that changes in the payment system affect the redistribution of claims costs across different levels of coverage. We discuss qualitatively additional measures that can be taken to achieve the desired level of redistribution.
papers.zh_title: 健康计划支付系统中风险调整与风险分担的结合：澳大利亚私人健康保险
papers.zh_abstract: 具有社区评级保费的健康计划支付系统通常包括风险调整、风险分担或两者兼有，以补偿保险公司对年轻健康人群的可预测利润和对老年及慢性病患者的可预测损失。本文展示了如何通过将风险分担与风险调整相结合来改进仅基于风险分担的支付系统（如澳大利亚）。以澳大利亚私人健康保险市场为案例，我们比较并评估了当前基于风险分担的支付系统与结合风险调整和风险分担的替代系统。具体而言，我们开发了结果指标，以比较各模型在风险选择激励和成本控制激励方面的表现。我们发现，由基于简单风险调整变量的风险调整并辅以异常值风险分担组成的支付系统，优于当前仅基于风险分担的系统。我们的结果表明，随着更多更好数据的可用，可以减少对风险分担的依赖，同时扩大风险调整的使用。在附加分析中，我们展示了支付系统的变化如何影响不同覆盖水平间的索赔成本再分配。我们定性讨论了为实现期望的再分配水平可以采取的额外措施。

papers.title: Attracting and Retaining Highly Effective Educators in Hard-to-Staff Schools
papers.authors: Andrew J. Morgan, Minh Nguyen, Eric A. Hanushek, Ben Ost, Steven G. Rivkin
papers.abstract: Efforts to attract and retain effective educators in high poverty public schools have had limited success. Dallas ISD addressed this challenge by using information produced by its evaluation and compensation reforms as the basis for effectiveness-adjusted payments that provided large compensating differentials to attract and retain effective teachers in its lowest achievement schools. The Accelerating Campus Excellence (ACE) program offers salary supplements to educators with records of high performance who are willing to work in the most educationally disadvantaged schools. We document that ACE resulted in immediate and sustained increases in student achievement, providing strong evidence that the multi-measure evaluation system identifies effective educators who foster the development of cognitive skills. The improvements at ACE schools were dramatic, bringing average achievement in the previously lowest performing schools close to the district average. When ACE stipends are largely eliminated, a substantial fraction of highly effective teachers leaves, and test scores fall. This highlights the central importance of the performance-based incentives to attract and retain effective educators in previously low-achievement schools.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：H0, I21, I28, J01, J45
papers.zh_title: 在难以配备人员的学校吸引和留住高效教育者
papers.zh_abstract: 在高贫困公立学校吸引和留住高效教育工作者的努力成效有限。达拉斯独立学区通过利用其评估和薪酬改革产生的信息，作为基于效能的支付基础，提供巨大的补偿差异，以吸引和留住其最低成就学校的有效教师，从而应对了这一挑战。“加速校园卓越”（ACE）项目向有高绩效记录且愿意在最教育弱势学校工作的教育者提供薪酬补贴。我们记录了ACE项目带来了学生成绩的即时和持续提升，提供了有力证据表明多维度评估系统能够识别培养认知技能的有效教育者。ACE学校的改善是显著的，使先前表现最差学校的平均成绩接近学区平均水平。当ACE津贴大幅取消时，相当一部分高效教师离开，考试成绩下降。这凸显了基于绩效的激励对于在先前低成就学校吸引和留住有效教育者的核心重要性。

papers.title: Inequality and Measured Growth
papers.authors: Ezra Oberfield
papers.abstract: Compared to a half-century ago, inequality in the United states has risen and measured productivity growth has fallen. Concerns about rising inequality have been exacerbated by the observation that prices of goods consumed by the poor have risen faster than prices of goods consumed by the rich. This paper presents an example of an economy that is consistent with these facts but in which the facts can be misleading about improvements in welfare. The two key ingredients are non-homothetic preferences and productivity improvements directed toward goods with larger market size. The model admits balanced growth despite the structural change induced by non-homothetic preferences. Along a BGP in which the distribution of after-tax income is stable, measured inflation among goods consumed by the bottom half of earners is perpetually higher than among goods consumed by the top half, but welfare improves at the same rate for all households. Across BGPs in which the only difference in primitives is the progressivity of the tax schedule, the BGP with a more unequal distribution of after-tax income exhibits lower measured growth of output and productivity. Nevertheless, welfare improves at the same rate along both BGPs. At the root of the deviation between productivity growth and welfare improvements is the fact that the value of cost reductions for a good are transitory if income effects eventually shrink the good's expenditure share. Standard measures of inflation capture the benefits of cost reductions among goods that are consumed contemporaneously, but only partly determine the evolution of price levels relevant for a household, as they do not capture the benefits from cost reductions that occur before the household shifts towards a good.
papers.zh_title: 不平等与测度增长
papers.zh_abstract: 与半个世纪前相比，美国的不平等程度上升，而测度的生产率增长下降。穷人消费商品的价格上涨速度快于富人消费商品的价格，这一观察加剧了人们对不平等加剧的担忧。本文提供了一个符合这些事实的经济体示例，但在此示例中，这些事实可能对福利改善产生误导。两个关键要素是非位似偏好以及生产率改进倾向于市场规模更大的商品。尽管非位似偏好引发了结构性变化，该模型仍允许平衡增长。在税后收入分配稳定的平衡增长路径上，收入后半部分人群消费商品的测度通胀率永久高于收入前半部分人群，但所有家庭的福利改善速度相同。在初始条件唯一差异是税收累进性的不同平衡增长路径之间，税后收入分配更不平等的平衡增长路径表现出更低的产出和生产率测度增长。然而，两条平衡增长路径上的福利改善速度相同。生产率增长与福利改善之间偏离的根源在于，如果收入效应最终缩小了某种商品的支出份额，那么该商品成本降低的价值就是暂时的。标准通胀指标捕捉了当期消费商品成本降低的收益，但仅部分决定了与家庭相关的价格水平的演变，因为它们未能捕捉家庭转向某种商品之前发生的成本降低收益。

papers.title: Beyond Pigou: Externalities and Civil Society in the Supply-Demand Framework
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: The extent of voluntary cooperation in the presence of externalities is shown as an equilibrium outcome in the supply and demand framework. The analysis uses familiar ingredients to provide a new way of understanding the results of the extensive literature beginning with Buchanan, Coase, Ostrom, Shapley, Telser, Tullock, and Williamson showing that a Pigouvian tax is not the only alternative to independently acting individuals who are coordinated merely through distorted market prices. Voluntary cooperation can have a far different incidence than Pigouvian taxes and subsidies while changing the character of the costs resulting from externalities. The paper discusses applications including forest management, volume discounts, residential associations, energy policy, the scope of planning of household activities, and the role of workplaces in preventing infectious disease.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：D62, D71, H23, L25
papers.zh_title: 超越庇古：供需框架中的外部性与公民社会
papers.zh_abstract: 在供需框架中，存在外部性时自愿合作的程度被展示为一种均衡结果。该分析使用熟悉的要素，提供了一种理解始于布坎南、科斯、奥斯特罗姆、沙普利、特尔瑟、塔洛克和威廉姆森的广泛文献结果的新方式，表明庇古税并非仅通过扭曲市场价格协调的独立行动个体的唯一替代方案。自愿合作可能具有与庇古税和补贴截然不同的影响范围，同时改变外部性所产生成本的性质。本文讨论了包括森林管理、批量折扣、住宅协会、能源政策、家庭活动规划范围以及工作场所在预防传染病中的作用等应用。

papers.title: Analyst Bias and Mispricing
papers.authors: Mark Grinblatt, Gergana Jostova, Alexander Philipov
papers.abstract: Cross-sectional forecasts of conservative and optimistic biases in analyst earnings estimates predict a stock's future returns, especially for firms that are hard to value. Trading strategies—whether based on the component of analyst bias that is correlated with major return anomalies or the component that is orthogonal to these anomalies—earn abnormal profits. The prevalence of optimistic analyst earnings estimates and rarity of conservative estimates emerges as a common link between anomaly-generating firm characteristics and subsequent negative alphas. For the vast majority of anomaly strategies, profitability disappears once we control for analyst bias.
papers.zh_title: 分析师偏差与错误定价
papers.zh_abstract: 分析师盈利预测中保守偏差和乐观偏差的横截面预测能够预测股票的未来收益，尤其是对于难以估值的公司。交易策略——无论是基于与主要回报异常相关的分析师偏差成分，还是与这些异常正交的成分——都能获得异常利润。乐观分析师盈利预测的普遍存在和保守预测的稀缺性，成为连接产生异常的公司特征与随后的负阿尔法之间的共同纽带。对于绝大多数异常策略而言，一旦我们控制了分析师偏差，其盈利能力就会消失。

papers.title: The Impact of the Level and Timing of Parental Resources on Child Development and Intergenerational Mobility
papers.authors: Sadegh Eshaghnia, James J. Heckman, Rasmus Landersø
papers.abstract: This study explores the relationships between parental resource trajectories and child development, and their implications for intergenerational mobility. By modifying child skill formation technology to incorporate new skills emerging during adolescence, we analyze the importance of the timing of family resources on life outcomes, such as educational attainment and participation in crime. Parental financial resources partially offset deficiencies in nonpecuniary inputs to children’s human capital, such as family stability. IGE estimates are less sensitive to parental and child reference ages but are strongly influenced by the choice of lifetime versus snapshot parental income measures.
papers.zh_title: 父母资源的水平与时机对儿童发展和代际流动性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了父母资源轨迹与儿童发展之间的关系，及其对代际流动性的影响。通过修改儿童技能形成技术以纳入青春期出现的新技能，我们分析了家庭资源时机对教育成就和犯罪参与等人生结果的重要性。父母的财务资源部分弥补了儿童人力资本非金钱投入（如家庭稳定性）的不足。代际收入弹性估计值对父母和子女的参考年龄不太敏感，但受到终身收入与快照收入衡量指标选择的强烈影响。

papers.title: Banking Crises in Historical Perspective
papers.authors: Carola Frydman, Chenzi Xu
papers.abstract: This article surveys the recent empirical literature on historical banking crises, defined as events taking place before 1980. Advances in data collection and identification have provided new insights into the causes and consequences of crises both immediately and over the long run. We highlight three overarching threads that emerge from the literature: first, leverage in the financial system is a systematic precursor to crises; second, crises have sizable negative effects on the real economy; and third, government interventions can ameliorate these effects. Contrasting historical episodes reveals that the process of crisis formation and evolution varies significantly across time and space. Thus, we also highlight specific institutions, regulations and historical contexts that give rise to these divergent experiences. We conclude by identifying important gaps in the literature and discussing avenues for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, IFM；JEL：E44, E58, G01, G21, N10, N20
papers.zh_title: 历史视角下的银行业危机
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综述了近期关于历史银行业危机（定义为1980年之前发生的事件）的实证文献。数据收集和识别方法的进步为危机的原因和后果（无论是即时影响还是长期影响）提供了新的见解。我们强调文献中出现的三个主要线索：首先，金融体系中的杠杆是危机的系统性前兆；其次，危机对实体经济产生显著的负面效应；第三，政府干预可以缓解这些效应。对比历史事件表明，危机的形成和演变过程在时间和空间上存在显著差异。因此，我们还强调了导致这些不同经历的具体制度、法规和历史背景。最后，我们指出了文献中的重要空白，并讨论了未来研究的途径。

papers.title: The Health Wedge and Labor Market Inequality
papers.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Casey C. McQuillan, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: Over half of the U.S. population receives health insurance through an employer, with employer premium contributions creating a flat "head tax" per worker, independent of their earnings. This paper develops and calibrates a stylized model of the labor market to explore how this uniquely American approach to financing health insurance contributes to labor market inequality. We consider a partial-equilibrium counterfactual in which employer-provided health insurance is instead financed by a statutory payroll tax on firms. We find that, under this counterfactual financing, in 2019 the college wage premium would have been 11 percent lower, non-college annual earnings would have been $1,700 (3 percent) higher, and non-college employment would have been nearly 500,000 higher. These calibrated labor market effects of switching from head-tax to payroll-tax financing are in the same ballpark as estimates of the impact of other leading drivers of labor market inequality, including changes in outsourcing, robot adoption, rising trade, unionization, and the real minimum wage. We also consider a separate partial-equilibrium counterfactual in which the current head-tax financing is maintained, but 2019 U.S. health care spending as a share of GDP is reduced to the Canadian share; here, we estimate that the 2019 college wage premium would have been 5 percent lower and non-college annual earnings would have been 5 percent higher. These findings suggest that health care costs and the financing of health insurance warrant greater attention in both public policy and research on U.S. labor market inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DAE, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H22, H24, I13, I14, J20, J31, J32, J38
papers.zh_title: 健康楔子与劳动力市场不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 超过一半的美国人口通过雇主获得健康保险，雇主的保费缴纳为每位工人创造了一笔与其收入无关的固定“人头税”。本文开发并校准了一个简化的劳动力市场模型，以探讨这种独特的美国式健康保险融资方式如何加剧劳动力市场不平等。我们考虑一个反事实的部分均衡情景，即雇主提供的健康保险改为由企业按工资税缴纳。我们发现，在这种反事实融资方式下，2019年大学工资溢价将降低11%，非大学年收入将增加1700美元（3%），非大学就业人数将增加近50万。这些从人头税融资转向工资税融资的校准劳动力市场效应，与其他主要劳动力市场不平等驱动因素（包括外包变化、机器人采用、贸易增长、工会化和实际最低工资）的估计影响大致相当。我们还考虑了另一个反事实的部分均衡情景，即维持当前的人头税融资方式，但将2019年美国医疗支出占GDP的比例降至加拿大水平；在此情景下，我们估计2019年大学工资溢价将降低5%，非大学年收入将增加5%。这些发现表明，医疗成本与健康保险融资方式在美国劳动力市场不平等的公共政策和研究中应得到更多关注。

papers.title: On the Law of the Household: The Principles Used by Parents in Disciplining Their Children
papers.authors: Steven Shavell
papers.abstract: In this article I first describe the basic principles that parents employ in disciplining their children. The description is based on a survey of parents, the major results of which are that parental sanctions are premised on wrongdoing—not on the mere causation of harm; that parental sanctions tend to be greater when wrongdoing results in harm than when it does not; that parental sanctions for intentionally harmful conduct exceed those for negligence; and that parental sanctions are not raised when the probability that wrongdoing would be discovered is low.\nI then develop a theory to explain the principles of discipline as functional for parents. The kernel of the theory is that the rules of discipline maximize the expected utility of parents—assuming that the utility of parents is reduced by the occurrence of harm and also reflects the well–being of their children.\nAfter elaborating the theory, I comment on several related issues, including the possible influence of childhood experience on our preferences as adults over legal rules; and I remark on the interpretation of the similarity between the principles of criminal law and those applied by parents in disciplining their children.
papers.meta: Programs：LE；JEL：D01, K00, K1, K10, K13, K14, K41
papers.zh_title: 论家庭法则：父母管教子女所采用的原则
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我首先描述了父母在管教子女时所采用的基本原则。该描述基于一项对父母的调查，其主要结果是：父母的惩罚以过错为前提——而非仅仅造成伤害；当过错导致伤害时，父母的惩罚往往比未导致伤害时更重；父母对故意伤害行为的惩罚超过对过失行为的惩罚；当过错被发现的可能性较低时，父母的惩罚不会提高。 然后，我发展了一个理论来解释这些管教原则对父母的功能性。该理论的核心是，管教规则最大化父母的期望效用——假设父母的效用因伤害的发生而降低，并且也反映了子女的福祉。 在阐述该理论之后，我评论了几个相关问题，包括童年经历对我们成年后法律规则偏好的可能影响；并讨论了刑法原则与父母管教子女所采用原则之间相似性的解释。

papers.title: Helping Small Businesses become more Data-Driven: A Field Experiment on eBay
papers.authors: Sagit Bar-Gill, Erik Brynjolfsson, Nir Hak
papers.abstract: As more and more activities in the economy become digitized, analytics and data-driven decision-making (DDD) are becoming increasingly important. The adoption of analytics and DDD has been slower in small-to-medium enterprises (SMEs) compared to large firms, and reliable causal estimates of the impacts of analytics tools for small businesses have been lacking. We derive experiment-based estimates of the effect of an analytics tool on SME outcomes, analyzing the randomized introduction of eBay’s Seller Hub (SH), a data-rich seller dashboard. We find that SH adoption is associated with increased DDD, and that access to SH increases e-retailers’ revenues by 3.6% on average, as more items are transacted and service quality increases, without increases in average prices. Our results suggest that analytics and DDD help SMEs establish a competitive advantage. Managerial practices play an important role in reaping the benefits from the analytics dashboard, as over a third of the SH impact is driven by active performance monitoring. This suggests that digital platforms could increase revenues by supporting the adoption of analytics tools by SMEs. Furthermore, policies supporting small businesses' transition to the data era could address gaps in analytics and data-driven decision-making (DDD) by providing access to tools such as SH, as well as offering appropriate managerial training.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：L1, L86, M15, M3, O3, O30
papers.zh_title: 帮助小企业更数据驱动：eBay上的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 随着经济中越来越多的活动数字化，分析和数据驱动决策变得越来越重要。与大型企业相比，中小型企业采用分析和数据驱动决策的速度较慢，并且缺乏关于分析工具对小型企业影响的可靠因果估计。我们通过分析eBay数据丰富的卖家仪表板“卖家中心”的随机引入，得出了分析工具对中小企业影响的基于实验的估计。我们发现，采用卖家中心与数据驱动决策的增加相关，并且访问卖家中心使电子零售商的收入平均增加3.6%，因为交易商品数量增加且服务质量提高，而平均价格并未上涨。我们的结果表明，分析和数据驱动决策有助于中小企业建立竞争优势。管理实践在从分析仪表板中获益方面发挥着重要作用，因为超过三分之一的卖家中心影响是由积极的绩效监控驱动的。这表明数字平台可以通过支持中小企业采用分析工具来增加收入。此外，支持小企业向数据时代过渡的政策可以通过提供诸如卖家中心等工具以及提供适当的管理培训，来解决分析和数据驱动决策方面的差距。

papers.title: Signals and Stigmas from Banking Interventions: Lessons from the Bank Holiday in 1933
papers.authors: Matthew S. Jaremski, Gary Richardson, Angela Vossmeyer
papers.abstract: A nationwide panic forced President Franklin Roosevelt to declare a banking holiday in March 1933. The government reopened banks sequentially using a process that sent noisy signals about banks’ health. New microdata reveals the public responded to these signals. Deposits at rapidly reopened banks grew quicker than deposits at comparable or stronger banks that reopened even a few days or weeks later. The stigma of late reopening lasted for a decade. This stigma shifted funds from stigmatized to lauded banks and among communities that they served, but the shift in funds across institutions and communities had no measurable impact on the rate at which localities recovered from the Great Depression.
papers.zh_title: 银行干预中的信号与污名：来自1933年银行假期的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 1933年3月，一场全国性的恐慌迫使富兰克林·罗斯福总统宣布银行假期。政府通过一个向公众传递银行健康状况嘈杂信号的过程，逐步重新开放银行。新的微观数据显示，公众对这些信号做出了反应。在快速重新开放的银行中，存款增长速度快于那些即使仅晚几天或几周重新开放的可比或更强健的银行。晚重新开放的污名持续了十年之久。这种污名将资金从受污名的银行转移到受赞誉的银行，并在它们所服务的社区之间转移，但这种跨机构和社区的资金转移对地方从大萧条中复苏的速度没有产生可衡量的影响。

papers.title: Identifying Preference for Early Resolution from Asset Prices
papers.authors: Hengjie Ai, Ravi Bansal, Hongye Guo, Amir Yaron
papers.abstract: This paper develops an asset market based test for preference for the timing of resolution of uncertainty. Our main theorem provides a characterization of preference for early resolution of uncertainty in terms of the risk premium of assets realized during the period when the informativeness of macroeconomic announcements is resolved. Empirically, we find support for preference for early resolution of uncertainty based on evidence on the dynamics of the implied volatility of S&P 500 index options before FOMC announcements.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：D0, D9, D91, G0
papers.zh_title: 从资产价格中识别对早期不确定性解决的偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种基于资产市场的检验方法，用于识别对不确定性解决时机的偏好。我们的主要定理以宏观经济公告信息含量得以解决的时期内实现资产的风险溢价，来刻画对早期不确定性解决的偏好。实证上，我们基于FOMC公告前标普500指数期权隐含波动率的动态证据，发现了对早期不确定性解决偏好的支持。

papers.title: Measuring the Characteristics and Employment Dynamics of U.S. Inventors
papers.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Nathan Goldschlag
papers.abstract: Innovation is a key driver of long run economic growth. Studying innovation requires a clear view of the characteristics and behavior of the individuals that create new ideas. A general lack of rich, large-scale data has constrained such analyses. We address this by introducing a new dataset linking patent inventors to survey, census, and administrative microdata at the U.S. Census Bureau. We use this data to provide a first look at the demographic characteristics, employer characteristics, earnings, and employment dynamics of inventors. These linkages, which will be available to researchers with approved access, dramatically increases the scope of what can be learned about inventors and innovative activity.
papers.zh_title: 衡量美国发明家的特征与就业动态
papers.zh_abstract: 创新是长期经济增长的关键驱动力。研究创新需要清晰了解创造新思想的个体的特征和行为。由于普遍缺乏丰富的大规模数据，此类分析一直受到限制。我们通过引入一个将专利发明人与美国人口普查局的调查、人口普查和行政微观数据相链接的新数据集来解决这一问题。我们利用这些数据首次揭示了发明家的人口特征、雇主特征、收入以及就业动态。这些链接——将向获得批准的研究人员开放——极大地扩展了关于发明家和创新活动所能了解的范围。

papers.title: Continuances and Uncertainty in the Course of Adjudication
papers.authors: Steven Shavell
papers.abstract: The myriad uncertainties common to the process of adjudication—concerning evidence that opposing parties will present, legal issues that will become relevant, illness of witnesses, and the like—lead to two social problems. First, when unanticipated events occur, the information that parties will be able to provide courts may be inadequate. And second, preparation effort invested by parties may be wasted: whereas parties will tend to prepare for numerous possible events in adjudication, many will not come to pass and thus much effort will be for nought. Both of these problems are addressed by the granting of continuances. Inability to present evidence for want of time will be directly remedied by the giving of continuances; and wasted preparation effort will be reduced because the ability to obtain continuances when uncertain events occur will lessen the need to prepare for them. But the use of continuances involves various costs of delay, meaning that the decision to grant continuances should be guided by an economic calculus.
