That calculus is developed in the theory presented in this article and the actual use of continuances is discussed.
papers.zh_title: 诉讼过程中的延期与不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 诉讼过程中普遍存在的各种不确定性——涉及对方当事人将提出的证据、将变得相关的法律问题、证人生病等——导致了两个社会问题。首先，当意外事件发生时，当事人能够向法院提供的信息可能不足。其次，当事人投入的准备努力可能被浪费：尽管当事人倾向于为诉讼中众多可能的事件做准备，但许多事件不会发生，因此大量努力将付诸东流。这两个问题都可以通过批准延期来解决。因时间不足而无法提交证据的问题将直接通过给予延期得到补救；而浪费的准备努力将减少，因为在不确定事件发生时获得延期的能力会降低为之准备的必要性。但使用延期会涉及各种延迟成本，这意味着批准延期的决定应受经济计算指导。本文提出的理论发展了这种计算，并讨论了延期的实际使用情况。

papers.title: Unpacking Social Capital
papers.authors: Ruben Durante, Nicola Mastrorocco, Luigi Minale, James M. Snyder Jr.
papers.abstract: We use novel and unique survey data from Italy to shed light on key questions regarding the measurement of social capital and the use of social capital indicators for empirical work. Our data cover a sample of over 600,000 respondents interviewed between 2000 and 2015. We identify four distinct components of social capital – i) social participation, ii) political participation, iii) trust in others, and iv) trust in institutions – and examine how they relate to each other. We then study how each dimension of social capital relates to various socioeconomic factors both at the individual and the aggregate level, and to various proxies of social capital commonly used in the literature. Finally, building on previous work, we investigate to what extent different dimensions of social capital predict differences in key economic, political, and health outcomes. Our findings support the view that social capital is a multifaceted object with multiple dimensions that, while related, are distinct from each other. Future work should take such multidimensionality into account and carefully consider what measure of social capital to use.
papers.zh_title: 解构社会资本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自意大利的新颖独特调查数据，阐明关于社会资本衡量以及社会资本指标在实证工作中使用的关键问题。我们的数据涵盖2000年至2015年间采访的超过60万受访者样本。我们识别出社会资本的四个不同组成部分——i) 社会参与，ii) 政治参与，iii) 对他人的信任，以及iv) 对机构的信任——并考察它们之间的相互关系。然后，我们研究社会资本的每个维度如何在个体和总体层面上与各种社会经济因素，以及与文献中常用的各种社会资本代理变量相关联。最后，基于先前的工作，我们探究不同维度的社会资本在多大程度上预测了关键经济、政治和健康结果的差异。我们的发现支持这样一种观点：社会资本是一个多面体，具有多个维度，这些维度虽然相关，但彼此不同。未来的工作应考虑这种多维性，并仔细考虑使用何种社会资本衡量指标。

papers.title: The Good Wife? Reputation Dynamics and Financial Decision-Making Inside the Household
papers.authors: Nina Buchmann, Pascaline Dupas, Roberta Ziparo
papers.abstract: We study the dynamic relationship between women's intra-household reputation and investment decisions. We consider household investments delegated to the wife in settings where wives perceived to be savvy investors by their husbands are entrusted with a larger budget share. We show, first theoretically, then empirically in a series of experiments in Malawi, that a signaling game can result: to maintain control over a larger budget share, wives (a) under-invest in novel goods with unknown but high expected returns; and (b) knowingly over-use low-return goods in order to hide bad purchase decisions---we call this the intra-household sunk cost effect. These dynamics have important implications for women's well-being as well as for the design of poverty alleviation programs.
papers.zh_title: 贤内助？家庭内部的声誉动态与财务决策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究女性在家庭内部声誉与投资决策之间的动态关系。我们考虑在丈夫认为妻子是精明投资者的情境下，委托给妻子的家庭投资，此时妻子被赋予更大的预算份额。我们首先在理论上，然后在马拉维的一系列实验中实证表明，一个信号博弈可能发生：为了维持对更大预算份额的控制，妻子们 (a) 对具有未知但高预期回报的新奇商品投资不足；以及 (b) 为了隐藏糟糕的购买决策而故意过度使用低回报商品——我们称之为家庭内部沉没成本效应。这些动态对女性福祉以及扶贫项目的设计具有重要影响。

papers.title: Inflation and Real Activity over the Business Cycle
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Giovanni Nicolò, Dongho Song
papers.abstract: We study the relation between inflation and real activity over the business cycle. We employ a Trend-Cycle VAR to control for low-frequency movements in inflation, unemployment, and growth that are pervasive in the post-WWII period. We show that cyclical fluctuations of inflation are related to cyclical movements in real activity and unemployment, in line with what is implied by the New Keynesian framework. We then discuss the reasons for which our results relying on a Trend-Cycle VAR differ from the findings of previous studies based on VAR analysis. We explain empirically and theoretically how to reconcile these differences.
papers.zh_title: 商业周期中的通胀与实际经济活动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究商业周期中通胀与实际经济活动之间的关系。我们采用趋势-周期向量自回归模型来控制二战后时期普遍存在的通胀、失业和增长的低频运动。我们表明，通胀的周期性波动与实际活动和失业的周期性运动相关，这与新凯恩斯框架所暗示的一致。然后，我们讨论基于趋势-周期向量自回归模型的结果为何与先前基于向量自回归分析的研究发现不同。我们从实证和理论上解释如何调和这些差异。

papers.title: Wayfair: A Step Towards the Destination, But Sales Tax Competition Remains
papers.authors: Donald Bruce, William F. Fox, Alannah M. Shute
papers.abstract: The U.S. Supreme Court decision in the landmark 2018 Wayfair case greatly improved state governments’ ability to enforce collection of sales taxes on a destination basis. This has reduced state tax competition with an essentially-untaxed internet, but has brought traditional cross-border shopping, which is often subject to origin taxation, back to prominence among policy makers and researchers. We provide a detailed discussion of state and local sales tax features and the extent to which they have fostered sales tax competition in recent decades. We then explore the extent to which greater destination taxation has influenced the location of (a) consumer purchases and (b) business locations using two different empirical approaches. First, we analyze county-level data for Tennessee and select surrounding states to provide suggestive evidence that sales tax collections have grown more in rural Tennessee counties and less in Tennessee border counties since Wayfair. Additionally, we show that collections have grown more since Wayfair in North Carolina counties along the Tennessee border, where the tax rate differential is on the order of 3.3 percentage points. Second, we examine state-level data to show that business applications have grown at much faster rates after Wayfair in states with the highest sales tax rates. We attribute this to the removal of the significant disincentive to establish sales tax nexus that dominated the pre-Wayfair environment.
papers.zh_title: Wayfair案：迈向目的地原则的一步，但销售税竞争依然存在
papers.zh_abstract: 美国最高法院在2018年具有里程碑意义的Wayfair案中的裁决，极大地提高了州政府按目的地原则强制征收销售税的能力。这减少了州与基本上免税的互联网之间的税收竞争，但使传统的跨境购物——通常受来源地征税——重新成为政策制定者和研究者的关注焦点。我们详细讨论了州和地方销售税的特征，以及它们在近几十年来在多大程度上促进了销售税竞争。然后，我们使用两种不同的实证方法，探讨更大程度的目的地征税在多大程度上影响了 (a) 消费者购买地点和 (b) 企业选址。首先，我们分析田纳西州及周边选定州的县级数据，提供暗示性证据表明，自Wayfair案以来，田纳西州农村县的销售税收入增长更多，而田纳西州边境县的销售税收入增长较少。此外，我们显示，自Wayfair案以来，北卡罗来纳州沿田纳西州边境的县（税率差异约为3.3个百分点）的税收收入增长更多。其次，我们考察州级数据，表明自Wayfair案以来，销售税率最高的州的企业申请增长速度要快得多。我们将此归因于消除了在Wayfair案前主导环境中的、建立销售税关联的重大抑制因素。

papers.title: The Effects of Comprehensive Pay Reform on Achievement in Urban Schools
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Jin Luo, Andrew J. Morgan, Minh Nguyen, Ben Ost, Steven G. Rivkin, Ayman Shakeel
papers.abstract: Academic performance of disadvantaged students has been stubbornly hard to improve, particularly in urban schools. The Dallas Independent School District (Dallas ISD) addressed this problem in 2015 with a radical change in the structure of teacher compensation, basing it entirely on classroom effectiveness as determined by an evaluation system incorporating achievement growth, classroom observations and student surveys. We evaluate this institutional change with synthetic control methods that compare math and reading achievement in Dallas ISD schools with achievement for schools in other high-poverty Texas districts. We find large and significant positive effects on math achievement that increase steadily over time. For reading, there is no clear evidence of improvement in Dallas ISD relative to the synthetic control. A mechanism analysis shows that changes in teacher composition account for a majority of the math achievement increase.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：H75, I20, I21, J30, J45
papers.zh_title: 综合薪酬改革对城市学校学业成绩的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 弱势学生的学业成绩一直难以改善，尤其是在城市学校。达拉斯独立学区（Dallas ISD）在2015年通过彻底改变教师薪酬结构来解决这一问题，将薪酬完全基于课堂有效性，而课堂有效性由包含学业成长、课堂观察和学生调查的评估体系决定。我们使用合成控制方法评估了这一制度变革，将达拉斯ISD学校的数学和阅读成绩与其他德克萨斯州高贫困地区的学校成绩进行比较。我们发现，对数学成绩产生了显著且持续增长的正向影响。在阅读方面，没有明确证据表明达拉斯ISD相对于合成控制组有所改善。机制分析表明，教师构成的变化解释了数学成绩提升的大部分原因。

papers.title: The Canary in the Coal Decline: Appalachian Household Finance and the Transition from Fossil Fuels
papers.authors: Josh Blonz, Brigitte Roth Tran, Erin E. Troland
papers.abstract: The energy transition away from fossil fuels, despite its substantial overall climate benefits, presents significant transition risks for communities historically built around the fossil fuel industry. This paper uses the decline in the Appalachian coal industry between 2011 and 2018 to understand how individuals are harmed by a reduction in local fossil fuel extraction activity. We use individual-level credit data and exogenous variation in coal demand from the electricity sector to identify how the coal mining industry’s decline affected the finances of Appalachian households. We find that the decline in demand for coal caused broad-based negative impacts, decreasing credit scores and increasing credit utilization, delinquencies, amounts in third party collections, bankruptcy rates, and the number of individuals with subprime status. These effects were broad based and cannot be explained solely by individuals who lost coal mining jobs. Individuals with the lowest pre-period credit scores were more likely to end up in financial distress and experienced a greater deterioration in credit scores. Quantile regressions show that the drop in credit scores from the coal decline was most pronounced between the 30th and 50th percentiles of the credit score distribution. Our results provide evidence that people living in fossil fuel extraction regions are likely to experience declines in financial well-being from the energy transition even if they do not directly work in the affected industry.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：D14, G51, L71, Q52, Q54, R11
papers.zh_title: 煤炭衰退中的预警：阿巴拉契亚家庭金融与化石燃料转型
papers.zh_abstract: 远离化石燃料的能源转型，尽管具有显著的整体气候效益，但对历史上围绕化石燃料产业建立的社区构成了重大的转型风险。本文利用2011年至2018年间阿巴拉契亚煤炭产业的衰退，来理解当地化石燃料开采活动减少如何对个人造成损害。我们使用个人层面的信贷数据以及来自电力部门的煤炭需求外生变化，来识别煤炭开采业的衰退如何影响阿巴拉契亚家庭的财务状况。我们发现，煤炭需求下降造成了广泛的负面影响，降低了信用评分，并提高了信贷利用率、违约率、第三方催收金额、破产率以及次级信用状态的人数。这些影响是广泛的，不能仅由失去煤炭开采工作的个人来解释。基期信用评分最低的个人更有可能陷入财务困境，并经历信用评分的更大恶化。分位数回归显示，煤炭衰退导致的信用评分下降在信用评分分布的第30至第50百分位数之间最为显著。我们的结果提供了证据，表明生活在化石燃料开采地区的人们，即使不直接受雇于受影响的行业，也可能因能源转型而经历财务福祉的下降。

papers.title: Environmentally-Inclined Politicians and Local Environmental Performance: Evidence from Publicly Listed Firms in China
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Honglin Ren, Danwen Song, Nianhang Xu
papers.abstract: We study how environmentally-inclined politicians (EIPs), i.e., politicians with prior environment-related working experience, affect local environmental performance in China. Firms located in cities with EIPs have lower levels of sulfur dioxide (SO2) emissions. The effect is attenuated when the politician is in his/her second term and among firms that are economically important. Firms in cities with EIPs commit less environmental violations, receive more green subsidies from the local government, and choose to establish new polluting subsidiaries in cities without EIPs. Furthermore, these EIPs do not have inferior economic performance and their promotion likelihood is negatively related to local emission levels. The findings overall suggest that local officials strategically leverage their expertise in environment protection to allocate more effort on environmental causes.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, PE；JEL：D72, G38, H75, Q53
papers.zh_title: 环保倾向型政治家与地方环境绩效：来自中国上市公司的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了环保倾向型政治家（EIPs），即具有先前环境相关工作经历的政治家，如何影响中国的地方环境绩效。位于有EIPs城市的公司，其二氧化硫（SO2）排放水平较低。当政治家处于第二任期时，以及在经济上重要的公司中，这种效应会减弱。在有EIPs的城市中，公司较少发生环境违规行为，从地方政府获得更多绿色补贴，并选择在没有EIPs的城市设立新的污染子公司。此外，这些EIPs并未表现出较差的经济绩效，其晋升可能性与当地排放水平呈负相关。总体而言，研究结果表明，地方官员战略性地利用其在环境保护方面的专业知识，将更多精力分配于环境事业。

papers.title: Fertility in the Heart of the COVID-19 Storm
papers.authors: Daniel L. Dench, Wenhui Li, Theodore J. Joyce, Howard Minkoff, Gretchen Van Wye
papers.abstract: We describe how the COVID-19 pandemic affected reproductive choices in New York City, the most acutely impacted area of the United States. We contrast changes in New York City with reproductive outcomes in the rest of the US. We find that births to New York City residents fell 8.4% more between March, 2020 and February 2021 than that would have been expected given trends leading up to the pandemic. Births to US-born residents of New York City fell 5.5% over the same year, triple the observed decline in the rest of the US. Births to foreign-born New York City residents fell 11.4%, twice the decline observed in the rest of the US. Reported induced abortions to New York City residents fell precipitously whereas induced abortions nation-wide rose slightly. The acute downturn and robust recovery in births in New York City maps closely with the spike in mortality and its equally rapid decline three months later. We conclude that the fear and uncertainty in the early months of the pandemic is the best explanation for the sudden, but brief drop in births in New York City.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情风暴中心的生育率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了COVID-19疫情如何影响纽约市（美国受影响最严重的地区）的生育选择。我们将纽约市的变化与美国其他地区的生育结果进行了对比。我们发现，在2020年3月至2021年2月期间，纽约市居民的出生人数比根据疫情前趋势预期的水平下降了8.4%。同期，纽约市美国出生居民的出生人数下降了5.5%，是美国其他地区观察到的下降幅度的三倍。纽约市外国出生居民的出生人数下降了11.4%，是美国其他地区观察到的下降幅度的两倍。纽约市居民的报告人工流产数量急剧下降，而全美范围内的人工流产数量略有上升。纽约市出生人数的急剧下降和强劲复苏，与三个月后死亡率的飙升及其同样迅速的下降密切相关。我们得出结论，疫情最初几个月的恐惧和不确定性是纽约市出生人数突然但短暂下降的最佳解释。

papers.title: Timing Matters: Intra-day Shifts of Economic Activity and Ambient Ozone Concentrations
papers.authors: David B. Adler, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: Ground-level ozone has been shown to have significant negative health externalities from short-term exposure, and as such has been regulated by the U.S. Clean Air Act since the 1970s. Ozone is not emitted directly; instead formation occurs due to a complex Leontief-like combination of air pollutants, under sunlight and warm temperatures, that results in high levels mid-day and low levels at night. Despite this known relationship, EPA regulations mostly consider the total emissions of ozone precursors and not when these emissions occur. Using hourly data on ambient ozone from 1980-2017 near the U.S. time zone borders, we provide evidence that the 1-hour time difference on either side of a border leads to a nontrivial change in ozone levels in certain hours of the day. We then examine a cap-and-trade program targeting ozone precursor emissions – the NOx Budget Program – finding that while it reduced ozone overall it did not have an economically significant effect on the timing of those emissions. We conclude by outlining a possible policy approach to account for the time-varying value of reductions in ozone precursor emissions.
papers.zh_title: 时机至关重要：经济活动日内变化与地面臭氧浓度
papers.zh_abstract: 已有研究表明，短期暴露于地面臭氧会产生显著的负面健康外部性，因此自1970年代以来，美国《清洁空气法》一直对其进行监管。臭氧并非直接排放；其形成是由于空气污染物在阳光和温暖温度下发生复杂的类似里昂惕夫式的组合，导致中午浓度高而夜间浓度低。尽管存在这种已知关系，美国环保署的法规主要考虑臭氧前体物的总排放量，而不考虑这些排放发生的时间。利用1980年至2017年美国时区边界附近的地面臭氧小时数据，我们提供了证据表明，边界两侧1小时的时差导致一天中某些小时的臭氧水平发生显著变化。然后，我们考察了一个针对臭氧前体物排放的总量控制与交易计划——氮氧化物预算计划，发现虽然它总体上减少了臭氧，但对这些排放的时间安排没有产生经济上显著的影响。最后，我们概述了一种可能的政策方法，以考虑减少臭氧前体物排放的时变价值。

papers.title: An Intangibles-Adjusted Profitability Factor
papers.authors: Ravi Jagannathan, Robert Korajczyk, Kai Wang
papers.abstract: We treat expenditures that create intangible assets as investments and instead of expensing them, we add them back to earnings when measuring the return on equity of firms while constructing the profitability factor in the Fama and French (2015) five factor model. The profitability factor we construct has significant alpha relative to many extant multi-factor asset-pricing models, including the standard Fama-French five factor model. When the profitability factor in the Fama and French (2015) five factor model is replaced with our intangibles adjusted profitability factor, the model performs better in explaining the cross section of stock returns, and several anomalies documented in the literature. Portfolios that exploit price momentum, earnings momentum, and operating leverage no longer have significant alphas. The improvement is consistent with the dividend discount model for equity valuation. Adjusted earnings constructed by treating expenditures that create intangible assets as investments help forecast the cross section of future cash dividends and operating cash flows on stocks better, especially at longer horizons. Adopting our adjustment when constructing the monthly rebalanced profitability factor in the Hou et al. (2015) four factor model improves its performance as well. Our intangible adjusted profitability factor has smaller left tail risk and co-tail risk with the market when compared to the standard profitability factor.
papers.zh_title: 无形资产调整后的盈利能力因子
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将创造无形资产的支出视为投资，而不是将其费用化，在构建Fama和French（2015）五因子模型中的盈利能力因子时，将其加回收益以衡量公司的股本回报率。我们构建的盈利能力因子相对于许多现有的多因子资产定价模型（包括标准的Fama-French五因子模型）具有显著的阿尔法值。当Fama和French（2015）五因子模型中的盈利能力因子被我们的无形资产调整后的盈利能力因子替代时，该模型在解释股票回报横截面以及文献中记录的若干异象方面表现更好。利用价格动量、盈利动量和经营杠杆的投资组合不再具有显著的阿尔法值。这种改进与股权估值的股息贴现模型一致。通过将创造无形资产的支出视为投资而构建的调整后收益，有助于更好地预测股票未来现金股息和经营现金流的横截面，尤其是在更长的预测期内。在构建Hou等人（2015）四因子模型中每月再平衡的盈利能力因子时采用我们的调整，也改善了其表现。与标准盈利能力因子相比，我们的无形资产调整后的盈利能力因子具有更小的左尾风险以及与市场的共同尾部风险。

papers.title: Disasters with Unobservable Duration and Frequency: Intensified Responses and Diminished Preparedness
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Timothy Johnson, Suresh Sundaresan, Steven Zheng
papers.abstract: We study an economy subject to recurrent disasters when the frequency and duration of the disasters are unobservable parameters. Imprecise information about transition intensities increases the probability of the current state effectively lasting forever. In a disaster, uncertainty about duration makes disasters subjectively much worse and can make the welfare value of information extremely high. However, in advance of a disaster, uncertainty about the arrival rate can be welfare-increasing. Agents optimally invest less in mitigation than under full information and pay less for insurance against the next disaster.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：D6, D8, E21, E32, G10
papers.zh_title: 频率和持续时间不可观测的灾难：加剧的反应与减弱的准备
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个遭受反复灾难的经济体，其中灾难的频率和持续时间是不可观测的参数。关于转移强度的不精确信息增加了当前状态实际上永久持续的概率。在灾难中，关于持续时间的不确定性使得灾难在主观上变得严重得多，并可能使信息的福利价值极高。然而，在灾难发生之前，关于到达率的不确定性可能会增加福利。代理人最优地投入于减灾的努力少于完全信息下的情况，并且为下一次灾难支付的保险费用也更少。

papers.title: M&A and Technological Expansion
papers.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Mario Leccese, Liad Wagman
papers.abstract: We examine how public firms listed in North American stock exchanges acquire technology companies during 2010-2020. Combining data from S&P, Refinitiv, Compustat, and CRSP, and utilizing a unique S&P taxonomy that classifies tech M&As by tech categories and business verticals, we show that 13.1% of public firms engage in any tech M&A in the S&P data, while only 6.75% of public firms make any (tech or non-tech) M&A in Refinitiv. In both datasets, the acquisitions are widespread across sectors of the economy, but tech acquirers in the S&P data are on average younger, more investment efficient, and more likely to engage in international acquisitions than general acquirers in Refinitiv. Within the S&P data, deals in each M&A-active tech category tend to be led by acquirers from a specific sector; the majority of target companies in tech M&As fall outside the acquirer’s core area of business; and firms are, in part, driven to acquire tech companies because they face increased competition in their core areas.
papers.zh_title: 并购与技术扩张
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2010-2020年间在北美证券交易所上市的公众公司如何收购科技公司。结合来自S&P、Refinitiv、Compustat和CRSP的数据，并利用S&P独特的按技术类别和业务垂直领域对科技并购进行分类的分类法，我们显示13.1%的公众公司在S&P数据中参与了任何科技并购，而只有6.75%的公众公司在Refinitiv中进行了任何（科技或非科技）并购。在两个数据集中，收购广泛分布于经济各部门，但S&P数据中的科技收购方平均而言比Refinitiv中的一般收购方更年轻、投资效率更高，且更可能进行国际收购。在S&P数据内部，每个并购活跃的技术类别中的交易往往由来自特定行业的收购方主导；科技并购中的大多数目标公司属于收购方核心业务领域之外；企业收购科技公司的部分原因是其在核心领域面临日益激烈的竞争。

papers.title: Modeling Managers As EPS Maximizers
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Alexander M. Chinco
papers.abstract: Textbook theory assumes that firm managers maximize the net present value of future cash flows. But when you ask them, the people running large public corporations say that they are maximizing something else entirely: earnings per share (EPS). Perhaps this is a mistake. No matter. We take managers at their word and show that EPS maximization provides a single unified explanation for a wide range of corporate policies such as leverage, share issuance and repurchases, M&A payment method, cash accumulation, and capital budgeting.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G30, G31, G32, G34, G35
papers.zh_title: 将管理者建模为每股收益最大化者
papers.zh_abstract: 教科书理论假设企业管理者最大化未来现金流的净现值。但当你询问他们时，大型上市公司的负责人表示他们正在最大化完全不同的东西：每股收益（EPS）。也许这是一个错误。没关系。我们相信管理者的话，并表明每股收益最大化为一系列广泛的公司政策提供了单一统一的解释，例如杠杆、股票发行与回购、并购支付方式、现金积累和资本预算。

papers.title: Are Inflationary Shocks Regressive? A Feasible Set Approach
papers.authors: Felipe N. Del Canto, John R. Grigsby, Eric Qian, Conor Walsh
papers.abstract: We develop a framework to measure the welfare impact of inflationary shocks throughout the distribution. The first-order impact of a shock is summarized by the induced movements in agents' feasible sets: their budget constraint and borrowing constraints. To measure this impact, we combine estimated impulse response functions with micro-data on household consumption bundles, asset holdings and labor income for different US households. We find that inflationary oil shocks are regressive, but monetary expansions are progressive, and there is substantial heterogeneity throughout the life cycle. In both cases, the dominant channel is the effect of the shock on asset prices, not movements in goods prices or labor income.
papers.zh_title: 通胀冲击是累退的吗？一个可行集方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个框架来衡量通胀冲击在整个分布中的福利影响。冲击的一阶影响由其在主体可行集（预算约束和借贷约束）中引发的变动来概括。为了衡量这种影响，我们将估计的脉冲响应函数与不同美国家庭的消费篮子、资产持有和劳动收入的微观数据相结合。我们发现通胀性石油冲击是累退的，但货币扩张是累进的，并且在整个生命周期中存在显著的异质性。在这两种情况下，主导渠道是冲击对资产价格的影响，而非商品价格或劳动收入的变动。

papers.title: Merger Effects and Antitrust Enforcement: Evidence from US Consumer Packaged Goods
papers.authors: Vivek Bhattacharya, Gastón Illanes, David Stillerman
papers.abstract: We document the effects of a comprehensive set of mergers of US consumer packaged goods manufacturers on prices, quantities, and product assortment. Across specifications, we find a small average price effect of mergers (-0.6% to 1.0%) but substantial heterogeneity in effects, with a standard deviation between 4.0–7.5 pp. Through a model of enforcement, we find that agencies act as if they challenge mergers they expect would increase prices more than 4.8–6.3%. Increases in stringency would reduce prices and the prevalence of completed price-increasing mergers, with minimal impacts on blocked price-decreasing mergers, at a significantly greater agency burden.
papers.zh_title: 并购效应与反垄断执法：来自美国消费包装品的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了美国消费包装品制造商一系列全面并购对价格、数量和产品组合的影响。在各种设定下，我们发现并购的平均价格效应很小（-0.6%至1.0%），但效应存在显著异质性，标准差在4.0-7.5个百分点之间。通过一个执法模型，我们发现执法机构的行为似乎表明，它们会挑战那些预期会导致价格上涨超过4.8-6.3%的并购。提高执法严格程度将降低价格和已完成的价格上涨型并购的普遍性，同时对被阻止的价格下降型并购影响极小，但会显著增加机构负担。

papers.title: Large Language Models as Simulated Economic Agents: What Can We Learn from Homo Silicus?
papers.authors: John J. Horton, Apostolos Filippas, Benjamin S. Manning
papers.abstract: We argue that newly-developed large language models (LLMs), because of how they are trained and designed, are implicit computational models of humans—a Homo silicus. LLMs can be used like economists use Homo economicus: they can be given endowments, information, preferences, and so on, and then their behavior can be explored in scenarios via simulation. Experiments using this approach, derived from Charness and Rabin (2002), Kahneman et al. (1986), Samuelson and Zeckhauser (1988), Oprea (2024b), and Horton (2025), show qualitatively similar results to the original, and when they differ, it is often generative for future research. We discuss potential applications, conceptual issues, and why this approach can inform the study of humans.
papers.zh_title: 作为模拟经济主体的大型语言模型：我们能从Homo Silicus中学到什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，新开发的大型语言模型（LLM），由于其训练和设计方式，是人类的隐式计算模型——一种Homo silicus。LLM可以像经济学家使用Homo economicus那样被使用：它们可以被赋予禀赋、信息、偏好等，然后通过模拟在各种场景中探索其行为。使用这种方法进行的实验，源自Charness和Rabin（2002）、Kahneman等人（1986）、Samuelson和Zeckhauser（1988）、Oprea（2024b）以及Horton（2025），显示出与原始研究定性相似的结果，而当结果不同时，这往往对未来研究具有生成性。我们讨论了潜在应用、概念问题以及为什么这种方法可以为人类研究提供信息。

papers.title: Asset Pricing with Optimal Under-Diversification
papers.authors: Vadim Elenev, Tim Landvoigt
papers.abstract: We study sources and implications of undiversified portfolios in a production-based asset pricing model with financial frictions. Households take concentrated positions in a single firm exposed to idiosyncratic shocks because managerial effort requires equity stakes, and because investors gain private benefits from concentrated holdings. Matching data on returns and portfolios, we find that the marginal investor optimally holds 45% of their portfolio in a single firm, incentivizing managerial effort that accounts for 4% of aggregate output. Investors derive control benefits equivalent to 3% points of excess return, rationalizing low observed returns on undiversified holdings in the data. A counterfactual world of full diversification would feature higher risk free rates, lower risk premiums on fully diversified and concentrated assets, less capital accumulation, yet higher consumption and welfare. Exposure to undiversified firm risk can explain approximately 40% of the level and 20% of the volatility of the equity premium. A targeted subsidy that decreases diversification improves welfare by increasing managerial effort and reducing financial frictions.
papers.zh_title: 最优分散不足下的资产定价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有金融摩擦的生产型资产定价模型中研究了非分散化投资组合的来源和影响。由于管理层的努力需要股权激励，且投资者从集中持股中获得私人利益，家庭将集中投资于单一面临特质冲击的企业。通过匹配收益率和投资组合数据，我们发现边际投资者最优地将45%的投资组合持有于单一企业，这激励了管理层努力，其贡献约占总体产出的4%。投资者获得的控制权收益相当于3个百分点的超额收益，从而解释了数据中观察到的非分散化持股的低收益率。一个完全分散化的反事实世界将具有更高的无风险利率、更低的完全分散化和集中化资产的风险溢价、更少的资本积累，但更高的消费和福利。暴露于非分散化的企业风险可以解释约40%的股权溢价水平和20%的波动率。一项旨在降低分散化的定向补贴通过增加管理层努力和减少金融摩擦来改善福利。

papers.title: Skill Depreciation during Unemployment: Evidence from Panel Data
papers.authors: Jonathan P. Cohen, Andrew C. Johnston, Attila S. Lindner
papers.abstract: We use a panel of survey responses linked to administrative data in Germany to measure the depreciation of skills while workers are unemployed. Both the reemployment hazard rate and reemployment earnings steadily fall with unemployment duration, and indicators of depression and loneliness rise substantially. Despite this, we find no decline in a wide range of cognitive and noncognitive skills while workers remain unemployed. We find the same pattern in a panel of American workers. The results imply that skill depreciation in general human capital is unlikely to be a major explanation for duration dependence.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：I32, J24, J6, J60, J64
papers.zh_title: 失业期间的技能折旧：来自面板数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国与行政数据关联的调查响应面板数据，衡量工人失业期间的技能折旧。再就业风险率和再就业收入均随失业持续时间稳步下降，而抑郁和孤独感指标则显著上升。尽管如此，我们发现工人在失业期间，一系列认知和非认知技能并未出现下降。我们在美国工人面板数据中也发现了相同的模式。结果表明，通用人力资本的技能折旧不太可能是持续时间依赖性的主要解释因素。

papers.title: Equity Term Structures without Dividend Strips Data
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Bryan T. Kelly, Serhiy Kozak
papers.abstract: We use a large cross-section of equity returns to estimate a rich affine model of equity prices, dividends, returns and their dynamics. Using the model, we price dividend strips of the aggregate market index, as well as any other well-diversified equity portfolio. We do not use any dividend strips data in the estimation of the model; however, model-implied equity yields generated by the model match closely the equity yields from the traded dividend forwards reported in the literature. Our model can be used to extend the data on the term structure of aggregate (market) discount rates over time (back to the 1970s) and across maturities, since we are not limited by the maturities of actually traded dividend claims. Most importantly, the model generates term structures for any portfolio of stocks (e.g., small and value portfolios, high and low investment portfolios, etc). The novel cross-section of term structure data estimated by our model, covering a span of 45 years that includes several recessions, represents a rich set of new empirical moments that can be used to guide and evaluate asset pricing models, beyond the aggregate term structure of dividend strips that has been studied in the literature.
papers.zh_title: 无股息剥离数据下的权益期限结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用大量横截面的股票收益率数据，估计了一个关于股票价格、股息、收益率及其动态的丰富仿射模型。利用该模型，我们为整体市场指数以及任何其他充分分散化的股票投资组合的股息剥离进行定价。在模型估计中，我们未使用任何股息剥离数据；然而，模型隐含的权益收益率与文献中报告的交易股息远期合约的权益收益率高度吻合。我们的模型可用于扩展整体（市场）贴现率期限结构的时间跨度（回溯至1970年代）和期限范围，因为我们不受实际交易股息索取权期限的限制。最重要的是，该模型能为任何股票投资组合（例如小盘股和价值股组合、高投资和低投资组合等）生成期限结构。我们的模型估计出的新颖横截面期限结构数据，覆盖了包含多次衰退的45年跨度，代表了丰富的新经验矩集合，可用于指导和评估资产定价模型，超越了文献中已研究的股息剥离整体期限结构。

papers.title: Derisking Real Estate in China’s Hybrid Economy
papers.authors: Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: This article examines the risks faced by China's real estate sector within its distinct hybrid economy, which combines market mechanisms with comprehensive state planning and government intervention. The real estate sector holds particular importance as land sale revenues are a crucial source of funding for local governments, enabling them to finance infrastructure projects and stimulate economic growth. Banks are highly exposed to debt secured by real estate properties, not only involving real estate firms and households but also extending to local governments and affiliated companies. The hybrid structure gives the government a strong commitment and the ability to delay a real estate crisis. However, China’s real estate risk is ultimately tied to the country’s overall economic growth and remains susceptible to policy-related risks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM；JEL：O18, O2, R0
papers.zh_title: 中国混合经济中的房地产去风险化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了中国房地产行业在其独特的混合经济中所面临的风险，这种经济结合了市场机制与全面的国家规划和政府干预。房地产行业尤为重要，因为土地出让收入是地方政府的关键资金来源，使其能够为基础设施项目融资并刺激经济增长。银行对以房地产为抵押的债务敞口很高，不仅涉及房地产企业和家庭，还延伸至地方政府及其关联公司。这种混合结构赋予了政府推迟房地产危机的强烈承诺和能力。然而，中国的房地产风险最终与该国的整体经济增长挂钩，并且仍然容易受到政策相关风险的影响。

papers.title: Dreaming of Leaving the Nest? Immigration Status and the Living Arrangements of DACAmented
papers.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Jakub Lonsky
papers.abstract: This study investigates the effects of the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) on the living arrangements and housing behavior of undocumented immigrants in the U.S. Using an event-study approach and difference-in-differences (DID) estimates, we compared immigrants above and below eligibility cutoffs and demonstrated that, after the adoption of the policy in June 2012, DACA-eligible immigrants were less likely to live with their parents or in multigenerational households (-12.5%) and more likely to live independently (+15.5%). We also revealed that DACA-eligible immigrants were less likely to live in the same house (-2%) and more likely to quit ethnic enclaves (+8%). Notably, these patterns are not explained by the known effects of DACA on income and employment outcomes. Lower rental costs (-3%) may have facilitated this transition into adulthood and the observed trends in living arrangements. The DACA also led to a decline in marriage rates among DACA-eligible individuals, although we found no evidence of significant effects on cohabitation, divorce, and intermarriage. We also found no evidence of a clear impact on fertility.
papers.zh_title: 梦想离开巢穴？移民身份与DACA受益者的居住安排
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了童年入境暂缓遣返计划（DACA）对美国无证移民居住安排和住房行为的影响。采用事件研究法和双重差分估计，我们比较了资格门槛上下移民的情况，并证明在2012年6月该政策实施后，DACA合格移民与父母同住或生活在多代同堂家庭的可能性降低（-12.5%），而独立生活的可能性增加（+15.5%）。我们还发现，DACA合格移民居住在同一房屋的可能性降低（-2%），离开族裔聚居区的可能性增加（+8%）。值得注意的是，这些模式无法用DACA对收入和就业结果的已知影响来解释。较低的租金成本（-3%）可能促进了这种向成年的过渡以及观察到的居住安排趋势。DACA还导致DACA合格个体的结婚率下降，尽管我们没有发现对同居、离婚和通婚有显著影响的证据。我们也没有发现对生育率有明显影响的证据。

papers.title: On the Efficiency of Competitive Equilibria with Pandemics
papers.authors: V. V. Chari, Rishabh Kirpalani, Luis Perez
papers.abstract: The epidemiological literature suggests that virus transmission occurs only when individuals are in relatively close contact. We show that if society can control the extent to which economic agents are exposed to the virus and agents can commit to contracts, virus externalities are local, and competitive equilibria are efficient. The Second Welfare Theorem also holds. These results still apply when infection status is imperfectly observed and when agents are privately informed about their infection status. If society cannot control virus exposure, then virus externalities are global and competitive equilibria are inefficient, but the policy implications are very different from those in the literature. Economic activity in this version of our model can be inefficiently low, in contrast to the conventional wisdom that viruses create global externalities and result in inefficiently high economic activity. If agents cannot commit, competitive equilibria are inefficient because of a novel pecuniary externality.
papers.zh_title: 论存在流行病时竞争性均衡的效率
papers.zh_abstract: 流行病学文献表明，病毒传播仅发生在个体相对密切接触时。我们证明，如果社会能够控制经济主体暴露于病毒的程度，且主体能够承诺合约，那么病毒外部性是局部的，竞争性均衡是有效的。第二福利定理也成立。当感染状态被不完全观察以及主体私下知晓自身感染状态时，这些结果仍然适用。如果社会无法控制病毒暴露，那么病毒外部性是全局的，竞争性均衡是低效的，但政策含义与文献中的截然不同。在我们模型的这个版本中，经济活动可能低效地低，这与传统观点——病毒产生全局外部性并导致经济活动低效地高——形成对比。如果主体无法承诺，由于一种新颖的货币外部性，竞争性均衡是低效的。

papers.title: Is the Global Economy Deglobalizing? And if so, why? And what is next?
papers.authors: Pinelopi K. Goldberg, Tristan Reed
papers.abstract: Data on global trade as well as capital and labor flows indicate a slowdown, but not reversal, of globalization post the 2008-09 financial crisis. Yet profound changes in the policy environment and public sentiment in the largest economies over the past five years suggest the beginning of a new era. Increasing anxiety about the labor market effects of import competition from low-wage countries, especially China, laid the groundwork, but was not the catalyst for the reversal in attitudes towards globalization. Similarly, the COVID pandemic provided novel arguments against free trade based on global supply chain resilience, but neither the pandemic nor short run policy response had enduring effects on trade flows. We demonstrate that global trade was remarkably resilient during the pandemic and that supply shortages would likely have been more severe in the absence of international trade. After a temporary decline in 2020, global trade in goods and services increased sharply in 2021. Russia’s invasion of Ukraine raised new concerns about national security and the exposure of supply chains to geopolitical risk. This was followed by demands to diversify away from “non-friendly” countries and to the employment of trade policy, export restrictions in particular, to halt China’s technological development. The future of globalization is highly uncertain at this point, but these new policies will likely slow global growth, innovation, and poverty reduction even if they benefit certain industries in certain countries. Regarding resilience, the main goal of recent trade policy changes, measures of trade volatility or concentration can be helpful, but resilience will be elusive as long as we lack benchmarks against which policy performance can be measured.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, IFM, ITI；JEL：F0, F1, N0, O10, O49
papers.zh_title: 全球经济正在去全球化吗？如果是，为什么？接下来会怎样？
papers.zh_abstract: 全球贸易以及资本和劳动力流动的数据表明，在2008-09年金融危机后，全球化进程放缓但并未逆转。然而，过去五年中最大经济体的政策环境和公众情绪发生了深刻变化，预示着新时代的开始。对来自低工资国家（尤其是中国）进口竞争劳动力市场影响的日益焦虑奠定了基础，但并非全球化态度逆转的催化剂。同样，新冠疫情基于全球供应链韧性提供了反对自由贸易的新论点，但无论是疫情还是短期政策反应，都未对贸易流动产生持久影响。我们证明，全球贸易在疫情期间表现出显著的韧性，且若无国际贸易，供应短缺可能会更严重。在2020年暂时下降后，全球商品和服务贸易在2021年急剧增长。俄罗斯入侵乌克兰引发了对国家安全以及供应链暴露于地缘政治风险的新担忧。随后出现了要求从“非友好”国家多元化的呼声，并采用贸易政策（特别是出口限制）来遏制中国的技术发展。全球化的未来目前高度不确定，但这些新政策可能会减缓全球增长、创新和减贫，即使它们使某些国家的某些行业受益。关于韧性（近期贸易政策变化的主要目标），贸易波动性或集中度指标可能有所帮助，但只要我们缺乏衡量政策绩效的基准，韧性就难以实现。

papers.title: Four Facts About ESG Beliefs and Investor Portfolios
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Matteo Maggiori, Johannes Stroebel, Zhenhao Tan, Stephen Utkus, Xiao Xu
papers.abstract: We analyze survey data on ESG beliefs and preferences in a large panel of retail investors linked to administrative data on their investment portfolios. The survey elicits investors’ expectations of long-term ESG equity returns and asks about their motivations, if any, to invest in ESG assets. We document four facts. First, investors generally expected ESG investments to underperform the market. Between mid-2021 and late-2022, the average expected 10-year annualized return of ESG investments relative to the overall stock market was –1.4%. Second, there is substantial heterogeneity across investors in their ESG return expectations and their motives for ESG investing: 45% of survey respondents do not see any reason to invest in ESG, 25% are primarily motivated by ethical considerations, 22% are driven by climate hedging motives, and 7% are motivated by return expectations. Third, there is a link between individuals’ reported ESG investment motives and their actual investment behaviors, with the highest ESG portfolio holdings among individuals who report ethics-driven investment motives. Fourth, financial considerations matter independently of other investment motives: we find meaningful ESG holdings only for investors who expect these investments to outperform the market, even among those investors who reported that their most important ESG investment motives were ethical or hedging reasons.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：G4, G5, Q50, Q54
papers.zh_title: 关于ESG信念与投资者投资组合的四个事实
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了与个人投资者投资组合行政数据相关联的大规模面板调查数据，内容涉及ESG信念和偏好。该调查询问投资者对长期ESG股票收益率的预期，并探究他们投资ESG资产的动机（如有）。我们记录了四个事实。第一，投资者普遍预期ESG投资表现逊于市场。在2021年中至2022年底期间，ESG投资相对于整体股票市场的平均预期10年年化收益率为-1.4%。第二，投资者在ESG收益率预期和ESG投资动机方面存在显著的异质性：45%的受访者认为没有理由投资ESG，25%主要受道德考量驱动，22%受气候对冲动机驱动，7%受收益率预期驱动。第三，个人报告的ESG投资动机与其实际投资行为之间存在关联，报告受道德驱动投资动机的个体持有最高的ESG投资组合。第四，财务考量独立于其他投资动机：我们发现，只有预期这些投资会跑赢市场的投资者才持有有意义的ESG头寸，即使在那些报告其最重要的ESG投资动机是道德或对冲原因的投资者中也是如此。

papers.title: Post COVID-19 Test Score Recovery: Initial Evidence from State Testing Data
papers.authors: Clare Halloran, Claire E. Hug, Rebecca Jack, Emily Oster
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic caused significant disruption in schooling in the U.S., and student test scores showed dramatic declines by the end of the 2020-21 school year. We use state test score data to analyze patterns of test score recovery over the 2021-22 school year. On average, we find that 20% of test score losses are recovered in English language arts (ELA) by 2022, compared to 37% in math. These recovery rates do not significantly vary across demographic characteristics, baseline achievement rates, in-person schooling rates in the pandemic school year, or category-based measures of recovery funding allocations. We observe large state-level variation in recovery rates in ELA – from full recovery to further losses. This evidence suggests state-level factors play an important role in students' academic recovery, but we are unable to isolate particular state factors. Future work should focus on this variation to facilitate a broader recovery effort.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情后考试成绩的恢复：来自州级测试数据的初步证据
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情对美国学校教育造成了严重干扰，到2020-21学年结束时，学生考试成绩出现大幅下降。我们利用州级考试成绩数据，分析了2021-22学年考试成绩的恢复模式。平均而言，我们发现到2022年，英语语言艺术（ELA）成绩损失恢复了20%，而数学成绩损失恢复了37%。这些恢复率在不同人口特征、基线成绩水平、疫情学年的线下教学率或基于类别的恢复资金分配指标之间没有显著差异。我们观察到各州在ELA恢复率上存在巨大差异——从完全恢复到进一步损失。这一证据表明，州级因素在学生学业恢复中发挥着重要作用，但我们无法分离出特定的州级因素。未来的研究应聚焦于这种差异，以促进更广泛的恢复努力。

papers.title: Policies, Projections, and the Social Cost of Carbon: Results from the DICE-2023 Model
papers.authors: Lint Barrage, William D. Nordhaus
papers.abstract: The present study examines the assumptions, modeling structure, and preliminary results of DICE-2023, the revised Dynamic Integrated Model of Climate and the Economy (DICE), updated to 2023. The revision contains major changes in the carbon and climate modules, the treatment of non-industrial greenhouse gases, discount rates, as well as updates on all the major components. The major changes are a significantly lower level of temperature of the cost-benefit optimal policy, a lower cost of reaching the 2° C target, an analysis of the impact of the Paris Accord, and a major increase in the estimated social cost of carbon.
papers.zh_title: 政策、预测与碳的社会成本：来自DICE-2023模型的结果
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了DICE-2023（修订后的气候与经济动态综合模型，更新至2023年）的假设、建模结构和初步结果。此次修订包含碳和气候模块、非工业温室气体处理、贴现率以及所有主要组成部分的重大变化。主要变化包括：成本效益最优政策下的温度水平显著降低、实现2°C目标的成本降低、对《巴黎协定》影响的分析，以及碳的社会成本估算值大幅上升。

papers.title: Trade Shocks and Credit Reallocation
papers.authors: Stefano Federico, Fadi Hassan, Veronica Rappoport
papers.abstract: This paper identifies a credit-supply contraction that arises endogenously after trade liberalization. Banks with loan portfolios concentrated in sectors exposed to competition from China face an increase in non-performing loans after China’s entry into the World Trade Organization. As a result, they reduce the supply of credit to firms, irrespective of the firm’s sector of operation. This cut in credit translates into lower employment, investment, and output. Through this mechanism, the financial channel amplifies the shock to firms already hit by import competition from China and passes it on to firms in sectors expected to expand upon trade liberalization.
papers.zh_title: 贸易冲击与信贷重新配置
papers.zh_abstract: 本文识别出贸易自由化后内生的信贷供给收缩。贷款组合集中于受中国竞争影响行业的银行，在中国加入世界贸易组织后，不良贷款增加。因此，无论企业所在行业如何，这些银行都会减少对企业的信贷供给。这种信贷削减导致就业、投资和产出下降。通过这一机制，金融渠道放大了对已受中国进口竞争冲击的企业的影响，并将其传导至预期在贸易自由化后扩张的行业中的企业。

papers.title: The Short-Term Labor Supply Response to the Expanded Child Tax Credit
papers.authors: Brandon Enriquez, Damon Jones, Ernest V. Tedeschi
papers.abstract: We estimate the extensive and intensive margin labor supply response to the monthly Child Tax Credit disbursed in 2021 as a part of the American Rescue Plan Act. Using Current Population Survey microdata, we compare labor supply outcomes among households who qualify for varying relative increases in household income, as a result of their income level and household size. We do not find strong evidence of a change in labor supply for families receiving the credit. The results are robust to alternative labor supply models, where households respond mainly to cash on hand or changes in the annual budget set.
papers.zh_title: 扩大儿童税收抵免的短期劳动力供给反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了作为《美国救援计划法案》一部分于2021年发放的月度儿童税收抵免在广延边际和集约边际上的劳动力供给反应。利用当前人口调查微观数据，我们比较了因收入水平和家庭规模不同而获得不同相对收入增长的家庭之间的劳动力供给结果。我们没有发现强有力的证据表明领取该抵免的家庭劳动力供给发生变化。这一结果在替代劳动力供给模型下依然稳健，这些模型假设家庭主要对现金持有或年度预算集的变化做出反应。

papers.title: Nurse Practitioner Scope of Practice and Patient Harm: Evidence from Medical Malpractice Cases and Adverse Action Reports
papers.authors: Sara Markowitz, Andrew J.D. Smith
papers.abstract: Many states have recently changed their scope of practice laws and granted full practice authority to nurse practitioners, allowing them to practice without oversight from physicians. Physician groups have argued against this change, citing patient safety concerns. In this paper, we use a ratio-in-ratio approach to evaluate whether the transition to full practice authority results in harm to patients as proxied by rates of malpractice payouts and adverse action reports against nurse practitioners. We find no evidence of such harm, and instead find that physicians may benefit from the law change in terms of reduced malpractice payouts against them.
papers.zh_title: 执业护士执业范围与患者伤害：来自医疗事故案件和不良行为报告的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多州最近修改了执业范围法律，授予执业护士完全执业权，允许他们在没有医生监督的情况下执业。医生团体以患者安全为由反对这一变化。在本文中，我们采用比率-比率方法评估向完全执业权过渡是否会导致患者伤害，以针对执业护士的医疗事故赔付率和不良行为报告率作为代理指标。我们没有发现此类伤害的证据，反而发现医生可能从法律变化中受益，表现为针对他们的医疗事故赔付减少。

papers.title: Natural Capital Considerations for an Extension of the U.S. Marine Economy Satellite Account
papers.authors: Jeffrey Wielgus, Monica Grasso, Charles Colgan, Jennifer Zhuang, Sarah C. Siegel, Joseph Conran, Tadesse Wodajo
papers.abstract: In an effort to measure and track marine-dependent economic activities, the United States National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) has developed two statistical tools: The Economics: National Ocean Watch (ENOW) and the Marine Economy Satellite Account (MESA). In both efforts, the focus has been on certain activities in selected sectors of the economy. MESA is developed within the framework of the System of National Accounts (SNA) and includes only economic activities that use essential marine inputs, produce goods or services to be used predominantly in the marine environment, take place in the marine environment, or need to be placed in proximity to the coast to take place. In addition, MESA only employs data on the annual flows of market-based values related to the marine activities. As an SNA-based tool, MESA also fails to systematically keep track of the contribution of the environment to the economy by properly accounting for the changes (both additions and reductions) in the environmental capital stock values. \nThis paper proposes an initial extension of MESA to include natural capital considerations by employing key elements of the System of Environmental-Economic Accounts Central Framework (SEEA-CF) adopted as the initial international statistical standard for environmental-economic accounting by the United Nations Statistical Commission in 2012. In addition to reporting the economic activities captured by the SNA structure, the SEEA-CF requires measuring both additions to the environmental capital stocks (due to natural growth or improved resource management) and reductions in these stocks (resulting from depletion from use in the production process or removal of resources from the natural stock). Considering the complexity involved in the measurement of the natural capital foundations of the ocean-related economy, the paper proposes to launch the MESA extension as a pilot project focusing only on selected data rich marine activities defined in MESA, namely, offshore oil and gas, commercial fishing, and beach recreation.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：Q0, Q20, Q3, Q32, Q5, Q56, Q57
papers.zh_title: 美国海洋经济卫星账户扩展的自然资本考量
papers.zh_abstract: 为衡量和追踪海洋依赖型经济活动，美国国家海洋和大气管理局（NOAA）开发了两种统计工具：经济学：国家海洋观察（ENOW）和海洋经济卫星账户（MESA）。在这两项工作中，重点都放在选定经济部门的某些活动上。MESA是在国民账户体系（SNA）框架内开发的，仅包括使用关键海洋投入、生产主要供海洋环境使用的商品或服务、发生在海洋环境中或需要靠近海岸才能进行的经济活动。此外，MESA仅使用与海洋活动相关的市场价值年度流量数据。作为基于SNA的工具，MESA也未能通过适当核算环境资本存量价值的变化（包括增加和减少）来系统追踪环境对经济的贡献。 本文提出通过采用2012年联合国统计委员会采纳为环境经济核算初始国际统计标准的环境经济核算体系中心框架（SEEA-CF）的关键要素，对MESA进行初步扩展，纳入自然资本考量。除了报告SNA结构所捕获的经济活动外，SEEA-CF要求衡量环境资本存量的增加（由于自然增长或资源管理改善）和减少（由于生产过程中的消耗或从自然存量中移除资源）。考虑到衡量海洋经济自然资本基础的复杂性，本文建议将MESA扩展作为试点项目启动，仅关注MESA中定义的数据丰富的选定海洋活动，即海上油气、商业捕鱼和海滩休闲。

papers.title: Business Group Spillovers
papers.authors: S. Lakshmi Naaraayanan, Daniel Wolfenzon
papers.abstract: We compare the investment of standalone firms across regions after a positive shock to the investment opportunities generated by a large-scale highway development project. We show that the standalones’ investment sensitivity is lower in regions with a higher density of business groups in the local area. We investigate mechanisms driving our results and find support for a financing mechanism whereby banks allocate capital preferentially to group-affiliated firms in responding to the increase in credit demand. Overall, our study documents that business groups have spillover effects on standalone firms.
papers.zh_title: 商业集团的溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较了在大型公路开发项目带来的投资机会正向冲击下，各地区独立企业的投资情况。我们发现，在当地商业集团密度较高的地区，独立企业的投资敏感性较低。我们研究了驱动我们结果的机制，并找到了融资机制的支持证据，即银行在应对信贷需求增加时，优先将资本分配给集团关联企业。总体而言，我们的研究表明商业集团对独立企业具有溢出效应。

papers.title: Do Entrepreneurs Want Control? And Should They Get What They Want? A Historical and Theoretical Exploration
papers.authors: Naomi R. Lamoreaux, Jean-Laurent Rosenthal
papers.abstract: From Elihu Thomson and Herbert Dow in the late nineteenth century to Steve Jobs a hundred years later, many entrepreneurs have been stymied by their investors. In this paper, we use a simple model to explore how outcomes might have been different if entrepreneurs, instead of the investors, had control of their firms. We also explore the importance of legal rules that enable entrepreneurs to lock in control even when, under one-share-one-vote governance, power would rest with their investors. We find that entrepreneurs take advantage of such rules when the cost of capital is low, as in Britain in the early twentieth century or the US in the early twenty-first century. We also find that firms controlled by entrepreneurs can take on more difficult projects, and thus push the technological frontier out more rapidly, than firms controlled by investors. Such firms are also superior in this way to serial startups.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：G3, K2, N2, N8, O39
papers.zh_title: 企业家想要控制权吗？他们应该得到他们想要的吗？历史与理论探索
papers.zh_abstract: 从19世纪末的伊莱休·汤姆森和赫伯特·道，到一百年后的史蒂夫·乔布斯，许多企业家都受到投资者的阻挠。在本文中，我们使用一个简单模型探讨如果企业家而非投资者控制其公司，结果可能会如何不同。我们还探讨了法律规则的重要性，这些规则使企业家能够锁定控制权，即使在一股一票的治理结构下权力本应归于投资者。我们发现，当资本成本较低时，如20世纪初的英国或21世纪初的美国，企业家会利用此类规则。我们还发现，与投资者控制的公司相比，企业家控制的公司可以承担更困难的项目，从而更快地推动技术前沿。这类公司在这方面也优于连续创业公司。

papers.title: China as an International Lender of Last Resort
papers.authors: Sebastian Horn, Bradley C. Parks, Carmen M. Reinhart, Christoph Trebesch
papers.abstract: This paper shows that China has launched a new global system for cross-border rescue lending to countries in debt distress. We build the first comprehensive dataset on China’s overseas bailouts between 2000 and 2021 and provide new insights into China’s growing role in the global financial system. A key finding is that the global swap line network put in place by the People’s Bank of China is increasingly used as a financial rescue mechanism, with more than USD 170 billion in liquidity support extended to crisis countries, including repeated rollovers of swaps coming due. The swaps bolster gross reserves and are mostly drawn by distressed countries with low liquidity ratios. In addition, we show that Chinese state-owned banks and enterprises have given out an additional USD 70 billion in rescue loans for balance of payments support. Taken together, China’s overseas bailouts correspond to more than 20 percent of total IMF lending over the past decade and bailout amounts are growing fast. However, China’s rescue loans differ from those of established international lenders of last resort in that they (i) are opaque, (ii) carry relatively high interest rates, and (iii) are almost exclusively targeted to debtors of China's Belt and Road Initiative. These findings have implications for the international financial and monetary architecture, which is becoming more multipolar, less institutionalized, and less transparent.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：F2, F33, F42, F65, G15, H63, N25
papers.zh_title: 中国作为国际最后贷款人
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，中国已建立了一个新的全球跨境救助贷款体系，用于向陷入债务困境的国家提供援助。我们构建了2000年至2021年间中国海外救助的首个综合数据集，并提供了关于中国在全球金融体系中日益增长作用的新见解。一个关键发现是，中国人民银行建立的全球货币互换网络正越来越多地被用作金融救助机制，已向危机国家提供了超过1700亿美元的流动性支持，包括对到期互换协议的多次展期。这些互换增强了总储备，且主要由流动性比率较低的困境国家提取。此外，我们显示，中国国有银行和国有企业还额外提供了700亿美元的救助贷款用于国际收支支持。总体而言，中国海外救助规模相当于过去十年国际货币基金组织总贷款额的20%以上，且救助金额增长迅速。然而，中国的救助贷款与成熟的国际最后贷款人提供的贷款存在差异，具体表现为：(i) 不透明，(ii) 利率相对较高，以及(iii) 几乎完全针对中国“一带一路”倡议的债务国。这些发现对国际金融和货币体系具有启示意义，该体系正变得更加多极化、更少制度化且更不透明。

papers.title: Five Myths About Carbon Pricing
papers.authors: Gilbert E. Metcalf
papers.abstract: While carbon pricing, in general, and carbon taxes, in particular, are popular with economists, they are subject to considerable misunderstanding among policy makers and the public. In this paper I consider and refute five myths about carbon taxes: 1) that a carbon price will hurt economic growth; 2) that carbon pricing will kill jobs; 3) that a carbon tax and cap and trade program have the same economic impacts; 4) that we can’t achieve carbon reduction targets with a carbon tax; and 5) that carbon pricing is regressive. I then discuss implications for policy making.
papers.zh_title: 关于碳定价的五个迷思
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管碳定价（尤其是碳税）受到经济学家的欢迎，但政策制定者和公众对其存在相当大的误解。在本文中，我考虑并驳斥了关于碳税的五个迷思：1) 碳价格会损害经济增长；2) 碳定价会扼杀就业；3) 碳税与总量控制与交易计划具有相同的经济影响；4) 我们无法通过碳税实现碳减排目标；以及5) 碳定价是累退的。随后，我讨论了这些结论对政策制定的启示。

papers.title: Solving Heterogeneous Agent Models with the Master Equation
papers.authors: Adrien Bilal
papers.abstract: This paper proposes an analytic representation of perturbations in heterogeneous agent economies with aggregate shocks up to any order. Treating the underlying distribution as an explicit state variable, the value function defined on an infinite-dimensional state space summarizes the entire economy and satisfies the ‘Master Equation’ introduced in the mathematics mean field games literature. I show that analytic perturbations of the Master Equation deliver dramatic simplifications. The First-order Approximation to the Master Equation (FAME) reduces to a standard Bellman equation for the directional derivatives of the value function with respect to the distribution and aggregate shocks. The FAME has six main advantages: (i) finite dimension; (ii) closed-form mapping to steady-state objects; (iii) applicability when many distributional moments or prices enter individuals' decision such as dynamic trade, urban or job ladder settings; (iv) block-recursivity bypassing further fixed points; (v) characterization of stability and of the stochastic steady-state; (vi) fast implementation using standard numerical methods. I develop the Second-order Approximation to the Master Equation (SAME) and show that it shares these properties, making it suitable to handle nonlinearities, aggregate risk, and asset pricing. I illustrate the FAME and the SAME with two applications. First, I show that the cost of business cycles is several orders of magnitude larger in incomplete market models. Second, I show that dynamic spatial migration models display near linearity at conventional aggregate shocks.
papers.zh_title: 用主方程求解异质性主体模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个在存在总体冲击的异质性主体经济中，任意阶扰动的解析表示。将潜在分布视为显式状态变量，定义在无限维状态空间上的价值函数概括了整个经济，并满足数学平均场博弈文献中引入的“主方程”。我表明，主方程的解析扰动带来了显著的简化。主方程的一阶近似（FAME）简化为关于价值函数对分布和总体冲击的方向导数的标准贝尔曼方程。FAME有六个主要优势：(i) 有限维；(ii) 与稳态对象的封闭形式映射；(iii) 适用于许多分布矩或价格进入个体决策的情形，如动态贸易、城市或职业阶梯设定；(iv) 块递归性，绕过了进一步的固定点；(v) 稳定性与随机稳态的表征；(vi) 使用标准数值方法快速实现。我发展了主方程的二阶近似（SAME），并表明其共享这些性质，使其适用于处理非线性、总体风险和资产定价。我通过两个应用说明了FAME和SAME。首先，我表明在不完全市场模型中，经济周期的成本要大几个数量级。其次，我表明动态空间迁移模型在常规总体冲击下表现出近乎线性。

papers.title: Evolution of Risk Aversion over Five Years after a Major Natural Disaster
papers.authors: Nicholas Ingwersen, Elizabeth Frankenberg, Duncan Thomas
papers.abstract: The impact of exposure to a major unanticipated natural disaster on the evolution of survivors’ attitudes toward risk is examined, exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in exposure to the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami in combination with rich population-representative longitudinal survey data spanning the five years after the tsunami. Respondents chose among pairs of hypothetical income streams. Those directly exposed to the tsunami made choices consistent with greater willingness to take on risk relative to those not directly exposed to the tsunami. These differences are short-lived: starting a year later, there is no evidence of differences in willingness to take on risk between the two groups. These conclusions hold for tsunami-related exposures measured at the individual and community level. Apparently, tsunami survivors were inclined to assume greater financial risk in the short-term while rebuilding their lives after the disaster.
papers.zh_title: 重大自然灾害后五年内风险厌恶的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了经历一场重大意外自然灾害对幸存者风险态度演变的冲击，利用2004年印度洋海啸暴露程度的似外生变化，结合海啸后五年内具有人口代表性的纵向调查数据。受访者在成对的假设收入流之间进行选择。那些直接暴露于海啸的受访者，其选择表明相对于未直接暴露者更愿意承担风险。这些差异是短暂的：从一年后开始，两组之间在承担风险意愿上没有发现差异的证据。这些结论适用于在个人和社区层面测量的海啸相关暴露。显然，海啸幸存者在灾后重建生活期间，短期内倾向于承担更大的财务风险。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of Intensive Agriculture
papers.authors: Timo Boppart, Patrick Kiernan, Per Krusell, Hannes Malmberg
papers.abstract: Developing countries employ a very large share of their workforce in agriculture, a sector in which their labor productivity is particularly low. We take a macroeconomic approach to analyze the role of agriculture in development. We construct a new database with systematic measures of inputs and outputs of agricultural production around the globe. The data exhibits strong neoclassical features: going from poor to rich countries, capital and intermediate input prices decline dramatically relative to labor prices; concurrently, capital and intermediate input use in agriculture increases by a factor of 300–800 relative to labor. Input intensification accounts for a bit less than two thirds of the agricultural labor productivity gap between the poorest and richest countries. Our observations are well explained by an aggregate agricultural production function with input substitutabilities significantly above unity. On the demand side, standard non-homothetic preferences accurately capture how the expenditure share of agricultural goods varies across the development spectrum. We incorporate our findings into a closed-economy general-equilibrium model with minimal distortions, showing that non-agricultural TFP differences play a much more important role than agricultural TFP differences in explaining income differences.
papers.zh_title: 集约农业的宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家将其劳动力的很大一部分投入农业，而该部门的劳动生产率尤其低下。我们采用宏观经济学方法分析农业在经济发展中的作用。我们构建了一个新的数据库，系统衡量全球农业生产的投入和产出。数据表现出强烈的新古典特征：从穷国到富国，资本和中间投入品价格相对于劳动力价格大幅下降；同时，农业中资本和中间投入品的使用量相对于劳动力增加了300-800倍。投入集约化解释了最贫穷和最富裕国家之间农业劳动生产率差距的近三分之二。我们的观察结果可以通过一个投入替代弹性显著高于1的加总农业生产函数得到很好的解释。在需求侧，标准的非位似偏好准确地捕捉了农产品支出份额在整个发展谱系中的变化。我们将这些发现纳入一个具有最小扭曲的封闭经济一般均衡模型，表明非农业全要素生产率差异在解释收入差异方面比农业全要素生产率差异重要得多。

papers.title: No Ground Truth? No Problem: Improving Administrative Data Linking Using Active Learning and a Little Bit of Guile
papers.authors: Sarah Tahamont, Zubin Jelveh, Melissa McNeill, Shi Yan, Aaron Chalfin, Benjamin Hansen
papers.abstract: While linking records across large administrative datasets [“big data”] has the potential to revolutionize empirical social science research, many administrative data files do not have common identifiers and are thus not designed to be linked to others. To address this problem, researchers have developed probabilistic record linkage algorithms which use statistical patterns in identifying characteristics to perform linking tasks. Naturally, the accuracy of a candidate linking algorithm can be substantially improved when an algorithm has access to “ground-truth” examples — matches which can be validated using institutional knowledge or auxiliary data. Unfortunately, the cost of obtaining these examples is typically high, often requiring a researcher to manually review pairs of records in order to make an informed judgement about whether they are a match. When a pool of ground-truth information is unavailable, researchers can use “active learning” algorithms for linking, which ask the user to provide ground-truth information for select candidate pairs. In this paper, we investigate the value of providing ground-truth examples via active learning for linking performance. We confirm popular intuition that data linking can be dramatically improved with the availability of ground truth examples. But critically, in many real-world applications, only a relatively small number of tactically-selected ground-truth examples are needed to obtain most of the achievable gains. With a modest investment in ground truth, researchers can approximate the performance of a supervised learning algorithm that has access to a large database of ground truth examples using a readily available off-the-shelf tool.
papers.zh_title: 没有真实数据？没问题：利用主动学习和一点巧思改进行政数据链接
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管跨大型行政数据集（“大数据”）链接记录有可能彻底改变实证社会科学研究，但许多行政数据文件没有通用标识符，因此并非设计用于相互链接。为解决此问题，研究人员开发了概率记录链接算法，利用识别特征中的统计模式来执行链接任务。自然，当算法能够访问“真实”示例（即可通过机构知识或辅助数据验证的匹配）时，候选链接算法的准确性可以得到显著提高。不幸的是，获取这些示例的成本通常很高，通常需要研究人员手动审查记录对，以便就它们是否匹配做出明智判断。当缺乏真实信息池时，研究人员可以使用“主动学习”算法进行链接，该算法要求用户为选定的候选对提供真实信息。在本文中，我们研究了通过主动学习提供真实示例对链接性能的价值。我们证实了普遍直觉，即数据链接可以通过真实示例的可用性得到显著改善。但关键的是，在许多实际应用中，只需要相对较少数量的策略性选择的真实示例，就能获得大部分可实现的收益。通过适度的真实信息投入，研究人员可以使用现成的工具，近似于能够访问大型真实示例数据库的监督学习算法的性能。

papers.title: Inflation is Conflict
papers.authors: Guido Lorenzoni, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: This paper isolates the role of conflict or disagreement on inflation in two ways. In the first part of the paper, we present a stylized model, kept purposefully away from traditional macro models. Inflation arises despite the complete absence of money, credit, interest rates, production, and employment. Inflation is due to conflict; it cannot be explained by monetary policy or departures from a natural rate of output or employment. In contrast, the second part of the paper develops a flexible framework that nests many traditional macroeconomic models. We include both goods and labor to study the interaction of price and wage inflation. Our main results provide a decomposition of inflation into “adjustment” and “conflict” inflation, highlighting the essential nature of the latter. Conflict should be viewed as the proximate cause of inflation, fed by other root causes. Our framework sits on top of a wide set of particular models that can endogenize conflict.
papers.zh_title: 通胀即冲突
papers.zh_abstract: 本文以两种方式分离了冲突或分歧对通胀的作用。在论文的第一部分，我们提出了一个程式化模型，有意使其远离传统宏观模型。通胀在完全缺乏货币、信贷、利率、生产和就业的情况下出现。通胀源于冲突；它无法用货币政策或偏离产出或就业的自然率来解释。相比之下，论文的第二部分发展了一个灵活的框架，该框架嵌套了许多传统宏观经济模型。我们同时包含商品和劳动力，以研究价格通胀和工资通胀的相互作用。我们的主要结果将通胀分解为“调整性通胀”和“冲突性通胀”，强调了后者的本质属性。冲突应被视为通胀的直接原因，并受到其他根本原因的滋养。我们的框架建立在能够内生冲突的广泛特定模型之上。

papers.title: Judging Nudging: Understanding the Welfare Effects of Nudges Versus Taxes
papers.authors: John A. List, Matthias Rodemeier, Sutanuka Roy, Gregory K. Sun
papers.abstract: While behavioral non-price interventions (“nudges”) have grown from academic curiosity to a bona fide policy tool, their relative economic efficiency remains under-researched. We develop a unified framework to estimate welfare effects of both nudges and taxes, while allowing for normative ambiguity about how nudges map into utility. We showcase our approach by creating a database of more than 300 carefully hand-coded point estimates of non-price and price interventions in the markets for cigarettes, influenza vaccinations, and household energy. While nudges are effective in changing behavior in all three markets, they are not necessarily the most efficient policy. When nudges are debiasing, they are more efficient in the market for cigarettes, while taxes are more efficient in the vaccine and energy market. Interestingly, these conclusions also often hold when nudges are deceptive rather than debiasing. We identify two key factors that govern the difference in results across markets: i) an elasticity-weighted standard deviation of the behavioral bias, and ii) the magnitude of the average externality. Nudges dominate taxes whenever i) exceeds ii). Finally, we consider cases in which nudges cause direct psychic costs or benefits to consumers.
papers.zh_title: 评判助推：理解助推与税收的福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管行为非价格干预（“助推”）已从学术好奇心发展为真正的政策工具，但其相对经济效率仍研究不足。我们开发了一个统一框架来估计助推和税收的福利效应，同时允许在助推如何映射到效用方面存在规范上的模糊性。我们通过创建一个包含300多个精心手工编码的香烟、流感疫苗接种和家庭能源市场中非价格和价格干预点估计的数据库来展示我们的方法。虽然助推在这三个市场中都能有效改变行为，但它们未必是最有效的政策。当助推是去偏时，它们在香烟市场中更有效率，而税收在疫苗和能源市场中更有效率。有趣的是，即使助推具有欺骗性而非去偏性，这些结论也常常成立。我们确定了导致不同市场结果差异的两个关键因素：i) 行为偏差的弹性加权标准差，以及 ii) 平均外部性的规模。当 i) 超过 ii) 时，助推优于税收。最后，我们考虑了助推给消费者带来直接心理成本或收益的情况。

papers.title: Has China’s Growth Gone From Miracle to Malady?
papers.authors: Eswar S. Prasad
papers.abstract: China’s remarkable run of persistently high growth in recent decades is all the more stunning in light of the country’s low levels of financial and institutional development, state-dominated economy, and nondemocratic government. Notwithstanding the inefficient and risky growth model, the government has maneuvered the economy around various stresses without any major financial or economic crash. With a shrinking labor force and declining efficiency of investment, raising productivity growth is key to maintaining reasonable GDP growth. Unbalanced reforms, a schizophrenic approach to the role of the market versus the state, and strains in financial and property markets could result in significant volatility but a financial or economic collapse is not in the cards.
papers.zh_title: 中国的增长是从奇迹走向病态了吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 中国近几十年来持续高增长的非凡表现，鉴于其金融和制度发展水平低、国家主导的经济以及非民主政府，显得尤为惊人。尽管存在低效且高风险的增長模式，政府仍成功驾驭经济应对各种压力，而未发生重大金融或经济崩溃。随着劳动力萎缩和投资效率下降，提高生产率增长对于维持合理的GDP增长至关重要。不平衡的改革、对市场与政府角色矛盾的看法，以及金融和房地产市场的压力，可能导致显著波动，但金融或经济崩溃的可能性不大。

papers.title: AGING IN STYLE: Seniority and Sentiment in Scholarly Writing
papers.authors: Lea-Rachel Kosnik, Daniel S. Hamermesh
papers.abstract: The scholarly impact of academic research matters for academic promotions, influence, relevance to public policy, and others. Focusing on writing style in top-level professional journals, we examine how it changes with age, and how stylistic differences and age affect impact. As top-level scholars age, their writing style increasingly differs from others’. The impact (measured by citations) of each contribution decreases, due to the direct effect of age and the much smaller indirect effects through style. Non-native English-speakers write in different styles from others, in ways that reduce the impact of their research. Nobel laureates’ scholarly writing evinces less certainty about the conclusions of their research than that of other highly productive scholars.
papers.zh_title: 优雅地老去：学术写作中的资历与情感
papers.zh_abstract: 学术研究的学术影响力对学术晋升、影响力、与公共政策的相关性等方面至关重要。我们聚焦于顶级专业期刊的写作风格，考察其如何随年龄变化，以及风格差异和年龄如何影响影响力。随着顶级学者年龄增长，他们的写作风格越来越与众不同。每项贡献的影响力（以引用量衡量）会下降，这是由于年龄的直接效应以及通过风格产生的更小的间接效应。非英语母语者的写作风格与他人不同，这种差异降低了其研究的影响力。诺贝尔奖得主的学术写作对其研究结论表现出的确定性低于其他高产学者。

papers.title: An Anatomy of Monopsony: Search Frictions, Amenities and Bargaining in Concentrated Markets
papers.authors: David W. Berger, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Andreas R. Kostøl, Simon Mongey
papers.abstract: We contribute a theory in which three channels interact to determine the degree of monopsony power and therefore the wedge between a worker’s spot wage and her marginal product (henceforth, the wage markdown): (1) heterogeneity in worker-firm-specific preferences (nonwage amenities), (2) firm granularity, and (3) off- and on-the-job search frictions. We use Norwegian data to discipline each channel and then reproduce novel reduced-form empirical relationships between market concentration, job flows, wages and wage inequality. Our main exercise quantifies the contribution of each channel to income inequality and wage markdowns. The markdowns are 21 percent in our baseline estimation. Removing nonwage amenity dispersion narrows them by a third. Giving the next-lowest-ranked competitor a seat at the bargaining table narrows them by half. Removing search frictions narrows them by two-thirds. Each counterfactual shows decreased wage inequality and increased welfare.
papers.zh_title: 买方垄断剖析：集中市场中的搜索摩擦、非工资福利与议价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个理论，其中三个渠道相互作用决定买方垄断势力的程度，从而决定工人即期工资与其边际产品之间的楔子（以下简称工资折价）：(1) 工人-企业特定偏好的异质性（非工资福利），(2) 企业粒度，以及 (3) 在职和离职搜索摩擦。我们使用挪威数据来约束每个渠道，然后重现市场集中度、工作流动、工资与工资不平等之间新颖的简约式实证关系。我们的主要练习量化了每个渠道对收入不平等和工资折价的贡献。在我们的基准估计中，工资折价为21%。消除非工资福利离散度使其缩小三分之一。让排名次低的竞争对手参与谈判使其缩小一半。消除搜索摩擦使其缩小三分之二。每个反事实情景都显示工资不平等减少和福利增加。

papers.title: Should History Change The Way We Think About Populism?
papers.authors: Alan de Bromhead, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke
papers.abstract: This paper asks whether history should change the way in which economists and economic historians think about populism. We use Müller’s definition, according to which populism is ‘an exclusionary form of identity politics, which is why it poses a threat to democracy’. We make three historical arguments. First, late 19th century US Populists were not populist. Second, there is no necessary relationship between populism and anti-globalization sentiment. Third, economists have sometimes been on the wrong side of important policy debates involving opponents rightly or wrongly described as populist. History encourages us to avoid an overly simplistic view of populism and its correlates.
papers.zh_title: 历史是否应改变我们对民粹主义的看法？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨历史是否应改变经济学家和经济史学家对民粹主义的看法。我们采用穆勒的定义，即民粹主义是“一种排他性的身份政治形式，因此对民主构成威胁”。我们提出三个历史论点。首先，19世纪末的美国民粹主义者并非民粹主义者。其次，民粹主义与反全球化情绪之间没有必然联系。第三，经济学家有时在涉及被正确或错误描述为民粹主义反对者的重要政策辩论中站错了立场。历史鼓励我们避免对民粹主义及其相关因素持有过于简单化的观点。

papers.title: Merger Guidelines for the Labor Market
papers.authors: David W. Berger, Thomas Hasenzagl, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Simon Mongey, Eric A. Posner
papers.abstract: While the labor market implications of mergers have historically been ignored, recent actions by the Department of Justice (DOJ) place buyer market power (i.e., monopsony) at the forefront of antitrust policy. We develop a theory of multi-plant ownership and monopsony to help guide this new policy focus. We estimate the model using U.S. Census data and demonstrate the model’s ability to replicate empirically documented paths of employment and wages following mergers. We then simulate a representative set of U.S. mergers in order to evaluate merger review thresholds. Our main exercise applies the DOJ and FTC’s product market concentration thresholds to local labor markets. Assuming mergers generate efficiency gains of 5 percent, our simulations suggest that workers are harmed, on average, under the enforcement of the more lenient 2010 merger guidelines and unharmed, on average, under enforcement of the more stringent 1982 merger guidelines. We also provide a framework for further research evaluating alternative concentration thresholds based on assumptions about the efficiency effects of mergers and the resource constraints of regulators. Finally, we provide guidance for using the Gross Downward Wage Pressure method for evaluating the impact of mergers on labor markets.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D40, E20, H0, J0, K0, L0
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场的并购指南
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管并购对劳动力市场的影响历来被忽视，但司法部近期的行动将买方市场势力（即买方垄断）置于反垄断政策的前沿。我们发展了一个多工厂所有权与买方垄断的理论，以指导这一新的政策重点。我们使用美国人口普查数据估计该模型，并展示模型复制并购后就业和工资的实证记录路径的能力。然后，我们模拟一组具有代表性的美国并购，以评估并购审查阈值。我们的主要练习将司法部和联邦贸易委员会的产品市场集中度阈值应用于本地劳动力市场。假设并购产生5%的效率收益，我们的模拟表明，在更宽松的2010年并购指南执行下，工人平均受到损害；而在更严格的1982年并购指南执行下，工人平均未受损害。我们还提供了一个框架，用于基于对并购效率效应和监管者资源约束的假设，评估替代集中度阈值的进一步研究。最后，我们为使用总向下工资压力方法评估并购对劳动力市场的影响提供指导。

papers.title: Empirical Analyses of Selection and Welfare in Insurance Markets: A Self-Indulgent Survey
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein
papers.abstract: This review article, which was solicited by the Geneva Risk and Insurance Review, surveys work that has been done using an empirical framework for analyzing selection in insurance markets developed by Einav, Finkelstein, and Cullen (2010). We briefly review that framework, and then describe a number of empirical applications that researchers have undertaken across an array of settings in both insurance and credit markets. We also discuss some of the useful extensions to the original framework that others have made and applied. The review is intended to be useful for scholars who may want to apply the framework in their own work on insurance, credit, or other selection markets.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EH, IO, PE；JEL：D60, D82
papers.zh_title: 保险市场中逆向选择与福利的实证分析：一篇自我放纵的综述
papers.zh_abstract: 这篇综述文章应《日内瓦风险与保险评论》之邀撰写，评述了使用Einav、Finkelstein和Cullen（2010）开发的实证框架分析保险市场逆向选择的研究工作。我们简要回顾该框架，然后描述研究人员在保险和信贷市场的各种环境中进行的一系列实证应用。我们还讨论了其他人对该原始框架所做的一些有用扩展及其应用。这篇综述旨在为那些可能希望在自己的保险、信贷或其他选择市场研究中应用该框架的学者提供帮助。

papers.title: The Importance of Financial Literacy: Opening a New Field
papers.authors: Annamaria Lusardi, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: We undertake an assessment of our two decades of research on financial literacy, building on our empirical research and theoretical work casting financial knowledge as a form of investment in human capital. We also draw on recent data to determine who is the most – and least – financially savvy in the United States, and we highlight the similarity of our results in other countries. A number of convincing studies is now available, from which we draw conclusions about the effects and consequences of financial illiteracy, and what can be done to fill these gaps. We conclude by offering our thoughts on implications for teaching, financial literacy programs, and future research.
papers.zh_title: 金融素养的重要性：开辟一个新领域
papers.zh_abstract: 我们基于实证研究和理论工作，将金融知识视为一种人力资本投资形式，对二十年来关于金融素养的研究进行了评估。我们还利用最新数据来确定美国哪些人最精通金融、哪些人最不精通，并强调了我们在其他国家得出的结果具有相似性。目前已有大量令人信服的研究，我们从中得出结论，探讨金融素养不足的影响和后果，以及可以采取哪些措施来填补这些空白。最后，我们就这些发现对教学、金融素养项目以及未来研究的启示提出了我们的思考。

papers.title: Women's Colleges and Economics Major Choice: Evidence from Wellesley College Applicants
papers.authors: Kristin F. Butcher, Patrick McEwan, Akila Weerapana
papers.abstract: Many observers argue that diversity in Economics and STEM fields is critical, not simply because of egalitarian goals, but because who is in a field may shape what is studied by it. If increasing the rate of majoring in mathematically-intensive fields among women is a worthy goal, then understanding whether women’s colleges causally affect that choice is important. Among all admitted applicants to Wellesley College, enrollees are 7.2 percentage points (94%) more likely to receive an Economics degree than non-enrollees (a plausible lower bound given negative selection into enrollment on math skills and major preferences). Overall, 3.2 percentage points—or 44% of the difference between enrollees and non-enrollees—is explained by college exposure to female instructors and students, consistent with a wider role for women’s colleges in increasing female participation in Economics.
papers.zh_title: 女子学院与经济学专业选择：来自韦尔斯利学院申请者的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多观察者认为，经济学和STEM领域的多样性至关重要，这不仅是因为平等主义目标，还因为一个领域内的人员构成可能塑造该领域的研究内容。如果提高女性选择数学密集型专业的比例是一个有价值的目标，那么理解女子学院是否因果性地影响这一选择就很重要。在韦尔斯利学院所有被录取的申请者中，入学学生获得经济学学位的可能性比未入学学生高出7.2个百分点（94%）（考虑到入学学生在数学技能和专业偏好上的负向选择，这可能是合理的下限）。总体而言，3.2个百分点——即入学学生与未入学学生之间差异的44%——可由大学期间接触女性教师和女性学生来解释，这与女子学院在提高女性参与经济学方面发挥更广泛作用的观点一致。

papers.title: Global Risk, Non-Bank Financial Intermediation, and Emerging Market Vulnerabilities
papers.authors: Anusha Chari
papers.abstract: Over the last two decades, the unprecedented increase in non-bank financial intermediation, particularly open-end mutual funds and ETFs, accounts for nearly half of the external financing flows to emerging markets exceeding cross-border lending by global banks. Evidence suggests that investment fund flows enhance risk-sharing across borders and provide emerging markets access to more diverse forms of financing. However, a growing body of evidence also indicates that investment funds are inherently more vulnerable to liquidity and redemption risks during periods of global financial market stress, increasing the volatility of capital flows to emerging markets. Benchmark-driven investments, namely passive funds, appear particularly sensitive to global risk shocks such as tightening US dollar funding conditions relative to their active fund counterparts. The procyclicality of investment fund flows to emerging markets during times of global stress poses financial stability concerns with implications for the role of macroprudential policy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：F21, F32, F36, F65, G11, G15, G23
papers.zh_title: 全球风险、非银行金融中介与新兴市场脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，非银行金融中介（尤其是开放式共同基金和ETF）的空前增长，占到了流向新兴市场的外部融资流量的近一半，超过了全球银行的跨境贷款。证据表明，投资基金流动增强了跨境风险分担，并为新兴市场提供了更多样化的融资渠道。然而，越来越多的证据也表明，在全球金融市场压力时期，投资基金本质上更容易受到流动性和赎回风险的影响，从而增加了流向新兴市场的资本流动的波动性。基准驱动的投资（即被动型基金）相对于主动型基金，似乎对全球风险冲击（如美元融资条件收紧）特别敏感。在全球压力时期，投资基金流向新兴市场的顺周期性带来了金融稳定担忧，并对宏观审慎政策的作用产生了影响。

papers.title: Investigating the Complexity of Naloxone Distribution: Which Policies Matter for Pharmacies and Potential Recipients
papers.authors: Rosanna Smart, David Powell, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula, Evan D. Peet, Rahi Abouk, Corey S. Davis
papers.abstract: Despite efforts to address the opioid crisis, opioid-related overdoses remain a significant contributor to mortality. State efforts to reduce overdose deaths by removing barriers to naloxone have recently focused on pharmacy channels, but the specifics of these laws and the contexts in which they are implemented vary widely. In this paper, we use novel methods robust to heterogeneous effects across states and time-varying policy effects to estimate the effects on naloxone pharmacy distribution of two types of laws: laws authorizing non-patient-specific prescription distribution of naloxone and laws granting pharmacists prescriptive authority for naloxone. We find that both types of laws significantly increase the volume of naloxone dispensed through pharmacies. However, relative to laws authorizing non-patient-specific prescription distribution, effects are significantly larger for pharmacist prescriptive authority laws. These larger effects only partially derive from increased naloxone prescribing by pharmacists. We also estimate large, significant increases in pharmacy dispensation of naloxone prescribed by non-pharmacist prescribers, with particularly large increases among family medicine physicians, with particularly large increases among family medicine physicians. The relative benefits of pharmacist prescriptive authority laws versus non-patient-specific distribution are larger among Non-Hispanic Black individuals, suggesting an important role of these policies for reducing disparities in access to naloxone.
papers.zh_title: 探究纳洛酮分发的复杂性：哪些政策对药房和潜在受药者重要
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管努力应对阿片类药物危机，但与阿片类药物相关的过量用药仍然是导致死亡的重要原因。各州通过消除纳洛酮获取障碍来减少过量用药死亡的努力，近期主要集中在药房渠道，但这些法律的具体细节及其实施背景差异很大。在本文中，我们使用对跨州异质效应和政策时变效应具有稳健性的新方法，来估计两类法律对药房纳洛酮分发的影响：授权非特定患者处方分发纳洛酮的法律，以及授予药剂师纳洛酮处方权的法律。我们发现，这两类法律都显著增加了通过药房分发的纳洛酮数量。然而，与授权非特定患者处方分发的法律相比，药剂师处方权法律的效果显著更大。这些更大的效果仅部分源于药剂师开具纳洛酮处方的增加。我们还估计到，由非药剂师处方者开具的纳洛酮在药房的分发量出现了大幅且显著的增加，其中家庭医学医生的增长尤为突出。与非特定患者分发相比，药剂师处方权法律的相对益处对于非西班牙裔黑人个体更大，这表明这些政策在减少纳洛酮获取差距方面发挥着重要作用。

papers.title: Partial Outsourcing of Public Programs: Evidence on Determinants of Choice in Medicare
papers.authors: Marika Cabral, Colleen Carey, Jinyeong Son
papers.abstract: Many public programs let individuals choose between publicly provided benefits and a subsidized private alternative. We investigate the determinants of health insurance choice in Medicare—a setting with vast geographic variation in the share of individuals selecting the public option versus private alternative. We analyze insurance decisions among individuals who move to quantify the relative importance of individual-specific factors (such as preferences or income) and place-specific factors (such as local health insurance options) on insurance decisions. We find roughly 40% of the geographic variation in the share selecting private coverage is due to place-based factors, while the remainder is explained by individuals. Our findings highlight the importance of individual factors in these decisions and may inform discussions about the use of policy to address geographic disparities.
papers.zh_title: 公共项目的部分外包：医疗保险选择决定因素的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多公共项目允许个人在公共提供的福利和补贴的私人替代方案之间进行选择。我们研究了医疗保险中健康保险选择的决定因素——这是一个在个人选择公共选项与私人替代方案的比例上存在巨大地理差异的环境。我们分析了搬家个体的保险决策，以量化个体特定因素（如偏好或收入）和地方特定因素（如当地健康保险选项）对保险决策的相对重要性。我们发现，选择私人保险比例的地理差异中，大约40%是由地方因素造成的，而其余部分则由个体因素解释。我们的发现强调了在这些决策中个体因素的重要性，并可能为关于使用政策解决地理差异的讨论提供信息。

papers.title: The Optimal Taxation of Couples
papers.authors: Mikhail Golosov, Ilia Krasikov
papers.abstract: We consider optimal joint nonlinear earnings taxation of couples. We use multi-dimensional mechanism design techniques to study this problem and show that the first-order approach – that restricts attention to only local incentive constraints – is valid for a broad set of primitives.
