Optimal taxes are characterized by the solution to a certain second-order partial differential equation. Using the Coarea Formula, we solve this equation for various conditional averages of optimal tax rates and identify key forces that determine the optimal tax rates; show how these rates depend on earnings of each spouse, correlation in spousal earnings, and redistributive objectives of the planner; compare optimal rates for primary and secondary earners; identify both the conditions under which simple tax systems are optimal and the sources of welfare gains from more sophisticated taxes when those conditions are not satisfied. Under realistic assumptions, optimal tax rates for married individuals are increasing in correlation of spousal earnings. However, they remain lower than the tax rates for single individuals, and the marginal rates for one spouse increase (decrease) in the earnings of the other if both spouses have low (high) earnings.
papers.zh_title: 夫妻的最优税收
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑夫妻联合非线性劳动收入的最优税收问题。我们使用多维机制设计技术来研究这一问题，并表明一阶方法——即只关注局部激励约束——对于广泛的基础设定是有效的。最优税收由某个二阶偏微分方程的解来刻画。利用余面积公式，我们求解了最优税率各种条件平均值的该方程，并识别了决定最优税率的关键力量；展示了这些税率如何取决于配偶各自的收入、配偶收入的相关性以及计划者的再分配目标；比较了主要收入者和次要收入者的最优税率；识别了简单税制最优的条件，以及当这些条件不满足时更复杂税制带来福利收益的来源。在现实假设下，已婚个体的最优税率随配偶收入相关性的增加而增加。然而，它们仍然低于单身个体的税率，并且如果配偶双方收入都低（高），则一方的边际税率随另一方收入的增加而增加（减少）。

papers.title: Projected Health Benefits and Health Care Savings from the United States National Hepatitis C Elimination Initiative
papers.authors: Jagpreet Chhatwal, Alec Aaron, Huaiyang Zhong, Neeraj Sood, Risha Irvin, Harvey J. Alter, Yueran Zhuo, Joshua M. Sharfstein, John W. Ward
papers.abstract: The national hepatitis C elimination initiative provides an opportunity to dramatically expand access to hepatitis C virus (HCV) treatment and put the US on a path to eliminating hepatitis C. Our objective was to project the health benefits and cost savings of this initiative. A previously developed mathematical model was updated to simulate trends in HCV disease burden and cost of care in the US for the next 20 years under status quo and national hepatitis C elimination initiative. Within five years, the initiative will diagnose 92.5% of all persons with HCV and cure 89.6% of HCV infection. Over 10 years, compared with the status quo, the initiative will avert 20,000 cases of hepatocellular carcinoma, 49,100 cases of diabetes, and 25,000 cases of chronic kidney disease. The initiative will also avert 24,000 deaths adding 220,000 life years. These benefits in improved health will save $18.1 billion in direct healthcare spending, of which $13.3 billion would accrue to the federal government. Over 20 years, the health benefits would increase by more than 2-fold and cost savings by 3-fold. The cost savings would further increase if the HCV incidence rate decreases because of rapid decline in HCV prevalence. In conclusion, the national hepatitis C elimination initiative would substantially reduce HCV-related morbidity and mortality and would reduce healthcare spending at 10 years and beyond.
papers.zh_title: 美国国家丙型肝炎消除计划的预期健康收益和医疗保健节省
papers.zh_abstract: 国家丙型肝炎消除计划提供了一个机会，可以大幅扩大丙型肝炎病毒（HCV）治疗的覆盖面，并使美国走上消除丙型肝炎的道路。我们的目标是预测该计划的健康收益和成本节省。我们更新了一个先前开发的数学模型，以模拟未来20年在美国现状和全国丙型肝炎消除计划下HCV疾病负担和护理成本的趋势。在五年内，该计划将诊断92.5%的HCV感染者，并治愈89.6%的HCV感染。在十年内，与现状相比，该计划将避免20,000例肝细胞癌、49,100例糖尿病和25,000例慢性肾脏病。该计划还将避免24,000例死亡，增加220,000生命年。这些健康改善带来的收益将节省181亿美元的直接医疗支出，其中133亿美元将由联邦政府承担。在二十年内，健康收益将增加两倍以上，成本节省将增加三倍。如果由于HCV患病率迅速下降而导致HCV发病率降低，成本节省将进一步增加。总之，国家丙型肝炎消除计划将大幅降低HCV相关的发病率和死亡率，并在十年及以后减少医疗支出。

papers.title: Deposit Franchise Runs
papers.authors: Itamar Drechsler, Alexi Savov, Philipp Schnabl, Olivier Wang
papers.abstract: We model a new type of bank run, a deposit franchise run. Banks pay below-market rates on deposits, which makes the deposit franchise a valuable asset. For a bank to keep this value, deposits must stay in the bank; if they leave, their value is lost to the bank. This makes the deposit franchise a runnable asset. Unlike Diamond-Dybvig runs, deposit franchise runs can occur even if the bank’s loans are fully liquid. Since the deposit franchise value increases with interest rates, a run is more harmful, and hence more likely, when rates are high. To avoid runs, banks can shorten the duration of their assets, but this can make them insolvent if interest rates fall. Avoiding both runs and insolvency requires additional capital in proportion to the value of the uninsured portion of the deposit franchise. We use our model to estimate deposit franchise values and show how to identify vulnerable banks in the context of the 2023 Regional Bank Crisis.
papers.zh_title: 存款特许权挤兑
papers.zh_abstract: 我们建模了一种新型银行挤兑，即存款特许权挤兑。银行以低于市场的利率支付存款利息，这使得存款特许权成为一项有价值的资产。为了银行保持这一价值，存款必须留在银行；如果它们离开，其价值对银行而言就损失了。这使得存款特许权成为一种可挤兑的资产。与Diamond-Dybvig挤兑不同，即使银行的贷款完全具有流动性，存款特许权挤兑也可能发生。由于存款特许权价值随利率上升而增加，当利率高时，挤兑更具破坏性，因此也更可能发生。为了避免挤兑，银行可以缩短其资产的久期，但这可能使它们在利率下降时资不抵债。要同时避免挤兑和资不抵债，需要额外的资本，其数额与存款特许权未保险部分的价值成比例。我们使用我们的模型来估计存款特许权价值，并展示如何在2023年区域银行危机的背景下识别脆弱银行。

papers.title: Biodiversity Risk
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Xuran Zeng
papers.abstract: We explore the effects of physical and regulatory risks related to biodiversity loss on economic activity and asset values. We first develop a news-based measure of aggregate biodiversity risk and analyze how it varies over time. We also construct and publicly release several firm-level measures of exposure to biodiversity risk, based on textual analyses of firms’ 10-K statements, a large survey of financial professionals, regulators, and academics, and the holdings of biodiversity-related funds. Exposures to biodiversity risk vary substantially across industries in a way that is economically sensible and distinct from exposures to climate risk. We find evidence that biodiversity risks already affect equity prices: returns of portfolios that are sorted on our measures of biodiversity risk exposure covary positively with innovations in aggregate biodiversity risk. However, our survey indicates that market participants do not perceive the current pricing of biodiversity risks to be adequate.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：G10, G11, G12, Q5, Q53, Q57
papers.zh_title: 生物多样性风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了与生物多样性丧失相关的物理风险和监管风险对经济活动及资产价值的影响。我们首先基于新闻构建了一个衡量总体生物多样性风险的指标，并分析其随时间的变化。我们还基于对企业10-K报表的文本分析、对金融专业人士、监管者和学者的大规模调查，以及生物多样性相关基金的持仓情况，构建并公开发布了多个企业层面的生物多样性风险暴露度量指标。不同行业的生物多样性风险暴露程度差异显著，这种差异在经济上具有合理性，并且与气候风险暴露截然不同。我们发现有证据表明，生物多样性风险已经影响股票价格：根据我们的生物多样性风险暴露度量指标排序的投资组合的回报，与总体生物多样性风险的创新呈正相关。然而，我们的调查表明，市场参与者认为当前生物多样性风险的定价并不充分。

papers.title: Beyond Racial Attitudes: The Role of Outside Options in the Dynamics of White Flight
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair
papers.abstract: When the fraction of minorities in a neighborhood exceeds the tipping point white flight accelerates. I develop a revealed-preference method to estimate the tipping points of 38,000 census tracts and the preferences of households for minority neighbors in the 123 Metropolitan Statistical Areas (MSA) covered by these census tracts over 40 years (1970-2010). I find that the average tipping point in an MSA initially covaries more with the racial attitudes of households than the outside options that they face but that this relationship reverses overtime. Ignoring outside options would obscure the declining role that racial attitudes play in understanding segregation.
papers.zh_title: 超越种族态度：外部选择在白人逃离动态中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 当一个社区中少数族裔的比例超过临界点时，白人逃离会加速。我开发了一种显示性偏好方法，用于估计1970年至2010年40年间，123个大都市统计区（MSA）内38,000个普查区的临界点，以及家庭对少数族裔邻居的偏好。我发现，最初，一个MSA的平均临界点与家庭的种族态度的协动性，比与它们所面临的外部选择的协动性更强，但这种关系随时间推移发生了逆转。忽略外部选择会掩盖种族态度在理解种族隔离中日益减弱的角色。

papers.title: Class Peers as Competitors and Educators: The Consequences of Rank-Based Rewards in US High Schools
papers.authors: Mark R. Rosenzweig, Bing Xu
papers.abstract: This paper examines the theoretical and empirical consequences of rank-based reward systems in schools in which students’ performance and effort are evaluated relative to their peers. In such environments, classmates act simultaneously as competitors—due to rank-determined rewards—and as educators through peer learning and assistance. Using nationally representative panel survey data from U.S. high schools, combined with administrative information on the location assignments of new refugee student cohorts, we exploit variation in school competition policies and class ability compositions to identify empirically their dual effects on student effort and peer learning. We develop a theoretical tournament model with heterogeneous students who adjust their effort in response to the effort of similar peers and in which students learn from peers. The model predicts that when rewards depend on relative standing, adding higher-ability students to a cohort will reduce both incumbent academic effort and peer assistance, particularly in schools emphasizing rank-based awards, while adding lower-ability students has the opposite effects. Empirical tests of the model confirm these predictions. In schools with strong rank-based reward policies, the addition of stronger peers reduces high-performing incumbent students’ homework time and eliminates the positive spillovers from peer learning observed in less competitive settings. The adverse effects are concentrated among high-ability incumbents, while lower-ability students—who are less likely to win competitive awards—are largely unaffected. The results indicate that performance-based competition undermines cooperative peer learning and reduces student effort and overall academic performance, especially in institutions with high-ability students that explicitly emphasize relative ranking in determining academic recognition.
papers.zh_title: 同班同学：既是竞争者也是教育者——美国高中基于排名的奖励制度的后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了学校中基于排名的奖励制度的理论和实证后果，在这种制度下，学生的表现和努力是根据其同龄人进行评价的。在这种环境中，同学同时扮演着竞争者的角色（由于排名决定的奖励）和教育者的角色（通过同伴学习和帮助）。利用美国高中的全国代表性面板调查数据，结合新难民学生群体所在地分配的行政信息，我们利用学校竞争政策和班级能力构成的差异，实证识别了它们对学生努力和同伴学习的双重影响。我们开发了一个理论锦标赛模型，其中包含异质性学生，他们会根据相似同伴的努力调整自己的努力，并且学生之间会相互学习。该模型预测，当奖励取决于相对排名时，向一个群体中加入能力更高的学生会减少现有学生的学业努力和同伴帮助，尤其是在强调基于排名奖励的学校中；而加入能力较低的学生则会产生相反的效果。对该模型的实证检验证实了这些预测。在实行严格基于排名奖励政策的学校中，加入更强的同伴会减少高表现现有学生的家庭作业时间，并消除在竞争较弱环境中观察到的同伴学习的正向溢出效应。这种不利影响主要集中在高能力的现有学生身上，而能力较低的学生——他们不太可能赢得竞争性奖励——则基本不受影响。结果表明，基于表现的竞争破坏了合作性的同伴学习，降低了学生的努力和整体学业表现，尤其是在那些明确强调相对排名以决定学业认可的高能力学生机构中。

papers.title: Supply Chain Risk: Changes in Supplier Composition and Vertical Integration
papers.authors: Nuri Ersahin, Mariassunta Giannetti, Ruidi Huang
papers.abstract: Using textual analysis of earnings conference calls, we quantify firms’ supply chain risk and its sources. Our proxy for supply chain risk exhibits large cross-sectional and time-series variation that aligns with reasonable priors and is unprecedently high during the Covid-19 pandemic. In addition, a firm exhibits high supply chain risk when its suppliers also do so. We find that firms that experience an increase in supply chain risk establish relationships with closer and domestic suppliers and with suppliers that are industry leaders, but also continue to work with suppliers in other continents. In addition, firms that do not face financial constraints become more likely to engage in vertical mergers and acquisitions.
papers.zh_title: 供应链风险：供应商构成与纵向整合的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 通过对财报电话会议的文本分析，我们量化了企业的供应链风险及其来源。我们的供应链风险代理指标表现出较大的横截面和时间序列变化，这与合理的先验预期一致，并在新冠疫情期间达到了前所未有的高度。此外，当一家企业的供应商也表现出高供应链风险时，该企业自身也呈现出高风险。我们发现，经历供应链风险增加的企业会与距离更近的、国内的供应商以及行业领先的供应商建立关系，但同时也会继续与其他大洲的供应商合作。此外，没有面临财务约束的企业更有可能进行纵向并购。

papers.title: Consumption Segregation
papers.authors: Corina Boar, Elisa Giannone
papers.abstract: This paper introduces consumption segregation as a new dimension of residential segregation, examines its patterns and determinants, and discusses its implications. Using novel longitudinal and highly granular data, we measure consumption segregation in the United States and document that, while it remains high, it has declined over the past 15 years and exhibits substantial regional variation. We find a strong correlation between consumption segregation and income segregation. We interpret it through the lens of a standard consumption model and argue that the correlation arises primarily due to incomplete markets that limit consumption insurance across income groups.
papers.zh_title: 消费隔离
papers.zh_abstract: 本文引入了消费隔离作为居住隔离的一个新维度，考察了其模式与决定因素，并讨论了其含义。利用新颖的纵向和高粒度数据，我们衡量了美国的消费隔离，并记录到，尽管消费隔离仍然很高，但在过去15年中有所下降，并且表现出显著的区域差异。我们发现消费隔离与收入隔离之间存在强相关性。我们通过一个标准消费模型的视角对此进行解释，并认为这种相关性主要源于不完全市场限制了不同收入群体之间的消费保险。

papers.title: Understanding the Impacts of a Natural Disaster: Evidence from the 2004 Indian Ocean Tsunami
papers.authors: Elizabeth Frankenberg, Cecep Sumantri, Duncan Thomas
papers.abstract: Measuring impacts of extreme events on population well-being is complicated if data are not representative of the pre-event at-risk population or a representative sample of the population is not followed post-event. The sources and nature of some important biases are documented using data from the Study of the Tsunami Aftermath and Recovery (STAR) which documents the evolution of population well-being before and after a major natural disaster, the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami. The baseline, collected 10 months before the tsunami, is representative of the at-risk population. Respondents have been followed and re-interviewed multiple times in the fifteen years since the tsunami achieving high follow-up rates. We empirically document the importance of construct samples that represent the pre-event at-risk population, rather than an opportunistic sample of those in the vicinity of the event. Pre-event characteristics condition where and in what circumstances people live post-event. Post-event well-being is associated with post-event living conditions in the short-term, and that over time, the link weakens between short-term living arrangements and post-event well-being. Failure to follow-up all respondents, especially those who move away from the location of the event, yields biased estimates of impacts of the event.
papers.zh_title: 理解自然灾害的影响：来自2004年印度洋海啸的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 如果数据不能代表事件发生前面临风险的群体，或者事件发生后没有对人口的代表性样本进行追踪，那么衡量极端事件对人口福祉的影响就会变得复杂。我们利用海啸后果与恢复研究（STAR）的数据，记录了某些重要偏差的来源和性质。该研究记录了2004年印度洋海啸这一重大自然灾害前后人口福祉的演变。基线调查在海啸发生前10个月进行，代表了面临风险的群体。受访者在海啸发生后的十五年内被多次追踪和重新访谈，实现了高随访率。我们实证记录了构建代表事件前面临风险群体样本（而非事件附近的机会样本）的重要性。事件前的特征决定了事件后人们居住的地点和生活状况。事件后的福祉在短期内与事件后的生活条件相关，并且随着时间的推移，短期生活安排与事件后福祉之间的联系会减弱。未能对所有受访者（尤其是那些搬离事件发生地的人）进行随访，会导致对事件影响的估计产生偏差。

papers.title: What Can Historically Black Colleges and Universities Teach about Improving Higher Education Outcomes for Black Students?
papers.authors: Gregory Price, Angelino Viceisza
papers.abstract: Historically Black colleges and universities are institutions that were established prior to 1964 with the principal mission of educating Black Americans. In this essay, we focus on two main issues. We start by examining how Black College students perform across HBCUs and non-HBCUs by looking at a relatively broad range of outcomes, including college and graduate school completion, job satisfaction, social mobility, civic engagement, and health. HBCUs punch significantly above their weight, especially considering their significant lack of resources. We then turn to the potential causes of these differences and provide a glimpse into the “secret sauce” of HBCUs. We conclude with potential implications for HBCU and non-HBCU policy.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS；JEL：I21, J01, J15, Z13
papers.zh_title: 传统黑人学院和大学能教给我们什么，以改善黑人学生的高等教育成果？
papers.zh_abstract: 传统黑人学院和大学是指在1964年之前建立、主要使命是教育美国黑人的机构。在这篇文章中，我们关注两个主要问题。我们首先通过考察相对广泛的结果，包括大学和研究生院毕业率、工作满意度、社会流动性、公民参与和健康状况，来审视黑人学生在HBCU和非HBCU中的表现。HBCU的表现显著超出其应有水平，尤其是考虑到它们严重缺乏资源。然后，我们转向这些差异的潜在原因，并一窥HBCU的“秘诀”。最后，我们总结了HBCU和非HBCU政策的潜在启示。

papers.title: Local and National Concentration Trends in Jobs and Sales: The Role of Structural Transformation
papers.authors: David Autor, Christina Patterson, John Van Reenen
papers.abstract: National industrial concentration in the U.S. has risen sharply since the early 1980s, but there remains dispute over whether local geographic concentration has followed a similar trend. Using near population data from the Economic Censuses, we confirm and extend existing evidence on national U.S. industrial concentration while providing novel evidence on local concentration. We document that the Herfindhahl index of local employment concentration, measured at the county-by-NAICS six-digit-industry cell level, fell between 1992 and 2017 even as local sales concentration rose. The divergence between national and local employment concentration trends is attributable to the structural transformation of U.S. economic activity: both sales and employment concentration rose within industry-by-county cells; but reallocation of sales and employment from relatively concentrated Manufacturing industries (e.g., steel mills) towards relatively un-concentrated Service industries (e.g. hair salons) reduced local concentration. A stronger between-sector shift in employment relative to sales drove the net fall in local employment concentration. Holding industry employment shares at their 1992 level, average local employment concentration would have risen by about 9% by 2017. Instead, it fell by 5%. Falling local employment concentration may intensify competition for recent market entrants. Simultaneously, rising within industry-by-geography concentration may weaken competition for incumbent workers who have limited sectoral mobility. To facilitate analysis, we have made data on these trends available for download.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS；JEL：E23, J42, L10, L11, L22, R11, R12
papers.zh_title: 就业与销售额的本地和全国集中度趋势：结构转型的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 自20世纪80年代初以来，美国的全国工业集中度急剧上升，但对于本地地理集中度是否遵循了类似趋势仍存在争议。利用经济普查的近乎总体数据，我们确认并扩展了关于美国全国工业集中度的现有证据，同时提供了关于本地集中度的新证据。我们记录到，本地就业集中度的赫芬达尔指数（按县和NAICS六位数行业单元衡量）在1992年至2017年间下降，而同期本地销售额集中度上升。全国和本地就业集中度趋势之间的差异可归因于美国经济活动的结构转型：在行业-县单元内部，销售额和就业集中度均有所上升；但销售额和就业从相对集中的制造业（例如，钢厂）向相对不集中的服务业（例如，理发店）的重新分配降低了本地集中度。就业方面比销售额方面更强的跨部门转移，推动了本地就业集中度的净下降。如果将行业就业份额保持在1992年的水平，到2017年，平均本地就业集中度本应上升约9%。但实际上，它下降了5%。本地就业集中度的下降可能会加剧新市场进入者之间的竞争。同时，行业-地理单元内部集中度的上升可能会削弱那些行业流动性有限的在职工人的竞争。为便于分析，我们已将这些趋势的数据提供下载。

papers.title: Disinflation and the Stock Market: Third World Lessons for First World Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Anusha Chari, Peter Blair Henry
papers.abstract: When policymakers implement a disinflation program directed at high inflation, the real dollar value of their country’s stock market index experiences a cumulative abnormal 12-month return of 48 percent in anticipation of the event. In contrast, the average cumulative abnormal 12-month return associated with disinflations directed at moderate inflation is negative 18 percent. The 66-percentage point difference between cumulative abnormal returns, along with descriptive evidence and case studies, suggests that unlike the swift eradication of past high inflations documented by Sargent (1982), the US will not experience a quick, low-cost transition from moderate inflation to the Fed’s two-percent target.
papers.zh_title: 去通胀与股票市场：第三世界对第一世界货币政策的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 当政策制定者实施针对高通胀的去通胀计划时，其国家股票市场指数的实际美元价值在事件预期期间会经历累计异常12个月回报率48%。相比之下，针对温和通胀的去通胀计划相关的平均累计异常12个月回报率为负18%。累计异常回报率之间66个百分点的差异，连同描述性证据和案例研究，表明与Sargent（1982）所记载的过去高通胀迅速消除不同，美国不会经历从温和通胀到美联储2%目标的快速、低成本过渡。

papers.title: FDI and Superstar Spillovers: Evidence from Firm-to-Firm Transactions
papers.authors: Mary Amiti, Cédric Duprez, Jozef Konings, John Van Reenen
papers.abstract: Using firm-to-firm transactions, we show that starting to supply a ‘superstar’ firm (large domestic firms, exporters and multinationals) boosts productivity by 8% in the medium-run. Placebos on starting relationships with smaller firms and novel identification strategies support a causal interpretation of “superstar spillovers”. Consistent with a model of technology transfer, we find falls in markups and bigger treatment effects from technology-intensive superstars. We also show that the increase in new buyers is particularly strong within the superstar firm's network, a “dating agency” effect. This suggests an important role for raising productivity through superstars' supply chains regardless of their multinational status.
papers.zh_title: 外商直接投资与超级明星溢出效应：来自企业间交易的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用企业间交易数据，我们表明开始向“超级明星”企业（大型国内企业、出口商和跨国公司）供货会在中期内使生产率提高8%。关于与较小企业建立关系的安慰剂检验以及新颖的识别策略支持了“超级明星溢出效应”的因果解释。与技术转移模型一致，我们发现加成率下降，且来自技术密集型超级明星的处理效应更大。我们还表明，新买家数量的增加在超级明星企业的网络内尤为显著，这是一种“婚介所”效应。这表明，无论其跨国状态如何，通过超级明星企业的供应链提高生产率都发挥着重要作用。

papers.title: Day Traders, Noise, and Cost of Immediacy
papers.authors: Manoj Dalvi, Prachi Deuskar, Lawrence R. Glosten, Ravi Jagannathan
papers.abstract: We identify different roles traders play using data with trader identities for all transactions in SENSEX-index stocks on the Bombay Stock Exchange from January 2005 to December 2011. Individual day traders (IDT) are identified as “noise traders”, who play an important role in the market microstructure literature. We measure the impact of their activity on market liquidity and trading of other market participants. IDT contribute 10% to volume while losing 3.2 bp (73% of the half-spread) on average on trades with others, including proprietary day traders (PDT), the primary intraday-liquidity providers, and longer-term traders. While we find some evidence that supports learning among IDT about their own ability and about how to trade, they continue to participate in the market even after losing for a long period. Instrumental variable regressions show that IDT activity reduces bid ask spread and increases intra-day volatility and total volume traded. The volume traded by PDT and the number of PDT active in the market also increase, but PDT profitability stays unchanged with increased IDT activity. This pattern is consistent with competition among PDT. Our results highlight the importance of IDT’s presence in lubricating financial markets.
papers.zh_title: 日内交易者、噪音与即时性成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2005年1月至2011年12月孟买证券交易所SENSEX指数股票所有交易中带有交易者身份的数据，识别了交易者扮演的不同角色。个人日内交易者（IDT）被识别为“噪音交易者”，他们在市场微观结构文献中扮演重要角色。我们衡量了其活动对市场流动性及其他市场参与者交易的影响。IDT贡献了10%的交易量，但在与其他交易者（包括作为主要日内流动性提供者的自营日内交易者（PDT）和长期交易者）的交易中平均损失3.2个基点（占半价差的73%）。虽然我们找到一些证据支持IDT关于自身能力和交易方式的认知学习，但他们在长期亏损后仍继续参与市场。工具变量回归表明，IDT活动降低了买卖价差，增加了日内波动性和总交易量。PDT的交易量和市场中活跃的PDT数量也有所增加，但PDT的盈利能力在IDT活动增加时保持不变。这种模式与PDT之间的竞争一致。我们的结果强调了IDT的存在在润滑金融市场中的重要性。

papers.title: Does Monetary Policy Matter? The Narrative Approach after 35 Years
papers.authors: Christina D. Romer, David H. Romer
papers.abstract: The narrative approach to macroeconomic identification uses qualitative sources, such as newspapers or government records, to provide information that can help establish causal relationships. This paper discusses the requirements for rigorous narrative analysis using fresh research on the impact of monetary policy as the focal application. We read the historical minutes and transcripts of Federal Reserve policymaking meetings to identify significant contractionary and expansionary changes in monetary policy not taken in response to current or prospective developments in real activity for the period 1946 to 2016. We find that such monetary shocks have large and significant effects on unemployment, output, and inflation in the expected directions. Analysis of available policy records suggests that a contractionary monetary shock likely occurred in 2022. Based on the empirical estimates of the effect of previous shocks, one would expect substantial negative impacts on real GDP and inflation in 2023 and 2024.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E31, E52, E58, E65, N12
papers.zh_title: 货币政策重要吗？35年后的叙事方法
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观经济识别的叙事方法利用定性资料，如报纸或政府记录，来提供有助于建立因果关系的信息。本文以货币政策影响的新研究作为焦点应用，讨论了严谨叙事分析的要求。我们阅读了1946年至2016年期间美联储政策制定会议的历史纪要和记录，以识别并非针对当前或预期实际活动发展而采取的重大紧缩性和扩张性货币政策变化。我们发现，此类货币冲击对失业、产出和通胀产生了符合预期方向的大幅且显著的影响。对现有政策记录的分析表明，2022年可能发生了一次紧缩性货币冲击。基于先前冲击效应的实证估计，可以预期2023年和2024年实际GDP和通胀将受到显著的负面影响。

papers.title: Logrolling in Congress
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Valerio Leone Sciabolazza, Eleonora Patacchini
papers.abstract: We study vote trading among U.S. Congress members. By tracking roll-call votes within bills across five legislatures and politicians' personal connections made during the school years, we document a propensity of connected legislators to vote together that depends on how salient the bill is to the politicians' legislative agenda. Although this activity does not seem to enhance U.S. Congress members' legislative effectiveness, vote trading is a strong predictor of future promotions to position of leadership.
papers.zh_title: 国会中的投票交易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国国会议员之间的投票交易。通过追踪五届立法机构内法案的唱名表决，以及政客在学生时代建立的个人关系，我们记录了有联系的议员共同投票的倾向，这种倾向取决于该法案对政客立法议程的显著程度。尽管这种行为似乎并未提升美国国会议员的立法效率，但投票交易是预测未来晋升至领导职位的有力指标。

papers.title: International Diversification, Reallocation, and the Labor Share
papers.authors: Joel M. David, Romain Rancière, David Zeke
papers.abstract: How does growing international financial diversification affect firm-level and aggregate labor shares? We study this question using a novel framework of firm labor choice in the face of aggregate risk. The theory implies a cross-section of labor risk premia and labor shares that appear as markups in firm-level data. International risk sharing leads to a reallocation of labor towards riskier/low labor share firms alongside a rise in within-firm labor shares, matching key micro-level facts. We use cross-country firm-level data to document a number of empirical patterns consistent with the theory, namely: (i) riskier firms have lower labor shares and (ii) international financial diversification is associated with a reallocation towards risky/low labor share firms. Our estimates suggest the reallocation effect has dominated the within effect in recent decades; on net, increased financial integration has reduced the corporate labor share in the US by about 2.5 percentage points, roughly one-third of the total decline since the 1970s.
papers.zh_title: 国际多元化、重新配置与劳动份额
papers.zh_abstract: 日益增长的国际金融多元化如何影响企业层面和总体的劳动份额？我们利用一个应对总体风险的企业劳动选择的新框架来研究这一问题。该理论意味着劳动风险溢价和劳动份额的横截面特征，这些特征在企业层面数据中表现为加成率。国际风险分担导致劳动向风险较高/劳动份额较低的企业重新配置，同时企业内部劳动份额上升，这与关键的微观层面事实相符。我们利用跨国企业层面数据记录了与理论一致的若干实证模式，即：(i) 风险较高的企业劳动份额较低；(ii) 国际金融多元化与向风险较高/劳动份额较低的企业重新配置相关。我们的估计表明，近几十年来，重新配置效应主导了内部效应；净效应上，金融一体化程度的提高使美国企业劳动份额下降了约2.5个百分点，约占自1970年代以来总降幅的三分之一。

papers.title: How Far Goods Travel: Global Transport and Supply Chains from 1965-2020
papers.authors: Sharat Ganapati, Woan Foong Wong
papers.abstract: This paper considers the evolution of global transportation usage over the past half century and its implications for supply chains. Transportation usage per unit of real output has more than doubled as costs decreased by a third. Participation of emerging economies in world trade and longer-distance trade between countries contribute to this usage increase, thereby encouraging longer supply chains. We discuss technological advances over this period, and their interactions with endogenous responses from transportation costs and supply chain linkages. Supply chains involving more countries and longer distances are reflective of reliable and efficient transportation, but are also more exposed to disruptions, highlighting the importance of considering the interconnectedness of transportation and supply chains in policymaking and future work.
papers.zh_title: 货物运输多远：1965-2020年的全球运输与供应链
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了过去半个世纪全球运输使用量的演变及其对供应链的影响。随着运输成本下降三分之一，单位实际产出的运输使用量增加了一倍以上。新兴经济体参与世界贸易以及国家间更长距离的贸易推动了这一使用量的增长，从而鼓励了更长的供应链。我们讨论了这一时期的技术进步，以及它们与运输成本和供应链关联的内生反应之间的相互作用。涉及更多国家和更长距离的供应链反映了可靠高效的运输，但也更容易受到 disruptions 的影响，这凸显了在政策制定和未来工作中考虑运输与供应链相互关联的重要性。

papers.title: Do Banks Hedge Using Interest Rate Swaps?
papers.authors: Lihong McPhail, Philipp Schnabl, Bruce Tuckman
papers.abstract: We analyze whether banks use interest rate swaps to hedge the interest rate risk of their assets, primarily loans and securities. By examining regulatory data on individual swap positions from the largest 250 U.S. banks, we find that banks hold large swap positions with an average notional value of $434 billion. However, after accounting for offsetting swap positions, the average bank exhibits almost no net interest rate risk from swaps: a 100-basis-point increase in rates reduces the value of its swaps by only 0.1% of bank equity. The variation in swap positions across banks indicates that banks use swaps to hedge interest rate risk, thereby facilitating risk transfer within the banking sector. Additionally, we find that swap dealer banks primarily hold swap positions for market making, while non-dealer banks use swaps to meet borrower demand for fixed-rate loans. Despite the substantial notional amounts, our findings suggest that swap positions are not economically significant in hedging the overall interest rate risk of bank assets. Instead, banks primarily rely on their deposit franchise to hedge interest rate risk.
papers.zh_title: 银行是否使用利率互换进行对冲？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了银行是否使用利率互换来对冲其资产（主要是贷款和证券）的利率风险。通过检查美国最大250家银行关于单个互换头寸的监管数据，我们发现银行持有大量互换头寸，平均名义价值为4340亿美元。然而，在考虑抵消性互换头寸后，平均银行几乎未表现出来自互换的净利率风险：利率上升100个基点仅使其互换价值减少银行股权的0.1%。银行间互换头寸的差异表明，银行使用互换来对冲利率风险，从而促进了银行部门内的风险转移。此外，我们发现，互换交易商银行主要出于做市目的持有互换头寸，而非交易商银行则使用互换来满足借款人对固定利率贷款的需求。尽管名义金额巨大，但我们的研究结果表明，互换头寸在对冲银行资产总体利率风险方面并不具有经济显著性。相反，银行主要依赖其存款特许经营权来对冲利率风险。

papers.title: CHOICE – What Can Go Wrong?
papers.authors: Daniel McFadden
papers.abstract: The elegant economic picture of rational consumers achieving Pareto optimality through trade in decentralized self-organized markets is blurred by market imperfections and choices inconsistent with consumer self-interest. Behavioral economics has documented these errors in choice, and considered interventions that can mitigate harm to individuals from bad choices. This essay considers more broadly market distortions that arise when sellers design and market products to exploit consumer errors, and suggests market management policies to mitigate these distortions. I give examples in which consumers’ lack of attention and diligence in collecting, filtering, and processing information has an outsize effect on market outcomes. I discuss identification and estimation of a two-stage model of decision-making, with attention determined in the first stage, and choice among alternatives described in the second stage. The stages in this model are linked by unobservable factors and identified by available information specific to each. I use this model to quantify the effects of inattention in a market for health insurance.
papers.meta: Programs：AG；JEL：D01, D04, D15, D18, D47, D83, D91, L14, L15
papers.zh_title: 选择——可能出什么问题？
papers.zh_abstract: 理性消费者通过去中心化自组织市场中的交易实现帕累托最优的优雅经济图景，因市场不完善和与消费者自身利益不一致的选择而变得模糊。行为经济学记录了这些选择错误，并考虑了能够减轻不良选择对个人伤害的干预措施。本文更广泛地探讨了当卖方设计并营销产品以利用消费者错误时产生的市场扭曲，并提出了缓解这些扭曲的市场管理政策。我举例说明了消费者在收集、筛选和处理信息方面缺乏注意力和勤奋对市场结果产生的巨大影响。我讨论了一个两阶段决策模型的识别和估计，其中注意力在第一阶段决定，而备选方案之间的选择在第二阶段描述。该模型中的阶段由不可观测因素联系，并通过每个阶段特有的可用信息进行识别。我使用该模型来量化健康保险市场中注意力不足的影响。

papers.title: Collateral Advantage: Exchange Rates, Capital Flows and Global Cycles
papers.authors: Michael B. Devereux, Charles Engel, Steve Pak Yeung Wu
papers.abstract: We construct a two-country New Keynesian model in which US government debt has an advantage as a superior collateral asset in the balance sheets of banks. The model can account for the observed response of the US dollar and US bond returns to a global downturn, in particular when the downturn is associated with a global financial crisis. In our model, the U.S. enjoys an “exorbitant privilege” as its government bonds are desired by banks both in the U.S. and abroad as superior collateral. In times of global stress, the dollar appreciates and the “convenience yield” earned by U.S. government bonds increases. There is “retrenchment” - each country reduces its holdings of foreign assets - a critical determinant of which is the endogenous response of prices and returns. In addition, the model displays a U.S. real exchange rate appreciation despite that domestic absorption in the US falls relative to the rest of the world during a global downturn, thus addressing the “reserve currency paradox” highlighted by Maggiori (2017).
papers.zh_title: 抵押品优势：汇率、资本流动与全球周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个两国新凯恩斯模型，其中美国政府债务作为银行资产负债表中的优质抵押品资产具有优势。该模型能够解释美元和美国债券收益对全球经济低迷（尤其是当低迷与全球金融危机相关时）的观测反应。在我们的模型中，美国享有“过度特权”，因为其政府债券被美国和国外的银行视为优质抵押品。在全球压力时期，美元升值，美国政府债券获得的“便利收益”增加。出现“收缩”——每个国家减少其外国资产持有量——其关键决定因素是价格和收益的内生反应。此外，该模型显示，尽管全球经济低迷期间美国国内吸收相对于世界其他地区下降，但美国实际汇率升值，从而解决了Maggiori（2017）强调的“储备货币悖论”。

papers.title: Wage Inequality in American Manufacturing, 1820-1940: New Evidence
papers.authors: Jeremy Atack, Robert A. Margo, Paul Rhode
papers.abstract: The consensus view among economic historians is that wage inequality in American manufacturing followed an inverted-U path from the early nineteenth century until just before World War Two. The previous literature, however, has been unable to fully document this path over time, or fully assess the role of explanatory factors such as changes in firm organization and technology. We provide fresh evidence that allow us to better document the inverted-U and its causes. In the first part of the paper, we use the U.S. Department of Labor’s 1899 “Hand and Machine Labor” study to argue that wage inequality within manufacturing establishments rose over the nineteenth century, primarily because of increasing division of labor In the second part, we use data for Massachusetts from state reports to construct a new time series on wage inequality among production workers, which declined from the early 1890s to the late 1930s, mainly because of compression in the left tail of the distribution. Analysis of industry panel data suggest that electrification was the main factor behind the compression.
papers.zh_title: 美国制造业的工资不平等，1820-1940年：新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 经济史学家普遍认为，从19世纪初到第二次世界大战前夕，美国制造业的工资不平等遵循倒U型路径。然而，以往的文献未能完全记录这一路径随时间的变化，也未能充分评估企业组织和技术变革等解释因素的作用。我们提供了新的证据，使我们能够更好地记录倒U型及其成因。在论文的第一部分，我们利用美国劳工部1899年的“手工与机器劳动”研究，论证了19世纪制造业企业内部工资不平等上升，主要原因是劳动分工的深化。在第二部分，我们利用马萨诸塞州的州报告数据，构建了生产工人工资不平等的新时间序列，该序列从1890年代初下降到1930年代末，主要是由于分布左尾的压缩。行业面板数据分析表明，电气化是压缩背后的主要因素。

papers.title: Intergenerational Child Mortality Impacts of Deworming: Experimental Evidence from Two Decades of the Kenya Life Panel Survey
papers.authors: Michael W. Walker, Alice H. Huang, Suleiman Asman, Sarah J. Baird, Lia Fernald, Joan Hamory Hicks, Fernando Hoces de la Guardia, Satoshi Koiso, Michael Kremer, Matthew N. Krupoff, Michelle Layvant, Eric Ochieng, Pooja Suri, Edward Miguel
papers.abstract: We assess the impacts of a randomized school-based deworming intervention in Kenya on the mortality of recipients’ children using a 23-year longitudinal data set of over 6,500 original participants and their offspring. The under-5 mortality rate fell by 22% (17 deaths per 1000 live births) for children of treatment group individuals. We find that a combination of improved health, education and living standards, increased urban residence, delayed fertility, and greater use of health care in the parent generation contributed to the reduction. The results provide evidence for meaningful intergenerational benefits of child health investments.
papers.zh_title: 驱虫治疗对儿童死亡率的代际影响：来自肯尼亚生命面板调查二十年的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含6500多名原始参与者及其后代、长达23年的纵向数据集，评估了肯尼亚一项随机学校驱虫干预措施对接受者子女死亡率的影响。治疗组个体子女的5岁以下死亡率下降了22%（每1000例活产减少17例死亡）。我们发现，亲代健康状况、教育水平、生活水平改善、城市居住增加、生育延迟以及医疗保健使用增加共同促成了这一下降。这些结果为儿童健康投资具有显著的代际收益提供了证据。

papers.title: Generative AI at Work
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Danielle Li, Lindsey R. Raymond
papers.abstract: New AI tools have the potential to change the way workers perform and learn, but little is known about their impacts on the job. In this paper, we study the staggered introduction of a generative AI-based conversational assistant using data from 5,179 customer support agents. Access to the tool increases productivity, as measured by issues resolved per hour, by 14% on average, including a 34% improvement for novice and low-skilled workers but with minimal impact on experienced and highly skilled workers. We provide suggestive evidence that the AI model disseminates the best practices of more able workers and helps newer workers move down the experience curve. In addition, we find that AI assistance improves customer sentiment, increases employee retention, and may lead to worker learning. Our results suggest that access to generative AI can increase productivity, with large heterogeneity in effects across workers.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D8, J24, M15, M51, O33
papers.zh_title: 工作中的生成式人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 新的人工智能工具有潜力改变员工的工作和学习方式，但关于它们对工作的影响，我们知之甚少。在本文中，我们利用来自5179名客户支持代理的数据，研究了基于生成式人工智能的对话助手的逐步引入。使用该工具后，以每小时解决的问题数量衡量的生产率平均提高了14%，其中新手和低技能工人的生产率提高了34%，但对经验丰富和高技能工人的影响微乎其微。我们提供了提示性证据，表明人工智能模型传播了能力较强工人的最佳实践，并帮助新工人沿着经验曲线向下移动。此外，我们发现人工智能辅助改善了客户情绪，提高了员工留存率，并可能促进工人学习。我们的结果表明，使用生成式人工智能可以提高生产率，但不同工人之间的效果存在很大异质性。

papers.title: Anatomy of a Run: The Terra Luna Crash
papers.authors: Jiageng Liu, Igor Makarov, Antoinette Schoar
papers.abstract: Terra, the third largest cryptocurrency ecosystem after Bitcoin and Ethereum, collapsed in three days in May 2022 and wiped out $50 billion in valuation. At the center of the collapse was a run on a blockchain-based borrowing and lending protocol (Anchor) that promised high yields to its stablecoin (UST) depositors. Using detailed data from the Terra blockchain and trading data from exchanges, we show that the run on Terra was a complex phenomenon that happened across multiple chains and assets. It was unlikely due to concentrated market manipulation by a third party but instead was precipitated by growing concerns about the sustainability of the system. Once a few large holders of UST adjusted their positions on May 7th, 2022, other large traders followed. Blockchain technology allowed investors to monitor each other's actions and amplified the speed of the run. Wealthier and more sophisticated investors were the first to run and experienced much smaller losses. Poorer and less sophisticated investors ran later and had larger losses. The complexity of the system made it difficult even for insiders to understand the buildup of risk. Finally, we draw broader lessons about financial fragility in an environment where a regulatory safety net does not exist, pseudonymous transactions are publicly observable, and market participants are incentivized to monitor the financial health of the system.
papers.zh_title: 挤兑剖析：Terra Luna崩溃事件
papers.zh_abstract: Terra是继比特币和以太坊之后的第三大加密货币生态系统，于2022年5月在三天内崩溃，市值蒸发500亿美元。崩溃的核心是对一个基于区块链的借贷协议（Anchor）的挤兑，该协议向其稳定币（UST）存款人承诺高收益。利用来自Terra区块链的详细数据和交易所的交易数据，我们表明Terra的挤兑是一个跨多条链和多种资产的复杂现象。它不太可能是由第三方集中市场操纵所致，而是由对系统可持续性日益增长的担忧所引发。一旦少数UST大户在2022年5月7日调整了头寸，其他大交易者便纷纷效仿。区块链技术使投资者能够相互监控彼此的行动，并加速了挤兑的速度。更富有、更精明的投资者最先挤兑，损失小得多；而较贫穷、较不精明的投资者挤兑较晚，损失更大。系统的复杂性使得即使是内部人士也难以理解风险的积累。最后，我们得出了关于在一个不存在监管安全网、假名交易公开可见且市场参与者有动力监控系统财务健康状况的环境中金融脆弱性的更广泛教训。

papers.title: Foreign Technology Adoption as a Flying Propeller
papers.authors: Yunfang Hu, Takuma Kunieda, Kazuo Nishimura, Ping Wang
papers.abstract: We construct a dynamic general equilibrium model of foreign direct investment (FDI) and foreign technology adoption, incorporating adoption barriers, international technology spillover, and relative price advantages. A higher FDI conversion efficacy, a lower adoption barrier, or a stronger international technology spillover, together with a lower relative price of FDI, can propel an economy to exhibit a flying geese paradigm escaping from a middle-income trap and catching up with the world frontier. We calibrate the model to eight representative Asian economies, including Asian Tigers and less-developed countries. Growth accounting exercises show that total factor productivity, FDI conversion efficacy, and foreign technology spillover drive Asian Tigers’ growth miracle, whereas a reduced adoption barrier and a favorable relative price of FDI are more crucial for the growth of less-developed Asian economies. The counterfactual analysis confirms that technology-embodied FDI serves as a flying propeller, explaining almost two-thirds of their economic growth.
papers.zh_title: 作为飞行螺旋桨的外国技术采用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个外商直接投资（FDI）和外国技术采用的动态一般均衡模型，纳入了采用壁垒、国际技术溢出和相对价格优势。更高的FDI转化效率、更低的采用壁垒或更强的国际技术溢出，加上更低的FDI相对价格，可以推动经济体表现出雁行范式，从而摆脱中等收入陷阱并追赶世界前沿。我们将模型校准到八个代表性亚洲经济体，包括亚洲四小龙和欠发达国家。增长核算显示，全要素生产率、FDI转化效率和外国技术溢出推动了亚洲四小龙的增长奇迹，而降低的采用壁垒和有利的FDI相对价格对于欠发达亚洲经济体的增长更为关键。反事实分析证实，技术体现型FDI起到了飞行螺旋桨的作用，解释了其经济增长的近三分之二。

papers.title: Covid and Cities, Thus Far
papers.authors: Gilles Duranton, Jessie Handbury
papers.abstract: A key reason for the existence of cities are the externalities created when people cluster together in close proximity. During Covid, such interactions came with health risks and people found other ways to interact. We document how cities changed during Covid and consider how the persistence of new ways of interacting, particularly remote work, will shape the development of cities in the future. We first summarize evidence showing how residential and commercial prices and activity adjusted at different distances from dense city centers during and since the pandemic. We use a textbook monocentric city model to demonstrate that two adjustments associated with remote work—reduced commuting times and increased housing demand—generate the patterns observed in the data. We then consider how these effects might be magnified by changes in urban amenities and agglomeration forces, and what such forces might mean for the future of cities.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情与城市：迄今的回顾
papers.zh_abstract: 城市存在的一个关键原因是人们近距离聚集在一起时产生的外部性。在新冠疫情期间，这种互动伴随着健康风险，人们找到了其他互动方式。我们记录了城市在疫情期间的变化，并考虑了新互动方式（尤其是远程工作）的持续性将如何塑造未来的城市发展。我们首先总结了证据，显示在疫情期间及之后，住宅和商业价格及活动如何根据与密集城市中心的不同距离进行调整。我们使用一个教科书式的单中心城市模型来证明，与远程工作相关的两种调整——通勤时间减少和住房需求增加——产生了数据中观察到的模式。然后，我们考虑了这些效应如何因城市便利设施和集聚力量的变化而被放大，以及这些力量对城市未来可能意味着什么。

papers.title: Bound by Ancestors: Immigration, Credit Frictions, and Global Supply Chain Formation
papers.authors: Jaerim Choi, Jay Hyun, Ziho Park
papers.abstract: This paper shows that the ancestry composition shaped by century-long immigration to the US can explain the current structure of global supply chain networks. Using an instrumental variable strategy, combined with a novel dataset that links firm-to-firm global supply chain information with a US establishment database and historical migration data, we find that the co-ethnic networks formed by immigration have a positive causal impact on global supply chain relationships between foreign countries and US counties. Such a positive impact not only exists in conventional supplier-customer relationships but also extends to strategic partnerships and trade in services. Examining the causal mechanisms, we find that the positive impact is stronger for counties in which more credit-constrained firms are located and that such a stronger effect becomes even more pronounced for foreign firms located in countries with weak contract enforcement. Collectively, the results suggest that co-ethnic networks serve as social collateral to overcome credit constraints and facilitate global supply chain formation.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IFM, ITI；JEL：F14, F22, F36, F60, G30, J61, L14
papers.zh_title: 祖先的羁绊：移民、信贷摩擦与全球供应链形成
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，由长达一个世纪的美国移民所塑造的祖先构成，可以解释当前全球供应链网络的结构。利用工具变量策略，结合一个将企业间全球供应链信息与美国企业数据库和历史移民数据联系起来的新数据集，我们发现移民形成的同族裔网络对外国与美国县之间的全球供应链关系具有正向因果影响。这种正向影响不仅存在于传统的供应商-客户关系中，还扩展到战略伙伴关系和服务贸易。在考察因果机制时，我们发现，对于信贷约束更强的企业所在的县，这种正向影响更强；而对于位于合同执行薄弱国家的外国企业，这种更强的效应变得更加显著。总体而言，结果表明同族裔网络作为社会抵押品，有助于克服信贷约束并促进全球供应链的形成。

papers.title: “There She Is, Your Ideal” Negative Social Comparisons and Health Behaviors
papers.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Brandyn F. Churchill
papers.abstract: We provide novel evidence on the role of negative social comparisons in population health behaviors by exploiting variation in Miss America and Miss USA beauty pageant winners. We show that there was more front-page newspaper coverage and more pageant-related internet search behavior following a home-state win. Teen girls and pageant-aged women with home-state winners were more likely to report that they were trying to lose weight, and pregnant women gained less gestational weight. We do not detect meaningful changes for teen boys, young adult men, or older women for whom social comparisons were plausibly less salient.
papers.zh_title: “她来了，你的理想”——负面社会比较与健康行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过利用美国小姐和美国妙龄小姐选美比赛获胜者的变化，提供了关于负面社会比较在人口健康行为中作用的新证据。我们表明，在来自本州的获胜者之后，报纸头版报道和与选美相关的互联网搜索行为有所增加。有本州获胜者的青少年女孩和选美适龄女性更有可能报告她们正在尝试减肥，而孕妇的孕期体重增加更少。我们没有检测到青少年男孩、年轻成年男性或老年女性（对于他们来说，社会比较的显著性可能较低）有有意义的变化。

papers.title: Tracing Sustainability in the Long Run: Genuine Savings Estimates 1850 - 2018
papers.authors: Eoin McLaughlin, Cristián Ducoing, Les Oxley
papers.abstract: We introduce a new database of historical Genuine Savings (GS), an indicator of sustainable development promoted by the World Bank and widely used in contemporary economic research. GS derives from the theoretical work on wealth accounting, and addresses shortcomings in conventional metrics of economic development by incorporating broader measures of saving and investment, including human capital (education), and natural resource depletion. Its value as an indicator is determined by its ability to be used to predict future well-being. This article provides consistent historical estimates of GS since 1850 for 25 countries to enhance, complement, and contextualise the work of the World Bank and others.
papers.zh_title: 长期追踪可持续性：1850-2018年真实储蓄估算
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个新的历史真实储蓄（GS）数据库，这是世界银行推广并广泛应用于当代经济研究的可持续发展指标。GS源于财富核算的理论工作，通过纳入更广泛的储蓄和投资衡量指标（包括人力资本（教育）和自然资源消耗），弥补了传统经济发展指标的不足。其作为指标的价值取决于它能否用于预测未来的福祉。本文为25个国家提供了自1850年以来一致的历史GS估算，以增强、补充和背景化世界银行及其他机构的工作。

papers.title: FinTech Lending with LowTech Pricing
papers.authors: Mark J. Johnson, Itzhak Ben-David, Jason Lee, Vincent Yao
papers.abstract: FinTech lending—known for using big data and advanced technologies—promised to break away from the traditional credit scoring and pricing models. Using a comprehensive dataset of FinTech personal loans, our study shows that loan rates continue to rely heavily on conventional credit scores, including 45% higher rates for nonprime borrowers. Other known default predictors are often neglected. Within each segment (prime/nonprime) loan rates are not very responsive to default risk, resulting in realized loan-level returns decreasing with risk. The pricing distortions result in substantial transfers from nonprime to prime borrowers and from low- to high-risk borrowers within segment.
papers.zh_title: 低技术定价的金融科技贷款
papers.zh_abstract: 以使用大数据和先进技术著称的金融科技贷款，曾承诺摆脱传统的信用评分和定价模式。利用金融科技个人贷款的全面数据集，我们的研究表明贷款利率仍然严重依赖传统的信用评分，非优质借款人的利率高出45%。其他已知的违约预测因素常常被忽略。在每个细分市场（优质/非优质）内，贷款利率对违约风险的反应并不大，导致实现的贷款层面回报随风险增加而下降。定价扭曲导致从非优质借款人向优质借款人、以及从细分市场内的低风险借款人向高风险借款人的实质性转移。

papers.title: Breaks in the Phillips Curve: Evidence from Panel Data
papers.authors: Simon Smith, Allan Timmermann, Jonathan H. Wright
papers.abstract: We revisit time-variation in the Phillips curve, applying new Bayesian panel methods with breakpoints to US and European Union disaggregate data. Our approach allows us to accurately estimate both the number and timing of breaks in the Phillips curve. It further allows us to determine the existence of clusters of industries, cities, or countries whose Phillips curves display similar patterns of instability and to examine lead-lag patterns in how individual inflation series change. We find evidence of a marked flattening in the Phillips curves for US sectoral data and among EU countries, particularly poorer ones. Conversely, evidence of a flattening is weaker for MSA-level data and for the wage Phillips curve. US regional data and EU data point to a kink in the price Phillips curve which remains relatively steep when the economy is running hot.
papers.zh_title: 菲利普斯曲线的断裂：来自面板数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视菲利普斯曲线的时间变化性，将带有断点的贝叶斯面板新方法应用于美国和欧盟的细分数据。我们的方法能够准确估计菲利普斯曲线断点的数量和发生时间。它还能让我们确定那些菲利普斯曲线表现出类似不稳定模式的行业、城市或国家集群，并考察各通胀序列变化中的领先-滞后模式。我们发现，美国行业数据以及欧盟国家（尤其是较贫穷国家）的菲利普斯曲线明显趋于平坦。相反，在都市统计区层面数据和工资菲利普斯曲线中，平坦化的证据较弱。美国区域数据和欧盟数据表明，价格菲利普斯曲线存在一个拐点，当经济过热运行时，该曲线仍然相对陡峭。

papers.title: Learning, Sophistication, and the Returns to Advertising: Implications for Differences in Firm Performance
papers.authors: Steven Tadelis, Christopher Hooton, Utsav Manjeer, Daniel Deisenroth, Nils Wernerfelt, Nick Dadson, Lindsay Greenbaum
papers.abstract: Why do establishments exhibit wide variation in their productivity and profitability? Can variation in returns to advertising help answer this question? We present results from a large field experiment on Facebook and Instagram that documents variance in advertisers’ ability to generate returns to advertising. We focus on campaigns aimed at boosting sales and tie advertising expenses to revenues for each advertiser. We find that spending on advertising led to significant increases in revenues, number of purchases, number of purchasers, and number of conversions. The heterogeneity in these results by expenditure, age, and engagement documents patterns consistent with learning by doing and variance in how sophisticated advertisers are. Advertisers who engage in more learning activities and more sophisticated data collection exhibit the highest returns and are more likely to continue their activities over time, suggesting that differences in advertising effectiveness may account for some of the variance in productivity across firms.
papers.zh_title: 学习、成熟度与广告回报：对企业绩效差异的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么不同企业在其生产率和盈利能力上表现出巨大差异？广告回报的差异能否帮助回答这个问题？我们展示了一项在Facebook和Instagram上进行的大规模实地实验结果，该实验记录了广告主从广告中获取回报的能力差异。我们聚焦于旨在提升销售额的广告活动，并将每位广告主的广告支出与其收入挂钩。我们发现，广告支出显著增加了收入、购买次数、购买人数以及转化次数。这些结果在支出、广告时长和参与度方面的异质性，揭示了与“干中学”以及广告主成熟度差异相一致的模式。那些参与更多学习活动并采用更复杂数据收集方法的广告主，获得了最高的回报，并且更有可能长期持续其广告活动。这表明，广告效果的差异可能解释了企业间生产率差异的一部分原因。

papers.title: Mortality Differentials, the Racial and Ethnic Retirement Wealth Gap, and the Great Pandemic
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: Using the Survey of Consumer Finances, I find that the Black/white gap in standard net worth widened from 1989 to 2019 but narrowed between Hispanics and (non-Hispanic) whites. When the definition of wealth is expanded to incorporate Social Security and defined benefit pension wealth (both the discounted sum of future benefits), the wealth gap is sharply reduced, especially for the ratio of median wealth. The Black/white and Hispanic/white disparity in Social Security wealth lessened considerably over 1989-2019. In contrast, the Black/white ratio of mean augmented wealth showed no change, though the ratio of median augmented wealth progressed. The Hispanic/white ratio of both mean and median augmented wealth advanced as well. The COVID-19 Pandemic struck in 2020 and hit the minority community much harder than whites in terms of mortality rates. Besides claiming over a million lives overall, it lopped off 4.7 percent of Social Security wealth among whites, 11.5 percent among Blacks, and 13.1 percent among Hispanics. As a result, while mean augmented wealth dipped only 1.2 percent among whites, it fell 6.7 percent among Black households and 7.3 percent among Hispanics. The effect was even stronger on median values – declines of a 2.6, 9.3 and 12.1 percent, respectively.
papers.zh_title: 死亡率差异、种族与族裔退休财富差距以及大流行病
papers.zh_abstract: 利用消费者金融调查数据，我发现从1989年到2019年，黑人与白人之间的标准净资产差距扩大了，但西班牙裔与（非西班牙裔）白人之间的差距有所缩小。当财富的定义扩展到包含社会保障和固定收益养老金财富（两者均为未来收益的折现总和）时，财富差距显著缩小，尤其是对于中位数财富的比率而言。在1989年至2019年间，黑人与白人以及西班牙裔与白人之间的社会保障财富差距大幅减小。相比之下，黑人与白人的平均扩增财富比率没有变化，但中位数扩增财富比率有所改善。西班牙裔与白人的平均和中位数扩增财富比率也均有所提升。2020年新冠疫情爆发，少数族裔社区的死亡率远高于白人。除了总体夺走超过一百万人的生命外，疫情还导致白人社会保障财富减少4.7%，黑人减少11.5%，西班牙裔减少13.1%。结果，白人的平均扩增财富仅下降1.2%，而黑人家庭下降6.7%，西班牙裔家庭下降7.3%。对中位数值的影响更为显著——分别下降了2.6%、9.3%和12.1%。

papers.title: Estimating a Theoretically Consistent Human Capital Production Function With an Application to Head Start
papers.authors: Robert Kaestner, Luis F. Faundez
papers.abstract: This article describes a conceptual and empirical approach for estimating a human capital production function of child development that incorporates mother- or child-fixed effects. The use of mother- or child-fixed effects is common in this applied economics literature, but its application is often inconsistent with human capital theory. We outline the problem and demonstrate its empirical importance with an analysis of the effect of Head Start and preschool on child and adult outcomes. The empirical specification we develop has broad implications for a variety of applied microeconomic analyses beyond our specific application Results of our analysis indicate that attending Head Start or preschool had no economically or statistically significant effect on child or adult outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 估计一个理论上一致的人力资本生产函数：以“开端计划”为例
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一种概念性和实证性的方法，用于估计包含母亲或儿童固定效应的儿童发展人力资本生产函数。在应用经济学文献中，使用母亲或儿童固定效应很常见，但其应用往往与人力资本理论不一致。我们概述了这一问题，并通过分析“开端计划”和学前教育对儿童及成人结果的影响，展示了其经验上的重要性。我们开发的实证规范，除了我们的具体应用之外，还对各种应用微观经济分析具有广泛的意义。我们的分析结果表明，参加“开端计划”或学前教育对儿童或成人的结果没有产生经济上或统计上显著的影响。

papers.title: A Simple Model of a Central Bank Digital Currency
papers.authors: Bineet Mishra, Eswar S. Prasad
papers.abstract: We develop a general equilibrium model that highlights the trade-offs between physical and digital forms of retail central bank money. The key differences between cash and central bank digital currency (CBDC) include transaction efficiency, possibilities for tax evasion, and, potentially, nominal rates of return. We establish conditions under which cash and CBDC can co-exist and show how government policies can influence relative holdings of cash, CBDC, and other assets. We illustrate how a CBDC can facilitate negative nominal interest rates and helicopter drops, and also how a CBDC can be structured to prevent capital flight from other assets.
papers.zh_title: 一个简单的央行数字货币模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个一般均衡模型，突出了零售央行货币的实物形式与数字形式之间的权衡。现金与央行数字货币（CBDC）的关键区别包括交易效率、逃税可能性以及潜在的名义回报率。我们建立了现金和CBDC可以共存的条件，并展示了政府政策如何影响现金、CBDC和其他资产的相对持有量。我们说明了CBDC如何促进负名义利率和“直升机撒钱”，以及如何构建CBDC以防止资本从其他资产外逃。

papers.title: It’s Baaack: The Surge in Inflation in the 2020s and the Return of the Non-Linear Phillips Curve
papers.authors: Pierpaolo Benigno, Gauti B. Eggertsson
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a non-linear New Keynesian Phillips curve (Inv-L NK Phillips Curve) to explain the surge of inflation in the 2020s. Economic slack is measured as firms' job vacancies over the number of unemployed workers. After showing empirical evidence of statistically significant nonlinearities, we propose a New Keynesian model with search and matching frictions, complemented by a form of wage rigidity, in the spirit of Phillips (1958), that generates strong nonlinearities. Policy implications include the thesis that appropriate monetary policy can bring inflation down without a significant recession and that the recent inflationary surge was mostly generated by a labor shortage -- i.e. an exceptionally tight labor market.
papers.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E12, E3, E30, E40, E50, E60
papers.zh_title: 它又回来了：2020年代的通货膨胀激增与非线性菲利普斯曲线的回归
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个非线性的新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线（Inv-L NK菲利普斯曲线）来解释2020年代的通货膨胀激增。经济松弛度以企业职位空缺与失业工人数量的比率来衡量。在展示了统计上显著的非线性经验证据后，我们提出了一个包含搜索与匹配摩擦的新凯恩斯模型，并辅以菲利普斯（1958）精神中的一种工资刚性形式，该模型产生了强烈的非线性。政策含义包括：适当的货币政策可以在不引发严重衰退的情况下降低通胀，以及近期的通胀激增主要是由劳动力短缺——即异常紧张的劳动力市场——造成的。

papers.title: Minimum Wage Effects Within Census Based Statistical Areas: A Matched Pair Cross-Border Analysis
papers.authors: Garrett C. Taylor, James E. West
papers.abstract: Using monthly data from major U.S. metropolitan areas that span state borders, we estimate the elasticity of employment with respect to the minimum wage using a difference-in-differences design with continuous treatment in two-digit industries of 71 (Arts, Entertainment and Recreation) and 72 (Accommodation and Food Services). In specifications that control for differences in state sales, personal and corporate income tax rates, we find negative average causal response on the treated (ACRT) in six-digit industries where we expect large numbers of young, entry-level employees, but positive correlations in other industries. Our results illustrate important heterogeneities in minimum wage effects in urban versus rural areas.
papers.zh_title: 基于人口普查统计区域内的最低工资效应：一项配对跨境分析
papers.zh_abstract: 利用跨越州界的美国主要大都市区的月度数据，我们采用连续处理的倍差法设计，估算了71（艺术、娱乐和休闲）和72（住宿和餐饮服务）这两个两位数行业中的就业相对于最低工资的弹性。在控制了各州销售税、个人所得税和公司所得税税率差异的规范中，我们在预期有大量年轻、入门级员工的六位数行业中发现了负的平均处理效应（ACRT），但在其他行业中发现了正相关关系。我们的结果说明了最低工资效应在城市与农村地区的重要异质性。

papers.title: Efficiency in Household Decision Making: Evidence from the Retirement Savings of U.S. Couples
papers.authors: Taha Choukhmane, Lucas Goodman, Cormac O'Dea
papers.abstract: We study how couples allocate retirement-saving contributions across each spouse's account. In a new dataset covering over a million U.S. individuals, we find retirement contributions are not allocated to the account with the highest employer match rate. This lack of coordination—which goes against the assumptions of most models of household decision-making—is common, costly, persistent over time, and cannot be explained by inertia, auto-enrollment, or simple heuristics. Complementing the administrative evidence with an online survey, we find that inefficient allocations reflect both financial mistakes as well as deliberate choices—especially when trust and commitment inside the households are weak.
papers.zh_title: 家庭决策中的效率：来自美国夫妇退休储蓄的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了夫妇如何在各自的账户之间分配退休储蓄缴款。在一个覆盖超过一百万美国个人的新数据集中，我们发现退休缴款并未被分配到雇主匹配率最高的账户。这种缺乏协调的现象——与大多数家庭决策模型的假设相悖——很普遍、代价高昂、随时间持续存在，并且不能用惯性、自动加入或简单启发式方法解释。通过用在线调查补充行政证据，我们发现低效的分配既反映了财务失误，也反映了深思熟虑的选择——尤其是在家庭内部信任和承诺薄弱的情况下。

papers.title: Nonlinear Budget Set Regressions for the Random Utility Model
papers.authors: Sören Blomquist, Anil Kumar, Che-Yuan Liang, Whitney Newey
papers.abstract: This paper is about the nonparametric regression of a choice variable on a nonlinear budget set under utility maximization with general heterogeneity, i.e. in the random utility model (RUM). We show that utility maximization and convex budget sets make this regression three dimensional with a more parsimonious specification than previously derived. We show that nonconvexities in the budget set will have little effect on these results in important cases. We characterize all the restrictions of utility maximization on the budget set regression and show how to check these restrictions in applications. We formulate budget set effects that can be identified by this regression and give automatic debiased machine learners of these effects. We consider use of control functions to allow for endogeneity. Throughout we take as the main example the effect of taxes on taxable income including accounting for productivity growth. In an application to Swedish data we find the taxable income elasticity of a change in the slope of each segment to be .52, that the regression satisfies the restrictions of utility maximization at the values chosen for over 95% of observations, and that a productivity growth rate we estimate is close to other estimates.
papers.zh_title: 随机效用模型中的非线性预算集回归
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究在具有一般异质性的效用最大化（即随机效用模型，RUM）下，选择变量对非线性预算集的非参数回归。我们证明，效用最大化和凸预算集使得该回归具有三维性，且其设定比先前推导的更为简约。我们表明，在重要情况下，预算集的非凸性对这些结果影响甚微。我们刻画了效用最大化对预算集回归的所有约束条件，并展示了如何在应用中检验这些约束。我们提出了可以通过该回归识别的预算集效应，并给出了这些效应的自动去偏置机器学习方法。我们考虑了使用控制函数来处理内生性问题。在整个过程中，我们以税收对应税收入的影响（包括考虑生产率增长）作为主要例子。在应用于瑞典数据时，我们发现每个分段斜率变化的应税收入弹性为0.52，该回归在超过95%的观测值上满足效用最大化的约束条件，并且我们估计的生产率增长率与其他估计值接近。

papers.title: How Many Americans Work Remotely? A Survey of Surveys and Their Measurement Issues
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, John J. Horton, Christos Makridis, Alexandre Mas, Adam Ozimek, Daniel Rock, Hong-Yi TuYe
papers.abstract: Remote work surged during the Covid pandemic but there is disagreement about the extent of the change. To address this question, we field a new, nationally-representative survey: the Remote Life Survey (RLS). We find that in October 2020, 31.6 percent of the continuously employed workforce always worked from home (WFH) and 21.9 percent sometimes or rarely WFH, totaling 53.5 percent. We compare our results with alternative measurement approaches, with a focus on government surveys and provide estimates on the impact of four factors: (a) differences among mail versus web-based survey respondents, (b) differences in the inclusion of self-employed workers, (c) the industry mix of the sample, and (d) the exclusion of people who were already remote pre-pandemic. We find that the last explanation (d) explains the bulk of the difference in estimates between the Current Population Survey (CPS) and other measures of remote work. Policymakers and researchers who turn to the BLS-CPS data series for an estimate of remote work prevalence in the American economy should note that it might be underestimating WFH levels by up to 25 percentage points. Under our preferred estimates, we find that about half of the U.S. workforce worked remotely at least one day each week as of December 2020.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：I15, J21, L23, M15, M5
papers.zh_title: 有多少美国人在远程工作？一项关于调查及其测量问题的综述
papers.zh_abstract: 远程工作在新冠疫情期间激增，但对于变化程度存在分歧。为解决这一问题，我们开展了一项新的全国代表性调查：远程生活调查（RLS）。我们发现，在2020年10月，31.6%的持续就业劳动力始终在家工作（WFH），21.9%有时或很少在家工作，总计53.5%。我们将结果与其他测量方法进行比较，重点关注政府调查，并提供了四个因素影响的估计：（a）邮件与网络调查受访者之间的差异，（b）是否包含自雇工人的差异，（c）样本的行业构成，以及（d）排除疫情前已远程工作的人员。我们发现，最后一个解释（d）解释了当前人口调查（CPS）与其他远程工作测量之间的大部分估计差异。转向BLS-CPS数据系列以获取美国经济中远程工作普遍程度估计的政策制定者和研究人员应注意，它可能低估了在家工作水平高达25个百分点。根据我们的首选估计，我们发现截至2020年12月，约一半的美国劳动力每周至少有一天远程工作。

papers.title: Managers and Productivity in Retail
papers.authors: Robert D. Metcalfe, Alexandre B. Sollaci, Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: Across many sectors, research has established that management explains a notable portion of productivity differences across organizations. A remaining question, however, is whether it is managers themselves or firm-wide management practices that matter. We shed light on this question by analyzing store-level data from two multibillion-dollar retail companies. In this setting, managers move between stores but management practices are set by firm policy and largely fixed, allowing us to hone in on managers’ personal roles in determining store performance. We find: (i) managers affect and explain a large share of the variance of store-level productivity; (ii) negative assortative matching between managers and stores, which may reflect both firms’ decisions and a selection-driven bias that we characterize and argue might apply in other settings using movers designs; (iii) managers who move do so on average from less productive to more productive stores; (iv) female managers are less likely to move stores than male managers; (v) manager quality is generally hard to explain with the observables in our data, but is correlated with the ratio of full-time to part-time workers; (vi) managers who obtain high labor productivity also tend to obtain high energy productivity, revealing some breadth in managers’ skills applicability; (vii) high-performing managers in stable growth times are also high-performing during turbulent times; and (viii) exogenous productivity shocks improve the quality of initially low quality managers, suggesting managers can learn. We explain implications of these findings for productivity research.
papers.zh_title: 零售业的管理者与生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多行业中，研究已证实管理解释了组织间生产率差异的显著部分。然而，一个遗留问题是，起作用的究竟是管理者本身还是公司范围内的管理实践。我们通过分析两家价值数十亿美元的零售公司的门店级数据来阐明这一问题。在此背景下，管理者在门店之间流动，但管理实践由公司政策设定且基本固定，这使我们能够聚焦于管理者在决定门店绩效中的个人作用。我们发现：（i）管理者影响并解释了门店层面生产率方差的很大一部分；（ii）管理者与门店之间存在负向分类匹配，这可能反映了公司的决策以及我们描述并认为可能适用于其他使用流动者设计的情境的选择驱动偏差；（iii）流动的管理者平均从生产率较低的门店流向生产率较高的门店；（iv）女性管理者比男性管理者更不可能更换门店；（v）管理者质量通常难以用我们数据中的可观测变量解释，但与全职与兼职工人比率相关；（vi）获得高劳动生产率的管理者也倾向于获得高能源生产率，揭示了管理者技能适用性的一定广度；（vii）在稳定增长时期表现优异的管理者在动荡时期也表现优异；（viii）外生生产率冲击提高了初始低质量管理者的质量，表明管理者可以学习。我们解释了这些发现对生产率研究的意义。

papers.title: The Effects of Minimum Wages on (Almost) Everything? A Review of Recent Evidence on Health and Related Behaviors
papers.authors: David Neumark
papers.abstract: The effects of minimum wages on employment, wages, earnings, and incomes, have been studied and debated for decades. In recent years, however, researchers have turned to the effects on a multitude of other behaviors and outcomes – largely related to health. I review and assess the large and growing body of evidence on minimum wage effects on a wide variety of health outcomes and health-related behaviors. \nThe evidence, even focusing on the more-compelling studies, is decidedly mixed. The evidence on physical health points in conflicting directions, and may lean towards adverse effects, possibly a reflection, in part, of the conflicting influences of minimum wages on factors that can affect health (related to how higher income is spent). In particular, research on the effects of minimum wages on diet and obesity sometimes points to beneficial effects, while other evidence indicates that higher minimum wages increase smoking and drinking and reduce exercise (and possibly hygiene). In contrast, there is rather strong evidence that higher minimum wages reduce suicides, partly consistent with the evidence of effects on other measures of mental health/depression being either positive or mixed. \nOverall, policy conclusions that minimum wages improve health are unwarranted or at least premature. Moreover, this research literature would benefit from more rigorous evidence, borrowing from the longer-running research on the labor market impacts of minimum wages.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I14, J08
papers.zh_title: 最低工资对（几乎）一切的影响？近期关于健康及相关行为证据的综述
papers.zh_abstract: 最低工资对就业、工资、收入和所得的影响已被研究和争论数十年。然而，近年来，研究人员转向其对众多其他行为和结果的影响——主要与健康相关。我回顾并评估了关于最低工资对各种健康结果和健康相关行为影响的大量且不断增长的证据。即使聚焦于更具说服力的研究，证据也明显好坏参半。关于身体健康的证据指向相互矛盾的方向，可能倾向于不利影响，这在一定程度上可能反映了最低工资对可能影响健康的因素（与更高收入如何花费相关）的冲突性影响。特别是，关于最低工资对饮食和肥胖影响的研究有时指向有益效果，而其他证据表明更高的最低工资增加了吸烟和饮酒，并减少了锻炼（可能还有卫生）。相比之下，有相当强的证据表明更高的最低工资减少了自杀，部分与对其他心理健康/抑郁测量指标的影响证据一致，这些影响要么是积极的，要么是好坏参半。总体而言，认为最低工资改善健康的政策结论是没有根据的，或至少为时过早。此外，这一研究文献将受益于更严格的证据，借鉴关于最低工资劳动力市场影响的更长期研究。

papers.title: Inflation Expectations and Misallocation of Resources: Evidence from Italy
papers.authors: Tiziano Ropele, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
papers.abstract: Using Italian data that includes both inflation forecasts of firms and external information on their balance sheets, we study the causal effect of changes in the dispersion of beliefs about future inflation on the misallocation of resources. We find that as disagreement increases, so does misallocation. In times of low inflation, the aggregate TFP loss of the dispersed expectations-induced misallocation is low, but we argue that it likely becomes quite significant in times of high inflation.
papers.zh_title: 通胀预期与资源错配：来自意大利的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用包含企业通胀预测及其资产负债表外部信息的意大利数据，我们研究了未来通胀信念离散度变化对资源错配的因果效应。我们发现，随着分歧增加，错配也会加剧。在低通胀时期，由分散预期导致的错配造成的全要素生产率总体损失较低，但我们认为，在高通胀时期，这种损失可能变得相当显著。

papers.title: Microdata and the Valuation of Natural Capital
papers.authors: Jonathan M. Colmer, John L. Voorheis
papers.abstract: The practical valuation of natural capital remains a challenge, despite a strong theoretical foundation and advances in our understanding of coupled natural and human systems. This paper discusses the extent to which advances in the availability of individual-level microdata might relax measurement constraints, and in turn open the door to new methodological and accounting frameworks that incorporate spatial and individual heterogeneity. We discuss conceptual issues, provide an overview of a new prototype microdata infrastructure developed by the US Census Bureau—the Census Environmental Impacts Frame—and present descriptive evidence on the individual-level distribution of urban tree canopy cover in the United States. Our analysis highlights the empirical relevance of aggregation bias and potential for within-location heterogeneity in demand for natural capital.
papers.zh_title: 微观数据与自然资本估值
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管有坚实的理论基础以及我们对耦合自然与人类系统理解的进步，自然资本的实际估值仍然是一个挑战。本文讨论了个人层面微观数据可用性的进步在多大程度上可能放松测量约束，进而为纳入空间和个体异质性的新方法论和核算框架打开大门。我们讨论了概念性问题，概述了美国人口普查局开发的新原型微观数据基础设施——人口普查环境影响框架，并提供了美国城市树冠覆盖率的个人层面分布描述性证据。我们的分析强调了加总偏差的经验相关性以及自然资本需求中位置内异质性的可能性。

papers.title: The Path of Student Learning Delay During the COVID-19 Pandemic: Evidence from Michigan
papers.authors: Katharine O. Strunk, Bryant G. Hopkins, Tara Kilbride, Scott A. Imberman, Dongming Yu
papers.abstract: Educators and policymakers have been concerned that the COVID-19 pandemic has led to substantial delays in learning due to disruptions, anxiety, and remote schooling. We study student achievement patterns over the pandemic using a combination of state summative and higher frequency benchmark assessments for middle school students in Michigan. Comparing pre-pandemic to post-pandemic cohorts we find that math and ELA achievement growth dropped by 0.22, and 0.03 standard deviations more than expected, respectively, between 2019 and 2022. These drops were larger for Black, Latino, and economically disadvantaged students, as well as students in districts that were at least partially remote in 2021-22. Benchmark assessment results are consistent with summative assessments and show sharp drops in 2020-21 followed by a partial recovery and potential stall-out in 2021-22.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间学生学习延迟的路径：来自密歇根州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 教育工作者和政策制定者一直担心，COVID-19疫情因干扰、焦虑和远程教学导致学习出现严重延迟。我们利用密歇根州中学生的州总结性评估和更高频率的基准评估相结合的数据，研究了疫情期间的学生成绩模式。比较疫情前和疫情后的队列，我们发现，在2019年至2022年间，数学和英语语言艺术成绩增长分别比预期低0.22和0.03个标准差。这些下降在黑人和拉丁裔学生、经济弱势学生以及2021-22学年至少部分远程教学的学区学生中更为显著。基准评估结果与总结性评估一致，显示2020-21学年急剧下降，随后在2021-22学年出现部分恢复和潜在的停滞。

papers.title: Why Did Putin Invade Ukraine? A Theory of Degenerate Autocracy
papers.authors: Georgy Egorov, Konstantin Sonin
papers.abstract: Many, if not most, personalistic dictatorships end up with a disastrous decision such as Hitler’s attack on the Soviet Union, Hirohito’s government launching a war against the United States, or Putin’s invasion of Ukraine in February 2022. Even if the decision is not ultimately fatal for the regime, such as Mao’s Big Leap Forward or the Pol Pot’s collectivization drive, they typically involve both a monumental miscalculation and an institutional environment in which better-informed subordinates have no chance to prevent the decision from being implemented. We offer a dynamic model of non-democratic politics, in which repression and bad decision-making are self-reinforcing. Repressions reduce the threat, yet raise the stakes for the incumbent; with higher stakes, the incumbent puts more emphasis on loyalty than competence. Our theory sheds light on the mechanism of disastrous individual decisions in highly institutionalized authoritarian regimes.
papers.zh_title: 普京为何入侵乌克兰？一种退化式独裁理论
papers.zh_abstract: 许多（如果不是大多数）个人独裁政权最终会做出灾难性决策，例如希特勒进攻苏联、裕仁政府发动对美战争，或普京在2022年2月入侵乌克兰。即使该决策最终对政权不致命，例如毛泽东的大跃进或波尔布特的集体化运动，它们通常既涉及巨大的误判，也涉及一种制度环境，在这种环境中，信息更充分的 subordinates 没有机会阻止决策的实施。我们提供了一个非民主政治的动态模型，其中镇压和糟糕决策是自我强化的。镇压降低了威胁，却提高了现任者的赌注；随着赌注增加，现任者更强调忠诚而非能力。我们的理论揭示了高度制度化的威权政权中灾难性个人决策的机制。

papers.title: Where Do STEM Graduates Stem From? The Intergenerational Transmission of Comparative Skill Advantages
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Babs Jacobs, Guido Schwerdt, Rolf van der Velden, Stan Vermeulen, Simon Wiederhold
papers.abstract: The standard economic model of occupational choice following a basic Roy model emphasizes individual selection and comparative advantage, but the sources of comparative advantage are not well understood. We employ a unique combination of Dutch survey and registry data that links math and language skills across generations and permits analysis of the intergenerational transmission of comparative skill advantages. Exploiting within-family between-subject variation in skills, we show that comparative advantages in math of parents are significantly linked to those of their children. A causal interpretation follows from a novel IV estimation that isolates variation in parent skill advantages due to their teacher and classroom peer quality. Finally, we show the strong influence of family skill transmission on children’s choices of STEM fields.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I24, I26, J12, J62
papers.zh_title: STEM毕业生从何而来？比较技能优势的代际传递
papers.zh_abstract: 基于基本Roy模型的职业选择标准经济模型强调个人选择和比较优势，但比较优势的来源尚不明确。我们利用荷兰调查和登记数据的独特组合，该数据将跨代的数学和语言技能联系起来，并允许分析比较技能优势的代际传递。利用家庭内学科间的技能变异，我们表明父母的数学比较优势与其子女的数学比较优势显著相关。因果解释来自一种新颖的IV估计，该估计分离了因教师和课堂同伴质量导致的父母技能优势变异。最后，我们展示了家庭技能传递对子女选择STEM领域的强烈影响。

papers.title: Can Deficits Finance Themselves?
papers.authors: George-Marios Angeletos, Chen Lian, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: We ask how fiscal deficits are financed in environments with two key features: (i) nominal rigidity, and (ii) a violation of Ricardian equivalence due to finite lives or liquidity constraints. In such environments, deficits can contribute to their own financing through two channels: a boom in real economic activity, which expands the tax base; and a surge in inflation, which erodes the real value of nominal government debt. Our main theoretical result establishes that this mechanism becomes more potent as fiscal adjustment is delayed, leading to full self-financing in the limit. In this scenario, the government can run a deficit today, refrain from tax hikes or spending cuts in the future, and still see its debt converge back to its initial level. We further demonstrate that a significant degree of self-financing is achievable when the theory is disciplined by empirical evidence on marginal propensities to consume, nominal rigidities, and the speed of fiscal adjustment.
papers.zh_title: 赤字能否自我融资？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨在具有两个关键特征的环境中财政赤字如何融资：（i）名义刚性，以及（ii）因有限寿命或流动性约束导致的李嘉图等价失效。在此类环境中，赤字可通过两个渠道促进其自身融资：实际经济活动的繁荣（扩大税基）以及通胀飙升（侵蚀名义政府债务的实际价值）。我们的主要理论结果表明，随着财政调整的延迟，这一机制会变得更为有效，最终在极限情况下实现完全自我融资。在此情景下，政府可以今天运行赤字，未来不增税或削减支出，而其债务仍会收敛回初始水平。我们进一步证明，当理论受到关于边际消费倾向、名义刚性和财政调整速度的实证证据约束时，可以实现显著程度的自我融资。

papers.title: A Local Projections Approach to Difference-in-Differences
papers.authors: Arindrajit Dube, Daniele Girardi, Òscar Jordà, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: We propose a local projections (LPs) based difference-in-differences approach that subsumes many of the recent solutions proposed in the literature to address possible biases arising from negative weighting. We combine LPs with a flexible ‘clean control’ condition to define appropriate sets of treated and control units. Our proposed LP-DiD estimator can be implemented with various weighting and normalization schemes for different target estimands, can be extended to include covariates or accommodate non-absorbing treatment, and is simple and fast to implement. A simulation and two empirical applications demonstrate that the LP-DiD estimator performs well in common applied settings.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, LS, ME, POL；JEL：C1, C23, C5
papers.zh_title: 双重差分法的局部投影方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于局部投影（LPs）的双重差分方法，该方法涵盖了文献中近期提出的许多解决方案，以解决因负权重可能产生的偏差。我们将LPs与灵活的“干净控制”条件相结合，以定义适当的处理组和对照组。我们提出的LP-DiD估计量可以通过不同的加权和标准化方案实现不同的目标估计量，可以扩展以包含协变量或适应非吸收性处理，并且实施简单快速。一项模拟和两个实证应用表明，LP-DiD估计量在常见的应用场景中表现良好。

papers.title: From Carry Trades to Trade Credit: Financial Intermediation by Non-Financial Corporations
papers.authors: Bryan Hardy, Felipe Saffie
papers.abstract: We use unique firm-level data from Mexico to document that non-financial corporations engage in carry trades by borrowing in foreign currency (FX) and lending in domestic currency, largely in the form of trade credit, accumulating currency risk in the process. We show at a quarterly frequency that the practice of borrowing in FX and extending trade credit is more prevalent when foreign currency borrowing is relatively cheaper than local currency borrowing, and it is associated with expansions in both gross trade credit and sales. Firms that were more active in carry-trades, accumulating currency risk, experienced larger reductions in investment and profits following a large depreciation event. Nevertheless, their extension of trade credit remained stable, insulating their trading partners from the shock. A firm-level panel for 20 emerging countries provide external validity for the link between carry trades and trade credit.
papers.zh_title: 从套利交易到贸易信贷：非金融企业的金融中介
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用墨西哥独特的企业层面数据，记录了非金融企业通过借入外币（FX）并以本币放贷（主要以贸易信贷形式）从事套利交易，在此过程中积累货币风险。我们在季度频率上表明，当外币借款相对本币借款更便宜时，借入外币并发放贸易信贷的做法更为普遍，并且这与总贸易信贷和销售额的扩张相关。在经历大幅贬值事件后，那些更积极参与套利交易、积累货币风险的企业，其投资和利润下降幅度更大。然而，它们提供的贸易信贷保持稳定，使其贸易伙伴免受冲击的影响。一个涵盖20个新兴国家的企业层面面板数据为套利交易与贸易信贷之间的联系提供了外部有效性。

papers.title: Minimum Wages and Poverty: New Evidence from Dynamic Difference-in-Differences Estimates
papers.authors: Richard V. Burkhauser, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Advocates of minimum wage increases have long touted their potential to reduce poverty. This study assesses this claim. Using data spanning nearly four decades from the March Current Population Survey, and a dynamic difference-in-differences approach, we find that a 10 percent increase in the minimum wage is associated with a (statistically insignificant) 0.17 percent increase in the probability of longer-run poverty among all persons. With 95% confidence, we can rule out long-run poverty elasticities with respect to the minimum wage of less than -0.129, which includes central poverty elasticities reported by Dube (2019). Prior evidence suggesting large poverty-reducing effects of the minimum wage are (i) highly sensitive to researcher’s choice of macroeconomic controls, and (ii) driven by specifications that limit counterfactuals to geographically proximate states (“close controls”), which poorly match treatment states’ pre-treatment poverty trends. Moreover, an examination of the post-Great Recession era — which saw frequent, large increases in state minimum wages — failed to uncover poverty-reducing effects of the minimum wage across a wide set of specifications. Finally, we find that less than 10 percent of workers who would be affected by a newly proposed $15 federal minimum wage live in poor families.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资与贫困：来自动态双重差分估计的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 最低工资上涨的支持者长期以来一直宣扬其减少贫困的潜力。本研究评估了这一说法。利用来自三月当前人口调查（March Current Population Survey）跨越近四十年的数据，并采用动态双重差分方法，我们发现最低工资每提高10%，与所有人长期贫困概率（统计上不显著）增加0.17%相关。在95%的置信水平下，我们可以排除最低工资的长期贫困弹性小于-0.129的情况，这包括了Dube（2019）报告的核心贫困弹性。先前表明最低工资具有显著减贫效果的证据（i）对研究者选择的宏观经济控制变量高度敏感，并且（ii）由那些将反事实限制在地理邻近州（“紧密控制”）的设定所驱动，而这些设定在处理组的预处理贫困趋势上匹配不佳。此外，对后大衰退时期（该时期各州最低工资频繁大幅上涨）的考察，未能在一系列广泛的设定中发现最低工资的减贫效果。最后，我们发现，在拟议的新联邦最低工资15美元可能影响的工人中，只有不到10%生活在贫困家庭。

papers.title: Incorporating Theory-Consistent Endogenous Markups into Applied General-Equilibrium Models
papers.authors: James R. Markusen
papers.abstract: The incorporation of increasing returns and imperfect competition into applied general-equilibrium (AGE) models, beginning with Harris (1984), led to much larger welfare effects from changes such as trade liberalization. But the imperfect competition side of these IO developments has often failed to incorporate meaningful strategic behavior, largely ruling out firm-level productivity and scale effects. I show here that the incorporation of theory-based endogenous markups into AGE models is not difficult in spite of the added simultaneity of the system. I first derive the optimal markup equations for Nash Cournot and Nash Bertrand competition in a CES environment with free entry and exit. Then I code a simple numerical model using non-linear complementarity. Three alternatives are considered: large-group monopolistic competition (LGMC), small-group Cournot (SGC) and small-group Bertrand (SGB). Growth in the economy is the experiment used to compare these specifications.
