While the overall effects of growth on welfare are qualitatively similar, the gains to initially small economies are much larger under either small-group assumption relative to LGMC, but diminish relative to LGMC as economies grow large. Secondly I show how the contributions of variety (entry), firm scale (productivity), and markups (distortions) to welfare changes differ substantially among the three alternatives.
papers.zh_title: 将理论一致的内生加成定价纳入应用一般均衡模型
papers.zh_abstract: 从Harris（1984）开始，将规模报酬递增和不完全竞争纳入应用一般均衡（AGE）模型，使得诸如贸易自由化等变化带来的福利效应大大增加。但这些产业组织发展的不完全竞争方面往往未能纳入有意义的策略性行为，很大程度上排除了企业层面的生产率和规模效应。我在此表明，尽管系统增加了同时性，但将基于理论的内生加成定价纳入AGE模型并不困难。我首先推导了在具有自由进入和退出的CES环境下，纳什古诺（Nash Cournot）和纳什伯特兰（Nash Bertrand）竞争的最优加成定价方程。然后，我使用非线性互补方法编写了一个简单的数值模型。考虑了三种替代方案：大群体垄断竞争（LGMC）、小群体古诺（SGC）和小群体伯特兰（SGB）。经济增长被用作比较这些设定的实验。虽然增长对福利的总体影响在性质上相似，但在小群体假设下，初始小经济体的收益相对于LGMC要大得多，但随着经济体规模变大，这些收益相对于LGMC会减少。其次，我展示了品种（进入）、企业规模（生产率）和加成定价（扭曲）对福利变化的贡献在三种替代方案之间存在显著差异。

papers.title: The Secular Decrease in UK Safe Asset Market Power
papers.authors: Jason Choi, Duong Q. Dang, Rishabh Kirpalani, Diego J. Perez
papers.abstract: We document the decline in market power of the U.K. in safe assets and quantify the resulting losses. We estimate an increasing elasticity of demand for U.K. public debt during the latter half of the 20th century. This is in sharp contrast to the U.S., which displays the opposite pattern with decreasing elasticities of demand during this time. We argue that the decline in market power of the U.K. in safe assets resulted in a sizable decline in seigniorage revenues.
papers.zh_title: 英国安全资产市场势力的长期下降
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了英国在安全资产领域市场势力的下降，并量化了由此产生的损失。我们估计，在20世纪下半叶，对英国公共债务的需求弹性在增加。这与美国形成鲜明对比，美国在此期间表现出相反的模式，需求弹性在下降。我们认为，英国在安全资产领域市场势力的下降导致了铸币税收入的显著减少。

papers.title: Supply Chain Constraints and Inflation
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Robert C. Johnson, Callum J. Jones
papers.abstract: We develop a New Keynesian framework to evaluate how potentially binding capacity constraints, and shocks to them, shape inflation. We show that binding constraints for domestic and foreign producers shift domestic and import price Phillips Curves up. Further, data on prices and quantities together identify whether constraints bind due to increased demand or reductions in capacity. Applying the model to interpret recent US data, we find that binding constraints in the goods sector explain half of the increase in inflation during 2021-2022. In particular, tight capacity served to amplify the impact of loose monetary policy in 2021, fueling the inflation takeoff.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, LS, ME, PR；JEL：E12, E3, E5, F40
papers.zh_title: 供应链约束与通货膨胀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个新凯恩斯主义框架，以评估潜在具有约束力的产能约束及其冲击如何塑造通胀。我们表明，对国内和国外生产者具有约束力的约束会使国内和进口价格菲利普斯曲线上移。此外，价格和数量的数据共同识别出约束是由于需求增加还是产能减少所致。将该模型应用于解释近期美国数据，我们发现，商品部门具有约束力的约束解释了2021-2022年通胀上升的一半。特别是，紧张的产能放大了2021年宽松货币政策的影响，助长了通胀的起飞。

papers.title: Mild Government Failure
papers.authors: Shang-Jin Wei, Jianhuan Xu, Ge Yin, Xiaobo Zhang
papers.abstract: A relatively mild form of government failure - for example, bureaucrats can count but do not differentiate quality - can significantly affect the efficacy of industrial policy. We investigate this idea in the context of China's largest pro-innovation industrial policy using a structural model. We find that the return to the subsidy program is -19.7\\% (but would be 7.8\\% if the mild government failure can be removed). Furthermore, the welfare loss is exacerbated by patent trade.
papers.zh_title: 温和的政府失灵
papers.zh_abstract: 一种相对温和的政府失灵形式——例如，官僚能够计数但无法区分质量——会显著影响产业政策的有效性。我们利用一个结构模型，在中国最大的支持创新产业政策背景下研究这一观点。我们发现，该补贴项目的回报率为-19.7%（但如果能够消除这种温和的政府失灵，回报率将为7.8%）。此外，专利交易加剧了福利损失。

papers.title: Parental and Student Time Use Around the Academic Year
papers.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan, Todd R. Jones, Jeffrey M. Swigert
papers.abstract: We demonstrate how mothers, fathers, and 15–17-year-old students alter their schedules around the K-12 academic year. Using regression discontinuity (RDD) methods, combined with dates on school year start and end dates by locality, we document several notable results. First, mothers are substantially more affected by the school year than are fathers. When school is in session, mothers sleep less, spend more time caring for family members and driving them around, and spend less time on eating, free time and exercise. Fathers see changes that are generally similar in sign but smaller in magnitude compared to mothers. 15–17-year-olds naturally reduce time spent in educational pursuits when school is out (a decrease of about 5.5 hours per day on weekdays), and most of that time is substituted toward free time (an additional 2+ hours per day) and sleep (1+ hours per day). Our results provide a holistic picture of how families build their days around the K-12 school calendar and have implications for policies targeted toward women’s and teenage children’s health and well-being.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I12, I21, I31, J16
papers.zh_title: 学年周期中的家长与学生时间利用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了母亲、父亲以及15-17岁学生如何根据K-12学年调整其日程安排。利用断点回归方法，结合各地区学年开始和结束日期，我们记录了几项显著结果。首先，母亲受学年影响的程度远大于父亲。上学期间，母亲睡眠减少，花更多时间照顾家人和开车接送，而用于饮食、休闲和锻炼的时间减少。父亲的变化方向与母亲大致相同，但幅度较小。15-17岁的学生在假期自然减少了用于教育的时间（工作日每天减少约5.5小时），其中大部分时间被替代为休闲时间（每天增加2小时以上）和睡眠（每天增加1小时以上）。我们的结果全面描绘了家庭如何围绕K-12校历安排日常生活，并对针对女性和青少年健康福祉的政策具有启示意义。

papers.title: Traditional Institutions in Modern Times: Dowries as Pensions When Sons Migrate
papers.authors: Natalie Bau, Gaurav Khanna, Corinne Low, Alessandra Voena
papers.abstract: This paper examines whether an important cultural institution in India - dowry - can enable male migration by increasing the liquidity available to young men after marriage. We hypothesize that one cost of migration is the disruption of traditional elderly support structures, where sons live near their parents and care for them in their old age. Dowry can attenuate this cost by providing sons and parents with a liquid transfer that eases constraints on income sharing. To test this hypothesis, we collect two novel datasets on property rights over dowry among migrants and among families of migrants. Net transfers of dowry to a man's parents are common but far from universal. Consistent with using dowry for income sharing, transfers occur more when sons migrate, especially when they work in higher-earning occupations. Nationally representative data confirms that migration rates are higher in areas with stronger historical dowry traditions. Finally, exploiting a large-scale highway construction program, we show that men from areas with stronger dowry traditions have a higher migration response to reduced migration costs. Despite its potentially adverse consequences, dowry may play a role in facilitating migration and therefore, economic development.
papers.zh_title: 现代社会的传统制度：儿子迁移时的嫁妆作为养老金
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了印度的一项重要文化制度——嫁妆——是否能够通过增加年轻男性婚后可获得的流动性来促进男性迁移。我们假设迁移的一个成本是传统养老支持结构的瓦解，即儿子住在父母附近并在父母年老时照顾他们。嫁妆可以通过为儿子和父母提供一种流动性转移来缓解这一成本，从而放松收入共享的约束。为检验这一假设，我们收集了两个关于迁移者及其家庭中嫁妆产权的新数据集。嫁妆净转移给男方父母的情况很常见，但远非普遍。与利用嫁妆进行收入共享的假设一致，当儿子迁移时，尤其是当他们从事高收入职业时，这种转移更频繁发生。具有全国代表性的数据证实，在嫁妆传统历史更浓厚的地区，迁移率更高。最后，利用一项大规模高速公路建设计划，我们发现来自嫁妆传统更浓厚地区的男性，其对迁移成本降低的迁移反应更大。尽管嫁妆可能带来不利后果，但它可能在促进迁移乃至经济发展方面发挥作用。

papers.title: Why Do Older Scholars Slow Down?
papers.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh, Lea-Rachel Kosnik
papers.abstract: Using data describing all “Top 5” economics journal publications from 1969-2018, we examine what determines which authors produce less as they age and which retire earlier. Sub-field has no impact on the rate of production, but interacts with it to alter retirement probabilities. A positive, tentative, and contemporary writing style increases persistence in publishing. Authors whose previous work was more heavily cited produce slightly more. Those better-cited with more top-flight publications retire later than others. Declining publication with age arises mostly from habit—there is a very significant increasing positive autocorrelation of publication across the decades of a career.
papers.zh_title: 年长学者为何放慢脚步？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用描述1969年至2018年间所有“五大”经济学期刊发表数据，我们考察了哪些因素决定了哪些作者随年龄增长产出减少以及哪些作者提前退休。子领域对产出率没有影响，但与之交互作用会改变退休概率。积极、试探性和当代的写作风格能提高持续发表的可能性。先前工作被引用更多的作者产出略高。那些引用更多且顶级发表更多的作者比其他人退休更晚。随年龄增长发表量下降主要源于习惯——在职业生涯的几十年间，发表量存在非常显著且递增的正自相关。

papers.title: Search Theory of Imperfect Competition with Decreasing Returns to Scale
papers.authors: Guido Menzio
papers.abstract: I study a version of the search-theoretic model of imperfect competition by Burdett and Judd (1983) in which sellers face a strictly increasing rather than a constant marginal cost of production. The equilibrium exists and is unique, and its structure depends on the extent of search frictions. If search frictions are large enough, the price distribution is non-degenerate and atomless. If search frictions are neither too large nor too small, the price distribution is non-degenerate with an atom at the lowest price. If search frictions are small enough, the price distribution is degenerate. The equilibrium is efficient if and only if the price distribution is degenerate and, hence, if and only if search frictions are small enough. In contrast, in Burdett and Judd (1983), the equilibrium price distribution is always non-degenerate and atomless and the equilibrium is always efficient. As in Burdett and Judd (1983), the equilibrium goes from monopolistic to competitive as search frictions decline.
papers.zh_title: 规模报酬递减下的不完全竞争搜索理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我研究了Burdett和Judd（1983）提出的不完全竞争搜索理论模型的一个版本，其中卖方面临严格递增而非恒定的边际生产成本。均衡存在且唯一，其结构取决于搜索摩擦的程度。如果搜索摩擦足够大，价格分布是非退化的且无原子。如果搜索摩擦既不太大也不太小，价格分布是非退化的，且在最低价格处有一个原子。如果搜索摩擦足够小，价格分布是退化的。当且仅当价格分布是退化的，从而当且仅当搜索摩擦足够小时，均衡才是有效的。相比之下，在Burdett和Judd（1983）中，均衡价格分布总是非退化的且无原子，并且均衡总是有效的。与Burdett和Judd（1983）一样，随着搜索摩擦的减少，均衡从垄断走向竞争。

papers.title: Inflation Surge and Sovereign Borrowing: The Role of Policy Practices in Strengthening Sovereign Resilience
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Huanhuan Zheng
papers.abstract: Sovereign borrowing during inflation surges is a litmus test of a government’s ability to withstand and navigate macroeconomic shocks. Based on transaction-level bond issuance data, we explore how sovereign financing strategies differ between surging and stable inflations and how policy practices affect their ability to weather inflation shocks. We find that governments lean more towards external borrowing in foreign currency during periods of high inflation, in part to reduce borrowing costs. This pattern is particularly prevalent in emerging markets (EMs), especially when the inflation surge is prolonged and severe. We further show that good practices of fiscal discipline and credibly pegged exchange rate regime alleviate external borrowing in foreign currency amid inflation surges.
papers.zh_title: 通胀飙升与主权借贷：政策实践在增强主权韧性中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 主权借贷在通胀飙升期间是对政府承受和应对宏观经济冲击能力的试金石。基于交易层面的债券发行数据，我们探讨了主权融资策略在通胀飙升期与稳定期之间的差异，以及政策实践如何影响其抵御通胀冲击的能力。我们发现，在高通胀时期，政府更倾向于以外币进行外部借贷，部分原因是为了降低借贷成本。这种模式在新兴市场中尤为普遍，尤其是在通胀飙升持续时间长且严重的情况下。我们进一步表明，良好的财政纪律实践和可信的固定汇率制度安排，能够缓解通胀飙升期间的外币外部借贷。

papers.title: Applications or Approvals: What Drives Racial Disparities in the Paycheck Protection Program?
papers.authors: Sergey Chernenko, Nathan Kaplan, Asani Sarkar, David S. Scharfstein
papers.abstract: We use the 2020 Small Business Credit Survey to study the sources of racial disparities in use of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). Black-owned firms are 8.9 percentage points less likely than observably similar white-owned firms to receive PPP loans. About 55% of this take-up disparity is attributable to a disparity in application propensity, while the remainder is attributable to a disparity in approval rates. The finding in prior research that Black-owned PPP recipients are less likely than white-owned recipients to borrow from banks and more likely to borrow from fintech lenders is driven entirely by application behavior. Conditional on applying for a PPP loan, Black-owned firms are 9.9 percentage points less likely than white-owned firms to apply to banks and 7.8 percentage points more likely to apply to fintechs. However, they face similar average approval disparities at banks (7.4 percentage points) and fintechs (8.4 percentage points). Sorting by Black-owned firms away from banks and towards fintechs is significantly stronger in more racially biased counties, and the bank approval disparity is also larger in more racially biased counties. We conclude that insofar as automation by fintechs reduces racial disparities in PPP take-up, it does so by mitigating disparities in loan application rates, not loan approval rates.
papers.zh_title: 申请还是批准：什么驱动了薪资保护计划中的种族差异？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2020年小企业信贷调查来研究薪资保护计划使用中种族差异的来源。黑人拥有的企业获得PPP贷款的可能性比特征相似的白人企业低8.9个百分点。这种获取率差异中约55%可归因于申请倾向的差异，其余部分则归因于批准率的差异。先前研究中发现的黑人PPP受助者比白人受助者更少向银行借款、更多向金融科技公司借款的现象，完全是由申请行为驱动的。在申请PPP贷款的条件下，黑人企业向银行申请的可能性比白人企业低9.9个百分点，而向金融科技公司申请的可能性高7.8个百分点。然而，它们在银行（7.4个百分点）和金融科技公司（8.4个百分点）面临的平均批准差异相似。在种族偏见更严重的县，黑人企业从银行转向金融科技公司的倾向显著更强，并且银行的批准差异在种族偏见更严重的县也更大。我们得出结论，就金融科技公司的自动化减少PPP获取中的种族差异而言，它是通过缓解贷款申请率的差异，而非贷款批准率的差异来实现的。

papers.title: The 2014 Russia Shock and Its Effects on Italian Firms and Banks
papers.authors: Stefano Federico, Giuseppe Marinelli, Francesco Palazzo
papers.abstract: We study how a demand shock in an export market propagates to the exporting country’s banking system. Using the dual shocks of sanctions and falling oil prices suffered by Russia in 2014, we investigate the effects on Italian firms and banks more exposed to the Russian market. This event implied a sharp decline in sales for firms with a significant share of sales to Russia, but it did not affect the overall amount of credit available to them. Banks relatively more exposed to Italian exporters to Russia cut their overall credit supply, especially vis-à-vis ex ante risky borrowers, but continued to provide credit towards firms moderately hit by the trade shock, in an attempt to let them cope with the liquidity shortfall. Our results suggest that banks mitigate trade shocks for certain hit firms, while at the same time propagate them to other firms not directly affected by the shock.
papers.zh_title: 2014年俄罗斯冲击及其对意大利企业和银行的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究出口市场的需求冲击如何传导至出口国的银行体系。利用2014年俄罗斯遭受的制裁和油价下跌的双重冲击，我们考察了对俄罗斯市场敞口更大的意大利企业和银行的影响。这一事件导致对俄销售份额较大的企业销售额急剧下降，但并未影响它们可获得的信贷总额。对意大利对俄出口企业敞口相对较大的银行削减了其整体信贷供给，尤其是对事前风险较高的借款人，但继续向受贸易冲击中度影响的企业提供信贷，试图帮助它们应对流动性短缺。我们的结果表明，银行缓解了某些受冲击企业的贸易冲击，同时又将冲击传导至其他未直接受冲击的企业。

papers.title: Generative AI and Firm Values
papers.authors: Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Gregor Schubert, Miao Ben Zhang
papers.abstract: How do recent advances in Generative AI affect firm value? We construct the first measure of firms’ workforce exposures to Generative AI and show that an “Artificial-Minus-Human” (AMH) portfolio earned 5% in the two weeks following the release of ChatGPT. The labor-exposure effect is more pronounced for firms with greater data assets and is distinct from the effect of firms’ product exposures to AI. We assess whether exposed workforces are substituted or complemented by Generative AI based on whether their exposed tasks are core or supplemental. Examining firms’ labor demand and profitability following the release of ChatGPT supports a labor-technology substitution channel.
papers.zh_title: 生成式人工智能与企业价值
papers.zh_abstract: 生成式人工智能的最新进展如何影响企业价值？我们构建了首个衡量企业劳动力对生成式人工智能暴露程度的指标，并表明在ChatGPT发布后的两周内，“人工减人类”（AMH）投资组合获得了5%的收益。劳动力暴露效应在数据资产较多的企业中更为显著，并且与企业产品对人工智能的暴露效应不同。我们根据暴露任务是核心还是辅助，评估暴露的劳动力是被生成式人工智能替代还是互补。考察ChatGPT发布后企业的劳动力需求和盈利能力，支持了劳动力-技术替代渠道。

papers.title: The Unequal Economic Consequences of Carbon Pricing
papers.authors: Diego R. Känzig
papers.abstract: This paper studies the economic impacts of carbon pricing. Exploiting institutional features of the European carbon market and high-frequency data, I identify carbon policy shocks and trace their dynamic effects. A restrictive carbon policy shock raises energy prices, reduces emissions, spurs green innovation, but decreases economic activity—disproportionately burdening poorer households. Not only are the poor more affected because of their higher energy spending, but they also experience larger income losses. These indirect, general-equilibrium effects via income and employment play an important role in the transmission of carbon pricing policies, accounting for about two-thirds of the aggregate consumption response.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, E62, H23, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 碳定价的不平等经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究碳定价的经济影响。利用欧洲碳市场的制度特征和高频数据，我识别出碳政策冲击并追踪其动态效应。限制性碳政策冲击会提高能源价格、减少排放、刺激绿色创新，但会降低经济活动——不成比例地加重贫困家庭的负担。贫困家庭不仅因其更高的能源支出而受到更大影响，而且他们还面临更大的收入损失。这些通过收入和就业产生的间接一般均衡效应在碳定价政策的传导中扮演重要角色，约占总体消费反应的三分之二。

papers.title: The Incidence of the Affordable Care Act’s Dependent Coverage Mandate
papers.authors: Sherry A. Glied, Hansoo Ko
papers.abstract: Economic theory and empirical studies conclude that the cost of voluntary employer-sponsored health insurance falls on employees. However, the distribution of incidence and the mechanism through which incidence occurs have not been well-established. We provide new evidence about incidence by examining the dependent coverage mandate in the ACA, which requires group insurance to allow adult children to age 26 to remain on their parents’ policies. We establish that the incidence of the mandate fell on covered employees as a group. We then consider three situations in which the benefits of this new coverage to an employee differ from the costs to an employer. First, we compare incidence where the young adult dependent is the youngest child in the family to the situation where the child is not the youngest (so the family could add a dependent to existing family coverage). We find that incidence falls mainly on households where the newly-eligible child is the youngest in the household. Second, higher-income households face a lower tax price of coverage than do lower-income households. We find that the incidence of the mandate falls mainly on the highest income households. Finally, we find that the mandate leads to increased commuting time for parents of newly-eligible dependents.
papers.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》受抚养人覆盖强制令的归宿
papers.zh_abstract: 经济理论和实证研究得出结论，自愿性雇主提供的健康保险的成本由员工承担。然而，归宿的分布以及归宿发生的机制尚未得到充分证实。我们通过研究《平价医疗法案》中的受抚养人覆盖强制令来提供关于归宿的新证据，该强制令要求团体保险允许成年子女在26岁前继续留在父母的保单中。我们确定该强制令的归宿落在了受保员工这个群体上。然后，我们考虑了三种情况，在这些情况下，这种新覆盖对员工的好处与雇主的成本不同。首先，我们比较了当年轻成年受抚养人是家庭中最年幼的孩子与孩子并非最年幼（因此家庭可以将受抚养人添加到现有的家庭覆盖中）时的归宿。我们发现，该强制令主要落在新符合条件的子女是家庭中最年幼子女的家庭上。其次，高收入家庭面临的保险税收价格低于低收入家庭。我们发现，该强制令的归宿主要落在最高收入家庭上。最后，我们发现该强制令导致新符合条件的受抚养人的父母通勤时间增加。

papers.title: An Alternative to the Basic Causal Requirement for Liability under the Negligence Rule
papers.authors: Steven Shavell
papers.abstract: The primary causal requirement that must be met for a negligent party to be held liable for a harm is a demonstration that the harm would not have occurred if the party had not been negligent. Thus, for a speeding driver to be found liable for harm done in a car accident, it must be shown that the accident would not have happened if the driver had obeyed the speed limit. The main point made here is that this basic causal requirement may be difficult to satisfy and hence may interfere with the discouragement of negligence. Therefore, an alternative and usually easier-to-meet causal requirement is proposed—that the harm would not have occurred if the party not been engaged in his activity (if the driver had not been driving).
papers.zh_title: 过失规则下责任基本因果要求的替代方案
papers.zh_abstract: 要使过失方对损害承担责任，必须满足的主要因果要求是证明如果该方没有过失，损害就不会发生。因此，要让超速驾驶的司机对车祸造成的损害承担责任，必须证明如果司机遵守了限速规定，事故就不会发生。这里提出的主要观点是，这种基本的因果要求可能难以满足，因此可能妨碍对过失的威慑。因此，提出了一种替代的且通常更容易满足的因果要求——即如果该方没有从事其活动（如果司机没有开车），损害就不会发生。

papers.title: Inflation and GDP Dynamics in Production Networks: A Sufficient Statistics Approach
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Saroj Bhattarai
papers.abstract: We derive closed-form solutions and sufficient statistics for inflation and GDP dynamics in multi-sector New Keynesian economies with arbitrary input-output linkages. Analytically, we show how (1) production linkages amplify inflation and GDP persistence in response to monetary and sectoral shocks and (2) monetary policies that stabilize price indices or the GDP gap affect shock propagation. Quantitatively, sectors with large input-output adjusted price stickiness have disproportionate effects relative to their GDP shares: The three sectors with the highest contribution to the persistence of aggregate inflation have GDP shares of around zero but explain 16% of monetary non-neutrality.
papers.zh_title: 生产网络中的通胀与GDP动态：一个充分统计量方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在具有任意投入产出关联的多部门新凯恩斯主义经济体中推导出通胀和GDP动态的闭式解和充分统计量。在分析上，我们展示了（1）生产关联如何放大货币和部门冲击下的通胀和GDP持续性，以及（2）稳定价格指数或GDP缺口的货币政策如何影响冲击传播。在数量上，具有较大投入产出调整后价格粘性的部门相对于其GDP份额具有不成比例的影响：对总体通胀持续性贡献最大的三个部门的GDP份额接近于零，但却解释了16%的货币非中性。

papers.title: The People and the Experts
papers.authors: William D. Nordhaus, Douglas Rivers
papers.abstract: Are speculators driving up oil prices? Should we raise energy prices to slow global warming? The present study takes a small number of such questions and compares the views of economic experts with those of the public. This comparison uses a panel of more than 2000 respondents from YouGov with the views of the panel of experts from the Initiative on Global Markets at the Chicago Booth School. We found that most of the US population is at best modestly informed about major economic questions and policies. The low level of knowledge is generally associated with the intrusion of ideological, political, and religious views that challenge or deny the current economic consensus. The intruding factors are highly heterogeneous across questions and sub-populations and are much more diverse than the narrowness of public political discourse would suggest. Many of these findings have been established for scientific subjects, but they appear to be equally important for economic views.
papers.zh_title: 民众与专家
papers.zh_abstract: 投机者是否在推高油价？我们是否应该提高能源价格以减缓全球变暖？本研究选取少量此类问题，比较了经济学专家的观点与公众的观点。这一比较使用了来自YouGov的2000多名受访者组成的样本，以及芝加哥大学布斯商学院全球市场倡议专家小组的观点。我们发现，大多数美国民众对主要经济问题和政策的了解充其量只是中等水平。低水平的知识通常与意识形态、政治和宗教观点的侵入有关，这些观点挑战或否定了当前的经济共识。这些侵入因素在不同问题和子群体之间高度异质，并且比狭隘的公共政治话语所暗示的要多样化得多。这些发现中有许多已在科学主题中得到证实，但它们对于经济观点似乎同样重要。

papers.title: Financial Crises and the Global Supply Network: Evidence from Multinational Enterprises
papers.authors: Sergi Basco, Giulia Felice, Bruno Merlevede, Martí Mestieri
papers.abstract: This paper empirically examines the effects of financial crises on the organization of production of multinational enterprises. We construct a panel of European multinational networks from 2003 through 2015. We use as a financial shock the increase in risk premia between August 2007 and July 2012 and build a multinational-specific shock based on the network structure before the shock. Multinationals facing a larger financial shock perform worse in terms of revenue, employment, and growth in the number of affiliates. Lower growth in the number of affiliates operates through a negative effect on domestic and foreign affiliates, and is concentrated in affiliates in a vertical relationship with the parent. These effects built up slowly over time. Negative effects are driven by multinationals with initially more leveraged parents, who reduce relatively more the number of foreign affiliates. These findings lend support to the hypothesis of financial frictions shaping multinational activity.
papers.zh_title: 金融危机与全球供应网络：来自跨国企业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文实证检验了金融危机对跨国企业生产组织的影响。我们构建了2003年至2015年欧洲跨国网络的样本。我们使用2007年8月至2012年7月期间风险溢价的上升作为金融冲击，并根据冲击前的网络结构构建了一个跨国企业特定的冲击。面临更大金融冲击的跨国企业在收入、就业和子公司数量增长方面表现更差。子公司数量增长放缓是通过对国内外子公司的负面影响实现的，并且集中在与母公司存在垂直关系的子公司中。这些效应随时间缓慢累积。负面效应是由最初杠杆率较高的母公司推动的，这些母公司相对更多地减少了外国子公司的数量。这些发现支持了金融摩擦塑造跨国企业活动的假设。

papers.title: Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion
papers.authors: Alex Edmans, Caroline Flammer, Simon Glossner
papers.abstract: This paper measures diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) using proprietary data on survey responses used to compile the Best Companies to Work For list. We identify 13 of the 58 questions as being related to DEI, and aggregate the responses to form our DEI measure. This variable has low correlation with gender and ethnic diversity in the boardroom, in senior management, and within the workforce, suggesting that DEI captures additional dimensions missing from traditional measures of demographic diversity. DEI is also unrelated to general workplace policies and practices, suggesting that DEI cannot be improved by generic initiatives. However, DEI is higher in small growth firms and firms with high financial strength. DEI is associated with higher future accounting performance across a range of measures, higher future earnings surprises, and higher valuation ratios, but demographic diversity is not. DEI perceptions among professional workers, such as R&D employees, are significantly correlated with the number and quality of patents. However, DEI exhibits no link with future stock returns.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：D63, G12, G32, J53, J71, J81
papers.zh_title: 多样性、公平与包容
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用用于编制“最佳工作公司”榜单的调查回复专有数据来衡量多样性、公平与包容（DEI）。我们从58个问题中识别出13个与DEI相关的问题，并汇总回复以形成我们的DEI衡量指标。该变量与董事会、高级管理层以及员工队伍中的性别和种族多样性相关性较低，这表明DEI捕捉到了传统人口多样性衡量指标所缺失的额外维度。DEI也与一般工作场所政策和实践无关，这表明DEI无法通过通用举措得到改善。然而，DEI在小型成长型公司和财务实力强的公司中更高。DEI与一系列指标衡量的未来更高会计业绩、更高的未来盈利惊喜以及更高的估值比率相关，但人口多样性则不然。研发员工等专业工作者对DEI的看法与专利数量和质量显著相关。然而，DEI与未来股票回报没有关联。

papers.title: Learning, Diversity and Adaptation in Changing Environments: The Role of Weak Links
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Asuman Ozdaglar, Sarath Pattathil
papers.abstract: Adaptation to dynamic conditions requires a certain degree of diversity. If all agents take the best current action, learning that the underlying state has changed and behavior should adapt will be slower. Diversity is harder to maintain when there is fast communication between agents, because they tend to find out and pursue the best action rapidly. We explore these issues using a model of (Bayesian) learning over a social network. Agents learn rapidly from and may also have incentives to coordinate with others to whom they are connected via strong links. We show, however, that when the underlying environment changes sufficiently rapidly, any network consisting of just strong links will do only a little better than random choice in the long run. In contrast, networks combining strong and weak links, whereby the latter type of links transmit information only slowly, can achieve much higher long-run average payoffs. The best social networks are those that combine a large fraction of agents into a strongly-connected component, while still maintaining a sufficient number of smaller communities that make diverse choices and communicate with this component via weak links.
papers.zh_title: 变化环境中的学习、多样性与适应：弱联系的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 适应动态条件需要一定程度的多样性。如果所有主体都采取当前最佳行动，那么学习到潜在状态已改变且行为应调整的速度将会更慢。当主体之间沟通迅速时，多样性更难维持，因为他们倾向于快速发现并追求最佳行动。我们使用一个社交网络上的（贝叶斯）学习模型来探讨这些问题。主体可以快速学习，并且也可能有动机与通过强联系连接的其他主体协调。然而，我们表明，当潜在环境变化足够快时，任何仅由强联系组成的网络长期来看表现仅略优于随机选择。相比之下，结合强联系和弱联系的网络（后者仅缓慢传递信息）可以实现高得多的长期平均收益。最佳社交网络是那些将大部分主体整合到一个强连接组件中，同时仍保持足够数量的小社区，这些社区做出多样化选择并通过弱联系与该组件进行沟通的网络。

papers.title: The Labor Market Effects of Occupational Licensing in the Public Sector
papers.authors: Morris M. Kleiner, Wenchen Wang
papers.abstract: In the U.S., occupational licensing is about twice as prevalent in the public sector than in the private sector. However, the influence of occupational regulation for public sector workers, and how it compares with that of private sector workers, has not been analyzed in detail. Our study examines how licensing is associated with key labor market outcomes of wages and part-time working status. Our results show that having an occupational license has positive associations on hourly wages and negative associations in both sectors on the probability of engaging in part-time work, mirroring licensing’s general relationships. When we disaggregate licensing’s associations by sector, its wage association is less in the public sector. Further, public sector licensed workers have an even lower probability of working part-time. We further examine how licensing differentially affects the wage distribution between the two sectors, and find that at the lower wage distribution, licensing’s wage associations are almost the same between the public and the private sector. The difference of licensing’s wage relationships between the two sectors becomes larger along the upper part of the wage distribution quantiles. Licensing increases the wage premia for private sector workers at the higher wage percentiles. which may make it more difficult for the public sector to attract and retain more highly-skilled workers.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J08, J38, J44, J48, K23, K31
papers.zh_title: 公共部门职业许可的劳动力市场效应
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，公共部门的职业许可率大约是私营部门的两倍。然而，职业监管对公共部门工人的影响，以及它与私营部门工人的比较，尚未得到详细分析。我们的研究考察了许可如何与工资和兼职工作状态等关键劳动力市场结果相关联。我们的结果表明，拥有职业许可对小时工资有正向关联，并且在两个部门都对从事兼职工作的概率有负向关联，这反映了许可的一般关系。当我们按部门分解许可的关联时，其在公共部门的工资关联较小。此外，公共部门持证工人从事兼职工作的概率更低。我们进一步研究了许可如何对两个部门之间的工资分布产生不同影响，并发现在较低的工资分布上，许可的工资关联在公共部门和私营部门之间几乎相同。许可的工资关系在两个部门之间的差异沿着工资分布分位数的上端变得更大。许可增加了私营部门工人在较高工资百分位上的工资溢价，这可能使公共部门更难吸引和留住技能更高的工人。

papers.title: The Gender Well-being Gap
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Given recent controversies about the existence of a gender wellbeing gap we revisit the issue estimating gender differences across 55 subjective well-being metrics – 37 positive affect and 18 negative affect – contained in 8 cross-country surveys from 167 countries across the world, two US surveys covering multiple years and a survey for Canada. We find women score more highly than men on all negative affect measures and lower than men on all but three positive affect metrics, confirming a gender wellbeing gap. The gap is apparent across countries and time and is robust to the inclusion of exogenous covariates (age, age squared, time and location fixed effects). It is also robust to conditioning on a wider set of potentially endogenous variables. However, when one examines the three ‘global’ wellbeing metrics - happiness, life satisfaction and Cantril’s Ladder - women are either similar to or ‘happier’ than men. This finding is insensitive to which controls are included and varies little over time. The difference does not seem to arise from measurement or seasonality as the variables are taken from the same surveys and frequently measured in the same way. The concern here though is that this is inconsistent with objective data where men have lower life expectancy and are more likely to die from suicide, drug overdoses and other diseases. This is the true paradox – morbidity doesn’t match mortality by gender. Women say they are less cheerful and calm, more depressed, and lonely, but happier and more satisfied with their lives, than men.
papers.zh_title: 性别福祉差距
papers.zh_abstract: 鉴于近期关于性别福祉差距是否存在争议，我们重新审视了这一问题，估算了涵盖55项主观福祉指标（37项积极情感和18项消极情感）中的性别差异。这些指标来自8项跨国调查，覆盖全球167个国家，以及两项涵盖多年的美国调查和一项加拿大调查。我们发现，在所有消极情感指标上，女性的得分均高于男性；而在除三项外的所有积极情感指标上，女性的得分均低于男性，这证实了性别福祉差距的存在。这种差距在不同国家和时间点均明显存在，并且在对年龄、年龄平方、时间和地点固定效应等外生协变量进行控制后依然稳健。在纳入更广泛的潜在内生变量进行条件分析时，该差距同样稳健。然而，当考察三项“全局性”福祉指标——幸福感、生活满意度和坎特里尔阶梯时，女性与男性相似，甚至比男性“更幸福”。这一发现不受所包含控制变量的影响，且随时间变化甚微。这种差异似乎并非源于测量方法或季节性因素，因为这些变量来自相同的调查，且通常以相同方式测量。但问题在于，这与客观数据不一致：客观数据显示男性预期寿命更低，且更可能死于自杀、药物过量和其他疾病。这才是真正的悖论——发病率与死亡率在性别上并不匹配。女性表示自己比男性更不快乐、更不平静、更抑郁、更孤独，但同时也更幸福、对生活更满意。

papers.title: Inflation Strikes Back: The Role of Import Competition and the Labor Market
papers.authors: Mary Amiti, Sebastian Heise, Fatih Karahan, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: U.S. inflation has recently surged, with inflation reaching its highest readings since the early 1980s. We examine the drivers of this rise in inflation, focusing on supply chain disruptions, labor supply constraints, and their interaction. Using a calibrated two-sector New Keynesian DSGE model with multiple factors of production, foreign competition, and endogenous markups, we find that supply chain disruptions combined with a rise in the disutility of work raised inflation by about 2 percentage points in the 2021-22 period. We show that the combined shock increased price inflation in the model by 0.6 percentage point more than it would have risen if the shocks had hit separately. This amplification arises because the joint shock to labor and imported input prices makes substituting between labor and intermediates less effective for domestic firms. Moreover, the simultaneous foreign competition shock allows domestic producers to increase their pass-through into prices without losing market share. We then show that the benefit of aggressive monetary policy in the model depends on the source of the rise in inflation. If the rise in inflation is demand-driven, then aggressive monetary tightening can contain inflation without a recession later. In contrast, aggressive policy can have a large negative effect on the labor market when inflation is driven by supply chain and labor market disruptions. We use aggregate and industry-level data on producer prices, wages, and input prices to provide corroborating evidence for the key amplification channels in the model.
papers.zh_title: 通胀卷土重来：进口竞争与劳动力市场的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 美国通胀近期飙升，达到自20世纪80年代初以来的最高水平。我们研究了此次通胀上升的驱动因素，重点关注供应链中断、劳动力供给约束及其相互作用。通过使用一个包含多种生产要素、外国竞争和内生加成的校准后两部门新凯恩斯主义动态随机一般均衡模型，我们发现，供应链中断与工作负效用上升相结合，在2021-22年期间将通胀推高了约2个百分点。我们表明，在模型中，这种联合冲击使价格通胀比单独冲击发生时高出0.6个百分点。这种放大效应源于劳动力和进口投入品价格的联合冲击，使得国内企业在劳动力和中间品之间的替代效果降低。此外，同时发生的外国竞争冲击使国内生产商能够提高其价格传导率，而不会失去市场份额。接着，我们展示了模型中激进货币政策的收益取决于通胀上升的根源。如果通胀上升是由需求驱动的，那么激进的货币紧缩可以在不引发后续衰退的情况下遏制通胀。相反，当通胀由供应链和劳动力市场中断驱动时，激进的政策可能对劳动力市场产生巨大的负面影响。我们利用生产者价格、工资和投入品价格的总体及行业层面数据，为模型中的关键放大渠道提供了佐证证据。

papers.title: Toward an Understanding of Tax Amnesties: Theory and Evidence from a Natural Field Experiment
papers.authors: Patricia Gil, Justin E. Holz, John A. List, Andrew Simon, Alejandro Zentner
papers.abstract: In modern economies, when debt and trust issues arise, a partial forgiveness policy is often the solution to induce payment and increase disclosure. For their part, governments around the globe continue to use tax amnesties as a strategy to allow debtors to make amends for past misdeeds in exchange for partial debt forgiveness. While ubiquitous, much remains unknown about the basic facts of how well amnesties work, for whom, and why. We present a simple theoretical construct that provides both economic clarity into tax amnesties as well as insights into the necessary behavioral parameters that one must estimate to understand the consequences of tax amnesties. We partner with the Dominican Republic Tax Authorities to design a natural field experiment that is linked to the theory to estimate key causal mechanisms. Empirical results from our field experiment, which covers 125,452 taxpayers who collectively owe $5.2 billion (5.5% of GDP) in known debt, highlight the import of deterrence laws, beliefs about future amnesties, and tax morale for debt payment and increased disclosure. Importantly, we find large short run effects: our most effective treatment (deterrence) increased payments of known debt by 25% and hidden debt by 48%. Further, we find no evidence of our intervention backfiring on subsequent tax payments.
papers.zh_title: 理解税收赦免：理论与来自自然实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在现代经济中，当债务和信任问题出现时，部分豁免政策通常是促使支付和增加披露的解决方案。与此同时，全球各国政府持续使用税收赦免作为一项策略，允许债务人通过部分债务豁免来弥补过去的过失。尽管税收赦免普遍存在，但关于其效果如何、对谁有效以及为何有效的基本事实仍有许多未知之处。我们提出了一个简单的理论框架，既为税收赦免提供了经济上的清晰解释，也揭示了理解税收赦免后果所必须估计的必要行为参数。我们与多米尼加共和国税务机关合作，设计了一个与理论相联系的实地自然实验，以估计关键因果机制。我们的实地实验覆盖了125,452名纳税人，他们共同欠有52亿美元（占GDP的5.5%）的已知债务。实证结果突显了威慑法律、对未来赦免的信念以及税收道德对于债务支付和增加披露的重要性。重要的是，我们发现了巨大的短期效应：我们最有效的处理方式（威慑）使已知债务的支付增加了25%，隐藏债务的支付增加了48%。此外，我们没有发现我们的干预措施对后续纳税产生反作用的证据。

papers.title: Information Flows, Organizational Structure, and Corporate Governance
papers.authors: Nadya Malenko
papers.abstract: This survey provides an overview of theoretical and empirical research on information flows in corporations. It highlights key frictions preventing effective information flows and discusses how organizational structure and corporate governance can alleviate these frictions, focusing on three broad topics: 1) organizational design, such as the choice between centralized and decentralized decision-making; 2) composition and decision-making process of the board of directors; and 3) communication among shareholders and between shareholders and management in the context of shareholder activism. The goal of the survey is to draw connections between theoretical and empirical work and point out directions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 信息流、组织结构与公司治理
papers.zh_abstract: 本综述概述了关于公司内部信息流的理论和实证研究。它强调了阻碍有效信息流的关键摩擦，并讨论了组织结构和公司治理如何能够缓解这些摩擦，重点关注三个广泛的主题：1）组织设计，例如集权与分权决策之间的选择；2）董事会的构成和决策过程；以及3）股东之间以及股东与管理层之间在股东积极主义背景下的沟通。本综述的目标是建立理论与实证工作之间的联系，并指出未来研究的方向。

papers.title: Building Resilient Education Systems: Evidence from Large-Scale Randomized Trials in Five Countries
papers.authors: Noam Angrist, Micheal Ainomugisha, Sai Pramod Bathena, Peter Bergman, Colin Crossley, Claire Cullen, Thato Letsomo, Moitshepi Matsheng, Rene Marlon Panti, Shwetlena Sabarwal, Tim Sullivan
papers.abstract: Education systems need to withstand frequent shocks, including disease and climate events, which close schools for over 222 million children. During these emergencies, alternative models are needed to deliver education. However, rigorous evaluation of effective educational approaches in these settings is challenging and rare, especially across multiple countries. We present results from five randomized trials in India, Kenya, Nepal, Philippines, and Uganda to evaluate the provision of education in emergency settings. These multi-site coordinated trials enable us to uniquely inform internal and external validity simultaneously. We also test multiple scalable models of remote targeted tutoring instruction, comparing government and NGO delivery. While SMS messages have mixed results, phone call tutorials show consistent effectiveness across diverse settings. We find large and robust effect sizes on learning, with average effects of 0.30- 0.35 standard deviations. These effects are highly cost-effective, delivering up to four years of high-quality instruction per $100 spent. Results also show similar effects when delivered by government teachers as NGO instructors and sustained improvements to teacher beliefs and practices. We further evaluate effects during a government scale-up with 25,000 teachers in India and an additional weather shock in the Philippines. Altogether, our results reveal it is possible to strengthen the resilience of education systems, enabling education provision amidst disruptions, and to deliver cost-effective learning gains across contexts and with governments.
papers.zh_title: 构建有韧性的教育体系：来自五个国家大规模随机试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 教育体系需要承受频繁的冲击，包括导致超过2.22亿儿童停课的疾病和气候事件。在这些紧急情况下，需要替代模式来提供教育。然而，在这些环境中对有效教育方法进行严格评估具有挑战性且罕见，尤其是在多个国家之间。我们展示了在印度、肯尼亚、尼泊尔、菲律宾和乌干达进行的五项随机试验的结果，以评估紧急情况下的教育提供。这些多地点协调试验使我们能够同时独特地评估内部和外部有效性。我们还测试了多种可扩展的远程定向辅导教学模式，比较了政府和非政府组织的实施效果。虽然短信效果不一，但电话辅导教程在多种不同环境中都显示出持续的有效性。我们发现了对学习成果巨大且稳健的效应量，平均效应为0.30-0.35个标准差。这些效果具有很高的成本效益，每花费100美元即可提供相当于四年高质量教学的效果。结果还显示，由政府教师和非政府组织教师实施的效果相似，并且对教师的信念和实践有持续的改善。我们进一步评估了印度25,000名教师参与的政府推广计划以及菲律宾额外天气冲击期间的效果。总而言之，我们的结果表明，有可能加强教育体系的韧性，使其能够在干扰中提供教育，并在不同情境下与政府合作实现具有成本效益的学习收益。

papers.title: Monetary Policy without Commitment
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Marina Halac, Kenneth S. Rogoff, Pierre Yared
papers.abstract: This paper studies the implications of central bank credibility for long-run inflation and inflation dynamics. We introduce central bank lack of commitment into a standard non-linear New Keynesian economy with sticky-price monopolistically competitive firms. Inflation is driven by the interaction of lack of commitment and the economic environment. We show that long-run inflation increases following an unanticipated permanent increase in the labor wedge or decrease in the elasticity of substitution across varieties. In the transition, inflation overshoots and then gradually declines. Quantitatively, the inflation response is large, as is the welfare loss from lack of commitment relative to inflation targeting.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, POL；JEL：D02, E02, E52, E58, E61
papers.zh_title: 无承诺的货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了央行可信度对长期通胀和通胀动态的影响。我们将央行缺乏承诺引入一个标准的非线性新凯恩斯主义经济模型中，该模型包含具有粘性价格和垄断竞争的企业。通胀由缺乏承诺与经济环境之间的相互作用驱动。我们表明，在劳动楔子意外永久性增加或品种间替代弹性下降之后，长期通胀会上升。在过渡期间，通胀会先过度调整，然后逐渐下降。从数量上看，通胀反应很大，与通胀目标制相比，缺乏承诺造成的福利损失也很大。

papers.title: Who Benefits from State Corporate Tax Cuts? A Local Labor Market Approach with Heterogeneous Firms: Further Results
papers.authors: Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato, Owen M. Zidar
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the incidence of state corporate taxes using new data and methods for estimating the effects on profits. We extend Suarez Serrato and Zidar (2016) by developing two new identification approaches that use the effects of business taxes on the labor demand of incumbent firms and local productivity to identify profit effects. We estimate these reduced-form effects using data from Census, show how reduced-form moments identify incidence and parameters, and provide incidence estimates using a variety of reduced-form approaches as well as a structural model. Across these approaches, we find that owners bear a substantial portion of incidence. Our central estimate is that firm owners bear half of the incidence, while workers and landowners bear 35-40 percent and 10-15 percent, respectively.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：H02, H22, H25, H32, H71, J03, J23, R30, R58
papers.zh_title: 谁从州公司税削减中受益？基于异质性企业的局部劳动力市场方法：进一步结果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用新的数据和方法来估计州公司税的归宿，特别是对利润的影响。我们扩展了Suarez Serrato和Zidar（2016）的研究，开发了两种新的识别方法，利用商业税对现有企业劳动力需求和当地生产率的影响来识别利润效应。我们使用人口普查数据估计了这些简化形式效应，展示了简化形式矩如何识别归宿和参数，并提供了使用多种简化形式方法以及结构模型的归宿估计。在这些方法中，我们发现企业所有者承担了相当大比例的税负。我们的核心估计是，企业所有者承担了一半的税负，而工人和土地所有者分别承担了35-40%和10-15%。

papers.title: Work Hours Mismatch
papers.authors: Marta Lachowska, Alexandre Mas, Raffaele Saggio, Stephen A. Woodbury
papers.abstract: This paper uses a revealed preference approach applied to administrative data from Washington to document and characterize work-hour constraints. Workers have limited discretion over hours at a given employer, and there is substantial mismatch between workers who prefer long hours and employers that provide short hours. Voluntary job transitions suggest that the ratio of the marginal rate of substitution of earnings for hours (MRS) to the wage rate is on the order of 0.5-0.6 for prime-age workers. The average absolute deviation between observed hours and optimal hours is about 15%, and constraints on hours are particularly acute among low-wage workers. On average, observed hours tend to be less than preferred levels, and workers would require a 12% higher wage with their current employer to be as well off as they would be after moving to an employer offering ideal hours. These findings suggest that hours constraints are an equilibrium feature of the labor market because long-hour jobs are costly to employers, and that employers offer high-wage/long-hour packages to increase their overall value of employment.
papers.zh_title: 工作时间错配
papers.zh_abstract: 本文采用显示性偏好方法，利用华盛顿州的行政数据来记录和描述工作时间约束的特征。工人在特定雇主处对工作时间的自主权有限，并且偏好长时间工作的工人与提供短时间工作的雇主之间存在显著的错配。自愿的工作转换表明，对于壮年工人而言，收入对工作时间的边际替代率与工资率的比率大约在0.5-0.6之间。观察到的工时与最优工时之间的平均绝对偏差约为15%，而低工资工人面临的时间约束尤为严重。平均而言，观察到的工时往往低于偏好水平，工人需要在其当前雇主处获得12%的更高工资，才能达到与转到提供理想工时的雇主后相同的福利水平。这些发现表明，工时约束是劳动力市场的一个均衡特征，因为长时间工作对雇主而言成本高昂，并且雇主提供高工资/长时间工作组合是为了提高就业的整体价值。

papers.title: War Discourse and Disaster Premia: 160 Years of Evidence from Stock and Bond Markets
papers.authors: David Hirshleifer, Dat Y. Mai, Kuntara Pukthuanthong
papers.abstract: Using a semi-supervised topic model on 7,000,000 New York Times articles spanning 160 years, we test whether topics of media discourse predict future stock market excess returns to test rational and behavioral hypotheses about market valuation of disaster risk. Media discourse data address the challenge of sample size even when disasters are rare. Our methodology avoids look-ahead bias and addresses semantic shifts. Our discourse topics positively predict market excess returns, with War having an out-of-sample R² of 1.35%. We call this effect the war return premium. The war return premium has increased in more recent time periods.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G0, G00, G01, G02, G1, G10, G11, G13, G4, G41
papers.zh_title: 战争话语与灾难溢价：来自股票和债券市场160年的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一个覆盖160年、包含700万篇《纽约时报》文章的半监督主题模型，我们检验了媒体话语主题是否能预测未来股票市场的超额收益，以验证关于市场对灾难风险估值的理性与行为假说。媒体话语数据解决了即使灾难罕见时样本量不足的挑战。我们的方法避免了前瞻性偏差，并处理了语义变迁问题。我们发现，话语主题正向预测市场超额收益，其中“战争”主题的样本外R²达到1.35%。我们将此效应称为战争回报溢价。在更近的时期，战争回报溢价有所上升。

papers.title: Randomized Regulation: The Impact of Minimum Quality Standards on Health Markets
papers.authors: Guadalupe Bedoya, Jishnu Das, Amy Dolinger
papers.abstract: We report results from the first randomization of a regulatory reform in the health sector. The reform established minimum quality standards for patient safety, an issue that has become increasingly salient following the Ebola and COVID-19 epidemics. In our experiment, all 1348 health facilities in three Kenyan counties were classifi ed into 273 markets, and the markets were then randomly allocated to treatment and control groups. Government inspectors visited health facilities and, depending on the results of their inspection, recommended closure or a timeline for improvements. The intervention increased compliance with patient safety measures in both public and private facilities (more so in the latter) and reallocated patients from private to public facilities without increasing out-of-pocket payments or decreasing facility use. In treated markets, improvements were equally marked throughout the quality distribution, consistent with a simple model of vertical differentiation in oligopolies. Our paper thus establishes the use of experimental techniques to study regulatory reforms and, in doing so, shows that minimum standards can improve quality across the board without adversely affecting utilization.
papers.zh_title: 随机化监管：最低质量标准对健康市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了卫生领域首次监管改革随机化实验的结果。该改革建立了患者安全的最低质量标准，这一问题在埃博拉和新冠疫情后日益突出。在我们的实验中，肯尼亚三个县的所有1348家医疗机构被划分为273个市场，然后这些市场被随机分配到处理组和对照组。政府检查员访问医疗机构，并根据检查结果建议关闭或设定改进时间表。该干预措施提高了公立和私立机构（后者更为显著）对患者安全措施的合规性，并将患者从私立机构重新分配到公立机构，同时未增加自付费用或减少机构使用率。在处理组市场中，质量分布各处的改善同样显著，这与寡头垄断中垂直差异化的简单模型一致。因此，我们的论文确立了使用实验技术研究监管改革的方法，并在此过程中表明，最低标准可以在不负面影响利用率的情况下全面改善质量。

papers.title: The Rise of E-Wallets and Buy-Now-Pay-Later: Payment Competition, Credit Expansion, and Consumer Behavior
papers.authors: Wenlong Bian, Lin William Cong, Yang Ji
papers.abstract: The past decade has witnessed a phenomenal rise of digital wallets, and the COVID-19 pandemic further accelerated their adoption globally. Such e-wallets provide not only a conduit to external bank accounts but also internal payment options, including the ever-popular Buy-Now-Pay-Later (BNPL). We examine, for the first time, e-wallet transactions matched with merchant and consumer information from a world-leading provider based in China, with over 1 billion users globally and a business model that other e-wallet providers quickly converge to. We document that internal payment options, especially BNPL, dominate both online and on-site transactions. BNPL has greatly expanded credit access on the extensive margin through its adoption in two-sided payment markets. While BNPL crowds out other e-wallet payment options, it expands FinTech credit to underserved consumers. Exploiting a randomized experiment, we also find that e-wallet credit through BNPL substantially boosts consumer spending. Nevertheless, users, especially those relying on e-wallets as their sole credit source, carefully moderate borrowing when incurring interest charges. The insights likely prove informative for economies transitioning from cash-heavy to cashless societies where digital payments and FinTech credit see the largest growth and market potential.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME, PR；JEL：E42, G20, G23, G51
papers.zh_title: 电子钱包与先买后付的兴起：支付竞争、信贷扩张与消费者行为
papers.zh_abstract: 过去十年见证了数字钱包的惊人崛起，而新冠疫情进一步加速了其在全球的普及。此类电子钱包不仅提供通往外部银行账户的渠道，还提供内部支付选项，包括广受欢迎的“先买后付”（BNPL）。我们首次研究了来自一家全球领先的中国提供商（拥有超过10亿全球用户，其商业模式正被其他电子钱包提供商迅速趋同）的电子钱包交易，并匹配了商户和消费者信息。我们记录到，内部支付选项，尤其是BNPL，在线上和现场交易中均占主导地位。BNPL通过其在双边支付市场中的采用，极大地扩展了信贷的广延边际。虽然BNPL挤出了其他电子钱包支付选项，但它将金融科技信贷扩展到了服务不足的消费者。利用一项随机实验，我们还发现，通过BNPL提供的电子钱包信贷显著提升了消费者支出。然而，用户，尤其是那些将电子钱包作为唯一信贷来源的用户，在产生利息费用时会谨慎地调节借贷。这些见解很可能为那些从现金密集型社会向无现金社会转型的经济体提供信息，在这些经济体中，数字支付和金融科技信贷拥有最大的增长和市场潜力。

papers.title: Two-Sided Market Power in Firm-to-Firm Trade
papers.authors: Vanessa I. Alviarez, Michele Fioretti, Ken Kikkawa, Monica Morlacco
papers.abstract: We develop and estimate a structural model of bargaining in firm-to-firm trade to study the determinants of tariff pass-through. The model features oligopoly and oligopsony power and yields analytical expressions for bilateral markups and pass-through based on two sufficient statistics: the supplier’s share in the buyer’s purchases and the buyer’s share in the supplier’s output. Using U.S. import data, we find substantial importer bargaining power and steep export supply curves. These primitives imply that cost changes, rather than markup adjustments, dominate pass-through, accounting for the bulk of incomplete pass-through of the 2018 U.S. tariffs and its heterogeneity across buyer-supplier links.
papers.zh_title: 企业间贸易中的双边市场势力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发并估计了一个企业间贸易中的讨价还价结构模型，以研究关税传导的决定因素。该模型具有寡头和寡买方势力特征，并基于两个充分统计量——供应商在买方采购中的份额和买方在供应商产出中的份额——得出了双边加成率和传导率的解析表达式。利用美国进口数据，我们发现进口商具有显著的讨价还价能力，且出口供给曲线陡峭。这些基本特征意味着成本变化（而非加成率调整）主导了传导，解释了2018年美国关税传导不完全及其在买卖双方联系中的异质性的主要部分。

papers.title: Crisis Risk and Risk Management
papers.authors: René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: This paper assesses the current state of knowledge about crisis risk and its implications for risk management. Better data that became available since the Global Financial Crisis (GFC) has improved our understanding of crisis risk. These data have been used to show that some types of crises become predictable when one accounts for interactions between risks. Specifically, a financial crisis is much more likely in the years following both high credit growth and high asset valuations. However, some other types of crises do not seem predictable. There is no evidence that the frequency of economic and financial crises is increasing. The existing data show that political crises make economic crises more likely, so that, as suggested by the concept of polycrisis, feedback between non-economic crises and economic crises can be important, but there is no comparable evidence for climate events. Strategies that increase firm operational and financial flexibility appear successful at reducing the adverse impact of crises on firms.
papers.zh_title: 危机风险与风险管理
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了当前关于危机风险及其对风险管理影响的知识状况。自全球金融危机以来可获得更优质的数据，这增进了我们对危机风险的理解。这些数据被用于表明，当考虑风险之间的相互作用时，某些类型的危机变得可预测。具体而言，在信贷高速增长和高资产估值之后的几年里，发生金融危机的可能性要大得多。然而，其他一些类型的危机似乎无法预测。没有证据表明经济和金融危机的频率正在增加。现有数据显示，政治危机使经济危机更可能发生，因此，正如多重危机概念所暗示的那样，非经济危机与经济危机之间的反馈可能很重要，但对于气候事件没有类似的证据。提高企业运营和财务灵活性的策略似乎能成功减少危机对企业的负面影响。

papers.title: Intergovernmental Grants and Policy Competition: Concepts, Institutions, and Evidence
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Stan Veuger
papers.abstract: Our purpose is three-fold. First, we summarize some of the core insights from both classic and more recent papers in the literature on the role of intergovernmental grants in systems of fiscal federalism. Second, we provide an updated look at some of the key institutions through which intergovernmental transfers are implemented in the United States. Third, we consider the rich environment of the COVID-19 pandemic in which new additional intergovernmental transfers were deployed, and present empirical evidence on how they affected state-level corporate tax policy. We conclude by discussing productive directions for future research on the economics of fiscal federalism and the role of intergovernmental grants as policy instruments in federal systems.
papers.zh_title: 政府间拨款与政策竞争：概念、制度与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们的目的有三重。首先，我们总结了关于政府间拨款在财政联邦制体系中作用的文献中，一些经典和较新论文的核心见解。其次，我们提供了对美国实施政府间转移支付的一些关键制度的最新审视。第三，我们考虑了新冠疫情这一丰富环境，其中部署了新的额外政府间转移支付，并提供了关于它们如何影响州级公司税政策的实证证据。最后，我们讨论了未来关于财政联邦制经济学以及政府间拨款作为联邦制体系中政策工具作用的研究方向。

papers.title: Data Privacy and Algorithmic Inequality
papers.authors: Zhuang Liu, Michael Sockin, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: This paper develops a foundation for consumer privacy preferences by linking them to the desire to conceal behavioral vulnerabilities. Although data sharing with digital platforms improves matching efficiency for products and services, it also exposes individuals with self-control issues to predatory lending practices, creating a new form of inequality in the digital era—algorithmic inequality. Privacy regulations empower consumers to opt out of data sharing, but cannot fully protect vulnerable individuals because of data-sharing externalities. Moreover, coordination frictions among consumers may generate multiple equilibria with drastically different levels of data sharing, amplifying both efficiency gains and inequality risks.
papers.zh_title: 数据隐私与算法不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过将消费者隐私偏好与隐藏行为脆弱性的愿望联系起来，为消费者隐私偏好奠定了基础。尽管与数字平台共享数据能提高产品和服务的匹配效率，但它也使存在自我控制问题的个体暴露于掠夺性贷款行为之下，从而在数字时代创造了一种新的不平等形式——算法不平等。隐私法规赋予消费者选择退出数据共享的权力，但由于数据共享的外部性，无法完全保护脆弱个体。此外，消费者之间的协调摩擦可能产生多个均衡，这些均衡的数据共享水平差异巨大，从而放大了效率提升和不平等风险。

papers.title: Income Gains and the Geography of the US Home Ownership Boom, 1940 to 1960
papers.authors: William J. Collins, Gregory Niemesh
papers.abstract: Income and home ownership both surged in the United States between 1940 and 1960. We use cross-place variation in changes in real income to assess the importance of income gains to the mid-century home ownership boom. OLS and IV estimates suggest that a large share of the overall increase in home ownership was attributable to wage gains that were both large on average and widely spread across workers. This research complements the literatures on how New Deal mortgage market innovations and the World War II and Korean War GI Bills promoted home ownership in this period.
papers.zh_title: 收入增长与美国1940至1960年住房拥有率繁荣的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 1940年至1960年间，美国的收入和住房拥有率均大幅增长。我们利用不同地区实际收入变化的差异来评估收入增长对20世纪中期住房拥有率繁荣的重要性。OLS和IV估计表明，住房拥有率总体增长中很大一部分可归因于工资增长，这些工资增长既平均幅度大，又在工人中广泛分布。本研究补充了关于新政抵押贷款市场创新以及二战和朝鲜战争《退伍军人权利法案》如何促进这一时期住房拥有率的文献。

papers.title: ESG Spillovers
papers.authors: Shangchen Li, Hongxun Ruan, Sheridan Titman, Haotian Xiang
papers.abstract: We study ESG and non-ESG mutual funds managed by overlapping teams. We find that non-ESG mutual funds include more high ESG stocks after the creation of an ESG sibling, and the high ESG stocks they select exhibit superior performance. The low ESG stocks selected by ESG funds also exhibit superior performance and despite being more constrained, the ESG funds outperform their non-ESG siblings. The latter result is consistent with fund families making choices that favor ESG funds. Specifically, ESG funds tend to trade illiquid stocks prior to their non-ESG siblings and get preferential IPO allocations.
papers.zh_title: ESG溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由重叠团队管理的ESG和非ESG共同基金。我们发现，在创建ESG兄弟基金后，非ESG共同基金包含了更多高ESG股票，并且它们选择的高ESG股票表现出卓越的业绩。ESG基金选择的低ESG股票也表现出卓越的业绩，尽管受到更多约束，但ESG基金的表现优于其非ESG兄弟基金。后一个结果与基金家族做出有利于ESG基金的选择一致。具体而言，ESG基金倾向于在其非ESG兄弟基金之前交易非流动性股票，并获得优先的IPO分配。

papers.title: Debt Moratoria: Evidence from Student Loan Forbearance
papers.authors: Michael Dinerstein, Constantine Yannelis, Ching-Tse Chen
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effects of the 2020 student debt moratorium that paused payments for student loan borrowers. Using administrative credit panel data, we show that the payment pause led to a sharp drop in student loan payments and delinquencies for borrowers subject to the debt moratorium, as well as an increase in credit scores. We find a large stimulus effect, as borrowers substitute increased private debt for paused public debt. Comparing borrowers whose loans were frozen with borrowers whose loans were not frozen due to differences in whether the government owned the loans, we show that borrowers used the new liquidity to increase borrowing on credit cards, mortgages, and auto loans rather than avoid delinquencies. The effects are concentrated among borrowers without prior delinquencies, who saw no change in credit scores, and we see little effects following student loan forgiveness announcements. The results highlight an important complementarity between liquidity and credit, as liquidity increases the demand for credit even as the supply of credit is fixed.
papers.zh_title: 债务暂停令：来自学生贷款宽限期的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了2020年暂停学生债务偿还政策的效果，该政策暂停了学生贷款借款人的还款。利用行政信用面板数据，我们表明，还款暂停导致受债务暂停令约束的借款人的学生贷款还款和违约率急剧下降，同时信用评分上升。我们发现了一个巨大的刺激效应，因为借款人用增加的私人债务替代了暂停的公共债务。通过比较贷款被冻结的借款人与因政府是否拥有贷款差异而贷款未被冻结的借款人，我们表明，借款人利用新的流动性增加了信用卡、抵押贷款和汽车贷款的借款，而不是避免违约。这些效应集中在没有先前违约记录的借款人中，他们的信用评分没有变化，并且我们在学生贷款减免公告后几乎没有看到影响。结果突显了流动性与信贷之间的重要互补性，因为即使在信贷供给固定的情况下，流动性也会增加对信贷的需求。

papers.title: Central Bank Credibility and Fiscal Responsibility
papers.authors: Jesse Schreger, Pierre Yared, Emilio Zaratiegui
papers.abstract: We consider a New Keynesian model with strategic monetary and fiscal interactions. The fiscal authority maximizes social welfare. Monetary policy is delegated to a central bank with an anti-inflation bias that suffers from a lack of commitment. The impact of central bank hawkishness on debt issuance is non-monotonic because increased hawkishness reduces the benefit from fiscal stimulus while simultaneously increasing real debt capacity. Starting from high levels of hawkishness (dovishness), a marginal increase in the central bank's anti-inflation bias decreases (increases) debt issuance.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E40, E44, E49, E50, E52
papers.zh_title: 央行可信度与财政责任
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑一个具有战略性货币和财政互动的新凯恩斯模型。财政当局最大化社会福利。货币政策被委托给一个具有反通胀倾向且缺乏承诺能力的中央银行。央行鹰派立场对债务发行的非单调影响，是因为鹰派立场增强既减少了财政刺激的收益，同时增加了实际债务容量。从高水平的鹰派（鸽派）立场出发，央行反通胀倾向的边际增加会减少（增加）债务发行。

papers.title: Risk Sharing, Commitment Constraints and Self Help Groups
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Anjini Kochar, Aprajit Mahajan, Vaishnavi Surendra
papers.abstract: Evaluations of group savings and lending programs have largely focused on average impacts, rather than distributional impacts — finding modest effects on long-term economic well-being. In this paper, we exploit the randomized roll-out of a self-help group lending program in rural Bihar, India (Hoffmann et al., 2021) to demonstrate that well-functioning groups facilitate risk-sharing within rural communities. We find no impact of the program on risk-sharing, measured as a reduction in the variance of consumption growth, in the aggregate. However, the program significantly improves risk-sharing in regions where it had greater institutional capacity and was better implemented. Building on our theoretical framework, we provide evidence of a specific channel of impact: program quality and pre-existing scale improve the quality and functioning of groups, which in turn increase the insurance value of the program to communities.
papers.zh_title: 风险分担、承诺约束与自助小组
papers.zh_abstract: 对团体储蓄和贷款计划的评估主要集中在平均影响上，而非分配影响——发现对长期经济福祉的影响适中。在本文中，我们利用印度比哈尔邦农村地区自助小组贷款计划的随机推广（Hoffmann等人，2021年）来证明，运作良好的团体促进了农村社区内的风险分担。我们发现，该计划总体上对风险分担（以消费增长方差的降低来衡量）没有影响。然而，在制度能力更强且实施更好的地区，该计划显著改善了风险分担。基于我们的理论框架，我们提供了特定影响渠道的证据：项目质量和现有规模提高了团体的质量和运作，进而增加了该计划对社区的保险价值。

papers.title: Firm Commitments
papers.authors: Patrick Bolton, Marcin Kacperczyk
papers.abstract: A growing fraction of companies globally have made commitments to reduce their carbon emissions by a certain date. While the companies that make commitments subsequently reduce their emissions, the effect on overall emissions of companies (including those that do not commit) has been small; the companies that commit, and those that make the most ambitious commitments, tend to have lower emissions; firm commitments are less prevalent in countries where governments have made national commitments. Overall, the commitment movements have been successful in drawing the willing but have found greater resistance from the companies that most need to reduce their emissions.
papers.zh_title: 企业承诺
papers.zh_abstract: 全球越来越多的公司承诺在特定日期前减少碳排放。虽然做出承诺的公司随后确实减少了排放，但对所有公司（包括未承诺的公司）整体排放的影响很小；做出承诺的公司以及做出最雄心勃勃承诺的公司，其排放量往往较低；在政府已做出国家承诺的国家，企业承诺不太普遍。总体而言，承诺运动成功地吸引了有意愿者，但遭到了最需要减排的公司的更大抵制。

papers.title: A Model of Influencer Economy
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Siguang Li
papers.abstract: With the rise of social media and streaming platforms, firms and brand-owners increasingly depend on influencers to attract consumers, who care about both common product quality and consumer-influencer interaction. Sellers thus compete in both influencer and product markets. As outreach and distribution technologies improve, influencer payoffs and income inequality change non-monotonically. More powerful influencers sell better-quality products, but pluralism in style mitigates market concentration by effectively differentiating consumer experience. Influencer style dispersion substitutes horizontal product differentiation but serves as either complement (small dispersion) or substitute (large dispersion) to vertical product differentiation. The assortative matching between sellers and influencers remains under endogenous influence-building, with the maximal differentiation principle recovered in the limit of costless style acquisition. Meanwhile, influencers may under-invest in consumer outreach to avoid exacerbating price competition. Finally, while requiring balanced seller-influencer matching can encourage seller competition, uni-directional exclusivity can improve welfare for sufficiently differentiated products and uncrowded influencer markets.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：L11, L20, L51, M31, M37
papers.zh_title: 网红经济模型
papers.zh_abstract: 随着社交媒体和流媒体平台的兴起，企业和品牌所有者越来越依赖网红来吸引消费者，消费者既关心共同的产品质量，也关心与网红的互动。因此，卖家在网红市场和产品市场上都展开竞争。随着推广和分发技术的改进，网红的收益和收入不平等呈非单调变化。更有影响力的网红销售质量更好的产品，但风格的多元化通过有效差异化消费者体验来缓解市场集中度。网红风格的分散替代了横向产品差异化，但与纵向产品差异化既可以是互补（小分散）也可以是替代（大分散）。在风格获取成本为零的极限情况下，卖家与网红之间的分类匹配在内生影响力构建下仍然存在，并恢复了最大差异化原则。同时，网红可能为避免加剧价格竞争而减少对消费者的推广投入。最后，虽然要求卖家与网红匹配平衡可以鼓励卖家竞争，但单向排他性可以在产品足够差异化和网红市场不拥挤的情况下提高福利。

papers.title: The Re-Emerging Suicide Crisis in the U.S.: Patterns, Causes and Solutions
papers.authors: Dave E. Marcotte, Benjamin Hansen
papers.abstract: The suicide rate in the United States has risen nearly 40 percent since 2000. This increase is puzzling because suicide rates had been falling for decades at the end of the 20th Century. In this paper, we review important facts about the changing rate of suicide. General trends miss the story of important differences across groups – suicide rates rose substantially among middle aged persons between 2005 and 2015 but have fallen since. Among young people, suicide rates began a rapid rise after 2010 that has not abated. We review empirical evidence to assess potential causes for recent changes in suicide rates. The economic hardship caused by the Great Recession played an important role in rising suicide among prime-aged Americans. We illustrate that the increase in the prevalence of depression among young people during the 2010s was so large it could explain nearly all the increase in suicide mortality among those under 25. Bullying victimization of LGBTQ youth could also account for part of the rise in suicide. The evidence that access to firearms or opioids are major drivers of recent suicide trends is less clear. We end by summarizing evidence on the most promising policies to reduce suicide mortality.
papers.zh_title: 美国重新出现的自杀危机：模式、原因与解决方案
papers.zh_abstract: 自2000年以来，美国的自杀率上升了近40%。这一增长令人费解，因为自杀率在20世纪末已持续下降数十年。在本文中，我们回顾了关于自杀率变化的重要事实。总体趋势掩盖了不同群体之间的重要差异——中年人的自杀率在2005年至2015年间大幅上升，但此后有所下降。在年轻人中，自杀率在2010年后开始快速上升，且至今未减。我们回顾了实证证据，以评估近期自杀率变化的潜在原因。大衰退造成的经济困难在壮年美国人自杀率上升中发挥了重要作用。我们表明，2010年代年轻人抑郁症患病率的增长幅度如此之大，以至于几乎可以解释25岁以下人群自杀死亡率的所有增长。LGBTQ青年遭受欺凌的经历也可能部分解释了自杀率的上升。关于枪支或阿片类药物的获取是近期自杀趋势主要驱动因素的证据则不那么明确。最后，我们总结了关于减少自杀死亡率最有希望的政策证据。

papers.title: The Dual U.S. Labor Market Uncovered
papers.authors: Hie Joo Ahn, Bart Hobijn, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: Aggregate U.S. labor market dynamics are well approximated by a dual labor market supplemented with a third, predominantly, home-production segment. We uncover this structure by estimating a Hidden Markov Model, a machine-learning method. The different market segments are identified through (in-)equality constraints on labor market transition probabilities. This method yields time series of stocks and flows for the three segments for 1980-2021. Workers in the primary sector, who make up around 55 percent of the population, are almost always employed and rarely experience unemployment. The secondary sector, which constitutes 14 percent of the population, absorbs most of the short-run fluctuations, both at seasonal and business cycle frequencies. Workers in this segment experience six times higher turnover rates than those in the primary tier and are ten times more likely to be unemployed than their primary counterparts. The tertiary segment consists of workers who infrequently participate in the labor market but nevertheless experience unemployment when they try to enter the labor force. Our individual-level analysis shows that observable demographic characteristics only explain a small part of the cross-individual variation in segment membership. The combination of the aggregate and individual-level evidence we provide points to dualism in the U.S. labor market being an equilibrium division of labor, under labor market imperfections, that minimizes adjustment costs in response to predictable seasonal as well as unpredictable business cycle fluctuations.
papers.zh_title: 揭示美国双重劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 美国总体劳动力市场动态可以很好地近似为一个双重劳动力市场，并辅以一个以家庭生产为主的第三部门。我们通过估计隐马尔可夫模型（一种机器学习方法）揭示了这一结构。不同的市场部门通过劳动力市场转换概率的（不）等式约束来识别。该方法得出了1980-2021年三个部门的存量和流量时间序列。初级部门的工人约占人口的55%，他们几乎总是就业，很少经历失业。次级部门占人口的14%，吸收了大部分短期波动，无论是季节性波动还是商业周期波动。该部门的工人流动率是初级部门的六倍，失业可能性是初级部门的十倍。第三部门由很少参与劳动力市场但在试图进入劳动力市场时仍会经历失业的工人组成。我们的个体层面分析表明，可观测的人口统计特征只能解释部门归属的个体间差异的一小部分。我们提供的总体和个体层面证据相结合表明，美国劳动力市场的二元性是在劳动力市场不完善条件下的一种均衡分工，旨在最小化应对可预测的季节性波动和不可预测的商业周期波动的调整成本。

papers.title: Can Evidence-Based Information Shift Preferences Towards Trade Policy?
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Maggie Chen, Davin Chor
papers.abstract: Amid public skepticism about trade, we investigate whether evidence-based information—a concise statement of a research finding—can shape preferences towards trade policy. Across survey experiments conducted over 2018-2022 on U.S. general population samples, we consistently uncover a “backfire effect”: Information that highlights benefits from trade (job gains in productive sectors or lower consumer prices) induces protectionist policy choices, particularly among Republicans. We interpret this finding through the lens of a model of prior-biased belief updating. Averting this backfire effect will require addressing the prior beliefs—specifically, over the impact of trade on jobs and trade relations with China—that we find prevalent among respondents inclined toward protectionism.
papers.zh_title: 基于证据的信息能否改变对贸易政策的偏好？
papers.zh_abstract: 在公众对贸易持怀疑态度的背景下，我们调查了基于证据的信息——即研究发现的简明陈述——能否塑造对贸易政策的偏好。在2018-2022年间对美国普通人群样本进行的调查实验中，我们一致发现了一种“反火效应”：强调贸易收益（生产性部门的就业增长或更低的消费价格）的信息会诱导保护主义政策选择，尤其是在共和党人中。我们通过一个基于先验信念更新的模型来解释这一发现。要避免这种反火效应，就需要解决我们在倾向于保护主义的受访者中普遍发现的先验信念——特别是关于贸易对就业的影响以及与中国贸易关系的信念。

papers.title: Administrative Burden and Procedural Denials: Experimental Evidence from SNAP
papers.authors: Eric Giannella, Tatiana Homonoff, Gwen Rino, Jason Somerville
papers.abstract: Many government program applications result in procedural denials due to administrative burdens associated with applying. We identify the intake interview as a key barrier to take-up of the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program and study the effect of an alternative application process designed to reduce burdens. Using a field experiment involving 65,000 Los Angeles applicants, we find that access to flexible interviews initiated by the applicant increases approvals by six percentage points, doubles early approvals, and increases long-term participation by over two percentage points. Our findings highlight the importance of incorporating flexibility when designing program integrity policies to minimize procedural denials.
papers.zh_title: 行政负担与程序性拒绝：来自SNAP的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多政府项目申请因申请过程中的行政负担而导致程序性拒绝。我们确定面试环节是补充营养援助计划（SNAP）参与的一个关键障碍，并研究了一种旨在减轻负担的替代申请流程的效果。通过对65,000名洛杉矶申请人进行的实地实验，我们发现，由申请人发起的灵活面试使批准率提高了六个百分点，早期批准率翻了一番，长期参与率提高了两个多百分点。我们的研究结果强调了在设计项目诚信政策时纳入灵活性以最小化程序性拒绝的重要性。

papers.title: The Empire Project: Trade Policy in Interwar Canada
papers.authors: Markus Lampe, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke, Lorenz Reiter, Yoto V. Yotov
papers.abstract: This paper uses a new dataset on the universe of Canadian imports and tariffs between 1924 and 1936, disaggregated into 1697 goods originating in 112 countries, to analyze the impact on Canadian imports of interwar Canadian trade policy, including the 1932 Ottawa trade agreements. Rather than use a dummy variable approach, we compute the impact of individual tariffs which varied substantially across goods, trade partners, and time. We develop a novel method of controlling for multilateral resistances in the context of a one-country dataset, and perform a variety of counterfactual exercises to determine the impact of tariffs on trade flows. The overall impact of post-1929 tariff shifts, including the 1932 agreements, was relatively small, reflecting the fact that Canadian trade policy was already highly protectionist: trade agreements can have heterogenous effects on participants because the shocks involved are different. Compared with a free trade counterfactual, the impact of the overall structure of protection on the level and composition of trade was large.
papers.zh_title: 帝国计划：两次世界大战期间加拿大的贸易政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1924年至1936年间加拿大进口和关税的新数据集（细分为来自112个国家的1697种商品），分析了两次世界大战期间加拿大贸易政策（包括1932年渥太华贸易协定）对加拿大进口的影响。我们没有使用虚拟变量方法，而是计算了单个关税的影响，这些关税在商品、贸易伙伴和时间上差异很大。我们开发了一种新方法，在单国数据集背景下控制多边阻力，并进行了各种反事实模拟，以确定关税对贸易流的影响。1929年后关税变动（包括1932年协定）的总体影响相对较小，这反映了加拿大贸易政策已经高度保护主义的事实：贸易协定对参与者的影响可能不同，因为所涉及的冲击不同。与自由贸易的反事实相比，整体保护结构对贸易水平和构成的影响是巨大的。

papers.title: Hukou and Guanxi: How Social Discrimination and Networks Impact Intrahousehold Allocations in China
papers.authors: Liqun Zhuge, Kevin Lang
papers.abstract: Hukou, China’s household registration system, affects access to public services and signals the strength of a person’s local social network, guanxi. We use a collective model and data on household consumption and spouses’ hukou status to show that hukou plays a crucial role in determining within-family bargaining power. Wives who bring the family more lucrative hukou enjoy significantly higher bargaining power than other wives. Still, these wives have less bargaining power than their husbands. Large differences in preferences between husbands and wives, especially regarding alcohol, tobacco, and clothing, allow us to identify these disparities.
papers.zh_title: 户口与关系：社会歧视和网络如何影响中国的家庭内部资源配置
papers.zh_abstract: 户口，即中国的户籍制度，影响着公共服务的获取，并标志着一个人当地社会网络（关系）的强度。我们利用一个集体模型以及家庭消费和配偶户口状况的数据，表明户口在决定家庭内部议价能力方面起着关键作用。为家庭带来更有价值户口的妻子，其议价能力显著高于其他妻子。尽管如此，这些妻子的议价能力仍低于她们的丈夫。丈夫和妻子在偏好上的巨大差异，尤其是在酒精、烟草和服装方面，使我们能够识别出这些差异。

papers.title: Accounting for the Widening Mortality Gap Between Adult Americans with and without a BA
papers.authors: Anne Case, Angus Deaton
papers.abstract: We examine mortality differences between Americans with and without a four-year college degree over the period 1992 to 2021. From 1992 to 2010, both groups saw falling mortality, but with greater improvements for the more educated; from 2010 to 2019, mortality fell for those with a BA and rose for those without; from 2019 to 2021, mortality rose for both groups, but more rapidly for the less educated. In consequence, the mortality gap between the two groups rose in all three periods, unevenly until 2010, faster between 2010 to 2019, and explosively during the pandemic. The overall period saw dramatic changes in patterns of mortality, but gaps rose consistently, not only in all-cause mortality, but in each of thirteen broad classifications of cause of death. Gaps increased for causes of death whose rates have risen in the last thirty years, whose rates have fallen in the last thirty years, and whose rates fell and then rose. Gaps rose for causes where rates were originally higher for those without a BA, and where rates were originally lower for those without a BA. Although mechanisms and stories are different for each cause of death, the widening gap is seen throughout.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, ED, EH；JEL：I1, I14, I26, J10
papers.zh_title: 解释美国拥有与未拥有学士学位的成年人之间死亡率差距的扩大
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1992年至2021年间，美国拥有四年制大学学位与未拥有该学位的人群之间的死亡率差异。从1992年到2010年，两组人群的死亡率均有所下降，但受教育程度更高的人群改善幅度更大；从2010年到2019年，拥有学士学位的人群死亡率下降，而未拥有者死亡率上升；从2019年到2021年，两组人群死亡率均上升，但受教育程度较低的人群上升更快。因此，两组人群之间的死亡率差距在所有三个时期都在扩大：2010年之前不均衡地扩大，2010年至2019年间加速扩大，并在疫情期间急剧扩大。整个时期死亡率模式发生了巨大变化，但差距持续扩大，不仅在全因死亡率上，而且在十三大类死因分类中的每一类中都是如此。差距在以下情况下均有所扩大：过去三十年间死亡率上升的死因、过去三十年间死亡率下降的死因、以及死亡率先降后升的死因。差距在以下情况下也有所扩大：原本未拥有学士学位者死亡率较高的死因，以及原本未拥有学士学位者死亡率较低的死因。尽管每种死因的机制和解释各不相同，但差距的扩大贯穿始终。

papers.title: Cross-border Spillovers: How US Financial Conditions affect M&As Around the World
papers.authors: Katharina Bergant, Prachi Mishra, Raghuram Rajan
papers.abstract: We study how U.S. monetary policy shocks transmit to cross-border merger and acquisition (M&A) activity. Using country- and firm-level data, tighter U.S. policy is shown to reduce both the value and the number of cross-border deals. The effects are especially pronounced for acquirer firms with larger foreign-currency liabilities, consistent with a net worth channel. Reflecting agency motives for acquisitions, deals announced under more accommodative U.S. conditions underperform ex post, indicating potential capital misallocation.
papers.zh_title: 跨境溢出效应：美国金融状况如何影响全球并购活动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国货币政策冲击如何传导至跨境并购活动。利用国家和企业层面的数据，我们发现，美国政策收紧会降低跨境交易的价值和数量。这种效应对于拥有较大外币负债的收购方企业尤为显著，这与净资产渠道一致。反映收购的代理动机，在更宽松的美国政策条件下宣布的交易事后表现不佳，表明存在潜在的资本错配。

papers.title: Immigration, Household Production, and Native Women's Labor Market Outcomes: A Survey of a Global Phenomenon
papers.authors: Patricia Cortés
papers.abstract: Most of the literature on how immigration affects the labor market focuses on the outcomes of natives in direct competition with immigrants. This paper reviews a growing literature on an alternative channel. Immigrants, particularly low-skilled women, are disproportionately represented in the household services sector, a global phenomenon that is seen to some extent in most regions. A simple time-use model suggests that by lowering the price of market-provided household services, immigrant workers allow high-skilled native women to reduce their unpaid household production and increase their participation in the labor market. I review existing evidence that the presence of foreign domestic workers has increased the labor supply of high-skilled native women, has helped narrow the gender earnings gap in high-paying powered occupations, and that these advances have not come at the cost of native women investing less time in their children or having lower birth rates. I discuss the policy implications of these results, as well as some ethical considerations.
papers.zh_title: 移民、家庭生产与本土女性劳动力市场结果：一项全球现象的调查
papers.zh_abstract: 关于移民如何影响劳动力市场的大部分文献都关注与移民直接竞争的本土人群的结果。本文综述了关于另一种渠道的日益增长的文献。移民，尤其是低技能女性，在家政服务部门中的比例过高，这是一个在大多数地区都不同程度存在的全球现象。一个简单的时间使用模型表明，通过降低市场提供的家政服务的价格，移民工人使得高技能本土女性能够减少其无偿的家庭生产，并增加其劳动力市场参与。我回顾了现有证据，这些证据表明外籍家政工人的存在增加了高技能本土女性的劳动力供给，有助于缩小高薪职业中的性别收入差距，并且这些进步并非以本土女性减少对子女的时间投入或降低生育率为代价。我讨论了这些结果的政策含义，以及一些伦理考量。

papers.title: The Aggregate Importance of Intermediate Input Substitutability
papers.authors: Alessandra Peter, Cian Ruane
papers.abstract: We estimate long-run elasticities of substitution between intermediate inputs for Indian manufacturing plants. India’s trade liberalization in the early 1990s provides an ideal natural policy experiment, with permanent and heterogeneous tariff reductions inducing changes in relative prices which we use for identification. We find a high degree of substitutability at the plant-level between 8 broad categories of material inputs, significantly above the Cobb-Douglas benchmark of 1. In contrast, when considering shorter time horizons or more transitory shocks to relative prices, we find evidence of much lower elasticities. Using our long-run elasticities in a quantitative model, we find that misallocation of intermediate inputs causes a reduction in aggregate output of 28%—3.5 times larger relative to a standard calibration with complementary inputs.
papers.zh_title: 中间投入品可替代性的总体重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了印度制造业工厂中间投入品之间的长期替代弹性。印度在1990年代初期的贸易自由化提供了一个理想的自然政策实验，永久且异质性的关税削减引起了相对价格的变化，我们利用这些变化进行识别。我们发现，在工厂层面，8大类材料投入品之间存在高度的可替代性，显著高于柯布-道格拉斯基准值1。相比之下，当考虑更短的时间跨度或更短暂的相对价格冲击时，我们发现了低得多的弹性证据。在我们的定量模型中使用这些长期弹性，我们发现中间投入品的错配导致总产出减少28%——比使用标准互补性投入品校准的结果大3.5倍。

papers.title: Central Bank Communication and House Price Expectations
papers.authors: Carola Binder, Pei Kuang, Li Tang
papers.abstract: We study how US consumers’ house price expectations respond to verbal and non-verbal communication about interest rate changes using several large online surveys. Verbal communication about interest rate hikes leads to little response of average house price expectations but large heterogeneity among household groups. Communication about rate hikes combined with a simple explanation of the mortgage rate channel causes large downward revisions to house price expectations. Consumers interpret heterogeneously Chair Powell’s voice tone and body language at the press conference which significantly influence their house price expectations. More negative evaluations are associated with larger upward revisions to house price expectations.
papers.zh_title: 中央银行沟通与房价预期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用多项大型在线调查，研究了美国消费者的房价预期如何对关于利率变动的语言和非语言沟通做出反应。关于加息的言语沟通导致平均房价预期反应甚微，但在不同家庭群体之间存在巨大异质性。将加息沟通与对抵押贷款利率渠道的简单解释相结合，会导致房价预期大幅下调。消费者对鲍威尔主席在新闻发布会上的语音语调和肢体语言存在异质性解读，这显著影响了他们的房价预期。更负面的评价与房价预期更大幅度的上调相关。

papers.title: Consumer Surplus from Suppliers: How Big is it and Does it Matter for Growth?
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Ariel Burstein, Cédric Duprez, Emmanuel Farhi
papers.abstract: Consumer surplus, the area between the demand curve and the price, plays a key role in many models of trade and growth. Quantifying it typically requires estimating and extrapolating demand curves. This paper provides an alternative approach to measuring consumer surplus by focusing on firms as consumers of inputs. We show that the elasticity of a downstream firm’s marginal cost to supplier additions and separations measures the downstream firm’s consumer surplus relative to its input costs. Using Belgian data and instrumenting for changes in supplier access, we find that for every 1% of suppliers gained or lost, the marginal cost of downstream firms falls or rises by roughly 0.3%. Our estimates are directly informative about the strength of love-of-variety effects and the gains from movements along quality-ladders. We use our microeconomic estimates of consumer surplus to assess the macroeconomic importance of supplier additions and separations in a growth-accounting framework. We find that supplier churn plausibly accounts for about half of aggregate productivity growth.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, E10, O0, O4
papers.zh_title: 来自供应商的消费者剩余：有多大，对增长重要吗？
