papers.zh_abstract: 消费者剩余，即需求曲线与价格之间的面积，在许多贸易和增长模型中扮演着关键角色。量化它通常需要估计和推断需求曲线。本文通过将企业视为投入品的消费者，提供了一种衡量消费者剩余的替代方法。我们证明，下游企业边际成本对供应商增加和减少的弹性，衡量了下游企业相对于其投入成本的消费者剩余。利用比利时数据并对供应商准入变化进行工具变量处理，我们发现，每增加或减少1%的供应商，下游企业的边际成本大约下降或上升0.3%。我们的估计直接揭示了品种偏好效应的强度以及沿质量阶梯移动的收益。我们利用这些微观经济层面的消费者剩余估计，在一个增长核算框架中评估供应商增加和减少的宏观经济重要性。我们发现，供应商更替可能解释了约一半的总体生产率增长。

papers.title: Scalable Demand and Markups
papers.authors: Enghin Atalay, Erika Frost, Alan T. Sorensen, Christopher J. Sullivan, Wanjia Zhu
papers.abstract: We study changes in markups across 72 product markets from 2006 to 2018. A growing literature has documented a rise in markups over time using a production function approach; we instead employ the standard microeconomic method, which is to estimate demand and then invert firms’ first-order pricing conditions to infer their markups. To make the method scalable, we propose estimating nested logit demand models, using household panel data to automate the assignment of products to nests. Our results indicate an overall upward trend in markups between 2006 and 2018, with considerable heterogeneity across and within product markets. We find that changes in firms’ marginal costs and households’ price sensitivity are the primary drivers of markup increases, with changes in firm ownership playing a much smaller role.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：L0, L1, L10, L11, L13, L16, L2, L20
papers.zh_title: 可扩展的需求与加成率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2006年至2018年间72个产品市场的加成率变化。日益增长的文献使用生产函数方法记录了加成率随时间上升的趋势；我们则采用标准的微观经济学方法，即估计需求，然后反转企业的一阶定价条件来推断其加成率。为了使该方法具有可扩展性，我们建议估计嵌套Logit需求模型，利用家庭面板数据来自动将产品分配到嵌套中。我们的结果表明，在2006年至2018年间，加成率总体呈上升趋势，不同产品市场之间以及市场内部存在相当大的异质性。我们发现，企业边际成本和家庭价格敏感性的变化是加成率上升的主要驱动因素，而企业所有权变化的作用要小得多。

papers.title: Product Repositioning by Merging Firms
papers.authors: Enghin Atalay, Alan T. Sorensen, Christopher J. Sullivan, Wanjia Zhu
papers.abstract: We examine merging firms' additions and removals of products for a sample of 66 mergers across a wide variety of consumer packaged goods markets. We find that mergers lead to a net reduction in the number of products offered by merging firms. Merging firms tend to both drop and add products at the periphery of their joint product portfolios, with the net effect of increasing within-firm product similarity. These results are consistent with theories of the firm that emphasize cost synergies among similar types of products or managerial core competencies linked to particular segments of the product market.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：L0, L1, L10, L13, L21, L22, L23, L25, L4, L40
papers.zh_title: 合并企业的产品重新定位
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了66个涉及多种消费品包装市场的合并样本中，合并企业增加和移除产品的情况。我们发现，合并导致合并企业提供的产品数量净减少。合并企业倾向于在其联合产品组合的边缘同时移除和增加产品，其净效应是增加了企业内部的产品相似性。这些结果与强调相似类型产品之间的成本协同效应或与产品市场特定细分领域相关的管理核心能力的企业理论是一致的。

papers.title: The Effect of a Peer's Teen Pregnancy on Sexual Behavior
papers.authors: Priyanka Anand, Lisa B. Kahn
papers.abstract: In this paper, we examine whether a friend or older sibling's teen pregnancy impacts one's own sexual behavior. Employing an event study design, we find that those who observe a peer's teen pregnancy change their sexual behavior after the pregnancy ends to put themselves at lower risk of their own teen pregnancy; specifically, they are less likely to have unprotected sex and have fewer sexual partners in the months following the end of the teen pregnancy. We find that females are more likely to change their sexual behavior after the end of a peer's teen pregnancy compared to males, and the effects are primarily after observing a peer's teen pregnancy that results in a live birth. Our work suggests that education campaigns that provide a realistic portrayal of teen parenthood may be an effective tool for reducing behaviors that may result in teen pregnancy.
papers.zh_title: 同伴青少年怀孕对性行为的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨朋友或年长兄弟姐妹的青少年怀孕经历是否会影响个体自身的性行为。采用事件研究设计，我们发现观察到同伴青少年怀孕的个体在怀孕结束后会改变其性行为，以降低自身青少年怀孕的风险；具体而言，他们在青少年怀孕结束后的几个月内更少进行无保护性行为，并且性伴侣数量减少。我们发现，与男性相比，女性在同伴青少年怀孕结束后更可能改变其性行为，且这种效应主要出现在观察到同伴青少年怀孕导致活产的情况下。我们的研究表明，提供青少年父母身份真实写照的教育宣传活动，可能是减少可能导致青少年怀孕行为的有效工具。

papers.title: Subjecting the ‘Average Joe’ to War Theatre Triggers Intimate Partner Violence
papers.authors: Resul Cesur, Arzu Kibris
papers.abstract: This research is the first to identify the impact of armed conflict exposure for the average male randomly drawn from the population on subsequent intimate partner violence (IPV). We exploit a population-level natural experiment in service location assignment of draftees under Turkey’s universal conscription system, inducting 90% of all draft-age men for 15-to-18 months, with nearly a quarter of them being deployed to the conflict zone during our analysis period, 1984-to-2011, in the southeast of the country to curb the Kurdistan Workers’ Party (PKK) insurgency. Purging any confounding influence of civilian exposure, the innovative design of our survey captures isolated exposure during military service. Results show that conflict zone deployment increases physical and psychological IPV perpetration from husband to wife. Probing the mechanisms, our analysis first renders the use of violence as an instrumental behavior in intrahousehold bargaining as an unlikely mechanism by eliminating labor market outcomes and economic- and social-controlling behaviors from the list of usual suspects. Moreover, we rule out the possibility of risky health habits exacerbating the unfavorable effects of combat. Then, we show compelling evidence that normalizing violence in everyday life, likely emerging as an expressive behavior when arguments escalate, is the primary mediating pathway.
papers.zh_title: 将“普通乔”置于战争剧场会引发亲密伴侣暴力
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究首次识别了从人口中随机抽取的普通男性暴露于武装冲突对后续亲密伴侣暴力（IPV）的影响。我们利用了土耳其普遍征兵制度下应征者服役地点分配中的人口层面自然实验，该制度征召了90%的适龄男性服役15至18个月，其中近四分之一在1984年至2011年的分析期间被部署到该国东南部的冲突地区，以遏制库尔德工人党（PKK）叛乱。通过排除平民暴露的任何混杂影响，我们调查的创新设计捕捉了服役期间的孤立暴露。结果显示，冲突地区部署增加了丈夫对妻子实施的身体和心理IPV。在探究机制时，我们的分析首先排除了将暴力作为家庭内部议价工具性行为的可能性，因为劳动力市场结果以及经济和社会控制行为等常见嫌疑因素均不显著。此外，我们排除了危险健康习惯加剧战斗不利影响的可能性。然后，我们提供了令人信服的证据，表明日常生活中暴力的正常化——很可能在争吵升级时作为一种表达性行为出现——是主要的中介途径。

papers.title: Swallow This: Childhood and Adolescent Exposure to Fast Food Restaurants, BMI, and Cognitive Ability
papers.authors: Sara Sofie Abrahamsson, Aline Bütikofer, Krzysztof Karbownik
papers.abstract: Using spatial and temporal variation in openings of fast food restaurants in Norway between 1980 and 2007, we study the effects of changes in the supply of high caloric nutrition on the health and cognitive ability of young adult males. Our results indicate that exposure to these establishments during childhood and adolescence increases BMI and has negative effects on cognition. Heterogeneity analysis does not reveal meaningful differences in the effects across groups, including for those with adverse prenatal health or high paternal BMI, an exception being that cognition is only affected by exposure at ages 0--12 and this effect is mediated by paternal education.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I12, I20, J13, L66
papers.zh_title: 吞下这个：儿童和青少年时期接触快餐店、BMI与认知能力
papers.zh_abstract: 利用1980年至2007年间挪威快餐店开业的时空变化，我们研究了高热量营养供应变化对年轻成年男性健康和认知能力的影响。结果表明，在儿童和青少年时期接触这些场所会增加BMI并对认知产生负面影响。异质性分析未揭示不同群体间效应的显著差异，包括那些产前健康状况不佳或父亲BMI较高的人群，但一个例外是认知仅在0至12岁接触时受到影响，且这种效应由父亲教育水平所中介。

papers.title: Norderfriedrichskoog! Tax Havens, Tax Competition and the Introduction of a Minimum Tax Rate
papers.authors: William C. Boning, Drahomir Klimsa, Joel Slemrod, Robert Ullmann
papers.abstract: German municipalities levy local business taxes by choosing a tax rate to apply to local business income, where the tax base is defined uniformly at the national level. Before the federal government’s imposition of a minimum tax rate in 2004, some municipalities such as the tiny North Sea town of Norderfriedrichskoog chose to act as tax havens by setting a zero tax rate. We combine administrative microdata from firm tax returns with municipality-level information to study the choice to become a tax haven; the (reported and real) income tax havens attracted from other municipalities before and after the introduction of the minimum tax rate; and how the introduction of the minimum tax rate affected tax competition between municipalities. We find that income was shifted to tax haven municipalities both before and after the introduction of the minimum tax rate. The mandated increase in tax havens’ tax rates did not lead to rate increases (or decreases) among municipalities in general, or among tax haven municipalities’ geographical neighbors. Our results suggest that tax havens largely did not affect the business tax rates set by non-havens.
papers.zh_title: Norderfriedrichskoog！避税天堂、税收竞争与最低税率的引入
papers.zh_abstract: 德国市政当局通过选择适用于本地企业收入的税率来征收地方营业税，而税基由国家层面统一规定。在2004年联邦政府实施最低税率之前，一些市政当局，如北海小镇Norderfriedrichskoog，选择设定零税率以充当避税天堂。我们结合企业纳税申报的行政微观数据与市政层面信息，研究成为避税天堂的选择；最低税率引入前后，避税天堂从其他市政当局吸引的（报告和实际）收入；以及最低税率的引入如何影响市政当局之间的税收竞争。我们发现，在最低税率引入前后，收入均被转移至避税天堂市政当局。强制提高避税天堂税率并未导致一般市政当局或避税天堂地理邻近市政当局的税率上升（或下降）。我们的结果表明，避税天堂在很大程度上并未影响非避税天堂设定的营业税税率。

papers.title: Debt and Deficits: Fiscal Analysis with Stationary Ratios
papers.authors: John Y. Campbell, Can Gao, Ian W.R. Martin
papers.abstract: We introduce a measure of a government's fiscal position that exploits cointegrating relationships among fiscal variables. The measure is a loglinear combination of tax revenue, government spending and the market value of government debt that—unlike the debt-GDP ratio—appears stationary in long historical data from the US and the UK and in postwar data from these and 14 other developed countries. The fiscal position must forecast either government debt returns or fiscal adjustment (a combination of high tax growth and low spending growth), or both. We find that fiscal adjustment, particularly through changes in spending, is the empirically relevant channel.
papers.zh_title: 债务与赤字：基于平稳比率的财政分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种衡量政府财政状况的指标，该指标利用了财政变量之间的协整关系。该指标是税收收入、政府支出和政府债务市场价值的对数线性组合——与债务-GDP比率不同——在美国和英国的长期历史数据以及这些国家及其他14个发达国家的战后数据中呈现平稳性。财政状况必须预测政府债务回报或财政调整（高税收增长与低支出增长的组合），或两者兼有。我们发现，财政调整，特别是通过支出变化实现的调整，是经验上相关的渠道。

papers.title: The Great Equalizer: Medicare and the Geography of Consumer Financial Strain
papers.authors: Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Maxim Pinkovskiy, Jacob Wallace
papers.abstract: We use a five percent sample of Americans’ credit bureau data, combined with a regression discontinuity approach, to estimate the effect of universal health insurance at age 65—when most Americans become eligible for Medicare—at the national, state, and local level. We find a 30 percent reduction in debt collections—and a two-thirds reduction in the geographic variation in collections—with limited effects on other financial outcomes. The areas that experienced larger reductions in collections debt at age 65 were concentrated in the Southern United States, and had higher shares of black residents, people with disabilities, and for-profit hospitals.
papers.zh_title: 伟大的均衡器：医疗保险与消费者财务压力的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国信用局数据的5%样本，结合断点回归方法，估计了65岁时（大多数美国人获得医疗保险资格）全民健康保险在全国、州和地方层面的影响。我们发现，债务催收减少了30%，且催收的地理差异减少了三分之二，而对其他财务结果的影响有限。在65岁时债务催收减少幅度较大的地区集中在美国南部，这些地区黑人居民、残疾人和营利性医院的比例较高。

papers.title: Incidence and Outcomes of School Finance Litigation: 1968-2021
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Matthew Joyce-Wirtz
papers.abstract: School finance court cases have proceeded one or more times in all but two states. Plaintiffs ask the courts to rule that the existing funding formula is unconstitutional under state constitutions, and the defendants call for continuation of the existing finance formula. By compiling and analyzing the universe of such cases, we can accurately describe the nature of the cases, the decisions made, and the long run impact on overall financing of schools. Defendants win a slight majority of decisions with, surprisingly, their victories coming most frequently in low spending states and in low achieving states. And, while plaintiff victories on average yield an immediate increase in funding, they have no influence on long run growth in school spending.
papers.zh_title: 学校财政诉讼的发生率与结果：1968-2021年
papers.zh_abstract: 除两个州外，所有州都进行过一次或多次学校财政法庭案件。原告请求法院裁定，根据州宪法，现有的资助公式违宪，而被告则呼吁维持现有的财政公式。通过汇编和分析所有这些案件，我们可以准确描述案件的性质、做出的裁决以及对学校整体融资的长期影响。被告赢得了略多数的裁决，令人惊讶的是，他们的胜利最常发生在低支出州和低成就州。而且，虽然原告的胜利平均而言会立即带来资金增加，但它们对学校支出的长期增长没有影响。

papers.title: Interbank Networks and the Interregional Transmission of Financial Crises: Evidence from the Panic of 1907
papers.authors: Matthew S. Jaremski, David C. Wheelock
papers.abstract: This paper provides quantitative evidence on interbank transmission of financial distress in the Panic of 1907 and ensuing recession. Originating in New York City, the panic led to payment suspensions and emergency currency issuance in many cities. Data on the universe of interbank connections show that i) suspension was more likely in cities whose banks had closer ties to banks at the center of the panic, ii) banks with such links were more likely to close in the panic and recession, and iii) banks responded to the panic by rearranging their correspondent relationships, with implications for network structure.
papers.zh_title: 银行间网络与金融危机的区域间传导：来自1907年恐慌的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于1907年恐慌及随后的衰退中银行间金融困境传导的定量证据。这场恐慌起源于纽约市，导致许多城市出现支付暂停和紧急货币发行。关于所有银行间联系的数据表明：i) 恐慌期间，其银行与恐慌中心银行联系更紧密的城市更有可能出现支付暂停；ii) 具有此类联系的银行在恐慌和衰退期间更有可能倒闭；iii) 银行通过重新安排其代理行关系来应对恐慌，这对网络结构产生了影响。

papers.title: Reducing Bias Among Health Care Providers: Experimental Evidence From Tanzania, Burkina Faso, and Pakistan
papers.authors: Zachary Wagner, Corrina Moucheraud, Manisha Shah, Alexandra Wollum, Willa H. Friedman, William H. Dow
papers.abstract: Bias among health care providers can lead to poor-quality care and poor health outcomes, and it can exacerbate disparities. We use a randomized controlled trial to evaluate an intervention to reduce family planning provider bias towards young women in 227 clinics in Tanzania, Burkina Faso, and Pakistan. The intervention educated providers about bias towards young women, facilitated communication about bias with other providers, and offered non-financial public awards to clinics with the least biased care. After 12 months, the intervention led to less-biased attitudes and beliefs among providers and more comprehensive counseling. Clients also perceived better treatment at intervention clinics compared to control clinics. Despite reductions in reported bias, we find mixed evidence regarding changes in method dispensing.
papers.zh_title: 减少医疗服务提供者的偏见：来自坦桑尼亚、布基纳法索和巴基斯坦的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗服务提供者的偏见可能导致低质量的护理和不良的健康结果，并可能加剧不平等。我们使用一项随机对照试验，评估了一项旨在减少坦桑尼亚、布基纳法索和巴基斯坦227家诊所中计划生育服务提供者对年轻女性偏见的干预措施。该干预措施教育提供者关于对年轻女性偏见的知识，促进提供者之间关于偏见的沟通，并向偏见护理最少的诊所提供非金钱的公开奖励。12个月后，该干预措施导致提供者产生了更少偏见的态度和信念，并提供了更全面的咨询。与对照诊所相比，干预诊所的客户也感受到了更好的待遇。尽管报告中的偏见有所减少，我们发现了关于方法配发变化的混合证据。

papers.title: What Drives Tax Policy? Political, Institutional and Economic Determinants of State Tax Policy
papers.authors: Sarah Robinson, Alisa Tazhitdinova
papers.abstract: We collect detailed data on U.S. state personal income, corporate, sales, cigarette, gasoline, and alcohol taxes over the past 70 years to shed light on the determinants of state tax policies. We provide a comprehensive summary of how tax policy has changed over time, within and across states. We then use permutation analysis, variance decomposition, and machine learning techniques to show that the timing and magnitude of tax changes are not driven by economic needs, state politics, institutional rules, neighbor competition, or demographics. Altogether, these factors explain less than 20% of observed tax variation.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D7, H2, H7
papers.zh_title: 什么驱动税收政策？州税收政策的政治、制度与经济决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 我们收集了过去70年美国各州个人所得税、公司税、销售税、香烟税、汽油税和酒精税的详细数据，以揭示州税收政策的决定因素。我们全面总结了税收政策在时间维度上以及各州内部和之间的变化情况。随后，我们使用排列分析、方差分解和机器学习技术表明，税收变化的时间和幅度并非由经济需求、州政治、制度规则、邻州竞争或人口统计因素驱动。总体而言，这些因素解释了不到20%的观察到的税收变化。

papers.title: Economic Implications of the Climate Provisions of the Inflation Reduction Act
papers.authors: John Bistline, Neil Mehrotra, Catherine Wolfram
papers.abstract: The Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) represents the largest federal response to climate change to date. We highlight the key climate provisions and assess the Act's potential economic impacts. Substantially higher investments in clean energy and electric vehicles imply that fiscal costs may be larger than projected. However, even at the high end, IRA provisions remain cost-effective. IRA has large impacts on power sector investments and electricity prices, lowering retail electricity rates and resulting in negative prices in some wholesale markets. We find small quantitative macroeconomic effects including a small decline in headline inflation, but macroeconomic conditions–particularly higher interest rates and materials costs–may have substantial negative effects on clean energy investment. We show that the subsidy approach in IRA has expansionary supply-side effects relative to a carbon tax but, in a representative-agent dynamic model, is preferable to a carbon tax only in the presence of a strong learning-by-doing externality. We also discuss the economics of the industrial policy aspects of the act as well as the distributional impacts and the possible incidence of the different tax credits in IRA.
papers.zh_title: 《通胀削减法案》气候条款的经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 《通胀削减法案》（IRA）是迄今为止联邦政府对气候变化的最大回应。我们重点介绍了关键的气候条款，并评估了该法案的潜在经济影响。清洁能源和电动汽车投资的大幅增加意味着财政成本可能高于预期。然而，即使在较高端，IRA条款仍具有成本效益。IRA对电力行业投资和电价产生重大影响，降低了零售电价，并在某些批发市场导致负电价。我们发现宏观经济影响较小，包括总体通胀率小幅下降，但宏观经济状况——尤其是更高的利率和材料成本——可能对清洁能源投资产生显著的负面影响。我们表明，与碳税相比，IRA中的补贴方法具有扩张性的供给侧效应，但在一个代表性代理人动态模型中，只有在存在强大的干中学外部性时，它才优于碳税。我们还讨论了该法案产业政策方面的经济学，以及IRA中不同税收抵免的分配影响和可能的归宿。

papers.title: Does Combating Corruption Reduce Clientelism?
papers.authors: Gustavo J. Bobonis, Paul Gertler, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro, Simeon Nichter
papers.abstract: Does combating corruption reduce clientelism? We examine the impact of a prominent anti-corruption program on clientelism using a novel representative survey of rural Brazilians. Randomized audits reduce politicians’ provision of campaign handouts, decrease citizens’ demands for private goods, and reduce requests fulfilled by politicians. We investigate mechanisms by which audits may reduce clientelism, and find that audits significantly reduce citizens’ willingness to supply clientelist votes. Results also offer novel insights into audits’ dynamic effects: they have more pronounced effects in the short run, especially during electoral periods.
papers.zh_title: 打击腐败能减少庇护主义吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 打击腐败能减少庇护主义吗？我们利用一项针对巴西农村居民的新型代表性调查，考察了一个著名的反腐败项目对庇护主义的影响。随机审计减少了政客提供竞选施舍的行为，降低了公民对私人商品的需求，并减少了由政客满足的请求。我们研究了审计可能减少庇护主义的机制，发现审计显著降低了公民提供庇护主义选票的意愿。结果还为审计的动态效应提供了新颖见解：它们在短期内效果更显著，尤其是在选举期间。

papers.title: Universalism and Political Representation: Evidence from the Field
papers.authors: Benjamin Enke, Raymond Fisman, Luis Mota Freitas, Steven Sun
papers.abstract: This paper provides field evidence on the link between morals and political behavior. We develop a theory-guided real-stakes measure of each U.S. district's values on the universalism-particularism continuum, which reflects the degree to which charitable giving decreases as a function of social distance. District universalism is strongly predictive of local Democratic vote shares, legislators' roll-call voting, and the moral content of Congressional speeches. These results hold in both across- and within-party analyses. Overall, spatial heterogeneity in universalism is a substantially stronger predictor of geographic variation in political outcomes than traditional economic variables such as income or education.
papers.zh_title: 普世主义与政治代表：来自田野的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于道德与政治行为之间联系的田野证据。我们开发了一个理论指导的、基于真实行为的衡量指标，用于衡量美国每个选区在普世主义-特殊主义连续统上的价值观，这反映了慈善捐赠随社会距离增加而减少的程度。选区普世主义强烈预测了当地民主党得票率、立法者的唱名投票以及国会演讲的道德内容。这些结果在跨党派和党内分析中均成立。总体而言，普世主义的空间异质性比收入或教育等传统经济变量更能预测政治结果的地理差异。

papers.title: Informing Mothers about the Benefits of Conversing with Infants: Experimental Evidence from Ghana
papers.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Camille Falezan, Seema Jayachandran, Mark P. Walsh
papers.abstract: Despite the well-established importance of verbal engagement for infant language and cognitive development, many parents in low-income contexts do not converse with their infants regularly. We report on a randomized field experiment evaluating a low-cost intervention that aims to raise verbal engagement with infants by showing recent or expectant mothers a 3-minute informational video and giving them a themed wall calendar. Six to eight months later, mothers selected for the intervention report greater belief in the benefits of verbally engaging with infants, more frequent parent-infant conversations, and that their infants have more advanced language and cognitive skills. We measure positive but noisy effects on parental verbal inputs in a day-long recording and on surveyor-observed infant cognitive skills. The intervention could be delivered to expectant mothers through existing health clinics at very low marginal cost so could be a highly cost-effective early childhood development policy in low-income contexts.
papers.zh_title: 告知母亲与婴儿交谈的好处：来自加纳的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管语言互动对婴儿语言和认知发展的重要性已得到充分证实，但在低收入环境中，许多父母并不经常与婴儿交谈。我们报告了一项随机田野实验，评估了一项低成本干预措施，该措施通过向准妈妈或新妈妈展示一段3分钟的信息视频并赠送一个主题挂历，旨在提高与婴儿的语言互动。六到八个月后，被选入干预组的母亲更相信与婴儿语言互动的好处，报告更频繁的亲子对话，并认为她们的婴儿具有更高级的语言和认知技能。我们测量了在一天录音中父母语言输入的积极但存在噪音的效果，以及调查员观察到的婴儿认知技能的积极但存在噪音的效果。该干预措施可以通过现有诊所以极低的边际成本提供给准妈妈，因此在低收入环境中可能是一项极具成本效益的儿童早期发展政策。

papers.title: Oil Prices, Monetary Policy and Inflation Surges
papers.authors: Luca Gagliardone, Mark Gertler
papers.abstract: We develop a simple quantitative New Keynesian model aimed at accounting for the recent sudden and persistent rise in inflation, with emphasis on the role of oil shocks and accommodative monetary policy. The model features oil as a complementary good for households and as a complementary input for firms. It also allows for unemployment and real wage rigidity. We estimate the key parameters by matching model impulse responses to those from identified money and oil shocks in a structural VAR. We then show that our model does a good job of explaining unemployment and inflation since 2010, including the recent inflation surge that began in mid 2021. We show that mainly accounting for this surge was a combination oil price shocks and “easy” monetary policy, even after allowing for demand shocks and shocks to labor market tightness. Important for the quantitative impact of the oil price shock is a low elasticity of substitution between oil and labor, which we estimate to be the case.
papers.zh_title: 油价、货币政策与通胀飙升
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单的定量新凯恩斯模型，旨在解释近期通胀的突然和持续上升，重点强调了石油冲击和宽松货币政策的作用。该模型将石油视为家庭的互补品和企业的互补投入。它还允许存在失业和实际工资刚性。我们通过匹配模型脉冲响应与结构VAR中识别的货币和石油冲击的脉冲响应来估计关键参数。然后，我们表明，我们的模型很好地解释了自2010年以来的失业率和通胀，包括始于2021年中期的近期通胀飙升。我们表明，即使考虑了需求冲击和劳动力市场紧张程度冲击，解释这次飙升的主要因素是石油价格冲击和“宽松”货币政策的结合。对石油价格冲击的定量影响重要的是石油与劳动力之间的低替代弹性，我们估计情况确实如此。

papers.title: Children's Indirect Exposure to the U.S. Justice System: Evidence from Longitudinal Links between Survey and Administrative Data
papers.authors: Keith Finlay, Michael G. Mueller-Smith, Brittany Street
papers.abstract: Children's indirect exposure to the justice system through biological parents or co-resident adults is both a marker of their own vulnerability and a measure of the justice system's expansive reach in society. Estimating the size of this population for the United States has historically been hampered by inadequate data resources, including the inability to (1) observe non-incarceration events, (2) follow children throughout their childhood, and (3) measure adult non-biological parent cohabitants. To overcome these challenges, we leverage billions of restricted administrative and survey records linked with Criminal Justice Administrative Records System data, and find substantially larger exposure rates than previously reported: prison - 9% of children born between 1999-2005, felony conviction - 18%, and any criminal charge - 39%. Charge exposure rates exceed 60% for Black, American Indian, and low-income children. While broader definitions reach a more expansive population, strong and consistently negative correlations with childhood well-being suggest these remain valuable predictors of vulnerability. Finally, we document substantial geographic variation in exposure, which we leverage in a movers design to estimate the effect of living in a high-exposure county during childhood. We find that children moving into high-exposure counties are more likely to experience post-move exposure events and exhibit significantly worse outcomes by age 26 on multiple dimensions (earnings, criminal activity, teen parenthood, mortality); impacts are strongest for those who moved at earlier ages.
papers.zh_title: 儿童对美国司法系统的间接暴露：来自调查与行政数据纵向链接的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童通过亲生父母或同住成年人对司法系统的间接暴露，既是他们自身脆弱性的标志，也是司法系统在社会中广泛影响的衡量标准。历史上，由于数据资源不足，包括无法（1）观察非监禁事件，（2）在整个童年期跟踪儿童，以及（3）衡量非亲生父母的成年同住者，估算美国这一人群的规模一直受到阻碍。为克服这些挑战，我们利用了数十亿条受限的行政和调查记录，并与刑事司法行政记录系统数据相链接，发现暴露率远高于先前报告的水平：监狱——1999-2005年间出生的儿童中有9%，重罪定罪——18%，任何刑事指控——39%。对于黑人、美洲印第安人和低收入儿童，指控暴露率超过60%。虽然更广泛的定义覆盖了更庞大的人群，但与儿童福祉之间强烈且持续的负相关表明，这些仍然是脆弱性的有价值预测指标。最后，我们记录了暴露率在空间上的显著差异，并利用移动者设计来估计童年期生活在高暴露县的影响。我们发现，搬入高暴露县的儿童更有可能经历搬家后的暴露事件，并且在26岁时在多个维度（收入、犯罪活动、青少年生育、死亡率）上表现出显著更差的结果；对较早搬家的儿童影响最大。

papers.title: Trends in Special Education Identification During the COVID-19 Pandemic: Evidence from Michigan
papers.authors: Bryant G. Hopkins, Katharine O. Strunk, Scott A. Imberman, Adrea J. Truckenmiller, Matthew Guzman, Marisa H. Fisher
papers.abstract: We use data from Michigan and an interrupted time series (ITS) strategy to show how the COVID-19 pandemic impacted new special education classifications and discontinuations. We find a substantial decrease in K-5 classifications and discontinuations during the 2019-20 and 2020-21 school years. Classifications fell by 19 and 12 percent in these years, respectively, with smaller but still significant reductions in discontinuations. Districts with remote schooling and Black, Asian, and economically disadvantaged students saw larger decreases in classifications. While rates returned to trend in 2021-22, there was little “catch up” beyond that to make up for these delays, suggesting that as of that year many students had not yet gained access to services for which they may be eligible.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间特殊教育识别趋势：来自密歇根州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用密歇根州的数据和中断时间序列（ITS）策略，展示了COVID-19疫情如何影响新的特殊教育分类和终止。我们发现，在2019-20和2020-21学年，K-5年级的分类和终止大幅减少。在这两年中，分类分别下降了19%和12%，终止的下降幅度较小但仍然显著。实行远程教学的学区以及黑人、亚裔和经济困难学生所在学区的分类下降幅度更大。虽然2021-22学年的比率恢复到了趋势水平，但除此之外几乎没有“追赶”来弥补这些延迟，这表明截至那一年，许多学生尚未获得他们可能有资格获得的服务。

papers.title: Climate Policy and the Economy: Evidence from Europe's Carbon Pricing Initiatives
papers.authors: Diego R. Känzig, Maximilian Konradt
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the impact of carbon pricing on the economy, with a focus on European carbon taxes and the carbon market. Our analysis reveals three key findings. First, while both policies have successfully reduced emissions, the economic costs of the European carbon market are larger than for national carbon taxes. Second, we explore four factors that explain this difference: fiscal policy and revenue recycling, pass-through and sectoral coverage, spillovers and leakage, and monetary policy. Our findings suggest that all four factors play a significant role. Third, we document substantial regional heterogeneity in the impacts of the carbon market, which crucially depend on the share of freely allocated emission permits and the degree of market concentration in the power sector.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, E62, H23, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 气候政策与经济：来自欧洲碳定价举措的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了碳定价对经济的影响，重点关注欧洲碳税和碳市场。我们的分析揭示了三个关键发现。首先，尽管这两项政策都成功减少了排放，但欧洲碳市场的经济成本高于国家碳税。其次，我们探讨了造成这种差异的四个因素：财政政策与收入循环、传导与行业覆盖、溢出与泄漏，以及货币政策。我们的发现表明，这四个因素都发挥了重要作用。第三，我们记录了碳市场影响中显著的地区异质性，这关键取决于免费分配的排放配额份额以及电力行业的市场集中度。

papers.title: Whatever it Takes? The Impact of Conditional Policy Promises
papers.authors: Valentin Haddad, Alan Moreira, Tyler Muir
papers.abstract: At the announcement of a new policy, agents form a view of state-contingent policy actions and impact. We develop a method to estimate this state-contingent perception and implement it for many asset-purchase interventions worldwide. Expectations of larger support in bad states—“policy puts”—explain a large fraction of the announcements’ impact. For example, when the Fed introduced purchases of corporate bonds in March 2020, markets expected five times more price support had conditions worsened relative to the median scenario. Perceived promises of additional support in bad states persistently distort asset prices, risk, and the response to future announcements.
papers.zh_title: 不惜一切代价？有条件政策承诺的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在新政策宣布时，参与者会形成对依状态而定的政策行动及其影响的看法。我们开发了一种方法来估计这种依状态而定的认知，并将其应用于全球许多资产购买干预措施。对不利状态下更大支持的预期——“政策看跌期权”——解释了公告影响的很大一部分。例如，当美联储在2020年3月引入公司债券购买时，市场预期如果情况相对于中位数情景恶化，价格支持将增加五倍。在不利状态下提供额外支持的感知承诺会持续扭曲资产价格、风险以及对未来公告的反应。

papers.title: The Economic Approach to Personality, Character and Virtue
papers.authors: James J. Heckman, Bridget Galaty, Haihan Tian
papers.abstract: This chapter presents an economic approach to character and personality traits with an application to the study of virtue. Economists interpret psychological traits, including character traits and virtue, as strategies that shape responses to situations (actions) determined by underlying endowments, preferences, resources, as well as incentives to act in situations. Philosophers of virtue consider it to be a certain kind of practice in pursuit of a worthy goal. Psychologists consider it to be a trait or endowment and many adopt this point of view. Character traits and personality are not considered immutable in any field. They are shaped by genetics, parents, peers, and schools, as well as by habituation, imitation, and life experiences. We develop economic models to interpret and give empirical content to virtue ethics and suggest what the study of virtue ethics contributes to the study of society.
papers.zh_title: 人格、性格与美德的经济学方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本章提出了一种研究性格和人格特质的经济学方法，并将其应用于美德研究。经济学家将心理特质（包括性格特质和美德）解释为策略，这些策略塑造了对情境的反应（行动），而反应由潜在禀赋、偏好、资源以及在情境中行动的激励决定。美德哲学家认为美德是追求有价值目标的某种实践。心理学家认为它是一种特质或禀赋，许多人采纳这一观点。在任何领域，性格特质和人格都不被视为不可改变的。它们受遗传、父母、同伴和学校的影响，也受习惯化、模仿和生活经历的影响。我们开发经济模型来解释美德伦理学并赋予其经验内容，并指出美德伦理学研究对社会研究的贡献。

papers.title: How Informal Mentoring by Teachers, Counselors, and Coaches Supports Students’ Long-Run Academic Success
papers.authors: Matthew A. Kraft, Alexander J. Bolves, Noelle M. Hurd
papers.abstract: We document a largely unrecognized pathway through which schools promote human capital development – by fostering informal mentoring relationships between students and teachers, counselors, and coaches. Using longitudinal data from a nationally representative sample of adolescents, we explore the nature and consequences of natural mentoring relationships by leveraging within-student variation in the timing of mentorship formation as well as differences in exposure among pairs of twins, best friends, and romantic partners. Results across difference-in-differences and pair fixed-effect specifications show consistent and meaningful positive effects on student attainment, with a conservative estimate of a 9.4 percentage point increase in college attendance. Effects are largest for students of lower socioeconomic status and robust to controls for individual characteristics and bounding exercises for selection on unobservables. Smaller class sizes and a school culture where students have a strong sense of belonging are important school-level predictors of having a K-12 natural mentor.
papers.zh_title: 教师、辅导员和教练的非正式指导如何支持学生的长期学业成功
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一种很大程度上未被认识到的学校促进人力资本发展的途径——通过培养学生与教师、辅导员和教练之间的非正式指导关系。利用具有全国代表性的青少年纵向数据，我们通过利用指导关系形成时间的学生内部变异以及双胞胎、最好朋友和浪漫伴侣之间的暴露差异，来探索自然指导关系的性质和后果。双重差分和配对固定效应模型的结果显示，对学生学业成就有一致且显著的正向影响，保守估计大学入学率提高了9.4个百分点。对社会经济地位较低的学生影响最大，并且在对个体特征进行控制以及对不可观测因素的选择性进行边界检验后，结果依然稳健。较小的班级规模和让学生有强烈归属感的学校文化，是拥有K-12阶段自然导师的重要学校层面预测因素。

papers.title: Inducing Participation and Performance Using Financial Incentives: Evidence from Medicare
papers.authors: Atul Gupta, Joseph R. Martinez, Amol S. Navathe
papers.abstract: Voluntary participation is a central feature of payment reforms that are being tested in US healthcare. These programs frequently incentivize provider participation with financial rewards linked to performance, although there are questions about their efficacy in attracting participants or on the treatment effects for participants drawn by such incentives. We inform this debate by studying the introduction of a voluntary Medicare payment reform to reduce spending on hospital surgeries. We show that hospitals with a higher financial gain predicted by the payment formula are more likely to participate. We leverage quasi-experimental variation in the potential financial gain to instrument for participation and quantify the treatment effect for “complier” hospitals: those induced to participate by the incentive. Although participating hospitals are disproportionately nonprofit overall, financial compliers are disproportionately of for-profit ownership. Compliers generate greater savings than the average participant by decreasing medical services more aggressively. Selection on favorable historical trends or changes in patient mix do not explain the savings. However, we detect some worsening of care quality in complier hospitals. Overall, the results suggest that the use of financial incentives increases both the participation in and the treatment effect of this voluntary program.
papers.zh_title: 利用财务激励诱导参与和绩效：来自医疗保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自愿参与是美国医疗保健领域正在测试的支付改革的核心特征。这些项目通常通过将财务奖励与绩效挂钩来激励提供者参与，尽管对于这些激励在吸引参与者方面或对受此类激励吸引的参与者的处理效应存在疑问。我们通过研究一项旨在减少医院手术支出的自愿性医疗保险支付改革的引入，为这一辩论提供信息。我们表明，根据支付公式预测财务收益更高的医院更有可能参与。我们利用潜在财务收益的准实验变异作为参与的工具变量，并量化对“依从”医院（即那些因激励而参与其中的医院）的处理效应。尽管参与医院总体上非营利性比例过高，但财务依从者中营利性所有权比例过高。依从者通过更积极地减少医疗服务，产生了比平均参与者更大的节省。选择有利的历史趋势或患者组合的变化并不能解释这些节省。然而，我们在依从者医院中检测到护理质量有所恶化。总体而言，结果表明，使用财务激励既增加了该自愿项目的参与率，也提高了其处理效应。

papers.title: Stress Relief?: Funding Structures and Resilience to the Covid Shock
papers.authors: Kristin Forbes, Christian Friedrich, Dennis Reinhardt
papers.abstract: This paper explores the relationship between different funding structures—including the source, instrument, currency, and counterparty location of funding—and the extent of financial stress experienced in different countries and sectors during the sharp risk-off shock in early 2020 when Covid-19 spread globally. We measure financial stress using a new dataset on changes in credit default swap spreads for sovereigns, banks, and corporates. Then we use country-sector and country-sector-time panels to assess how different funding structures are related to financial stress. A higher share of funding from non-bank financial institutions (NBFIs) or in US dollars was correlated with significantly greater stress, while a higher share of funding in debt instruments (instead of loans) or cross-border (instead of domestically) was not significantly related to financial stress. The results suggest that macroprudential regulations should broaden their current focus to take into account exposures to NBFI and dollar funding, with less priority for regulations focused on residency (i.e., capital controls). After the sharp increase in financial stress in early 2020, policy responses targeting these structural vulnerabilities (i.e., US$ swap lines and focused on NBFIs) were more effective at mitigating stress related to these funding structures than policies supporting banks, even after controlling for macroeconomic policy responses.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E65, F31, F36, F42, G18, G23, G38
papers.zh_title: 缓解压力？融资结构与对新冠冲击的韧性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了不同的融资结构——包括融资来源、工具、货币和交易对手所在地——与2020年初新冠疫情全球蔓延时强烈的避险冲击期间不同国家和部门所经历的金融压力程度之间的关系。我们使用一个关于主权、银行和公司信用违约互换利差变化的新数据集来衡量金融压力。然后，我们使用国家-部门和国别-部门-时间面板来评估不同的融资结构如何与金融压力相关。来自非银行金融机构（NBFI）或美元的融资份额较高与显著更大的压力相关，而债务工具（而非贷款）或跨境（而非国内）融资份额较高与金融压力没有显著关系。结果表明，宏观审慎监管应扩大其当前关注范围，以考虑对非银行金融机构和美元融资的风险敞口，而针对居民身份（即资本管制）的监管优先级较低。在2020年初金融压力急剧上升之后，针对这些结构性脆弱性的政策应对（即美元互换额度并聚焦于非银行金融机构）在缓解与这些融资结构相关的压力方面，比支持银行的政策更有效，即使在控制了宏观经济政策应对之后也是如此。

papers.title: Chinese Insurance Markets: Developments and Prospects
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Xian Xu
papers.abstract: In this chapter, we review the development of the insurance industry in China, and provide a comprehensive discussion of its regulatory framework, major insurance segments, market structure, InsurTech, social insurance, and the challenges and prospects for the future development of the insurance market in China.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PE；JEL：G22, G28, H55, L11, O16
papers.zh_title: 中国保险市场：发展与前景
papers.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我们回顾了中国保险业的发展历程，并全面讨论了其监管框架、主要保险细分领域、市场结构、保险科技、社会保险，以及中国保险市场未来发展的挑战与前景。

papers.title: PLUS or Minus? The Effect of Graduate School Loans on Access, Attainment, and Prices
papers.authors: Sandra E. Black, Lesley J. Turner, Jeffrey T. Denning
papers.abstract: In 2006, the federal government effectively uncapped student borrowing for graduate programs with the introduction of the Graduate PLUS loan program. Access to additional federal loans increased graduate students’ borrowing and shifted the composition of their loans from private to federal debt. However, the increase in borrowing limits did not improve access to existing programs overall or for underrepresented groups. Nor did access to additional loan aid result in significant increase in constrained students’ persistence or degree receipt. We document that among programs in which a larger share of graduate students had exhausted their annual federal loan eligibility before the policy change—and thus were more exposed to the expansion in access to credit—federal borrowing and prices increased.
papers.zh_title: PLUS还是减号？研究生贷款对入学、学业完成和学费的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2006年，联邦政府通过引入研究生PLUS贷款项目，实际上取消了对研究生项目学生借款的上限。获得额外联邦贷款的机会增加了研究生的借款，并使其贷款构成从私人债务转向联邦债务。然而，借款限额的提高并未总体上改善对现有项目的入学机会，也未改善对弱势群体的入学机会。同样，获得额外贷款援助也并未显著提高受约束学生的学业持续性或学位获得率。我们记录到，在那些政策变化前更大比例研究生已用尽年度联邦贷款资格——因此更受信贷扩张影响——的项目中，联邦借款和学费均有所增加。

papers.title: Evaluation and Learning in R&D Investment
papers.authors: Alexander P. Frankel, Joshua L. Krieger, Danielle Li, Dimitris Papanikolaou
papers.abstract: We investigate the role of knowledge spillovers in determining firms' incentives to invest in exploratory versus incremental R&D. We link drug candidates to molecularly similarly drugs that are developed in the future and show that novel drug candidates generate greater knowledge spillovers: they are more likely to inspire the development of subsequent successful drugs than incremental candidates. Building off this empirical finding, we develop a model of R&D in which firms face a tradeoff: incremental drug candidates are easier to evaluate because they are based on more established science, while novel drugs present more opportunities for future learning. We provide empirical evidence that firms place less value on learning and are therefore reluctant to develop novel drugs. We provide additional evidence that firms are more willing to engage in exploration when they expect to appropriate a greater fraction of spillover knowledge, when they expect drugs to generate many follow on innovations, and when they face lower discount rates.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EH, PR；JEL：G11, L65, O31, O32, O34
papers.zh_title: 研发投资中的评估与学习
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了知识溢出在决定企业投资于探索性研发与增量性研发的激励中的作用。我们将候选药物与未来开发的分子相似药物联系起来，并表明新颖的候选药物能产生更大的知识溢出：它们比增量候选药物更有可能激发后续成功药物的开发。基于这一实证发现，我们构建了一个研发模型，其中企业面临一种权衡：增量候选药物更容易评估，因为它们基于更成熟的科学，而新颖药物则为未来学习提供了更多机会。我们提供的实证证据表明，企业不太重视学习，因此不愿开发新颖药物。我们还提供了额外证据，表明当企业预期能获取更大份额的溢出知识、预期药物能引发许多后续创新，以及面临较低贴现率时，它们更愿意进行探索。

papers.title: The Effect of Pre-Arraignment Legal Representation on Criminal Case Outcomes
papers.authors: Johanna Lacoe, Brett Fischer, Steven Raphael
papers.abstract: Low-income individuals arrested on criminal charges face disproportionately high rates of pretrial detention and conviction. We study a novel approach to addressing this inequity: providing low-income individuals with access to legal counsel immediately following their arrest. Focusing on a pilot program in a large urban county, we estimate the causal impact of early representation by a public defender on release and case outcomes, leveraging quasi-random variation in access to counsel pre-arraignment. Low-income individuals who met with a public defender shortly after arrest were 28 percentage points more likely to be released pretrial, and 36 percent more likely to see their cases dismissed, relative to otherwise similar individuals who would first meet with a public defender at their arraignment. These results suggest that providing timely access to legal representation could improve release and case outcomes for public defender clients.
papers.zh_title: 提审前法律代理对刑事案件结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 因刑事指控被捕的低收入个体面临不成比例的高审前拘留率和定罪率。我们研究了一种解决这一不平等问题的新方法：在逮捕后立即为低收入个体提供法律咨询。聚焦于一个大城市县的试点项目，我们利用提审前获得律师服务的准随机变化，估计了早期由公设辩护人代理对释放和案件结果的因果影响。与那些在提审时才会首次见到公设辩护人的类似个体相比，在逮捕后不久见到公设辩护人的低收入个体，审前获释的可能性高出28个百分点，案件被驳回的可能性高出36%。这些结果表明，提供及时的法律代理机会可以改善公设辩护人客户的释放和案件结果。

papers.title: Coordination with Differential Time Preferences: Experimental Evidence
papers.authors: Marina Agranov, Jeongbin Kim, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: The experimental literature on repeated games has largely focused on settings where players discount the future identically. In applications, however, interactions often occur between players whose time preferences differ. We study experimentally the effects of discounting differentials in infinitely repeated coordination games. In our data, differential discount factors play two roles. First, they provide a coordination anchor: more impatient players get higher payoffs first. Introducing even small discounting differentials reduces coordination failures significantly. Second, with pronounced discounting differentials, intertemporal trades are prevalent: impatient players get higher payoffs for an initial phase and patient players get higher payoffs in perpetuity afterward.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C73, C92, D15, D25
papers.zh_title: 具有不同时间偏好的协调：实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 关于重复博弈的实验文献主要关注参与者对未来贴现相同的情境。然而，在应用中，互动通常发生在时间偏好不同的参与者之间。我们通过实验研究了贴现率差异在无限重复协调博弈中的影响。在我们的数据中，不同的贴现因子扮演了两个角色。首先，它们提供了一个协调锚点：更不耐烦的参与者首先获得更高的收益。即使引入微小的贴现率差异，也能显著减少协调失败。其次，在贴现率差异显著的情况下，跨期交易很普遍：不耐烦的参与者在初始阶段获得更高收益，而耐心的参与者此后永久获得更高收益。

papers.title: Trends in the School Lunch Program: Changes in Selection, Nutrition & Health
papers.authors: Therese Bonomo, Diane Whitmore Schanzenbach
papers.abstract: There has been significant media attention on the issue of childhood obesity, leading policymakers to reform the National School Lunch Program (NSLP) to include stricter nutritional requirements. We use data on school lunch menus to document improvements in the nutritional quality of school meals between 1991 and 2010. We then evaluate how this change in nutritional content maps into obesity outcomes, using panel data on a nationally representative cohort of children, tracking them from kindergarten entry in fall 2010 through the end of fifth grade in spring 2016. We find little evidence that participation in the school lunch program leads to weight gain, as measured by changes in obesity, overweight, and BMI. These results suggest that improvements in the nutritional content of school lunches have been largely successful in reversing the previously negative relationship between school lunches and childhood obesity. Unrelated to school lunch participation, we find a strong relationship between mother’s obesity status and both the level and growth of children’s obesity, especially for girls and among high-SES families.
papers.zh_title: 学校午餐计划趋势：选择、营养与健康的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童肥胖问题受到了媒体的广泛关注，促使政策制定者改革国家学校午餐计划（NSLP），纳入更严格的营养要求。我们利用学校午餐菜单数据，记录了1991年至2010年间学校餐食营养质量的改善情况。然后，我们使用一个全国代表性儿童队列的面板数据，追踪他们从2010年秋季进入幼儿园到2016年春季五年级结束的情况，评估了营养含量的变化如何映射到肥胖结果上。我们发现，几乎没有证据表明参与学校午餐计划会导致体重增加（以肥胖、超重和BMI的变化衡量）。这些结果表明，学校午餐营养含量的改善在很大程度上成功逆转了学校午餐与儿童肥胖之间先前存在的负相关关系。与学校午餐参与无关，我们发现母亲的肥胖状况与儿童肥胖的水平及增长之间存在强关联，尤其是对于女孩和高社会经济地位家庭。

papers.title: Social Relationships and Joint Profit in Kinshasa
papers.authors: Aimable Amani Lameke, Albert Malukisa Nkuku, Raúl Sánchez de la Sierra, Vincent Tanutama, Kristof Titeca
papers.abstract: This article explores the role of social ties in governing the transaction costs of corrupt exchange. We leverage relationships we have built over years with public transport operators in the Congo, where a more efficient toll fee system has replaced costly bribe negotiations among mutually connected drivers and officers. A field experiment encourages drivers in random days to drive in routes where they do not have ties with the officers. In rerouting days, drivers interact with officers with whom they have less personal ties. Rerouting decreases driving revenue, net of operating costs (joint profit). The analysis of two cross-randomizations allows us to attribute this reduction in joint profit to the driver-officer social ties, and to establish that ties give the driver the security to take actions that increase passenger demand and prices. The findings emphasize that social ties might be relevant in mitigating the fundamental problem of exchange among corrupt transactions, imply that corruption profit opportunities shape the social structure.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D23, D73, D74
papers.zh_title: 金沙萨的社会关系与联合利润
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了社会关系在治理腐败交易成本中的作用。我们利用了多年来与刚果公共交通运营商建立的关系，在那里，一种更高效的收费系统取代了相互有联系的司机和官员之间代价高昂的贿赂谈判。一项实地实验在随机日期鼓励司机在那些他们与官员没有关系的路线上行驶。在改道日，司机与个人关系较少的官员互动。改道减少了驾驶收入（扣除运营成本后的联合利润）。对两个交叉随机化的分析使我们能够将这种联合利润的减少归因于司机与官员之间的社会关系，并确定这种关系赋予了司机采取行动以提高乘客需求和价格的安全性。研究结果强调，社会关系可能在缓解腐败交易中的基本交换问题方面具有相关性，并意味着腐败利润机会塑造了社会结构。

papers.title: The Economics of Financial Stress
papers.authors: Dmitriy Sergeyev, Chen Lian, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
papers.abstract: We study the psychological costs of financial constraints and their economic consequences. Using a representative survey of U.S. households, we document the prevalence of financial stress in U.S. households and a strong relationship between financial stress and measures of financial constraints. We incorporate financial stress into an otherwise standard dynamic model of consumption and labor supply. We emphasize two key results. First, both financial stress itself and naivete about financial stress are important components of a psychology-based theory of the poverty trap. Sophisticates, instead, save extra to escape high-stress states because they understand that doing so alleviates the economic consequences of financial stress. Second, the financial stress channel dampens or reverses the counterfactual large negative wealth effect on labor earnings because relieving stress frees up cognitive resources for productive work. Financial stress also has macroeconomic implications on wealth inequality and fiscal multipliers.
papers.zh_title: 财务压力的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了财务约束的心理成本及其经济后果。利用一项具有代表性的美国家庭调查，我们记录了美国家庭中财务压力的普遍性，以及财务压力与财务约束指标之间的强相关性。我们将财务压力纳入一个原本标准的消费和劳动供给动态模型中。我们强调两个关键结果。首先，财务压力本身以及对财务压力的天真认知，都是基于心理学的贫困陷阱理论的重要组成部分。相反，老练者会额外储蓄以逃离高压状态，因为他们明白这样做可以减轻财务压力的经济后果。其次，财务压力渠道会抑制或逆转反事实的、劳动收入对财富的较大负效应，因为缓解压力可以释放认知资源用于生产性工作。财务压力还对财富不平等和财政乘数具有宏观经济影响。

papers.title: Do You Even Crypto, Bro? Cryptocurrencies in Household Finance
papers.authors: Michael Weber, Bernardo Candia, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
papers.abstract: Using repeated large-scale surveys of U.S. households, we study the cryptocurrency investment decisions and motives of households relative to other financial assets. Cryptocurrency holders tend to be young, white, male and more libertarian relative to non-crypto holders. They expect much higher rates of returns for crypto and perceive it as relatively safer than do other households. They also view it as a better hedge against inflation. For those holding cryptocurrencies, changes in Bitcoin prices translate into their purchases of durable goods. Finally, exogenously-provided information about historical returns of cryptocurrencies leads individuals to increase their desired crypto holdings and makes them more likely to actually purchase cryptocurrency subsequently. We compare these views and behaviors to those of households toward other financial assets and argue that cryptocurrency is unique in many of these respects.
papers.zh_title: 老兄，你玩加密货币吗？家庭金融中的加密货币
papers.zh_abstract: 利用对美国住户的重复大规模调查，我们研究了家庭相对于其他金融资产的加密货币投资决策和动机。加密货币持有者往往更年轻、白人、男性，且比非加密货币持有者更倾向于自由意志主义。他们对加密货币的预期回报率要高得多，并认为它比其他家庭认为的更安全。他们还将其视为更好的通胀对冲工具。对于持有加密货币的人来说，比特币价格的变化会转化为他们对耐用品的购买。最后，外生提供的关于加密货币历史回报的信息会导致个人增加他们期望的加密货币持有量，并使他们随后更有可能实际购买加密货币。我们将这些观点和行为与家庭对其他金融资产的观点和行为进行比较，并认为加密货币在许多这些方面是独特的。

papers.title: Campaign Connections
papers.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Claudio Labanca
papers.abstract: This paper explores the labor market returns to working for a victorious political campaign. Using unique administrative data from Brazil, we track the earnings and employment of campaign workers before and after close elections spanning nearly 20 years. We identify sizable returns to working for a winning campaign, especially in areas with a large informal sector and for workers connected to newly elected challengers. The returns are concentrated in the public sector, where connected hires are relatively more qualified. Our results suggest that campaign connections facilitate the hiring of capable but inexperienced workers in the public sector through relational contracting.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, D73, J45, J46, O17, P00
papers.zh_title: 竞选人脉
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了为一场获胜的政治竞选工作所带来的劳动力市场回报。利用来自巴西的独特行政数据，我们追踪了近20年间在势均力敌的选举前后竞选工作人员的薪酬和就业情况。我们发现，为获胜竞选工作会带来可观的回报，尤其是在非正规部门规模较大的地区，以及对于与新当选的挑战者有关联的工人而言。这些回报集中在公共部门，在那里，有人脉的雇员相对更合格。我们的结果表明，竞选人脉通过关系合同促进了公共部门雇佣有能力但缺乏经验的工人。

papers.title: Inequality and the Zero Lower Bound
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Joël Marbet, Galo Nuño, Omar Rachedi
papers.abstract: This paper studies how household inequality shapes the effects of the zero lower bound (ZLB) on nominal interest rates on aggregate dynamics. To do so, we consider a heterogeneous agent New Keynesian (HANK) model with an occasionally binding ZLB and solve for its fully non-linear stochastic equilibrium using a novel neural network algorithm. In this setting, changes in the monetary policy stance influence households' precautionary savings by altering the frequency of ZLB events. As a result, the model features monetary policy non-neutrality in the long run. The degree of long-run non-neutrality, i.e., by how much monetary policy shifts real rates in the ergodic distribution of the model, can be substantial when we combine low inflation targets and high levels of wealth inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：D31, E12, E21, E31, E43, E52, E58
papers.zh_title: 不平等与零下限
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究家庭不平等如何塑造名义利率零下限（ZLB）对总体动态的影响。为此，我们考虑了一个具有偶尔约束性ZLB的异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）模型，并使用一种新颖的神经网络算法求解其完全非线性的随机均衡。在这种设定下，货币政策立场的变化通过改变ZLB事件的频率来影响家庭的预防性储蓄。因此，该模型在长期内具有货币政策非中性特征。当我们结合低通胀目标和高水平的财富不平等时，长期非中性的程度——即货币政策在模型的遍历分布中改变实际利率的程度——可能相当大。

papers.title: Effects of the Minimum Wage on the Nonprofit Sector
papers.authors: Jonathan Meer, Hedieh Tajali
papers.abstract: The nonprofit sector’s ability to absorb increases in labor costs differs from the private sector in a number of ways. We analyze how nonprofits are affected by changes in the minimum wage utilizing data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics and the Internal Revenue Service, linked to state minimum wages. We examine changes in reported employment and volunteering, as well as other financial statements such as revenues and expenses. The results from both datasets show a negative impact on employment for states with large statutory minimum wage increases. We observe some evidence for a reduction in the number of nonprofit establishments, fundraising expenses, and revenues from contributions.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资对非营利部门的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 非营利部门吸收劳动力成本增加的能力在许多方面与私营部门不同。我们利用来自劳工统计局和国税局的数据，并与各州最低工资相关联，分析非营利组织如何受到最低工资变化的影响。我们考察了报告就业和志愿服务的变化，以及其他财务报表如收入和支出的变化。两个数据集的结果都显示，对于法定最低工资大幅增加的州，就业受到负面影响。我们观察到一些证据表明，非营利机构数量、筹款费用和捐款收入有所减少。

papers.title: Strategic Complementarities in a Dynamic Model of Technology Adoption: P2P Digital Payments
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Francesco Lippi, Esteban Méndez, Diana Van Patten
papers.abstract: This paper develops a dynamic model of technology adoption featuring strategic complementarities: the benefits of usage increase with the number of adopters. We study the diffusion of new means of payments, where such complementarities are pervasive. We show that complementarities give rise to multiple equilibria, suboptimal allocations, and study the planner’s problem. The model generates gradualism in adoption, as individuals optimally wait for others to adopt before doing so. We apply the theory to the adoption of SINPE, an electronic peer-to-peer (P2P) payment app developed by the Central Bank of Costa Rica. Transaction-level data on the use of SINPE and several administrative data sets on the network structure allow us to exploit plausibly exogenous variation and to document sizable complementarities. A calibrated version of the model shows that the optimal subsidy pushes the economy to universal adoption.
papers.zh_title: 技术采纳动态模型中的战略互补性：P2P数字支付
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个具有战略互补性的技术采纳动态模型：使用收益随采纳者数量增加而增加。我们研究新支付方式的扩散，在这种方式中，这种互补性普遍存在。我们表明，互补性会导致多重均衡和次优配置，并研究了计划者的问题。该模型在采纳中产生了渐进主义，因为个人会最优地等待他人先采纳。我们将该理论应用于SINPE的采纳，SINPE是哥斯达黎加中央银行开发的一款电子点对点（P2P）支付应用程序。关于SINPE使用的交易层面数据以及关于网络结构的多个行政数据集，使我们能够利用看似外生的变化，并记录下可观的互补性。该模型的校准版本表明，最优补贴将推动经济实现普遍采纳。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Consequences of Exchange Rate Depreciations
papers.authors: Masao Fukui, Emi Nakamura, Jón Steinsson
papers.abstract: We study the consequences of “regime-induced” exchange rate depreciations by comparing outcomes for peggers versus floaters to the US dollar in response to a dollar depreciation. Pegger currencies depreciate relative to floater currencies and these depreciations are strongly expansionary. The boom is associated with a fall in net exports, and (if anything) an increase in interest rates in the pegger countries. This suggests that expenditure switching and domestic monetary policy are not the main drivers of the boom. We show that a large class of existing models cannot match our estimated responses and develop a model with imperfect financial openness that can. Following a depreciation, UIP deviations lower the costs of borrowing from abroad and stimulate the economy, as in the data. The model is consistent with (unconditional) exchange rate disconnect and the Mussa facts, even though exchange rates have large effects on the economy.
papers.zh_title: 汇率贬值的宏观经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过比较盯住美元与浮动汇率制国家在美元贬值时的结果，来研究“制度引发的”汇率贬值的后果。盯住国货币相对于浮动国货币贬值，且这些贬值具有强烈的扩张性。这种繁荣与净出口下降以及（如果有的话）盯住国利率上升相关。这表明支出转换和国内货币政策并非繁荣的主要驱动因素。我们表明，一大类现有模型无法匹配我们估计的反应，并开发了一个具有不完全金融开放性的模型，该模型可以做到这一点。在贬值之后，UIP偏差降低了从国外借贷的成本并刺激了经济，正如数据所示。该模型与（无条件）汇率脱节和Mussa事实一致，尽管汇率对经济有巨大影响。

papers.title: Who Gains from Corporate Tax Cuts?
papers.authors: James Cloyne, Ezgi Kurt, Paolo Surico
papers.abstract: Goods producers increase their capital expenditure and employment in response to a cut in marginal corporate income tax rates or an increase in investment tax credits. In contrast, companies in the service sector mostly use any tax windfall to increase dividend payouts. We base our conclusions on a novel measure of U.S. firm-specific tax shocks that combines changes in statutory tax rates faced by each firm with narrative identified legislated U.S. federal tax changes between 1950 and 2006.
papers.zh_title: 谁从企业减税中获益？
papers.zh_abstract: 商品生产商在应对边际企业所得税税率削减或投资税收抵免增加时，会增加其资本支出和就业。相比之下，服务业的公司大多将任何税收意外之财用于增加股息支付。我们的结论基于一种新颖的美国公司特定税收冲击衡量方法，该方法结合了每家公司面临的法定税率变化，以及通过叙事方法识别的1950年至2006年间美国联邦法定税收变化。

papers.title: Child Health, Parental Well-Being, and the Social Safety Net
papers.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, N. Meltem Daysal, Snaebjorn Gunnsteinsson, Teresa Molina, Herdis Steingrimsdottir
papers.abstract: How do parents contend with threats to the health and survival of their children? Can the social safety net mitigate negative economic effects through transfers to affected families? We study these questions by combining the universe of cancer diagnoses among Danish children with register data for affected and matched unaffected families. Parental income declines substantially for 3-4 years following a child's cancer diagnosis. Fathers’ incomes recover fully, but mothers' incomes remain 3% lower 12 years after diagnosis. Using a policy reform that introduced variation in the generosity of targeted safety net transfers to affected families, we show that such transfers play a crucial role in smoothing income for these households and, importantly, do not generate work disincentive effects. The pattern of results is most consistent with the idea that parents’ preferences to personally provide care for their children during the critical years following a severe health shock drive changes in labor supply and income. Mental health and fertility effects are also observed but are likely not mediators for impacts on economic outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 儿童健康、父母福祉与社会安全网
papers.zh_abstract: 父母如何应对子女健康和生存受到的威胁？社会安全网能否通过向受影响家庭提供转移支付来减轻负面经济影响？我们通过将丹麦儿童癌症诊断的完整数据与受影响及匹配的未受影响家庭的登记数据相结合来研究这些问题。在儿童被诊断出癌症后的3-4年内，父母收入大幅下降。父亲的收入完全恢复，但母亲的收入在诊断后12年仍低3%。利用一项引入针对受影响家庭的安全网转移支付慷慨程度变化的政策改革，我们表明，此类转移支付在平滑这些家庭的收入方面发挥着关键作用，并且重要的是，不会产生工作抑制效应。结果模式最符合以下观点：在严重健康冲击后的关键几年里，父母亲自照顾孩子的偏好驱动了劳动力供给和收入的变化。还观察到了心理健康和生育率的影响，但它们可能不是经济结果影响的中介因素。

papers.title: Measurements, Determinants and Causes of Corruption: Lessons from China's Anti-Corruption Campaign
papers.authors: Hanming Fang
papers.abstract: Corruption is a widespread phenomenon in many developing and transitional economies. China is a country in profile both in the prevalence of corruption, and in its attempts to root out corruption. The recent anti-corruption campaign in China, which started in December of 2012 when President Xi Jinping took power, is unprecedented in its magnitude and time length. It has had lasting impact on the functioning of the Chinese bureaucracy, and on the behavior of firms and consumers. It also provides unusual amount of data to study the causes and consequences of corruption, which will have implications for other countries and economies. In this review I discuss the definition and measurement of corruption with a particular focus on the measurements that highlight the city-level heterogeneity of corruption in China, and present simple frameworks to understand the determinants of corruption by government officials and the causes and consequences of corruption and anti-corruption. I summarize the key findings regarding how the anti-corruption campaign affects the behavior of a host of decisions makers in the economy, including firms and bureaucrats, and on the resource allocation in general, and argue that the lessons from China's anti-corruption campaign are useful to other developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 腐败的度量、决定因素与成因：来自中国反腐运动的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 腐败是许多发展中经济体和转型经济体中普遍存在的现象。中国既是一个腐败盛行的典型国家，也是一个致力于根除腐败的典型国家。始于2012年12月习近平主席上台后的中国近期反腐运动，其规模和持续时间前所未有。这场运动对中国官僚体系的运作以及企业和消费者的行为产生了持久影响，同时也为研究腐败的成因与后果提供了异常丰富的数据，这些研究将对其他国家和经济体具有借鉴意义。在本综述中，我讨论了腐败的定义和度量，特别关注那些凸显中国城市层面腐败异质性的度量方法，并提出了理解政府官员腐败决定因素以及腐败与反腐成因及后果的简单框架。我总结了关于反腐运动如何影响经济中一系列决策者（包括企业和官僚）行为以及总体资源配置的关键发现，并论证了中国反腐运动的经验对其他发展中国家具有借鉴价值。

papers.title: When Do Cross-Sectional Asset Pricing Factors Span the Stochastic Discount Factor?
papers.authors: Serhiy Kozak, Stefan Nagel
papers.abstract: When expected returns are linear in asset characteristics, the stochastic discount factor (SDF) that prices individual stocks can be represented as a factor model with GLS cross-sectional regression slope factors. Factors constructed heuristically by aggregating individual stocks into characteristics-based factor portfolios using sorting, characteristics-weighting, or OLS cross-sectional regression slopes do not span this SDF unless the covariance matrix of stock returns has a specific structure. These conditions are more likely satisfied when researchers use large numbers of characteristics simultaneously. Methods to hedge unpriced components of heuristic factor returns allow partial relaxation of these conditions. We also show the conditions that must hold for dimension reduction to a number of factors smaller than the number of characteristics to be possible without having to invert a large covariance matrix. Under these conditions, instrumented and projected principal components analysis methods can be implemented as simple PCA on characteristics-based portfolios.
papers.zh_title: 横截面资产定价因子何时能跨越随机贴现因子？
papers.zh_abstract: 当预期收益与资产特征呈线性关系时，对个股进行定价的随机贴现因子（SDF）可以表示为一个包含GLS横截面回归斜率因子的因子模型。通过排序、特征加权或OLS横截面回归斜率等方法，将个股聚合为基于特征的投资组合而启发式构建的因子，并不能跨越这个SDF，除非股票收益的协方差矩阵具有特定结构。当研究者同时使用大量特征时，这些条件更有可能得到满足。对启发式因子收益中未定价成分进行对冲的方法，允许这些条件得到部分放松。我们还展示了在无需对大型协方差矩阵求逆的情况下，将维度缩减至小于特征数量的因子数所必须满足的条件。在这些条件下，工具变量主成分分析方法和投影主成分分析方法可以简化为对基于特征的投资组合进行简单的主成分分析。

papers.title: The Impact of the Prehistoric Out of Africa Migration on Cultural Diversity
papers.authors: Oded Galor, Marc Klemp, Daniel C. Wainstock
papers.abstract: Evidence suggests that the prehistoric Out of Africa Migration has impacted the degree of intra-population genetic and phenotypic diversity across the globe. This paper provides the first evidence that this migration has shaped cultural diversity. Leveraging a folklore catalogue of 958 oral traditions across the world, we find that ethnic groups further away from East Africa along the migratory routes have lower folkloric diversity. This pattern is consistent with the compression of genetic, phenotypic, and phonemic traits along the Out of Africa migration routes, setting conditions for the emergence and proliferation of differential cultural diversity and economic development across the world.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：N0, O10, O40, Z10
papers.zh_title: 史前“走出非洲”迁徙对文化多样性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 有证据表明，史前的“走出非洲”迁徙影响了全球范围内种群内遗传和表型多样性的程度。本文首次提供了证据，表明这次迁徙塑造了文化多样性。利用一个包含全球958个口头传统的民俗目录，我们发现，沿着迁徙路线距离东非更远的族群，其民俗多样性更低。这一模式与“走出非洲”迁徙路线上遗传、表型和音位特征的压缩现象相一致，为全球不同文化多样性和经济发展的出现与扩散创造了条件。

papers.title: The Evolution of Platform Gig Work, 2012-2021
papers.authors: Andrew Garin, Emilie Jackson, Dmitri K. Koustas, Alicia Miller
papers.abstract: We document the dynamics of tax-based measures of work mediated by online platforms from 2012 through 2021. We present a measurement framework to account for high reporting thresholds on some information returns using returns from states with lower reporting thresholds to provide a more complete estimate of total platform work. Updating data through 2021 allows us to provide the most comprehensive estimates of the COVID-19 pandemic on tax filing behavior. We find that the number of workers receiving information returns not subject to the 1099-K gap increased dramatically during the pandemic, with least 5 million individuals receiving information returns from platform gig work by 2021, nearly all from transportation platforms. We present evidence that the availability of expanded unemployment insurance benefits resulted in many individuals who were platform workers in 2019 not reporting any self-employment income in 2020-2021. At the same time, other services done by platform gig workers increased dramatically by at least 3.1 million people between 2019 and 2021. Interestingly, the broader 1099-contract economy follows a different trend, declining during this period, suggesting the challenges for tax administration are largely concentrated among platform gig workers, at least through 2021.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：H24, J21, J41, J46, M13, Y1
papers.zh_title: 平台零工经济的演变：2012-2021年
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了2012年至2021年间，由在线平台中介的工作的基于税收的衡量指标的动态变化。我们提出了一个衡量框架，以解释某些信息申报表上的高申报门槛，利用来自申报门槛较低的州的数据，来提供对平台工作总量的更完整估计。将数据更新至2021年，使我们能够提供关于COVID-19大流行对纳税申报行为影响的最全面估计。我们发现，在大流行期间，收到不受1099-K门槛限制的信息申报表的工人数量急剧增加，到2021年至少有500万人从平台零工工作中收到了信息申报表，其中几乎全部来自交通平台。我们提供的证据表明，扩大的失业保险福利的可用性，导致许多在2019年是平台工人的个人在2020-2021年没有报告任何自雇收入。与此同时，平台零工工人从事的其他服务在2019年至2021年间急剧增加了至少310万人。有趣的是，更广泛的1099合同经济遵循了不同的趋势，在此期间出现下降，这表明税收管理面临的挑战主要集中在平台零工工人身上，至少到2021年是这样。

papers.title: Pharmaceutical Pricing and R&D as a Global Public Good
papers.authors: H. E. Frech, III, Mark V. Pauly, William S. Comanor, Joseph R. Martinez
papers.abstract:
In his Labor Day address, President Biden stated that the U.S. “has the highest drug prices in the world, and there is no reason for it.” For new branded drugs, the first part of that statement is supported by a recent RAND Report (Mulcahy et. al. 2021) which found U.S. average prices are 2.3 times those present in both the 32 OECD countries overall and in the UK separately. In this research, we consider the second part of that statement, and identify the economic factors that suggest some “reasons for it.”
Viewing pharmaceutical markets through the lens of the theories of global public goods and alliances, as developed by Olson and Zeckhauser (1966), we explain the observed pricing differences along with their implications the for the global supply of innovative new drugs. Similar views were advanced in two U.S. government reports (CEA 2018, 2020), and also by Goldman and Lakdawala (2018). We develop these ideas further and implement them empirically.
A commonly held theory presumes that drug companies in the U.S set prices for patented drugs at profit- maximizing levels that fund and incentivize substantial research and development efforts. In contrast, in the rest of the world (ROW), national authorities set prices minimally above marginal costs of production, allowing few revenues remaining to support R&D (CEA Report 2018; Blumenthal 2018; Hooper and Henderson 2022). The ROW countries are then considered to be fully free riding on U.S. research efforts. We examine this argument both theoretically and empirically, and find it wanting. 
We apply global public good theory to examine the pricing of branded drugs. To this end, we describe the optimal global contribution, as supported by the Lindahl pricing model, and show theoretically that existing independently determined contributions and thereby aggregate R&D levels are likely sub-optimal. Then we implement the model by calculating the contribution to the global public good as represented by short-term profits or quasi-rents received from sales of all branded drugs. These calculations are derived from pricing data contained in the RAND Report along with two market-based estimates of marginal costs. 
We find that, while ROW contributions are less than those found in the United States, they are more than minimal, and do not approach zero for most countries. When we regress these positive contributions on a country’s size of GDP along with various controls, we find that GDP size alone is a powerful determinant of national contributions. It remains economically and statistically significant without regard to the controls introduced. In addition, we estimate how large are the contributions of ROW countries to the global public good. We offer reasons why US pharmaceutical prices and contributions per capita are nevertheless higher than those found in all ROW countries. We also suggest actions aimed to promote R&D efforts that are closer to the global optimum.
papers.zh_title: 作为全球公共品的药品定价与研发
papers.zh_abstract: 拜登总统在劳动节演讲中表示，美国“拥有世界上最高的药品价格，这毫无道理。”对于新的品牌药，该陈述的第一部分得到了兰德公司近期一份报告（Mulcahy等人，2021年）的支持，该报告发现美国平均价格是32个OECD国家整体以及单独英国价格的2.3倍。在本研究中，我们考察该陈述的第二部分，并识别出表明存在某些“理由”的经济因素。 通过奥尔森和泽克豪泽（1966）发展的全球公共品和联盟理论视角来审视药品市场，我们解释了观察到的价格差异及其对全球创新药物供应的含义。两份美国政府报告（CEA 2018, 2020）以及戈德曼和拉克达瓦拉（2018）也提出了类似观点。我们进一步深化这些想法并进行了实证检验。 一种普遍持有的理论假设，美国制药公司为专利药设定利润最大化的价格，这些价格资助并激励了大量的研发工作。相比之下，在世界其他地区（ROW），国家当局将价格设定在略高于生产边际成本的水平，几乎没有剩余收入来支持研发（CEA报告2018；布卢门撒尔2018；胡珀和亨德森2022）。因此，ROW国家被认为完全是在搭美国研发努力的便车。我们从理论和实证两方面审视了这一论点，并发现其存在不足。 我们应用全球公共品理论来研究品牌药的定价。为此，我们描述了由林达尔定价模型支持的最优全球贡献，并从理论上表明，现有的独立决定的贡献以及由此产生的总研发水平可能是次优的。然后，我们通过计算以所有品牌药销售所获得的短期利润或准租金形式体现的全球公共品贡献来实施该模型。这些计算基于兰德公司报告中的定价数据以及两个基于市场的边际成本估计。 我们发现，虽然ROW国家的贡献低于美国，但它们并非微不足道，并且对大多数国家而言远非零。当我们将这些正向贡献对一个国家的GDP规模以及各种控制变量进行回归时，我们发现GDP规模本身是国家贡献的一个强有力的决定因素。无论引入何种控制变量，它在经济上和统计上仍然显著。此外，我们估算了ROW国家对全球公共品的贡献有多大。我们提出了美国药品价格和人均贡献仍然高于所有ROW国家的原因。我们还建议采取旨在促进更接近全球最优水平的研发努力的行动。

papers.title: Policy Packages and Policy Space: Lessons from COVID-19
papers.authors: Katharina Bergant, Kristin Forbes
papers.abstract: This paper uses the onset of COVID-19 to examine how countries construct their policy packages in response to a severe negative shock. We use several new datasets to track the use of a large variety of policy tools: announced fiscal stimulus (both above- and below-the-line), monetary policy (through interest rates, asset purchases, liquidity support and swap lines), foreign currency intervention, adjustments to macroprudential regulations (including the countercyclical capital buffer) and changes in capital controls (on inflows and outflows). The results suggest that pre-existing policy space was usually more important than other country characteristics and the extent of “stress” (in economic, financial, and health measures) in determining how a country responded to COVID-19. The notable exception is for fiscal stimulus, for which existing policy space did not act as a significant constraint in advanced economies. This is a sharp contrast to results for earlier episodes—although advanced economies with higher debt levels may have been constrained in how they provided stimulus (with more below-the-line commitments). Moreover, the use of (and space available) for each policy tool usually did not affect a country’s use of other policies. This suggests that countries are not coordinating their tools optimally in an integrated framework, especially when policy space is limited for certain tools.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E5, E6, F3, H5, H6
papers.zh_title: 政策组合与政策空间：来自COVID-19的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用COVID-19的爆发来考察各国如何构建其政策组合以应对严重的负面冲击。我们使用几个新数据集来追踪大量政策工具的使用情况：宣布的财政刺激（包括线上和线下）、货币政策（通过利率、资产购买、流动性支持和互换额度）、外汇干预、宏观审慎监管调整（包括逆周期资本缓冲）以及资本管制变化（针对流入和流出）。结果表明，在决定一个国家如何应对COVID-19时，预先存在的政策空间通常比其他国家特征以及“压力”程度（在经济、金融和健康指标方面）更为重要。一个显著的例外是财政刺激，对于发达经济体而言，现有的政策空间并未构成重大约束。这与早期事件的结果形成鲜明对比——尽管债务水平较高的发达经济体可能在提供刺激的方式上受到限制（有更多的线下承诺）。此外，每种政策工具的使用（以及可用空间）通常不会影响一个国家其他政策的使用。这表明各国并未在综合框架内最优地协调其工具，尤其是在某些工具的政策空间有限时。

papers.title: Using Machine Learning to Construct Hedonic Price Indices
papers.authors: Michael Cafarella, Gabriel Ehrlich, Tian Gao, John C. Haltiwanger, Matthew D. Shapiro, Laura Zhao
papers.abstract: This paper uses machine learning (ML) to estimate hedonic price indices at scale from item-level transaction and product characteristics. The procedure uses state-of-the-art approaches from hedonic econometrics and implements them with a neural network ML approach. Applying the methodology to Nielsen Retail Scanner data leads to a large hedonic adjustment to the Tornqvist index for food product groups: Cumulative food inflation over the period from 2007 through 2015 is reduced by half from 5.9% to 2.8% -- owing to quality adjustment. These results suggest that quality improvement via product turnover is important even in product groups that are not normally considered to feature rapid technological progress. The approach in the paper thus demonstrates the feasibility and importance of implementing hedonic adjustment at scale.
papers.zh_title: 利用机器学习构建特征价格指数
papers.zh_abstract: 本文运用机器学习（ML）方法，基于项目级交易数据和产品特征，大规模估计特征价格指数。该流程采用特征计量经济学中的前沿方法，并通过神经网络机器学习技术加以实现。将这一方法应用于尼尔森零售扫描数据后，发现对食品类产品的Tornqvist指数进行了大幅特征调整：2007年至2015年期间的累计食品通胀率因质量调整而从5.9%降至2.8%，减少了一半。这些结果表明，即使在通常不被认为具有快速技术进步特征的产品类别中，通过产品更替实现的质量提升也至关重要。因此，本文的方法论证了大规模实施特征调整的可行性与重要性。

papers.title: Spillovers and Scalability in Job Ad Experiments: Evidence from Gender-Neutral Language
papers.authors: Lucia Del Carpio, Thomas Fujiwara
papers.abstract: Gendered-grammar languages are spoken by 39% of the global population, and recent years have seen increasing advocacy for adopting gender-neutral language to promote diversity. We present evidence from two experiments on the effects of gender-neutral language in job advertisements and its treatment spillovers. In a field experiment encompassing all job postings on a Spanish-language tech platform, ads randomly assigned gender-neutral language attracted more female applicants—but only when few other ads applicants viewed were also treated. A second experiment shows that gender-neutral language shapes female tech workers’ beliefs about job characteristics, particularly when the contrast with gendered language is salient. These findings are consistent with applicants interpreting gender-neutral language as a signal about job attributes, with effects that diminish as treatment becomes widespread. Short-run scalability is thus limited: small-scale interventions may produce meaningful impacts, but large-scale adoption may have negligible effects. However, longer-term effects may exist that our designs cannot capture.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, POL；JEL：J16, J7, M14, Z13
papers.zh_title: 招聘广告实验中的溢出效应与可扩展性：来自性别中立语言的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 全球39%的人口使用具有语法性别的语言，近年来倡导采用性别中立语言以促进多样性的呼声日益高涨。我们通过两项实验，提供了关于招聘广告中性别中立语言效果及其处理溢出效应的证据。在一项涵盖西班牙语科技平台所有招聘帖子的现场实验中，随机分配使用性别中立语言的广告吸引了更多女性求职者——但仅当求职者看到的其他广告中很少也采用相同处理时，这一效果才显著。第二项实验表明，性别中立语言会塑造女性科技工作者对工作特征的信念，尤其是在与性别化语言形成鲜明对比时，这种影响更为突出。这些发现与求职者将性别中立语言解读为关于工作属性的信号这一解释一致，且随着该处理方式的普及，其效果会减弱。因此，短期可扩展性有限：小规模干预可能产生有意义的影响，但大规模采用可能效果甚微。然而，我们的实验设计无法捕捉可能存在的长期效应。

papers.title: Laboratory Safety and Research Productivity
papers.authors: Alberto Galasso, Hong Luo, Brooklynn Zhu
papers.abstract: Are laboratory safety practices a tax on scientific productivity? We examine this question by exploiting the substantial increase in safety regulations at the University of California following the shocking death of a research assistant in 2008. Difference-in-differences analyses show that relative to “dry labs” that use theoretical and computational methods, the publication rates of “wet labs” that conduct experiments using chemical and biological substances did not change significantly after the shock. At the same time, we find that wet labs that used dangerous compounds more frequently before the shock reduced their reliance on flammable materials and unfamiliar hazardous compounds afterward, even though their overall research agenda does not appear to be affected. Our findings suggest that laboratory safety may shape the production of science, but they do not support the claim that safety practices impose a significant tax on research productivity.
papers.zh_title: 实验室安全与研究生产力
papers.zh_abstract: 实验室安全实践是否会对科研生产力造成负担？我们利用2008年加州大学一名研究助理不幸死亡后安全法规大幅加强这一事件来探讨此问题。双重差分分析显示，与使用理论和计算方法的“干实验室”相比，使用化学和生物物质进行实验的“湿实验室”在事件发生后，其发表率并未发生显著变化。同时，我们发现，那些在事件前更频繁使用危险化合物的湿实验室，在事件后减少了对易燃材料和不熟悉危险化合物的依赖，尽管其整体研究议程似乎未受影响。我们的研究结果表明，实验室安全可能影响科学产出，但并未支持安全实践会显著拖累研究生产力的说法。

papers.title: When Cryptomining Comes to Town: High Electricity-use Spillovers to the Local Economy
papers.authors: Matteo Benetton, Giovanni Compiani, Adair Morse
papers.abstract: Cryptomining, the clearing of cryptocurrency transactions, uses large quantities of electricity. We document that cryptominers' use of local electricity implies higher electricity prices for existing small businesses and households. Studying the electricity market in Upstate NY and using the Bitcoin price as an exogenous shifter of the part of the supply curve faced by the community, we estimate the electricity demand functions for small businesses and households. Based on our estimates, we calculate counterfactual electricity bills, finding that small businesses and households paid an extra $92 million and $204 million annually in Upstate NY because of increased electricity consumption from cryptominers. Local governments in Upstate NY realize more business taxes, but this only offsets a small portion of the costs from higher community electricity bills. Using data on China, where electricity prices are fixed, we find that rationing of electricity in cities with cryptomining entrants deteriorates wages and investments, consistent with crowding-out effects on the local economy. Our results point to a yet-unstudied negative spillover from technology processing to local communities, which would need to be considered against welfare benefits.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, PE；JEL：G10, G23, G5, Q4, Q52, R1, R23
papers.zh_title: 当加密货币挖矿来到城镇：高电力使用对地方经济的溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 加密货币挖矿（即处理加密货币交易）消耗大量电力。我们记录到，矿工对当地电力的使用导致现有小企业和家庭面临更高的电价。通过研究纽约州上游地区的电力市场，并利用比特币价格作为社区所面临电力供给曲线部分的外生变动因素，我们估算了小企业和家庭的电力需求函数。基于这些估计，我们计算了反事实的电费账单，发现由于矿工电力消耗的增加，纽约州上游地区的小企业和家庭每年分别额外支付了9200万美元和2.04亿美元。当地政府获得了更多的商业税收，但这仅能抵消社区电费上涨成本的一小部分。利用中国（电价固定）的数据，我们发现，在有加密货币挖矿企业进入的城市，电力配给导致工资和投资恶化，这与对地方经济的挤出效应一致。我们的结果指出了技术处理对当地社区的一种尚未被研究的负面溢出效应，在权衡福利收益时需要加以考虑。

papers.title: Misallocation in Firm Production: A Nonparametric Analysis Using Procurement Lotteries
papers.authors: Paul Carrillo, Dave Donaldson, Dina Pomeranz, Monica Singhal
papers.abstract: This paper develops new tools to study misallocation that do not require assumptions about the heterogeneity of firms’ technologies. We show how features of the distribution of marginal products can be identified from exogenous variation in firms’ input use and used both to test for misallocation and to quantify its resulting welfare losses. We apply this method to a setting with exogenous demand shocks from public procurement contracts for construction services in Ecuador. Our results reject the null of efficiency but our estimates of the resulting welfare losses from misallocation are small.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IO, ITI, PE, PR；JEL：D24, D61, H57, L10, O40
papers.zh_title: 企业生产中的资源错配：基于采购抽签的非参数分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了研究资源错配的新工具，这些工具无需对企业技术异质性做出假设。我们展示了如何利用企业投入使用的外生变化来识别边际产品分布的特征，并以此检验资源错配的存在性以及量化由此产生的福利损失。我们将该方法应用于一个场景，该场景中厄瓜多尔公共采购合同（针对建筑服务）带来了外生需求冲击。我们的结果拒绝了效率为零的原假设，但估计出的资源错配导致的福利损失很小。

papers.title: Carbon Border Adjustments, Climate Clubs, and Subsidy Races When Climate Policies Vary
papers.authors: Kimberly A. Clausing, Catherine Wolfram
papers.abstract: Jurisdictions adopt heterogeneous climate policies that vary both in terms of ambition and in terms of policy approach, with some jurisdictions pricing carbon and others subsidizing clean production. We distinguish two types of policy spillovers associated with diverse policy approaches to climate change. First, when countries have different levels of climate ambition, free-riders will benefit at the expense of more committed countries. Second, when countries pursue different approaches, carbon-intensive producers within cost-imposing jurisdictions will be at a relative competitive disadvantage compared with producers in subsidizing jurisdictions. Carbon border adjustments and climate clubs are attempts to respond to these policy spillovers, but when countries have divergent policy approaches, one policy alone will not be able to address both types of spillovers. We also consider the policy dynamics that result from carbon border adjustments and climate clubs; both have the potential to encourage upward harmonization of climate policy, but they come with risks. Further, the pressures of international competition in the presence of divergent climate policy approaches may result in subsidy races, which come with their own potential risks and benefits.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI, PE；JEL：F18, H23, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 气候政策差异下的碳边境调整、气候俱乐部与补贴竞赛
papers.zh_abstract: 各司法管辖区采取的气候政策各不相同，既体现在雄心水平上，也体现在政策方法上：一些地区对碳定价，另一些则补贴清洁生产。我们区分了与不同气候政策方法相关的两类政策溢出效应。首先，当各国气候雄心水平不同时，搭便车者将以更坚定承诺的国家为代价获益。其次，当各国采取不同方法时，实施成本政策辖区的碳密集型生产商相对于补贴辖区的生产商将处于竞争劣势。碳边境调整和气候俱乐部是应对这些政策溢出效应的尝试，但当各国政策方法存在分歧时，单一政策无法同时解决两类溢出效应。我们还考虑了碳边境调整和气候俱乐部所引发的政策动态；两者都有可能鼓励气候政策的向上协调，但也伴随着风险。此外，在气候政策方法存在分歧的情况下，国际竞争的压力可能导致补贴竞赛，这本身也带来潜在的风险和收益。
