papers.title: Quality Adjustment at Scale: Hedonic vs. Exact Demand-Based Price Indices
papers.authors: Gabriel Ehrlich, John C. Haltiwanger, Ron S. Jarmin, David Johnson, Ed Olivares, Luke W. Pardue, Matthew D. Shapiro, Laura Zhao
papers.abstract: This paper explores methods for constructing price indices from item-level transactions data on prices, quantities, and product attributes. The paper evaluates approaches that are feasible at scale, i.e., across the wide range of products, disparate encoding of attributes, and rapid product turnover inherent in “big data” on economic transactions, while producing improved cost-of-living indices that reflect both substitution effects and quality change. The paper presents hedonic methods that estimate changing valuations of both observable and unobservable characteristics in the presence of product turnover. It also considers demand-based methods that account for product turnover and changing appeal of continuing products. The paper provides evidence of substantial quality-adjustment in prices for a wide range of goods, including food and high-tech consumer products. The paper also shows that hedonics can be implemented with well-encoded attributes using standard econometrics and with unstructured attribute data using machine learning.
papers.zh_title: 大规模质量调整：特征价格指数与基于精确需求的价格指数之比较
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了利用包含价格、数量和产品属性的项目级交易数据构建价格指数的方法。文章评估了那些在大规模应用（即跨越经济交易“大数据”中固有的广泛产品类别、不同属性编码方式以及快速产品更替）中可行的方案，同时旨在生成能够同时反映替代效应和质量变化的改进型生活成本指数。本文提出了特征方法，用于估计在产品更替背景下可观测和不可观测特征价值的变化。文章还考虑了基于需求的方法，该方法能够处理产品更替以及存续产品吸引力变化的问题。本文提供了证据，表明在包括食品和高科技消费品在内的广泛商品中，价格存在显著的质量调整。文章还表明，对于编码良好的属性，可以使用标准计量经济学方法实现特征调整；对于非结构化属性数据，则可以使用机器学习方法。

papers.title: Top Talent, Elite Colleges, and Migration: Evidence from the Indian Institutes of Technology
papers.authors: Prithwiraj Choudhury, Ina Ganguli, Patrick Gaulé
papers.abstract: We study migration in the right tail of the talent distribution using a novel dataset of Indian high school students taking the Joint Entrance Exam (JEE), a college entrance exam used for admission to the prestigious Indian Institutes of Technology (IIT). We find a high incidence of migration after students complete college: among the top 1,000 scorers on the exam, 36% have migrated abroad, rising to 62% for the top 100 scorers. We next document that students who attended the original “Top 5” Indian Institutes of Technology (IIT) were 5 percentage points more likely to migrate for graduate school compared to equally talented students who studied in other institutions. We explore two mechanisms for these patterns: signaling, for which we study migration after one university suddenly gained the IIT designation; and alumni networks, using information on the location of IIT alumni in U.S. computer science departments.
papers.zh_title: 顶尖人才、精英大学与移民：来自印度理工学院的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一份新颖的数据集——即参加联合入学考试（JEE，即印度理工学院等名校的大学入学考试）的印度高中生数据——来研究人才分布右尾端的移民现象。我们发现，学生大学毕业后移民的比例很高：在考试成绩排名前1000名的学生中，36%已移民海外；而在排名前100名的学生中，这一比例上升至62%。接着，我们记录到，与同等才华但就读于其他院校的学生相比，就读于最初的“前五所”印度理工学院（IIT）的学生，其研究生阶段移民的可能性高出5个百分点。我们探讨了这两种模式的两种机制：信号机制（我们研究了一所大学突然获得IIT称号后的移民情况）和校友网络机制（利用美国计算机科学系中IIT校友的地理位置信息）。

papers.title: The Effect of Means-Tested Transfers on Work: Evidence from Quasi-Randomly Assigned SNAP Caseworkers
papers.authors: Jason B. Cook, Chloe N. East
papers.abstract: Canonical economic theory clearly predicts means-tested transfers will reduce work. We provide new evidence on this question in the context of the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP)—the backbone of the U.S. safety net. It is challenging to identify the causal effects of SNAP, so we introduce an examiner design based on conditional random assignment of SNAP applicants to caseworkers using rich administrative data. We empirically establish that caseworkers help determine whether applicants receive benefits. We then use this as an instrument for SNAP receipt to produce new, comprehensive and generalizable evidence of the labor supply effects of modern SNAP. Our results shed light on why the canonical theory’s predictions might not always bear out.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H53, I38, J22
papers.zh_title: 经济状况调查式转移支付对工作的影响：来自准随机分配的SNAP案件工作者的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 经典经济理论明确预测，经济状况调查式转移支付会减少工作。我们以补充营养援助计划（SNAP）——美国安全网的支柱——为背景，提供了关于这一问题的新的证据。识别SNAP的因果效应具有挑战性，因此我们引入了一种基于条件随机分配的设计，利用丰富的行政数据将SNAP申请人分配给案件工作者。我们通过实证确定，案件工作者有助于决定申请人是否获得福利。然后，我们以此作为SNAP领取的工具变量，为现代SNAP的劳动供给效应提供新的、全面且可推广的证据。我们的结果揭示了为何经典理论的预测可能并不总是成立。

papers.title: Creating and Connecting US and China Science: Chinese Diaspora and Returnee Researchers
papers.authors: Qingnan Xie, Richard B. Freeman
papers.abstract: The close connection between US and China in scientific research and education in the 2000s produced a large group of China-born researchers who work in the US (“diaspora”) and a larger group of China-born researchers who gained US-research experience and returned to do their research in China (“returnee”). Analyzing 2018 Scopus data on research papers, we estimate that diaspora researchers contributed to 27% of US addressed papers, and that returnee researchers contributed to 38% of China addressed papers. Both the number of papers with diaspora authors and the number of papers with returnee authors far exceeded the usual measure of US-China collaborative work, papers with both US and China addresses. In terms of quality or impact, papers with diaspora or returnee authors averaged more citations and had higher proportions of publication in high CiteScore journals than other US-addressed or China-addressed papers. Finally, papers with diaspora and/or returnee authors were at the center of the US-China coauthor network and major conduits of research findings between the countries in the network of scientific citations. The benefits of the US-China research connection notwithstanding, the link between the countries’ research began to fray from 2018 through the early 2020s, with potential deleterious effects on each country’s future research output and on global science writ large to which US and China are the two biggest contributors.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F1, F22, F63, I2, I20, J2, J20, J3, J30, O3, O30
papers.zh_title: 创建与连接美国和中国科学：华人散居与海归研究人员
papers.zh_abstract: 21世纪初，美国与中国在科学研究和教育领域的紧密联系产生了一大批在美国工作的中国出生研究人员（“散居者”），以及更大一批获得美国研究经验后返回中国进行研究的研究人员（“海归”）。通过分析2018年Scopus研究论文数据，我们估计散居研究人员贡献了27%的美国地址论文，而海归研究人员贡献了38%的中国地址论文。拥有散居作者或海归作者的论文数量，均远远超过了通常衡量美中合作工作的指标——即同时拥有美国和中国地址的论文数量。在质量或影响力方面，拥有散居或海归作者的论文平均被引次数更高，并且在高CiteScore期刊上发表的比例也高于其他美国地址或中国地址论文。最后，拥有散居和/或海归作者的论文处于美中合著网络的中心，并且是两国之间在科学引文网络中研究成果的主要传导渠道。尽管美中研究联系带来了益处，但两国研究之间的联系从2018年到2020年代初开始出现裂痕，这可能对各自国家未来的研究产出以及全球科学（美中是其中最大的两个贡献者）产生有害影响。

papers.title: Using Limited Trial Evidence to Credibly Choose Treatment Dosage when Efficacy and Adverse Effects Weakly Increase with Dose
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski
papers.abstract: In medical treatment and elsewhere, it has become standard to base treatment intensity (dosage) on evidence in randomized trials. Yet it has been rare to study how outcomes vary with dosage. In trials to obtain drug approval, the norm has been to specify some dose of a new drug and compare it with an established therapy or placebo. Design-based trial analysis views each trial arm as qualitatively different, but it may be highly credible to assume that efficacy and adverse effects (AEs) weakly increase with dosage. Optimization of patient care requires joint attention to both, as well as to treatment cost. This paper develops methodology to credibly use limited trial evidence to choose dosage when efficacy and AEs weakly increase with dose. I suppose that dosage is an integer choice t ∊ (0, 1, . . . , T), T being a specified maximum dose. I study dosage choice when trial evidence on outcomes is available for only K dose levels, where K < T + 1. Then the population distribution of dose response is partially rather than point identified. The identification region is a convex polygon determined by linear equalities and inequalities. I characterize clinical and public-health decision making using the minimax-regret criterion. A simple analytical solution exists when T = 2 and computation is tractable when T is larger.
papers.zh_title: 当疗效和不良反应随剂量弱递增时，利用有限的试验证据可信地选择治疗剂量
papers.zh_abstract: 在医疗治疗及其他领域，基于随机试验的证据来确定治疗强度（剂量）已成为标准做法。然而，研究结果如何随剂量变化却很少见。在获取药物批准的试验中，常规做法是指定新药的某种剂量，并将其与既定疗法或安慰剂进行比较。基于设计的试验分析将每个试验组视为性质不同，但假设疗效和不良反应（AEs）随剂量弱递增可能具有很高的可信度。优化患者护理需要同时关注这两者以及治疗成本。本文开发了一种方法，当疗效和不良反应随剂量弱递增时，能够可信地利用有限的试验证据来选择剂量。我假设剂量是一个整数选择 t ∈ (0, 1, ..., T)，T 是规定的最大剂量。我研究了当仅有 K 个剂量水平（K < T + 1）的试验证据可用时的剂量选择问题。那么，剂量反应的人群分布是部分识别而非点识别的。识别区域是一个由线性等式和不等式确定的凸多边形。我使用最小化最大遗憾准则来刻画临床和公共卫生决策。当 T = 2 时存在一个简单的解析解，而当 T 更大时计算是可行的。

papers.title: Money Matters: Broad Divisia Money and the Recovery of Nominal GDP from the COVID-19 Recession
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, John V. Duca
papers.abstract: The rise of inflation in 2021 and 2022 surprised many macroeconomists who ignored the earlier surge in money growth because past instability in the demand for simple-sum monetary aggregates had made these aggregates unreliable indicators. We find that the demand for more theoretically-based divisia aggregates can be modeled and that their growth rates provide useful information for future nominal GDP growth.\nUnlike M2 and divisia-M2, whose velocities do not internalize shifts in liabilities across commercial and shadow banks, the velocities of broader Divisia monetary aggregates are more stable and can be reasonably empirically modeled in both the short run and the long run through the Covid-19 pandemic and to date. In the long run, these velocities depend on regulatory changes and mutual fund costs that affect the substitutability of money for other financial assets. In the short run, we control for swings in mortgage activity and use vaccination rates and an index of the stringency of government pandemic restrictions to control for the unusual effects of the pandemic.\nThe velocity of broad Divisia money temporarily declines during crises like the Great and COVID Recessions, but later rebounds. In each recession monetary policy lowered short-term interest rates to zero and engaged in quantitative easing of about $4 Trillion. Nevertheless, broad money growth was more robust in the COVID Recession, likely reflecting that the banking system was less impaired and could promote rather than hinder multiple deposit creation. Partly as a result, our framework implies that nominal GDP growth and inflationary pressures rebounded much more quickly from the COVID Recession versus the Great Recession. We consider different scenarios for future Divisa money growth and the unwinding of the pandemic that have different implications for medium-term nominal GDP growth and inflationary pressures as monetary policy tightening seeks to restore low inflation.
papers.zh_title: 货币至关重要：广义迪维西亚货币与名义GDP从COVID-19衰退中的复苏
papers.zh_abstract: 2021年和2022年通胀的上升令许多宏观经济学家感到意外，他们忽视了此前货币增长的大幅飙升，因为过去简单加总货币总量需求的不稳定性使得这些总量指标变得不可靠。我们发现，基于更理论化的迪维西亚总量的需求是可以建模的，并且其增长率能为未来的名义GDP增长提供有用信息。与M2和迪维西亚-M2不同，后两者的流通速度并未内化商业银行和影子银行之间负债的转移，而更广泛的迪维西亚货币总量的流通速度则更为稳定，并且可以在短期和长期内通过COVID-19大流行及至今的时期进行合理的实证建模。在长期，这些流通速度取决于监管变化和共同基金成本，这些因素影响货币与其他金融资产之间的可替代性。在短期，我们控制了抵押贷款活动的波动，并使用疫苗接种率和政府大流行限制措施的严格程度指数来控制大流行的异常影响。广义迪维西亚货币的流通速度在像大衰退和COVID-19衰退这样的危机期间会暂时下降，但之后会反弹。在每次衰退中，货币政策都将短期利率降至零，并实施了约4万亿美元的量化宽松。尽管如此，在COVID-19衰退中，广义货币增长更为强劲，这可能反映出银行体系受损较小，能够促进而非阻碍多重存款创造。部分由于这个原因，我们的框架意味着，与大衰退相比，名义GDP增长和通胀压力从COVID-19衰退中反弹得更快。我们考虑了未来迪维西亚货币增长和大流行消退的不同情景，这些情景对中期名义GDP增长和通胀压力有不同的影响，因为货币政策紧缩旨在恢复低通胀。

papers.title: Information Acquisition and Rating Agencies
papers.authors: Harold L. Cole, Thomas F. Cooley
papers.abstract: For decades credit rating agencies were viewed as trusted arbiters of creditworthiness and their ratings as important tools for managing risk. The common narrative is that the value of ratings was compromised by the evolution of the industry to a form where issuers pay for ratings. In this paper we consider both an investor-pays and an issuer-pays set-ups and show that if the investor-pays version can overcome the free-rider problem it is efficient, and otherwise leads to under-provision of information; while if the issuer-pays can force disclosure, it is efficient, but otherwise it leads to less revealing information because of the systematic distortion in revealed information along with over-investment in information. We show that in both these arrangements credit ratings have value in equilibrium and how reputation insures that, in equilibrium, ratings will reflect sound assessments of credit worthiness. We argue that regulatory reliance on ratings and the increasing importance of risk-weighted capital in prudential regulation have more likely contributed to distorted ratings than the matter of who pays for them.
papers.zh_title: 信息获取与评级机构
papers.zh_abstract: 几十年来，信用评级机构被视为可信赖的信用度仲裁者，其评级是管理风险的重要工具。普遍的说法是，评级价值因行业演变为发行人付费模式而受到损害。在本文中，我们考虑了投资者付费和发行人付费两种设置，并表明：如果投资者付费版本能够克服搭便车问题，它是有效的，否则会导致信息供给不足；而如果发行人付费能够强制披露，它是有效的，否则由于所披露信息的系统性扭曲以及信息过度投资，会导致信息揭示程度降低。我们表明，在这两种安排中，信用评级在均衡中都具有价值，并且声誉如何确保在均衡中评级将反映对信用度的可靠评估。我们认为，监管对评级的依赖以及风险加权资本在审慎监管中日益增长的重要性，更可能导致评级扭曲，而非谁为评级付费的问题。

papers.title: Trade Wars, Nominal Rigidities and Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
papers.abstract: This paper shows that the outcome of trade wars for tariffs and welfare will be affected by the monetary policy regime. The key message is that trade policy interacts with monetary policy in a way that magnifies the welfare costs of discretionary monetary policy in an international setting. If countries follow monetary policies of flexible inflation targeting, trade wars are relatively mild, with low equilibrium tariffs and small welfare costs. Discretionary monetary policies imply much higher tariffs, high inflation rates, and substantially larger welfare costs. We quantify the effects of a global trade war among major economies using estimates of trade elasticities, economic size, net foreign assets and trade openness. We find large welfare benefits of an inflation targeting monetary policy for all countries.
papers.zh_title: 贸易战、名义刚性与货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，贸易战对关税和福利的结果将受到货币政策制度的影响。关键信息是，贸易政策与货币政策相互作用的方式，放大了国际环境中相机抉择货币政策的福利成本。如果各国遵循灵活的通胀目标制货币政策，贸易战相对温和，均衡关税较低，福利成本较小。相机抉择的货币政策意味着高得多的关税、高通胀率以及显著更大的福利成本。我们利用贸易弹性、经济规模、净外国资产和贸易开放度的估计值，量化了主要经济体之间全球贸易战的影响。我们发现，对所有国家而言，通胀目标制货币政策能带来巨大的福利收益。

papers.title: Cryptic Regulation of Crypto-Tokens
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the alignment of existing securities regulations with the emerging landscape of crypto-tokens and blockchain technology. By examining the features of these digital assets, including decentralization, consensus mechanisms, and programmability, we analyze how they interact with existing financial rules. We compare approaches to regulation across countries, considering potential impacts on innovation. Furthermore, we explore the issues that may arise with blockchain networks, such as payment efficiency and market safety. The study aims to contribute to discussions about balancing innovation within the blockchain sphere and ensuring investor protection and market security, underlining areas that may necessitate regulatory improvements.
papers.zh_title: 加密代币的隐秘监管
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了现有证券法规与新兴的加密代币和区块链技术格局的契合度。通过考察这些数字资产的特征，包括去中心化、共识机制和可编程性，我们分析了它们如何与现有金融规则相互作用。我们比较了各国之间的监管方法，考虑了对创新的潜在影响。此外，我们探讨了区块链网络可能出现的问题，例如支付效率和市场安全。本研究旨在为平衡区块链领域的创新与确保投资者保护和市场安全的讨论做出贡献，并强调了可能需要监管改进的领域。

papers.title: Firm Inflation Uncertainty
papers.authors: Ivan Yotzov, Lena Anayi, Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Özgen Öztürk, Gregory Thwaites
papers.abstract: We introduce a new measure of own-price inflation uncertainty using firm-level data from a large and representative survey of UK businesses. Inflation uncertainty increased significantly from the start of 2021 and reached a peak in the second half of 2022, even as a similar measure of sales uncertainty declined. We also find large cross-sectional differences in inflation uncertainty, with uncertainty particularly elevated for smaller firms and those in the goods sector. Finally, we show that firms which are more uncertain about their own price expectations experience higher forecast errors 12 months later. These findings suggest that studying inflation uncertainty at the firm level may be an important new dimension to understanding firm performance.
papers.zh_title: 企业通胀不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自英国企业大规模代表性调查的企业层面数据，引入了一种新的自身价格通胀不确定性衡量指标。通胀不确定性从2021年初开始显著增加，并在2022年下半年达到峰值，即使类似的销售不确定性指标在下降。我们还发现通胀不确定性存在巨大的横截面差异，对于小型企业和商品行业的企业，不确定性尤其高。最后，我们表明，对自身价格预期更不确定的企业，在12个月后会出现更高的预测误差。这些发现表明，研究企业层面的通胀不确定性可能是理解企业绩效的一个重要新维度。

papers.title: Accounting for the Duality of the Italian Economy
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Dario Laudati, Lee E. Ohanian, Vincenzo Quadrini
papers.abstract: After 162 years of political unification, Italy still displays large regional economic differences. In 2019, the per capita GDP of Lombardia was 39,700 euros, but Calabria's per capita GDP was only 17,300 euros. We build a two-region, two-sector model of the Italian economy to measure the wedges that could account for the differences in aggregate variables between the North and the South. We find that the largest driver of the regional disparity in per capita output is the difference in total factor productivity, followed by fiscal redistribution. These two factors, together, account for more than 70 percent of the output disparity between the North and the South.
papers.zh_title: 意大利经济二元性的核算
papers.zh_abstract: 在政治统一162年后，意大利仍然表现出巨大的区域经济差异。2019年，伦巴第大区的人均GDP为39,700欧元，而卡拉布里亚大区的人均GDP仅为17,300欧元。我们构建了一个包含两个地区和两个部门的意大利经济模型，以衡量能够解释北方和南方之间总量变量差异的楔子。我们发现，人均产出区域差异的最大驱动因素是全要素生产率的差异，其次是财政再分配。这两个因素共同解释了北方和南方之间产出差异的70%以上。

papers.title: The Debt-Inflation Channel of the German Hyperinflation
papers.authors: Markus K. Brunnermeier, Sergio A. Correia, Stephan Luck, Emil Verner, Tom Zimmermann
papers.abstract: This paper studies how a large increase in the price level is transmitted to the real economy through firm balance sheets. Using newly digitized macro- and micro-level data from the German inflation of 1919-1923, we show that inflation led to a large reduction in real debt burdens and bankruptcies. Firms with higher nominal liabilities at the onset of inflation experienced a larger decline in interest expenses, a relative increase in their equity values, and higher employment during the inflation. The results are consistent with real effects of a debt-inflation channel that operates even when prices and wages are flexible.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, ME；JEL：E31, G0, G20, G30, N2
papers.zh_title: 德国恶性通货膨胀的债务-通胀渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了价格水平的大幅上涨如何通过企业资产负债表传导至实体经济。利用1919-1923年德国通货膨胀期间新数字化的宏观和微观层面数据，我们表明通货膨胀导致了实际债务负担和破产数量的大幅减少。在通货膨胀初期名义负债较高的企业，其利息支出下降幅度更大，股权价值相对增加，并且在通货膨胀期间就业水平更高。这些结果与债务-通胀渠道的实际效应一致，即使价格和工资具有灵活性，该渠道也能发挥作用。

papers.title: Pareto Improving Fiscal and Monetary Policies: Samuelson in the New Keynesian Model
papers.authors: Mark A. Aguiar, Manuel Amador, Cristina Arellano
papers.abstract: This paper explores the positive and normative consequences of government bond issuances in a New Keynesian model with heterogeneous agents, focusing on how the stock of government bonds affects the cross-sectional allocation of resources in the spirit of Samuelson (1958). We characterize the Pareto optimal levels of government bonds and the associated monetary policy adjustments that should accompany Pareto-improving bond issuances. The paper introduces a simple phase diagram to analyze the global equilibrium dynamics of inflation, interest rates, and labor earnings in response to changes in the stock of government debt. The framework also provides a tractable tool to explore the use of fiscal policy to escape the Effective Lower Bound (ELB) on nominal interest rates and the resolution of the “forward guidance puzzle.” A common theme throughout is that following the monetary policy guidance from the standard Ricardian framework leads to excess fluctuations in income and inflation.
papers.zh_title: 帕累托改进的财政与货币政策：新凯恩斯模型中的萨缪尔森
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在一个包含异质性主体的新凯恩斯模型中探讨了政府债券发行的正面和规范后果，重点关注政府债券存量如何以萨缪尔森（1958）的精神影响资源的跨部门配置。我们刻画了政府债券的帕累托最优水平，以及伴随帕累托改进债券发行所应进行的相应货币政策调整。本文引入了一个简单的相图来分析通货膨胀、利率和劳动收入在应对政府债务存量变化时的全球均衡动态。该框架还提供了一个易于处理的工具，用于探索利用财政政策摆脱名义利率有效下限（ELB）以及解决“前瞻指引之谜”。贯穿全文的一个共同主题是，遵循标准李嘉图框架的货币政策指引会导致收入和通货膨胀的过度波动。

papers.title: Dollarization Dynamics
papers.authors: Tomás E. Caravello, Pedro Martinez-Bruera, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: This study explores the consequences of dollarizing an economy with an initial dollar shortage. We show that the resulting transitional dynamics are tantamount to that of a “sudden stop”: consumption of tradable goods fall, the real exchange rate depreciates abruptly by a discrete drop in domestic prices and wages followed by a gradual appreciation from positive inflation. With nominal rigidities the economy first falls into a recession. This is true even if all prices and wages are allowed to adjust flexibly on impact. The subsequent recovery in activity always “overshoots” the steady state: the non-tradable sector transitions from the initial recession to a boom, then asymptotes to its steady state.
papers.zh_title: 美元化动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了在初始美元短缺的情况下对经济进行美元化的后果。我们表明，由此产生的转型动态等同于“突然停止”：可贸易品消费下降，实际汇率因国内价格和工资的离散下降而急剧贬值，随后因正通货膨胀而逐渐升值。在存在名义刚性的情况下，经济首先陷入衰退。即使允许所有价格和工资在冲击发生时灵活调整，情况也是如此。随后活动的复苏总是“过度”稳态：非贸易部门从最初的衰退过渡到繁荣，然后渐近地趋于其稳态。

papers.title: Specialization Trends in Economics Research: A Large-Scale Study Using Natural Language Processing and Citation Analysis
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Ramiro H. Gálvez, Ian Nachman
papers.abstract: This article conducts a comprehensive analysis of specialization trends within and across fields of economics research. We collect data on 24,273 articles published between 1970 and 2016 in general research economics outlets and employ machine learning techniques to enrich the collected data. Results indicate that theory and econometric methods papers are becoming increasingly specialized, with a narrowing scope and steady or declining citations from outside economics and from other fields of economics research. Conversely, applied papers are covering a broader range of topics, receiving more extramural citations from fields like medicine, and psychology. Trends in applied theory articles are unclear.
papers.zh_title: 经济学研究的专业化趋势：基于自然语言处理和引文分析的大规模研究
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对经济学研究领域内部和跨领域的专业化趋势进行了全面分析。我们收集了1970年至2016年间发表在一般研究经济学刊物上的24,273篇文章的数据，并采用机器学习技术来丰富所收集的数据。结果表明，理论和计量方法论文正变得越来越专业化，范围日益狭窄，来自经济学外部和经济学其他研究领域的引用数量稳定或下降。相反，应用论文涵盖的主题范围更广，从医学和心理学等领域获得更多的外部引用。应用理论文章的趋势尚不明确。

papers.title: Exchange Controls As A Fiscal Instrument
papers.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: About 20 percent of countries employ multiple exchange rates. An important rationale for this practice is the creation of fiscal revenue. This paper develops a general equilibrium model with exchange controls. It shows that such controls can mobilize significant fiscal resources, but also cause dollar shortages, misallocation, and smuggling. The paper studies an optimal taxation problem where chronic fiscal deficits must be financed with money creation and exchange controls. Under plausible calibrations, the optimal policy favors multiple exchange rates, with stronger controls on exports than on imports. Both exchange controls and inflation finance significant portions of the deficit.
papers.zh_title: 作为财政工具的外汇管制
papers.zh_abstract: 大约20%的国家采用多重汇率。这种做法的一个重要理由是创造财政收入。本文构建了一个包含外汇管制的一般均衡模型。研究表明，这种管制可以调动大量的财政资源，但也会导致美元短缺、资源错配和走私。本文研究了一个最优税收问题，其中长期的财政赤字必须通过货币创造和外汇管制来融资。在合理的校准下，最优政策倾向于多重汇率，对出口的管制强于对进口的管制。外汇管制和通货膨胀都为赤字提供了相当大比例的资金。

papers.title: Micro- and Macroeconomic Impacts of a Place-Based Industrial Policy
papers.authors: Enghin Atalay, Ali Hortaçsu, Mustafa Runyun, Chad Syverson, Mehmet Fatih Ulu
papers.abstract: We investigate the impact of a set of place-based subsidies introduced in Turkey in 2012. Using firm-level balance-sheet data along with data on the domestic production network, we first assess the policy’s direct and indirect impacts. We find an increase in economic activity in industry-province pairs that were the focus of the subsidy program, and positive spillovers to the suppliers and customers of subsidized firms. With the aid of a dynamic multi-region, multi-industry general equilibrium model, we then assess the program’s impacts. Based on the calibrated model we find that, in the long run, the subsidy program is modestly successful in reducing inequality between the relatively under-developed and more prosperous portions of the country. These modest longer-term effects are due to the ability of households to migrate in response to the subsidy program and to input-output linkages that traverse subsidy regions within Turkey.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D20, E2, E6, H5, L5
papers.zh_title: 基于地点的产业政策的微观与宏观经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了土耳其2012年引入的一组基于地点的补贴的影响。利用企业层面的资产负债表数据以及国内生产网络的数据，我们首先评估了该政策的直接和间接影响。我们发现，在作为补贴计划重点的行业-省份配对中，经济活动有所增加，并且对受补贴企业的供应商和客户产生了正向溢出效应。借助一个动态的多区域、多行业一般均衡模型，我们随后评估了该计划的影响。基于校准后的模型，我们发现，从长期来看，该补贴计划在减少该国相对欠发达地区和较繁荣地区之间的不平等方面取得了适度成功。这些适度的长期效应是由于家庭能够响应补贴计划而迁移，以及投入产出联系跨越了土耳其境内的补贴区域。

papers.title: The Subtlety of Optimal Paternalism in a Population with Bounded Rationality
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski, Eytan Sheshinski
papers.abstract: We study the subtlety of optimal paternalism when a utilitarian planner has the power to design a discrete choice set for a heterogeneous population with bounded rationality. We first consider the planning problem in abstraction. We show that the policy that most effectively constrains or influences choices depends multiplicatively on the preferences of the population and the choice probabilities conditional on preferences that measure the suboptimality of behavior. We then study two settings in which the planner may mandate an action or decentralize decision making. One setting supposes that individuals measure utility with additive random error and maximize mismeasured rather than actual utility. Then optimal planning requires knowledge of the distribution of measurement errors. The other setting studies binary treatment choice when the planner can mandate a treatment conditional on publicly observed personal covariates or can enable individuals to choose their own treatments conditional on private information. Here we focus on situations where bounded rationality takes the form of deviations between subjective and objective probabilities of uncertain outcomes. To illustrate, we consider clinical decision making in medicine. In toto, our cautionary analysis shows that determination of optimal policy requires the planner to possess extensive knowledge that is rarely available. We warn that research in behavioral public economics should avoid overoptimistic claims regarding the nature of optimal paternalistic policies. We argue that credible study of utilitarian planning should consider not only the population but also the planner to be boundedly rational.
papers.zh_title: 有限理性人口中最优家长式管理的微妙性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当功利主义规划者有权为具有有限理性的异质人口设计离散选择集时，最优家长式管理的微妙性。我们首先抽象地考虑规划问题。我们表明，最有效约束或影响选择的政策，取决于人口的偏好以及衡量行为次优性的、以偏好为条件的概率的乘积。然后，我们研究了规划者可以强制采取行动或下放决策权的两种情境。一种情境假设个体以加性随机误差衡量效用，并最大化被误测的效用而非实际效用。那么，最优规划需要了解测量误差的分布。另一种情境研究二元治疗选择，此时规划者可以根据公开观察到的个人协变量强制实施治疗，或者允许个体根据私人信息选择自己的治疗。在这里，我们关注有限理性表现为不确定结果的主观概率与客观概率之间存在偏差的情况。为了说明，我们考虑医学中的临床决策。总之，我们的警示性分析表明，确定最优政策要求规划者拥有广泛且鲜有可用的知识。我们警告，行为公共经济学的研究应避免对最优家长式政策的性质做出过于乐观的断言。我们认为，对功利主义规划的可靠研究不仅应考虑人口，也应将规划者视为有限理性的。

papers.title: War Discourse and the Cross Section of Expected Stock Returns
papers.authors: David Hirshleifer, Dat Mai, Kuntara Pukthuanthong
papers.abstract: A war-related factor model derived from textual analysis of media news reports explains the cross section of expected stock returns. Using a semi-supervised topic model to extract discourse topics from 7,000,000 New York Times stories spanning 160 years, the war factor predicts the cross section of returns across test assets derived from both traditional and machine learning construction techniques, and spanning 138 anomalies. Our findings are consistent with assets that are good hedges for war risk receiving lower risk premia, or with assets that are more positively sensitive to war prospects being more overvalued. The return premium on the war factor is incremental to standard effects.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, POL；JEL：G0, G02, G1, G10, G11, G4, G41
papers.zh_title: 战争话语与预期股票收益的截面差异
papers.zh_abstract: 一个基于媒体新闻报道文本分析得出的战争相关因子模型，解释了预期股票收益的截面差异。我们使用半监督主题模型，从跨越160年的700万篇《纽约时报》报道中提取话语主题，发现战争因子能够预测跨测试资产的收益截面差异，这些测试资产既来自传统构建技术，也来自机器学习构建技术，并涵盖138个异象。我们的发现与以下观点一致：能够较好对冲战争风险的资产获得较低的风险溢价，或者对战争前景更敏感的资产被更严重地高估。战争因子的回报溢价是独立于标准效应的增量效应。

papers.title: A Theory of Price Caps on Non-Renewable Resources
papers.authors: Simon Johnson, Lukasz Rachel, Catherine Wolfram
papers.abstract: What is the optimal response of an exhaustible resource producer to sanctions in the form of a price cap? This paper develops a dynamic framework incorporating stochastic prices, financial frictions, and market power to study this novel tool of statecraft. A binding price cap can incentivize increased extraction, stabilizing prices in the global market. But the cap’s effectiveness diminishes when the policy is leaky or is weakly enforced, as seen with the G7 price cap on Russian oil. Such imperfections introduce a trade-off between market stability and the welfare of the sanctioned producer. We provide a systematic approach to setting an optimal cap level in these circumstances.
papers.zh_title: 不可再生资源价格上限理论
papers.zh_abstract: 面对以价格上限形式实施的制裁，可耗竭资源生产者的最优应对策略是什么？本文构建了一个包含随机价格、金融摩擦和市场势力的动态框架，以研究这一新颖的国家治理工具。具有约束力的价格上限可以激励增加开采量，从而稳定全球市场价格。但当政策存在漏洞或执行不力时，其有效性会降低，正如七国集团对俄罗斯石油实施的价格上限所示。这种不完善性在市场稳定与被制裁生产者的福利之间引入了权衡。我们提供了一种系统性的方法，用于在这些情况下设定最优的价格上限水平。

papers.title: Ph.D. Publication Productivity: The Role of Gender and Race in Supervision in South Africa
papers.authors: Giulia Rossello, Robin Cowan, Jacques Mairesse
papers.abstract: We study whether student-advisor gender and race composition matters for publication productivity of Ph.D. students in South Africa. We consider all Ph.D. students in STEM graduating between 2000 and 2014, after the recent systematic introduction of doctoral programs in this country. We investigate the joint effects of gender and race for the whole sample and looking separately at the sub-samples of (1) white-white; (2) black-black; and (3) black-white student-advisor couples. We find significant productivity differences between male and female students. These disparities are more pronounced for female students working with male advisors when looking at the joint effects of gender and race for the white-white and black-black student-advisor pairs. We also explore whether publication productivity differences change significantly for students with a high, medium, or low “productivity-profile”. We find that female productivity gaps are U-shaped over the range of productivity. Female students working with male advisors have more persistent productivity gaps over the productivity distribution, while female students with a high (or low) “productivity-profile” studying with female advisors are as productive as male students with similar “productivity-profile” studying with male advisors.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：A14, I23, I24, J15, J16, O32
papers.zh_title: 博士生的发表生产力：南非导师制中性别与种族的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了南非博士生中，学生与导师的性别和种族构成是否对发表生产力产生影响。我们考察了2000年至2014年间毕业的所有STEM领域博士生，这一时期正值该国系统性地引入博士项目。我们分析了性别和种族对全样本的联合效应，并分别考察了以下子样本：(1) 白人-白人；(2) 黑人-黑人；(3) 黑人-白人的学生-导师配对。我们发现男女学生之间存在显著的生产力差异。在考察白人-白人和黑人-黑人学生-导师配对中性别与种族的联合效应时，这些差异在由男性导师指导的女性学生中更为明显。我们还探讨了具有高、中、低“生产力特征”的学生，其发表生产力差异是否发生显著变化。我们发现，女性生产力差距在整个生产力分布上呈U形。由男性导师指导的女性学生在生产力分布上具有更持久的差距，而由女性导师指导的具有高（或低）“生产力特征”的女性学生，其生产力与由男性导师指导的具有相似“生产力特征”的男性学生相当。

papers.title: Public Education and Intergenerational Housing Wealth Effects
papers.authors: Michael Gilraine, James Graham, Angela Zheng
papers.abstract: While rising house prices are known to benefit existing homeowners, we document a new channel through which house price shocks have intergenerational wealth effects. Using panel data from school zones within a large U.S. school district, we find that higher local house prices lead to improvements in local school quality, thereby increasing children's human capital and future incomes. We quantify this housing wealth channel using an overlapping generations model with neighborhood choice, spatial equilibrium, and endogenous school quality. We find that housing market shocks generate large intergenerational wealth effects that account for around one-third of total housing wealth effects.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG；JEL：E21, E24, I24, J62, R21, R23
papers.zh_title: 公共教育与代际住房财富效应
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然房价上涨已知会使现有房主受益，但我们记录了一种新的渠道，通过该渠道，房价冲击会产生代际财富效应。利用美国一个大学区内的学区面板数据，我们发现当地房价上涨会导致当地学校质量改善，从而增加儿童的人力资本和未来收入。我们通过一个包含邻里选择、空间均衡和内生学校质量的世代交叠模型来量化这一住房财富渠道。我们发现，住房市场冲击会产生巨大的代际财富效应，约占住房财富总效应的三分之一。

papers.title: The Economic Determinants of Heat Pump Adoption
papers.authors: Lucas W. Davis
papers.abstract: One concern with subsidies for low-carbon technologies is that they tend to go predominantly to high-income households. Previous research has shown, for example, that the top income quintile receives 60% of subsidies for rooftop solar and 90% of subsidies for electric vehicles. This paper finds that heat pumps are an important exception. Using newly available U.S. nationally representative data, the paper finds that there is remarkably little correlation between heat pump adoption and household income. Nationwide, 14% of U.S. households have a heat pump as their primary heating equipment, and adoption levels are essentially identical for all income levels ranging from the bottom of the income distribution (<$30,000 annually) to the top ($150,000+). Instead, the paper shows that heat pump adoption is strongly correlated with geography, climate, and electricity prices.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H23, L51, Q41, Q42, Q48, Q54
papers.zh_title: 热泵采用的经济决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 对低碳技术补贴的一个担忧是，这些补贴往往主要流向高收入家庭。例如，先前的研究表明，收入最高的五分之一人群获得了屋顶太阳能补贴的60%和电动汽车补贴的90%。本文发现，热泵是一个重要的例外。利用新获得的美国全国代表性数据，本文发现热泵采用与家庭收入之间的相关性非常小。在全美范围内，14%的美国家庭将热泵作为主要供暖设备，从收入分布底层（年收入低于3万美元）到顶层（年收入15万美元以上），所有收入水平的采用率基本相同。相反，本文表明，热泵采用与地理位置、气候和电价密切相关。

papers.title: The Elusive Quest for Disarmed Peace: Contest Games and International Relations
papers.authors: Johann Caro-Burnett, Sebastian Galiani, Gustavo Torrens
papers.abstract: This paper extends the canonical security competition one-shot game by developing a dynamic framework where states can invest in a technology to eliminate their rival. The model includes a settlement stage for negotiation, stochastic contestable resources, and it assumes diplomacy never fails–so payoff-dominated equilibria are not played. Within this setting, we fully characterize equilibrium behavior for all discount factors, comparing cases with high and low elimination costs. The dynamic structure reveals why, even when states coordinate on the best possible equilibrium outcome, long-lasting disarmed peace is rare. By combining the escalation of military capabilities with the constraining implications of effective diplomacy, the model rationalizes the persistent cycles of peace, arms races, and conflict observed in history. Our approach identifies strategic mechanisms that restrict the sustainability of disarmament and clarifies the conditions under which arms races or conflict are inevitable. These findings offer a deeper understanding of the recurrent nature of international conflict under repeated interaction.
papers.zh_title: 寻求解除武装的和平：竞争博弈与国际关系
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过构建一个动态框架扩展了经典的安全竞争一次性博弈，在该框架中，国家可以投资于消除对手的技术。该模型包含一个用于谈判的解决阶段、随机可争夺资源，并假设外交永远不会失败——因此，支付占优的均衡不会被采用。在此设定下，我们完整刻画了所有贴现因子下的均衡行为，比较了高消除成本和低消除成本的情况。动态结构揭示了为什么即使各国协调出可能的最佳均衡结果，持久的解除武装和平也极为罕见。通过将军事能力的升级与有效外交的约束性影响相结合，该模型解释了历史上观察到的和平、军备竞赛和冲突的持续循环。我们的方法识别了限制裁军可持续性的战略机制，并阐明了军备竞赛或冲突不可避免的条件。这些发现为理解重复互动下国际冲突的反复性提供了更深入的见解。

papers.title: Pandemic-Era Changes to Medicaid Enrollment and Funding: Implications for Future Policy and Research
papers.authors: Laura Dague, Benjamin D. Ukert
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 related public health emergency led to federal legislation that changed the landscape of Medicaid coverage for low-income people in the United States. Beginning in 2020, policy responses led to a surge in Medicaid enrollment due to federal rules preventing Medicaid disenrollment, and total Medicaid enrollment increased more from January 2020-2023 than the net increase in insurance coverage from 2013-2017 following the Affordable Care Act’s implementation. As these policies come to an end, it is crucial to understand their implications for the future of Medicaid. This paper provides an overview of Medicaid’s enrollment, renewal and funding policies, highlighting how these policies changed during and immediately following the acute phases of the COVID-19 pandemic, describes enrollment increases and their composition, reviews literature relevant to the policy and its unwinding, and identifies key areas for research. By examining this unprecedented period of Medicaid policy, we can inform future policy decisions and optimize safety net programs to be effective in a broad set of circumstances.
papers.zh_title: 疫情时期医疗补助注册与资助的变化：对未来政策与研究的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 与COVID-19相关的公共卫生紧急事件导致联邦立法改变了美国低收入人群医疗补助覆盖的格局。从2020年开始，由于联邦规则禁止医疗补助注销，政策应对导致医疗补助注册人数激增，2020年1月至2023年期间医疗补助总注册人数的增长，超过了《平价医疗法案》实施后2013年至2017年保险覆盖的净增长。随着这些政策的结束，理解它们对医疗补助未来的影响至关重要。本文概述了医疗补助的注册、续期和资助政策，重点说明了这些政策在COVID-19大流行急性期及之后如何变化，描述了注册人数的增长及其构成，回顾了与政策及其退出相关的文献，并确定了关键的研究领域。通过审视这一医疗补助政策的空前时期，我们可以为未来的政策决策提供信息，并优化安全网计划，使其在广泛情况下都能有效发挥作用。

papers.title: Techies and Firm Level Productivity
papers.authors: James Harrigan, Ariell Reshef, Farid Toubal
papers.abstract: We study the impact of techies—engineers and other technically trained workers—on firm-level productivity. We first report new facts on the role of techies in the firm by using French administrative data and unique surveys. Techies are STEM-skill intensive and are associated with innovation, as well as with technology adoption, management, and diffusion within firms. Using structural econometric methods, we estimate the causal effect of techies on firm-level Hicks-neutral productivity in both manufacturing and non-manufacturing industries. We find that techies raise firm-level productivity, and this effect goes beyond the employment of R&D workers, extending to ICT and other techies. In non-manufacturing firms, the impact of techies on productivity operates mostly through ICT and other techies, not R&D workers. Engineers have a greater effect on productivity than technicians.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D2, D24, O3, O33
papers.zh_title: 技术人员与企业层面生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了技术人员——工程师和其他受过技术培训的工人——对企业层面生产率的影响。我们首先利用法国行政数据和独特调查，报告了关于技术人员在企业中作用的新事实。技术人员密集使用STEM技能，并与创新以及企业内的技术采用、管理和扩散相关联。使用结构计量经济学方法，我们估计了技术人员对制造业和非制造业企业希克斯中性生产率的因果效应。我们发现，技术人员提高了企业层面的生产率，且这种效应超出了研发工人的雇佣范围，延伸到了ICT和其他技术人员。在非制造业企业中，技术人员对生产率的影响主要通过ICT和其他技术人员实现，而非研发工人。工程师对生产率的影响大于技术员。

papers.title: Community-Based Health Programs and Child Vaccinations: Evidence from Madagascar
papers.authors: Catalina Herrera-Almanza, Maria Rosales-Rueda
papers.abstract: Vaccinations are a cost-effective tool to prevent child mortality and morbidity; however, their access and take-up remain low in developing countries. We analyze the effects on child vaccinations of a large-scale community-based health worker program that aimed to reach remote areas distant from public health facilities in Madagascar. We identify these effects using a triple-difference design that leverages the time and geographic variation in the program rollout and the geocoded household distance to the closest health facility. Our findings indicate that, on average, the program did not improve the vaccination uptake in treated areas; however, the community health workers component had an additional effect on children’s vaccinations in the most remote areas from the closest health facility. Despite this improvement, we find that mothers’ religious affiliation might constitute a barrier for the vaccination uptake of the most remote and vulnerable children.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH；JEL：I12, I15, J13, O15
papers.zh_title: 社区健康项目与儿童疫苗接种：来自马达加斯加的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 疫苗接种是预防儿童死亡和发病的具有成本效益的工具；然而，在发展中国家，其可及性和接种率仍然较低。我们分析了马达加斯加一个旨在覆盖远离公共卫生设施的偏远地区的大规模社区健康工作者项目对儿童疫苗接种的影响。我们利用三重差分设计来识别这些效应，该设计利用了项目推广的时间和地理变化，以及按地理编码计算的家庭与最近卫生设施的距离。我们的研究结果表明，平均而言，该项目并未改善处理地区的疫苗接种率；然而，社区健康工作者部分对距离最近卫生设施最偏远地区的儿童疫苗接种产生了额外影响。尽管有这种改善，但我们发现母亲的宗教信仰可能构成最偏远和最脆弱儿童接种疫苗的障碍。

papers.title: The 2021 Child Tax Credit, the Living Arrangements and Housing Affordability of Families with Low Incomes
papers.authors: Natasha V. Pilkauskas, Katherine Michelmore, Nicole Kovski
papers.abstract: Access to safe and stable housing is important for child and adult wellbeing. Yet many low-income households face severe challenges in maintaining stable housing. In this paper we examine the impact of the 2021 temporary expansion to the Child Tax Credit (CTC) on the living arrangements and housing affordability of families with low incomes. We employ a parameterized difference-in-differences method and use national data from a sample of parents who are receiving, or recently received, Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program benefits (N~20,500). We find that the monthly CTC is associated with a higher likelihood that parents reported a change in their living arrangements as well as reduced household size, an effect largely driven by fewer mothers living with a partner (and not a reduction in doubling up). We also find that the credit reduced parents’ likelihood of reporting potential moves due to difficulties affording rent/mortgages as well as the amount and incidence of back-owed rent/mortgages. We find some differences in effects by race and ethnicity and income. Our findings illustrate how the monthly credit allowed parents to gain residential independence from partners, reduce the number of people residing in their household, and reduce their past-due rent/mortgage.
papers.zh_title: 2021年儿童税收抵免、低收入家庭的居住安排与住房可负担性
papers.zh_abstract: 获得安全稳定的住房对儿童和成人的福祉至关重要。然而，许多低收入家庭在维持稳定住房方面面临严峻挑战。本文研究了2021年儿童税收抵免（CTC）的临时扩大对低收入家庭居住安排和住房可负担性的影响。我们采用参数化双重差分方法，并使用来自正在领取或近期领取补充营养援助计划福利的家长样本的全国数据（约20,500人）。我们发现，月度CTC与家长报告居住安排变更的可能性增加以及家庭规模缩小相关，这一效应主要由与伴侣同住的母亲减少驱动（而非合住减少）。我们还发现，该抵免降低了家长因难以负担租金/抵押贷款而报告潜在搬迁的可能性，以及拖欠租金/抵押贷款的金额和发生率。我们观察到按种族、民族和收入划分的效应存在一些差异。我们的研究结果表明，月度抵免使家长能够获得独立于伴侣的居住权，减少其家庭中的居住人数，并减少其逾期租金/抵押贷款。

papers.title: Violent Discipline and Parental Behavior: Short- and Medium-term Effects of Virtual Parenting Support to Caregivers
papers.authors: Lelys I. Dinarte Diaz, Saravana Ravindran, Manisha Shah, Shawn M. Powers, Helen Baker-Henningham
papers.abstract: Approximately 75% of children aged 2 to 4 worldwide are regularly subjected to violent discipline across the globe. We study the impact of a virtually-delivered intervention on positive parenting practices in Jamaica. We find the intervention improves caregiver knowledge (0.52 SD) and attitudes around violence (0.2 SD) and leads to meaningful changes in caregiver disciplining behaviors, with a 0.12 SD reduction in violence against children. Treatment children also experience fewer emotional problems (0.17 SD). When we return nine months later, we also find reductions in caregiver depression (0.12 SD), anxiety (0.16 SD), and parental stress (0.16 SD) for treatment caregivers. The virtual delivery has important scalable policy implications which could help decrease violence against children across the globe.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH；JEL：I25, J12, J13, J16
papers.zh_title: 暴力管教与家长行为：虚拟育儿支持对照顾者的短期和中期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 全球范围内，大约75%的2至4岁儿童经常遭受暴力管教。我们研究了在牙买加实施的一项基于虚拟交付的干预措施对积极育儿实践的影响。我们发现，该干预措施改善了照顾者的知识（0.52个标准差）和关于暴力的态度（0.2个标准差），并导致照顾者管教行为发生有意义的变化，对儿童的暴力行为减少了0.12个标准差。接受治疗的儿童也经历了更少的情绪问题（0.17个标准差）。九个月后我们再次回访时，还发现治疗组照顾者的抑郁（0.12个标准差）、焦虑（0.16个标准差）和育儿压力（0.16个标准差）有所减少。虚拟交付方式具有重要的可扩展政策含义，可能有助于减少全球范围内针对儿童的暴力行为。

papers.title: The Empirical Distribution of Firm Dynamics and Its Macro Implications
papers.authors: Nir Jaimovich, Stephen J. Terry, Nicolas Vincent
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous firm models are ubiquitous in modern macroeconomics. We revisit a central feature of these models: the idiosyncratic shock process faced by firms. Using a large representative firm-level dataset, we document nonparametrically that the common assumption, a Gaussian AR(1) shock process, is at odds in important ways with observed fat-tailed firm dynamics. We embed these findings within a standard quantitative general equilibrium heterogeneous firm dynamics model and show that the nature of firm-level shocks has a sizable quantitative effect on the economy’s responsiveness to aggregate shifts.
papers.zh_title: 企业动态的经验分布及其宏观含义
papers.zh_abstract: 异质性企业模型在现代宏观经济学中无处不在。我们重新审视了这些模型的一个核心特征：企业面临的异质性冲击过程。利用一个大型代表性企业层面数据集，我们非参数地证明了常见假设——高斯AR(1)冲击过程——在重要方面与观察到的厚尾企业动态不一致。我们将这些发现嵌入一个标准的定量一般均衡异质性企业动态模型中，并表明企业层面冲击的性质对经济对总体变化的响应程度具有显著的定量影响。

papers.title: Plugging Gaps in Payment Systems: Evidence from the Take-Up of New Medicare Billing Codes
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Jonathan M. Leganza, Alex Masucci
papers.abstract: Over the last decade, the U.S. Medicare program has added new billing codes to enhance the financial rewards for Chronic Care Management and Transitional Care Management. We analyze the effects of introducing these new billing codes. First, we provide evidence on the adoption of the new codes by primary care physicians. We show that take-up of the new billing codes occurs gradually and exhibits substantial variation across space and across physician characteristics. Second, we provide evidence on how the new billing codes can both complement and substitute for the billing or provision of other services. We focus on two case studies. As a case of code substitution, we show that Transitional Care Management services partially crowd out traditional office visits following hospital discharges. As a case of code complementarity, we show that both Transitional Care Management and Chronic Care Management services predict increases in annual wellness visits. Overall, our analysis highlights how both new code take-up frictions and the impact of new code billing on existing code billing can be important for assessing the total costs and benefits of payment reforms.
papers.zh_title: 填补支付体系空白：新医疗保险计费代码采纳的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，美国医疗保险计划增加了新的计费代码，以增强对慢性病管理和过渡期护理管理的财务奖励。我们分析了引入这些新计费代码的影响。首先，我们提供了初级保健医生采纳新代码的证据。我们表明，新计费代码的采纳是逐步发生的，并且在空间和医生特征方面表现出显著差异。其次，我们提供了新计费代码如何补充或替代其他服务计费或提供的证据。我们聚焦于两个案例研究。作为代码替代的案例，我们表明过渡期护理管理服务部分挤出了出院后的传统办公室就诊。作为代码互补的案例，我们表明过渡期护理管理和慢性病管理服务都预示着年度健康就诊的增加。总体而言，我们的分析强调了新代码采纳摩擦以及新代码计费对现有代码计费的影响，对于评估支付改革的总成本和总收益可能至关重要。

papers.title: On the Allocation and Impacts of Managerial Training
papers.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Emir Murathanoglu, Anant Nyshadham
papers.abstract: We study the allocation and productivity consequences of training production line supervisors in soft skills via a randomized controlled trial. Consistent with standard practice for training investments within firms, we asked middle managers -- who sit above supervisors in the hierarchy -- to nominate members of their supervisory team for training. Program access was randomized within these recommendation rankings. Highly recommended supervisors experienced no productivity gains; in contrast, less-recommended supervisors' productivity increased 12% relative to controls. This was not due to poor information or favoritism. Instead, consistent with the fact that supervisor turnover comes at a large effort cost to middle managers due to gaps in coverage and onboarding, middle managers prioritized retention over productivity impacts. Indeed, treated supervisors were 15% less likely to quit than controls; this gain was most pronounced for highly recommended supervisors. Misallocation of training can help explain the persistence of low managerial quality in firms.
papers.zh_title: 论管理培训的分配与影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项随机对照试验，研究了生产线主管软技能培训的分配及其生产力后果。与公司内部培训投资的常规做法一致，我们要求处于主管上级的中层管理者提名其监督团队中的成员参加培训。项目准入在这些推荐排名内随机分配。被高度推荐的主管没有经历生产力提升；相比之下，被较少推荐的主管的生产力相对于对照组提高了12%。这并非由于信息不足或偏袒。相反，与主管离职因覆盖缺口和入职培训而给中层管理者带来巨大努力成本这一事实一致，中层管理者优先考虑保留而非生产力影响。确实，接受治疗的主管离职的可能性比对照组低15%；这一收益在被高度推荐的主管中最为显著。培训的错配有助于解释公司中低管理质量的持续存在。

papers.title: De-skilling: Evidence from Late Nineteenth Century American Manufacturing
papers.authors: Jeremy Atack, Robert A. Margo, Paul Rhode
papers.abstract: The long-standing view in US economic history is the shift in manufacturing in the nineteenth century from the artisan shop to the mechanized factory led to “labor deskilling.” Craft workers were displaced by mix of semi-skilled operatives, unskilled workers, and a reduced force of mechanics to maintain the powered machines. Investigating the Department of Labor’s 1899 Hand and Machine Labor Study using causal inference statistical techniques, we show the adoption of inanimate power did indeed induce deskilling. While the effects were statistically significant, they accounted for only 7-15 percent of the deskilling observed in the sample. Broadening the scope of our inquiry, we find the increased division of labor as captured by the increase in scale of operations and the ratio of workers to tasks accounts for a larger fraction.
papers.zh_title: 去技能化：来自十九世纪末美国制造业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国经济史中长期存在的观点是，十九世纪制造业从工匠作坊向机械化工厂的转变导致了“劳动力去技能化”。工匠工人被半熟练操作工、非熟练工人以及数量减少的维护动力机器的技工所取代。利用因果推断统计技术调查劳工部1899年手工与机器劳动研究，我们表明无生命动力的采用确实导致了去技能化。虽然这些效应在统计上显著，但它们仅占样本中观察到的去技能化的7-15%。扩大我们的研究范围，我们发现，由经营规模扩大和工人与任务比率增加所体现的劳动分工加深，解释了更大比例的去技能化。

papers.title: Tax Design, Information, and Elasticities: Evidence From the French Wealth Tax
papers.authors: Bertrand Garbinti, Jonathan Goupille-Lebret, Mathilde Muñoz, Stefanie Stantcheva, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: Using exhaustive administrative wealth and income tax data, we study a French wealth tax reform that scaled back information disclosure requirements below a certain wealth threshold. We develop a dynamic bunching approach that permits estimating the average response to the reform, the share of compliers (bunchers) and the LATE. Reported wealth declines sharply in response to the reform and annual wealth growth rates are on average 20% lower among affected taxpayers. This decline appears due to increased evasion facilitated by the lower disclosure requirements. By contrast, the elasticities to tax rates estimated are very small and insignificant. Responses to disclosure requirements are ten times larger than behavioral responses to kinks in the tax rates. To offset the revenue losses induced by the simplified reporting regime, the government would need to increase the effective wealth tax rate paid by the bunchers by 22.5%. Together, these results illustrate the critical role of information disclosure policies in shaping taxpayers’ behavior and tax revenues.
papers.zh_title: 税收设计、信息与弹性：来自法国财富税的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用详尽的行政财富和所得税数据，我们研究了一项法国财富税改革，该改革在低于某个财富门槛时缩减了信息披露要求。我们开发了一种动态聚束方法，可以估计对改革的平均响应、合规者（聚束者）的比例以及局部平均处理效应。报告财富在改革后急剧下降，受影响纳税人的年财富增长率平均低20%。这种下降似乎是由于较低披露要求所助长的逃税增加所致。相比之下，估计的税率弹性非常小且不显著。对披露要求的响应是对税率拐点行为响应的十倍。为了抵消简化报告制度导致的收入损失，政府需要将聚束者支付的有效财富税率提高22.5%。这些结果共同说明了信息披露政策在塑造纳税人行为和税收收入中的关键作用。

papers.title: How the 1963 Equal Pay Act and 1964 Civil Rights Act Shaped the Gender Gap in Pay
papers.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Thomas E. Helgerman, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: In the 1960s, two landmark statutes—the Equal Pay and Civil Rights Acts—targeted the long-standing practice of employment discrimination against U.S. women. For the next 15 years, the gender gap in median earnings among full-time, full-year workers changed little, leading many scholars to conclude the legislation was ineffectual. This paper revisits this conclusion using two research designs, which leverage (1) cross-state variation in pre-existing state equal pay laws and (2) variation in the 1960 gender gap across occupation-industry-state-group cells to capture differences in the legislation’s incidence. Both designs suggest that federal anti-discrimination legislation led to striking gains in women’s relative wages, which were concentrated among below-median wage earners. These wage gains offset pre-existing labor-market forces which worked to depress women’s relative pay growth, resulting in the apparent stability of the gender gap at the median and mean in the 1960s and 1970s. The data show little evidence of short-term changes in women’s employment but suggest that firms reduced their hiring and promotion of women in the medium to long term. The historical record points to the key role of the Equal Pay Act in driving these changes.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LE, LS；JEL：J16, J71, N32
papers.zh_title: 1963年《同工同酬法》和1964年《民权法》如何塑造了性别薪酬差距
papers.zh_abstract: 在1960年代，两项具有里程碑意义的法规——《同工同酬法》和《民权法》——针对美国女性长期遭受的就业歧视。在接下来的15年里，全职全年工作者中位收入的性别差距变化甚微，导致许多学者认为该立法无效。本文利用两种研究设计重新审视了这一结论，这两种设计利用（1）各州现有同工同酬法律的州际差异，以及（2）1960年按职业-行业-州-群体划分的性别差距变化，以捕捉立法影响程度的差异。两种设计都表明，联邦反歧视立法导致了女性相对工资的显著增长，这些增长集中在收入低于中位数的群体中。这些工资增长抵消了先前存在的、压低女性相对工资增长的劳动力市场力量，导致1960年代和1970年代中位数和均值上的性别差距表面稳定。数据显示，女性就业在短期内几乎没有变化的证据，但表明企业在中期到长期内减少了女性的招聘和晋升。历史记录指出了《同工同酬法》在推动这些变化中的关键作用。

papers.title: The Confederate Diaspora
papers.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Andreas Ferrara, Martin Fiszbein, Thomas P. Pearson, Patrick A. Testa
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new framework for understanding when and how migrants shape culture, applying it to the Confederate diaspora—a small migrant group that left a large cultural imprint. Southern Whites that migrated after the Civil War played a pivotal role in spreading Confederate symbols and racial norms across the United States by the early 20th century. Their far-reaching influence stemmed from two key conditions: (i) an ideological intensity rooted in their experiences of slavery, secession, and military defeat, and (ii) access to malleable power structures during westward expansion and postwar reconciliation. These conditions enabled them to transmit Confederate culture to both kin and non-Southern neighbors and to expand their reach by mobilizing civil society organization and leveraging positions of authority. They shaped policies and institutions that helped entrench racial norms and inequalities in labor markets, housing, and the criminal justice system. Our findings provide empirical foundations for understanding how migrants can transform local culture, rather than merely assimilate.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：D72, J15, J18, N31, N32, P16
papers.zh_title: 邦联散居者
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个理解移民何时以及如何塑造文化的新框架，并将其应用于邦联散居者——一个规模虽小却留下深刻文化印记的移民群体。内战后迁移的美国南方白人在20世纪初将邦联符号和种族规范传播至全美，发挥了关键作用。其深远影响源于两个关键条件：(i) 基于奴隶制、分裂和军事失败经历所形成的意识形态强度；(ii) 在西进运动和战后和解期间，他们能够接触到可塑的权力结构。这些条件使他们能够将邦联文化传递给亲属和非南方邻居，并通过动员公民社会组织及利用权威地位来扩大影响力。他们塑造的政策和制度帮助巩固了劳动力市场、住房和刑事司法系统中的种族规范与不平等。我们的发现为理解移民如何能够转变当地文化（而不仅仅是同化）提供了实证基础。

papers.title: The Demand for Mobility: Evidence from an Experiment with Uber Riders
papers.authors: Peter Christensen, Gustavo Nino, Adam Osman
papers.abstract: Optimal transportation policies depend on demand elasticities that interact across modes and vary across the population, but understanding how and why these elasticities vary has been an empirical challenge. Using an experiment with Uber in Egypt, we randomly assign large price discounts for transport services over a 3-month period to examine: (1) the demand for ride-hailing services, (2) the demand for total mobility (km/week), and (3) its contributions to external costs (e.g. congestion). A 50% discount more than quadruples Uber usage and induces an increase of nearly 49% in total mobility. These effects are stronger for women, who are less mobile at baseline and perceive public transit as unsafe. Technology-induced reductions in the price of ride-hailing services could generate substantial benefits to users (6.1% of GDP) that would be accompanied by considerable increases in external costs (0.7% of GDP), with benefits accruing to the most affluent and costs being borne by the entire population.
papers.zh_title: 出行需求：来自优步乘客实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 最优交通政策依赖于跨出行方式相互作用且随人群变化的出行需求弹性，但理解这些弹性如何以及为何变化一直是一个实证挑战。通过在埃及与优步合作进行的一项实验，我们在3个月内随机分配交通服务的大幅价格折扣，以考察：(1) 网约车服务需求，(2) 总出行需求（公里/周），以及(3) 其对外部成本（如拥堵）的贡献。50%的折扣使优步使用量增加了四倍多，并导致总出行量增加了近49%。这些效应对女性更为显著，她们在基线水平上出行较少，并认为公共交通不安全。技术驱动的网约车服务价格下降可为用户带来巨大收益（占GDP的6.1%），但同时也伴随着外部成本的显著增加（占GDP的0.7%），其中收益主要由最富裕群体获得，而成本则由全体人口承担。

papers.title: Corporate Discount Rates
papers.authors: Niels Joachim Gormsen, Kilian Huber
papers.abstract: We construct a dataset of firms’ discount rates (i.e., required returns to capital) and perceived cost of capital using corporate conference calls. The relation between discount rates and the cost of capital is far below the one-to-one mapping assumed in standard theory, as it takes many years for changes in the cost of capital to be incorporated into discount rates. This pattern leads to large and time-varying discount rate wedges that affect firm investment. Moreover, increasing discount rate wedges can account for the recent puzzle of “missing investment.” Cross-firm variation in market power and riskiness explains the evolution of wedges.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E22, E32, E43, E44, E52, G10, G12, G30, G31, G40
papers.zh_title: 企业贴现率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用公司电话会议构建了一个企业贴现率（即资本要求回报率）和感知资本成本的数据集。贴现率与资本成本之间的关系远低于标准理论假设的一一对应关系，因为资本成本的变化需要多年才能被纳入贴现率。这种模式导致了巨大且随时间变化的贴现率楔子，进而影响企业投资。此外，贴现率楔子的扩大可以解释近期“投资缺失”的谜题。企业间市场势力和风险程度的差异解释了楔子的演变。

papers.title: School Choice, Competition, and Aggregate School Quality
papers.authors: Michael Gilraine, Uros Petronijevic, John D. Singleton
papers.abstract: This paper develops and estimates an empirical model that allows for evaluating the impact of charter school choice on education quality in the aggregate. We estimate the model using student-level data from North Carolina. Using the model to counterfactually reverse North Carolina's removal of its statewide charter school cap, we show that the policy raised the average public school's value-added by around 0.01σ (on the student test score distribution). This competitive response drives the aggregate learning gain, worth about $2,000 per student. We further use model simulations to quantify the expected human capital returns to the marginal charter school, which show that policies that steer entrants to disadvantaged and underserved neighborhoods stand to amplify the impact of charter school expansion.
papers.zh_title: 学校选择、竞争与总体学校质量
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建并估计了一个实证模型，用于评估特许学校选择对总体教育质量的影响。我们使用北卡罗来纳州的学生层面数据来估计该模型。通过反事实模拟逆转北卡罗来纳州取消全州特许学校上限的政策，我们发现该政策使公立学校的平均增值提高了约0.01σ（基于学生考试成绩分布）。这种竞争性反应驱动了总体学习收益，价值约为每名学生2000美元。我们进一步利用模型模拟量化了边际特许学校预期的人力资本回报，结果表明，引导新办学校进入弱势和服务不足社区的政策有望放大特许学校扩张的影响。

papers.title: GDP and Temperature: Evidence on Cross-Country Response Heterogeneity
papers.authors: Kimberly A. Berg, Chadwick C. Curtis, Nelson Mark
papers.abstract: We use local projections to estimate the cross-country distribution of real GDP per capita growth impulse responses to global and idiosyncratic temperature shocks. Negative growth responses to global temperature at longer horizons are found for all Group of Seven countries while positive responses are found for seven of the nine poorest countries. Global temperature shocks have negative effects on growth for around half of the countries and seemingly anomalous positive effects for the other half. After controlling for latitude and average temperature, positive growth responses to global temperature shocks are more likely for countries that are poorer, have experienced slower growth, are less educated (lower high school attainment), less open to trade, and more authoritarian.
papers.zh_title: GDP与温度：跨国反应异质性的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用局部投影法来估计实际人均GDP增长率对全球和特定国家温度冲击的跨国脉冲响应分布。所有七国集团国家在较长时期内对全球温度冲击均呈现负增长响应，而九个最贫困国家中有七个呈现正响应。全球温度冲击对大约一半的国家产生负增长效应，而对另一半国家则产生看似反常的正效应。在控制纬度和平均温度后，全球温度冲击的正增长响应更可能出现在那些更贫困、增长较慢、教育程度较低（高中入学率低）、贸易开放度较低以及更威权的国家。

papers.title: Dynamic Programming in Economics on a Quantum Annealer
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Isaiah J. Hull
papers.abstract: We introduce novel algorithms for solving dynamic programming problems in economics on a quantum annealer, a specialized quantum computer used for combinatorial optimization. Quantum annealers begin in a superposition of all states and generate candidate global solutions in milliseconds, regardless of problem size. In contrast to existing methods, those developed in this paper 1) recover value and policy functions, 2) avoid fundamental scaling bottlenecks, and 3) are already implementable for small (but non-trivial) problems on current hardware. We demonstrate the method by solving the real business cycle model on a quantum annealer.
papers.zh_title: 量子退火器上的经济学动态规划
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了在量子退火器（一种用于组合优化的专用量子计算机）上求解经济学动态规划问题的新算法。量子退火器从所有状态的叠加态开始，无论问题规模大小，都能在毫秒内生成候选全局解。与现有方法相比，本文开发的方法能够：1) 恢复值函数和政策函数，2) 避免基本的扩展瓶颈，3) 在现有硬件上已可针对小型（但非平凡）问题实现。我们通过在量子退火器上求解真实商业周期模型来演示该方法。

papers.title: Firm Investments in Artificial Intelligence Technologies and Changes in Workforce Composition
papers.authors: Tania Babina, Anastassia Fedyk, Alex X. He, James Hodson
papers.abstract: We study the shifts in U.S. firms' workforce composition and organization associated with the use of AI technologies. To do so, we leverage a unique combination of worker resume and job postings datasets to measure firm-level AI investments and workforce composition variables, such as educational attainment, specialization, and hierarchy. We document that firms with higher initial shares of highly-educated workers and STEM workers invest more in AI. As firms invest in AI, they tend to transition to more educated workforces, with higher shares of workers with undergraduate and graduate degrees, and more specialization in STEM fields and IT skills. Furthermore, AI investments are associated with a flattening of the firms' hierarchical structure, with significant increases in the share of workers at the junior level and decreases in shares of workers in middle-management and senior roles. Overall, our results highlight that adoption of AI technologies is associated with significant reorganization of firms' workforces.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D22, E22, J01, J23, J24
papers.zh_title: 企业人工智能技术投资与劳动力结构变化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国企业劳动力构成和组织结构随人工智能技术使用而发生的变化。为此，我们利用求职者简历和职位发布数据集的独特组合来衡量企业层面的AI投资和劳动力构成变量，如教育程度、专业化和层级结构。我们记录到，初始高学历工人和STEM工人占比较高的企业在AI上投资更多。随着企业投资AI，它们倾向于转向受教育程度更高的劳动力队伍，拥有本科和研究生学位的工人比例更高，STEM领域和IT技能的专业化程度也更高。此外，AI投资与企业的扁平化层级结构相关，初级工人比例显著增加，中层管理和高级职位工人比例下降。总体而言，我们的结果强调，AI技术的采用与企业的重大劳动力重组相关联。

papers.title: Do Green Users Become Green Voters?
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Johannes Rode
papers.abstract: We estimate the causal effect of the diffusion of solar photovoltaic (PV) systems on the fraction of Green Party votes in federal and state elections in Baden-Württemberg, Germany. Our estimates are based on instruments that induce exogenous variation in roof appropriateness to PV installation. We find that PV adoption had a strong positive effect on Green Party votes. The effect is connected to the direct engagement of households with the PV system and does not reflect reciprocity to economic gains from PV. Our estimates likely reveal changing attitudes towards environmentally friendly values after adopting PV produced by cognitive dissonance.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE, PR；JEL：O14, O33, Q48, Q58
papers.zh_title: 绿色用户会变成绿色选民吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了德国巴登-符腾堡州太阳能光伏系统扩散对联邦和州选举中绿党得票比例的因果效应。我们的估计基于那些引发屋顶对光伏安装适宜性外生变化的工具变量。我们发现，光伏采用对绿党得票有强烈的正向效应。这种效应与家庭直接参与光伏系统有关，并非对光伏经济收益的互惠反应。我们的估计可能揭示了在采用光伏后，因认知失调而产生的对环境友好价值观的态度转变。

papers.title: Anticipating Climate Change Across the United States
papers.authors: Adrien Bilal, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
papers.abstract: We evaluate how anticipation and adaptation shape the aggregate and local costs of climate change. We develop a dynamic spatial model of the U.S. economy and its 3,143 counties that features costly forward-looking migration and capital investment decisions. We leverage the ‘Master Equation’ representation of the economy to make the model tractable. We propose reduced-form estimates of the county-level impact of severe storms and heat waves over the 20th century on local income, employment, and investment. We match these effects in the model by estimating migration and investment elasticities, capital depreciation shocks for storms, and a combination of productivity and amenity shocks for heat waves. Our counterfactuals show, first, that the impact of climate on capital depreciation magnifies the U.S. aggregate welfare costs of climate change twofold to 2.8% in 2025 under a business-as-usual warming scenario. Second, anticipation of future climate damages amplifies climate-induced worker and investment mobility, thereby significantly reducing the losses of workers in the most affected locations. Third, migration offsets 25-40% of aggregate losses and reduces substantially the spatial variance in the welfare impact of climate change.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：C6, E3, Q54, R11
papers.zh_title: 全美气候变化预期评估
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了预期和适应如何影响气候变化的总体及局部成本。我们构建了一个涵盖美国经济及其3143个县的动态空间模型，该模型包含了具有前瞻性的、成本高昂的迁移和资本投资决策。我们利用经济的“主方程”表示法使模型易于处理。我们提出了20世纪严重风暴和热浪对县级收入、就业和投资影响的简化形式估计。通过估计迁移和投资弹性、风暴的资本折旧冲击以及热浪的生产率和宜居性冲击组合，我们在模型中匹配了这些影响。我们的反事实分析显示：首先，在一切照旧的变暖情景下，气候对资本折旧的影响使美国2025年气候变化的总体福利成本翻倍，达到2.8%。其次，对未来气候损害的预期加剧了气候引发的工人和投资流动，从而显著减少了受影响最严重地区工人的损失。第三，迁移抵消了25-40%的总体损失，并大幅降低了气候变化福利影响的空间差异。

papers.title: Incentive-Based Pay and Building Decarbonization: Experimental Evidence from the Weatherization Assistance Program
papers.authors: Peter Christensen, Paul Francisco, Erica Myers
papers.abstract: Building energy efficiency is a cornerstone of greenhouse gas mitigation strategies with billions of dollars set aside for extensive upgrades in the coming years. However, impact evaluations have revealed actual energy savings from home upgrade programs often fall short of projections, in part due to contractor underperformance. Using field experiment results, we show refining one program design element—offering performance bonuses to contractors— increased natural gas savings by 24% and generated $5.39-$14.53 in social benefits per dollar invested. Hence, changes to worker incentives can have sizable impacts on the cost effectiveness of GhG abatement in energy efficiency programs.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, LS, PE；JEL：H41, J0, Q4, Q50
papers.zh_title: 基于激励的薪酬与建筑脱碳：来自天气化援助计划的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 建筑能效是温室气体减排战略的基石，未来几年将有数十亿美元用于大规模升级改造。然而，影响评估显示，家庭升级计划的实际节能效果往往低于预期，部分原因在于承包商表现不佳。通过现场实验结果，我们表明优化一个项目设计要素——向承包商提供绩效奖金——使天然气节省量增加了24%，并且每投入1美元可产生5.39至14.53美元的社会效益。因此，改变工人激励措施可以对能效项目中温室气体减排的成本效益产生显著影响。

papers.title: Putting Quantitative Models to the Test: An Application to Trump’s Trade War
papers.authors: Rodrigo Adão, Arnaud Costinot, Dave Donaldson
papers.abstract: The primary motivation behind quantitative modeling in international trade and many other fields is to shed light on the economic consequences of policy changes. To help assess and potentially strengthen the credibility of such quantitative predictions we introduce an IV-based goodness-of-fit measure that provides the basis for testing causal predictions in arbitrary general-equilibrium environments as well as for estimating the average misspecification in these predictions. As an illustration of how to use our IV-based goodness-of-fit measure in practice, we revisit the welfare consequences of Trump's trade war predicted by Fajgelbaum, Goldberg, Kennedy and Khandelwal (2020).
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, IO, ITI；JEL：C52, C68, E17, F10, R10
papers.zh_title: 量化模型的检验：以特朗普贸易战为例
papers.zh_abstract: 国际贸易及许多其他领域中量化建模的主要动机是揭示政策变化的经济后果。为了帮助评估并可能增强此类量化预测的可信度，我们引入了一种基于工具变量的拟合优度度量，该度量既为在任意一般均衡环境中检验因果预测提供了基础，也为估计这些预测的平均误设程度提供了依据。作为在实践中如何使用我们基于工具变量的拟合优度度量的示例，我们重新审视了Fajgelbaum、Goldberg、Kennedy和Khandelwal（2020）预测的特朗普贸易战的福利后果。

papers.title: Green Tilts
papers.authors: Lubos Pastor, Robert F. Stambaugh, Lucian A. Taylor
papers.abstract: We estimate financial institutions' portfolio tilts related to stocks' environmental, social, and governance (ESG) characteristics. From 2012 to 2023, ESGrelated tilts consistently total about 6% of the investment industry's assets and rise from 17% to 27% of institutions' total portfolio tilts. Significant ESG tilts arise from the choice of stocks held and, especially, the weights on stocks held. The largest institutions tilt increasingly toward green stocks, while other institutions and households tilt increasingly brown. Divestment from brown stocks is typically partial rather than full, even for individual mutual funds. UNPRI signatories and European institutions tilt greener; banks tilt browner.
papers.zh_title: 绿色倾斜
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了金融机构与股票环境、社会和治理（ESG）特征相关的投资组合倾斜。从2012年到2023年，与ESG相关的倾斜始终约占投资行业总资产的6%，并在机构总投资组合倾斜中的占比从17%上升至27%。显著的ESG倾斜源于所持股票的选择，尤其是所持股票的权重。最大的机构日益向绿色股票倾斜，而其他机构和家庭则日益向棕色股票倾斜。对棕色股票的撤资通常是部分而非完全撤资，即使对于单个共同基金也是如此。联合国负责任投资原则签署方和欧洲机构的倾斜更偏向绿色；银行的倾斜更偏向棕色。

papers.title: The Changing Firm and Country Boundaries of US Manufacturers in Global Value Chains
papers.authors: Teresa C. Fort
papers.abstract: This paper documents how US firms organize goods production across firm and country boundaries. Most US firms that perform physical transformation tasks in-house using foreign manufacturing plants in 2007 also own US manufacturing plants; moreover manufacturing comprises their main domestic activity. By contrast, “factoryless goods producers” outsource all physical transformation tasks to arm's-length contractors, focusing their in-house efforts on design and marketing. This distinct firm type is missing from standard analyses of manufacturing, growing in importance, and increasingly reliant on foreign suppliers. Physical transformation “within-the-firm” thus coincides with substantial physical transformation “within-the-country,” whereas its performance “outside-the-firm” often also implies “outside-the-country.” Despite these differences, factoryless goods producers and firms with foreign and domestic manufacturing plants both employ relatively high shares of US knowledge workers. These patterns call for new models and data to capture the potential for foreign production to support domestic innovation, which US firms leverage around the world.
papers.zh_title: 全球价值链中美国制造商的企业与国家边界变迁
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了美国企业如何跨越企业和国家边界组织商品生产。2007年，大多数利用外国制造工厂内部完成实物转换任务的美国企业也拥有美国制造工厂；此外，制造业构成了它们主要的国内活动。相比之下，“无工厂商品生产商”将所有实物转换任务外包给独立承包商，将内部工作重点放在设计和营销上。这种独特的企业类型在标准的制造业分析中缺失，其重要性日益增长，并且越来越依赖外国供应商。因此，在企业内部进行的实物转换往往与在国家内部进行的实物转换同时发生，而企业外部的实物转换通常也意味着国家外部的实物转换。尽管存在这些差异，无工厂商品生产商和拥有国内外制造工厂的企业都雇佣了相对较高比例的美国知识工作者。这些模式要求建立新的模型和数据，以捕捉外国生产支持国内创新的潜力，而美国企业正在全球范围内利用这种潜力。

papers.title: Supply, Demand, Institutions, and Firms: A Theory of Labor Market Sorting and the Wage Distribution
papers.authors: Daniel Haanwinckel
papers.abstract: This paper examines how workforce composition, labor demand, and minimum wage jointly determine wages through their effects on worker-task assignments, firm wage premiums, and firm-worker sorting. Using an estimated model of monopsonistic local labor markets, it finds that minimum wage hikes and labor demand shocks drove the decline in Brazilian wage inequality from 1998 to 2012. While rising educational attainment compressed skill premiums within firms, it also reallocated skilled workers to high-wage firms, limiting that shock’s effect on inequality. The analysis highlights interactions among exogenous factors, showing that concurrent supply and demand changes attenuated minimum wage impacts.
papers.zh_title: 供给、需求、制度与企业：劳动力市场分类与工资分配理论
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了劳动力构成、劳动力需求和最低工资如何通过其对工人-任务分配、企业工资溢价以及企业-工人分类的影响共同决定工资。利用一个估计的垄断性地方劳动力市场模型，本文发现最低工资上涨和劳动力需求冲击是1998年至2012年巴西工资不平等下降的驱动因素。虽然教育水平提高压缩了企业内部的技能溢价，但它也将技能工人重新分配到高工资企业，从而限制了该冲击对不平等的影响。该分析强调了外生因素之间的相互作用，表明同时发生的供给和需求变化减弱了最低工资的影响。

papers.title: Are Cryptos Different? Evidence from Retail Trading
papers.authors: Shimon Kogan, Igor Makarov, Marina Niessner, Antoinette Schoar
papers.abstract: Trading in cryptocurrencies has grown rapidly over the last decade, primarily dominated by retail investors. Using a dataset of 200,000 retail traders from eToro, we show that they have a different model of the underlying price dynamics in cryptocurrencies relative to other assets. Retail traders in our sample are contrarian in stocks and gold, yet the same traders follow a momentum-like strategy in cryptocurrencies. Individual characteristics do not explain the differences in how people trade cryptocurrencies versus stocks, suggesting that our results are orthogonal to differences in investor composition or clientele effects. Furthermore, our findings are not explained by inattention, differences in fees, or preference for lotterylike stocks. We conjecture that retail investors hold a model of cryptocurrency prices, where price changes imply a change in the likelihood of future widespread adoption, which in turn pushes asset prices further in the same direction.
papers.zh_title: 加密货币与众不同吗？来自零售交易的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 加密货币交易在过去十年中迅速增长，主要由散户投资者主导。利用来自eToro的20万名零售交易者的数据集，我们表明他们对加密货币的潜在价格动态持有与其他资产不同的模型。我们样本中的零售交易者在股票和黄金上是逆势交易者，但同样的交易者在加密货币上遵循动量策略。个人特征并不能解释人们交易加密货币与股票方式的差异，这表明我们的结果与投资者构成或客户群效应的差异无关。此外，我们的发现不能用注意力不足、费用差异或对彩票型股票的偏好来解释。我们推测，散户投资者持有一种加密货币价格模型，其中价格变化意味着未来广泛采用可能性的变化，这反过来又推动资产价格进一步朝同一方向变动。

papers.title: Cassatts in the Attic
papers.authors: Marlène Koffi, Matt Marx
papers.abstract: We analyze more than 70 million scientific articles to characterize the gender dynamics of commercializing science. The double-digit gender gap we report is explained neither by the quality of the science nor its ex-ante commercial potential, and is widest among papers with female last authors (i.e., lab heads) when publishing high-quality science. Using Pitchbook database, we show that when authors self-commercialize scientific discoveries via new ventures, no gap appears, raising the question of whether incumbent firms are unaware of—or ignore—scientific contributions by women. A natural experiment based on the Obama administration’s staggered introduction of open-access requirements for federally-funded research reveals that although easier access to scientific articles might facilitate commercialization, this benefit accrues primarily to male authors. Articles written with more “boastful” language are commercialized more often, and female scientists generally boast less, but even when they do their discoveries are commercialized no more often. We also observe gender homophily between scientific authors and commercializing inventors, the majority of whom are male. We conclude with the potential welfare effects of the gender gap: the disparity is more pronounced for higher-quality discoveries, as indicated by academic and patent citations or by predicted probabilities of commercialization derived from deep-learning algorithms.
papers.zh_title: 阁楼里的卡萨特
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了超过7000万篇科学文章，以描述科学商业化的性别动态。我们报告的两位数性别差距既不能用科学质量解释，也不能用其事前商业潜力解释，并且在女性末位作者（即实验室负责人）发表高质量科学论文时差距最大。利用Pitchbook数据库，我们表明当作者通过新创企业自行商业化科学发现时，没有出现差距，这引发了一个问题：现有企业是否不了解——或忽视了——女性的科学贡献。基于奥巴马政府对联邦资助研究分阶段引入开放获取要求的自然实验表明，尽管更容易获取科学文章可能促进商业化，但这种好处主要惠及男性作者。使用更多“自夸”语言撰写的文章被商业化的频率更高，而女性科学家通常自夸较少，但即使她们自夸，其发现被商业化的频率也没有更高。我们还观察到科学作者与商业化发明者之间存在性别同质性，其中大多数发明者为男性。我们最后讨论了性别差距的潜在福利效应：对于更高质量的发现，这种差距更为明显，这由学术和专利引用或基于深度学习算法预测的商业化概率所表明。

papers.title: Transmission Impossible? Prospects for Decarbonizing the US Grid
papers.authors: Lucas W. Davis, Catherine Hausman, Nancy L. Rose
papers.abstract: Encouraged by the declining cost of grid-scale renewables, recent analyses conclude that the United States could reach net zero carbon dioxide emissions by 2050 at relatively low cost using currently available technologies. While the cost of renewable generation has declined dramatically, integrating these renewables would require a large expansion in transmission to deliver that power. Already there is growing evidence that the United States has insufficient transmission capacity, and current levels of annual investment are well below what would be required for a renewables-dominated system. We describe a variety of challenges that make it difficult to build new transmission and potential policy responses to mitigate them, as well as possible substitutes for some new transmission capacity.
papers.zh_title: 传输不可能？美国电网脱碳的前景
papers.zh_abstract: 受电网规模可再生能源成本下降的鼓舞，近期分析得出结论，美国可以在2050年前以相对较低的成本，利用现有技术实现净零二氧化碳排放。虽然可再生能源发电成本已大幅下降，但整合这些可再生能源需要大规模扩建输电网络以输送电力。已有越来越多的证据表明，美国输电容量不足，而当前年度投资水平远低于可再生能源主导系统所需。我们描述了使新建输电线路变得困难的多种挑战，以及应对这些挑战的潜在政策回应，以及部分新输电容量的可能替代方案。

papers.title: A Welfare Analysis of Tax Audits Across the Income Distribution
papers.authors: William C. Boning, Nathaniel Hendren, Ben Sprung-Keyser, Ellen Stuart
papers.abstract: We estimate the returns to IRS audits of taxpayers across the income distribution. We find an additional $1 spent auditing taxpayers above the 90th income percentile yields more than $12 in revenue, while audits of below-median income taxpayers yield $5. We draw upon comprehensive internal accounting information and audit-level enforcement logs to quantify the average costs and revenues associated with each audit. We begin by estimating the average initial return to all audits of US taxpayers filing in 2010-2014. On average, $1 in audit spending raises $2.17 in initial revenue. Audits of high-income taxpayers are more costly, but the additional revenue raised more than offsets the costs. Audits of the 99-99.9th percentile have a 3.2:1 return; audits of the top 0.1% return 6.3:1. We then exploit the 40% audit reduction between tax years 2010 and 2014 to examine the returns to marginal audits. We find they exceed the returns to average audits. Revenues remain relatively unchanged but marginal costs fall below average costs due to economies of scale. Next, we use randomly selected audits to examine the impact of an initial audit on future revenue. This specific deterrence effect produces at least three times more revenue than the initial audit. Deterrence effects are relatively consistent across the income distribution. This results in the 12:1 return above the 90th percentile. We conclude by estimating the welfare consequences of audits using the MVPF framework and comparing audits to other revenue raising policies. We find that audits raise revenue at lower welfare cost.
papers.zh_title: 跨收入分布的税务审计福利分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了美国国税局（IRS）对不同收入阶层纳税人进行审计的回报。我们发现，在收入分布第90百分位以上的纳税人身上每多花费1美元进行审计，可带来超过12美元的收入，而对收入中位数以下纳税人的审计则带来5美元。我们利用全面的内部会计信息和审计层面的执法记录来量化每次审计的平均成本和收入。我们首先估算了2010-2014财年所有美国纳税人审计的平均初始回报。平均而言，每1美元审计支出可带来2.17美元的初始收入。对高收入纳税人的审计成本更高，但由此产生的额外收入足以抵消成本。对收入在99-99.9百分位纳税人的审计回报率为3.2:1；对前0.1%纳税人的审计回报率为6.3:1。然后，我们利用2010至2014纳税年度间审计量减少40%的情况，来考察边际审计的回报。我们发现边际审计的回报超过了平均审计的回报。收入相对保持不变，但由于规模经济，边际成本低于平均成本。接下来，我们利用随机选择的审计来考察初始审计对未来收入的影响。这种特定威慑效应产生的收入至少是初始审计的三倍。威慑效应在收入分布中相对一致。这导致第90百分位以上的回报率达到12:1。最后，我们使用MVPF框架估算审计的福利后果，并将审计与其他增收政策进行比较。我们发现，审计以较低的福利成本增加了收入。

papers.title: Who Benefits from a Smaller Honors Track?
papers.authors: Zachary Szlendak, Richard K. Mansfield
papers.abstract: Most U.S. high school courses separate classrooms into standard and honors tracks. This paper characterizes the efficiency and distributional impact of changing the share of students enrolling in honors classrooms. Using a sorting model where students choose tracks by course but schools influence the share choosing honors, we show that administrators’ optimal choices of honors track size require knowledge of treatment effect functions capturing the impact of alternative honors enrollment shares on different parts of the student predicted performance distribution.
