Using administrative data from North Carolina public high schools, we estimate these treatment effect functions by predicted performance quintile. Across various specifications, we find that smaller honors tracks (20%-30% of students) yield moderate performance gains for the top quintile (~.05-.07 test score SDs relative to no tracking) that decline monotonically across quintiles toward zero for the bottom quintile. However, expanding the honors share beyond 30-35% generates further (small) achievement increases only for the middle quintile, while reducing top quintile gains and causing substantial bottom quintile losses. Since many courses feature honors shares above 35% or do not track, we predict that enrolling ~25% of students in honors in each high school course would improve all quintiles’ statewide performance.
papers.zh_title: 谁从更小的荣誉班中受益？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国大多数高中课程将课堂分为标准班和荣誉班。本文描述了改变选修荣誉班学生比例对效率和分配的影响。利用一个学生按课程选择班级但学校影响选择荣誉班比例的排序模型，我们表明，管理者对荣誉班规模的最优选择需要了解处理效应函数，该函数捕捉了不同荣誉班入学份额对学生预测成绩分布不同部分的影响。利用北卡罗来纳州公立高中的行政数据，我们按预测成绩五分位数估计了这些处理效应函数。在各种设定下，我们发现较小的荣誉班（占学生总数的20%-30%）为最高五分位数学生带来适度的成绩提升（相对于不分班，测试分数标准差约为0.05-0.07），该提升随五分位数下降而单调递减，至最低五分位数时趋近于零。然而，将荣誉班份额扩大到30-35%以上，仅对中间五分位数学生产生进一步（微小的）成绩提升，同时减少了最高五分位数的收益，并导致最低五分位数学生的显著损失。由于许多课程的荣誉班份额超过35%或根本不设分班，我们预测，在每门高中课程中让约25%的学生进入荣誉班，将提高所有五分位数学生在全州范围内的成绩表现。

papers.title: Return on Returns: Building Scientific Capacity in AIDS Endemic Countries
papers.authors: Caroline Fry, Ina Ganguli
papers.abstract: We estimate spillovers from public funding for health research in the context of the NIH's Fogarty International Center's AIDS International Training and Research Program, which aims to strengthen scientific capacity in AIDS endemic countries by providing African researchers with training opportunities in the U.S. We use an event study difference-and-differences framework with information on scientists who participated in the program and the outcomes of African scientists working in the same scientific fields at their home institutions. Compared to control groups of similar scientists, our results show that scientists exposed to a returned trainee increase their publication output, particularly those with international coauthors. They also increase their grant funding and publish more HIV and WHO policy documents, showing that the Fogarty program impacted health policy related to the HIV/AIDS epidemic in African countries.
papers.zh_title: 回报的回报：在艾滋病流行国家建设科学能力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了美国国立卫生研究院（NIH）福格蒂国际中心艾滋病国际培训与研究项目对健康研究公共资助的溢出效应，该项目旨在通过为非洲研究人员提供在美国的培训机会，加强艾滋病流行国家的科学能力。我们采用事件研究双重差分框架，利用参与该项目的科学家信息以及在其所在机构从事相同科学领域的非洲科学家的成果。与类似的对照组科学家相比，我们的结果显示，接触到归国受训人员的科学家增加了其发表产出，特别是那些有国际合著者的论文。他们还增加了科研经费，并发表了更多关于HIV和世界卫生组织政策文件，这表明福格蒂项目影响了非洲国家与HIV/AIDS流行病相关的健康政策。

papers.title: Why Do Wages Grow Faster for Educated Workers?
papers.authors: David J. Deming
papers.abstract: The U.S. college wage premium doubles over the life cycle, from 27 percent at age 25 to 60 percent at age 55. Using a panel survey of workers followed through age 60, I show that growth in the college wage premium is primarily explained by occupational sorting. Shortly after graduating, workers with college degrees shift into professional, nonroutine occupations with much greater returns to tenure. Nearly 90 percent of life cycle wage growth occurs within rather than between jobs. To understand these patterns, I develop a model of human capital investment where workers differ in learning ability and jobs vary in complexity. Faster learners complete more education and sort into complex jobs with greater returns to investment. College acts as a gateway to professional occupations, which offer more opportunity for wage growth through on-the-job learning.
papers.zh_title: 为什么受教育工人的工资增长更快？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的大学工资溢价在整个生命周期中翻了一番，从25岁时的27%增长到55岁时的60%。利用一项追踪工人至60岁的面板调查，我表明大学工资溢价的增长主要由职业分类解释。毕业后不久，拥有大学学位的工人转向专业性、非常规的职业，这些职业的任期回报要高得多。近90%的生命周期工资增长发生在工作内部而非工作转换之间。为了理解这些模式，我建立了一个人力资本投资模型，其中工人的学习能力不同，工作的复杂性也不同。学习能力更强的工人完成更多教育，并进入投资回报更高的复杂工作。大学是通往专业职业的门户，这些职业通过在职学习提供了更多工资增长的机会。

papers.title: How Does Data Access Shape Science? The Impact of Federal Statistical Research Data Centers on Economics Research
papers.authors: Abhishek Nagaraj, Matteo Tranchero
papers.abstract: How does access to data shape the rate, quality, and policy relevance of academic research? To shed light on this question, we study the impact of access to confidential microdata through the progressive geographic expansion of the U.S. Census Bureau’s Federal Statistical Research Data Centers (FSRDCs). FSRDCs boost the use of confidential microdata and help applied researchers publish more policy- relevant articles in top outlets. Besides direct data usage, this effect also reflects spillovers: exposed researchers are encouraged to explore topics related to FSRDC-enabled findings and employ similar empirical methods. Our findings underscore the importance of data access for scientific progress and evidence-based policy formulation.
papers.zh_title: 数据获取如何塑造科学？联邦统计研究数据中心对经济学研究的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 数据获取如何影响学术研究的速率、质量和政策相关性？为了阐明这一问题，我们研究了通过美国人口普查局联邦统计研究数据中心（FSRDCs）逐步地理扩张而获取机密微观数据的影响。FSRDCs促进了机密微观数据的使用，并帮助应用研究人员在顶级期刊上发表更多政策相关的文章。除了直接的数据使用，这种效应还反映了溢出效应：受影响的科研人员被鼓励探索与FSRDC支持的研究发现相关的主题，并采用类似的实证方法。我们的研究结果强调了数据获取对科学进步和循证政策制定的重要性。

papers.title: Pricing Neighborhoods
papers.authors: Sadegh Eshaghnia, James J. Heckman, Goya Razavi
papers.abstract: Education in Denmark is freely available. Despite near equal teacher salaries and per-pupil school expenditure across districts, there is substantial spatial heterogeneity in school quality as measured by teacher quality and student test scores. We argue that this is due to sorting of teachers and students across neighborhoods. We develop and apply multiple methods for identifying parental valuation of measured school quality in the presence of strong neighborhood sorting. There is strong concordance in the estimates across diverse methodologies. We estimate a willingness to pay of about 3% more for a house with average characteristics when test scores are one standard deviation above the mean. Controlling for selection into neighborhoods only slightly reduces our estimates. Given that school quality, as measured by monetary resources, is equalized across all neighborhoods, payments for school quality embodied in housing prices are in fact payments for peer, teacher, and neighborhood quality. This evidence challenges the appropriateness of the current emphasis in the literature on Tiebout-based models of neighborhood choice that stress sorting on parental income in order to finance the local public good of school quality. Rather, a model of neighborhood choice to select neighbor and peer quality is more appropriate. Our evidence is consistent with evidence that cash expenditures on classrooms have weak effects on child achievement.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, POL；JEL：H0, H4, H70, I20, R0, R20, R3
papers.zh_title: 为社区定价
papers.zh_abstract: 丹麦的教育是免费提供的。尽管各学区的教师工资和生均学校支出几乎相等，但以教师质量和学生考试成绩衡量的学校质量存在显著的空间异质性。我们认为这是由于教师和学生跨社区的分类所致。我们开发并应用多种方法，在存在强烈社区分类的情况下，识别家长对可测量的学校质量的估值。不同方法得出的估计结果高度一致。我们估计，当考试成绩高于平均值一个标准差时，家庭愿意为具有平均特征的房屋多支付约3%。控制社区选择因素后，我们的估计值仅略有下降。鉴于以货币资源衡量的学校质量在所有社区都是均等的，体现在房价中的学校质量支付，实际上是对同伴、教师和社区质量的支付。这一证据挑战了当前文献中强调基于蒂布特模型的社区选择（即通过家长收入分类来为学校质量这一地方公共品融资）的适当性。相反，一个用于选择邻居和同伴质量的社区选择模型更为合适。我们的证据与关于教室现金支出对儿童学业成就影响微弱的证据一致。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Operations: Theory, Evidence, and Tools for Quantitative Analysis
papers.authors: Ricardo Lagos, Gastón Navarro
papers.abstract: We formulate a quantitative dynamic equilibrium theory of trade in the fed funds market, calibrate it to fit a comprehensive set of market-wide and micro-level cross-sectional observations, and use it to make two contributions to the operational side of monetary policy implementation. First, we produce global structural estimates of the aggregate demand for reserves—a crucial decision-making input for modern central banks. Second, we propose diagnostic tools to gauge the central bank’s ability to track a given fed funds target, and the heterogeneous incidence of policy actions on the shadow cost of funding across banks.
papers.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：C78, D83, E44, E49, G1, G18, G2, G21, G23, G28
papers.zh_title: 货币政策操作：理论、证据与定量分析工具
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个联邦基金市场交易的定量动态均衡理论，对其进行校准以拟合一套全面的市场层面和微观层面横截面观测数据，并利用该理论在货币政策实施的操作层面做出两项贡献。首先，我们得出了准备金总需求的全局结构性估计——这是现代中央银行的关键决策输入。其次，我们提出了诊断工具，用以衡量央行追踪给定联邦基金目标利率的能力，以及政策行动对不同银行影子融资成本的异质性影响。

papers.title: Optimal Public Transportation Networks: Evidence from the World's Largest Bus Rapid Transit System in Jakarta
papers.authors: Gabriel Kreindler, Arya Gaduh, Tilman Graff, Rema Hanna, Benjamin A. Olken
papers.abstract: Designing public transport networks involves tradeoffs between extensive geographic coverage, frequent service on each route, and relying on interconnections as opposed to direct service. These choices, in turn, depend on individual preferences for waiting times, travel times, and transfers. We study these tradeoffs by examining the world's largest bus rapid transit system, in Jakarta, Indonesia, leveraging a large network expansion between 2016-2020. Using detailed ridership data and aggregate travel flows from smartphone data, we analyze how new direct connections, changes in bus travel time, and wait time reductions increase ridership and overall trips. We set up and estimate a transit network demand model with multi-dimensional travel costs, idiosyncratic heterogeneity induced by random wait times, and inattention, matching event-study moments from the route launches. Commuters in Jakarta are 2-4 times more sensitive to wait time compared to time on the bus, and inattentive to long routes. To study the implications for network design, we introduce a new framework to describe the set of optimal networks. Our results suggest that a less concentrated network would increase ridership and commuter welfare.
papers.zh_title: 最优公共交通网络：来自雅加达全球最大快速公交系统的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 设计公共交通网络需要在广泛的地理覆盖、每条线路的高频服务以及依赖换乘而非直达服务之间进行权衡。这些选择反过来取决于个人对等待时间、出行时间和换乘的偏好。我们通过研究印度尼西亚雅加达全球最大的快速公交系统，利用2016年至2020年间的大规模网络扩张来考察这些权衡。利用详细的乘客数据和智能手机数据中的总体出行流量，我们分析了新的直达连接、公交出行时间变化以及等待时间减少如何增加乘客量和总出行次数。我们建立并估计了一个具有多维出行成本、由随机等待时间引起的异质性偏好以及注意力不足的交通网络需求模型，并与线路开通的事件研究矩相匹配。雅加达的通勤者对等待时间的敏感度是在公交车上的时间的2到4倍，并且对长线路缺乏关注。为了研究对网络设计的影响，我们引入了一个新框架来描述最优网络集合。我们的结果表明，一个不那么集中的网络将增加乘客量和通勤者福利。

papers.title: Chat Over Coffee? Diffusion of Agronomic Practices and Market Spillovers in Rwanda
papers.authors: Esther Duflo, Daniel Keniston, Tavneet Suri, Céline Zipfel
papers.abstract: Agricultural extension programs often train a subset of farmers and rely on social networks for knowledge dissemination. We evaluate this approach through a two-stage experiment of an agronomy training program among Rwandan coffee farmers. The first stage randomized trainee concentration at the village level; the second randomly selected participants within villages. The program increased knowledge and self-reported adoption of the taught practices. It also reshaped farmers’ social networks by creating new social ties primarily among co-trainees. At first glance, the intervention appeared modestly effective, with treated farmers exhibiting higher yields than control applicants within the same village, although this difference is not statistically significant. However, knowledge did not diffuse, and control farmers with more treatment friends at baseline reduced audited adoption and input use. Villages with high trainee concentrations showed suggestive evidence of negative spillovers, consistent with reallocation of labor and other shared inputs toward treated farmers, as formalized in a simple model in which social ties shape access to inputs. Relative declines in the yields of control farmers in these villages account for treatment-control differences, raising concerns both about this dissemination strategy and estimates that fail to consider potential negative spillovers.
papers.zh_title: 咖啡闲聊？卢旺达农技推广与市场溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 农业推广项目通常培训一部分农民，并依赖社交网络进行知识传播。我们通过一项针对卢旺达咖啡种植者的农艺培训项目的两阶段实验来评估这种方法。第一阶段在村庄层面随机分配受训者集中度；第二阶段在村庄内随机选择参与者。该项目提高了知识水平和所教授实践的自报采用率。它还通过主要在同批受训者之间建立新的社会联系，重塑了农民的社交网络。初步看来，该干预措施效果一般，处理组农民的产量高于同一村庄内的对照组申请者，尽管这种差异在统计上不显著。然而，知识并未扩散，并且基线时拥有更多处理组朋友的对照组农民减少了经审计的实践采用和投入品使用。受训者集中度高的村庄显示出负面溢出效应的初步证据，这与劳动力和其它共享投入品向处理组农民重新分配的现象一致，正如一个关于社会联系塑造投入品获取的简单模型所形式化的那样。这些村庄中对照组农民产量的相对下降解释了处理组与对照组之间的差异，这既对这种推广策略提出了担忧，也对那些未能考虑潜在负面溢出效应的估计提出了质疑。

papers.title: Understanding Trends in Chinese Skill Premiums, 2007-2018
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Yuan Wang, Lei Zhang
papers.abstract: The dramatic expansion of the education system and the transformation of the economy in China provide an opportunity to investigate how the labor market rewards skills. Between 2007 and 2018, the overall return to cognitive skills is virtually constant at 10%, whereas the college premium drops steeply by more than 20 percentage points. But, the regional differences in returns are significant and highlight the importance of differential demand factors. College returns are higher in more developed regions, but the declining trend is more pronounced. Returns to cognitive skills increase in more developed regions and decrease in less developed regions.
papers.zh_title: 理解中国技能溢价趋势，2007-2018
papers.zh_abstract: 中国教育体系的急剧扩张和经济转型为研究劳动力市场如何奖励技能提供了机会。在2007年至2018年间，认知技能的整体回报率几乎稳定在10%，而大学溢价则急剧下降了超过20个百分点。但是，回报的地区差异显著，凸显了差异化需求因素的重要性。在更发达的地区，大学回报更高，但下降趋势也更明显。认知技能回报在更发达地区上升，在欠发达地区下降。

papers.title: The Spillover Effects of Top Income Inequality
papers.authors: Joshua D. Gottlieb, David Hémous, Jeffrey Hicks, Morten G. Olsen
papers.abstract: Top income inequality in the United States has increased considerably within occupations. This phenomenon has led to a search for a common explanation. We instead develop a theory where increases in income inequality originating within a few occupations can "spill over" through consumption into others. We show theoretically that such spillovers occur when an occupation provides non-divisible services to consumers, with physicians our prime example. Examining local income inequality across U.S. regions, the data suggest that such spillovers exist for physicians, dentists, and real estate agents. Estimated spillovers for other occupations are consistent with the predictions of our theory.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, LS；JEL：D31, J24, J31, O15
papers.zh_title: 顶层收入不平等的溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 美国顶层收入不平等在职业内部显著加剧。这一现象促使人们寻找一个共同的解释。我们则提出一种理论，认为起源于少数职业的收入不平等加剧会通过消费“溢出”到其他职业。我们从理论上证明，当一个职业向消费者提供不可分割的服务时（医生是我们的主要例子），这种溢出就会发生。通过考察美国各地区的地方收入不平等，数据表明这种溢出效应存在于医生、牙医和房地产经纪人中。对其他职业的估计溢出效应与我们的理论预测一致。

papers.title: The Historical Impact of Coal on Cities
papers.authors: Karen Clay, Joshua A. Lewis, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: Historically coal has offered both benefits and costs to urban areas. Benefits include coal’s role in fueling industry and thus employment. The primary costs are air pollution and its impact on human health. This paper starts by using a Rosen-Roback style model to examine how differences in local coal availability affect equilibrium city employment. Drawing on the model, the paper surveys papers that examine the net effects of coal on the growth in city population and air pollution on health. The paper then turns to papers that explicitly consider the trade-offs between production benefits and pollution disamenities across space and over time. The paper ends with a discussion of opportunities for future work on coal and cities in historical settings.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：N52, N72, O13, Q53, Q56
papers.zh_title: 煤炭对城市的历史影响
papers.zh_abstract: 历史上，煤炭为城市地区带来了好处和成本。好处包括煤炭在推动工业发展进而促进就业方面的作用。主要成本是空气污染及其对人类健康的影响。本文首先使用罗森-罗巴克风格模型来考察当地煤炭可用性的差异如何影响均衡的城市就业。基于该模型，本文综述了考察煤炭对城市人口增长和空气污染对健康净效应的论文。然后，本文转向那些明确考虑空间和时间上生产效益与污染负外部性之间权衡的论文。本文最后讨论了在历史背景下未来关于煤炭与城市研究的机会。

papers.title: Screen Now, Save Later? The Trade-Off between Administrative Ordeals and Fraud
papers.authors: Shan Aman-Rana, Daniel W. Gingerich, Sandip Sukhtankar
papers.abstract: Screening requirements are common features of fraud and corruption mitigation efforts around the world. Yet imposing these requirements involves trade-offs between higher administrative costs, delayed benefits, and exclusion of genuine beneficiaries on one hand and lower fraud on the other. We examine these trade-offs in one of the largest economic relief programs in US history: the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). Employing a database that includes nearly 11.5 million PPP loans, we assess the impact of screening by exploiting temporal variation in the documentation standards applied to loan applications for loans of different values. We find that screening significantly reduced the incidence and magnitude of various measures of loan irregularities that are indicative of fraud. Moreover, our analysis reveals that a subset of borrowers with a checkered history strategically reduced their loan application amounts in order to avoid being subjected to screening. Borrowers without a checkered history engaged in this behavior at a much lower rate, implying that the documentation requirement reduced fraud without imposing an undue administrative burden on legitimate firms. All told, our estimates imply that screening led to a reduction in losses due to fraud equal to at least $744 million.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D22, D73, G38, H25, H32, H81
papers.zh_title: 现在筛查，以后省钱？行政繁琐与欺诈之间的权衡
papers.zh_abstract: 筛查要求是全球范围内欺诈和腐败缓解措施的常见特征。然而，实施这些要求涉及权衡：一方面是更高的行政成本、延迟的福利以及对真正受益人的排斥，另一方面是更低的欺诈率。我们在美国历史上最大的经济救助计划之一——薪资保护计划（PPP）中考察了这些权衡。利用一个包含近1150万笔PPP贷款的数据库，我们通过利用适用于不同贷款金额的贷款申请文件标准的时序变化来评估筛查的影响。我们发现，筛查显著降低了各种表明欺诈的贷款违规指标的发生率和严重程度。此外，我们的分析揭示，一部分有不良记录的借款人策略性地减少了他们的贷款申请金额，以避免受到筛查。没有不良记录的借款人从事这种行为的比率要低得多，这意味着文件要求减少了欺诈，而没有给合法企业带来不适当的行政负担。总体而言，我们的估计表明，筛查导致因欺诈造成的损失减少了至少7.44亿美元。

papers.title: Foreign Direct Investment, Global Value Chains, and Labor Rights: No Race-to-the-Bottom?
papers.authors: Hyejoon Im, John McLaren
papers.abstract: In a stylized model of multinational firms choosing host locations for their global value chains, host-country governments choose the strength of collective-bargaining rights that allow their workers to receive a share of the resulting quasi-rents. Each government must trade off the direct benefit of stronger bargaining rights against both the effect of chasing multinationals away to rival countries and general-equilibrium effects of discouraging investment in the industry altogether. We find that an increase in globalization in the sense of lower transaction costs has no effect on equilibrium workers' rights, but adding more countries to the global trading system tends, in the limit, to weaken them. Thus, as a matter of theory, the effect of globalization on labor rights is ambiguous. Empirically, we find little evidence that globalization drives movements in labor rights in either direction.
papers.zh_title: 外国直接投资、全球价值链与劳工权利：没有逐底竞争？
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个关于跨国公司为其全球价值链选择东道国的简化模型中，东道国政府决定集体谈判权的强度，使工人能够分享由此产生的准租金。每个政府必须在加强谈判权的直接收益与将跨国公司赶向竞争对手国家的影响，以及完全抑制该行业投资的一般均衡效应之间进行权衡。我们发现，从降低交易成本的意义上说，全球化的加剧对均衡状态下的工人权利没有影响，但将更多国家纳入全球贸易体系在极限情况下往往会削弱工人权利。因此，从理论上讲，全球化对劳工权利的影响是模糊的。在实证上，我们几乎没有发现全球化推动劳工权利向任一方向变动的证据。

papers.title: Global Value Chains and Labor Standards: The Race-to-the-Bottom Problem.
papers.authors: Hyejoon Im, John McLaren
papers.abstract: We ask how globalization affects a government's incentives to set labor standards for its workers. In a stylized equilibrium model of global value chains, we find two contrasting results. First, each country chooses stricter labor standards with globalization than it would under autarky, because labor standards are a normal good and the general increase in incomes from globalization increases demand for them. We call this the effect of `globalization in the large.' Second, if more countries join the world economy so that globalization increases at the margin, labor standards worsen (improve) at the margin if a country is competing with countries that are very similar to (different from) itself. We call this the effect of `globalization at the margin.' In equilibrium, labor standards are actually stricter than optimal because each country is able to pass some of the costs of its improved labor standards onto other countries (consumers of the final good, for example).
papers.zh_title: 全球价值链与劳工标准：逐底竞争问题
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨全球化如何影响政府为其工人设定劳工标准的激励。在一个全球价值链的简化均衡模型中，我们发现了两个对比鲜明的结果。首先，与自给自足相比，每个国家在全球化下会选择更严格的劳工标准，因为劳工标准是一种正常品，全球化带来的普遍收入增长增加了对其的需求。我们称之为“广义全球化”效应。其次，如果更多国家加入世界经济，使得全球化在边际上增强，那么当一个国家与自身非常相似（不同）的国家竞争时，劳工标准在边际上会恶化（改善）。我们称之为“边际全球化”效应。在均衡状态下，劳工标准实际上比最优水平更严格，因为每个国家能够将其改善劳工标准的部分成本转嫁给其他国家（例如最终产品的消费者）。

papers.title: Fatal Errors: The Mortality Value of Accurate Weather Forecasts
papers.authors: Jeffrey G. Shrader, Laura Bakkensen, Derek Lemoine
papers.abstract: We provide the first revealed preference estimates of the benefits of routine weather forecasts. The benefits come from how people use advance information to reduce mortality from heat and cold. Theoretically, more accurate forecasts reduce mortality if and only if mortality risk is convex in forecast errors. We test for such convexity using data on the universe of mortality events and weather forecasts for a twelve-year period in the U.S. Results show that erroneously mild forecasts increase mortality whereas erroneously extreme forecasts do not reduce mortality. Making forecasts 50% more accurate would save 2,200 lives per year. The public would be willing to pay $112 billion to make forecasts 50% more accurate over the remainder of the century, of which $22 billion reflects how forecasts facilitate adaptation to climate change.
papers.zh_title: 致命错误：准确天气预报的死亡率价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们首次提供了常规天气预报收益的显示性偏好估计。这些收益来自人们如何利用提前信息来降低因高温和寒冷导致的死亡率。理论上，当且仅当死亡风险对预报误差呈凸性时，更准确的预报才能降低死亡率。我们利用美国十二年间所有死亡事件和天气预报的数据来检验这种凸性。结果显示，错误地预报温和天气会增加死亡率，而错误地预报极端天气则不会降低死亡率。将预报准确率提高50%每年可挽救2200条生命。公众愿意为本世纪剩余时间内将预报准确率提高50%支付1120亿美元，其中220亿美元反映了预报如何促进对气候变化的适应。

papers.title: Avoiding Idiosyncratic Volatility: Flow Sensitivity to Individual Stock Returns
papers.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Francesco Franzoni, Shimon Kogan, Ran Xing
papers.abstract: Despite positive and significant earnings announcement premia, we find that institutional investors reduce their exposure to stocks before earnings announcements. A novel result on the sensitivity of flows to individual stock returns provides a potential explanation. We show that extreme announcement returns for an individual holding lead to substantial outflows, controlling for overall performance, and they increase the probability of managers leaving the fund. Reducing the exposure to these stocks before the announcement mitigates the outflows. We build a model to describe and quantify this tradeoff. Overall, the paper identifies a new dimension of limits to arbitrage for institutions.
papers.zh_title: 规避特质波动：资金流对个股收益的敏感性
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管存在显著为正的盈余公告溢价，但我们发现机构投资者在盈余公告前会减少对股票的敞口。关于资金流对个股收益敏感性的一个新发现提供了潜在解释。我们表明，在控制整体业绩的情况下，个股持仓的极端公告收益会导致大量资金流出，并增加基金经理离开基金的概率。在公告前减少对这些股票的敞口可以缓解资金流出。我们构建了一个模型来描述和量化这种权衡。总体而言，本文识别了机构套利限制的一个新维度。

papers.title: The Value of Student Debt Relief and the Role of Administrative Barriers: Evidence from the Teacher Loan Forgiveness Program
papers.authors: Brian Jacob, Damon Jones, Benjamin J. Keys
papers.abstract: We explore how much borrowers value student debt relief, in the setting of the federal Teacher Loan Forgiveness (TLF) program, and further document whether information and eligibility for this program affect teacher employment decisions. The program cancels between $5,000 and $17,500 in debt for teachers who remain employed in a high-need school for five consecutive years. Using both quasi-experimental evidence and a randomized control trial, we find that neither eligibility nor a targeted information intervention result in changes in teacher employment decisions, despite the presence of sizable student loan balances in our sample. Information was found, however, to increase application and receipt rates for teachers who had already accrued the five years of eligibility. Additional evidence from contingent valuation surveys suggests that teachers do in general value possible debt relief. Incorporating qualitative evidence from focus groups, we conclude that take-up may be constrained by program complexity and administrative barriers that involve knowing which schools qualify, tracking employment records, having employers sign off, and coordinating with loan servicers.
papers.zh_title: 学生债务减免的价值与行政障碍的作用：来自教师贷款豁免计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们以联邦教师贷款豁免计划为背景，探讨借款人如何评价学生债务减免，并进一步记录该计划的信息和资格是否影响教师的就业决策。该计划为在需求高的学校连续工作五年的教师取消5000至17500美元的债务。利用准实验证据和随机对照试验，我们发现，尽管样本中存在可观的学生贷款余额，但资格和有针对性的信息干预均未导致教师就业决策的变化。然而，我们发现信息提高了已累积五年资格教师的申请和获得率。来自条件价值评估调查的额外证据表明，教师总体上确实重视可能的债务减免。结合焦点小组的定性证据，我们得出结论，参与率可能受到项目复杂性和行政障碍的限制，这些障碍包括了解哪些学校符合条件、跟踪就业记录、获得雇主签字以及与贷款服务机构协调。

papers.title: Globalization, Structural Change and International Comovement
papers.authors: Barthélémy Bonadio, Zhen Huo, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: We study the roles of globalization and structural change in the evolution of international GDP comovement among industrialized countries over the period 1978-2007. In recent decades, trade integration between advanced economies increased rapidly while average GDP correlations remained stable. We show that structural change – trend reallocation of economic activity towards services – plays an important part in resolving this apparent puzzle. Business cycle shocks in the service sector are less internationally correlated than in manufacturing, and thus structural change lowers GDP comovement by increasing the share of less correlated sectors in GDP. Globalization – trend reductions in trade costs – exerts two opposing effects on cross-border GDP comovement. On the one hand, greater trade linkages increase international transmission of shocks and therefore comovement. On the other, globalization induces structural change towards services because it reduces the relative price of traded goods, and services and goods are complements. We use a multi-country, multi-sector model of international production and trade to quantify these effects. The two opposing effects of globalization on comovement largely cancel each other out, limiting the net contribution of globalization to increasing international comovement over this period.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F41, F44, F62, L16
papers.zh_title: 全球化、结构变化与国际经济联动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1978-2007年间全球化与结构变化在工业化国家国际GDP联动演变中的作用。近几十年来，发达经济体之间的贸易一体化迅速增强，而平均GDP相关性保持稳定。我们表明，结构变化——经济活动向服务业趋势性再配置——在解决这一明显谜题中发挥了重要作用。服务业的经济周期冲击在国际上的相关性低于制造业，因此结构变化通过增加相关性较低的部门在GDP中的份额来降低GDP联动。全球化——贸易成本的趋势性下降——对跨境GDP联动产生两种相反的影响。一方面，更大的贸易联系增加了冲击的国际传导，从而增强了联动。另一方面，全球化通过降低贸易品的相对价格（而服务与商品是互补品）引发向服务业的结构变化。我们使用一个多国、多部门的国际生产与贸易模型来量化这些效应。全球化的两种相反效应在很大程度上相互抵消，限制了全球化在这一时期对国际联动增强的净贡献。

papers.title: New Technologies and Jobs in Europe
papers.authors: Stefania Albanesi, António Dias da Silva, Juan F. Jimeno, Ana Lamo, Alena Wabitsch
papers.abstract: We examine the link between labour market developments and new technologies such as artificial intelligence (AI) and software in 16 European countries over the period 2011- 2019. Using data for occupations at the 3-digit level in Europe, we find that on average employment shares have increased in occupations more exposed to AI. This is particularly the case for occupations with a relatively higher proportion of younger and skilled workers. This evidence is in line with the Skill Biased Technological Change theory. While there exists heterogeneity across countries, only very few countries show a decline in employment shares of occupations more exposed to AI-enabled automation. Country heterogeneity for this result seems to be linked to the pace of technology diffusion and education, but also to the level of product market regulation (competition) and employment protection laws. In contrast to the findings for employment, we find little evidence for a relationship between wages and potential exposures to new technologies.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J2, J21, J31, O30, O33
papers.zh_title: 新技术与欧洲就业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2011-2019年间16个欧洲国家劳动力市场发展与人工智能和软件等新技术之间的联系。利用欧洲三位数职业层面的数据，我们发现，平均而言，在更易受人工智能影响的职业中，就业份额有所增加。这在相对年轻和技能型工人比例较高的职业中尤为明显。这一证据与技能偏向型技术变革理论一致。尽管各国之间存在异质性，但只有极少数国家显示出更易受人工智能自动化影响的职业就业份额下降。这一结果的国家异质性似乎与技术扩散速度和受教育程度有关，但也与产品市场监管和就业保护法水平有关。与就业的发现相反，我们几乎没有发现工资与新技术潜在暴露之间存在关系的证据。

papers.title: Finance and Climate Resilience: Evidence from the long 1950s US Drought
papers.authors: Raghuram Rajan, Rodney Ramcharan
papers.abstract: The local availability of credit shaped whether, and how, farmers adapted to the long 1950s US drought. Investment in irrigation increased substantially more in drought-exposed areas with greater access to bank finance. Overall, these areas suffered significantly less population decline, both in the short- and long term. Thus, enhancing local access to finance can enable communities to adapt to large adverse climatic shocks, limiting outmigration.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EEE, EFG；JEL：G0, J0, Q0
papers.zh_title: 金融与气候韧性：来自20世纪50年代美国长期干旱的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 当地信贷的可获得性决定了农民是否以及如何适应20世纪50年代美国的长期干旱。在受干旱影响且银行融资渠道更广的地区，灌溉投资增加幅度显著更大。总体而言，这些地区在短期和长期内人口下降幅度都显著更小。因此，增强当地融资渠道可以使社区适应大规模不利气候冲击，从而限制人口外迁。

papers.title: Global Liquidity: Drivers, Volatility and Toolkits
papers.authors: Linda S. Goldberg
papers.abstract: Global liquidity refers to the volumes of financial flows – largely intermediated through global banks and non-bank financial institutions – that can move at relatively high frequencies across borders. The amplitude of responses to global conditions like risk sentiment, discussed in the context of the global financial cycle, depends on the characteristics and vulnerabilities of the institutions providing funding flows. Evidence from across empirical approaches and using granular data provides policy-relevant lessons. International spillovers of monetary policy and risk sentiment through global liquidity evolve in response to regulation, the characteristics of financial institutions, and actions of official institutions around liquidity provision. Strong prudential policies in the home countries of global banks and official facilities reduce funding strains during stress events. Country-specific policy challenges, summarized by the monetary and financial trilemmas, are partially alleviated. However, risk migration across types of financial intermediaries underscores the importance of advancing regulatory agendas related to non-bank financial institutions.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E44, F30, F36, F38, F40, G15, G18, G23
papers.zh_title: 全球流动性：驱动因素、波动性与政策工具箱
papers.zh_abstract: 全球流动性指主要通过全球银行和非银行金融机构中介、能够以较高频率跨境流动的金融流量规模。对风险情绪等全球状况的反应幅度（在全球金融周期背景下讨论）取决于提供资金流的机构特征与脆弱性。来自不同实证方法并使用微观数据的证据提供了具有政策相关性的启示。货币政策与风险情绪通过全球流动性产生的国际溢出效应，会随着监管、金融机构特征以及官方机构在流动性提供方面的行动而演变。全球银行母国强有力的审慎政策以及官方便利设施，能够缓解压力事件期间的融资紧张状况。由货币与金融三难困境所概括的特定国家政策挑战，在一定程度上得到缓解。然而，风险在不同类型金融中介机构之间的迁移，凸显了推进与非银行金融机构相关的监管议程的重要性。

papers.title: The Benefits and Costs of Guest Worker Programs: Experimental Evidence from the India-UAE Migration Corridor
papers.authors: Suresh Naidu, Yaw Nyarko, Shing-Yi Wang
papers.abstract: We estimate the individual returns to temporary migration programs using a randomized experiment with several thousand job seekers in India applying to guest worker jobs in the United Arab Emirates (UAE). Working with construction companies and the UAE Ministry of Labor, we randomized job offers to potential migrant workers at recruitment sites. We measured effects on labor market outcomes, well-being, social relationships, and work satisfaction, as well as on labor intermediation costs, assets and debt. We find that workers who received the randomized offer experienced 30% higher earnings, and those who take up the offer to migrate to the UAE doubled their compensation. However, they also paid substantial upfront costs to labor intermediaries, financed by additional debt, that reduced take-home pay by about 10%. Migrants also reported a significant fall in subjective well-being, driven by increases in physical pain, effort, and heat. There were no significant effects on loneliness or other dimensions of well-being. Our finding of negative effects on well-being is consistent with the large share of workers offered jobs who did not migrate to the UAE. Extrapolating using a linear marginal treatment effects framework to workers who decline the UAE job offer, we find large and positive pecuniary returns to migration, even including intermediary fees, but even larger non-pecuniary costs.
papers.zh_title: 客工计划的好处与成本：来自印度-阿联酋移民走廊的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项针对印度数千名求职者申请阿联酋客工岗位的随机实验，估算了临时移民计划的个人回报。我们与建筑公司及阿联酋劳工部合作，在招聘现场向潜在移民工人随机提供工作机会。我们测量了对劳动力市场结果、幸福感、社会关系、工作满意度以及劳动力中介成本、资产和债务的影响。我们发现，获得随机工作机会的工人收入提高了30%，而实际接受移民阿联酋的工人薪酬翻了一番。然而，他们也向劳动力中介支付了高额前期费用，这些费用通过额外债务融资，导致实际到手收入减少约10%。移民还报告主观幸福感显著下降，这由身体疼痛、劳累和高温的增加所驱动。对孤独感或其他幸福感维度没有显著影响。我们发现幸福感受到负面影响，这与大量获得工作机会但未移民阿联酋的工人情况一致。利用线性边际处理效应框架对拒绝阿联酋工作机会的工人进行外推，我们发现移民带来巨大且正向的金钱回报（即使包括中介费用），但非金钱成本甚至更高。

papers.title: Gaming and Effort in Performance Pay
papers.authors: Luca Bertuzzi, Paul J. Eliason, Benjamin Heebsh, Riley J. League, Ryan C. McDevitt, James W. Roberts
papers.abstract: Health insurers often tie payments to providers’ quality of care. Although payers do this to elicit more effort from providers, some providers may game the system by avoiding patients who would cause their quality scores to fall. We use annual variation in the criteria for Medicare’s Quality Incentive Program in dialysis to distinguish strategic patient dropping from higher-quality care. Patients who would reduce their facilities’ scores are 14.3–71.5% more likely to switch facilities, often to ones that suggest the move was involuntary, while under certain conditions facilities exert more effort to improve their scores by providing better care.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：I11, I13, L10, L15, L2, L50
papers.zh_title: 绩效薪酬中的博弈与努力
papers.zh_abstract: 健康保险公司通常将支付与医疗服务提供者的护理质量挂钩。尽管支付方这样做是为了促使提供者付出更多努力，但一些提供者可能通过规避那些会导致其质量评分下降的患者来操纵系统。我们利用医疗保险透析质量激励计划标准的年度变化，来区分策略性患者流失与更高质量的护理。那些会降低其所在机构评分的患者，转至其他机构的可能性高出14.3%至71.5%，且通常转向暗示该转院并非自愿的机构；而在某些条件下，机构会付出更多努力，通过提供更好的护理来提高其评分。

papers.title: Resting on Their Laureates? Research Productivity Among Winners of the Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine
papers.authors: Jay Bhattacharya, Paul Bollyky, Jeremy D. Goldhaber-Fiebert, Geir H. Holom, Mikko Packalen, David M. Studdert
papers.abstract: The Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine is the most prestigious and coveted award in medical research. Anecdotal evidence and related research suggest that receiving it may adversely affect research productivity. We compared the post-Nobel research output of laureates (prize years: 1950-2010) with their pre-Nobel output and with the output of a matched control group consisting of winners of the Lasker Award, another highly prestigious medical research prize. Pre-Nobel, laureates’ publications were more voluminous, highly cited, and novel than those of (future) Lasker winners. Post-Nobel, laureates’ productivity decreased sharply, eventually falling below that of Lasker winners on all three measures. These declines may reflect diversionary effects of the Prize, changed incentives, or intrinsically different career arcs for medical researchers who win the Nobel Prize.
papers.zh_title: 功成名就后止步不前？诺贝尔生理学或医学奖得主的研究生产力
papers.zh_abstract: 诺贝尔生理学或医学奖是医学研究领域最负盛名且最令人向往的奖项。轶事证据及相关研究表明，获得该奖项可能会对研究生产力产生不利影响。我们将获奖者（获奖年份：1950-2010年）获奖后的研究成果与其获奖前的产出，以及匹配对照组（由另一项享有盛誉的医学研究奖——拉斯克奖得主组成）的产出进行了比较。获奖前，诺贝尔奖得主的论文在数量、被引次数和新颖性方面均高于（未来的）拉斯克奖得主。获奖后，诺贝尔奖得主的生产力急剧下降，最终在这三项指标上均低于拉斯克奖得主。这些下降可能反映了奖项的转移效应、激励机制的改变，或诺贝尔奖得主医学研究者内在不同的职业轨迹。

papers.title: The Neoclassical Growth of China
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Lee E. Ohanian, Wen Yao
papers.abstract: This paper studies China's four-fold increase in per capita GDP relative to the U.S. between 1995 and 2019. First, we argue that China's growth pattern is very similar to that of several other East Asia economies that initially grew very quickly. Second, we show that a minimalist Ramsey-Cass-Koopmans model with a parsimonious TFP catch-up process can account for China's growth path and the growth paths of other East Asia economies at a similar stage of development. The growth paths of other East Asia economies and the model predictions suggest that China's growth will substantially slow, so much so that we find the U.S. growth rate will likely be higher than China's by 2043. We also find that China's income per capita will level off at roughly 44% of the U.S. level around 2100.
papers.zh_title: 中国的新古典增长
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中国在1995年至2019年间人均GDP相对于美国增长四倍的现象。首先，我们认为中国的增长模式与几个最初增长非常迅速的东亚经济体非常相似。其次，我们证明，一个包含简约全要素生产率追赶过程的极简拉姆齐-卡斯-库普曼斯模型，可以解释中国的增长路径以及处于类似发展阶段的其他东亚经济体的增长路径。其他东亚经济体的增长路径以及模型预测表明，中国的增长将大幅放缓，以至于我们发现到2043年，美国增长率很可能超过中国。我们还发现，到2100年左右，中国人均收入将稳定在美国水平的约44%。

papers.title: Intuit QuickBooks Small Business Index: A New Employment Series for the US, Canada, and the UK
papers.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Raman Singh Chhina, Seyit M. Cilasun, Javier Miranda, Eren Ocakverdi, Nicolas Serrano-Velarde
papers.abstract: Small and young businesses are essential for job creation, innovation, and economic growth. Even most of the superstar firms start their business life small and then grow over time. Small firms have less internal resources, which makes them more fragile and sensitive to macroeconomic conditions. This suggests the need for frequent and real-time monitoring of the small business sector’s health. Previously this was difficult due to a lack of appropriate data. This paper fills this important gap by developing a new Intuit QuickBooks Small Business Index that focuses on the smallest of small businesses with at most 9 workers in the US and the UK and at most 19 workers in Canada. The Index aggregates a sample of anonymous QuickBooks Online Payroll subscriber data (QBO Payroll sample) from 333,000 businesses in the US, 66,000 in Canada, and 25,000 in the UK. After comparing the QBO Payroll sample data to the official statistics, we remove the seasonal components and use a Flexible Least Squares method to calibrate the QBO Payroll sample data against official statistics. Finally, we use the estimated model and the QBO Payroll sample data to generate a near real-time index of economic activity. We show that the estimated model performs well both in-sample and out-of-sample. Additionally, we use this analysis for different regions and industries.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D22, E24, J20, J21, J24
papers.zh_title: Intuit QuickBooks小企业指数：美国、加拿大和英国的新就业序列
papers.zh_abstract: 小型和年轻企业对创造就业、创新和经济增长至关重要。即使是大多数超级明星企业，其商业生涯也始于小型，然后随时间成长。小企业内部资源较少，这使得它们更加脆弱，对宏观经济状况更为敏感。这表明需要频繁、实时地监测小企业部门的健康状况。此前由于缺乏适当数据，这很困难。本文通过开发一个新的Intuit QuickBooks小企业指数来填补这一重要空白，该指数聚焦于美国、英国员工最多9人、加拿大员工最多19人的最小型企业。该指数汇总了来自美国33.3万家企业、加拿大6.6万家企业、英国2.5万家企业的匿名QuickBooks在线工资单订阅者样本数据。在将QBO工资单样本数据与官方统计数据进行比较后，我们去除季节性成分，并使用灵活最小二乘法根据官方统计数据校准QBO工资单样本数据。最后，我们利用估计模型和QBO工资单样本数据生成接近实时的经济活动指数。我们表明，估计模型在样本内和样本外均表现良好。此外，我们将此分析应用于不同地区和行业。

papers.title: Gender-Neutral Language and Gender Disparities
papers.authors: Alma Cohen, Tzur Karelitz, Tamar Kricheli-Katz, Sephi Pumpian, Tali Regev
papers.abstract: This study investigates empirically whether and how the use of gender-neutral language affects the performance of women and men in real high-stakes exams. We make use of a natural experiment in which the institute administering Israel’s standardized college admission tests amended the language used in its exams, making test language more gender neutral. We find that the change to a more gender-neutral language was associated with a significant improvement in the performance of women on quantitative questions, which meaningfully reduced the gender gap between male and female performance on these questions. However, the change did not affect female performance on verbal questions nor male performance on either quantitative or verbal questions. Our findings are consistent with the hypothesis that gendered language may introduce a "stereotype threat" that adversely affects women’s performance in tasks in which they are stereotypically perceived to underperform. Our findings have significant implications for the ongoing academic and policy discussions regarding the use and effects of gender-neutral language.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D83, I20, I24, J16, Z13
papers.zh_title: 性别中立语言与性别差异
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究通过实证调查，探讨在真实高风险考试中使用性别中立语言是否以及如何影响女性和男性的表现。我们利用一个自然实验，其中管理以色列标准化大学入学考试的机构修改了考试语言，使考试语言更加性别中立。我们发现，转向更性别中立的语言与女性在定量问题上的表现显著改善相关，这有意义地缩小了男女在这些问题上的性别差距。然而，这一变化并未影响女性在语言问题上的表现，也未影响男性在定量或语言问题上的表现。我们的发现与以下假设一致：性别化语言可能引入一种“刻板印象威胁”，对女性在刻板印象中表现不佳的任务中产生不利影响。我们的发现对当前关于性别中立语言使用及其影响的学术和政策讨论具有重要意义。

papers.title: Exporting Ideology: The Right and Left of Foreign Influence
papers.authors: Pol Antràs, Gerard Padró I Miquel
papers.abstract: We present an economic rationale for countries resorting to foreign influence to export their ideology to other nations. Our model incorporates two fundamental elements: redistribution of the tax burden between capital owners and workers, and international capital mobility. The model highlights the role of ideology in shaping both the taxes implemented by governments and the cross-border externalities of these policy choices. Pro-capital governments set lower capital taxes than pro-labor governments. Importantly, pro-capital governments benefit from other countries setting low capital taxes, while pro-labor governments' efforts to shift the tax burden onto capital owners are facilitated by higher capital taxes abroad. These cross-border externalities create strong incentives for engaging in foreign influence activities. We solve for a political equilibrium in which incumbent governments may exert costly actions that probabilistically affect the electoral outcome in other countries. In equilibrium, pro-capital parties exert influence aimed at promoting pro-capital parties and policies worldwide, while pro-labor governments carry out foreign influence activities aimed at boosting pro-labor parties and policies in other countries.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：D7, F2, F5, H77, P33
papers.zh_title: 输出意识形态：外国影响的左右之分
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个经济理由，解释国家为何诉诸外国影响以向其他国家输出其意识形态。我们的模型包含两个基本要素：资本所有者与工人之间的税收负担再分配，以及国际资本流动性。该模型强调了意识形态在塑造政府实施的税收以及这些政策选择的跨境外部性方面的作用。亲资本政府设定的资本税率低于亲劳动政府。重要的是，亲资本政府受益于其他国家设定低资本税率，而亲劳动政府将税收负担转嫁给资本所有者的努力则因国外更高的资本税率而得到促进。这些跨境外部性产生了参与外国影响活动的强烈激励。我们求解了一个政治均衡，其中现任政府可能采取代价高昂的行动，以概率性方式影响其他国家的选举结果。在均衡中，亲资本政党施加影响，旨在全球范围内推广亲资本政党和政策，而亲劳动政府则开展外国影响活动，旨在提升其他国家的亲劳动政党和政策。

papers.title: How Do Firms Respond to State Retirement Plan Mandates?
papers.authors: Adam Bloomfield, Kyung Min Lee, Jay Philbrick, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: We investigate how state “Auto-IRA” mandates affect firm offerings of employer-sponsored retirement plans (ESRPs). These policies require firms without ESRPs to facilitate automatic employee contributions to state-created individual retirement accounts (IRAs). We find that these policies increase an individual’s probability of working for a firm with an ESRP by 6-9 percent and of being included in the ESRP by 8-13 percent. At the firm level, these policies increase the probability of offering an ESRP by 7, the probability of establishing a new ESRP by 41-44 percent, and the number of ESRP participants by 6 percent.
papers.zh_title: 企业如何应对州退休计划强制要求？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究州“自动IRA”强制要求如何影响企业提供雇主赞助退休计划（ESRP）。这些政策要求没有ESRP的企业促进员工自动向州创建的个人退休账户（IRA）缴款。我们发现，这些政策将个人在提供ESRP的企业工作的概率提高了6-9%，将被纳入ESRP的概率提高了8-13%。在企业层面，这些政策将提供ESRP的概率提高了7个百分点，将建立新ESRP的概率提高了41-44%，并将ESRP参与者数量提高了6%。

papers.title: How Costs Limit Contraceptive Use among Low-Income Women in the U.S.: A Randomized Control Trial
papers.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Vanessa Wanner Lang, Alexa Prettyman, Iris Vrioni, Lea J. Bart, Daniel Eisenberg, Paula Fomby, Jennifer Barber, Vanessa Dalton
papers.abstract: The Affordable Care Act eliminated cost-sharing for contraception for Americans with health insurance, but substantial cost sharing remains for uninsured individuals who seek care through Title X—a national family planning program that provides patient-centered, subsidized contraception and reproductive health services in the U.S. This paper uses a randomized control trial (RCT) to examine how cost-sharing at Title X providers affects the choice of contraceptive method. The study randomizes vouchers that cover any contraceptive method up to the cost of 50% or 100% of a name-brand intra-uterine device (IUD). The results show that Title X clients are highly constrained by the out-of-pocket costs of contraception. The offer of free contraception is associated with a 40% increase in the use of any birth control method (ITT effect), a 94% increase in the value of birth control purchased, a 328-day (226%) increase in the period covered by contraceptives purchased, and a 324% increase in the likelihood of choosing a long-acting, reversible method (an IUD or implant). The results imply that eliminating the costs of contraception for Title X clients nationwide would reduce undesired pregnancies by 5.3%, birth rates by 3.9%, and abortions by 8.3%, and save $1.43 billion in the first year of the program.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J13, J18
papers.zh_title: 成本如何限制美国低收入女性使用避孕措施：一项随机对照试验
papers.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》取消了有健康保险的美国人的避孕费用分摊，但对于通过Title X（一项美国全国性的家庭计划项目，提供以患者为中心的补贴避孕和生殖健康服务）寻求护理的无保险个人，仍存在大量费用分摊。本文使用随机对照试验（RCT）来研究Title X提供者的费用分摊如何影响避孕方法的选择。该研究随机发放代金券，覆盖任何避孕方法，最高可达名牌宫内节育器（IUD）成本的50%或100%。结果显示，Title X客户受到避孕自付费用的高度限制。提供免费避孕与任何节育方法使用率增加40%（ITT效应）、购买的节育价值增加94%、购买的避孕措施覆盖期限增加328天（226%）、以及选择长效可逆方法（IUD或植入物）的可能性增加324%相关。结果表明，在全国范围内取消Title X客户的避孕费用，将使意外怀孕减少5.3%，出生率降低3.9%，堕胎减少8.3%，并在项目第一年节省14.3亿美元。

papers.title: Deposit Regulation and Monetary Transmission in China
papers.authors: Kaiji Chen, Yiqing Xiao, Tao Zha
papers.abstract: In well-developed financial markets, retail deposits and wholesale funding comove negatively in response to monetary policy changes. This negative comovement weakens the transmission of monetary policy. By contrast, our study finds that in emerging markets such as China, where deposit rate ceilings are regulated, (i) retail deposits and wholesale funding comove positively as the policy rate changes, and (ii) wholesale funding strengthens the transmission of monetary policy to bank lending. We develop a theoretical model that highlights the significant influence of deposit regulation on monetary policy transmission in the context of the world’s largest emerging market economy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E02, E5, G11, G12, G28
papers.zh_title: 中国存款监管与货币政策传导
papers.zh_abstract: 在发达的金融市场中，零售存款和批发融资在货币政策变化时呈负相关变动。这种负相关削弱了货币政策的传导。相比之下，我们的研究发现，在中国等新兴市场，存款利率上限受到监管，因此（i）当政策利率变化时，零售存款和批发融资呈正相关变动，并且（ii）批发融资强化了货币政策向银行贷款的传导。我们构建了一个理论模型，突显了在全球最大新兴市场经济体的背景下，存款监管对货币政策传导的显著影响。

papers.title: China's Macroeconomic Development: The Role of Gradualist Reforms
papers.authors: Kaiji Chen, Tao Zha
papers.abstract: This paper provides analytic guides to recent literature on China's macroeconomic development, emphasizing the critical role of the gradualist reform approach. Our analysis suggests that from 1978 to 1997, the gradualist approach contributed to China's aggregate total factor productivity and economic growth primarily through policies that facilitated the reallocation of surplus labor from agriculture to non-agricultural sectors. Since 1998, the government's focus shifted, with various reforms encouraging large enterprises, whether state-owned or privately-owned, to enter capital-intensive sectors, making capital deepening the main driver of economic growth. While this strategy sustained China's GDP growth, it also increased trade tensions with global partners, created barriers to transitioning to a consumption-led economy, and threatened China's long-term financial stability, casting long shadows over the Chinese economy.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ME；JEL：E02, E2, E65, F43
papers.zh_title: 中国宏观经济发展：渐进式改革的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文为近期关于中国宏观经济发展的文献提供了分析指南，强调了渐进式改革方法的关键作用。我们的分析表明，从1978年到1997年，渐进式方法主要通过促进剩余劳动力从农业向非农业部门重新配置的政策，推动了中国全要素生产率和经济增长。自1998年以来，政府重心发生转变，各项改革鼓励大型企业（无论是国有还是私营）进入资本密集型部门，使资本深化成为经济增长的主要驱动力。这一战略虽然维持了中国GDP增长，但也加剧了与全球伙伴的贸易紧张关系，为向消费主导型经济转型设置了障碍，并威胁到中国的长期金融稳定，给中国经济投下了长长的阴影。

papers.title: In-Kind Welfare Benefits and Reincarceration Risk: Evidence from Medicaid
papers.authors: Marguerite Burns, Laura Dague
papers.abstract: Most of the 600,000 adults returning to the community from state and federal prisons annually in the U.S. carry substantial debt, have low income and low education, and limited formal employment prior to entering prison. Upon reentry, they face financial hardship, high rates of morbidity and mortality, and high incidence of re-offense. Medicaid coverage, as a means-tested transfer program providing subsidized health insurance, may influence reincarceration through both financial and health channels. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive look at the effects of public health insurance coverage on post-release behavior of formerly incarcerated adults. We study a natural experiment in which two separate state policy changes resulted in a 60 percentage point increase in Medicaid enrollment at release. Using a series of linked individual level administrative datasets, we estimate the effects of this change in Medicaid enrollment, finding declines in reincarceration, increased employment, and higher health care use. Leveraging data on financial concerns and need for mental health and substance use treatment to examine mechanisms, we find support for a financial channel and mixed support for health channels. Policies that enhance access to healthcare and provide financial security for this population may have significant benefits for individuals and society.
papers.zh_title: 实物福利与再监禁风险：来自医疗补助的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国每年有60万成年人从州立和联邦监狱重返社区，其中大多数人背负巨额债务、收入低、教育水平低，且在入狱前正式就业有限。重返社会后，他们面临经济困难、高发病率和死亡率以及高再犯罪率。医疗补助作为一种基于经济状况调查的转移支付项目，提供补贴性健康保险，可能通过经济和健康两种渠道影响再监禁。在本文中，我们全面考察了公共健康保险覆盖对曾有监禁经历的成年人释放后行为的影响。我们研究了一项自然实验，其中两项独立的州政策变化导致释放时医疗补助注册率提高了60个百分点。利用一系列关联的个人层面行政数据集，我们估计了医疗补助注册变化的影响，发现再监禁率下降、就业增加以及医疗保健使用增加。通过利用关于经济担忧以及心理健康和物质使用治疗需求的数据来检验机制，我们发现了支持经济渠道的证据，而对健康渠道的支持则不一。增强这一人群获得医疗保健的机会并为其提供经济保障的政策可能对个人和社会产生显著益处。

papers.title: Design-Based Identification with Formula Instruments: A Review
papers.authors: Kirill Borusyak, Peter Hull, Xavier Jaravel
papers.abstract: Many studies in economics use instruments or treatments which combine a set of exogenous shocks with other predetermined variables by a known formula. Examples include shift-share instruments and measures of social or spatial spillovers. We review recent econometric tools for this setting, which leverage the assignment process of the exogenous shocks and the structure of the formula for identification. We compare this design-based approach with conventional estimation strategies based on conditional unconfoundedness, and contrast it with alternative strategies that leverage a model for unobservables.
papers.zh_title: 基于设计的公式工具识别：综述
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学中的许多研究使用工具或处理变量，这些变量通过已知公式将一组外生冲击与其他预定变量结合起来。例子包括份额转移工具以及社会或空间溢出效应的度量。我们回顾了针对这一情境的最新计量经济学工具，这些工具利用了外生冲击的分配过程和公式结构进行识别。我们将这种基于设计的方法与基于条件无混杂性的传统估计策略进行比较，并将其与利用不可观测因素模型的其他策略进行对比。

papers.title: The Impact of Fear on Police Behavior and Public Safety
papers.authors: Sungwoo Cho, Felipe Gonçalves, Emily Weisburst
papers.abstract: We examine how changes in the salience of workplace risk affect police behavior and public safety. Specifically, we investigate cases of police officer deaths while on duty. Officers respond to a peer death by decreasing arrest activity for one to two months, consistent with heightened fear. Reductions are largest for low-level arrests and are more pronounced in smaller cities. Crime does not increase on average during this period, nor do we observe crime spikes in cities with larger or longer arrest declines. While shocks in fatality risk generate substantial enforcement responses, officer fear is unlikely to harm public safety.
papers.zh_title: 恐惧对警察行为与公共安全的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了工作场所风险显著性的变化如何影响警察行为和公共安全。具体而言，我们调查了警察执勤死亡案例。警察对同事死亡的反应是，逮捕活动减少一到两个月，这与恐惧加剧相一致。逮捕减少在低级别逮捕中最为显著，并且在较小城市更为明显。在此期间，犯罪率平均并未上升，我们也没有在逮捕下降幅度更大或时间更长的城市观察到犯罪激增。尽管致命风险冲击引发了显著的执法反应，但警察的恐惧不太可能损害公共安全。

papers.title: Treatment for Mental Health and Substance Use: Spillovers to Police Safety
papers.authors: Monica Deza, Thanh Lu, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega
papers.abstract: We study the effect of community access to mental health and substance use treatment on police officer safety, proxied with on-duty assaults on officers. Police officers often serve as first-responders to people experiencing mental health and substance use crises, which can place police officers at risk. Combining agency-level data on police officer on-duty assaults and county-level data on treatment centers that offer mental health and substance use care, we estimate panel fixed-effects regressions. An additional four centers per county (the average annual increase observed in our data) leads to a 1.3% reduction per police agency in on-duty police officers assaults.
papers.zh_title: 心理健康与物质使用治疗：对警察安全的溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了社区获得心理健康和物质使用治疗对警察安全的影响，以执勤期间警察遇袭作为代理指标。警察通常是应对经历心理健康和物质使用危机人群的第一响应者，这可能使警察面临风险。结合关于警察执勤遇袭的机构层面数据和关于提供心理健康及物质使用护理的治疗中心的县级数据，我们估计了面板固定效应回归。每个县每增加四个治疗中心（我们数据中观察到的年均增长），每个警察机构的执勤警察遇袭事件减少1.3%。

papers.title: International Trade, Noise Pollution, and Killer Whales
papers.authors: M. Scott Taylor, Fruzsina Mayer
papers.abstract: Orcinus Orca is the world’s largest predator, and simultaneously a significant tourist asset and cultural icon for much of the Pacific Northwest. In the past two decades, the Southern Resident Killer whale (SRKW) population has declined by more than 25 percent, putting them at risk of extinction. The cause of this decline is hotly debated. This paper employs novel data, an innovative noise pollution model, and quasi-experimental methods borrowed from environmental economics to solve this puzzle. We find consistent evidence that vessel noise pollution from international shipping has lowered fertility and raised the mortality of the SRKW significantly. Had noise pollution remained at its pre-1998 levels, the SRKW population would be 30% larger. Noise pollution is a growing threat to marine mammals worldwide.
papers.zh_title: 国际贸易、噪音污染与虎鲸
papers.zh_abstract: 虎鲸是世界上最大的捕食者，同时也是太平洋西北地区重要的旅游资产和文化标志。在过去二十年中，南方定居虎鲸种群数量下降了超过25%，面临灭绝风险。这种下降的原因存在激烈争论。本文利用新颖数据、创新的噪音污染模型以及借鉴自环境经济学的准实验方法来解决这一难题。我们发现一致的证据表明，国际航运产生的船舶噪音污染显著降低了南方定居虎鲸的生育率并提高了死亡率。如果噪音污染保持在1998年之前的水平，南方定居虎鲸种群规模将比现在大30%。噪音污染是全球海洋哺乳动物日益面临的威胁。

papers.title: Do Municipal Bond Investors Pay a Convenience Premium to Avoid Taxes?
papers.authors: Matthias Fleckenstein, Francis A. Longstaff
papers.abstract: We study the valuation of state-issued tax-exempt municipal bonds and find that there are significant convenience premia in their prices. These premia parallel those identified in Treasury markets. We find evidence that these premia are tax related. Specifically, the premia are related to measures of tax and fiscal uncertainty, forecast flows into state municipal bond funds, and are directly linked to outmigration from high-tax to low-tax states and to other measures of tax aversion such as IRA and retirement plan contributions. These results suggest that investors are willing to pay a substantial premium to avoid taxes.
papers.zh_title: 市政债券投资者是否为避税支付便利溢价？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了州发行免税市政债券的估值，发现其价格中存在显著的便利溢价。这些溢价与国债市场中识别的溢价相似。我们发现有证据表明这些溢价与税收相关。具体而言，这些溢价与税收和财政不确定性指标、预测流入州市政债券基金的资金流有关，并且直接与从高税州向低税州的迁出以及其他税收规避措施（如IRA和退休计划缴款）相关联。这些结果表明，投资者愿意支付可观的溢价来避税。

papers.title: When Your Bootstraps Are Not Enough: How Demand and Supply Interact to Generate Learning in Settings of Extreme Poverty
papers.authors: Alex Eble, Maya Escueta
papers.abstract: In settings of extreme poverty, how do demand and supply combine to produce child learning? In rural Gambia, caregivers with high aspirations for their children's future, measured before children start school, invest substantially more than others in children’s education. Despite this, essentially no children are literate or numerate three years later. When villages receive a highly impactful, teacher-focused supply-side intervention, however, children of high-aspirations caregivers are 25 percent more likely to achieve literacy and numeracy than others in the same village. We estimate patterns of substitutability and complementarity between demand and supply in generating learning that change with skill difficulty.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：I24, I25, I28, I3, O12, O15
papers.zh_title: 当你的努力不够时：需求与供给如何相互作用在极端贫困环境中产生学习成果
papers.zh_abstract: 在极端贫困的环境中，需求和供给如何共同作用以产生儿童的学习成果？在冈比亚农村，那些在孩子入学前就对其未来抱有高期望的照顾者，在教育上的投入远高于其他人。尽管如此，三年后，基本上没有孩子具备读写或计算能力。然而，当村庄接受一项高度有效、以教师为重点的供给侧干预时，高期望照顾者的孩子在该村庄内实现读写和计算能力的可能性比其他人高出25%。我们估计了需求与供给在产生学习成果方面的替代性和互补性模式，这些模式随着技能难度的变化而改变。

papers.title: The Urban Wage Premium in Historical Perspective
papers.authors: Kyle Butts, Taylor Jaworski, Carl Kitchens
papers.abstract: We estimate the urban wage premium in the United States from 1940 to 2010. Drawing on recent advances in the literature on selection on unobservables, we show how to control for heterogeneity in the characteristics of individuals that choose to live in cities to address endogenous sorting. Estimates from naive comparisons of individuals living in urban versus non-urban areas substantially overstate the urban wage premium. We find that the premium is highest in the middle of the twentieth century (about 12 percent in 1940 and 1950) relative to the early in twenty-first century (declining to a few percent by 2010). Overall, the urban wage premium is decreasing and sorting explains a larger fraction of the difference in urban versus non-urban earnings across our sample period.
papers.zh_title: 历史视角下的城市工资溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了美国从1940年到2010年的城市工资溢价。借鉴近期关于不可观测特征选择问题的文献进展，我们展示了如何控制选择居住在城市中的个体特征的异质性，以解决内生性分类问题。基于对城市与非城市地区个体进行简单比较的估计，会显著高估城市工资溢价。我们发现，城市工资溢价在20世纪中期（1940年和1950年约为12%）最高，相对于21世纪初期（到2010年下降至几个百分点）而言。总体而言，城市工资溢价呈下降趋势，并且在我们的样本期内，分类效应解释了城市与非城市收入差异的更大一部分。

papers.title: Gold's Value as an Investment
papers.authors: Urban Jermann
papers.abstract: For investors, gold is an asset without a yield that is attractive in times of low and negative real interest rates. Gold also has an embedded put option because investors can sell it to those who value its use as jewelry or as a productive input. This paper presents an approach for pricing gold from investors' perspective. The model is based on no-arbitrage principles with minimal structural assumptions. There is no need to specify investor preferences. When fitted to match 10-year real US Treasury rates the model can replicate the salient fluctuations in the time series of gold prices since 2007. The model is also able to capture key patterns of CME Comex gold futures prices from about 1990 onwards. The model implies that the majority of the value of gold is due to its role as an investment asset.
papers.zh_title: 黄金作为投资品的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 对于投资者而言，黄金是一种无收益的资产，在低实际利率和负实际利率时期具有吸引力。黄金还内含一个看跌期权，因为投资者可以将其出售给那些看重其作为珠宝或生产投入品用途的人。本文提出了一种从投资者角度为黄金定价的方法。该模型基于无套利原则，结构假设极少，无需指定投资者偏好。当模型拟合10年期美国实际国债收益率时，能够复制自2007年以来黄金价格时间序列中的显著波动。该模型还能捕捉自1990年左右以来CME Comex黄金期货价格的关键模式。模型表明，黄金的大部分价值源于其作为投资资产的角色。

papers.title: Is it the Message or the Messenger? Examining Movement in Immigration Beliefs
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Carolina Arteaga, Emily K. Weisburst
papers.abstract: How do political leaders affect constituents’ beliefs? Is it rhetoric, leader identity, or the interaction of the two that matters? Using a large-scale experiment we decompose the relative importance of partisan messages vs leader sources, in the context of beliefs about immigration. Participants listen to anti-immigrant and pro-immigrant speeches from both Presidents Obama and Trump. These treatments are benchmarked to versions of the speeches recorded by an actor to control for message content, and to non-ideological presidential speeches to control for leader priming. Our findings show that political leader sources influence beliefs beyond the content of their messages in a special case: when leaders deliver unanticipated messages to individuals in their own party. This evidence supports the hypothesis that individuals will “follow their leader” to new policy positions.
papers.zh_title: 是信息还是信使？考察移民信念的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 政治领袖如何影响选民的信念？是言辞、领袖身份，还是两者的相互作用在起作用？通过一项大规模实验，我们在移民信念的背景下分解了党派信息与领袖来源的相对重要性。参与者聆听奥巴马总统和特朗普总统的反移民和亲移民演讲。这些处理以演员录制的演讲版本为基准，以控制信息内容，并以非意识形态的总统演讲为基准，以控制领袖启动效应。我们的研究结果表明，政治领袖来源在一种特殊情况下会影响信念，超越其信息内容：当领袖向本党成员传递出乎意料的信息时。这一证据支持了“追随领袖”走向新政策立场的假设。

papers.title: Does Anger Drive Populism?
papers.authors: Omer Ali, Klaus Desmet, Romain Wacziarg
papers.abstract: We study whether anger fuels the rise of populism. Anger as an emotion tends to act as a call to action against individuals or groups that are blamed for negative situations, making it conducive to voting for populist politicians. Using a unique dataset tracking emotions for a large sample of respondents from 2008 to 2017, we explore the relationship between anger and the populist vote share across U.S. counties. More angry counties displayed stronger preferences for populist candidates during the 2016 presidential primaries and elections. However, once we control for other negative emotions and life satisfaction, anger no longer operates as a separate channel in driving the populist vote share. Instead, our results indicate that a more complex sense of malaise and gloom, rather than anger per se, drives the rise in populism.
papers.zh_title: 愤怒是否驱动民粹主义？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究愤怒是否助长了民粹主义的兴起。作为一种情绪，愤怒往往倾向于引发针对被指责造成负面情况的个人或群体的行动，因此有利于投票给民粹主义政治家。利用2008年至2017年间追踪大量受访者情绪的独特数据集，我们探讨了美国各县愤怒情绪与民粹主义得票率之间的关系。在2016年总统初选和大选期间，愤怒程度较高的县表现出对民粹主义候选人更强的偏好。然而，一旦我们控制其他负面情绪和生活满意度，愤怒不再作为驱动民粹主义得票率的独立渠道。相反，我们的结果表明，是一种更复杂的萎靡和阴郁感，而非愤怒本身，推动了民粹主义的兴起。

papers.title: Anatomy of the Phillips Curve: Micro Evidence and Macro Implications
papers.authors: Luca Gagliardone, Mark Gertler, Simone Lenzu, Joris Tielens
papers.abstract: We develop a bottom-up approach to estimate the slope of the primitive form of the New Keynesian Phillips curve, which features marginal cost as the real activity variable. Using quarterly micro data on prices, costs, and output, we estimate dynamic pass-through regressions that identify the slope as a function of primitive parameters. We find a high slope for the cost-based Phillips curve, which contrasts with the low estimates of the conventional output gap-based formulation found in the literature. We reconcile by showing that the output elasticity of marginal cost is low, at least during moderate inflation periods (e.g., pre-pandemic).
papers.zh_title: 菲利普斯曲线的剖析：微观证据与宏观含义
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种自下而上的方法来估计新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线原始形式的斜率，该形式以边际成本作为实际活动变量。利用价格、成本和产出的季度微观数据，我们估计了动态传递回归，将斜率识别为原始参数的函数。我们发现基于成本的菲利普斯曲线斜率较高，这与文献中发现的基于传统产出缺口的公式的低估计值形成对比。我们通过证明边际成本的产出弹性较低（至少在温和通胀时期，如疫情前）来调和这一矛盾。

papers.title: The Welfare Economics of Reference Dependence
papers.authors: Daniel Reck, Arthur Seibold
papers.abstract: Empirical evidence suggests that individuals often evaluate options relative to a reference point, especially seeking to avoid losses. We undertake the first welfare analysis under reference-dependent preferences. We characterize the welfare impact of changes in reference points and prices, decomposing these into direct and behavioral effects. The sign of direct and behavioral effects depends on the form of reference-dependent payoffs; which of these effects matter for welfare depends on whether reference dependence reflects a bias or a normative preference. We derive sufficient statistics formulas quantifying the social welfare effects of changes in reference points and prices in terms of estimable reduced-form parameters and normative judgments. We illustrate these findings with an empirical application to reference dependence exhibited in German workers' retirement decisions. We find positive social welfare effects of increasing the Normal Retirement Age, but ambiguous effects of financial incentives to postpone retirement.
papers.zh_title: 参照依赖的福利经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 经验证据表明，个体通常相对于参照点来评估选项，尤其倾向于避免损失。我们首次在参照依赖偏好下进行福利分析。我们刻画了参照点和价格变化对福利的影响，将其分解为直接效应和行为效应。直接效应和行为效应的符号取决于参照依赖收益的形式；这些效应对福利的重要性取决于参照依赖反映的是偏差还是规范性偏好。我们推导出充分统计量公式，用可估计的简化形式参数和规范性判断来量化参照点和价格变化的社会福利效应。我们通过一个实证应用来说明这些发现，该应用涉及德国工人退休决策中表现出的参照依赖。我们发现提高正常退休年龄具有正向社会福利效应，但推迟退休的财务激励效应则不确定。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Transmission Through Online Banks
papers.authors: Isil Erel, Jack Liebersohn, Constantine Yannelis, Samuel Earnest
papers.abstract: Financial technology has the potential to alter the transmission of monetary policy by lowering search costs and expanding banking markets. This paper studies the reaction of online banks to changes in the federal funds rate. We find that a 100 basis points increase in the federal funds rate leads to a 30 basis points larger increase in the deposit rates of online banks relative to traditional banks. Consistent with the rate movements, online bank deposits experience inflows, while traditional banks experience outflows. Results are similar across markets with differing competitiveness and demographics, but vary with the stickiness of depositors.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ME；JEL：E52, E58, G21, G23, G28
papers.zh_title: 通过在线银行的货币政策传导
papers.zh_abstract: 金融科技有可能通过降低搜索成本和扩大银行市场来改变货币政策的传导。本文研究了在线银行对联邦基金利率变化的反应。我们发现，联邦基金利率每上升100个基点，在线银行的存款利率相对于传统银行会多上升30个基点。与利率变动一致，在线银行存款出现流入，而传统银行存款则出现流出。结果在不同竞争程度和人口结构的市场中相似，但随存款者的粘性而变化。

papers.title: The Impact of Lead Exposure on Fertility, Infant Mortality, and Infant Birth Outcomes
papers.authors: Karen Clay, Alex Hollingsworth, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: Lead exposure has detrimental effects on fertility, infants, children, and adults. Despite the success in removing lead from on-road gasoline, industrial and aviation emissions continue to pose a substantial global challenge. Other major sources of exposure include dust, soil resuspension, and consumption of contaminated water or food. Both animal studies and evidence from humans support claims of an adverse relationship between lead pollution and human health. Since lead exposure is not randomly assigned, quasi-experimental studies play a crucial role in this knowledge base. Among these studies, extensive research links elevated blood lead levels in children to academic and behavioral outcomes, but more limited attention has been given to lead’s impact on fertility, infant mortality, and infant health. This paper examines the existing quasi-experimental literature on lead and fertility, infant mortality, and infant birth outcomes, highlighting key results, methods, and implications for policymakers.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EEE, EH；JEL：I12, Q53, Q58
papers.zh_title: 铅暴露对生育率、婴儿死亡率及婴儿出生结局的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 铅暴露对生育能力、婴儿、儿童及成人均产生有害影响。尽管成功将铅从车用汽油中去除，但工业和航空排放仍构成重大的全球挑战。其他主要暴露源包括灰尘、土壤再悬浮以及受污染的水或食物消费。动物研究和人类证据均支持铅污染与人类健康之间存在不利关系的论断。由于铅暴露并非随机分配，准实验研究在这一知识体系中发挥着关键作用。在这些研究中，大量研究将儿童血铅水平升高与学业和行为结果联系起来，但关于铅对生育率、婴儿死亡率和婴儿健康影响的关注较为有限。本文考察了关于铅与生育率、婴儿死亡率及婴儿出生结局的现有准实验文献，重点介绍了关键结果、方法以及对政策制定者的启示。

papers.title: Trade Integration, Industry Reallocation, and Welfare in Colombia
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Oscar I. Avila-Montealegre
papers.abstract: We study empirically and theoretically the dynamic effects of the unilateral reduction in import tariffs undertaken by Colombia from 1989-1993, with a particular emphasis on the transition and including any anticipation effects. We develop an asymmetric two-country, multi-sector heterogeneous firm model with a dynamic exporting decision, input-output linkages, capital accumulation, and trade in financial assets. The model is calibrated to match Colombian exporter dynamics, sectoral trade openness, tariffs, imbalances, and input-output linkages in the late 1980s. We introduce an anticipated phased out reform into the model and relate the predicted path of sectoral and aggregate activity to the data. Our multi-sector dynamic exporting model predicts much larger gains from these reforms than models that abstract from exporter dynamics, sectoral heterogeneity, trade in financial assets, or capital accumulation. It also captures the key macroeconomic features in terms of a temporary expansion in growth featuring a large, but short-lived investment boom financed by international borrowing, more so when the reforms are expected to be short-lived.
papers.zh_title: 哥伦比亚的贸易一体化、产业再配置与福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从实证和理论角度研究了哥伦比亚在1989-1993年间单边降低进口关税的动态效应，特别强调转型过程并包含任何预期效应。我们构建了一个非对称的两国、多部门异质性企业模型，其中包含动态出口决策、投入产出关联、资本积累和金融资产贸易。该模型经过校准，以匹配1980年代末哥伦比亚的出口商动态、部门贸易开放度、关税、失衡和投入产出关联。我们将预期的分阶段改革引入模型，并将部门及总体活动的预测路径与实际数据联系起来。我们的多部门动态出口模型预测，这些改革带来的收益远大于那些忽略出口商动态、部门异质性、金融资产贸易或资本积累的模型。该模型还捕捉了关键宏观经济特征，即经济增长的暂时扩张，表现为由国际借贷融资的大规模但短暂的投资繁荣，当改革预期为短期时，这一特征更为明显。

papers.title: Credit Allocation and Macroeconomic Fluctuations
papers.authors: Karsten Müller, Emil Verner
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between credit expansions, macroeconomic fluctuations, and financial crises using a novel database on the sectoral distribution of private credit for 117 countries since 1940. We document that, during credit booms, credit flows disproportionately to the non-tradable sector. Credit expansions to the non-tradable sector, in turn, systematically predict subsequent growth slowdowns and financial crises. In contrast, credit expansions to the tradable sector are associated with sustained output and productivity growth without a higher risk of a financial crisis. To understand these patterns, we show that firms in the non-tradable sector tend to be smaller, more reliant on loans secured by real estate, and more likely to default during crises. Our findings are consistent with models in which credit booms to the non-tradable sector are driven by easy financing conditions and amplified by collateral feedbacks, contributing to increased financial fragility and a boom-bust cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, F30, G01, G02
papers.zh_title: 信贷配置与宏观经济波动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个涵盖1940年以来117个国家私人信贷部门分布的新数据库，研究了信贷扩张、宏观经济波动与金融危机之间的关系。我们记录到，在信贷繁荣期间，信贷资金不成比例地流向非贸易部门。非贸易部门的信贷扩张随后会系统性地预测经济增长放缓与金融危机。相反，贸易部门的信贷扩张则与持续的产出和生产率增长相关，且不会带来更高的金融危机风险。为了理解这些模式，我们表明非贸易部门的企业往往规模较小，更依赖以房地产为抵押的贷款，并且在危机期间更有可能违约。我们的发现与以下模型一致：在这些模型中，非贸易部门的信贷繁荣是由宽松的融资条件驱动，并通过抵押品反馈效应放大，从而加剧了金融脆弱性并引发繁荣-萧条周期。

papers.title: Nowcasting World Trade with Machine Learning: a Three-Step Approach
papers.authors: Menzie D. Chinn, Baptiste Meunier, Sebastian Stumpner
papers.abstract: We nowcast world trade using machine learning, distinguishing between tree-based methods (random forest, gradient boosting) and their regression-based counterparts (macroeconomic random forest, gradient linear boosting). While much less used in the literature, the latter are found to outperform not only the tree-based techniques, but also more “traditional” linear and non-linear techniques (OLS, Markov-switching, quantile regression). They do so significantly and consistently across different horizons and real-time datasets. To further improve performances when forecasting with machine learning, we propose a flexible three-step approach composed of (step 1) pre-selection, (step 2) factor extraction and (step 3) machine learning regression. We find that both pre-selection and factor extraction significantly improve the accuracy of machine-learning-based predictions. This three-step approach also outperforms workhorse benchmarks, such as a PCA-OLS model, an elastic net, or a dynamic factor model. Finally, on top of high accuracy, the approach is flexible and can be extended seamlessly beyond world trade.
papers.zh_title: 利用机器学习进行世界贸易的即时预测：一种三步法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用机器学习对世界贸易进行即时预测，区分了基于树的方法（随机森林、梯度提升）及其基于回归的对应方法（宏观经济随机森林、梯度线性提升）。尽管后者在文献中使用较少，但我们发现它们不仅优于基于树的技术，也优于更“传统”的线性和非线性技术（普通最小二乘法、马尔可夫转换、分位数回归）。这种优势在不同预测时点和实时数据集中均显著且一致。为了进一步提高机器学习预测的性能，我们提出了一种灵活的三步法，包括（步骤1）预筛选、（步骤2）因子提取和（步骤3）机器学习回归。我们发现，预筛选和因子提取均显著提高了基于机器学习的预测准确性。这种三步法也优于工作基准模型，例如主成分分析-普通最小二乘模型、弹性网络或动态因子模型。最后，除了高准确性外，该方法具有灵活性，并且可以无缝扩展到世界贸易以外的领域。

papers.title: Currency Risk Premiums: A Multi-horizon Perspective
papers.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Magnus Dahlquist
papers.abstract: We review the literature on multi-horizon currency risk premiums. We show how the multi-horizon implications arise from the classic present-value relationship. We further show how these implications manifest themselves in the interaction between bond and currency risk premiums. This link is strengthened by explicitly accounting for stochastic discount factors. Information about currency risk premiums at different horizons presents a wealth of new evidence and challenges for existing models.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：E43, E52, F31, G12, G15
papers.zh_title: 货币风险溢价：多期限视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于多期限货币风险溢价的文献。我们展示了多期限含义如何从经典的现值关系中产生。我们进一步展示了这些含义如何在债券风险溢价与货币风险溢价之间的相互作用中体现出来。通过明确考虑随机贴现因子，这种联系得到了加强。关于不同期限货币风险溢价的信息为现有模型提供了丰富的新证据和挑战。

papers.title: What Caused the US Pandemic-Era Inflation?
papers.authors: Olivier J. Blanchard, Ben S. Bernanke
papers.abstract: We answer the question posed by the title by specifying and estimating a simple dynamic model of prices, wages, and short-run and long-run inflation expectations. The estimated model allows us to analyze the direct and indirect effects of product-market and labor-market shocks on prices and nominal wages and to quantify the sources of U.S. pandemic-era inflation and wage growth. We find that, contrary to early concerns that inflation would be spurred by overheated labor markets, most of the inflation surge that began in 2021 was the result of shocks to prices given wages. These shocks included sharp increases in commodity prices, reflecting strong aggregate demand, and sectoral price spikes, resulting from changes in the level and sectoral composition of demand together with constraints on sectoral supply. However, although tight labor markets have thus far not been the primary driver of inflation, we find that the effects of overheated labor markets on nominal wage growth and inflation are more persistent than the effects of product-market shocks. Controlling inflation will thus ultimately require achieving a better balance between labor demand and labor supply.
papers.zh_title: 是什么导致了美国疫情时期的通货膨胀？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过设定并估计一个包含价格、工资以及短期和长期通胀预期的简单动态模型，来回答标题提出的问题。估计的模型使我们能够分析产品市场和劳动力市场冲击对价格和名义工资的直接和间接影响，并量化美国疫情时期通胀和工资增长的来源。我们发现，与早期关于通胀将由过热劳动力市场引发的担忧相反，始于2021年的通胀飙升大部分是由给定工资下的价格冲击造成的。这些冲击包括反映总需求强劲的大宗商品价格急剧上涨，以及由需求水平和部门构成变化以及部门供给约束导致的部分价格飙升。然而，尽管紧张的劳动力市场迄今尚未成为通胀的主要驱动因素，但我们发现，过热劳动力市场对名义工资增长和通胀的影响比产品市场冲击的影响更持久。因此，控制通胀最终需要实现劳动力需求与劳动力供给之间更好的平衡。

papers.title: Production, Trade, and Cross-Border Data Flows
papers.authors: Qing Chang, Lin William Cong, Liyong Wang, Longtian Zhang
papers.abstract: We build a tractable general equilibrium model to analyze the effects of cross-border data flows and pre-existing development gaps in digital economies on each country’s production and international trade. Raw data as byproducts of consumption can be transformed into various types of working data (information) to be used by both domestic and foreign producers. Because data constitute a new production factor for intermediate goods, a large extant divide in data utilization can reduce or even freeze trade. Cross-border data flows mitigate the situation and improve welfare when added to international trade. Data-light countries where data are less important in production enjoy a “latecomer’s advantage” with international trade and data flows, contributing more raw data from which the data-intensive countries generate knowledge for production. Furthermore, cross-border data flows can reverse the cyclicity of working data usage after productivity shocks, whereas shocks to data privacy or import costs have opposite effects on domestic and foreign data sectors. The insights inform research and policy discussions concerning data divide, data flows, and their implications for trade liberalization, the data labor market, data protection, among others.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：F15, F29, F43
papers.zh_title: 生产、贸易与跨境数据流动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个易于处理的一般均衡模型，以分析跨境数据流动以及数字经济中既有的发展差距对各国生产和国际贸易的影响。作为消费副产品的原始数据可以被转化为各种类型的工作数据（信息），供国内外生产者使用。由于数据构成了中间产品的新生产要素，数据利用方面巨大的现有差距可能会减少甚至冻结贸易。当跨境数据流动被添加到国际贸易中时，它缓解了这种情况并改善了福利。数据在生产中重要性较低的数据轻国家，在贸易和数据流动中享有“后来者优势”，贡献了更多原始数据，数据密集型国家则利用这些数据生成生产所需的知识。此外，跨境数据流动可以在生产率冲击后逆转工作数据使用的周期性，而数据隐私或进口成本的冲击则对国内外数据部门产生相反的影响。这些见解为关于数据鸿沟、数据流动及其对贸易自由化、数据劳动力市场、数据保护等影响的学术研究和政策讨论提供了信息。

papers.title: Concentration, Market Power, and Misallocation: The Role of Endogenous Customer Acquisition
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Andres Drenik, Ryan Kim
papers.abstract: This paper explores how different margins of market share are related to markups. Using merged microdata on producers and consumers, we document that a firm’s market share is mainly related to its number of customers, while its price-cost markup is associated only with its average sales per customer. We develop a new model that reflects this empirical evidence and the endogenous nature of customer acquisition. When calibrated, this model predicts a higher degree of markup dispersion, which suggests greater efficiency losses due to customer misallocation. An analysis of the efficient allocation in this model reveals that compared with the equilibrium, aggregate TFP and output are 10.8% and 14% higher, respectively.
papers.zh_title: 集中度、市场势力与错配：内生客户获取的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了市场份额的不同边际如何与加成率相关联。利用生产者和消费者的合并微观数据，我们记录到，企业的市场份额主要与其客户数量相关，而其价格-成本加成率仅与每位客户的平均销售额相关。我们开发了一个反映这一经验证据以及客户获取内生性质的新模型。在校准后，该模型预测了更高程度的加成率离散度，这表明由于客户错配导致的效率损失更大。对该模型中有效配置的分析显示，与均衡相比，总要素生产率和产出分别高出10.8%和14%。

papers.title: Competitive Capture of Public Opinion
papers.authors: Ricardo Alonso, Gerard Padró I Miquel
papers.abstract: We propose a general equilibrium model where two special interest groups (SIGs) compete to influence public opinion. Citizens with heterogeneous priors over a binary state of the world receive reports drawn from a continuous message space by a variety of sources. The two opposite SIGs attempt to push their own agenda (one SIG to persuade citizens towards one state of the world, the other towards the alternative state of the world) by capturing the messages these sources convey. We characterize the equilibrium level of capture of each source by competing SIGs as well as the equilibrium level of information transmission. We show that capture increases the prevalence of the ex ante most informative messages. As a consequence, rational citizens discount such informative reports. Opposite capturing efforts do not cancel each other and result in a loss of social learning. We show that efforts to capture an information source are strategic substitutes: citizens' skepticism of messages favoring the view of the SIG that is expected to capture that source dampen the incentives of the opposite SIG. Strategic substitution exacerbates horizontal differentiation so the information landscape becomes more polarized. We finally show that increased demand for information when SIGs want to fire up the base can exacerbate differentiation, increase capture, and reduce information transmission in equilibrium.
papers.zh_title: 公众舆论的竞争性俘获
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个一般均衡模型，其中两个特殊利益集团竞争以影响公众舆论。具有关于世界二元状态异质性先验的公民，接收来自多种来源的、从连续信息空间中抽取的报告。两个对立的特殊利益集团试图通过俘获这些来源所传达的信息，来推动各自的议程（一个集团说服公民倾向于一种世界状态，另一个集团则倾向于另一种状态）。我们刻画了竞争性特殊利益集团对每个信息来源的均衡俘获水平，以及均衡的信息传递水平。我们表明，俘获增加了先验最具信息量的信息的普遍性。因此，理性的公民会低估此类信息性报告。对立的俘获努力并不会相互抵消，而是导致社会学习的损失。我们表明，俘获一个信息源的努力是战略替代品：公民对倾向于预期将俘获该来源的特殊利益集团观点的信息的怀疑，抑制了对立特殊利益集团的激励。战略替代加剧了横向分化，因此信息格局变得更加两极分化。最后，我们表明，当特殊利益集团想要激发基本盘时，对信息需求的增加会加剧分化，增加俘获，并减少均衡中的信息传递。
