papers.title: How Good Are Privacy Guarantees? Platform Architecture and Violation of User Privacy
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Alireza Fallah, Ali Makhdoumi, Azarakhsh Malekian, Asuman Ozdaglar
papers.abstract: Many platforms deploy data collected from users for a multitude of purposes. While some are beneficial to users, others are costly to their privacy. The presence of these privacy costs means that platforms may need to provide guarantees about how and to what extent user data will be harvested for activities such as targeted ads, individualized pricing, and sales to third parties. In this paper, we build a multi-stage model in which users decide whether to share their data based on privacy guarantees. We first introduce a novel mask-shuffle mechanism and prove it is Pareto optimal—meaning that it leaks the least about the users’ data for any given leakage about the underlying common parameter. We then show that under any mask-shuffle mechanism, there exists a unique equilibrium in which privacy guarantees balance privacy costs and utility gains from the pooling of user data for purposes such as assessment of health risks or product development. Paradoxically, we show that as users’ value of pooled data increases, the equilibrium of the game leads to lower user welfare. This is because platforms take advantage of this change to reduce privacy guarantees so much that user utility declines (whereas it would have increased with a given mechanism). Even more strikingly, we show that platforms have incentives to choose data architectures that systematically differ from those that are optimal from the user’s point of view. In particular, we identify a class of pivot mechanisms, linking individual privacy to choices by others, which platforms prefer to implement and which make users significantly worse off.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LE, PE；JEL：D62, D83, L86
papers.zh_title: 隐私保障有多好？平台架构与用户隐私侵犯
papers.zh_abstract: 许多平台将从用户收集的数据用于多种目的。虽然有些对用户有益，但其他则损害了用户的隐私。这些隐私成本的存在意味着平台可能需要就用户数据如何以及在多大程度上被用于定向广告、个性化定价和向第三方销售等活动提供保障。在本文中，我们构建了一个多阶段模型，其中用户根据隐私保障决定是否共享其数据。我们首先引入了一种新颖的掩码-洗牌机制，并证明它是帕累托最优的——这意味着对于任何给定的关于潜在共同参数的泄露，它泄露的用户数据最少。然后我们表明，在任何掩码-洗牌机制下，存在一个独特的均衡，其中隐私保障平衡了隐私成本与用户数据汇集带来的效用收益（例如用于健康风险评估或产品开发）。矛盾的是，我们表明，随着用户对汇集数据价值的增加，博弈的均衡导致用户福利降低。这是因为平台利用这种变化大幅降低隐私保障，以至于用户效用下降（而在给定机制下，效用本应增加）。更引人注目的是，我们表明平台有动机选择与用户最优视角系统不同的数据架构。特别是，我们识别出一类枢轴机制，将个人隐私与他人的选择联系起来，平台更倾向于实施这类机制，而这使得用户境况显著恶化。

papers.title: Effects of the Expanded Child Tax Credit on Household Spending: Estimates Based on U.S. Consumer Expenditure Survey Data
papers.authors: Jake Schild, Sophie M. Collyer, Thesia Garner, Neeraj Kaushal, Jiwan Lee, Jane Waldfogel, Christopher T. Wimer
papers.abstract: The Child Tax Credit (CTC) was substantially expanded through the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021, making the benefit more generous, fully refundable, and more periodic. Early studies documented the positive impact of the expanded CTC on reducing poverty and food insufficiency, but there is little research on the impact it had on household spending and, specifically, its impact on child-related spending. We use data from the Consumer Expenditure Interview Survey (CE) and impute CTC payments for all qualifying households to examine whether the expanded CTC increased spending overall, in major categories, and on specific items related to children's education and development. Our findings indicate that families utilized the CTC payments to enhance the well-being of both their children and the entire household. For each $100 of imputed CTC payment, our models show that families spent $75, mainly on food ($28), housing ($31), and child-related goods and services ($15). We also found that the spending response for low-income households, Hispanic households, and non-Hispanic Black households was larger than the spending response of the average household. By analyzing the variation in spending response by race and ethnicity, we are providing policy makers with valuable insights into the experience of marginalized communities.
papers.zh_title: 扩大儿童税收抵免对家庭支出的影响：基于美国消费者支出调查数据的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童税收抵免（CTC）通过2021年《美国救援计划法案》大幅扩大，使福利更加慷慨、完全可退还且更具周期性。早期研究记录了扩大后的CTC在减少贫困和食物不足方面的积极影响，但关于其对家庭支出，特别是对儿童相关支出影响的研究很少。我们使用消费者支出访谈调查（CE）的数据，并为所有符合条件的家庭估算CTC支付额，以检验扩大后的CTC是否增加了总体支出、主要类别支出以及儿童教育和发展相关特定项目的支出。我们的研究结果表明，家庭利用CTC支付提高了其子女和整个家庭的福祉。对于每100美元的估算CTC支付，我们的模型显示家庭花费了75美元，主要用于食品（28美元）、住房（31美元）以及儿童相关商品和服务（15美元）。我们还发现，低收入家庭、西班牙裔家庭和非西班牙裔黑人家庭的支出反应大于普通家庭的支出反应。通过分析不同种族和族裔群体支出反应的差异，我们为政策制定者提供了关于边缘化社区经历的宝贵见解。

papers.title: Praying for Rain
papers.authors: José-Antonio Espín-Sánchez, Salvador Gil-Guirado, Nicholas Ryan
papers.abstract: We study rainmaking as an instrumental religious belief. We present a model in which a religious leader tries to persuade people to believe. Praying for rain can persuade only where the hazard of rainfall during a dry spell is increasing over time, so that prayer is most likely to succeed when people most want rain. We present evidence from prayers for rain in Murcia, Spain, where the hazard rate is increasing, that the church’s prayers for rain predict rainfall over two centuries. To generalize this finding, we gather an original data set of whether ethnic groups around the world traditionally prayed for rain. We find that ethnic groups facing an increasing rainfall hazard are 47% more likely to pray for rain, consistent with our model’s prediction that societies are more likely to pray for rain where prayer is persuasive.
papers.zh_title: 祈雨
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究祈雨作为一种工具性宗教信仰。我们提出了一个模型，其中宗教领袖试图说服人们相信。只有当干旱期间降雨的危险性随时间增加时，祈雨才能具有说服力，这样当人们最需要雨水时，祈祷最有可能成功。我们提供了来自西班牙穆尔西亚祈雨的证据，该地区的危险率正在增加，表明教堂的祈雨在两个世纪内预测了降雨。为了推广这一发现，我们收集了一个原始数据集，了解世界各地的族群是否传统上会祈雨。我们发现，面临降雨危险率增加的族群祈雨的可能性高出47%，这与我们模型的预测一致，即社会更可能在祈祷具有说服力的地方祈雨。

papers.title: The Economics of Tropical Deforestation
papers.authors: Clare A. Balboni, Aaron Berman, Robin Burgess, Benjamin A. Olken
papers.abstract: Two factors have elevated recent academic and policy interest in tropical deforestation: first, the realization that it is a major contributor to climate change; and second, a revolution in satellite-based measurement that has revealed that it is proceeding at a rapid rate. We begin by reviewing the methodological advances that have enabled measurement of forest loss at a fine spatial resolution across the globe. We then develop a simple benchmark model of deforestation based on classic models of natural resource extraction. Extending this approach to incorporate features that characterize deforestation in developing countries---pressure for land use change, significant local and global externalities, weak property rights, and political economy constraints---provides us with a framework for reviewing the fast-growing empirical literature on the economics of deforestation in the tropics. This combination of theory and empirics provides insights not only into the economic drivers and impacts of tropical deforestation but also into policies that may affect its progression. We conclude by identifying areas where more work is needed in this important body of research.
papers.zh_title: 热带森林砍伐的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 两个因素提升了近期对热带森林砍伐的学术和政策兴趣：第一，认识到它是气候变化的主要贡献者；第二，基于卫星的测量革命揭示其正在以快速的速度进行。我们首先回顾了方法论上的进步，这些进步使得在全球范围内以精细空间分辨率测量森林损失成为可能。然后，我们基于自然资源开采的经典模型，开发了一个简单的森林砍伐基准模型。将这种方法扩展到包含发展中国家森林砍伐特征的特征——土地利用变化的压力、显著的本地和全球外部性、薄弱的产权以及政治经济约束——为我们提供了一个框架，用于回顾关于热带森林砍伐经济学的快速增长的实证文献。这种理论与实证的结合不仅提供了对热带森林砍伐的经济驱动因素和影响的见解，也提供了对可能影响其进程的政策的见解。最后，我们指出了在这一重要研究领域中需要更多工作的领域。

papers.title: Choose Your Moments: Peer Review and Scientific Risk Taking
papers.authors: Richard T. Carson, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Jeffrey G. Shrader
papers.abstract: Science funding agencies such as the NIH, NSF, and their counterparts around the world are often criticized for being too conservative, funding incremental innovations over more radical but riskier projects. One explanation for their conservatism is the way the agencies use peer review of scientific proposals. Peer review is the cornerstone of research allocation decisions, but agencies typically base decisions on a simple average of peer review scores. More novel ideas are less likely to gain consistently high ratings across evaluators and are less likely to be funded. Using a discrete choice experiment conducted with a large sample of active biomedical researchers, we find that—in contrast to funding agencies—scientists systematically prefer to fund projects with more reviewer dissensus. Rather than purely focusing on the first moment of the distribution of reviewer scores, they also value the second moment. Further, scientists with the greatest domain expertise on a proposal are more enthusiastic about dissensus, and while appetite for dissensus shrinks as budgets become tighter, it does not disappear completely. Applying our estimates to prior studies mimicking NIH’s review process shows that incorporating expert scientists’ preferences for dissensus would change marginal funding decisions for ten percent of projects worth billions of dollars per year.
papers.zh_title: 选择你的时刻：同行评审与科学风险承担
papers.zh_abstract: 科学资助机构，如NIH、NSF及其世界各地的对应机构，经常因过于保守而受到批评，资助渐进式创新而非更激进但风险更高的项目。对其保守主义的一种解释是这些机构使用同行评审科学提案的方式。同行评审是研究分配决策的基石，但机构通常基于同行评审分数的简单平均值做出决策。更具新颖性的想法不太可能在不同评审者之间获得一致的高评分，因此更不可能获得资助。通过对大量活跃的生物医学研究人员进行离散选择实验，我们发现——与资助机构相反——科学家系统性地倾向于资助评审者意见分歧更大的项目。他们并非纯粹关注评审者分数分布的一阶矩，也重视二阶矩。此外，对某个提案拥有最深厚领域专业知识的科学家对分歧更热情，虽然随着预算收紧，对分歧的偏好会缩小，但并未完全消失。将我们的估计应用于先前模拟NIH评审过程的研究表明，纳入专家科学家对分歧的偏好将改变每年价值数十亿美元的百分之十项目的边际资助决策。

papers.title: Energy and the Environment in Economic History
papers.authors: Karen Clay
papers.abstract: Both energy and the environment are inputs into production, influencing the economy and the overall welfare of the population. While the economy itself has been a central focus of economic history from its inception, energy and the environment have received more limited attention. On the energy side, the relative lack of attention reflects economic historians' focus on labor, capital, and technology. Two areas that have received attention are the effects of energy on the spatial location of economic activity and the importance of coal for the Industrial Revolution. On the environmental side, the relative lack of attention likely reflects the focus on the positive aspects of industrialization and the difficulty of finding data related to air, water, and land pollution. One environmental area that has received attention is water pollution from human waste, which had large mortality impacts, particularly in cities. This essay reviews long run trends in energy use and water and air pollution and then turns to the energy and environmental literatures in economic history. The conclusion offers some thoughts regarding opportunities for further research in energy and the environment.
papers.zh_title: 经济史中的能源与环境
papers.zh_abstract: 能源和环境都是生产的投入要素，影响着经济和人口的总体福利。虽然经济本身自经济史诞生以来一直是其核心焦点，但能源和环境受到的关注较为有限。在能源方面，相对缺乏关注反映了经济史学家对劳动力、资本和技术的关注。已受到关注的两个领域是能源对经济活动空间位置的影响以及煤炭对工业革命的重要性。在环境方面，相对缺乏关注可能反映了对工业化积极方面的关注以及寻找与空气、水和土地污染相关数据的困难。一个已受到关注的环境领域是人类排泄物造成的水污染，它对死亡率产生了巨大影响，尤其是在城市。本文回顾了能源使用以及水和空气污染的长期趋势，然后转向经济史中的能源和环境文献。结论部分就能源与环境领域进一步研究的机会提出了一些想法。

papers.title: Enhancing Human Capital in Children: A Case Study on Scaling
papers.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Ciro Avitabile, Matteo Bobba
papers.abstract: This paper provides novel insights into the science of scaling by examining an educational mentoring program in Mexico. The analysis encompasses two independent field experiments, and seizes a unique opportunity to learn from the government's implementation of the same intervention. While the program originally implemented at scale demonstrates limited effectiveness, the introduction of a new modality with enhanced mentor training significantly improves children's outcomes. Mentor-parent interactions are found to stimulate parental engagement at the community-school level, which emerges as a critical factor for the scalability of the program. Our findings offer compelling evidence on the socially determined drivers of education interventions at scale.
papers.zh_title: 增强儿童人力资本：关于规模化的案例研究
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过考察墨西哥的一个教育指导项目，为规模化科学提供了新颖的见解。该分析涵盖了两个独立的现场实验，并抓住了从政府实施相同干预中学习的独特机会。虽然最初大规模实施的项目效果有限，但引入一种具有增强导师培训的新模式显著改善了儿童的结果。研究发现，导师与家长的互动激发了家长在社区学校层面的参与，这成为项目可规模化性的关键因素。我们的发现提供了关于大规模教育干预的社会决定因素的令人信服的证据。

papers.title: Sibling Spillovers May Enhance the Efficacy of Targeted School Policies
papers.authors: David N. Figlio, Krzysztof Karbownik, Umut Özek
papers.abstract: Public policies often target individuals but within-family externalities of such interventions are understudied. Using a regression discontinuity design, we document how a third grade retention policy affects both the target children and their younger siblings. The policy improves test scores of both children while the spillover is up to 30% of the target child effect size. The effects are particularly pronounced in families where one of the children is disabled, for boys, and in immigrant families. Candidate mechanisms include improved classroom inputs and parental school choice.
papers.zh_title: 兄弟姐妹溢出效应可能增强针对性学校政策的效力
papers.zh_abstract: 公共政策通常针对个人，但此类干预措施的家庭内部外部性研究不足。使用断点回归设计，我们记录了一项三年级留级政策如何影响目标儿童及其弟弟妹妹。该政策提高了两个孩子的考试成绩，而溢出效应高达目标儿童效应量的30%。这种效应在有一个孩子残疾的家庭、男孩以及移民家庭中尤为显著。候选机制包括改善的课堂投入和家长的学校选择。

papers.title: The Dollar in an Era of International Retrenchment
papers.authors: Ryan Chahrour, Rosen Valchev
papers.abstract: This paper uses a quantitative theory to explore whether escalating geoeconomic conflict and protectionism could threaten the dominant role of the US dollar in the international monetary system. The theory emphasizes the joint determination of countries’ portfolio choices and the currency used for financing international trade, and introduces the Chinese yuan as a potential competitor to the dollar. We find that even a substantial increase in trade tariffs and protectionism would not change the dollar’s dominant role. However, policies directly supporting the yuan’s international use could end the dollar’s dominance if implemented for more than a decade. US economic sanctions on a substantial portion of dollar assets held abroad also pose a threat, but only if maintained for more than 15 years. If competing trading blocs substantively eliminated trade across blocs, a regime with bloc-specific dominant currencies becomes likely.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E44, F02, F33, F41, G15
papers.zh_title: 国际收缩时代的美元
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用定量理论探讨不断升级的地缘经济冲突和保护主义是否可能威胁美元在国际货币体系中的主导地位。该理论强调国家投资组合选择与国际贸易融资所用货币的共同决定，并引入人民币作为美元的潜在竞争对手。我们发现，即使贸易关税和保护主义大幅增加，也不会改变美元的主导地位。然而，直接支持人民币国际使用的政策如果实施超过十年，可能终结美元的主导地位。美国对海外持有的大量美元资产实施经济制裁也构成威胁，但前提是维持超过15年。如果相互竞争的贸易集团实质性地消除了跨集团贸易，那么出现以集团特定主导货币为特征的体制就变得可能。

papers.title: Who's on (the 1040) First? Determinants and Consequences of Spouses' Name Order on Joint Returns
papers.authors: Emily Y. Lin, Joel Slemrod, Evelyn A. Smith, Alexander Yuskavage
papers.abstract: Married couples filing a joint return put the male name first 88.1% of the time in tax year 2020, down from 97.3% in 1996. The man’s name is more likely to go first the larger is the fraction of the couple’s allocable income that goes to him, and the older is the couple. Based on state averages, putting the man’s name first is strongly associated with conservative political attitudes, religiosity, and a survey-based measure of sexist attitudes. Risk-taking and tax noncompliance are both associated with the man’s name going first.
papers.zh_title: 谁的名字排在（1040表格）前面？联合报税中配偶姓名顺序的决定因素与后果
papers.zh_abstract: 在2020纳税年度，已婚夫妇联合报税时，男性姓名排在首位的情况占88.1%，低于1996年的97.3%。男性姓名更可能排在首位的情况是：男性在夫妇可分配收入中所占份额越大，以及夫妇年龄越大。基于各州平均水平，将男性姓名排在首位与保守政治态度、宗教信仰以及一项基于调查的性别歧视态度指标密切相关。冒险行为和税务不合规行为也与男性姓名排在首位相关。

papers.title: Bridging the Gap: Mismatch Effects and Catch-Up Dynamics in a Brazilian College Affirmative Action
papers.authors: Rodrigo Oliveira, Alei Santos, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: Affirmative action in higher education can lead to mismatch, where students admitted through preferential treatment struggle academically due to inadequate preparation before college. Although some students may face initial challenges, by providing access to quality education for talented individuals who might have otherwise been overlooked due to systemic disadvantages, these programs may enable students to bridge the gap and catch up to their peers. In this study, we examine the effects of a quota-type affirmative action policy on gaps in college outcomes between potential beneficiaries and non-beneficiaries. Using comprehensive administrative data from a leading Brazilian university which implemented affirmative action in 2005, we find that compared to their non-quota peers, potential quota beneficiaries are less likely to progress smoothly through college and less likely to graduate, a result that is mostly driven by those who would not be admitted to the university otherwise. Notably, however, most of these differences shrink as the students progress through college, suggesting a catch-up effect between those groups. While potential quota students initially face challenges, resulting in a reduced course load in their early college years, they compensate by taking more credits in later years to ultimately graduate.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：I23, I24, I28, J15
papers.zh_title: 弥合差距：巴西大学平权行动中的错配效应与追赶动态
papers.zh_abstract: 高等教育中的平权行动可能导致错配，即通过优惠待遇录取的学生因大学前准备不足而在学业上遇到困难。尽管一些学生可能面临初始挑战，但通过为那些因系统性劣势而可能被忽视的有才华个体提供优质教育机会，这些项目可能使学生弥合差距并追赶同龄人。在本研究中，我们考察了配额型平权行动政策对潜在受益者与非受益者之间大学成果差距的影响。利用一所巴西顶尖大学（该大学于2005年实施平权行动）的全面行政数据，我们发现，与非配额学生相比，潜在配额受益者更不可能顺利升入大学并毕业，这一结果主要由那些原本不会被该大学录取的学生驱动。然而，值得注意的是，随着学生升入高年级，这些差异大多缩小，表明这些群体之间存在追赶效应。虽然潜在配额学生最初面临挑战，导致他们在大学早期减少课程负担，但他们通过在高年级修读更多学分来弥补，最终得以毕业。

papers.title: Foreign Residents and the Future of Global Cities
papers.authors: Joao Guerreiro, Sergio Rebelo, Pedro Teles, Miguel Godinho de Matos
papers.abstract: Global cities are attracting a growing number of tourists and foreign residents. This influx generates capital gains for property owners but adversely affects renters, creating potentially important production, congestion, and amenities externalities. We study the optimal policy regarding local and foreign residents in a model with key features emphasized in policy debates. Using this model, we provide sufficient statistics to calculate the optimal tax and transfer policies that internalize agglomeration, congestion, and other potential externalities. We find that it is not optimal to impose zoning regulations or to restrict, tax, or subsidize home purchases by foreign residents. However, it may be optimal to charge an entry fee to foreign residents.
papers.zh_title: 外国居民与全球城市的未来
papers.zh_abstract: 全球城市正在吸引越来越多的游客和外国居民。这种涌入为房产所有者带来资本收益，但对租房者产生不利影响，并可能产生重要的生产、拥堵和便利设施外部性。我们在一个包含政策辩论中强调的关键特征的模型中，研究针对本地和外国居民的最优政策。利用该模型，我们提供了充分统计量来计算最优税收和转移支付政策，这些政策能够内化集聚、拥堵和其他潜在外部性。我们发现，实施分区法规或限制、征税或补贴外国居民购房并非最优选择。然而，对外国居民收取入场费可能是最优的。

papers.title: Policy Uncertainty Reduces Green Investment
papers.authors: Mengyu Wang, Jeffrey Wurgler, Hong Zhang
papers.abstract: Government subsidies are often used to stimulate environment-friendly investment. We find that Chinese firms reduce green investment as the uncertainty of subsidies rises. This effect is identified from weather-driven fluctuations in air pollution that lead to fluctuations in subsidy allocations: Firms in cities where weather-driven subsidy uncertainty is high engage in less green R&D investment, patent applications, and research staff. Industries that are heavy emitters and those focused on environmental technologies are more affected. The results suggest that policy uncertainty may originate not only from political and macroeconomic shocks but from behavioral mechanisms that link policy to salient recent conditions.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, PE, PR；JEL：D8, O13, O3
papers.zh_title: 政策不确定性减少绿色投资
papers.zh_abstract: 政府补贴常被用于刺激环境友好型投资。我们发现，随着补贴不确定性上升，中国企业会减少绿色投资。这一效应通过天气驱动的空气污染波动（导致补贴分配波动）得以识别：在天气驱动的补贴不确定性较高的城市，企业从事的绿色研发投资、专利申请和研究人员数量较少。高排放行业以及专注于环境技术的行业受影响更大。结果表明，政策不确定性不仅可能源于政治和宏观经济冲击，还可能源于将政策与近期显著条件联系起来的行为机制。

papers.title: How Replaceable Is a Low-Wage Job?
papers.authors: Evan K. Rose, Yotam Shem-Tov
papers.abstract: We study the long-run consequences of losing a low-wage job using linked employer-employee wage records and household surveys. For full-time workers earning $15 per hour or less, job loss due to an idiosyncratic, firm-wide contraction generates a 13% reduction in earnings six years later and over $40,000 cumulative lost earnings. Most of the long-run decrease stems from reductions in employment and hours as opposed to wage rates: job losers are twice as likely to report being unemployed and looking for work. By contrast, workers initially earning $15-$30 per hour see comparable long-run earnings losses driven primarily by reductions in hourly wages. Calibrating a dynamic job ladder model to the estimates implies that the rents from holding a full-time $15 per hour job relative to unemployment are worth about $20,000, more than seven times monthly earnings.
papers.zh_title: 低薪工作的可替代性有多高？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的雇主-雇员工资记录和家庭调查，研究了失去低薪工作的长期后果。对于时薪15美元或以下的全职工作者，因企业层面的特异性收缩而导致的失业，会在六年后造成13%的收入减少，以及超过40,000美元的累计收入损失。长期下降主要源于就业和工时的减少，而非工资率：失业者报告失业并正在找工作的可能性是原来的两倍。相比之下，初始时薪在15至30美元之间的工作者，其长期收入损失相当，但主要由小时工资的下降驱动。将动态工作阶梯模型校准到这些估计值，意味着相对于失业，拥有一份时薪15美元的全职工作所带来的租金价值约为20,000美元，超过月收入的七倍。

papers.title: (Breaking) Intergenerational Transmission of Mental Health
papers.authors: Aline Bütikofer, Rita Ginja, Krzysztof Karbownik, Fanny Landaud
papers.abstract: We estimate health associations across generations and dynasties using information on healthcare visits from administrative data for the entire Norwegian population. A parental mental health diagnosis is associated with a 9.3 percentage point (40%) higher probability of a mental health diagnosis of their adolescent child. Intensive margin physical and mental health associations are similar, and dynastic estimates account for about 40% of the intergenerational persistence. We also show that a policy targeting additional health resources for the young children of adults diagnosed with mental health conditions reduced the parent-child mental health association by about 40%.
papers.zh_title: （打破）心理健康的代际传递
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用挪威全国人口的行政数据中的医疗就诊信息，估计了跨代和跨世系的健康关联。父母有心理健康诊断，其青少年子女被诊断出心理健康问题的概率会高出9.3个百分点（40%）。在集约边际上，身体健康和心理健康关联相似，而世系估计解释了代际持续性的约40%。我们还表明，一项针对有心理健康诊断成年人的年幼子女提供额外健康资源的政策，将亲子心理健康关联降低了约40%。

papers.title: The Effects of Cryptocurrency Wealth on Household Consumption and Investment
papers.authors: Darren Aiello, Scott R. Baker, Tetyana Balyuk, Marco Di Maggio, Mark J. Johnson, Jason D. Kotter
papers.abstract: This paper uses transaction-level data across millions of accounts to identify cryptocurrency investors and evaluate how fluctuations in individual crypto wealth affect household consumption, equity investment, and local real estate markets. We estimate an MPC out of unrealized crypto gains that is more than double the MPC out of unrealized equity gains but smaller than the MPC from exogenous cash flow shocks. This MPC is mostly driven by increases in cash/check spending and mortgages. Moreover, households sell crypto to increase both discretionary as well as housing spending. As a result, crypto wealth causes house price appreciation—counties with higher crypto wealth see higher growth in home values following high crypto returns. Our results indicate that cryptocurrencies have substantial spillover effects on the real economy through consumption and investment into other asset classes.
papers.zh_title: 加密货币财富对家庭消费和投资的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用数百万账户的交易级数据来识别加密货币投资者，并评估个人加密货币财富波动如何影响家庭消费、股权投资和当地房地产市场。我们估计出，来自未实现加密货币收益的边际消费倾向（MPC）是来自未实现股票收益MPC的两倍多，但小于来自外生现金流冲击的MPC。这种MPC主要由现金/支票支出和抵押贷款的增加驱动。此外，家庭出售加密货币以增加可自由支配支出和住房支出。因此，加密货币财富导致房价上涨——在加密货币回报率高之后，加密货币财富较高的县房价增长更快。我们的结果表明，加密货币通过消费和对其他资产类别的投资，对实体经济产生了显著的溢出效应。

papers.title: Getting the Right Tail Right: Modeling Tails of Health Expenditure Distributions
papers.authors: Martin Karlsson, Yulong Wang, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
papers.abstract: Health expenditure data almost always include extreme values, implying that the underlying distribution has heavy tails. This may result in infinite variances as well as higher-order moments and bias the commonly used least squares methods. To accommodate extreme values, we propose an estimation method that recovers the right tail of health expenditure distributions. It extends the popular two-part model to develop a novel three-part model. We apply the proposed method to claims data from one of the biggest German private health insurers. Our findings show that the estimated age gradient in health care spending differs substantially from the standard least squares method.
papers.zh_title: 正确拟合右尾：健康支出分布尾部的建模
papers.zh_abstract: 健康支出数据几乎总是包含极端值，这意味着其潜在分布具有厚尾。这可能导致方差和高阶矩无穷大，并使常用的最小二乘法产生偏差。为了适应极端值，我们提出了一种恢复健康支出分布右尾的估计方法。它将流行的两部分模型扩展为一种新颖的三部分模型。我们将所提出的方法应用于德国最大私人健康保险公司之一的索赔数据。我们的研究结果表明，估计的医疗支出年龄梯度与标准最小二乘法存在显著差异。

papers.title: Instrumental Variable Methods Reconcile Intention-to-Screen Effects Across Pragmatic Cancer Screening Trials
papers.authors: Joshua Angrist, Peter Hull
papers.abstract: Pragmatic cancer screening trials mimic real-world scenarios in which patients and doctors are the ultimate arbiters of treatment. Intention-to-screen (ITS) analyses of such trials maintain randomization-based apples-to-apples comparisons, but differential adherence (the failure of subjects assigned to screening to actually get screened) makes ITS effects hard to compare across trials and sites. We show how instrumental variables (IV) methods address the nonadherence challenge in a comparison of estimates from 17 sites in five randomized trials measuring screening effects on colorectal cancer incidence. While adherence rates and ITS estimates vary widely across and within trials, IV estimates of per-protocol screening effects are remarkably consistent. An application of simple IV tools, including graphical analysis and formal statistical tests, shows how differential adherence explains variation in ITS impact. Screening compliers are also shown to have similar demographic characteristics to those of the full trial study sample. These findings argue for the clinical relevance of IV estimates of cancer screening effects.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：C21, C26, C93, I12
papers.zh_title: 工具变量方法调和实用主义癌症筛查试验中的意向筛查效应
papers.zh_abstract: 实用主义癌症筛查试验模拟真实世界场景，其中患者和医生是治疗的最终决定者。对此类试验的意向筛查分析保持了基于随机化的同类比较，但依从性差异（被分配至筛查组的受试者实际未接受筛查）使得意向筛查效应难以在不同试验和试验点之间进行比较。我们展示了工具变量方法如何解决非依从性挑战，通过比较来自五项随机试验中17个试验点的估计值，这些试验测量了筛查对结直肠癌发病率的影响。虽然依从率和意向筛查估计值在试验内部和试验之间差异很大，但按方案筛查效应的工具变量估计值却惊人地一致。应用简单的工具变量工具，包括图形分析和正式统计检验，显示了依从性差异如何解释意向筛查效应的变化。此外，筛查依从者的人口统计学特征与完整试验研究样本相似。这些发现论证了癌症筛查效应的工具变量估计的临床相关性。

papers.title: Pack-Crack-Pack: Gerrymandering with Differential Turnout
papers.authors: Laurent Bouton, Garance Genicot, Micael Castanheira, Allison L. Stashko
papers.abstract: This paper studies the manipulation of electoral maps by political parties, commonly referred to as gerrymandering. At the core of our analysis is the recognition that not all inhabitants of a district vote. This is important for gerrymandering as districts must have the same population size, but only voters matter for electoral outcomes. We propose a model of gerrymandering that allows for heterogeneity in voter turnout across individuals. This model reveals a new strategy for the gerrymanderers: the pattern is to pack-crack-pack along the turnout dimension. Specifically, parties benefit from packing low-turnout supporters and high-turnout opponents, while creating cracked districts that combine moderate-to-high-turnout supporters with lower-turnout opponents. These findings yield testable empirical implications about the relationship between partisan support, turnout rates, and electoral maps. Using a novel empirical strategy based on comparing maps proposed by Democrats and Republicans during the 2020 U.S. redistricting cycle, we test these predictions and find supporting evidence.
papers.zh_title: 打包-拆分-打包：基于差异化投票率的选区划分
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究政党对选举地图的操纵，通常称为选区划分。我们分析的核心是认识到并非所有选区居民都会投票。这对选区划分很重要，因为选区必须拥有相同的人口规模，但只有选民才对选举结果至关重要。我们提出了一个允许个体间投票率异质性的选区划分模型。该模型揭示了选区划分者的一种新策略：模式是沿着投票率维度进行打包-拆分-打包。具体而言，政党受益于将低投票率的支持者与高投票率的反对者打包在一起，同时创建将中等至高投票率支持者与较低投票率反对者相结合的拆分选区。这些发现产生了关于党派支持、投票率和选举地图之间关系的可检验实证含义。利用基于比较2020年美国选区重划周期中民主党和共和党提出的地图的新颖实证策略，我们检验了这些预测并找到了支持性证据。

papers.title: Policy Diffusion Through Elections
papers.authors: Hitoshi Shigeoka, Yasutora Watanabe
papers.abstract: Staggered difference-in-differences designs are pervasive in policy evaluations but little is known about the mechanisms of policy diffusion: How and why do such policies spread across jurisdictions? In this study, we highlight the role of elections in policy diffusion in settings where municipal elections are asynchronous due to historical reasons. First, we empirically show the presence of policy diffusion using neighbors’ election cycles as instruments for neighbors’ policy adoption. Second, we further demonstrate interactions of municipalities’ election cycles with neighbors’ adoption and show that they follow neighbors’ policy only during their own election timing, indicating that policy diffuses through elections.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, POL；JEL：D04, D78, H73, H75
papers.zh_title: 通过选举的政策扩散
papers.zh_abstract: 交错双重差分设计在政策评估中普遍存在，但关于政策扩散的机制知之甚少：这些政策如何以及为何在辖区间传播？在本研究中，我们强调了选举在政策扩散中的作用，背景是市政选举因历史原因而不同步。首先，我们利用邻居的选举周期作为邻居政策采纳的工具变量，实证展示了政策扩散的存在。其次，我们进一步展示了市政选举周期与邻居政策采纳的交互作用，并表明市政当局仅在其自身选举时机跟随邻居的政策，这表明政策通过选举进行扩散。

papers.title: Law-Abiding Immigrants: The Incarceration Gap Between Immigrants and the US-born, 1870–2020
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Elisa Jácome, Santiago Pérez, Juan David Torres
papers.abstract: We provide the first nationally representative long-run series (1870–2020) of incarceration rates for immigrants and the US-born. As a group, immigrants have had lower incarceration rates than the US-born for 150 years. Moreover, relative to the US-born, immigrants’ incarceration rates have declined since 1960: immigrants today are 60% less likely to be incarcerated (30% relative to US-born whites). This relative decline occurred among immigrants from all regions and cannot be explained by changes in immigrants’ observable characteristics or immigration policy. Instead, the decline is part of a broader divergence of outcomes between less-educated immigrants and their US-born counterparts.
papers.zh_title: 守法的移民：1870-2020年移民与美国本土出生者之间的监禁率差距
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了首个具有全国代表性的移民和美国本土出生者监禁率长期序列（1870-2020年）。作为一个群体，移民在150年间一直拥有比美国本土出生者更低的监禁率。此外，相对于美国本土出生者，移民的监禁率自1960年以来有所下降：如今的移民被监禁的可能性低60%（相对于美国本土出生的白人低30%）。这种相对下降发生在来自所有地区的移民中，并且不能由移民可观测特征或移民政策的变化来解释。相反，这种下降是受教育程度较低的移民与其美国本土出生同龄人之间结果更广泛分化的一部分。

papers.title: Time Use, College Attainment, and The Working-from-Home Revolution
papers.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan
papers.abstract: I demonstrate that the profound change in working from home (WFH) in the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic is concentrated among individuals with college degrees. Relative to 2015-19, the number of minutes worked from home on “post-pandemic” (August 2021-December 2022) weekdays increased by 78 minutes for college graduates; for non-graduates, it was 22 minutes. The share of work done at home (for those who worked at all) increased by 22% for graduates and 7% for non-graduates. Average minutes worked changed little for either group. Daily time spent traveling (e.g., commuting) fell by 21 minutes for college graduates and 6 minutes for non-graduates. I examine how time-use patterns change for college graduates relative to non-graduates over the same period. College graduates experience a relative shift from eating out to eating at home, an increase in free time, and an increase in time spent with children, with the latter effect being concentrated among fathers. Thus, while the gender gap in childcare among college graduates may be diminished by the WFH revolution, gaps in children’s outcomes by parents’ college attainment may be exacerbated by it.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS；JEL：I12, I24, J22, J24, J32
papers.zh_title: 时间利用、大学学历与居家办公革命
papers.zh_abstract: 我证明了COVID-19大流行后居家办公的深刻变化集中在拥有大学学历的个体中。相对于2015-19年，在“后疫情”时期（2021年8月至2022年12月）的工作日，大学毕业生居家工作的时间增加了78分钟；对于非毕业生，这一数字为22分钟。居家工作占全部工作时间的比例（对于任何有工作的人）在毕业生中增加了22%，在非毕业生中增加了7%。两组人群的平均工作分钟数变化不大。每日用于出行（例如通勤）的时间在大学毕业生中减少了21分钟，在非毕业生中减少了6分钟。我考察了同期大学毕业生相对于非毕业生的时间利用模式变化。大学毕业生经历了从外出就餐向在家就餐的相对转变，空闲时间增加，以及与孩子相处的时间增加，后一种效应集中在父亲身上。因此，虽然大学毕业生中育儿方面的性别差距可能因居家办公革命而缩小，但父母大学学历差异导致的子女结果差距可能因此加剧。

papers.title: Political Preferences and Transport Infrastructure: Evidence from California’s High-Speed Rail
papers.authors: Pablo D. Fajgelbaum, Cecile Gaubert, Nicole Gorton, Eduardo Morales, Edouard Schaal
papers.abstract: We study how political preferences shaped California’s High-Speed Rail (CHSR), a large transportation project approved by referendum in 2008. Voters’ support responded significantly to the projected economic gains in their tract of residence, as measured by a quantitative model of high-speed rail matched to CHSR plans. Given this response, a revealed-preference approach comparing the proposed network with alternative designs identifies strong planner’s preferences for political support. The optimal politically-blind design would have placed the stations nearer to California’s dense metro areas, where it was harder to sway votes, thus increasing the projected economic gains.
papers.zh_title: 政治偏好与交通基础设施：来自加州高铁的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究政治偏好如何塑造了加州高铁项目，这是一个在2008年通过公投批准的大型交通项目。选民的支持对其居住区预计的经济收益反应显著，这些收益通过一个与加州高铁计划相匹配的高铁定量模型来衡量。鉴于这种反应，一种比较拟议网络与替代设计的显示性偏好方法，识别出规划者对政治支持的强烈偏好。最优的无政治偏见设计本应将车站更靠近加州人口密集的大都市区，但在这些地区更难争取选票，从而增加了预计的经济收益。

papers.title: Certification and Recertification in Welfare Programs: What Happens When Automation Goes Wrong?
papers.authors: Derek Wu, Bruce D. Meyer
papers.abstract: How do administrative burdens influence enrollment in different welfare programs? Who is screened out at a given stage? This paper studies the impacts of increased administrative burdens associated with the automation of welfare caseworker assistance, leveraging a unique natural experiment in Indiana in which the IBM Corporation remotely processed applications for two-thirds of all counties. Using linked administrative records covering nearly 3 million program recipients, the results show that SNAP, TANF, and Medicaid enrollments fell by 15%, 24%, and 4% one year after automation, with these heterogeneous declines largely attributable to cross-program differences in recertification costs. Earlier-treated and higher-poverty counties experienced larger declines in welfare receipt. More needy individuals were screened out at exit while less needy individuals were screened out at entry, a novel distinction that would be missed by typical measures of targeting which focus on average changes overall. The decline in Medicaid enrollment exhibited considerable permanence after IBM's automated system was disbanded, suggesting potential long-term consequences of increased administrative burdens.
papers.zh_title: 福利项目中的认证与再认证：当自动化出错时会发生什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 行政负担如何影响不同福利项目的注册？谁在特定阶段被筛选出去？本文研究了与福利个案工作者协助自动化相关的行政负担增加的影响，利用印第安纳州一个独特的自然实验，其中IBM公司远程处理了三分之二县的申请。使用涵盖近300万项目受助人的关联行政记录，结果显示，在自动化一年后，SNAP、TANF和Medicaid的注册人数分别下降了15%、24%和4%，这些异质性下降很大程度上可归因于跨项目再认证成本的差异。较早处理且贫困率较高的县福利领取下降幅度更大。更贫困的个体在退出时被筛选出去，而较不贫困的个体在进入时被筛选出去，这是一个新颖的区别，如果仅关注总体平均变化的典型目标定位衡量指标，将会遗漏这一点。在IBM的自动化系统解散后，Medicaid注册人数的下降表现出显著的持久性，这表明行政负担增加可能产生长期后果。

papers.title: Access and Exposure to Local News Media in the Digital Era: Evidence from U.S. Media Markets
papers.authors: Minji Bang, Lucie L'Heude, Andrew Postlewaite, Holger Sieg
papers.abstract: Using a new comprehensive survey of adults in large U.S. media markets we show that minority and low-skill individuals, who are heavily exposed to shocks to the local economy, typically have stronger preferences for and stronger ex- posure to local news than high-skill and white individuals. At the same time, these disadvantaged individuals have been negatively affected by the impact of the digital revolution on news provision. In particular, high-skill and white indi- viduals have more rapidly embraced online and social media while low-skill and minority individuals still heavily rely on local television and other traditional news providers. These differences in provider choices are important because the digital revolution has reduced the quality of traditional news providers while the quality and quantity of online and social media have substantially in- creased. To gain additional insights into the welfare consequence of the digital revolution and assess potential policy interventions, we develop and estimate a model of news production and demand for local news. Our model is based on a time-allocation, discrete bundle-choice framework. Our findings suggest that the loss of the local newspaper (television) reduces welfare on average by $923 ($1064) which is well above the annual subscription costs in most markets. Finally, we study policies that subsidize online or social media to offset the loss of the local newspaper or television station.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PE, POL；JEL：C0, L0, P0, R0
papers.zh_title: 数字时代地方新闻媒体的获取与接触：来自美国媒体市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一项针对美国大型媒体市场成年人的新综合调查，我们显示少数族裔和低技能个体（他们深受地方经济冲击的影响）通常比高技能和白人个体对地方新闻有更强的偏好和更强的接触。同时，这些弱势个体受到了数字革命对新闻供应影响的负面冲击。特别是，高技能和白人个体更迅速地接受了在线和社交媒体，而低技能和少数族裔个体仍然严重依赖地方电视和其他传统新闻提供商。这些提供商选择的差异很重要，因为数字革命降低了传统新闻提供商的质量，而在线和社交媒体的质量和数量则大幅提升。为了更深入地了解数字革命的福利后果并评估潜在的政策干预，我们开发并估计了一个新闻生产与地方新闻需求模型。我们的模型基于一个时间分配、离散捆绑选择框架。我们的发现表明，地方报纸（电视）的消失平均会减少923美元（1064美元）的福利，这远高于大多数市场的年度订阅成本。最后，我们研究了补贴在线或社交媒体以弥补地方报纸或电视台消失的政策。

papers.title: The Incidence of Adverse Selection: Theory and Evidence from Health Insurance Choices
papers.authors: Michael Geruso, Timothy Layton, Adam Leive
papers.abstract: Existing research on selection in insurance markets focuses on how adverse selection distorts prices and misallocates products across people. This ignores the distributional consequences of who pays the higher prices. In this paper, we show that the distributional incidence depends on the correlations between income, expected costs, and insurance demand. We discuss the general implications for the design of subsidies and mandates when policymakers value both equity and efficiency. Then, in an empirical case study of a large employer, we show that the incidence of selection falls on higher-income employees, who are more likely to choose generous health insurance plans.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：D31, D8, D82, H22, I13
papers.zh_title: 逆向选择的负担：来自健康保险选择的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 现有关于保险市场选择的研究主要关注逆向选择如何扭曲价格并在人群中错误配置产品，这忽略了谁承担更高价格所带来的分配后果。本文表明，分配负担取决于收入、预期成本与保险需求之间的相关性。我们讨论了当政策制定者同时重视公平与效率时，这对补贴和强制参保设计的普遍意义。随后，在一家大型雇主的实证案例研究中，我们发现选择的负担落在了高收入员工身上，他们更倾向于选择更慷慨的健康保险计划。

papers.title: White Flight from Asian Immigration: Evidence from California Public Schools
papers.authors: Leah Platt Boustan, Christine Cai, Tammy Tseng
papers.abstract: Asian Americans are the fastest-growing racial group in the US but we know little about how Asian immigration has affected cities, neighborhoods and schools. This paper studies white flight from Asian arrivals in high-socioeconomic-status Californian school districts from 2000-2016 using initial settlement patterns and national immigrant flows to instrument for entry. We find that, as Asian students arrive, white student enrollment declines in higher-income suburbs. These patterns cannot be fully explained by racial animus, housing prices, or correlations with Black/Hispanic arrivals. Parental fears of academic competition may play a role.
papers.zh_title: 亚裔移民引发的白人逃离：来自加州公立学校的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 亚裔美国人是美国增长最快的种族群体，但我们对亚裔移民如何影响城市、社区和学校知之甚少。本文利用初始定居模式和国家移民流量作为工具变量，研究了2000-2016年间加州高社会经济地位学区中亚裔涌入导致的白人逃离现象。我们发现，随着亚裔学生的到来，高收入郊区的白人学生入学率下降。这些模式无法完全由种族敌意、房价或与黑人和西语裔学生涌入的相关性来解释。家长对学业竞争的担忧可能起到了一定作用。

papers.title: Price Level and Inflation Dynamics in Heterogeneous Agent Economies
papers.authors: Greg Kaplan, Georgios Nikolakoudis, Giovanni L. Violante
papers.abstract: We study equilibria in a heterogeneous-agent incomplete-market economy with nominal government debt and flexible prices. Unlike in representative agent economies, steady-state equilibria exist when the government runs persistent deficits, provided that the level of deficits is not too large. In these equilibria, the real interest rate is below the growth rate of the economy. We quantify the maximum sustainable deficit for the US and show that it is lower under more redistributive tax and transfer systems. With constant primary deficits, there exist two steady-states, and the price level and inflation are not uniquely determined. We describe alternative policy settings that deliver uniqueness. We conduct quantitative experiments to illustrate how redistribution and precautionary saving amplify price level increases in response to fiscal helicopter drops, deficit expansions, and loose monetary policy. We show that rising primary deficits can account for a decline in the long-run real interest rate, leading to higher inflation for any given monetary policy. Our work highlights the role of household heterogeneity and market incompleteness in determining inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E3, E4, E5, E6, H2, H3
papers.zh_title: 异质性主体经济中的价格水平与通胀动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了存在名义政府债务和灵活价格的异质性主体不完全市场经济中的均衡。与代表性主体经济不同，当政府持续存在赤字且赤字水平不太高时，稳态均衡存在。在这些均衡中，实际利率低于经济增长率。我们量化了美国的最大可持续赤字，并表明在更具再分配性的税收和转移支付体系下，这一赤字更低。在恒定基本赤字下，存在两个稳态，价格水平和通胀并非唯一确定。我们描述了能够实现唯一性的替代政策设定。我们进行了定量实验，以说明再分配和预防性储蓄如何放大财政直升机撒钱、赤字扩张和宽松货币政策带来的价格水平上升。我们表明，上升的基本赤字可以解释长期实际利率的下降，从而在任何给定货币政策下导致更高的通胀。我们的工作强调了家庭异质性和市场不完全性在决定通胀中的作用。

papers.title: What Did UWE Do for Economics?
papers.authors: Tatyana Avilova, Claudia Goldin
papers.abstract: Economics is among the most popular undergraduate majors. However, even at the best research universities and liberal arts colleges men outnumber women by two to one, and overall there are about 2.5 males to every female economics major. The Undergraduate Women in Economics (UWE) Challenge was begun in 2015 for one year as a randomized controlled trial with 20 treatment and 68 control schools to evaluate the impact of light-touch interventions to recruit and retain female economics majors. Treatment schools received funding, guidance, and access to networking with other treatment schools to implement programs such as providing better information about the application of economics, exposing students to role models, and updating course content and pedagogy. Using 2001-2021 data from the Integrated Postsecondary Education Data System (IPEDS) on graduating BAs, we find that UWE was effective in increasing the fraction of female BAs who majored in economics relative to men in liberal arts colleges. Large universities did not show an impact of the treatment, although those that implemented their own RCTs showed moderate success in encouraging more women to major in economics. We speculate on the reasons for differential treatment impact.
papers.zh_title: UWE对经济学产生了什么影响？
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学是最受欢迎的本科专业之一。然而，即使在顶尖研究型大学和文理学院，男性人数也以二比一超过女性，总体而言，每名女性经济学专业学生对应约2.5名男性。本科女性经济学挑战（UWE）于2015年启动，为期一年，作为一项随机对照试验，涉及20所处理学校和68所控制学校，旨在评估轻触式干预措施对招募和留住女性经济学专业学生的影响。处理学校获得了资金、指导以及与其他处理学校交流的机会，以实施诸如提供更好的经济学应用信息、让学生接触榜样以及更新课程内容和教学法等项目。利用2001-2021年综合高等教育数据系统（IPEDS）的本科毕业生数据，我们发现UWE在文理学院中有效提高了女性经济学专业毕业生相对于男性的比例。大型大学未显示出处理效应，尽管那些实施了自己随机对照试验的大学在鼓励更多女性主修经济学方面取得了一定成功。我们推测了处理效应差异的原因。

papers.title: Fiscal Procyclicality in Commodity Exporting Countries: How Much Does it Pour and Why?
papers.authors: Francisco Arroyo Marioli, Carlos A. Vegh
papers.abstract: A large literature has documented that fiscal policy is procyclical in emerging markets and developing economies and acyclical/countercyclical in advanced economies. This paper analyzes fiscal procyclicality in commodity-exporting countries. It first shows that the degree of fiscal procyclicality is twice as high in commodity exporters than in non-commodity exporters. Further, while fiscal procyclicality has been falling in commodity exporters over the past 15 years, it is still pervasive and has fallen slower than in non-commodity exporting countries. In addition to testing the main theories behind fiscal procyclicality in commodity exporters and the role of institutional variables, the paper makes two novel contributions. First, based on the idea of fiscal procyclicality as a "when it rains, it pours" phenomenon (that is, contractionary fiscal policy amplifies the effects of a fall in commodity prices), the paper shows that, on average, government spending amplifies the business cycle by 21 percent of the initial drop in output following a fall in commodity prices. Put differently, the pours component accounts for 17 percent of the total fall in output. Second, the paper estimates the welfare costs of fiscal procyclicality at 2.6 percent of the costs associated with the regular business cycle in commodity exporters.
papers.zh_title: 大宗商品出口国的财政顺周期性：雨下多大，为何倾盆？
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献表明，新兴市场和发展中经济体的财政政策是顺周期的，而发达经济体的财政政策则是非周期或逆周期的。本文分析了大宗商品出口国的财政顺周期性。首先，它表明大宗商品出口国的财政顺周期程度是非大宗商品出口国的两倍。此外，尽管过去15年大宗商品出口国的财政顺周期性有所下降，但仍普遍存在，且下降速度慢于非大宗商品出口国。除了检验大宗商品出口国财政顺周期性的主要理论以及制度变量的作用外，本文还做出了两项新贡献。第一，基于财政顺周期性是一种“不下雨则已，一下雨则倾盆”现象（即紧缩性财政政策放大大宗商品价格下跌的影响）的观点，本文表明，平均而言，政府支出将大宗商品价格下跌后初始产出下降的21%放大了经济周期。换言之，“倾盆”部分占产出总下降的17%。第二，本文估计财政顺周期性的福利成本相当于大宗商品出口国常规经济周期相关成本的2.6%。

papers.title: On the Importance of African Traditional Religion for Economic Behavior
papers.authors: Louis Dunia, Aimable Amani Lameke, Nathan Nunn, Max Posch, Raúl Sánchez de la Sierra
papers.abstract: Within the field of economics, despite being widespread, African traditional religions tend to be perceived as unimportant and ignored when studying economic decision-making. This study tests whether this presumption is correct. Using daily data on business decisions and performance of beer sellers in the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, we study the importance of traditional religious beliefs for economic behavior and outcomes. Beer sellers perceive the risk of theft in their shops to be higher than it actually is, causing them to hold lower inventories, more frequent stock-outs, and reduced profits. We facilitate randomly-timed access to commonly-used, but typically prohibitively expensive rituals, which reduce the perceived risk of theft. We find that the rituals partially correct the beliefs about the risk of theft for sellers who report believing in the ritual’s efficacy. These sellers purchase more inventory, experience fewer stock-outs, and have larger sales, revenues, and profits. To distinguish the belief in the efficacy of the ritual from other incidental effects of participation, we analyze these outcomes for sellers who do not believe in the ritual. For these individuals, we find none of the observed effects. The findings provide evidence of the importance of African traditional religions, demonstrating that they can influence behavior and outcomes that are important for economic development.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：L81, O12, Z12, Z13
papers.zh_title: 论非洲传统宗教对经济行为的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 在经济学领域，尽管非洲传统宗教广泛存在，但在研究经济决策时往往被认为不重要而被忽视。本研究检验了这一假设是否正确。利用刚果民主共和国东部啤酒销售商的日常商业决策和绩效数据，我们研究了传统宗教信仰对经济行为和结果的重要性。啤酒销售商认为其商店被盗的风险高于实际水平，导致他们持有更低的库存、更频繁的缺货以及利润减少。我们促进了随机时间访问通常使用但通常价格昂贵的仪式，这些仪式降低了感知的盗窃风险。我们发现，对于报告相信仪式功效的销售商，这些仪式部分纠正了他们对盗窃风险的信念。这些销售商购买了更多库存，经历了更少的缺货，并获得了更大的销量、收入和利润。为了区分对仪式功效的信念与参与的其他附带效应，我们分析了不相信仪式的销售商的这些结果。对于这些个体，我们没有发现任何观察到的效应。这些发现提供了非洲传统宗教重要性的证据，表明它们可以影响对经济发展重要的行为和结果。

papers.title: The Intergenerational Transmission of Poverty and Public Assistance: Evidence from the Earned Income Tax Credit
papers.authors: Nicardo S. McInnis, Katherine Michelmore, Natasha Pilkauskas
papers.abstract: This paper examines the intergenerational effects of the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) on poverty and public assistance use. Using data from the PSID, we find that increased exposure to the EITC in childhood reduces the use of public assistance in adulthood (WIC and other public assistance) and reduces the likelihood of being in poverty (<100% of poverty) or near poor (<200% of poverty) by about 7 percentage points. These findings build on a growing literature that considers the intergenerational impacts of public policy and suggests that the economic benefits of policies in one generation may have long-term effects on the next generation.
papers.zh_title: 贫困与公共援助的代际传递：来自劳动所得税抵免的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了劳动所得税抵免（EITC）对贫困和公共援助使用的代际效应。利用PSID数据，我们发现，童年时期对EITC的更多接触减少了成年后对公共援助（WIC和其他公共援助）的使用，并将陷入贫困（低于贫困线100%）或接近贫困（低于贫困线200%）的可能性降低了约7个百分点。这些发现建立在越来越多考虑公共政策代际影响的文献基础上，并表明一代人政策的的经济效益可能对下一代产生长期影响。

papers.title: Innovation and Appropriability: Revisiting the Role of Intellectual Property
papers.authors: Filippo Mezzanotti, Timothy Simcoe
papers.abstract: It is more than 25 years since the authors of the Yale and Carnegie surveys studied how firms seek to protect the rents from innovation. In this paper, we revisit that question using a nationally representative sample of firms over the period 2008-2015, with the goal of updating and extending a set of stylized facts that has been influential for our understanding of the economics of innovation. There are five main findings. First, while patenting firms are relatively uncommon in the economy, they account for an overwhelming share of R&D spending. Second, firms consider utility patents less important on average than other forms of IP protection, like trade secrets, trademarks, and copyrights. Third, industry differences explain a great deal of the level of firms’ engagement with IP, with high-tech firms on average being more active on all forms of IP. Fourth, we find no significant differences in the use of IP strategies across firms at different points of their life cycle. Lastly, unlike age, firms of different size appear to manage IP significantly differently. On average, larger firms tend to engage much more extensively in the protection of IP, and this pattern cannot be easily explained by differences in the type of R&D or innovation produced by a firm. We also discuss the implications of these findings for innovation research and policy.
papers.zh_title: 创新与可占有性：重新审视知识产权的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 自耶鲁和卡内基调查的作者研究企业如何保护创新租金以来，已过去超过25年。在本文中，我们利用2008-2015年间具有全国代表性的企业样本重新审视这一问题，旨在更新和扩展一组对我们理解创新经济学具有影响力的典型事实。主要有五个发现。第一，尽管申请专利的企业在经济中相对少见，但它们占据了研发支出的绝大部分。第二，企业认为实用新型专利平均而言不如其他形式的知识产权保护（如商业秘密、商标和版权）重要。第三，行业差异在很大程度上解释了企业参与知识产权的水平，高科技企业在所有形式的知识产权上平均更为活跃。第四，我们发现处于生命周期不同阶段的企业在知识产权策略使用上没有显著差异。最后，与年龄不同，不同规模的企业在管理知识产权方面似乎存在显著差异。平均而言，大型企业更广泛地参与知识产权保护，这一模式不能轻易用企业研发类型或创新产出的差异来解释。我们还讨论了这些发现对创新研究和政策的意义。

papers.title: Bottlenecks: Sectoral Imbalances and the US Productivity Slowdown
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, David Autor, Christina Patterson
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid pace of innovation in information and communications technologies (ICT) and electronics, aggregate US productivity growth has been disappointing since the 1970s. We propose and empirically explore the hypothesis that slow growth stems in part from an unbalanced sectoral distribution of innovation over the last several decades. Because an industry's success in innovation depends on complementary innovations among its input suppliers, rapid productivity growth that is concentrated in a subset of sectors may create bottlenecks and consequently fail to translate into commensurate aggregate productivity gains. Using data on input-output linkages, citation linkages, industry productivity growth and patenting, we find evidence consistent with this hypothesis: the variance of suppliers' Total Factor Productivity growth or innovation adversely affects an industry's own TFP growth and innovation. Our estimates suggest that a substantial share of the productivity slowdown in the United States (and several other industrialized economies) can be accounted for by a sizable increase in cross-industry variance of TFP growth and innovation. For example, if TFP growth variance had remained at the 1977-1987 level, US manufacturing productivity would have grown twice as rapidly in 1997-2007 as it did—yielding a counterfactual growth rate that would have been close to that of 1977-1987 and 1987-1997.
papers.zh_title: 瓶颈：部门失衡与美国生产率放缓
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管信息和通信技术（ICT）及电子领域创新步伐迅速，但自20世纪70年代以来，美国总体生产率增长一直令人失望。我们提出并实证探讨了一个假说：过去几十年的缓慢增长部分源于创新在部门间分布的不均衡。由于一个行业的创新成功取决于其投入供应商的互补性创新，集中在少数部门的生产率快速增长可能会造成瓶颈，从而无法转化为相应的总体生产率提升。利用投入产出关联、引文关联、行业生产率增长和专利数据，我们发现了与这一假说一致的证据：供应商全要素生产率（TFP）增长或创新的方差会对行业自身的TFP增长和创新产生不利影响。我们的估计表明，美国（以及其他几个工业化经济体）生产率放缓的相当大一部分可以用跨行业TFP增长和创新方差的显著增大来解释。例如，如果TFP增长方差保持在1977-1987年的水平，美国制造业生产率在1997-2007年间的增长速度将是实际的两倍——从而产生一个接近1977-1987年和1987-1997年增长率的反事实增长率。

papers.title: Institutions and Global Crop Yields
papers.authors: David Wuepper, Haoyu Wang, Wolfram Schlenker, Meha Jain, Robert Finger
papers.abstract: We estimate annual discontinuities in remotely-sensed crop yields at all international land borders and link them to changes in the economic freedom index by the Fraser Institute, a country-level measure of institutional quality. Each point of the ten-point index increases the discontinuity by 2.2% over the next five years, highlighting that institutional reforms have the potential to close some of the observed crop yield gap. Three subcategories are consistently significant: credit market regulation, inflation, and the top marginal tax rate. We present suggestive evidence that higher average yields are achieved through increased use of irrigation and mechanization. Yield variability remains unchanged, and reforms lead to cropland expansion through deforestation.
papers.zh_title: 制度与全球作物产量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了所有国际陆地边界处遥感作物产量的年度不连续性，并将其与弗雷泽研究所的经济自由指数（一种国家层面的制度质量衡量指标）的变化联系起来。该十分制指数每增加一分，未来五年的产量不连续性就会增加2.2%，这表明制度改革有可能缩小部分观察到的作物产量差距。三个子类别始终显著：信贷市场监管、通货膨胀和最高边际税率。我们提出了暗示性证据，表明更高的平均产量是通过增加灌溉和机械化使用实现的。产量变异性保持不变，而改革通过森林砍伐导致了耕地扩张。

papers.title: Black Empowerment and White Mobilization: The Effects of the Voting Rights Act
papers.authors: Andrea Bernini, Giovanni Facchini, Marco Tabellini, Cecilia Testa
papers.abstract: The 1965 Voting Rights Act (VRA) paved the road to Black empowerment. How did southern whites respond? Leveraging newly digitized data on county-level voter registration rates by race between 1956 and 1980, and exploiting pre-determined variation in exposure to the federal intervention, we document that the VRA increases both Black and white political participation. Consistent with the VRA triggering counter-mobilization, the surge in white registrations is concentrated where Black political empowerment is more tangible and salient due to the election of African Americans in county commissions. Additional analysis suggests that the VRA has long-lasting negative effects on whites' racial attitudes.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LE, POL；JEL：D72, H70, J15, N92
papers.zh_title: 黑人赋权与白人动员：投票权法案的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 1965年的《投票权法案》（VRA）为黑人赋权铺平了道路。南方白人对此如何反应？利用1956年至1980年间按种族划分的县级选民登记率的新数字化数据，并利用联邦干预暴露程度的预先确定差异，我们记录了VRA同时提高了黑人和白人的政治参与。与VRA引发反动员相一致的是，白人登记人数的激增集中在黑人政治赋权因非裔美国人当选县委员会而更加切实和显著的地区。进一步的分析表明，VRA对白人的种族态度具有持久的负面影响。

papers.title: Sparse Modeling Under Grouped Heterogeneity with an Application to Asset Pricing
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Guanhao Feng, Jingyu He, Junye Li
papers.abstract: Sparse models, though long preferred and pursued by social scientists, can be ineffective or unstable relative to large models, for example, in economic predictions (Giannone et al., 2021). To achieve sparsity for economic interpretation while exploiting big data for superior empirical performance, we introduce a general framework that jointly clusters observations (via new decision trees) and locally selects variables (with Bayesian priors) for modeling panel data with potential grouped heterogeneity. We derive analytical marginal likelihoods as global split criteria in our Bayesian Clustering Model (BCM), to incorporate economic guidance, address parameter and model uncertainties, and prevent overfitting. We apply BCM to asset pricing and estimate uncommon-factor models for data-driven asset clusters and macroeconomic regimes. We find (i) cross-sectional heterogeneity linked to (non-linear interactions of) return volatility, size, and value, (ii) structural changes in factor relevance predicted by market volatility and valuation, and (iii) MKTRF and SMB as common factors and multiple uncommon factors across characteristics-managed-market-timed clusters. BCM helps explain volatility- or size-related anomalies, exploit within-group tests, and mitigate the “factor zoo” problem. Overall, BCM outperforms benchmark common-factor models in pricing and investments in U.S. equities, e.g., attaining out-of-sample cross-sectional R2s exceeding 25% for multiple clusters and Sharpe ratio of tangency portfolios tripling built from ME-B/M 5 × 5 portfolios.
papers.zh_title: 分组异质性下的稀疏建模及其在资产定价中的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 稀疏模型虽然长期以来受到社会科学家的青睐和追求，但在经济预测等方面可能不如大模型有效或稳定（Giannone et al., 2021）。为了在利用大数据获得卓越实证表现的同时实现经济解释所需的稀疏性，我们引入了一个通用框架，该框架通过新的决策树联合聚类观测值，并使用贝叶斯先验局部选择变量，以对具有潜在分组异质性的面板数据进行建模。我们在贝叶斯聚类模型（BCM）中推导出解析边际似然作为全局分裂准则，以纳入经济指导、处理参数和模型不确定性并防止过拟合。我们将BCM应用于资产定价，并为数据驱动的资产聚类和宏观经济体制估计非共同因子模型。我们发现：（i）与收益波动率、规模和价值的非线性交互作用相关的横截面异质性；（ii）由市场波动率和估值预测的因子相关性的结构性变化；以及（iii）MKTRF和SMB作为共同因子，以及跨特征管理-市场时机聚类的多个非共同因子。BCM有助于解释与波动率或规模相关的异常现象、利用组内检验并缓解“因子动物园”问题。总体而言，BCM在美国股票的定价和投资方面优于基准共同因子模型，例如，多个聚类的样本外横截面R²超过25%，由ME-B/M 5×5投资组合构建的切点组合夏普比率提高了两倍。

papers.title: The Largest Insurance Expansion in History: Saving One Million Lives Per Year in China
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Mengyun Lin, Junjian Yi
papers.abstract: The New Cooperative Medical Scheme (NCMS) rolled out in China from 2003-2008 provided insurance to 800 million rural Chinese. We combine aggregate mortality data with individual survey data, and identify the impact of the NCMS from program rollout and heterogeneity across areas in their rural share. We find that there was a significant decline in aggregate mortality, with the program saving more than one million lives per year at its peak, and explaining 78% of the entire increase in life expectancy in China over this period. We confirm these mortality effects using micro-data on mortality, other health outcomes, and utilization.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H4, I13
papers.zh_title: 史上最大的保险扩张：中国每年挽救超过一百万条生命
papers.zh_abstract: 新型农村合作医疗制度（NCMS）于2003年至2008年在中国推广，为8亿农村人口提供了保险。我们将总体死亡率数据与个人调查数据相结合，并根据项目推广和不同地区农村人口比例的异质性来识别NCMS的影响。我们发现总体死亡率显著下降，该项目在其高峰期每年挽救超过一百万条生命，并解释了同期中国预期寿命全部增长的78%。我们使用关于死亡率、其他健康结果和医疗利用的微观数据证实了这些死亡率效应。

papers.title: Combining Human Expertise with Artificial Intelligence: Experimental Evidence from Radiology
papers.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Alex Moehring, Pranav Rajpurkar, Tobias Salz
papers.abstract: Full automation using Artificial Intelligence (AI) predictions may not be optimal if humans have information not available to the AI (contextual information). We study human-AI collaboration using an information experiment with professional radiologists. Results show that providing (i) AI predictions does not improve performance on average, whereas (ii) contextual information does. Radiologists do not realize the gains from AI assistance because of errors in belief updating – they underweight AI predictions and treat their own information and AI predictions as statistically independent. Unless these mistakes can be corrected, the optimal human-AI collaboration design delegates cases either to humans or to AI, but rarely to AI assisted humans.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PR；JEL：C50, C90, D47, D83
papers.zh_title: 将人类专业知识与人工智能相结合：来自放射学的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 如果人类拥有AI无法获取的信息（上下文信息），那么使用人工智能（AI）预测的完全自动化可能并非最优。我们通过与专业放射科医生进行信息实验来研究人机协作。结果显示：（i）提供AI预测平均而言并未提高表现，而（ii）提供上下文信息则提高了表现。放射科医生未能从AI辅助中获益，是因为信念更新中的错误——他们低估了AI预测，并将自己的信息和AI预测视为统计独立。除非这些错误能够得到纠正，否则最优的人机协作设计是将病例分配给人类或AI，而很少分配给AI辅助的人类。

papers.title: Think Globally, Act Globally: Opportunities to Mitigate Greenhouse Gas Emissions in Low- and Middle-Income Countries
papers.authors: Rachel Glennerster, Seema Jayachandran
papers.abstract: Reductions in greenhouse gas emissions are a global public good, which makes it efficient to act globally when addressing this challenge. We lay out several reasons that high-income countries seeking to mitigate climate change might have greater impact if they invest their resources in opportunities in low- and middle-income countries. Specifically, some of the easiest and cheapest options have already been tapped in high-income countries, land and labor costs are lower in low- and middle-income countries, it is cheaper to build green than to retrofit green, and global targeting matters in integrated economies. We also discuss economic counterarguments such as the challenge of monitoring emissions levels in low- and middle-income countries, ethical considerations, the importance of not double-counting mitigation funding as development aid, and policy steps that might help to realize this opportunity.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, ITI；JEL：F18, O13, Q54, Q56
papers.zh_title: 全球思考，全球行动：在低收入和中等收入国家减缓温室气体排放的机遇
papers.zh_abstract: 减少温室气体排放是一种全球公共品，这使得在应对这一挑战时采取全球行动是有效的。我们阐述了几个理由，说明寻求减缓气候变化的高收入国家如果将资源投资于低收入和中等收入国家的机会，可能会产生更大的影响。具体来说，一些最简单和最便宜的选择在高收入国家已被利用，低收入和中等收入国家的土地和劳动力成本更低，新建绿色设施比改造为绿色设施更便宜，并且在一体化经济中，全球目标定位至关重要。我们还讨论了经济上的反对论点，例如在低收入和中等收入国家监测排放水平的挑战、伦理考量、不将减缓资金重复计算为发展援助的重要性，以及可能有助于实现这一机遇的政策步骤。

papers.title: Education and Later-life Mortality: Evidence from a School Reform in Japan
papers.authors: Kazuya Masuda, Hitoshi Shigeoka
papers.abstract: We examine the mortality effects of a 1947 school reform in Japan, which extended compulsory schooling from primary to secondary school by as much as 3 years. The abolition of secondary school fees also indicates that those affected by the reform likely came from disadvantaged families who could have benefited the most from schooling. Even in this relatively favorable setting, we fail to find that the reform improved later-life mortality up to the age of 87 years, although it significantly increased years of schooling. This finding suggests limited health returns to schooling at the lower level of educational attainment.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I12, I21, I28
papers.zh_title: 教育与晚年死亡率：来自日本学校改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了日本1947年学校改革的死亡率影响，该改革将义务教育从小学延长至中学，最多延长了3年。中学学费的取消也表明，受改革影响的人很可能来自本可以从学校教育中获益最多的弱势家庭。即使在这种相对有利的环境下，我们未能发现该改革改善了至87岁的晚年死亡率，尽管它显著增加了受教育年限。这一发现表明，在较低的教育水平上，学校教育对健康的回报有限。

papers.title: Moonshot: Public R&D and Growth
papers.authors: Shawn Kantor, Alexander T. Whalley
papers.abstract: We estimate the long-term effect of public R&D on growth in manufacturing by analyzing new data from the Cold War era Space Race. We develop a novel empirical strategy that leverages US-Soviet rivalry in space technology to isolate windfall R&D spending. Our results demonstrate that public R&D conducted by NASA contractors increased manufacturing value added, employment, and capital accumulation in space related sectors. While migration responses were important, they were not sufficient to generate a wedge between local and national effects. The iconic Moonshot R&D program had only modest economic effects for both the local and national space-related sectors.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：H54, N12, N72, O32, R11
papers.zh_title: 登月计划：公共研发与增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过分析冷战时期太空竞赛的新数据，估计了公共研发对制造业增长的长期影响。我们开发了一种新颖的实证策略，利用美苏在太空技术上的竞争来分离出意外的研发支出。我们的结果表明，由NASA承包商进行的公共研发增加了太空相关部门的制造业增加值、就业和资本积累。虽然移民响应很重要，但它们不足以在地方和国家效应之间产生差异。标志性的登月研发计划对地方和国家太空相关行业的经济影响都较为温和。

papers.title: Relationship between Social Security Programs and Elderly Employment in Japan
papers.authors: Takashi Oshio, Satoshi Shimizutani, Akiko S. Oishi
papers.abstract: This study examines how elderly employment is associated with social security programs and how it responds to recent reforms in Japan. To this end, we employed a rich and longitudinal dataset of middle-aged and older individuals collected between 2005 and 2018. By incorporating various factors related to social security incentives into a single index of implicit tax (ITAX), we confirmed that the index successfully captured the incentives and their changes incorporated in recent social security reforms. We further estimated the association of ITAX with an individual’s decisions concerning retirement and pension benefit claims. Lastly, we conducted counterfactual simulations to assess the effect of recent social security forms on retirement based on the estimated regression parameters. The results showed that a higher ITAX drove individuals, especially men, to retire and claim benefits earlier.
papers.zh_title: 日本社会保障计划与老年人就业之间的关系
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了老年人就业如何与社会保障计划相关联，以及它如何响应日本近期的改革。为此，我们使用了2005年至2018年间收集的关于中老年人的丰富纵向数据集。通过将与社会保障激励相关的各种因素纳入一个单一的隐性税收指数，我们确认该指数成功捕捉了近期社会保障改革中所包含的激励及其变化。我们进一步估计了隐性税收指数与个人关于退休和养老金领取决策的关联。最后，我们基于估计的回归参数进行了反事实模拟，以评估近期社会保障形式对退休的影响。结果表明，较高的隐性税收促使个人，尤其是男性，更早退休并领取福利。

papers.title: Who Values Human Capitalists' Human Capital? The Earnings and Labor Supply of U.S. Physicians
papers.authors: Joshua D. Gottlieb, Maria Polyakova, Kevin Rinz, Hugh Shiplett, Victoria Udalova
papers.abstract: Is government guiding the invisible hand at the top of the labor market? We use new administrative data to measure physicians' earnings and estimate the influence of healthcare policies on these earnings, physicians' labor supply, and allocation of talent. Combining the administrative registry of U.S.~physicians with tax data, Medicare billing records, and survey responses, we find that physicians' annual earnings average $350,000 and comprise 8.6% of national healthcare spending. The age-earnings profile is steep; business income comprises one-quarter of earnings and is systematically underreported in survey data. There are major differences in earnings across specialties, regions, and firm sizes, with an unusual geographic pattern compared with other workers. We show that health policy has a major impact on the margin: 25% of physician fee revenue driven by Medicare reimbursements accrues to physicians personally. Physicians earn 6% of public money spent on insurance expansions. We find that these policies in turn affect the type and quantity of medical care physicians supply in the short run; retirement timing in the medium run; and earnings affect specialty choice in the long run.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I13, I18, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 谁看重人力资本家的人力资本？美国医生的收入与劳动力供给
papers.zh_abstract: 政府是否在引导劳动力市场顶层的无形之手？我们使用新的行政数据来衡量医生的收入，并估计医疗政策对这些收入、医生劳动力供给以及人才配置的影响。通过将美国医生的行政注册数据与税收数据、医疗保险账单记录和调查回复相结合，我们发现医生的年收入平均为35万美元，占全国医疗支出的8.6%。年龄-收入曲线陡峭；营业收入占收入的四分之一，并且在调查数据中被系统性低估。不同专业、地区和公司规模之间存在重大收入差异，与其他工人相比呈现出不寻常的地理模式。我们表明，医疗政策在边际上具有重大影响：由医疗保险报销驱动的医生服务费收入的25%直接归属于医生个人。医生赚取了用于保险扩张的公共资金的6%。我们发现，这些政策反过来在短期内影响医生提供的医疗护理类型和数量；在中期影响退休时机；而收入在长期影响专业选择。

papers.title: The Electric Telegraph, News Coverage and Political Participation
papers.authors: Tianyi Wang
papers.abstract: Using newly digitized data on the growth of the telegraph network in America during 1840-1852, the paper studies the impacts of the electric telegraph on national elections. I use proximity to daily newspapers with telegraphic connections to Washington to generate plausibly exogenous variation in access to telegraphed news from Washington. I find that access to Washington news with less delay had a robust positive effect on voter turnout in national elections. For mechanisms, I provide evidence that newspapers facilitated the dissemination of national news to local areas. In addition, text analysis on more than a hundred small-town weekly newspapers from the 1840s shows that the improved access to news from Washington led newspapers to cover more national political news, including coverage of Congress, the presidency, and sectional divisions involving slavery. The results suggest that the telegraph made newspapers less parochial, facilitated a national conversation and increased political participation. I find little evidence that access to telegraphed news from Washington affected party vote shares or Congressmen's roll call votes.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：D72, L82, L96, N41, N71, O3
papers.zh_title: 电报、新闻报道与政治参与
papers.zh_abstract: 利用1840-1852年间美国电报网络增长的新数字化数据，本文研究了电报对全国选举的影响。我利用与华盛顿有电报联系的日报的邻近性，来生成获取来自华盛顿的电报新闻的外生性差异。我发现，获取华盛顿新闻的延迟时间更短，对全国选举的选民投票率产生了稳健的正向影响。关于机制，我提供了证据表明报纸促进了全国新闻向地方区域的传播。此外，对19世纪40年代一百多家小镇周报的文本分析表明，获取华盛顿新闻的改善导致报纸报道了更多的全国政治新闻，包括对国会、总统以及涉及奴隶制的地区分歧的报道。结果表明，电报使报纸不再那么狭隘，促进了全国性的对话，并增加了政治参与。我几乎没有发现证据表明，获取来自华盛顿的电报新闻影响了政党得票率或国会议员的唱名表决。

papers.title: Corporate Tax Disclosure
papers.authors: Jeffrey L. Hoopes, Leslie Robinson, Joel Slemrod
papers.abstract: Policies that require, or recommend, disclosure of corporate tax information are becoming more common throughout the world, as are examples of tax-related information increasingly influencing public policy and perceptions. In addition, companies are increasing the voluntary provision of tax-related information. We describe those trends and place them within a taxonomy of public and private tax disclosure. We then review the academic literature on corporate tax disclosures and discuss what is known about their effects. One key takeaway is the paucity of evidence that many tax disclosures mandated with the aim of increasing tax revenue have produced additional revenue. We highlight many crucial unanswered questions, answers to which would inform future tax legislation and financial accounting rule making.
papers.zh_title: 企业税收披露
papers.zh_abstract: 要求或建议披露企业税收信息的政策在全球范围内日益普遍，同时，税收相关信息越来越多地影响公共政策和公众认知的例子也在增加。此外，企业正在增加税收相关信息的自愿提供。我们描述了这些趋势，并将其置于公共和私人税收披露的分类框架中。然后，我们回顾了关于企业税收披露的学术文献，并讨论了已知的其影响。一个关键结论是，很少有证据表明许多旨在增加税收收入的强制性税收披露产生了额外收入。我们强调了许多关键但尚未解答的问题，对这些问题的解答将为未来的税收立法和财务会计规则制定提供信息。

papers.title: The Job Ladder: Inflation vs. Reallocation
papers.authors: Giuseppe Moscarini, Fabien Postel-Vinay
papers.abstract: We introduce on-the-job search frictions in an otherwise standard monetary DSGE New-Keynesian model. Heterogeneity in productivity across jobs gives rise to a job ladder. Firms Bertrand-compete for employed workers according to the Sequential Auctions protocol of Postel-Vinay and Robin (2002). Outside job offers to employed workers, when accepted, reallocate employment up the productivity ladder; when declined, because matched by the current employer, they raise production costs and, due to nominal price rigidities, compress mark-ups, building inflationary pressure. When employment is concentrated at the bottom of the job ladder, typically after recessions, the reallocation effect prevails, aggregate supply expands, moderating marginal costs and inflation. As workers climb the job ladder, reducing slack in the employment pool, the inflation effect takes over. The model generates endogenous cyclical movements in the Neo Classical labor wedge and in the New Keynesian wage mark-up. The economy takes time to absorb cyclical misallocation and features propagation in the response of job creation, unemployment and inflation to aggregate shocks. The ratio between job-finding probabilities from job-to-job and from unemployment, a measure of the “Acceptance rate” of job offers to employed workers, predicts negatively inflation, independently of the unemployment rate.
papers.zh_title: 工作阶梯：通货膨胀与重新配置
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个原本标准的货币DSGE新凯恩斯模型中引入了在职搜寻摩擦。工作间生产率的异质性产生了工作阶梯。企业根据Postel-Vinay和Robin（2002）的顺序拍卖协议，对在职工人进行伯特兰竞争。对在职工人的外部工作邀请，如果被接受，会将就业重新配置到生产率阶梯的上层；如果被拒绝（因为被当前雇主匹配），则会提高生产成本，并且由于名义价格刚性，会压缩加成率，从而形成通胀压力。当就业集中在工作阶梯的底部时（通常在经济衰退之后），重新配置效应占主导地位，总供给扩张，从而缓和边际成本和通货膨胀。随着工人攀登工作阶梯，减少了就业池中的闲置，通胀效应开始占据主导地位。该模型产生了新古典劳动楔子和新凯恩斯工资加成率的内生周期性波动。经济需要时间来吸收周期性的错配，并且在就业创造、失业和通货膨胀对总体冲击的反应中表现出传导机制。从工作到工作以及从失业到工作的求职概率之比，即对在职工人工作邀请的“接受率”的衡量指标，能够负向预测通货膨胀，且独立于失业率。

papers.title: The Linear Algebra of Economic Geography Models
papers.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: We provide sufficient statistics for nominal and real wage exposure to productivity shocks in a constant elasticity economic geography model. These exposure measures summarize the first-order general equilibrium elasticity of nominal and real wages in each location with respect to productivity shocks in all locations. They are readily computed using commonly-available trade data and the values of trade and migration elasticities. They have an intuitive interpretation in terms of underlying economic mechanisms. Computing these measures for all bilateral pairs of locations involves a single matrix inversion and therefore remains computational efficient even with an extremely high-dimensional state space. These sufficient statistics provide theory-consistent measures of locations’ exposure to productivity shocks for use in further economic and statistical analysis.
papers.zh_title: 经济地理模型的线性代数
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为恒定弹性经济地理模型中名义和实际工资对生产率冲击的暴露度提供了充分统计量。这些暴露度衡量指标总结了每个地点的名义和实际工资相对于所有地点生产率冲击的一阶一般均衡弹性。它们可以很容易地使用常见的贸易数据以及贸易和移民弹性值来计算。它们在潜在的经济机制方面具有直观的解释。计算所有双边地点对的这些衡量指标仅涉及一次矩阵求逆，因此即使在极高维度的状态空间下也能保持计算效率。这些充分统计量为在进一步的经济和统计分析中使用提供了理论一致的地点对生产率冲击暴露度的衡量指标。

papers.title: The Credit Supply Channel of Monetary Policy Tightening and its Distributional Impacts
papers.authors: Joshua Bosshardt, Marco Di Maggio, Ali Kakhbod, Amir Kermani
papers.abstract: This paper studies how tightening monetary policy transmits to the economy through the mortgage market and sheds new light on the distributional consequences at both individual and regional levels. We find that credit supply factors, specifically restrictions on the debt-to-income (DTI) ratio, account for most of the decline in mortgages. These effects are even more pronounced for minority and middle-income borrowers, who find themselves excluded from the credit market. Additionally, regions with historically high DTI ratios exhibit greater reductions in mortgage originations, house prices, and consumption.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ME；JEL：E20, E5, E52, G5, G51
papers.zh_title: 货币政策紧缩的信贷供给渠道及其分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了紧缩性货币政策如何通过抵押贷款市场传导至经济，并揭示了其在个人和区域层面的分配后果。我们发现，信贷供给因素，特别是对债务收入比（DTI）的限制，解释了抵押贷款下降的大部分原因。这些影响对少数族裔和中等收入借款人更为显著，他们发现自己被排除在信贷市场之外。此外，历史上债务收入比（DTI）较高的地区在抵押贷款发放、房价和消费方面表现出更大的减少。

papers.title: Firms with Benefits? Nonwage Compensation and Implications for Firms and Labor Markets
papers.authors: Paige Ouimet, Geoffrey Tate
papers.abstract: Using administrative data on health insurance, retirement, and leave benefits, we find within-firm variation accounts for a dramatically lower percentage of total variation in benefits than in wages. We also document sharply higher between-firm variation in nonwage benefits than in wages. We argue that this pattern can be a consequence of nondiscrimination regulations, fairness concerns, and the high administrative burden of managing too many or complex plans. Consistent with this mechanism, we show that the presence of high-wage workers in unrelated divisions of a firm as well as workers hired in high-benefit local labor markets positively predicts their colleagues’ benefits, controlling for occupation, wages, state, and industry. We find that the resulting high benefits reduce turnover, particularly among low-wage workers, for whom the benefits comprise a larger percentage of total compensation. Moreover, firms with more generous benefits attract and retain more high-wage workers, but also reduce their reliance on low-wage workers more than low-benefit peers. Our results suggest that benefits disproportionately matter for worker-firm matching and, hence, compensation inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G32, J01, J23, J32, J63
papers.zh_title: 提供福利的企业？非工资补偿及其对企业与劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用关于健康保险、退休和休假福利的行政数据，我们发现，在福利总变异中，企业内变异所占的比例远低于工资。我们还记录了企业间在非工资福利方面的变异远高于工资。我们认为，这种模式可能是非歧视性法规、公平性关切以及管理过多或复杂计划的高行政负担的结果。与这一机制一致，我们表明，在控制了职业、工资、州和行业后，企业不相关部门中高工资工人的存在，以及在高福利地方劳动力市场雇用的工人，会正向预测其同事的福利。我们发现，由此产生的高福利降低了离职率，尤其是在低工资工人中，对他们而言，福利占总薪酬的比例更高。此外，提供更慷慨福利的企业能吸引和留住更多高工资工人，但与低福利同行相比，它们也更多地减少了对低工资工人的依赖。我们的结果表明，福利对工人-企业匹配以及由此产生的薪酬不平等具有不成比例的重要影响。

papers.title: Bank Branch Density and Bank Runs
papers.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Jun Yang, Michal Zator
papers.abstract: Bank branch density, defined as the number of bank branches to total deposits, has significantly declined over the past decade, fueled by a confluence of branch closings and the almost doubling of deposits between 2016 and 2022. During this period, banks with low branch density benefited from large deposits inflows, leading to even lower density. But the virtuous cycle of deposits growth in these banks stopped spinning when investors became wary about their financial health. Stock prices of banks with low branch density plummeted during the 2023 Banking Crisis as these banks experienced larger outflows of uninsured deposits. Our results suggest that digital banking enabled banks to grow faster and attract uninsured deposits, but those large deposits inflows took the form of “hot money” that changed its course when economic conditions worsened.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM；JEL：E44, E52, G20, G21, G28
papers.zh_title: 银行网点密度与银行挤兑
papers.zh_abstract: 银行网点密度（定义为银行网点数量与总存款之比）在过去十年中显著下降，这是由于网点关闭与2016年至2022年间存款几乎翻倍共同推动的。在此期间，网点密度低的银行受益于大量存款流入，导致密度进一步降低。但是，当投资者开始担忧这些银行的财务状况时，这些银行存款增长的正向循环停止了。在2023年银行业危机期间，网点密度低的银行股价暴跌，因为这些银行经历了更大的未保险存款外流。我们的结果表明，数字银行使银行能够更快增长并吸引未保险存款，但这些大量存款流入采取了“热钱”的形式，当经济状况恶化时，其流向发生了改变。

papers.title: Regulating Transformative Technologies
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Todd Lensman
papers.abstract: Transformative technologies like generative artificial intelligence promise to accelerate productivity growth across many sectors, but they also present new risks from potential misuse. We develop a multi-sector technology adoption model to study the optimal regulation of transformative technologies when society can learn about these risks over time. Socially optimal adoption is gradual and convex. If social damages are proportional to the productivity gains from the new technology, a higher growth rate leads to slower optimal adoption. Equilibrium adoption is inefficient when firms do not internalize all social damages, and sector-independent regulation is helpful but generally not sufficient to restore optimality.
papers.zh_title: 监管变革性技术
papers.zh_abstract: 像生成式人工智能这样的变革性技术有望加速许多部门的生产率增长，但它们也带来了因潜在滥用而产生的新风险。我们开发了一个多部门技术采用模型，以研究当社会能够随时间了解这些风险时，对变革性技术的最优监管。社会最优的采用是渐进且凸性的。如果社会损害与新技术的生产率收益成比例，那么更高的增长率会导致更慢的最优采用。当企业没有内部化所有社会损害时，均衡采用是无效率的，而独立于部门的监管是有帮助的，但通常不足以恢复最优状态。

papers.title: Mega Firms and New Technological Trajectories in the U.S.
papers.authors: Joonkyu Choi, Serguey Braguinsky, Yuheng Ding, Karam Jo, Seula Kim
papers.abstract: We provide evidence that mega firms have played an increasingly important role in shaping new technological trajectories in recent years. While the share of novel patents—defined as patents introducing new combinations of technological components—produced by mega firms declined until around 2000, it has rebounded sharply since then. Furthermore, we find that the technological impact and knowledge diffusion of novel patents by mega firms have grown relative to those by non-mega firms after 2001. We also explore potential drivers of this trend, presenting evidence that the rise in novel patenting by mega firms is tied to their disproportionate increase in cash holdings and the expansion of their technological scope. Our findings highlight an overlooked positive role of mega firms in the economywide innovation process.
papers.zh_title: 美国的大型企业与新技术轨迹
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，近年来，大型企业在塑造新技术轨迹方面发挥了越来越重要的作用。虽然大型企业生产的创新专利（定义为引入新技术组件组合的专利）的份额在2000年左右之前一直在下降，但此后急剧反弹。此外，我们发现，在2001年之后，大型企业的创新专利的技术影响力和知识扩散相对于非大型企业有所增长。我们还探讨了这一趋势的潜在驱动因素，提供的证据表明，大型企业创新专利的增加与其现金持有量的不成比例增长以及其技术范围的扩大有关。我们的发现强调了大型企业在整个经济创新过程中一个被忽视的积极作用。

papers.title: Globalization and Inequality in Latin America
papers.authors: Rafael Dix-Carneiro, Brian K. Kovak
