papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国制造业普查的企业层面数据，研究了温度对制造业活动的短期和长期影响。我们发现，高温冲击显著增加了小型企业的能源成本并降低了其生产率，而大型企业基本不受影响。在1980年代至2010年代期间，平均气温上升幅度较大的通勤区经历了小型企业数量下降、劳动力从小型企业向大型企业重新配置以及地方劳动力市场集中度提高。单位能源成本、管理技能和融资渠道的差异有助于解释我们的结果。

papers.title: Trends in the Retirement Preparedness of Black and Hispanic Households in the US
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: Retirement income security refers to the ability of households to provide an adequate stream of income during the period of their retirement from the labor force. Expected retirement income is based of four components: (i) standard non-pension wealth holdings, (ii) defined contribution (DC) pension holdings, (iii) actual or expected defined benefit (DB) pension entitlements, and (iv) actual or expected Social Security benefits. The first two components are converted into an annuity. All the data (except rates of return) for these calculations are available from the Survey of Consumer Finances. Results indicate that both Black and Hispanic households made remarkable progress in terms of mean and median retirement income, poverty reduction, and replacement rates from 1989 to 2007 in both absolute terms and relative to whites. However, for Black households, this was followed by a reversal of fortune from 2007 to 2019, with expected median retirement income declining, the projected poverty rate rising, and the projected replacement rate falling, though expected mean retirement income does rise. Hispanics also experienced a setback in mean retirement income but continued progress in replacement rates and reducing poverty from 2007 to 2019.
papers.zh_title: 美国黑人和西班牙裔家庭退休准备情况的趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 退休收入安全是指家庭在退出劳动力市场后的退休期间提供充足收入流的能力。预期退休收入基于四个组成部分：（i）标准非养老金财富持有量，（ii）固定缴费型养老金持有量，（iii）实际或预期的固定收益型养老金权益，以及（iv）实际或预期的社会保障福利。前两个组成部分被转换为年金。这些计算所需的所有数据（除回报率外）均来自消费者金融调查。结果表明，从1989年到2007年，无论是绝对值还是相对于白人，黑人和西班牙裔家庭在平均和中位退休收入、减贫以及替代率方面都取得了显著进步。然而，对于黑人家庭而言，从2007年到2019年，情况发生了逆转：预期中位退休收入下降，预计贫困率上升，预计替代率下降，尽管预期平均退休收入确实有所上升。西班牙裔家庭在平均退休收入方面也遭遇了挫折，但从2007年到2019年，他们在替代率和减贫方面继续取得进展。

papers.title: The Impact of Violence on the Dynamics of Migration: Evidence from the Mexican Revolution
papers.authors: David Escamilla-Guerrero, Edward Kosack, Zachary Ward
papers.abstract: Forced displacement from conflict has risen sharply in recent decades, yet little is known about how violence impacts migration dynamics in the short run or over a longer horizon. Using novel high-frequency data during the Mexican Revolution (1910-1917), one of history’s deadliest conflicts, we find that localized violence caused a sharp but temporary 60 percent spike in migration to the US, lasting only seven months before reverting to pre-conflict levels. We do not find evidence of increased migration after the Revolution, suggesting that refugee networks did not spur significant chain migration, even during an era of relatively open borders.
papers.zh_title: 暴力对移民动态的影响：来自墨西哥革命的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，冲突导致的被迫流离失所急剧增加，但关于暴力如何在短期内或更长时间内影响移民动态，人们知之甚少。利用墨西哥革命（1910-1917年）——历史上最致命的冲突之一——期间新颖的高频数据，我们发现局部暴力导致移民到美国的人数急剧但暂时地飙升了60%，这种飙升仅持续了七个月，然后恢复到冲突前的水平。我们没有发现革命后移民增加的证据，这表明难民网络并未引发显著的连锁移民，即使在边界相对开放的时代也是如此。

papers.title: Converting Brown Offices to Green Apartments
papers.authors: Arpit Gupta, Candy Martinez, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: The conversion of brown office buildings to green apartments can contribute towards a solution to three pressing issues: oversupply of office in a hybrid-and-remote-work world, shortage of housing, and excessive greenhouse gas emissions. We propose a set of criteria to identify commercial office properties that are are physically suitable for conversion, yielding about 11% of all office buildings across the U.S. We present a pro-forma real estate model that identifies parameters under which these conversions are financially viable. We highlight several policy levers available to federal, state, and local governments that could accelerate the conversion, and that may be necessary should policymakers desire the creation of affordable housing. We highlight the role that the Inflation Reduction Act could play.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EEE, EFG, PE；JEL：G1, Q51, Q54, Q58, R21, R23, R32, R38
papers.zh_title: 将棕色办公楼改造成绿色公寓
papers.zh_abstract: 将棕色办公楼改造成绿色公寓有助于解决三个紧迫问题：混合办公和远程办公世界中的办公楼供应过剩、住房短缺以及过度的温室气体排放。我们提出了一套标准来识别物理上适合改造的商业办公物业，这涵盖了美国约11%的办公楼。我们提出了一个形式上的房地产模型，用于确定这些改造在财务上可行的参数。我们强调了联邦、州和地方政府可用的几个政策杠杆，这些杠杆可以加速改造，并且如果政策制定者希望创建经济适用房，这些杠杆可能是必要的。我们强调了《通胀削减法案》可能发挥的作用。

papers.title: Using Lotteries to Attract Deposits
papers.authors: Paul Gertler, Sean Higgins, Aisling Scott, Enrique Seira
papers.abstract: Despite the importance of deposit financing for lending, banks in developing countries struggle to attract deposits. In a randomized experiment across 110 bank branches throughout Mexico, a lottery incentive based on net monthly deposits caused a 40% increase in the number of accounts opened and a 21% increase in the number of deposits during the lottery months. Nearly all new accounts (96%) were opened by households previously unbanked at any bank. The temporary two-month incentive had a persistent 2-3 year impact on the flow of deposits and stock of savings, and increased the present value of branch profits by 6%.
papers.zh_title: 利用抽奖吸引存款
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管存款融资对贷款至关重要，但发展中国家的银行在吸引存款方面面临困难。在墨西哥110家银行分行进行的一项随机实验中，基于月度净存款的抽奖激励措施使抽奖月份的开户数量增加了40%，存款笔数增加了21%。几乎所有新账户（96%）都是由此前在任何银行均无账户的家庭开设的。这一为期两个月的临时激励措施对存款流量和储蓄存量产生了持续2至3年的影响，并使分行利润的现值增加了6%。

papers.title: Sticky Wages on the Layoff Margin
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Pawel M. Krolikowski
papers.abstract: We design and field an innovative survey of unemployment insurance (UI) recipients that yields new insights about wage stickiness on the layoff margin. Most UI recipients express a willingness to accept wage cuts of 5-10 percent to save their jobs, and one third would accept a 25 percent pay cut. Yet worker-employer discussions about cuts in pay, benefits or hours in lieu of layoffs are exceedingly rare. When asked why employers don’t propose job-saving pay cuts, four-in-ten UI recipients don’t know. Sixteen percent say cuts would undermine morale or lead the best workers to quit, and 39 percent don’t think wage cuts would save their jobs. For lost union jobs, 45 percent say contracts prevent wage cuts. Among those on permanent layoff who reject our hypothetical pay cuts, half say they have better outside options, and 38 percent regard the proposed pay cut as insulting. At least one-tenth of the layoffs in our sample violate the condition for bilaterally efficient separations in leading theories of job separations, frictional unemployment, and job ladders. We draw on our findings and other evidence to assess theories of wage stickiness and its role in layoffs.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, J31, J63, J65
papers.zh_title: 裁员边缘的工资粘性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们设计并实施了一项针对失业保险领取者的创新调查，该调查揭示了关于裁员边缘工资粘性的新见解。大多数失业保险领取者表示愿意接受5%至10%的工资削减以保住工作，三分之一的人愿意接受25%的减薪。然而，工人与雇主之间关于以减薪、削减福利或减少工时来替代裁员的讨论极为罕见。当被问及雇主为何不提出保岗减薪方案时，40%的失业保险领取者表示不知道。16%的人认为减薪会打击士气或导致最优秀的员工离职，39%的人认为减薪无法保住他们的工作。对于失去的工会职位，45%的人表示合同禁止减薪。在那些拒绝我们假设性减薪的永久性裁员者中，一半人表示他们有更好的外部选择，38%的人认为提议的减薪具有侮辱性。在我们样本中，至少十分之一的裁员违反了关于工作分离、摩擦性失业和职业阶梯的主要理论中双边有效分离的条件。我们利用我们的发现及其他证据来评估关于工资粘性及其在裁员中作用的理论。

papers.title: The Disparate Impacts of College Admissions Policies on Asian American Applicants
papers.authors: Joshua Grossman, Sabina Tomkins, Lindsay C. Page, Sharad Goel
papers.abstract: There is debate over whether Asian American students are admitted to selective colleges and universities at lower rates than white students with similar academic qualifications. However, there have been few empirical investigations of this issue, in large part due to a dearth of data. Here we present the results from analyzing 685,709 applications from Asian American and white students to a subset of selective U.S. institutions over five application cycles, beginning with the 2015–2016 cycle. The dataset does not include admissions decisions, and so we construct a proxy based in part on enrollment choices. Based on this proxy, we estimate the odds that Asian American applicants were admitted to at least one of the schools we consider were 28% lower than the odds for white students with similar test scores, grade-point averages, and extracurricular activities. The gap was particularly pronounced for students of South Asian descent (49% lower odds). We trace this pattern in part to two factors. First, many selective colleges openly give preference to the children of alumni, and we find that white applicants were substantially more likely to have such legacy status than Asian applicants, especially South Asian applicants. Second, after adjusting for observed student characteristics, the institutions we consider appear less likely to admit students from geographic regions with relatively high shares of applicants who are Asian. We hope these results inform ongoing discussions on the equity of college admissions policies.
papers.zh_title: 大学招生政策对亚裔美国申请人的差异化影响
papers.zh_abstract: 关于亚裔美国学生是否以低于学业资格相当的白人学生的比率被选择性大学录取，存在争议。然而，对此问题的实证研究很少，主要原因是数据匮乏。在此，我们展示了分析结果，该分析涵盖了从2015-2016申请周期开始的五个申请周期内，亚裔美国学生和白人学生向美国部分选择性院校提交的685,709份申请。该数据集不包括录取决定，因此我们部分基于入学选择构建了一个代理变量。基于该代理变量，我们估计，与具有相似考试成绩、平均绩点和课外活动的白人学生相比，亚裔美国申请人被我们考虑的至少一所学校录取的几率低28%。对于南亚裔学生，这一差距尤为显著（几率低49%）。我们将这种模式部分归因于两个因素。首先，许多选择性大学公开优先录取校友子女，我们发现白人申请人比亚裔申请人（尤其是南亚裔申请人）更有可能拥有这种传承身份。其次，在根据观察到的学生特征进行调整后，我们考虑的院校似乎不太可能录取来自亚裔申请人比例相对较高地理区域的学生。我们希望这些结果能为关于大学招生政策公平性的持续讨论提供信息。

papers.title: The Shadow Price of Capital: Accounting for Capital Displacement in Cost Benefit Analysis
papers.authors: Richard G. Newell, William A. Pizer, Brian C. Prest
papers.abstract: Government analysts have long used discount rates based on investment rates of return to approximate the effect of capital displacement. However, we show how this approach is not well grounded in economic theory and produces highly biased results, particularly in the context of decisions involving long-lived impacts such as climate change. We demonstrate how analysts can use the conceptually correct shadow price of capital (SPC) approach in a straightforward manner to account for concerns about capital displacement in federal regulatory analysis. We derive a formula for the SPC as a function of four key parameters and propose a central SPC value of 1.1, with a reasonable range of 1.1 to 1.2. We then illustrate how the SPC approach could be easily implemented in practice using the example of the 2015 Clean Power Plan Regulatory Impact Analysis, showing that estimated net benefits are far less sensitive to capital displacement concerns under the analytically correct SPC approach as compared to the inappropriate approach of using a 7 percent investment rate or return. Our work is particularly important given the ongoing efforts to revise federal guidance for benefit-cost analysis and discounting.
papers.zh_title: 资本的影子价格：成本效益分析中资本置换的核算
papers.zh_abstract: 政府分析人员长期以来一直使用基于投资回报率的贴现率来近似资本置换的影响。然而，我们展示了这种方法缺乏经济理论基础，并会产生高度偏差的结果，尤其是在涉及气候变化等长期影响的决策中。我们展示了分析人员如何以直接的方式使用概念上正确的资本影子价格方法来核算联邦监管分析中关于资本置换的担忧。我们推导出资本影子价格作为四个关键参数的函数公式，并提出一个中心资本影子价格值为1.1，合理范围为1.1至1.2。然后，我们以2015年清洁电力计划监管影响分析为例，说明了资本影子价格方法在实践中如何易于实施，表明在分析正确的资本影子价格方法下，估计的净收益对资本置换担忧的敏感度远低于使用7%投资回报率的不当方法。鉴于目前正在努力修订联邦关于成本效益分析和贴现的指导方针，我们的工作尤为重要。

papers.title: The Impact of Vaccines and Behavior on U.S. Cumulative Deaths from COVID-19
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson
papers.abstract: The CDC reports that 1.13 million Americans have died of COVID-19 through June of 2023. I use a model of the impact over the past three years of vaccines and private and public behavior to mitigate disease transmission during the COVID-19 pandemic in the United States to address two questions. First, holding the strength of the response of behavior to the level of daily deaths from COVID-19 fixed, what was the impact of vaccines on cumulative mortality from COVID-19 up through June 2023? And second, holding the pace of deployment of vaccinations fixed, what would have been the impact of stricter or looser behavioral responses to COVID-19 deaths on cumulative mortality from COVID-19 over this same time period? In answering the first question, I find that vaccines saved 748,600 lives through June 2023. That is, without vaccines, cumulative mortality from COVID-19 would have been closer to 1.91 million over this time period. In answering the second question, I find that behavioral efforts to slow the transmission of the virus before vaccines became widely administered were critical to this positive impact of vaccines on cumulative mortality. For example, with a complete relaxation of these mitigation efforts, vaccines would have come too late to have saved a significant number of lives. Earlier deployment of vaccines would have saved many lives. I find that marginal changes in the strength of the behavioral response to COVID-19 deaths within the range of those responses estimated with the model have a significantly impact on cumulative COVID-19 mortality over this time period.
papers.zh_title: 疫苗与行为对美国COVID-19累计死亡人数的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心报告称，截至2023年6月，已有113万美国人死于COVID-19。我使用一个模型来研究过去三年中，疫苗以及私人和公共行为在缓解美国COVID-19大流行期间疾病传播方面的影响，以解决两个问题。首先，在行为对每日COVID-19死亡人数的反应强度保持不变的情况下，截至2023年6月，疫苗对COVID-19累计死亡率的影响是什么？其次，在疫苗接种部署速度保持不变的情况下，对COVID-19死亡人数采取更严格或更宽松的行为反应，在同一时期会对累计死亡率产生什么影响？在回答第一个问题时，我发现疫苗截至2023年6月挽救了748,600人的生命。也就是说，如果没有疫苗，同期COVID-19的累计死亡率将接近191万。在回答第二个问题时，我发现，在疫苗广泛接种之前，为减缓病毒传播所做的行为努力对于疫苗对累计死亡率的这种积极影响至关重要。例如，如果完全放松这些缓解措施，疫苗将来得太晚，无法挽救大量生命。更早地部署疫苗本可以挽救许多生命。我发现，在模型估计的行为反应强度范围内，对COVID-19死亡人数的行为反应强度的边际变化，对这一时期内的累计COVID-19死亡率有显著影响。

papers.title: Risk Preferences Over Health: Empirical Estimates and Implications for Healthcare Decision-Making
papers.authors: Karen Mulligan, Drishti Baid, Jason N. Doctor, Charles E. Phelps, Darius N. Lakdawalla
papers.abstract: Recent research has documented a link between consumer risk preferences over health and the willingness to pay (WTP) for medical technologies. However, the absence of empirical health risk preference estimates so far limits the implementation of this generalized risk-adjusted cost-effectiveness (GRACE) theory, which addresses several limitations of traditional cost-effectiveness analysis (CEA). To address this gap, we elicit from a nationally representative U.S. sample individual risk preference parameters over health-related quality of life (HRQoL) that shed light on health risk attitudes and enable GRACE valuation of medical technology. We find individuals exhibit risk-seeking preferences at low levels of health, switch to risk-averse preferences at health equal to 0.485 (measured on a zero to one scale), and become most risk-averse when their health is perfect (coefficient of relative risk aversion = 4.36). The risk preference estimates imply an empirical premium for disease severity: each unit of health is worth three times more to patients with serious health conditions (health equals 0.5) than those who are perfectly healthy. They also imply that traditional CEA overvalues treatments for the mildest diseases by more than a factor of two. Use of traditional CEA both overstimulates mild disease treatment innovation and underprovides severe disease treatment innovation.
papers.zh_title: 健康风险偏好：实证估计及其对医疗决策的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究记录了消费者对健康的风险偏好与对医疗技术的支付意愿之间的联系。然而，迄今为止缺乏实证的健康风险偏好估计，限制了这种广义风险调整成本效益理论的应用，该理论解决了传统成本效益分析的若干局限性。为弥补这一空白，我们从具有全国代表性的美国样本中，引出了个体对健康相关生活质量的风险偏好参数，这些参数揭示了健康风险态度，并使得对医疗技术进行广义风险调整成本效益评估成为可能。我们发现，个体在低健康水平时表现出风险寻求偏好，在健康水平等于0.485（以0到1的尺度衡量）时转为风险厌恶偏好，并在健康完美时风险厌恶程度最高（相对风险厌恶系数为4.36）。这些风险偏好估计意味着疾病严重程度的经验溢价：对于患有严重健康状况（健康水平等于0.5）的患者，每单位健康的价值是健康完美者的三倍。它们还意味着，传统成本效益分析对最轻微疾病治疗的价值高估了两倍多。使用传统成本效益分析既过度刺激了轻微疾病治疗的创新，又对严重疾病治疗的创新供给不足。

papers.title: Estimating the Impact of the Age of Criminal Majority: Decomposing Multiple Treatments in a Regression Discontinuity Framework
papers.authors: Michael G. Mueller-Smith, Benjamin Pyle, Caroline Walker
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impact of adult prosecution on recidivism and employment trajectories for adolescent, first-time felony defendants. We use extensive linked Criminal Justice Admin- istrative Record System and socio-economic data from Wayne County, Michigan (Detroit). Using the discrete age of majority rule and a regression discontinuity design, we find that adult prosecution reduces future criminal charges over 5 years by 0.48 felony cases (↓ 20%) while also worsening labor market outcomes: 0.76 fewer employers (↓ 19%) and $674 fewer earnings (↓ 21%) per year. We develop a novel econometric framework that combines standard regression discontinuity methods with predictive machine learning models to identify mechanism-specific treatment effects that underpin the overall impact of adult prosecution. We leverage these estimates to consider four policy counterfactuals: (1) raising the age of majority, (2) increasing adult dismissals to match the juvenile disposition rates, (3) eliminating adult incarceration, and (4) expanding juvenile record sealing opportunities to teenage adult defendants. All four scenarios generate positive returns for government budgets. When accounting for impacts to defendants as well as victim costs borne by society stemming from increases in recidivism, we find positive social returns for juvenile record sealing expansions and dismissing marginal adult charges; raising the age of majority breaks even. Eliminating prison for first-time adult felony defendants, however, increases net social costs. Policymakers may still find this attractive if they are willing to value beneficiaries (taxpayers and defendants) slightly higher (124%) than potential victims.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C36, C45, J24, K14, K42
papers.zh_title: 估算刑事责任年龄的影响：在断点回归框架中分解多重处理
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了成人起诉对青少年初犯重罪被告人的累犯和就业轨迹的影响。我们使用了来自密歇根州韦恩县（底特律）的广泛关联的刑事司法行政记录系统和社会经济数据。利用离散的成年年龄规则和断点回归设计，我们发现成人起诉使未来5年内的刑事指控减少了0.48起重罪案件（下降20%），同时恶化了劳动力市场结果：每年雇主数量减少0.76个（下降19%），收入减少674美元（下降21%）。我们开发了一个新颖的计量经济学框架，将标准断点回归方法与预测性机器学习模型相结合，以识别构成成人起诉总体影响基础的机制特定处理效应。我们利用这些估计来考虑四种政策反事实情景：（1）提高成年年龄，（2）增加成人案件驳回率以匹配青少年处置率，（3）消除成人监禁，以及（4）将青少年记录封存机会扩大到青少年成年被告人。所有四种情景都为政府预算带来了正回报。当考虑到对被告人的影响以及因累犯增加而由社会承担的受害者成本时，我们发现扩大青少年记录封存和驳回边缘成人指控能带来正社会回报；提高成年年龄则收支平衡。然而，消除初犯成人重罪被告人的监禁会增加社会净成本。如果政策制定者愿意对受益者（纳税人和被告人）的估值略高于潜在受害者（124%），他们可能仍会觉得这一方案有吸引力。

papers.title: Temperature and Maltreatment of Young Children
papers.authors: Mary F. Evans, Ludovica Gazze, Jessamyn Schaller
papers.abstract: We estimate the impacts of temperature on alleged and substantiated child maltreatment among young children using administrative data from state child protective services agencies. Leveraging short-term weather variation, we find increases in the number of young children involved in cases of alleged and substantiated maltreatment during hot periods. Additional analysis identifies neglect as the temperature-sensitive maltreatment type, and we find some evidence that adaptation via air conditioning mitigates this relationship. Given that climate change will increase exposure to extreme temperatures, our findings speak to additional costs of climate change among the most vulnerable.
papers.zh_title: 温度与幼儿虐待
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用州儿童保护服务机构的行政数据，估计了温度对幼儿涉嫌和证实的虐待案件的影响。利用短期天气变化，我们发现炎热时期涉及涉嫌和证实虐待案件的幼儿数量有所增加。进一步分析确定忽视是对温度敏感的虐待类型，并且我们发现一些证据表明，通过空调进行适应可以缓解这种关系。鉴于气候变化将增加极端温度的暴露，我们的研究结果揭示了气候变化在最脆弱群体中带来的额外成本。

papers.title: Research and/or Development? Financial Frictions and Innovation Investment
papers.authors: Filippo Mezzanotti, Timothy Simcoe
papers.abstract: Abstract U.S. firms have reduced their investment in scientific research (“R”) compared to product development (“D”), raising questions about the returns to each type of investment, and about the reasons for this shift. We use Census data that disaggregates “R” from “D” to study how US firms adjust their innovation investments in response to an external increase in funding cost. Companies with greater demand for refinancing during the 2008 financial crisis made larger cuts to R&D investment. This reduction in R&D is achieved almost entirely by reducing investments in basic and applied research. Development remains essentially unchanged. Although patenting is more strongly correlated with development than research investments, the impact of the crisis appears in citation-weighted patent output after 3 to 5 years. Finally, we show that if other firms patenting similar technologies are exposed to the crisis, then a focal firm's Development investment declines. We consider several mechanisms that could explain these results, and without ruling out every alternative, conclude that the overall pattern is consistent with an important role for technological competition in R&D financing decisions.
papers.zh_title: 研究与/或开发？金融摩擦与创新投资
papers.zh_abstract: 美国企业已减少对科学研究（“R”）的投资，相较于产品开发（“D”），这引发了对各类投资回报率以及这一转变原因的疑问。我们利用将“R”与“D”分开统计的人口普查数据，研究美国企业如何调整其创新投资以应对外部融资成本上升。在2008年金融危机期间，再融资需求较大的企业更大幅度地削减了研发投资。这种研发削减几乎完全是通过减少基础研究和应用研究投资实现的，而开发投资基本保持不变。尽管专利活动与开发投资的相关性比与研究投资更强，但危机的影响在3至5年后的引用加权专利产出中显现。最后，我们表明，如果其他申请类似技术专利的企业也受到危机冲击，那么焦点企业的开发投资会下降。我们考虑了可能解释这些结果的几种机制，并在不排除所有替代解释的情况下得出结论：整体模式与技术创新竞争在研发融资决策中发挥重要作用是一致的。

papers.title: US Monetary Policy and the Return to Price Stability
papers.authors: Richard H. Clarida
papers.abstract: This paper assesses the proximate causes of the post pandemic surge in US inflation, the Federal Reserve's real time reaction to and interpretation of incoming data in 2021, and the pivot to raising rates and shrinking the balance sheet that commenced in 2022 and continues in 2023. Particular attention is devoted to the role, if any, that Fed's August 2020 revisions to its monetary policy framework may have played in delaying lift - off relative to counterfactuals informed by simple policy rules, including a framework - consistent "shortfalls" policy rule featured in its semi - annual Monetary Policy Reports.
papers.zh_title: 美国货币政策与回归价格稳定
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了疫情后美国通胀飙升的直接原因、美联储在2021年对实时数据的反应和解读，以及始于2022年并持续至2023年的加息和缩表政策转向。特别关注美联储2020年8月对其货币政策框架的修订是否以及在多大程度上导致了加息启动延迟，相较于由简单政策规则（包括其半年度货币政策报告中一项符合框架的“短缺”政策规则）所推导的反事实情景。

papers.title: Currency Areas, Labor Markets, and Regional Cyclical Sensitivity
papers.authors: Katheryn Russ, Jay C. Shambaugh, Sanjay R. Singh
papers.abstract: In his papers during the lead up to the birth of the European Monetary Union, Obstfeld considered whether the countries forming the EMU were sufficiently similar to survive a single monetary policy—and more importantly, whether they had the capacity to adjust to asymmetric shocks given a single monetary and exchange rate policy. The convention at the time was to take the United States as the baseline for a smoothly functioning currency union. We document the evolution of the literature on regional labor market adjustment within the United States, expanding on stylized facts illustrating how stratification in local labor market outcomes appears far more persistent today than 30 years ago in the context of what Obstfeld and Peri (1998) call non-adjustment in unemployment rates. We then extend the currency union literature by adding an additional consideration: differences in regional cyclical sensitivity. Using measures of cyclicality and Obstfeld-Peri-type non-adjustment, we explore the characteristics of places that can get left behind when local labor markets respond differently to national shocks and discuss implications for policy.
papers.zh_title: 货币区、劳动力市场与区域周期敏感性
papers.zh_abstract: 在欧洲货币联盟诞生前夕的论文中，Obstfeld探讨了组成EMU的国家是否足够相似以承受单一货币政策——更重要的是，在单一货币和汇率政策下，它们是否有能力调整以应对不对称冲击。当时的惯例是将美国视为运作良好的货币联盟的基准。我们记录了美国区域劳动力市场调整文献的演变，扩展了典型事实，说明在Obstfeld和Peri（1998）所称的失业率非调整背景下，如今地方劳动力市场结果的分层现象比30年前更为持久。然后，我们通过增加一个额外考量——区域周期敏感性的差异——来扩展货币联盟文献。利用周期性指标和Obstfeld-Peri式的非调整指标，我们探讨了当地方劳动力市场对国家冲击反应不同时可能被落下的地区的特征，并讨论了对政策的启示。

papers.title: The Search for Good Jobs: Evidence from a Six-year Field Experiment in Uganda
papers.authors: Oriana Bandiera, Vittorio Bassi, Robin Burgess, Imran Rasul, Munshi Sulaiman, Anna Vitali
papers.abstract: There are 420 million young people in Africa today. Understanding how youth search for jobs and what affects their ability to find good jobs is of paramount importance. We do so using a field experiment tracking young job seekers for six years in Uganda's main cities. We examine how two standard labor market interventions impact their search for good jobs: vocational training, vocational training combined with matching youth to firms, and matching only. Training is offered in sectors with high quality firms. The matching intervention assigns workers for interviews with such firms. At baseline, unskilled youth are optimistic about their job prospects, especially over the job offer arrival rate from high quality firms. Those offered vocational training become even more optimistic, search more intensively and direct their search towards high quality firms. However, youth additionally offered matching become discouraged because call back rates from firm owners are far lower than their prior. As a result, they search less intensively and direct their search towards lower quality firms. These divergent expectations and search behaviors have persistent impacts: vocational trainees without match offers achieve greater labor market success, largely because they end up employed at higher quality firms than youth additionally offered matching. Our analysis highlights the foundational but separate roles of skills and expectations in job search, how interventions cause youth to become optimistic or discouraged, and how this matters for long run sorting and individual labor market outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 寻找好工作：来自乌干达一项六年实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 如今非洲有4.2亿年轻人。了解年轻人如何寻找工作以及什么因素影响他们找到好工作的能力至关重要。我们通过一项在乌干达主要城市跟踪年轻求职者六年的实地实验来做到这一点。我们考察了两种标准的劳动力市场干预措施如何影响他们对好工作的寻找：职业培训、职业培训结合将青年与公司匹配，以及仅匹配。培训在拥有高质量公司的行业提供。匹配干预措施为求职者安排与这些公司的面试。在基线时，低技能青年对自己的就业前景持乐观态度，尤其是对来自高质量公司的工作机会到达率。那些获得职业培训的人变得更加乐观，更密集地搜索，并将搜索方向转向高质量公司。然而，额外获得匹配机会的青年变得沮丧，因为公司老板的回电率远低于他们的先验预期。结果，他们搜索的密集度降低，并将搜索方向转向低质量公司。这些不同的预期和搜索行为产生了持久的影响：没有匹配机会的职业培训学员在劳动力市场上取得了更大的成功，这主要是因为与额外获得匹配机会的青年相比，他们最终受雇于更高质量的公司。我们的分析强调了技能和预期在求职中的基础性但独立的作用，干预措施如何使青年变得乐观或沮丧，以及这对长期分类和个人劳动力市场结果的重要性。

papers.title: Productivity Variation and Input Misallocation: Evidence from Hospitals
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Carrie H. Colla, Jonathan S. Skinner
papers.abstract: There are widespread differences in total factor productivity across producers in the U.S. and around the world. To explain these variations, we use simple economic insights to test the extent to which U.S. hospitals misallocate inputs by examining if the marginal return to specific inputs, conditional on total cost, differs from zero. This test does not require knowledge of the production function or specific input prices. We find large and systematic deviations from efficiency: Holding spending fixed, misallocation is estimated to account for as much as 3.3 percentage points (11% of mortality) across hospitals, and explains roughly 25% of hospital productivity variation. These results suggest large gains from improving how—not how much—hospitals spend.

papers.title: Drinking Water Contaminant Concentrations and Birth Outcomes
papers.authors: Richard DiSalvo, Elaine L. Hill
papers.abstract: Previous research in the US has found negative health effects of contamination when it triggers regulatory violations. An important question is whether levels of contamination that do not trigger a health-based violation impact health. We study the impact of drinking water contamination in community water systems on birth outcomes using drinking water sampling results data in Pennsylvania. We create an overall water quality index and an index specific to reproductive health. We focus on the effects of water contamination for births not exposed to regulatory violations. Our most rigorous specification employs mother fixed effects and finds changing from the 10th to the 90th percentile of water contamination (among births not exposed to regulatory violations) increases low birth weight by 12% and preterm birth by 17%.
papers.zh_title: 饮用水污染物浓度与出生结局
papers.zh_abstract: 先前在美国的研究发现，当污染触发监管违规时，会对健康产生负面影响。一个重要的问题是，未触发基于健康的违规标准的污染水平是否会影响健康。我们利用宾夕法尼亚州的饮用水采样结果数据，研究了社区供水系统中饮用水污染对出生结局的影响。我们创建了一个总体水质指数和一个专门针对生殖健康的指数。我们重点关注未暴露于监管违规的出生人口中水污染的影响。我们最严格的设定采用了母亲固定效应，发现（在未暴露于监管违规的出生人口中）水污染程度从第10百分位变化到第90百分位，会使低出生体重率增加12%，早产率增加17%。

papers.title: The Summer Drop in Female Employment
papers.authors: Brendan M. Price, Melanie Wasserman
papers.abstract: We provide the first systematic account of summer declines in women’s labor market activity. From May to July, the employment-to-population ratio among prime-age US women declines by 1.1 percentage points, whereas male employment rises; women’s total hours worked fall by 9.8 percent, more than twice the decline among men. School closures for summer break—and corresponding lapses in implicit childcare—provide a unifying explanation for these patterns. The summer drop in female employment aligns with cross-state differences in the timing of school closures, is concentrated among mothers with young school-age children, and coincides with increased time spent engaging in childcare. Decomposing the gender gap in summer work interruptions across job types defined by sector and occupation, we find large contributions from both gender differences in job allocation and gender differences within job types in the propensity to exit employment over the summer. Women’s summer work interruptions contribute to gender gaps in pay: women’s weekly earnings decline by 3.3 percent over the summer months, about five times the decline among men.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：J13, J16, J22, J24
papers.zh_title: 女性就业的夏季下降
papers.zh_abstract: 我们首次系统性地阐述了夏季女性劳动力市场活动的下降。从5月到7月，美国黄金年龄女性的就业人口比率下降了1.1个百分点，而男性就业率则上升；女性的总工作时间下降了9.8%，是男性下降幅度的两倍多。学校因暑假关闭——以及随之而来的隐性儿童照护中断——为这些模式提供了一个统一的解释。女性就业的夏季下降与各州学校关闭时间的差异相一致，主要集中在有年幼学龄儿童的母亲中，并且与花在儿童照护上的时间增加相吻合。通过按行业和职业划分的工作类型对夏季工作中断的性别差距进行分解，我们发现，性别在工作分配上的差异以及性别在同一工作类型内夏季退出就业倾向的差异，都对此有较大贡献。女性的夏季工作中断导致了性别薪酬差距：女性夏季每周收入下降3.3%，约为男性下降幅度的五倍。

papers.title: Author Country of Origin and Attention on Open Science Platforms: Evidence from COVID-19 Preprints
papers.authors: Caroline Fry, Megan MacGarvie
papers.abstract: Online platforms such as preprint servers have become an important way to disseminate new scientific knowledge prior to peer review. However, little is known about how attention to preprints may vary across authors from different countries of origin, particularly relative to evaluation in expert-controlled systems such as scientific journals. This study explores how readers allocated attention across preprints in the initial months of the COVID-19 pandemic, a time when there was an increase in demand for new research and a corresponding increase in the use of preprint platforms around the world. We find that, after controlling carefully for article quality and topic as well as the prominence of the preprint’s ultimate publication outlet, preprints with authors from Chinese institutions receive less attention, and preprints with authors from U.S. institutions receive more attention, than preprints with authors from the rest of the world. In an exploration of potential mechanisms driving the observed effects, we find evidence that when evaluation is more constrained, in terms of lack of knowledge or expertise and increase in time pressure, audiences tend to make greater use of preprint authors’ country of origin as a proxy for quality or relevance. The results suggest that geographic biases may persist or even be exacerbated on platforms designed to promote unfettered access to early research findings.
papers.zh_title: 作者来源国与开放科学平台上的关注度：来自COVID-19预印本的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 预印本服务器等在线平台已成为在同行评审前传播新科学知识的重要方式。然而，关于来自不同来源国的作者所发布的预印本所获得的关注度如何变化，尤其是在与科学期刊等专家控制系统中的评估相比较时，我们知之甚少。本研究探讨了在COVID-19大流行初期（当时对新研究的需求增加，全球范围内预印本平台的使用也相应增加），读者如何在预印本之间分配关注度。我们发现，在仔细控制了文章质量、主题以及预印本最终发表渠道的知名度后，与来自世界其他地区作者的预印本相比，来自中国机构作者的预印本获得的关注度较低，而来自美国机构作者的预印本获得的关注度较高。在探索驱动所观察效应的潜在机制时，我们发现证据表明，当评估受到更多限制（例如缺乏知识或专业知识以及时间压力增加）时，受众倾向于更多地利用预印本作者的来源国作为质量或相关性的代理指标。结果表明，在旨在促进早期研究成果自由获取的平台上，地理偏见可能持续存在甚至加剧。

papers.title: Testing Above the Limit: Drinking Water Contamination and Test Scores
papers.authors: Michelle M. Marcus
papers.abstract: This paper provides estimates of the contemporaneous effect of drinking water quality violations on students’ academic achievement. Using student-level test score data with residential addresses, geographic information on water systems, and drinking water violations from North Carolina, I estimate the within-student impacts of poor water quality on student test scores. Exposure to a bacteria violation during the school year decreases math scores by about 0.038 standard deviations when the public is uninformed. Results suggest that poor water quality may impact retention or comprehension of material throughout the school year.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EEE, EH；JEL：I18, I24, Q51, Q53
papers.zh_title: 超标测试：饮用水污染与考试成绩
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了饮用水质量违规对学生学业成绩同期影响的估计。利用北卡罗来纳州的学生层面考试成绩数据（包含居住地址）、供水系统地理信息以及饮用水违规数据，我估计了水质不佳对学生考试成绩的个体内影响。在公众不知情的情况下，学年期间暴露于细菌违规会使数学成绩下降约0.038个标准差。结果表明，水质不佳可能会影响整个学年中材料的记忆或理解。

papers.title: Seniority
papers.authors: DongIk Kang, Miles S. Kimball
papers.abstract: This paper studies the optimal wage structure of a firm with imperfect monitoring of worker effort. We find that when firms can commit to (implicit) long-term contracts, imperfect monitoring leads to optimal wage profiles that reflect worker seniority. We provide a precise measure of seniority as a ratio of co-state variables and illustrate how this measure of seniority evolves over the worker’s tenure with the firm and how it affects wages, effort, and separation rates. We also show how earnings loss from unemployment reflects seniority and how optimal monitoring intensity, amenities and on-the-job training evolve with seniority.
papers.zh_title: 资历
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个对工人努力程度存在不完全监督的企业的最优工资结构。我们发现，当企业能够承诺（隐性）长期合同时，不完全监督会导致反映工人资历的最优工资曲线。我们提供了一个精确的资历度量，即协态变量的比率，并说明了这种资历度量如何随着工人在企业中的任期演变，以及它如何影响工资、努力程度和离职率。我们还展示了失业导致的收入损失如何反映资历，以及最优监督强度、福利和在职培训如何随资历变化。

papers.title: Who Benefits From The Export-Import Bank Aid?
papers.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Joao Monteiro
papers.abstract: We study the effectiveness of government aid to exporters by exploring an exogenous shock that affected the ability of the Export-Import Bank of the United States (EXIM) to provide aid to U.S. exporters through loan guarantees to importers. We focus on Boeing, the largest individual recipient of aid. We find that Boeing sales declined only modestly – despite Boeing’s significant reliance on EXIM for export credit. Moreover, we find that this decline is driven by financially constrained airlines or by airlines operating in countries with underdeveloped financial systems. We show that airlines in developed countries were easily able to substitute EXIM guaranteed loans for private credit and thus could still purchase Boeing aircraft despite the EXIM shock. Our results are consistent with the view that government-sponsored export credit is mostly relevant for importers in countries with underdeveloped financial systems, which represent a relatively small share of total EXIM aid.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F14, F34, G28, G31, L93
papers.zh_title: 谁从进出口银行援助中受益？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究一个影响美国进出口银行向美国出口商提供援助（通过向进口商提供贷款担保）能力的外生冲击，来探讨政府援助出口商的有效性。我们重点关注波音公司，它是援助的最大个体接受者。我们发现，尽管波音严重依赖进出口银行提供出口信贷，但其销售额仅出现小幅下降。此外，我们发现这种下降是由财务受限的航空公司或在金融体系不发达的国家运营的航空公司所驱动的。我们表明，发达国家的航空公司能够轻易地用私人信贷替代进出口银行担保的贷款，因此尽管受到进出口银行冲击，它们仍能购买波音飞机。我们的结果与以下观点一致：政府支持的出口信贷主要与金融体系不发达国家的进口商相关，而这些国家在进出口银行总援助中所占份额相对较小。

papers.title: Strategic Money and Credit Ledgers
papers.authors: Markus K. Brunnermeier, Jonathan Payne
papers.abstract: This paper studies strategic decision making by a private currency ledger operator, which faces competition from public money and/or other ledgers. A monopoly ledger operator can incentivize contract enforcement across the financial sector by threatening exclusion, but it can also impose markups through its pricing power. Currency competition limits rent extraction, but also makes coordinated contract enforcement more fragile. The emergent market structure bundles the provision of ledger and platform trading technologies. Regulation to ensure platform cooperation on contract enforcement and competition on markup setting is effective so long as agents can easily switch between platforms.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ME；JEL：E4, E42, E5, E50, E59, F39, G21, G23, L10, L13
papers.zh_title: 战略货币与信用账本
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究私人货币账本运营商的战略决策，该运营商面临来自公共货币和/或其他账本的竞争。垄断账本运营商可以通过威胁排斥来激励金融部门内的合同执行，但也可以通过其定价权施加加价。货币竞争限制了租金提取，但也使协调的合同执行更加脆弱。涌现的市场结构将账本提供与平台交易技术捆绑在一起。只要代理人能够在平台之间轻松切换，确保平台在合同执行上合作并在加价设定上竞争的监管就是有效的。

papers.title: The Effect of Child Endowment on Fertility Choices
papers.authors: Victor Lavy, Yeshaya Nussbaum
papers.abstract: Does the intellectual endowment of born children affect their parents’ future fertility choices? We study the effect of positive or negative shocks to child endowment on the intensive margin of fertility using data on intellectually gifted and intellectually disabled children. Because families with an exceptional-endowment child differ from those without, we propose quasi-experiments that exploit differences in the child’s birth order to estimate the effect of their birth on further fertility. We find that the birth of a gifted child increases family size. However, parents must be able to recognize the endowment’s exceptional ability for it to have an effect. Similarly, the birth of an intellectually disabled child negatively affects family size, but only when the child is of high birth order. Our results point to child endowment as an important factor in determining fertility choices.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I0, J10
papers.zh_title: 子女禀赋对生育选择的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 已出生子女的智力禀赋是否会影响父母未来的生育选择？我们利用智力超常儿童和智力障碍儿童的数据，研究子女禀赋的正向或负向冲击对生育密集边际的影响。由于拥有特殊禀赋子女的家庭与没有此类子女的家庭不同，我们提出了利用子女出生顺序差异的准实验，来估计其出生对进一步生育的影响。我们发现，天才儿童的出生会增加家庭规模。然而，父母必须能够认识到这种禀赋的卓越能力，才能产生这种效应。同样，智力障碍儿童的出生会对家庭规模产生负面影响，但只有当该儿童出生顺序较高时才会如此。我们的结果表明，子女禀赋是决定生育选择的重要因素。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence and Scientific Discovery: A Model of Prioritized Search
papers.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, John McHale, Alexander Oettl
papers.abstract: We model a key step in the innovation process, hypothesis generation, as the making of predictions over a vast combinatorial space. Traditionally, scientists and innovators use theory or intuition to guide their search. Increasingly, however, they use artificial intelligence (AI) instead. We model innovation as resulting from sequential search over a combinatorial design space, where the prioritization of costly tests is achieved using a predictive model. We represent the ranked output of the predictive model in the form of a hazard function. We then use discrete survival analysis to obtain the main innovation outcomes of interest – the probability of innovation, expected search duration, and expected profit. We describe conditions under which shifting from the traditional method of hypothesis generation, using theory or intuition, to instead using AI that generates higher fidelity predictions, results in a higher likelihood of successful innovation, shorter search durations, and higher expected profits. We then explore the complementarity between hypothesis generation and hypothesis testing; potential gains from AI may not be realized without significant investment in testing capacity. We discuss the policy implications.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与科学发现：优先搜索模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将创新过程中的一个关键步骤——假设生成——建模为在广阔的组合空间中进行预测。传统上，科学家和创新者使用理论或直觉来指导他们的搜索。然而，他们越来越多地使用人工智能（AI）来代替。我们将创新建模为在组合设计空间上的顺序搜索，其中使用预测模型对昂贵测试进行优先级排序。我们以风险函数的形式表示预测模型的排序输出。然后，我们使用离散生存分析来获得主要的创新结果——创新概率、预期搜索持续时间和预期利润。我们描述了从使用理论或直觉的传统假设生成方法转向使用生成更高保真度预测的AI的条件，这会导致更高的成功创新可能性、更短的搜索持续时间和更高的预期利润。然后，我们探讨了假设生成与假设测试之间的互补性；如果没有对测试能力的大量投资，AI的潜在收益可能无法实现。我们讨论了政策含义。

papers.title: The Effect of Medicaid Expansion on the Take-up of Disability Benefits by Race and Ethnicity
papers.authors: Becky Staiger, Madeline S. Helfer, Jessica Van Parys
papers.abstract: Public disability programs provide financial support to 12 million working-age individuals per year, though not all eligible individuals take up these programs. Mixed evidence exists regarding the impact of Medicaid eligibility expansion on program take-up, and even less is known about the relationship between Medicaid expansion and racial and ethnic disparities in take-up. Using 2009—2020 Current Population Survey (CPS) data, we compare changes in Supplemental Security Income (SSI) and Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) take-up among respondents with disabilities living in Medicaid expansion states to respondents with disabilities living in non-expansion states, before and after Medicaid expansion. We further explore heterogeneity by race/ethnicity. We find that Medicaid expansion reduced SSI take-up by 10% overall, particularly among White and Hispanic respondents (10% and 21%, respectively). Medicaid expansion increased SSDI take-up by 8% overall, particularly among White and Black respondents (9% and 11%, respectively). Moreover, we find that Medicaid expansion reduced the probability that respondents with disabilities had employer-sponsored health insurance by approximately 8%, suggesting that expansion may have reduced job-lock among the SSDI-eligible, contributing to the observed increase in SSDI take-up.
papers.zh_title: 医疗补助扩展对按种族和民族划分的残疾福利领取的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 公共残疾项目每年为1200万处于工作年龄的个体提供经济支持，但并非所有符合条件的个体都领取这些项目。关于医疗补助资格扩展对项目领取的影响存在混合证据，而关于医疗补助扩展与领取中的种族和民族差异之间的关系则知之更少。使用2009年至2020年当前人口调查（CPS）数据，我们比较了医疗补助扩展前后，生活在扩展州与非扩展州的残疾受访者中补充保障收入（SSI）和社会保障残疾保险（SSDI）领取的变化。我们进一步按种族/民族探讨了异质性。我们发现，医疗补助扩展总体上使SSI领取减少了10%，尤其是在白人和西班牙裔受访者中（分别减少10%和21%）。医疗补助扩展总体上使SSDI领取增加了8%，尤其是在白人和黑人受访者中（分别增加9%和11%）。此外，我们发现医疗补助扩展使残疾受访者拥有雇主提供的健康保险的概率降低了约8%，这表明扩展可能减少了符合SSDI条件者的工作锁定，从而促进了观察到的SSDI领取增加。

papers.title: School Accountability, Long-Run Criminal Activity, and Self-Sufficiency
papers.authors: Ozkan Eren, David N. Figlio, Naci H. Mocan, Orgul Ozturk
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of school accountability on adult crime and economic self-sufficiency. We employ a unique source of linked administrative data from a Southern state and exploit exogenous variation generated by the state's accountability regime. Our findings indicate that a school's receipt of a lower accountability rating, at the bottom end of the ratings distribution, decreases adult criminal involvement. Accountability pressures also reduce the propensity of students' reliance on social welfare programs in adulthood and these effects persist at least until when individuals reach their early 30s. Further examination reveals that our results are consistent with an explanation related to improvements in human capital accumulation.
papers.zh_title: 学校问责制、长期犯罪活动与自给自足
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了学校问责制对成人犯罪和经济自给自足的影响。我们使用了来自美国南部一个州的独特关联行政数据，并利用了该州问责制产生的外生变异。我们的研究结果表明，学校在评级分布底端获得较低的问责评级，会减少成人的犯罪参与。问责压力还降低了学生成年后依赖社会福利项目的倾向，这些效应至少持续到个体30岁出头。进一步考察表明，我们的结果与人力资本积累改善的解释一致。

papers.title: The Dynastic Benefits of Early Childhood Education: Participant Benefits and Family Spillovers
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García, Frederik H. Bennhoff, Duncan Ermini Leaf
papers.abstract: We demonstrate the social efficiency of investing in high-quality early childhood education using newly collected data from the HighScope Perry Preschool Project. The data analyzed are the longest follow-up of any randomized early childhood education program. Annual observations of participant outcomes up to midlife allow us to provide a cost-benefit analysis without relying on forecasts. Adult outcomes on the participants' children and siblings allow us to quantify spillover benefits. The program generates a benefit-cost ratio of 6.0 (p-value = 0.03). Spillover benefits increase this ratio to 7.5 (p-value = 0.00).
papers.zh_title: 早期儿童教育的代际收益：参与者收益与家庭溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用从HighScope佩里学前项目新收集的数据，证明了投资高质量早期儿童教育的社会效率。所分析的数据是任何随机早期儿童教育项目中最长的跟踪数据。对参与者结果直至中年的年度观察使我们能够在不依赖预测的情况下进行成本效益分析。参与者子女和兄弟姐妹的成人结果使我们能够量化溢出收益。该项目产生的效益成本比为6.0（p值=0.03）。溢出收益将此比率提高到7.5（p值=0.00）。

papers.title: Urban Forests: Environmental Health Values and Risks
papers.authors: Jianwei Xing, Zhiren Hu, Fan Xia, Jintao Xu, Eric Zou
papers.abstract: Urban forests are ubiquitous, yet their impacts and values remain largely unknown. We study a massive urban afforestation policy in Beijing that planted 1/3 of a million acres of greenery in less than a decade. We conduct a remote-sensing audit of the program, finding that it contributes to a substantial greening up of the city. This causes significant downwind air quality improvement, reducing average PM2.5 concentration at city population hubs by 4.2%. Rapid vegetation growth unexpectedly led to a 7.4% increase in pollen exposure. Analysis of medical claims data shows that increased aeroallergens triggered emergency room visits, mirroring pollution effects though much less severe. Monetized net health benefits of the program amount to 1.5% of the city’s GDP. Urban forests are only partially capitalized in housing values, with buyers mainly appreciating proximity to green spaces but not the air quality improvements they bring.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, PE；JEL：I18, Q23, Q53, Q56, R11
papers.zh_title: 城市森林：环境健康价值与风险
papers.zh_abstract: 城市森林无处不在，但其影响和价值在很大程度上仍然未知。我们研究了北京一项大规模的城市绿化政策，该政策在不到十年内种植了33万英亩的绿地。我们对该项目进行了遥感审计，发现它显著增加了城市的绿化程度。这导致了下风方向空气质量的显著改善，使城市人口中心的平均PM2.5浓度降低了4.2%。快速的植被增长意外地导致花粉暴露增加了7.4%。对医疗索赔数据的分析表明，气源性过敏原的增加引发了急诊就诊，这与污染效应相似，但严重程度低得多。该项目的货币化净健康效益相当于该市GDP的1.5%。城市森林仅部分资本化在住房价值中，购房者主要欣赏靠近绿地的便利，而非其带来的空气质量改善。

papers.title: The Impact of Public School Choice: Evidence from Los Angeles' Zones of Choice
papers.authors: Christopher Campos, Caitlin Kearns
papers.abstract: Does a school district that expands school choice provide better outcomes for students than a neighborhood-based assignment system? This paper studies the Zones of Choice (ZOC) program, a school choice initiative of the Los Angeles Unified School District (LAUSD) that created small high school markets in some neighborhoods but left attendance-zone boundaries in place throughout the rest of the district. We study market-level impacts of choice on student achievement and college enrollment using a differences-in-differences design. Student outcomes in ZOC markets increased markedly, narrowing achievement and college enrollment gaps between ZOC neighborhoods and the rest of the district. The effects of ZOC are larger for schools exposed to more competition, supporting the notion that competition is a key channel. Demand estimates suggest families place substantial weight on schools' academic quality, providing schools with competition-induced incentives to improve their effectiveness. The evidence demonstrates that public school choice programs have the potential to improve school quality and reduce neighborhood-based disparities in educational opportunity.
papers.zh_title: 公立学校选择的影响：来自洛杉矶“选择区”的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 一个扩大学校选择的学区是否比基于邻里的分配制度能为学生提供更好的结果？本文研究了“选择区”（ZOC）项目，这是洛杉矶联合学区（LAUSD）的一项学校选择计划，该项目在一些社区创建了小型高中市场，但在学区的其他地区保留了入学区域边界。我们使用双重差分法研究了选择对市场层面学生成绩和大学入学率的影响。ZOC市场中学生的成绩显著提高，缩小了ZOC社区与学区其他地区之间的成绩和大学入学率差距。ZOC对面临更多竞争的学校影响更大，这支持了竞争是关键渠道的观点。需求估计表明，家庭非常重视学校的学术质量，这为学校提供了竞争带来的改进效率的激励。证据表明，公立学校选择项目有潜力提高学校质量，并减少基于邻里的教育机会差距。

papers.title: Trends in Social Security Incentives in Belgium
papers.authors: Anne-Lore Fraikin, Alain Jousten, Mathieu Lefebvre
papers.abstract: In Belgium, a series of social security reforms have been implemented over the years with the overarching goal of increasing the labor force participation through better work incentives. Using individual-level administrative data, the paper studies the impact of those incentive-based reforms on observed changes in older workers’ employment patterns. We investigate how social security incentives and particularly their changes over time can explain the retirement decision. We calculate indicators of benefit entitlement and derive retirement incentive measures. Using micro-estimation techniques, we find that more generous retirement provision contribute to earlier retirement. Counterfactual reform simulations show strongly incentivizing effects at lower ages and more mixed results at higher ages – particularly for men.
papers.zh_title: 比利时社会保障激励的趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 在比利时，多年来实施了一系列社会保障改革，其总体目标是通过更好的工作激励来提高劳动力参与率。本文利用个人层面的行政数据，研究了这些基于激励的改革对观察到的老年工人就业模式变化的影响。我们调查了社会保障激励，特别是其随时间的变化，如何解释退休决策。我们计算了福利应享权利指标，并推导出退休激励措施。使用微观估计技术，我们发现更慷慨的退休福利会导致更早退休。反事实改革模拟显示，在较低年龄有强烈的激励效应，而在较高年龄（尤其是男性）则结果更为复杂。

papers.title: Market Access and Migration: Evidence from the Panama Canal Opening during the First Great Migration
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Luis F. Jaramillo, Mateo Uribe-Castro
papers.abstract: This paper examines the influence of transportation infrastructure on migration decisions in the context of the Great Migration in the United States. Focusing on the opening of the Panama Canal in 1920, we isolate the effect of improved economic opportunities from reduced migration costs. Using full-count Census data, we find that Southern African American migrants preferred areas with enhanced market access, leading to higher inflows after 1920. The study highlights the inter- play between migrant networks and labor markets in shaping migration patterns. Our findings underscore the significance of local market conditions induced by improvements in local market access in influencing migration decisions during the Great Migration.
papers.zh_title: 市场准入与移民：第一次大迁徙期间巴拿马运河开通的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在美国大迁徙的背景下，考察了交通基础设施对移民决策的影响。聚焦于1920年巴拿马运河的开通，我们将改善经济机会的影响与降低移民成本的影响分离开来。利用全量人口普查数据，我们发现南方非裔美国移民更偏好市场准入改善的地区，导致1920年后这些地区的流入量更高。该研究强调了移民网络与劳动力市场在塑造移民模式中的相互作用。我们的发现强调了在大迁徙期间，由当地市场准入改善所引发的当地市场条件在影响移民决策中的重要性。

papers.title: Estimating the Spatial Amplification of Damage Caused by Degradation in the Amazon
papers.authors: Rafael Araujo, Juliano Assunção, Marina Hirota, José A. Scheinkman
papers.abstract: The Amazon rainforests have been undergoing unprecedented levels of human-induced disturbances. In addition to local impacts, such changes are likely to cascade following the eastern-western atmospheric flow generated by trade winds. We propose a model of spatial and temporal interactions created by this flow to estimate the spread of local disturbances to downwind locations along atmospheric trajectories. The spatial component captures cascading effects propagated by neighboring regions while the temporal component captures persistence. All these network effects can be described by a single matrix, acting as a spatial multiplier that amplifies local disturbances. This matrix can be used to easily map where the damage of an initial forest disturbance is amplified and propagated to. We identify regions that are likely to cause the largest impact throughout the basin, and those that are the most vulnerable to shocks caused by remote deforestation. On average, the presence of cascading effects mediated by winds doubles the impact of an initial damage. However, there is heterogeneity in this impact. While damage in some regions does not propagate, in others amplification may reach 250%.
papers.zh_title: 估算亚马逊森林退化造成的损害的空间放大效应
papers.zh_abstract: 亚马逊雨林正遭受前所未有的人为干扰。除了局部影响外，这些变化很可能沿着信风产生的东-西大气流级联传播。我们提出了一个由这种气流产生的空间和时间相互作用模型，以估计局部干扰沿大气轨迹向下风位置的扩散。空间分量捕捉了由邻近区域传播的级联效应，而时间分量则捕捉了持续性。所有这些网络效应都可以用一个单一的矩阵来描述，该矩阵作为一个空间乘数，放大了局部干扰。该矩阵可用于轻松绘制初始森林损害的放大和传播区域。我们识别出可能对整个流域造成最大影响的区域，以及最容易受到远程森林砍伐冲击的区域。平均而言，由风介导的级联效应的存在使初始损害的影响加倍。然而，这种影响存在异质性。虽然某些地区的损害不会传播，但在其他地区，放大效应可能达到250%。

papers.title: Micro vs Macro Labor Supply Elasticities: The Role of Dynamic Returns to Effort
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven, Claus Thustrup Kreiner, Kristian Larsen, Jakob Egholt Søgaard
papers.abstract: We investigate long-run earnings responses to taxes in the presence of dynamic returns to effort. First, we develop a theoretical model of earnings determination with dynamic returns to effort. In this model, earnings responses are delayed and mediated by job switches. Second, using administrative data from Denmark, we verify our model’s predictions about earnings and hours-worked patterns over the lifecycle. Third, we provide a quasi-experimental analysis of long-run earnings elasticities. Informed by our model, the empirical strategy exploits variation among job switchers. We find that the long-run elasticity is around 0.5, considerably larger than the short-run elasticity of roughly 0.2.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：C1, D6, E6, H2, H3, J2, J3
papers.zh_title: 微观与宏观劳动力供给弹性：努力动态回报的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在努力动态回报的情况下，收入对税收的长期反应。首先，我们建立了一个具有努力动态回报的收入决定理论模型。在该模型中，收入反应是延迟的，并通过工作转换来调节。其次，利用丹麦的行政数据，我们验证了模型关于生命周期中收入和工时模式的预测。第三，我们提供了长期收入弹性的准实验分析。根据我们的模型，实证策略利用了工作转换者之间的差异。我们发现长期弹性约为0.5，远大于约0.2的短期弹性。

papers.title: Unpacking P-Hacking and Publication Bias
papers.authors: Abel Brodeur, Scott E. Carrell, David N. Figlio, Lester R. Lusher
papers.abstract: We use unique data from journal submissions to identify and unpack publication bias and p-hacking. We find that initial submissions display significant bunching, suggesting the distribution among published statistics cannot be fully attributed to a publication bias in peer review. Desk-rejected manuscripts display greater heaping than those sent for review i.e. marginally significant results are more likely to be desk rejected. Reviewer recommendations, in contrast, are positively associated with statistical significance. Overall, the peer review process has little effect on the distribution of test statistics. Lastly, we track rejected papers and present evidence that the prevalence of publication biases is perhaps not as prominent as feared.
papers.zh_title: 解析P值操纵与发表偏倚
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自期刊投稿的独特数据来识别和解析发表偏倚和P值操纵。我们发现，初始投稿显示出显著的聚集现象，这表明已发表统计数据的分布不能完全归因于同行评审中的发表偏倚。被直接拒稿的稿件比送审的稿件显示出更大的堆积现象，即边际显著的结果更有可能被直接拒稿。相比之下，审稿人的推荐与统计显著性呈正相关。总体而言，同行评审过程对检验统计量的分布影响很小。最后，我们追踪被拒稿件，并提供证据表明发表偏倚的普遍性可能不像人们担心的那样突出。

papers.title: Selling Subscriptions
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Benjamin Klopack, Neale Mahoney
papers.abstract: Retailers are increasingly selling goods and services via subscriptions instead of spot markets. In this paper, we study one benefit to the retailer of selling subscriptions: the possibility that – presumably because of inattention or inertia – consumers continue to pay for subscriptions after the flow benefit falls below its price. We use comprehensive data from a large payment card network and focus on credit and debit cards that get replaced (e.g., due to expiration). Replaced cards require an active subscription renewal decision, and we document that months during which cards are replaced are associated with much higher rates of cancellation for the ten subscriptions we study. We write down and estimate a stylized model of subscription renewals that allows us to recover the baseline degree of inattention. We find that estimated inattention is higher for consumers that took cash advances, a proxy for low financial sophistication. Relative to a counterfactual in which consumers are fully attentive, inattention raises seller revenues by between 14% and more than 200%. We use the estimated model to explore the quantitative impact of possible regulatory remedies.
papers.zh_title: 销售订阅服务
papers.zh_abstract: 零售商越来越多地通过订阅而非现货市场销售商品和服务。在本文中，我们研究了零售商销售订阅的一个好处：消费者（可能由于疏忽或惯性）在流量收益低于其价格后继续支付订阅费用的可能性。我们使用来自大型支付卡网络的综合数据，重点关注被更换（例如，由于到期）的信用卡和借记卡。更换卡需要主动的订阅续订决策，我们记录到，在我们研究的十种订阅中，卡被更换的月份与更高的取消率相关。我们构建并估计了一个简化的订阅续订模型，该模型使我们能够恢复基准的疏忽程度。我们发现，对于使用现金预支（作为金融素养较低的一个代理变量）的消费者，估计的疏忽程度更高。与消费者完全注意的反事实情况相比，疏忽使卖方收入增加了14%到超过200%。我们利用估计的模型来探索可能的监管补救措施的量化影响。

papers.title: The Effects of Social Insurance Benefits on Leaving Employment at Older Ages in the Netherlands
papers.authors: Adriaan Kalwij, Arie Kapteyn
papers.abstract: In the Netherlands, from 1989 to 2013, in the age group 55-63 the annual exit rate from employment to receiving social insurance benefits in the following year decreased from around 17 percent to 7 percent for men, and from 14 percent to 5 percent for women. We found that less generous social insurance benefits have had small but significant negative effects on these exit rates: The annual exit rate to social insurance benefit receipt next year (at ages 56-64) would have been about 14 percent higher for both men and women in 2013 should social insurance benefits schemes of 1989 still have been in place. This increase amounts to staying, on average, three months longer in employment from age 55 onwards in 2013 than in 1989. These findings are driven to some extent by the reduction in the maximum duration of unemployment insurance benefits in 2007, but predominantly by making (early) retirement schemes actuarially fair from 2006 onwards. The increase in disability insurance’s income replacement rate in 2006 has led to a slight increase in the exit rate from employment, conditional on eligibility. As the estimated effects of changes in the social insurance benefits from 1989 to 2013 on working beyond age 55 are relatively small, they suggest the importance of other factors such as changes in workers’ skills, improved health (on which we provide some evidence), and social insurance’s tighter eligibility criteria.
papers.zh_title: 荷兰社会保障福利对老年离职的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在荷兰，从1989年到2013年，在55-63岁年龄组中，男性从就业状态转为在下一年领取社会保障福利的年退出率从约17%下降到7%，女性从14%下降到5%。我们发现，较不慷慨的社会保障福利对这些退出率产生了虽小但显著的负面影响：如果1989年的社会保障福利计划仍然存在，2013年男性和女性在56-64岁期间下一年转为领取社会保障福利的年退出率将高出约14%。这一增长相当于在2013年，从55岁起平均比1989年多工作三个月。这些发现在一定程度上是由2007年失业保险福利最长期限的缩短所驱动的，但主要是由2006年起使（提前）退休计划在精算上公平所驱动的。2006年残疾保险收入替代率的提高，导致在符合条件的情况下，就业退出率略有上升。由于估计的1989年至2013年社会保障福利变化对55岁以上就业的影响相对较小，这表明其他因素的重要性，例如工人技能的变化、健康状况的改善（我们对此提供了一些证据）以及社会保障更严格的资格标准。

papers.title: Divorce and Property Division Laws Shape Human Capital Investment
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Elijah Neilson
papers.abstract: In theory, unilateral divorce laws alter the private incentive to invest in human capital by permitting either spouse to initiate the division of the marital assets. Using several causal research designs we show that both men and women are less likely to attain a bachelor’s degree in states with unilateral divorce laws—especially individuals who were exposed to the laws when making educational choices and who live in states requiring an even split of assets upon divorce. Unilateral divorce laws do not distort human capital investment generically—but rather in contexts where the property division laws invite moral hazard.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LE, LS；JEL：D13, J12, J13, J24, K11, K12, K36
papers.zh_title: 离婚与财产分割法如何塑造人力资本投资
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，单方无过错离婚法通过允许配偶任何一方启动婚姻资产分割，改变了人力资本投资的私人激励。利用多种因果研究设计，我们发现在实行单方无过错离婚法的州，男性和女性获得学士学位的可能性均较低——尤其是那些在做出教育选择时已受该法律影响、且居住在要求离婚时资产均分州的个体。单方无过错离婚法并非普遍扭曲人力资本投资，而是在财产分割法引发道德风险的情境下才产生这种效应。

papers.title: Why Global and Local Solutions of Open-Economy Models with Incomplete Markets Differ and Why it Matters
papers.authors: Oliver de Groot, Ceyhun Bora Durdu, Enrique G. Mendoza
papers.abstract: Global and local methods used to study open-economy incomplete-markets models yield different cyclical moments, impulse responses, spectral densities and precautionary savings. Endowment and RBC model solutions obtained with first-order, higher-order, and risky-steady-state local methods are compared with fixed-point-iteration global solutions. Analytic and numerical results show that the differences are due to the near-unit-root nature of net foreign assets under incomplete markets and inaccuracies of local methods in computing their autocorrelation. In a Sudden Stops model, quasi-linear methods that handle occasionally binding constraints understate the size of credit constraint multipliers, financial premia and macroeconomic responses.
papers.zh_title: 为何不完全市场开放经济模型的全局解与局部解存在差异及其重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 用于研究开放经济不完全市场模型的全局方法和局部方法会得出不同的周期矩、脉冲响应、谱密度和预防性储蓄。我们将通过一阶、高阶和风险稳态局部方法获得的禀赋模型和RBC模型解，与通过不动点迭代获得的全局解进行比较。解析和数值结果表明，这些差异源于不完全市场下净外国资产的近单位根性质，以及局部方法在计算其自相关性时的不准确性。在“骤停”模型中，处理偶尔有约束条件的准线性方法会低估信贷约束乘数、金融溢价和宏观经济响应的规模。

papers.title: Managing an Energy Shock: Fiscal and Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Adrien Auclert, Hugo Monnery, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: This paper studies the macroeconomic effects of energy price shocks in energy-importing economies using a heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model. When MPCs are realistically large and the elasticity of substitution between energy and domestic goods is realistically low, increases in energy prices depress real incomes and cause a recession, even if the central bank does not tighten monetary policy. Imported energy inflation can spill over to wage inflation through a wage-price spiral, but this does not mitigate the decline in real wages. Monetary tightening has limited effect on imported inflation when done in isolation, but can be powerful when done in coordination with other energy importers by lowering world energy demand. Fiscal policy, especially energy price subsidies, can isolate individual energy importers from the shock, but it has large negative externalities on other economies.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, F42, Q43
papers.zh_title: 应对能源冲击：财政与货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用异质性主体新凯恩斯模型，研究能源进口经济体中能源价格冲击的宏观经济效应。当边际消费倾向（MPC）现实地较高，且能源与国内商品之间的替代弹性现实地较低时，能源价格上涨会压低实际收入并引发经济衰退，即使央行不收紧货币政策。进口能源通胀可能通过工资-价格螺旋传导至工资通胀，但这并不能缓解实际工资的下降。单独实施的货币紧缩对进口通胀影响有限，但若与其他能源进口国协调行动，通过降低全球能源需求，则可产生强大效果。财政政策，尤其是能源价格补贴，能使单个能源进口国免受冲击，但会对其他经济体产生巨大的负外部性。

papers.title: Workers and the Green-Energy Transition: Evidence from 300 Million Job Transitions
papers.authors: E. Mark Curtis, Layla O'Kane, R. Jisung Park
papers.abstract: Using micro-data representing over 130 million online work profiles, we explore transitions into and out of jobs most likely to be affected by a transition away from carbon-intensive production technologies. Exploiting detailed textual data on job title, firm name, occupation, and industry to focus on workers employed in carbon-intensive (“dirty”) and non-carbon-intensive (“green”) jobs, we find that the rate of transition from dirty to green jobs is rising rapidly, increasing ten-fold over the period 2005-2021 including a significant uptick in EV-related jobs in recent years. Overall however, fewer than 1 percent of all workers who leave a dirty job appear to transition to a green job. We find that the persistence of employment within dirty industries varies enormously across local labor markets; in some states, over half of all transitions out of dirty jobs are into other dirty jobs. Older workers and those without a college education appear less likely to make transitions to green jobs, and more likely to transition to other dirty jobs, other jobs, or non-employment. When accounting for the fact that green jobs tend to have later start dates, it appears that green and dirty jobs have roughly comparable job durations.
papers.zh_title: 工人与绿色能源转型：来自3亿次职业转换的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用代表超过1.3亿在线工作档案的微观数据，我们探讨了进出最可能受远离碳密集型生产技术转型影响的职业的转换情况。利用关于职位名称、公司名称、职业和行业的详细文本数据，聚焦于从事碳密集型（“肮脏”）和非碳密集型（“绿色”）工作的工人，我们发现从肮脏工作向绿色工作的转换率正在迅速上升，在2005年至2021年间增长了十倍，包括近年来与电动汽车相关工作的显著增加。然而总体而言，离开肮脏工作的所有工人中，似乎只有不到1%转换到了绿色工作。我们发现，肮脏行业内的就业持续性在不同地方劳动力市场之间存在巨大差异；在某些州，超过一半的肮脏工作转换是转向其他肮脏工作。年长工人和未受过大学教育的工人似乎不太可能转向绿色工作，而更可能转向其他肮脏工作、其他工作或非就业状态。考虑到绿色工作往往有较晚的起始日期，绿色工作和肮脏工作似乎具有大致相当的工作持续时间。

papers.title: Inventor Gender and Patent Undercitation: Evidence from Causal Text Estimation
papers.authors: Yael Hochberg, Ali Kakhbod, Peiyao Li, Kunal Sachdeva
papers.abstract: Implementing a state-of-the-art machine learning technique for causal identification from text data (C-TEXT), we document that patents authored by female inventors are under-cited relative to those authored by males. Relative to what the same patent would be predicted to receive had the lead inventor instead been male, patents with a female lead inventor receive 10% fewer citations. Patents with male lead inventors tend to undercite past patents with female lead inventors, while patent examiners of both genders appear to be more even-handed in the citations they add to patent applications. For female inventors, market-based measures of patent value load significantly on the citation counts that would be predicted by C-TEXT, but do not load significantly on actual forward citations. The under-recognition of female-authored patents likely has implications for the allocation of talent in the economy.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：C13, J16, J24, J71, O30
papers.zh_title: 发明人性别与专利被引不足：来自因果文本估计的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 通过实施一种用于从文本数据中进行因果识别的最先进机器学习技术（C-TEXT），我们记录了由女性发明人撰写的专利相对于男性发明人撰写的专利被引次数较少。与同一专利在首席发明人为男性时预计会获得的引用次数相比，首席发明人为女性的专利获得的引用次数少10%。首席发明人为男性的专利倾向于少引过去由女性发明人撰写的专利，而不同性别的专利审查员在他们添加到专利申请中的引用方面似乎更为公平。对于女性发明人而言，基于市场的专利价值指标显著依赖于C-TEXT预测的引用次数，但并不显著依赖于实际的前向引用。对女性发明人专利的认可不足可能对经济中的人才配置产生影响。

papers.title: State Capacity as an Organizational Problem. Evidence from the Growth of the U.S. State Over 100 Years
papers.authors: Nicola Mastrorocco, Edoardo Teso
papers.abstract: We study how the organization of the state evolves over the process of development of a nation, using a new dataset on the internal organization of the U.S. federal bureaucracy over 1817- 1905. First, we show a series of novel facts, describing how the size of the state, its presence across the territory, and its key organizational features evolved over the nineteenth century. Second, exploiting the staggered expansion of the railroad and telegraph networks across space, we show that the ability of politicians to monitor state agents throughout the territory is an important driver of these facts: locations with lower transportation and communication costs with Washington DC have more state presence, are delegated more decision power, and have lower employee turnover. The results suggest that high monitoring costs are associated with small, personalistic state organizations based on networks of trust; technological innovations lowering monitoring costs facilitate the emergence of modern bureaucratic states.
papers.zh_title: 作为组织问题的国家能力：来自美国百年国家扩张的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用1817年至1905年间美国联邦官僚机构内部组织的新数据集，研究国家组织如何在一个国家的发展过程中演变。首先，我们展示了一系列新事实，描述了19世纪国家规模、其在全国范围内的存在以及其关键组织特征如何演变。其次，利用铁路和电报网络在不同地区的交错扩张，我们表明政治家监控全国范围内国家代理人的能力是这些事实的重要驱动因素：与华盛顿特区交通和通信成本较低的地点拥有更多的国家存在、被授予更多的决策权以及更低的员工流动率。结果表明，高监控成本与基于信任网络的小型、个人化的国家组织相关；降低监控成本的技术创新促进了现代官僚国家的出现。

papers.title: Infrastructure and Finance: Evidence from India's GQ Highway Network
papers.authors: Abhiman Das, Ejaz Ghani, Arti Grover Goswami, William R. Kerr, Ramana Nanda
papers.abstract: We use data from Reserve Bank of India to study the impact of India's Golden Quadrilateral (GQ) highway project on finance-dependent activity. Loan volumes increase by 20-30% in districts along GQ and are stronger in industries more dependent upon external finance. Loan growth begins with increases in average branch size and in places with more pre-GQ loan activity. New branch openings come later, consistent with short-run adjustment costs to expanding branch networks. These patterns are not evident in placebo tests using delayed investments in NS-EW highways. Results suggest the depth of initial financial infrastructure shapes how infrastructure investments impact localities.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, PE, PR；JEL：G21, H4, O18, R12, R14, R33, R42
papers.zh_title: 基础设施与金融：来自印度黄金四边形高速公路网络的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用印度储备银行的数据研究印度黄金四边形（GQ）高速公路项目对金融依赖型活动的影响。GQ沿线地区的贷款额增加了20-30%，并且在更依赖外部融资的行业中这种效应更强。贷款增长始于平均分行规模的增加以及GQ前贷款活动较多的地区。新分行的开设则较晚，这与扩大分行网络的短期调整成本一致。这些模式在使用延迟投资的NS-EW高速公路的安慰剂检验中并不明显。结果表明，初始金融基础设施的深度决定了基础设施投资如何影响地方经济。

papers.title: Domino Secessions: Evidence from the U.S.
papers.authors: Jean Lacroix, Kris James Mitchener, Kim Oosterlinck
papers.abstract: A secession movement is an uncertain process that evolves over time. We develop a simple theoretical framework in which regions use news to update their decisions to secede. Uncertainty and economies of scale are necessary conditions to observe “domino secessions” – sequential interdependent secessions. Empirically, we use geographically-specific assets (state bonds) to assess how uncertainty and economies of scale influenced some slaveholding states’ decisions to secede from the U.S. in the 1860s. Uncertainty prevailed over the outcome of the secession movement with financial markets updating their priors on potential seceders at the election of Abraham Lincoln, but also every time a state seceded. We further document that financial markets priced in economies of scale to both state and federal debt.
papers.zh_title: 多米诺骨牌式脱离：来自美国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 脱离运动是一个随时间演变的不确定过程。我们构建了一个简单的理论框架，其中地区利用新闻来更新其脱离决策。不确定性和规模经济是观察到“多米诺骨牌式脱离”（即连续的相互依赖的脱离）的必要条件。在实证中，我们利用地理特定的资产（州债券）来评估不确定性和规模经济如何影响1860年代一些蓄奴州脱离美国的决策。在亚伯拉罕·林肯当选时，以及每次一个州脱离时，金融市场都会更新其对潜在脱离者的先验信念，这表明脱离运动的结果存在不确定性。我们进一步证明，金融市场对州债和联邦债都定价了规模经济。

papers.title: Industry Wage Differentials: A Firm-Based Approach
papers.authors: David Card, Jesse Rothstein, Moises Yi
papers.abstract: We revisit the estimation of industry wage differentials using linked employer-employee data from the U.S. LEHD program. Building on recent advances in the measurement of employer wage premiums, we define the industry wage effect as the employment-weighted average workplace premium in that industry. We show that cross-sectional estimates of industry differentials overstate the pay premiums due to unmeasured worker heterogeneity. Conversely, estimates based on industry movers understate the true premiums, due to unmeasured heterogeneity in pay premiums within industries. Industry movers who switch to higher-premium industries tend to leave firms in the origin sector that pay above-average premiums and move to firms in the destination sector with below-average premiums (and vice versa), attenuating the measured industry effects. Our preferred estimates reveal substantial heterogeneity in narrowly-defined industry premiums, with a standard deviation of 12%. On average, workers in higher-paying industries have higher observed and unobserved skills, widening between-industry wage inequality. There are also small but systematic differences in industry premiums across cities, with a wider distribution of pay premiums and more worker sorting in cities with more high-premium firms and high-skilled workers.
papers.zh_title: 行业工资差异：基于企业的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国LEHD项目中的关联雇主-雇员数据重新审视行业工资差异的估计。基于雇主工资溢价测量的最新进展，我们将行业工资效应定义为该行业内就业加权平均的工作场所溢价。我们表明，行业差异的横截面估计由于未测量的工人异质性而高估了工资溢价。相反，基于行业流动者的估计由于行业内工资溢价的未测量异质性而低估了真实溢价。转向更高溢价行业的行业流动者往往离开原行业中支付高于平均溢价的雇主，并前往目标行业中支付低于平均溢价的雇主（反之亦然），从而削弱了测量的行业效应。我们偏好的估计揭示了狭义定义行业溢价的显著异质性，标准差为12%。平均而言，高薪行业的工人具有更高的可观测和不可观测技能，从而扩大了行业间工资不平等。不同城市之间的行业溢价也存在微小但系统的差异，在拥有更多高溢价企业和高技能工人的城市，工资溢价分布更广，工人分类更明显。

papers.title: Location, Location, Location
papers.authors: David Card, Jesse Rothstein, Moises Yi
papers.abstract: We use data from the Longitudinal Employer-Household Dynamics program to study the causal effects of location on earnings. Starting from a model with employer and employee fixed effects, we estimate the average earnings premiums associated with jobs in different commuting zones (CZs) and different CZ-industry pairs. About half of the variation in mean wages across CZs is attributable to differences in worker ability (as measured by their fixed effects); the other half is attributable to place effects. We show that the place effects from a richly specified cross sectional wage model overstate the causal effects of place (due to unobserved worker ability), while those from a model that simply adds person fixed effects understate the causal effects (due to unobserved heterogeneity in the premiums paid by different firms in the same CZ). Local industry agglomerations are associated with higher wages, but overall differences in industry composition and in CZ-specific returns to industries explain only a small fraction of average place effects. Estimating separate place effects for college and non-college workers, we find that the college wage gap is bigger in larger and higher-wage places, but that two-thirds of this variation is attributable to differences in the relative skills of the two groups in different places. Most of the remaining variation reflects the enhanced sorting of more educated workers to higher-paying industries in larger and higher-wage CZs. Finally, we find that local housing costs at least fully offset local pay premiums, implying that workers who move to larger CZs have no higher net-of-housing consumption.
papers.zh_title: 区位、区位、区位
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用纵向雇主-家庭动态项目的数据研究区位对收入的因果效应。从一个包含雇主和雇员固定效应的模型出发，我们估算了不同通勤区（CZ）以及不同CZ-行业配对中工作的平均收入溢价。各CZ平均工资差异中约一半可归因于工人能力（以其固定效应衡量）的差异；另一半可归因于区位效应。我们表明，来自详细设定的横截面工资模型的区位效应高估了区位的因果效应（由于未观测到的工人能力），而来自仅添加个人固定效应的模型的区位效应则低估了因果效应（由于同一CZ内不同企业支付的溢价的未观测异质性）。地方产业集聚与更高的工资相关，但产业构成和CZ特定产业回报率的总体差异仅解释了平均区位效应的一小部分。分别估计大学和非大学工人的区位效应，我们发现大学工资差距在更大和工资更高的地方更大，但这种变动的三分之二可归因于两组工人在不同地方相对技能的差异。剩余的大部分变动反映了更多受教育工人向更大和更高工资CZ中更高薪行业的增强分类。最后，我们发现地方住房成本至少完全抵消了地方工资溢价，这意味着迁移到更大CZ的工人没有更高的扣除住房后的消费。

papers.title: Plata y Plomo: How Higher Wages Expose Politicians to Criminal Violence
papers.authors: Massimo Pulejo, Pablo Querubín
papers.abstract: Adequate wages are an important tool to shield public officials from special interests and corruption. But what is the equilibrium effect of higher wages in the presence of criminal pressure groups, who use both bribes and violence? By means of a regression discontinuity design, we show that an increase in the remuneration of Italian municipal cabinets triggers a sizable and significant increase in criminal attacks against their members. We argue that this is triggered by higher-paid officials' lower likelihood of catering to criminal interests. In particular, we show that better-paid politicians are significantly more likely to prevent corruption in public procurement, a key area of illicit interactions between the state and criminal organizations. Additional analyses reveal that the disciplining effect of wages is driven by a change in incumbents' behavior rather than improved selection. These findings reveal how -- in the presence of criminal groups -- higher wages may limit corruption, but also foster the use of violence as an alternative tool to influence policymaking.
papers.zh_title: 金钱与子弹：更高工资如何使政客暴露于犯罪暴力
papers.zh_abstract: 充足的工资是保护公职人员免受特殊利益和腐败影响的重要工具。但在存在同时使用贿赂和暴力的犯罪压力集团的情况下，更高工资的均衡效应是什么？通过断点回归设计，我们表明意大利市政内阁薪酬的增加会引发对其成员犯罪攻击的大幅且显著的增加。我们认为，这是由于高薪官员迎合犯罪利益的可能性降低所致。具体而言，我们表明薪酬更高的政客显著更有可能防止公共采购中的腐败，这是国家与犯罪组织之间非法互动的关键领域。额外分析揭示，工资的约束效应是由现任者行为的改变而非更好的筛选所驱动。这些发现揭示了在存在犯罪集团的情况下，更高工资可能限制腐败，但也促使暴力作为影响政策制定的替代工具。

papers.title: Population Aging and Economic Growth: From Demographic Dividend to Demographic Drag?
papers.authors: Rainer Kotschy, David E. Bloom
papers.abstract: This paper examines the extent to which changes in working-age shares associated with population aging might slow economic growth in upcoming years. We first analyze the economic effects of changing working-age shares in a standard empirical growth model using country panel data from 1950–2015. We then juxtapose the estimates with predicted shifts in population age structure to project economic growth in 2020–2050. Our results indicate that population aging will slow economic growth throughout much of the world. Expansions of labor supply due to improvements in functional capacity among older people can cushion much of this demographic drag.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I15, J11, O11, O47
papers.zh_title: 人口老龄化与经济增长：从人口红利到人口拖累？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了与人口老龄化相关的劳动年龄人口份额变化在未来几年可能减缓经济增长的程度。我们首先使用1950-2015年的跨国面板数据，在一个标准实证增长模型中分析了劳动年龄人口份额变化的经济效应。然后，我们将这些估计值与人口年龄结构的预测变化相结合，以预测2020-2050年的经济增长。我们的结果表明，人口老龄化将减缓世界大部分地区的经济增长。由于老年人功能能力改善而带来的劳动力供给扩张，可以缓冲这种人口拖累的很大一部分。

papers.title: Micro MPCs and Macro Counterfactuals: The Case of the 2008 Rebates
papers.authors: Jacob Orchard, Valerie A. Ramey, Johannes F. Wieland
papers.abstract: We present evidence that the high estimated MPCs from the leading household studies result in implausible macroeconomic counterfactuals. Using the 2008 tax rebate as a case study, we calibrate a standard medium-scale New Keynesian model with the estimated micro MPCs to construct counterfactual macroeconomic consumption paths in the absence of a rebate. The counterfactual paths imply that consumption expenditures would have plummeted in spring and summer 2008 and then recovered when Lehman Brothers failed in September 2008. We use narratives and forecasts to argue that these paths are implausible. We then show that standard two-way fixed effect estimates of the micro MPCs are upward biased. When we correct for the biases, we estimate smaller micro MPCs than the previous literature. We also show that reasonable modifications of the model result in general equilibrium forces that dampen rather than amplify micro MPCs. The combination of smaller micro MPCs and dampening general equilibrium forces implies general equilibrium consumption multipliers that are below 0.2.
papers.zh_title: 微观边际消费倾向与宏观反事实：以2008年退税为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，主要家庭研究估计的高边际消费倾向导致了不合理的宏观反事实。以2008年退税为例，我们校准了一个包含估计的微观边际消费倾向的标准中等规模新凯恩斯模型，以构建没有退税情况下的反事实宏观消费路径。这些反事实路径表明，消费支出本应在2008年春季和夏季骤降，然后在2008年9月雷曼兄弟倒闭时恢复。我们使用叙事和预测来论证这些路径是不合理的。然后，我们证明微观边际消费倾向的标准双向固定效应估计存在向上偏误。当我们纠正这些偏误时，我们估计的微观边际消费倾向小于先前文献。我们还表明，对模型的合理修改会导致一般均衡力量抑制而非放大微观边际消费倾向。较小的微观边际消费倾向与抑制性一般均衡力量的结合意味着一般均衡消费乘数低于0.2。

papers.title: Machine Forecast Disagreement
papers.authors: Turan G. Bali, Bryan T. Kelly, Mathis Mörke, Jamil Rahman
papers.abstract: We propose a statistical model of heterogeneous beliefs where investors are represented as different machine learning model specifications. Investors form return forecasts from their individual models using common data inputs. We measure disagreement as forecast dispersion across investor-models (MFD). Our measure aligns with analyst forecast disagreement but more powerfully predicts returns. We document a large and robust association between belief disagreement and future returns. A decile spread portfolio that sells stocks with high disagreement and buys stocks with low disagreement earns a value-weighted return of 14% per year. Further analyses suggest MFD-alpha is mispricing induced by short-sale costs and limits-to-arbitrage.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C15, C4, C45, C58, G1, G10, G17, G4, G40
papers.zh_title: 机器预测分歧
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个异质性信念的统计模型，其中投资者被表示为不同的机器学习模型规格。投资者使用共同的数据输入从其个体模型形成收益预测。我们将分歧衡量为投资者模型之间的预测离散度（MFD）。我们的指标与分析师的预测分歧一致，但能更有效地预测收益。我们记录了信念分歧与未来收益之间显著且稳健的关联。一个十分位价差投资组合，卖出高分歧股票并买入低分歧股票，每年可获得14%的价值加权收益。进一步分析表明，MFD-alpha是由卖空成本和套利限制引起的错误定价。

papers.title: Organizational Responses to Product Cycles
papers.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Vittorio Bassi, Anant Nyshadham, Jorge A. Tamayo, Nicolas Torres
papers.abstract: We use daily administrative data from a leading automobile manufacturer to study the organizational impacts of introducing new models to the auto assembly line. We first show that costly defects per vehicle spike when new models are introduced. As a response, the firm trains in problem-solving skills and promotes lower- and mid-level employees to solve the more complex problems that arise, thus moving to a less pyramidal knowledge hierarchy with fewer layers. We develop an extension to the classic theory of knowledge-based hierarchies that reconciles our novel empirical results by allowing the firm to also invest in its training resources.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：D22, M12, M53, O3
papers.zh_title: 组织对产品周期的响应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一家领先汽车制造商的每日行政数据，研究将新车型引入汽车装配线对组织的影响。我们首先表明，当引入新车型时，每辆车的高成本缺陷会激增。作为回应，公司培训问题解决技能，并提拔中低层员工来解决出现的更复杂问题，从而转向层级更少、金字塔式知识层级更扁平的结构。我们扩展了经典的知识层级理论，通过允许公司也投资于其培训资源，来调和我们的新颖实证结果。

papers.title: The Impact of Criminal Financial Sanctions: A Multi-State Analysis of Survey and Administrative Data
papers.authors: Keith Finlay, Matthew Gross, Carl Lieberman, Elizabeth Luh, Michael G. Mueller-Smith
