papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of financial sanctions in the U.S. criminal justice system using nine distinct natural experiments across five states. These regression discontinuity designs capture a range of enforcement levels ($17–$6,000) and institutional environments, providing robust causal evidence and external validity. We leverage survey and administrative data to consider a variety of short and long-term outcomes including employment, recidivism, household expenditures, spousal spillovers, and other self-reported measures of well-being. We find consistent, robust evidence of precise null effects on the population, including ruling out long-run impacts larger than -$347–$168 in annual earnings and -0.002–0.01 in annual convictions.
papers.zh_title: 刑事经济制裁的影响：基于调查和行政数据的多州分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用跨越五个州的九个不同自然实验，估计了美国刑事司法系统中经济制裁的影响。这些断点回归设计涵盖了广泛的执法力度（17美元至6000美元）和制度环境，提供了稳健的因果证据和外部有效性。我们利用调查和行政数据，考虑了各种短期和长期结果，包括就业、累犯、家庭支出、配偶溢出效应以及其他自我报告的福祉指标。我们发现了一致且稳健的证据，表明对总体人口存在精确的零效应，包括排除了长期影响大于年收入-347至-168美元以及年定罪次数-0.002至0.01的可能性。

papers.title: Roots of Inequality
papers.authors: Oded Galor, Marc Klemp, Daniel C. Wainstock
papers.abstract: Why does inequality vary across societies? Why are some societies more unequal than others? We advance the hypothesis that in a market economy, where income differentials reflect variations in productive traits, a significant share of cross-societal differences in inequality may reflect enduring variation in the degree of diversity within societies, rooted in the prehistoric Out-of-Africa migration. Patterns of inequality within the U.S. population are consistent with this hypothesis, suggesting that disparities among groups originating from different ancestral societies are associated with the degree of diversity in productive traits within those societies, shaped during humanity's dispersal from Africa. Consistent with the proposed mechanism, populations whose ancestors originated closer to East Africa tend to exhibit greater dispersion in productive traits—education, ability, and labor supply—channels that appear to mediate the relationship between ancestral diversity and inequality.
papers.zh_title: 不平等的根源
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么不平等在不同社会之间存在差异？为什么有些社会比其他社会更不平等？我们提出假设：在市场经济中，收入差异反映了生产性特征的变异，跨社会不平等差异的很大一部分可能反映了社会内部多样性程度的持久差异，这种差异根植于史前“走出非洲”的迁徙。美国人口内部的不平等模式与这一假设一致，表明来自不同祖先社会的群体之间的差异，与这些社会内部生产性特征的多样性程度相关，这种多样性是在人类从非洲扩散过程中形成的。与提出的机制一致，祖先起源更靠近东非的人群，其生产性特征——教育、能力和劳动力供给——往往表现出更大的离散度，这些渠道似乎调节了祖先多样性与不平等之间的关系。

papers.title: Broadband Internet Access and Health Outcomes: Patient and Provider Responses in Medicare
papers.authors: Jessica Van Parys, Zach Y. Brown
papers.abstract: High-speed internet has increased the amount of information available in health care markets. Online information may improve health outcomes if it reduces information frictions and helps patients choose higher quality providers or causes providers to improve quality. We examine how health outcomes for common procedures in Medicare changed after broadband internet rolled out across ZIP Codes from 1999 to 2008. Estimates imply that broadband expansion improved health outcomes by 5%. Broadband access primarily helped patients choose higher-quality providers; we also find some evidence that broadband improved provider quality. We use a structural model to decompose the improvements in patient outcomes over time. Counterfactual simulations imply that broadband roll-out was responsible for 16% of the improvement in outcomes by the end of the period.
papers.zh_title: 宽带互联网接入与健康结果：医疗保险中的患者和提供者响应
papers.zh_abstract: 高速互联网增加了医疗保健市场中可用的信息量。如果在线信息减少了信息摩擦，帮助患者选择更高质量的提供者，或促使提供者提高质量，则可能改善健康结果。我们考察了1999年至2008年宽带互联网在邮政编码区推广后，医疗保险中常见手术的健康结果如何变化。估计表明，宽带扩展使健康结果改善了5%。宽带接入主要帮助患者选择更高质量的提供者；我们也发现一些证据表明宽带提高了提供者的质量。我们使用结构模型来分解患者结果随时间推移的改善。反事实模拟表明，到研究期末，宽带推广负责了结果改善的16%。

papers.title: Long Term Expectations and Aggregate Fluctuations
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Rafael La Porta, Matthew O'Brien, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: In line with Keynes’ intuition, volatility in the stock market and in real economic activity are linked by expectations of long term profits. We show that analysts’ optimism about the long term earnings growth of S&P 500 firms is associated with a near term boom in major US financial markets, real investment, and other business cycle indicators. The same optimism however predicts disappointing earnings growth and a contraction in financial markets and real activity one to two years later. Overreaction of measured long term profit expectations emerges as a promising mechanism for reconciling Shiller’s excess volatility puzzle with the business cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E0, E32, E44, E7, G01, G10
papers.zh_title: 长期预期与总量波动
papers.zh_abstract: 与凯恩斯的直觉一致，股票市场和实际经济活动的波动通过长期利润预期联系在一起。我们表明，分析师对标普500公司长期盈利增长的乐观情绪，与美国主要金融市场的短期繁荣、实际投资以及其他商业周期指标相关。然而，同样的乐观情绪预测了一到两年后令人失望的盈利增长以及金融市场和实际活动的收缩。衡量的长期利润预期的过度反应，成为调和席勒的过度波动之谜与商业周期的一个有前景的机制。

papers.title: Did the U.S. Really Grow Out of Its World War II Debt?
papers.authors: Julien Acalin, Laurence M. Ball
papers.abstract: The fall in the U.S. public debt/GDP ratio from 106% in 1946 to 23% in 1974 is often attributed to high rates of economic growth. This paper examines the roles of three other factors: primary budget surpluses, surprise inflation, and pegged interest rates before the Fed-Treasury Accord of 1951. Our central result is a simulation of the path that the debt/GDP ratio would have followed with primary budget balance and without the distortions in real interest rates caused by surprise inflation and the pre-Accord peg. In this counterfactual, debt/GDP declines only to 74% in 1974, not 23% as in actual history. Moreover, the ratio starts rising again in 1980 and in 2022 it is 84%. These findings imply that, over the last 76 years, only a small amount of debt reduction has been achieved through growth rates that exceed undistorted interest rates.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E31, E43, E65, H60, H63
papers.zh_title: 美国真的通过经济增长摆脱了二战债务吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国公共债务与GDP之比从1946年的106%下降到1974年的23%，这一现象常被归因于高经济增长率。本文考察了另外三个因素的作用：初级预算盈余、意外通胀以及1951年美联储-财政部协议前的利率管制。我们的核心结果是对债务/GDP比率路径的模拟，该路径假设初级预算平衡，且不存在由意外通胀和协议前利率管制导致的实际利率扭曲。在这种反事实情景下，债务/GDP比率在1974年仅降至74%，而非实际历史中的23%。此外，该比率在1980年再次上升，到2022年达到84%。这些发现意味着，在过去76年里，通过超过未扭曲利率的经济增长率实现的债务削减量很小。

papers.title: The Changing Skill Content of Private Sector Union Coverage
papers.authors: Samuel Dodini, Michael F. Lovenheim, Alexander Willén
papers.abstract: Concurrent with the precipitous decline in private sector unionization over the past half century, there has been a shift in the type of work covered by unions. We take a skill-based approach to studying this shift, using data from the Current Population Survey combined with occupation-specific task requirements from the Dictionary of Occupational Titles and the Occupational Information Network. We partition skills into four groups based on two dimensions of task requirements: non-routine cognitive, non-routine manual, routine cognitive, and routine manual. For both men and women, private sector unionized jobs have changed to require more non-routine, cognitive skills and for women, less routine/manual skills. Union, non-union skill differences have grown, with unionized jobs requiring relatively more non-routine cognitive skill for both groups but also relatively more routine skills. We decompose these skill changes into: (1) changes in skills within an occupation, (2) changes in worker concentration across existing occupations, and (3) changes to the occupational mix from entry and exit. Most of the skill changes we document are driven by the second two forces. Finally, we discuss how this evidence can be reconciled with a model of skill-biased technological change that explicitly accounts for the institutional framework surrounding collective bargaining.
papers.zh_title: 私营部门工会覆盖范围的技能内容变化
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去半个世纪中，随着私营部门工会化率的急剧下降，工会所覆盖的工作类型也发生了转变。我们采用基于技能的方法来研究这种转变，使用的数据来自当前人口调查，并结合了《职业名称词典》和《职业信息网络》中特定职业的任务要求。我们根据任务要求的两个维度将技能分为四组：非常规认知、非常规操作、常规认知和常规操作。对于男性和女性而言，私营部门的工会工作已转变为需要更多非常规、认知技能，而对于女性来说，则减少了常规/操作技能。工会与非工会之间的技能差异已经扩大，工会工作对两个群体都要求相对更多的非常规认知技能，同时也要求相对更多的常规技能。我们将这些技能变化分解为：(1) 职业内部技能的变化，(2) 现有职业间工人集中度的变化，以及 (3) 由职业进入和退出导致的职业组合变化。我们记录的大部分技能变化都是由后两种力量驱动的。最后，我们讨论了这些证据如何与一个明确考虑集体谈判制度框架的技能偏向型技术变革模型相协调。

papers.title: The Value of Intermediaries for GSE Loans
papers.authors: Joshua Bosshardt, Ali Kakhbod, Amir Kermani
papers.abstract: We analyze the costs and benefits of intermediaries for government-sponsored enterprise (GSE) mortgages using regulatory data. We find evidence of lenders pricing for observable and unobservable default risk independently from the GSEs. We then develop and estimate a model of competitive lending in which lenders have skin-in-the-game. Lenders reduce costs by acquiring information beyond the GSEs’ criteria but charge markups. On net, interest rates are higher compared to a counterfactual in which the GSEs’ criteria are implemented passively. In an extension, the observed differences between banks and nonbanks are more consistent with differences in their skin-in-the-game rather than screening quality.
papers.zh_title: 政府赞助企业贷款中介的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用监管数据分析了政府赞助企业抵押贷款中介的成本和收益。我们发现有证据表明，贷款机构独立于政府赞助企业，对可观测和不可观测的违约风险进行定价。然后，我们开发并估计了一个贷款机构具有风险共担机制的竞争性贷款模型。贷款机构通过获取超出政府赞助企业标准的信息来降低成本，但会收取加价。总体而言，与政府赞助企业标准被动实施的反事实情景相比，利率更高。在扩展分析中，银行与非银行机构之间的观察差异更符合它们在风险共担机制上的差异，而非筛选质量的差异。

papers.title: Accounting for Environmental Activity: Measuring Public Environmental Expenditures and the Environmental Goods and Services Sector in the US
papers.authors: Dennis Fixler, Julie L. Hass, Tina Highfill, Kelly M. Wentland, Scott A. Wentland
papers.abstract: How much of the economy is focused on protecting, rehabilitating, or managing the environment? To answer this question, we develop a proof-of-concept environmental activity account to quantify the environmental goods and services sector (EGSS) in the United States. Methodologically, we employ a satellite account approach similar to the method used by the US Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) to quantify other sectors of the economy (e.g., Outdoor Recreation Account, Marine Economy Account) while following the accounting principles and methods outlined in the SEEA Central Framework (SEEA-CF). This approach draws on detailed internal supply-use data, drawn primarily from Census’s Industry and Product data along with other supplemental sources. Overall, we estimate gross output of the EGSS was $725 billion in 2019, or about 1.9% of the total gross output of the US economy. Government expenditures (across all levels) comprise a substantial portion of the EGSS in the US, as the public sector accounted for about 27% of total EGSS output ($197 billion) in 2019. Although these estimates are still preliminary and are not official statistics, the goals of this research are to provide new insights into classification and measurement challenges in producing environmental activity accounts more generally, while also documenting data gaps and accounting issues in the US context more specifically.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E01, M41, O44, Q50, Q56
papers.zh_title: 环境活动核算：衡量美国公共环境支出与环境商品和服务部门
papers.zh_abstract: 经济中有多少部分专注于保护、修复或管理环境？为了回答这个问题，我们开发了一个概念验证的环境活动账户，以量化美国的环境商品和服务部门。在方法上，我们采用了类似于美国经济分析局用于量化其他经济部门（例如，户外休闲账户、海洋经济账户）的卫星账户方法，同时遵循《环境经济核算体系中心框架》中概述的核算原则和方法。这种方法利用了详细的内部供给-使用数据，这些数据主要来自人口普查局的行业和产品数据以及其他补充来源。总体而言，我们估计2019年环境商品和服务部门的总产出为7250亿美元，约占美国经济总产出的1.9%。各级政府支出在美国环境商品和服务部门中占很大比重，2019年公共部门约占环境商品和服务部门总产出的27%（1970亿美元）。尽管这些估计仍是初步的，并非官方统计数据，但本研究的目标是为更普遍地编制环境活动账户时面临的分类和衡量挑战提供新见解，同时更具体地记录美国背景下的数据缺口和核算问题。

papers.title: On the Source and Instability of Probability Weighting
papers.authors: Cary Frydman, Lawrence J. Jin
papers.abstract: We propose and experimentally test a new theory of probability distortions in risky choice. The theory is based on a core principle from neuroscience called efficient coding, which states that information is encoded more accurately for those stimuli that the agent expects to encounter more frequently. As the agent’s prior beliefs vary, the model predicts that probability distortions change systematically. We provide novel experimental evidence consistent with this prediction by manipulating and measuring a subject’s prior beliefs. The data reveal that lottery valuations are more sensitive to probabilities that occur more frequently under the subject’s reported prior beliefs.
papers.zh_title: 论概率加权的来源与不稳定性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出并通过实验检验了一个关于风险选择中概率扭曲的新理论。该理论基于神经科学的一个核心原则，即高效编码，该原则指出，对于主体预期更频繁遇到的刺激，其信息编码会更准确。随着主体先验信念的变化，该模型预测概率扭曲会系统地改变。我们通过操纵和测量受试者的先验信念，提供了与这一预测一致的新实验证据。数据显示，彩票估值对受试者报告的先验信念中出现频率更高的概率更为敏感。

papers.title: Skills, Majors, and Jobs: Does Higher Education Respond?
papers.authors: Johnathan G. Conzelmann, Steven W. Hemelt, Brad Hershbein, Shawn M. Martin, Andrew Simon, Kevin M. Stange
papers.abstract: How do college students and postsecondary institutions react to changes in skill demand in the U.S. labor market? We quantify the magnitude and nature of response in the 4-year sector using a new measure of labor demand at the institution-major level that combines online job ads with geographic locations of alumni from a professional networking platform. Within a shift-share setup, we find that the 4-year sector responds. We estimate elasticities for undergraduate degrees and credits centered around 1.3, generally increasing with time horizon. Changes in non-tenure-track faculty allocations and the credits they teach partially mediate this overall response. We provide further evidence that the magnitude of the overall response depends on both student demand and institutional supply-side constraints. Our findings illuminate the nature of educational production in higher education and suggest that policy efforts that aim to align human capital investment with labor demand may struggle to achieve such goals if they target only one side of the market.
papers.zh_title: 技能、专业与工作：高等教育是否做出回应？
papers.zh_abstract: 大学生和高等教育机构如何应对美国劳动力市场技能需求的变化？我们利用一种新的机构-专业层面劳动力需求衡量指标，该指标结合了在线招聘广告和来自专业社交网络平台的校友地理位置信息，量化了四年制大学部门的反应幅度和性质。在份额-转移分析框架内，我们发现四年制大学部门确实做出了回应。我们估计本科学位和学分的弹性约为1.3，且通常随时间跨度增加而增大。非终身教职教师分配及其所授学分的变化部分中介了这一总体反应。我们进一步提供证据表明，总体反应的幅度取决于学生需求和机构供给侧的约束。我们的发现揭示了高等教育中教育生产的性质，并表明旨在使人力资本投资与劳动力需求相一致的政策努力，如果只针对市场的一方，可能难以实现其目标。

papers.title: How to Fund Unemployment Insurance with Informality and False Claims: Evidence From Senegal
papers.authors: Abdoulaye Ndiaye, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Abdoulaye Cisse, Alessandro Dell'Acqua, Ahmadou Aly Mbaye
papers.abstract: This paper studies the welfare effects from the provision of unemployment insurance (UI) benefits in a context where formal workers represent only a small proportion of the labor market and informal workers can submit fraudulent claims for UI benefits. We model these features and allow for varying degrees of enforcement and different funding sources. We then estimate the model’s key parameters by conducting a custom labor force survey in Senegal. Our findings show that the liquidity gains are large and the moral hazard response to the UI benefits among workers is relatively small: an extra dollar of UI benefits yields a consumption-equivalent gain of 60–90 cents, which exceeds comparable estimates from U.S. calibrations by a factor of three to sixteen. We then show that the welfare gains depend on the program design: UI funded through payroll taxes delivers the greatest welfare gains but becomes infeasible when there are few formal workers and high rates of fraudulent claims. On the other hand, UI funded through consumption taxes delivers lower welfare gains but remains feasible with high informality and false claims.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E0, E24, H21, J65, O10, O55
papers.zh_title: 在存在非正规就业和虚假索赔的情况下如何为失业保险提供资金：来自塞内加尔的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在正规工人仅占劳动力市场一小部分且非正规工人可以提交虚假失业保险索赔的背景下，提供失业保险福利的福利效应。我们对这些特征进行建模，并允许不同程度的执法和不同的资金来源。然后，我们通过在塞内加尔进行一项定制劳动力调查来估计模型的关键参数。我们的研究结果表明，流动性收益很大，而工人对失业保险福利的道德风险反应相对较小：额外一美元的失业保险福利产生的消费等价收益为60-90美分，这比美国校准中的可比估计值高出三到十六倍。然后，我们表明福利收益取决于项目设计：通过工资税资助的失业保险带来最大的福利收益，但当正规工人很少且虚假索赔率很高时变得不可行。另一方面，通过消费税资助的失业保险带来的福利收益较低，但在高非正规就业和虚假索赔的情况下仍然可行。

papers.title: Monitoring for Waste: Evidence from Medicare Audits
papers.authors: Maggie Shi
papers.abstract: This paper examines the tradeoffs of monitoring for wasteful public spending. By penalizing unnecessary spending, monitoring improves the quality of public expenditure and incentivizes firms to invest in compliance technology. I study a large Medicare program that monitored for unnecessary healthcare spending and consider its effect on government savings, provider behavior, and patient health. Every dollar Medicare spent on monitoring generated $24–29 in government savings. The majority of savings stem from the deterrence of future care, rather than reclaimed payments from prior care. I do not find evidence that the health of the marginal patient is harmed, indicating that monitoring primarily deters low-value care. Monitoring does increase provider administrative costs, but these costs are mostly incurred upfront and include investments in technology to assess the medical necessity of care.
papers.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：H0, H00, H5, H50, H51, H53, H57, I0, I00, I1, I10, I11, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 浪费监控：来自医疗保险审计的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了监控浪费性公共支出的权衡。通过惩罚不必要的支出，监控提高了公共支出的质量，并激励企业投资于合规技术。我研究了一个监控不必要医疗支出的大型医疗保险项目，并考虑其对政府储蓄、提供者行为和患者健康的影响。医疗保险在监控上每花费1美元，就能产生24至29美元的政府储蓄。大部分储蓄源于对未来护理的威慑，而非对先前护理的追回款项。我没有发现边际患者健康受到损害的证据，这表明监控主要威慑了低价值护理。监控确实增加了提供者的行政成本，但这些成本大部分是前期投入的，包括投资于评估护理医疗必要性的技术。

papers.title: Political Sentiment and Innovation: Evidence from Patenters
papers.authors: Joseph Engelberg, Runjing Lu, William Mullins, Richard R. Townsend
papers.abstract: We document political sentiment effects on US inventors. Democratic inventors are more likely to patent (relative to Republicans) after the 2008 election of Obama but less likely after the 2016 election of Trump. These effects are 2-3 times as strong among politically active partisans and are present even within firms over time. Patenting by immigrant inventors (relative to non-immigrants) also falls following Trump’s election. Finally, we show partisan concentration by technology class and firm. This concentration aggregates up to more patenting in Democrat-dominated technologies (e.g., Biotechnology) compared to Republican-dominated technologies (e.g., Weapons) following the 2008 election of Obama.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, POL, PR；JEL：D72, J24, M5, O31
papers.zh_title: 政治情绪与创新：来自专利持有者的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了政治情绪对美国发明家的影响。民主党发明家在2008年奥巴马当选后更有可能申请专利（相对于共和党人），但在2016年特朗普当选后则不太可能。这些影响在政治活跃的党派人士中强2-3倍，并且即使在企业内部也随时间存在。移民发明家（相对于非移民）的专利申请在特朗普当选后也有所下降。最后，我们展示了按技术类别和公司划分的党派集中度。这种集中度累积起来，导致在2008年奥巴马当选后，民主党主导的技术（例如生物技术）的专利申请比共和党主导的技术（例如武器）更多。

papers.title: Greed? Profits, Inflation, and Aggregate Demand
papers.authors: Florin O. Bilbiie, Diego R. Känzig
papers.abstract: We investigate whether corporate profits can drive elevated inflation through the interplay of income distribution dynamics and aggregate demand—our narrow definition of the “greed” narrative—within the New Keynesian framework. We first derive an analytical condition for profits to be procyclical and thus inflationary in response to demand expansions. Yet when distributional mechanisms are of the essence, as under the greed view, a conundrum emerges: procyclical profits accruing to low-MPC asset-holders imply a dampening of aggregate demand, yielding deflationary forces—the opposite of greedflation. Adding capital investment undoes part of this as it delivers aggregate-demand amplification even under procyclical profits, but the deflationary effects of the latter are still operating in a compensating way. Countercyclical income risk can deliver the amplified inflationary response; yet since this operates through a precautionary-saving channel and not profits, it is still inconsistent with the narrative directly attributing inflation to corporate greed.
papers.zh_title: 贪婪？利润、通胀与总需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在新凯恩斯主义框架下，企业利润能否通过收入分配动态与总需求的相互作用（即我们对“贪婪”叙事的狭义定义）来推动通胀上升。我们首先推导出一个分析条件，说明利润何时具有顺周期性，从而在需求扩张时引发通胀。然而，当分配机制至关重要时（正如贪婪观点所认为的那样），一个难题出现了：流向低边际消费倾向资产持有者的顺周期利润意味着总需求受到抑制，从而产生通缩压力——这与贪婪通胀恰恰相反。加入资本投资部分抵消了这一效应，因为即使在利润顺周期的情况下，它也能放大总需求，但利润的通缩效应仍在以补偿方式发挥作用。反周期的收入风险可以产生放大的通胀反应；然而，由于这是通过预防性储蓄渠道而非利润渠道发挥作用，因此仍然与直接将通胀归因于企业贪婪的叙事不一致。

papers.title: Protests
papers.authors: Davide Cantoni, Andrew Kao, David Y. Yang, Noam Yuchtman
papers.abstract: Citizens have long taken to the streets to demand change, expressing political views that may otherwise be suppressed. Protests have produced change at local, national, and international scales, including spectacular moments of political and social transformation. We document five new empirical patterns describing 1.2 million protest events across 218 countries between 1980 and 2020. First, autocracies and weak democracies experienced a trend break in protests during the Arab Spring. Second, protest movements also rose in importance following the Arab Spring. Third, protest movements geographically diffuse over time, spiking to their peak, before falling off. Fourth, a country’s year-to-year economic performance is not strongly correlated with protests; individual values are predictive of protest participation. Fifth, the US, China, and Russia are the most over-represented countries by their share of academic studies. We discuss each pattern’s connections to the existing literature and anticipate paths for future work.
papers.zh_title: 抗议活动
papers.zh_abstract: 长期以来，公民们走上街头要求变革，表达那些可能被压制的政治观点。抗议活动在地方、国家和国际层面带来了变革，包括政治和社会转型的壮观时刻。我们记录了描述1980年至2020年间218个国家120万起抗议事件的五个新实证模式。第一，威权政体和脆弱民主国家在阿拉伯之春期间经历了抗议活动的趋势性转折。第二，抗议运动在阿拉伯之春之后的重要性也显著上升。第三，抗议运动在时间上呈现地理扩散，达到顶峰后逐渐消退。第四，一个国家逐年的经济表现与抗议活动之间没有强相关性；个人价值观可以预测抗议参与。第五，美国、中国和俄罗斯在学术研究中所占份额被过度代表。我们讨论了每个模式与现有文献的联系，并展望了未来研究的路径。

papers.title: CEO Gender Bias in the Formation of Firm-to-Firm Transactions
papers.authors: Yutaro Izumi, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Masayuki Yagasaki
papers.abstract: This study examines an unexplored channel of female CEO disadvantage: CEO gender bias in forming business networks. Using supplier-buyer linkage data from Japanese firms, we find that CEOs of the same gender are more likely to trade than those of the opposite gender, particularly in small and medium-sized rms. As most CEOs are male, this same-gender bias restricts the trading opportunities for female CEOs compared with their male counterparts. Our CEO survey revealed frictions that hinder cross-gender encounters, suggesting that creating venues to promote female-male CEO interactions could effectively achieve gender equity through expanding the business networks of female CEOs.
papers.zh_title: 企业间交易形成中的CEO性别偏见
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了女性CEO劣势的一个未被探索的渠道：在形成商业网络中的CEO性别偏见。利用日本企业的供应商-买家关联数据，我们发现同性别的CEO之间比异性别的CEO更有可能进行交易，尤其是在中小企业中。由于大多数CEO是男性，这种同性别偏见限制了女性CEO相对于男性同行的交易机会。我们的CEO调查揭示了阻碍跨性别接触的摩擦，这表明创造促进男女CEO互动的场所可以通过扩大女性CEO的商业网络来有效实现性别平等。

papers.title: Clean Growth
papers.authors: Costas Arkolakis, Conor Walsh
papers.abstract: We provide a spatial theory of clean growth to assess the global impact of the rise of renewable energy. We model the details of the combined production and transmission network of electricity (“the grid”) that determine the supply and losses of energy in space. The local rate of clean energy adoption depends on learning-by-doing, the global electricity and trade network, and regional comparative advantage in renewable resources. We use the model to measure the aggregate and spatial implications of clean growth. We find that the world’s power system is likely to be dominated by renewables by 2040 in a range of scenarios, with substantial welfare gains, even in the absence of policy. Incorporating policy, we find that the US Inflation Reduction Act significantly accelerates renewable uptake, and generates substantial economic benefits. In addition, planned grid improvements lower prices substantially in many areas of the US, justifying their cost of construction.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：F11, Q40, Q41, Q42, Q43, R13
papers.zh_title: 清洁增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个清洁增长的空间理论，以评估可再生能源崛起的全球影响。我们对决定能源在空间上供给和损耗的电力联合生产与传输网络（即“电网”）的细节进行了建模。本地清洁能源采用率取决于干中学、全球电力和贸易网络以及区域在可再生资源上的比较优势。我们利用该模型衡量了清洁增长的总体和空间影响。我们发现，在一系列情景下，即使没有政策干预，到2040年世界电力系统很可能由可再生能源主导，并带来显著的福利收益。结合政策因素，我们发现美国《通胀削减法案》显著加速了可再生能源的采用，并产生了巨大的经济效益。此外，计划中的电网改进大幅降低了美国许多地区的电价，证明了其建设成本的合理性。

papers.title: Managing Mental Accounts: Payment Cards and Consumption Expenditures
papers.authors: Michael Gelman, Nikolai Roussanov
papers.abstract: Does mental accounting matter for total consumption expenditures? We exploit a unique setting in which individuals exogenously received a new credit card, without requesting one. Using random variation in the time of receipt we show that individuals temporarily increase total consumption expenditure by making purchases with the new card without reducing spending on the others. We do not observe a corresponding increase in indebtedness. Total consumption expenditure rises even for the least liquidity-constrained individuals. The evidence is consistent with consumers treating methods of payment as nonfungible budget categories, as suggested by models of mental accounting and narrow bracketing.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：D01, D12, D31, D91, D99, G02, G40, G41, G5, G50, G51, G53
papers.zh_title: 管理心理账户：支付卡与消费支出
papers.zh_abstract: 心理账户对总消费支出是否重要？我们利用一个独特的情境，即个体在未主动申请的情况下外生地收到了一张新信用卡。利用收到时间的随机变化，我们表明个体通过使用新卡进行购买而暂时增加了总消费支出，同时并未减少其他卡上的支出。我们没有观察到相应的负债增加。即使对于流动性约束最小的个体，总消费支出也会上升。这些证据与消费者将支付方式视为不可替代的预算类别的观点一致，正如心理账户和窄框架模型所建议的那样。

papers.title: An Experimental Evaluation of Deferred Acceptance: Evidence from Over 100 Army Officer Labor Markets
papers.authors: Jonathan M.V. Davis, Kyle Greenberg, Damon Jones
papers.abstract: Internal labor markets are increasingly important for matching workers to jobs within organizations. We present evidence from a randomized trial that compares matching workers to jobs using the deferred acceptance (DA) algorithm to the traditional manager-directed matching process. Our setting is the U.S. Army’s internal labor market, which matches over 14,000 officers to units annually. We find that DA reduces administrative burden and increases match quality as measured by reduced justified envy, increased truthful preference reporting, and officers’ and units’ preferences over their matches. The overall impact of DA on officer retention and performance in the two years after officers started their new jobs is limited by strategic preference coordination between officers and units. However, DA leads to significant improvements in officer retention and promotions in markets with inexperienced managers. Our findings suggest that cross-market communication between agents in internal labor markets can attenuate the benefits of strategy-proof matching algorithms.
papers.zh_title: 延迟接受算法的实验评估：来自超过100个陆军军官劳动力市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 内部劳动力市场在组织内部将工人与工作岗位匹配方面日益重要。我们展示了一项随机试验的证据，该试验比较了使用延迟接受算法将工人与工作岗位匹配与传统管理者主导的匹配过程。我们的背景是美国陆军的内部劳动力市场，该市场每年将超过14000名军官匹配到各个单位。我们发现，延迟接受算法减少了行政负担，并提高了匹配质量，具体表现为减少了合理的嫉妒、增加了真实偏好报告，以及军官和单位对其匹配结果的偏好。在军官开始新工作后的两年内，延迟接受算法对军官留任和绩效的总体影响受到军官与单位之间战略性偏好协调的限制。然而，在管理者经验不足的市场中，延迟接受算法显著改善了军官的留任和晋升。我们的研究结果表明，内部劳动力市场中代理人之间的跨市场沟通可能会削弱防策略匹配算法的益处。

papers.title: Psychosocial Constraints, Impact Heterogeneity and Spillovers in a Multifaceted Graduation Program in Kenya
papers.authors: Geyi Zheng, Michael Carter, Nathan Jensen, Laurel Krovetz
papers.abstract: Poverty reduction programs modeled on BRAC's graduation approach build up both tangible productive assets and intangible psychosocial assets such as self-confidence and the aspiration for upward mobility. The goal of this paper is to better understand how psychosocial factors operate and shape the impact of graduation programs. After deriving a set of hypotheses about the impacts of psychosocial constraints from a dynamic optimization model of the choice between a low income, casual wage-labor occupation and a higher earning entrepreneurial activity, this paper exploits a randomized controlled trial of a graduation program implemented in the pastoralist regions of Northern Kenya. Key empirical findings include that the estimated highly favorable average treatment effects disguise substantial heterogeneity, with beneficiaries who began with severe depressive symptoms gaining little from the program. The RCT's saturation design also allows us to identify substantial spillover effects onto the asset accumulation of women who were not enrolled in the graduation program. Spillovers are also estimated to positively affect non-beneficiary women's preference for upward economic mobility, providing a plausible explanation for their accumulation of capital despite no direct support from the graduation program. The paper draws out the implications of these findings for the cost-effective design and implementation of graduation programs.
papers.zh_title: 肯尼亚多层面脱贫项目中的心理社会约束、影响异质性与溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 以BRAC脱贫方法为蓝本的减贫项目既积累有形生产性资产，也积累无形的心理社会资产，如自信和向上流动的愿望。本文旨在更好地理解心理社会因素如何运作并塑造脱贫项目的影响。在从动态优化模型中推导出一组关于心理社会约束影响的假设后（该模型模拟了在低收入、临时工资劳动职业与高收入创业活动之间的选择），本文利用在肯尼亚北部牧区实施的一个脱贫项目的随机对照试验。关键实证发现包括：估计出的非常有利的平均处理效应掩盖了显著的异质性，那些最初有严重抑郁症状的受益者从项目中获益甚少。该随机对照试验的饱和设计还使我们能够识别出对未参加脱贫项目的女性资产积累的显著溢出效应。据估计，溢出效应还积极影响了非受益女性对向上经济流动的偏好，这为她们尽管没有直接从脱贫项目中获得支持却仍能积累资本提供了合理解释。本文阐述了这些发现对脱贫项目成本效益设计和实施的意义。

papers.title: Firm Export Dynamics in Interdependent Markets
papers.authors: Alonso Alfaro-Urena, Juanma Castro-Vincenzi, Sebastian Fanelli, Eduardo Morales
papers.abstract: We estimate a model of firm export dynamics featuring cross-country complementarities. The firm decides where to export by solving a dynamic combinatorial discrete choice problem, for which we develop a solution algorithm that overcomes the computational challenges inherent to the large dimensionality of its state space and choice set. According to our estimated model, firms enjoy cost reductions when exporting to countries geographically or linguistically close to each other, or that share deep trade agreements. Countries, especially small ones, sharing these traits with attractive destinations receive significantly more exports than in the absence of complementarities.
papers.zh_title: 相互依存市场中的企业出口动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个具有跨国互补性的企业出口动态模型。企业通过解决一个动态组合离散选择问题来决定出口目的地，为此我们开发了一种求解算法，克服了其状态空间和选择集维度高所带来的计算挑战。根据我们估计的模型，当企业向地理或语言相近、或共享深度贸易协定的国家出口时，会享受成本降低。与没有互补性的情况相比，与有吸引力的目的地共享这些特征的国家（尤其是小国）获得的出口显著更多。

papers.title: From Addiction to Aggression: The Spillover Effects of Opioid Policies on Intimate Partner Violence
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Bilge Erten, Pinar Keskin, Shuo Zhang
papers.abstract: Substance abuse is a major risk factor for intimate partner violence (IPV). We investigate how a key supply-side intervention – the abuse-deterrent reformulation of a widely-diverted opioid, OxyContin – affected IPV. Our results indicate counties with greater baseline rates of prescription opioid usage experienced relatively larger declines in IPV after OxyContin’s reformulation. The reformulation reduced IPV only in states with small illicit drug markets, while states with large illicit drug markets experienced increased heroin-involved IPV due to substitution towards illicit opioids. Our results underscore the importance of identifying populations at high risk of substitution to illicit opioids and moderating this risk with evidence-based policies.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H0, I12, I18, K0
papers.zh_title: 从成瘾到攻击：阿片类药物政策对亲密伴侣暴力的溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 药物滥用是亲密伴侣暴力的主要风险因素。我们研究了一项关键的供给侧干预措施——对广泛被滥用的阿片类药物奥施康定进行防滥用配方改革——如何影响亲密伴侣暴力。我们的结果表明，在奥施康定配方改革后，处方阿片类药物使用基线率较高的县，亲密伴侣暴力出现了相对较大的下降。该改革仅在非法药物市场规模较小的州减少了亲密伴侣暴力，而在非法药物市场规模较大的州，由于转向非法阿片类药物，涉及海洛因的亲密伴侣暴力有所增加。我们的结果强调了识别转向非法阿片类药物高风险人群，并通过循证政策来调节这一风险的重要性。

papers.title: Distributional Equity in the Employment and Wage Impacts of Energy Transitions
papers.authors: Ben Gilbert, Hannah Gagarin, Ben Hoen
papers.abstract: We use restricted-access, geocoded data on the near-universe of workers in 23 U.S. states in order to quantify the impact of wind energy development on local earnings and employment, by race, ethnicity, sex, and educational attainment. We find the largest relative impacts for workers without a high school education, or workers with a college education, in addition to other systematic differences across sub-populations. We compare these results to estimates using county aggregates of the worker-level data, such as can be obtained using publicly available data. We find that (a) county-level estimates are dramatically dampened relative to geocoded worker-level estimates, and (b) the degree of bias differs by sub-population such that qualitative comparisons of impacts are not consistent using restricted-access data versus county-level data for most sub-populations. We discuss implications for achieving equity goals within energy transition policies.
papers.zh_title: 能源转型对就业和工资影响的分配公平性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用美国23个州近乎所有工人的受限访问地理编码数据，按种族、民族、性别和教育程度量化风能发展对当地收入和就业的影响。我们发现，除各子群体之间存在其他系统性差异外，对未接受高中教育或接受大学教育的工人的相对影响最大。我们将这些结果与使用县级工人数据汇总（例如可从公开数据中获得）的估计值进行比较。我们发现：(a) 县级估计值相对于地理编码工人层面的估计值显著减弱，并且 (b) 偏差程度因子群体而异，因此对于大多数子群体，使用受限访问数据与县级数据得出的影响定性比较并不一致。我们讨论了在能源转型政策中实现公平目标的意义。

papers.title: Biased Surveys
papers.authors: Luca Gemmi, Rosen Valchev
papers.abstract: We find evidence suggesting that surveys of professional forecasters are biased by strategic incentives. First, we find that individual forecasts overreact to idiosyncratic information but underreact to common information. Second, we show that this bias is not present in forecasts data that is not subject to strategic incentives. We show that our evidence is consistent with a model of strategic diversification incentives in forecast reporting. Our results caution against the use of surveys of forecasts as a direct measure of expectations, as this would overestimate the likely deviations from rational expectations, the information precision and the degree of disagreement.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C53, D84, E31, E37, E70
papers.zh_title: 有偏的调查
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现有证据表明，专业预测者的调查受到战略激励的偏差影响。首先，我们发现个体预测对特质信息反应过度，但对共同信息反应不足。其次，我们表明这种偏差不存在于不受战略激励影响的预测数据中。我们证明，我们的证据与预测报告中战略多元化激励的模型一致。我们的结果警示，不要将预测调查直接用作预期的衡量标准，因为这会高估与理性预期的可能偏离、信息精度以及分歧程度。

papers.title: Market Response to Racial Uprisings
papers.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Roman Rivera, Alexander Whitefield
papers.abstract: Do investors anticipate that demands for racial equity will impact companies? We explore this question in the context of the Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement—the largest racially motivated protest movement in U.S. history—and its effect on the U.S. policing industry using a novel dataset on publicly traded firms contracting with the police. It is unclear whether the BLM uprisings were likely to increase or decrease market valuations of firms contracting heavily with police because of the increased interest in reforming the police, fears over rising crime, and pushes to “defund the police”. We find, in contrast to the predictions of economics experts we surveyed, that in the three weeks following incidents triggering BLM uprisings, policing firms experienced a stock price increase of seven percentage points relative to the stock prices of nonpolicing firms in similar industries. In particular, firms producing surveillance technology and police accountability tools experienced higher returns following BLM activism–related events. Furthermore, policing firms’ fundamentals, such as sales, improved after the murder of George Floyd, suggesting that policing firms’ future performances bore out investors' positive expectations following incidents triggering BLM uprisings. Our research shows how—despite BLM’s calls to reduce investment in policing and explore alternative public safety approaches—the financial market has translated high-profile violence against Black civilians and calls for systemic change into shareholder gains and additional revenues for police suppliers.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, POL；JEL：D73, G14, G3, K42
papers.zh_title: 市场对种族起义的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 投资者是否预期种族公平的要求会影响公司？我们以“黑人的命也是命”运动——美国历史上规模最大的种族动机抗议运动——为背景，利用一个关于与警方签订合同的上市公司的新数据集，探讨了这个问题及其对美国警务行业的影响。目前尚不清楚“黑人的命也是命”起义是可能增加还是减少与警方签订大量合同的公司的市场估值，原因在于对警务改革兴趣的增加、对犯罪率上升的担忧以及“撤资警察”的推动。我们发现，与我们调查的经济学专家的预测相反，在引发“黑人的命也是命”起义的事件发生后的三周内，警务公司的股价相对于类似行业中非警务公司的股价上涨了七个百分点。特别是，生产监控技术和警察问责工具的公司，在与“黑人的命也是命”行动相关的事件后获得了更高的回报。此外，在乔治·弗洛伊德被杀后，警务公司的基本面（如销售额）有所改善，这表明在引发“黑人的命也是命”起义的事件之后，投资者对警务公司未来表现的积极预期得到了证实。我们的研究展示了，尽管“黑人的命也是命”呼吁减少对警务的投资并探索替代性的公共安全方法，但金融市场如何将对黑人平民的高调暴力事件和系统性变革的呼声转化为股东收益和警察供应商的额外收入。

papers.title: Incorporating Micro Data into Differentiated Products Demand Estimation with PyBLP
papers.authors: Christopher Conlon, Jeff Gortmaker
papers.abstract: We delineate a general framework for incorporating many types of micro data from summary statistics to full surveys of selected consumers into Berry, Levinsohn, and Pakes (1995)-style estimates of differentiated products demand systems. We extend recommended practices for BLP estimation in Conlon and Gortmaker (2020) to the case with micro data and implement them in our open-source package PyBLP. Monte Carlo experiments and empirical examples suggest that incorporating micro data can substantially improve the finite sample performance of the BLP estimator, particularly when using well-targeted summary statistics or “optimal micro moments” that we derive and show how to compute.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：C13, C18, C30, D12, L0, L66
papers.zh_title: 使用PyBLP将微观数据纳入差异化产品需求估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描绘了一个通用框架，用于将多种类型的微观数据（从汇总统计到选定消费者的完整调查）纳入Berry、Levinsohn和Pakes（1995）风格的差异化产品需求系统估计中。我们将Conlon和Gortmaker（2020）中针对BLP估计的推荐实践扩展到包含微观数据的情况，并在我们的开源软件包PyBLP中实现它们。蒙特卡洛实验和实证例子表明，纳入微观数据可以显著改善BLP估计量的有限样本表现，特别是在使用针对性强的汇总统计或我们推导并展示如何计算的“最优微观矩”时。

papers.title: Who (Actually) Gets the Farm? Intergenerational Farm Succession in the United States
papers.authors: Adrian Haws, David R. Just, Joseph Price
papers.abstract: Farm succession is a central issue in agricultural policy. Yet while many studies explore succession planning, little is known about how farms are actually transferred. We provide the first population-level evidence on intergenerational farm succession by linking US census records for millions of farmers’ children in 1900 and 1910 to identify which children own and operate the family farm up to 40 years later. We first show that daughters are rarely successors. Using a within-family identification strategy, we find that first-born sons are slightly more likely than their younger brothers to be successors while their parents are working aged. However, birth order is not predictive of who receives the farm when parents are older or deceased. For later farm transfers, sons who were previously tenant farmers are much more likely than their brothers to be successors, possibly because they are better prepared. Fewer than one-fifth of farmers transfer their farm to any son. Our study relies on rich historical data because current policy prevents the necessary data linkages for studying intergenerational farm succession. Providing a secure system for researchers to link modern agricultural data to population microdata, similar to what has been achieved with other data sources, would yield crucial insights into long-term agricultural policy issues in the US.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV；JEL：D64, J24, N32, N52, Q12, Q15
papers.zh_title: 谁（实际上）继承了农场？美国的代际农场继承
papers.zh_abstract: 农场继承是农业政策的核心问题。然而，尽管许多研究探讨了继承规划，但关于农场实际如何转移的知之甚少。我们通过关联1900年和1910年数百万农民子女的美国人口普查记录，首次提供了关于代际农场继承的人口层面证据，以确定哪些子女在长达40年后拥有并经营家庭农场。我们首先表明，女儿很少成为继承人。使用家庭内部识别策略，我们发现，在父母仍在工作年龄时，长子比其弟弟更有可能成为继承人。然而，当父母年长或去世时，出生顺序并不能预测谁将获得农场。对于后来的农场转移，以前是佃农的儿子比其兄弟更有可能成为继承人，这可能是因为他们准备更充分。不到五分之一的农民将农场转移给任何儿子。我们的研究依赖于丰富的历史数据，因为当前的政策阻止了研究代际农场继承所需的数据链接。建立一个安全系统，使研究人员能够将现代农业数据与人口微观数据联系起来，类似于其他数据源已经实现的那样，将为美国长期农业政策问题提供关键见解。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of the Federal Reserve's Conventional and Unconventional Monetary Policies
papers.authors: Eric T. Swanson
papers.abstract: I separately identify and estimate the effects of the Federal Reserve’s federal funds rate, forward guidance, and large-scale asset purchase (LSAP) policies on the U.S. economy. I extend the high-frequency identification strategy of Bauer and Swanson (2023b) for monetary policy VARs by allowing each of the above policies to have possibly different economic effects. I follow Swanson (2021) and Swanson and Jayawickrema (2023) to separately identify federal funds rate, forward guidance, and LSAP components of monetary policy announcements using high-frequency interest rate changes around FOMC announcements, post- FOMC press conferences, FOMC meeting minutes releases, and speeches and testimony by the Fed Chair and Vice Chair. I find that changes in the federal funds rate have had the most powerful effects on the U.S. economy, followed by forward guidance and, lastly, LSAPs.
papers.zh_title: 美联储常规与非常规货币政策的宏观经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我分别识别并估计了美联储的联邦基金利率、前瞻指引和大规模资产购买政策对美国经济的影响。我扩展了Bauer和Swanson（2023b）针对货币政策VAR的高频识别策略，允许上述每种政策可能产生不同的经济效应。我遵循Swanson（2021）以及Swanson和Jayawickrema（2023）的方法，利用联邦公开市场委员会公告前后、联邦公开市场委员会会后新闻发布会、联邦公开市场委员会会议纪要发布以及美联储主席和副主席的演讲和证词中的高频利率变化，分别识别联邦基金利率、前瞻指引和大规模资产购买政策公告的组成部分。我发现，联邦基金利率的变化对美国经济的影响最为强大，其次是前瞻指引，最后是大规模资产购买。

papers.title: Supply Chain Adjustments to Tariff Shocks: Evidence from Firm Trade Linkages in the 2018-2019 U.S. Trade War
papers.authors: Kyle Handley, Fariha Kamal, Ryan Monarch
papers.abstract: We use the 2018-2019 U.S. trade war to examine how supply chains adjustments to a tariff cost shock affect imports and exports. Using confidential firm-trade linked data, we show that the decline in imports of tariffed goods was driven by discontinuations of U.S. buyer–foreign supplier relationships, reduced formation of new relationships, and exits by U.S. firms from import markets altogether. However, tariffed products where imports were concentrated in fewer suppliers had a smaller decline in import growth. We then construct measures of export exposure to import tariffs by linking tariffs paid by importing firms to their exported products. We find that the most exposed products had lower exports in 2018-2019, with most of the impact occurring in 2019.
papers.zh_title: 供应链对关税冲击的调整：来自2018-2019年美国贸易战中企业贸易联系的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2018-2019年的美国贸易战，研究供应链对关税成本冲击的调整如何影响进口和出口。使用保密的企贸关联数据，我们表明，受关税影响商品的进口下降是由美国买方-外国供应商关系的终止、新关系形成的减少以及美国企业完全退出进口市场所驱动的。然而，在进口集中在较少供应商的受关税影响产品中，进口增长的下降幅度较小。然后，我们通过将进口企业支付的关税与其出口产品联系起来，构建了出口对进口关税的暴露度指标。我们发现，暴露度最高的产品在2018-2019年的出口较低，其中大部分影响发生在2019年。

papers.title: Automatic Enrollment with a 12% Default Contribution Rate
papers.authors: John Beshears, Ruofei Guo, David Laibson, Brigitte C. Madrian, James J. Choi
papers.abstract: We study a retirement savings plan with a default contribution rate of 12% of income, which is much higher than previously studied defaults. Twenty-five percent of employees had not opted out of this default 12 months after hire; a literature review finds that the corresponding fraction in plans with lower defaults is approximately one-half. Because only contributions above 12% were matched by the employer, 12% was likely to be a suboptimal contribution rate for employees. Employees who remained at the 12% default contribution rate had average income that was approximately one-third lower than would be predicted from the relationship between salaries and contribution rates among employees who were not at 12%. Defaults may influence low-income employees more strongly in part because these employees face higher psychological barriers to active decision making.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, D15, G40, G51, J32
papers.zh_title: 12%默认缴存率的自动加入计划
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项退休储蓄计划，其默认缴存率为收入的12%，远高于以往研究的默认水平。在入职12个月后，25%的员工未退出这一默认缴存率；文献综述发现，在默认缴存率较低的计划中，相应比例约为二分之一。由于只有超过12%的缴存部分才获得雇主匹配，12%对员工而言很可能是一个次优的缴存率。停留在12%默认缴存率的员工，其平均收入比根据非12%缴存率员工的薪资与缴存率关系所预测的水平低约三分之一。默认选项可能对低收入员工影响更强，部分原因是这些员工在主动决策时面临更高的心理障碍。

papers.title: An Import(ant) Price of Brexit Uncertainty
papers.authors: Alejandro G. Graziano, Kyle Handley, Nuno Limão
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of trade policy uncertainty (TPU) on CES import price indices, focusing on the implications of Britain’s exit from the European Union (Brexit). Our analysis reveals that an increase in the probability of Brexit increases U.K. import price indices by raising the prices of existing products and by reducing product variety from the E.U. We find evidence that the risk of higher import protection from the 2016 referendum increased current import price indices by more than 10%. This amounted to a 2 log point increase in manufactured goods prices and a 0.6 log point decrease in consumers’ real income.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：D8, E02, F02, F13, F14, F15
papers.zh_title: 英国脱欧不确定性的一个重要价格
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了贸易政策不确定性对CES进口价格指数的影响，重点关注英国退出欧盟的影响。我们的分析表明，英国脱欧概率的增加通过提高现有产品价格和减少来自欧盟的产品种类，推高了英国进口价格指数。我们发现，2016年公投带来的更高进口保护风险，使当前进口价格指数上升超过10%。这导致制成品价格上涨2个对数点，消费者实际收入下降0.6个对数点。

papers.title: Global Capital Allocation
papers.authors: Sergio Florez-Orrego, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger, Ziwen Sun, Serdil Tinda
papers.abstract: We survey the literature on global capital allocation. We begin by reviewing the rise of cross-border investment, the shift towards portfolio investment, and the literature focusing on aggregate patterns in multilateral and bilateral positions. We then turn to the recent literature that uses micro-data to document patterns in global capital allocations. We focus on the importance of the currency of denomination of assets in international portfolios and the role that tax havens and offshore financial centers play in intermediating global capital. We conclude with directions for future research in this area.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：F0, F3, F30
papers.zh_title: 全球资本配置
papers.zh_abstract: 我们综述了关于全球资本配置的文献。首先回顾跨境投资的兴起、向组合投资的转变，以及关注多边和双边头寸总体模式的文献。然后转向近期利用微观数据记录全球资本配置模式的文献。我们重点关注资产计价货币在国际投资组合中的重要性，以及避税天堂和离岸金融中心在全球资本中介中的作用。最后，我们提出该领域未来研究的方向。

papers.title: Women and the Econometrics of Family Trees
papers.authors: José-Antonio Espín-Sánchez, Joseph P. Ferrie, Christopher Vickers
papers.abstract: We present an econometric structure for the analysis of intergenerational mobility that integrates non-linearities, the role of maternal-side effects and the impact of grandparents. We show how previously estimated models are special cases of this general framework and what specific assumptions each embeds. Our analysis of linked U. S. data 1900-40 reveals the extent to which inadequate consideration of assortative mating and the impact of mothers produces misleading conclusions.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：C36, C50, J08, J12, J13, J62, N31, N32
papers.zh_title: 女性与家庭树计量经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个用于分析代际流动性的计量经济学结构，该结构整合了非线性、母系效应的影响以及祖父母的作用。我们展示了先前估计的模型如何成为这一一般框架的特例，以及每个模型嵌入了哪些具体假设。我们对1900-1940年美国关联数据的分析揭示了，对选型婚配和母亲影响考虑不足会在多大程度上产生误导性结论。

papers.title: Antitrust Enforcement Increases Economic Activity
papers.authors: Tania Babina, Simcha Barkai, Jessica Jeffers, Ezra Karger, Ekaterina Volkova
papers.abstract: We hand-collect and standardize information describing all 3,055 antitrust lawsuits brought by the Department of Justice (DOJ) between 1971 and 2018. Using restricted establishment-level microdata from the U.S. Census, we compare the economic outcomes of a non-tradable industry in states targeted by DOJ antitrust lawsuits to outcomes of the same industry in other states that were not targeted. We document that DOJ antitrust enforcement actions permanently increase employment by 5.4% and business formation by 4.1%. Using an event-study design, we find (1) a sharp increase in payroll that exceeds the increase in employment, meaning that DOJ antitrust enforcement increases average wages, (2) an economically smaller increase in sales that is statistically insignificant, and (3) a precise increase in the labor share. While we cannot separately measure the quantity and price of output, the increase in production inputs (employment), together with a proportionally smaller increase in sales, strongly suggests that these DOJ antitrust enforcement actions increase the quantity of output and simultaneously decrease the price of output. Our results show that government antitrust enforcement leads to persistently higher levels of economic activity in targeted industries.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, LE, LS, POL, PR；JEL：E24, J21, K21, L4, L40
papers.zh_title: 反垄断执法促进经济活动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们手工收集并标准化了1971年至2018年间司法部提起的所有3055起反垄断诉讼的信息。利用美国人口普查局限制使用的企业层面微观数据，我们比较了受司法部反垄断诉讼针对的非贸易品行业在各州的经济结果，与同一行业在其他未受针对州的结果。我们记录到，司法部反垄断执法行动使就业永久性增加5.4%，企业创建增加4.1%。通过事件研究设计，我们发现：(1) 工资总额急剧增加，且超过就业增长，意味着司法部反垄断执法提高了平均工资；(2) 销售额在经济上较小的增加在统计上不显著；(3) 劳动份额精确增加。虽然我们无法分别衡量产出的数量和价格，但生产投入（就业）的增加，加上销售额比例较小的增长，强烈表明这些司法部反垄断执法行动增加了产出数量，同时降低了产出价格。我们的结果表明，政府反垄断执法导致目标行业的经济活动持续处于更高水平。

papers.title: The Zero-Beta Interest Rate
papers.authors: Sebastian Di Tella, Benjamin M. Hébert, Pablo Kurlat, Qitong Wang
papers.abstract: We use equity returns to construct a time-varying measure of the interest rate that we call the zero-beta rate: the expected return of a stock portfolio orthogonal to the stochastic discount factor. The zero-beta rate is high and volatile. In contrast to safe rates, the zero-beta rate fits the aggregate consumption Euler equation remarkably well, both unconditionally and conditional on monetary shocks, and can explain the level and volatility of asset prices. We claim that the zero-beta rate is the correct intertemporal price.
papers.zh_title: 零贝塔利率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用股票收益率构建了一个随时间变化的利率度量，称为零贝塔利率：一个与随机贴现因子正交的股票投资组合的预期收益率。零贝塔利率高且波动剧烈。与安全利率相反，零贝塔利率在无条件情况下和货币冲击条件下，都与总消费欧拉方程拟合得非常好，并能解释资产价格的水平与波动性。我们主张零贝塔利率是正确的跨期价格。

papers.title: The Impact of Bretton Woods International Capital Controls on the Global Economy and the Value of Geopolitical Stability: A General Equilibrium Analysis
papers.authors: Lee E. Ohanian, Paulina Restrepo-Echavarria, Diana Van Patten, Mark L.J. Wright
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies the positive and normative impact of Bretton Woods capital controls on global and regional economic activity. A three-region DSGE capital flows accounting framework consisting of the U.S., Western Europe, and the Rest of the World (ROW) is developed to quantify capital controls and evaluate their impact on the world economy. We find these controls had large effects. Counterfactual analysis show world output would have been 0:5 percent higher had there been perfect capital mobility, with substantial capital flowing from the ROW to the U.S. Bretton Woods capital controls raised welfare substantially in the ROW, but at the expense of much lower U.S. welfare. Given the U.S.’s goal of keeping capital within these countries to preserve their stability during this period, we interpret lower U.S. welfare due to Bretton Woods as the implicit value the U.S. placed on preserving geopolitical stability in ally countries during the Cold War.
papers.zh_title: 布雷顿森林国际资本管制对全球经济的影响及地缘政治稳定的价值：一般均衡分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文量化了布雷顿森林资本管制对全球和区域经济活动的正面及规范影响。我们构建了一个包含美国、西欧和世界其他地区三个区域的一般动态随机均衡资本流核算框架，以量化资本管制并评估其对世界经济的影响。我们发现这些管制产生了巨大影响。反事实分析表明，如果存在完全的资本流动性，世界产出将高出0.5%，大量资本将从世界其他地区流向美国。布雷顿森林资本管制大幅提高了世界其他地区的福利，但以美国福利大幅降低为代价。鉴于美国在此期间的目标是将资本保留在这些国家以维护其稳定，我们将布雷顿森林体系导致的美国福利降低，解释为美国在冷战期间为维护盟国地缘政治稳定所赋予的隐性价值。

papers.title: Do Cops Know Who to Stop? Assessing Optimizing Models of Police Behavior with a Natural Experiment
papers.authors: David Abrams, Hanming Fang, Priyanka Goonetilleke
papers.abstract: The standard economic model of police stops implies that the contraband hit rate should rise when the number of stops or searches per officer falls, ceteris paribus. We provide empirical corroboration of such optimizing models of police behavior by examining changes in stops and frisks around two extraordinary events of 2020: the COVID-19 pandemic onset and the nationwide protests following the killing of George Floyd. We find that hit rates from pedestrian and vehicle stops generally rose as stops and frisks fell dramatically. Using detailed data, we are able to rule out a number of alternative explanations, including changes in street population, crime, police allocation, and policing intensity. We find mixed evidence about the changes in racial disparities, and evidence that police stops do not decrease crime, at least in the short run. The results are robust to a number of different specifications. Our findings provide quantitative estimates that can contribute to the important goals of improving and reforming policing.
papers.zh_title: 警察知道该拦停谁吗？利用自然实验评估警察行为的优化模型
papers.zh_abstract: 标准的警察拦停经济模型意味着，在其他条件不变的情况下，当每位警官的拦停或搜查次数下降时，违禁品查获率应上升。我们通过考察2020年两起特殊事件（新冠疫情爆发和乔治·弗洛伊德被杀后的全国抗议）前后拦停与搜身的变化，为这种警察行为优化模型提供了实证支持。我们发现，随着拦停和搜身大幅减少，行人及车辆拦停的查获率普遍上升。利用详细数据，我们能够排除一系列替代解释，包括街头人口变化、犯罪变化、警力分配和警务强度变化。关于种族差异变化的证据不一，且有证据表明警察拦停至少在短期内不会减少犯罪。结果对多种不同设定均保持稳健。我们的发现提供了定量估计，有助于实现改善和改革警务的重要目标。

papers.title: Seasonal Allergies and Accidents
papers.authors: Mika Akesaka, Hitoshi Shigeoka
papers.abstract: Seasonal allergies affect over 400 million people globally, yet the broader economic consequences of pollen exposure remain understudied. Evidence from Japan’s ambulance records suggests that high-pollen days are associated with increases in accidents, including traffic accidents and work-related injuries, which may reflect impaired cognitive performance. Retail scanner data and cellphone mobility records indicate that individuals already engage in avoidance behaviors, such as purchasing allergy products and limiting outdoor activities on weekends. This suggests that relying on individual self-protection may be insufficient to offset these risks, and thus greater government intervention may be warranted to mitigate pollen-related harm.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EEE, EH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I12, J24, Q51, Q53, Q54
papers.zh_title: 季节性过敏与事故
papers.zh_abstract: 季节性过敏影响全球超过4亿人，然而花粉暴露更广泛的经济后果仍未得到充分研究。来自日本救护车记录的证据表明，高花粉日与事故（包括交通事故和工伤）的增加相关，这可能反映了认知能力的下降。零售扫描数据和手机移动记录显示，个体已经采取了回避行为，例如购买抗过敏产品以及在周末限制户外活动。这表明依赖个人自我保护可能不足以抵消这些风险，因此可能需要更多的政府干预来减轻花粉相关的危害。

papers.title: Causal Effects of Renewable Portfolio Standards on Renewable Investments and Generation: The Role of Heterogeneity and Dynamics
papers.authors: Olivier Deschenes, Christopher Malloy, Gavin G. McDonald
papers.abstract: Despite a 30-year long history, Renewable Portfolio Standards (RPS) remain controversial and debates continue to surround their efficacy in leading the low-carbon transition in the electricity sector. Contributing to the ongoing debates is the lack of definitive causal evidence on their impact on investments in renewable capacity and generation. This paper provides the most detailed analysis to date of the impact of RPSs on renewable electricity capacity investments and on generation. We use state-level data from 1990-2019 and recent econometric methods designed to address dynamic and heterogeneous treatment effects in a staggered adoption panel data design. We find that, on average, RPS policies increase wind generation capacity by 600-1200 MW, a 44% increase, but have no significant effect on investments in solar capacity. Additionally, we demonstrate that RPSs have slow dynamic effects: most of the capacity additions occur 5 years after RPS implementation. Estimates for wind and solar electricity generation mimic those for capacity investments. We also find similar results using an alternate treatment definition that allows states to meet their RPS requirements with pre-existing renewable generation and renewable generation from nearby states.
papers.zh_title: 可再生能源组合标准对可再生能源投资与发电的因果效应：异质性与动态性的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管可再生能源组合标准已有30多年的历史，但其仍存在争议，关于其在引领电力行业低碳转型方面的有效性争论持续不断。导致这些争论的原因之一是缺乏关于其对可再生能源装机容量投资和发电量影响的明确因果证据。本文提供了迄今为止关于可再生能源组合标准对可再生能源电力装机容量投资和发电量影响的最详细分析。我们使用了1990年至2019年的州级数据，以及旨在处理交错采用面板数据设计中动态和异质性处理效应的最新计量经济学方法。我们发现，平均而言，可再生能源组合标准政策使风电装机容量增加了600-1200兆瓦，增幅达44%，但对太阳能装机容量的投资没有显著影响。此外，我们证明了可再生能源组合标准具有缓慢的动态效应：大部分装机容量增加发生在政策实施5年后。风电和太阳能发电量的估计结果与装机容量投资的结果相似。当我们使用另一种处理定义（允许各州利用已有的可再生能源发电量以及来自邻近州的可再生能源发电量来满足其可再生能源组合标准要求）时，也得到了类似的结果。

papers.title: Game, Sweat, Match: Temperature and Elite Worker Productivity
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Vincent Tanutama, Sam Heft-Neal, Miyuki Hino, David Lobell
papers.abstract: The effect of hot temperatures on labor productivity is thought to be a key channel through which a warming climate will impact the economy, and these impacts could help explain broader observed relationships between temperature and economic output. Yet for many workers and jobs, especially the high-wage service-economy work that constitutes a large share of total economic output in wealthy nations, productivity is hard to measure and thus climate impacts hard to quantify. We study a high-wage job where individual productivity is readily observable: professional tennis. Using 15 years of data on 177 thousand tennis matches merged to hourly temperature data, we study the effects of temperature on tennis performance in contemporaneous and future matches. Variation in player birthplace and residence allows us to study whether players adapt to heat, and data from betting markets allows us to evaluate whether markets price climate risk. We find that hot temperatures increase contemporaneous errors and retirements, and reduce win probability in the subsequent match. In percentage terms, estimated effects on earnings are smaller than lower-wage settings studied in existing literature. By most measures, top players are less affected by hot temperatures. Most tennis betting markets appear to accurately price climate risk, and temperature impacts do not appear to offer profitable arbitrage opportunities.
papers.zh_title: 比赛、汗水、胜负：温度与精英劳动者生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 高温对劳动生产率的影响被认为是气候变暖影响经济的关键渠道，这些影响可能有助于解释观测到的温度与经济产出之间的广泛关系。然而，对于许多劳动者和工作岗位，尤其是构成富裕国家经济产出主要部分的高薪服务业工作，生产率难以衡量，因此气候影响也难以量化。我们研究了一个个人生产率易于观察的高薪职业：职业网球。利用15年间17.7万场网球比赛的数据，并结合每小时温度数据，我们研究了温度对网球运动员当前及未来比赛表现的影响。运动员出生地和居住地的差异使我们能够研究运动员是否适应了高温，而博彩市场的数据则使我们能够评估市场是否对气候风险进行了定价。我们发现，高温会增加当前的失误和退赛次数，并降低下一场比赛的获胜概率。按百分比计算，对收入的影响小于现有文献中研究的低薪环境。从大多数指标来看，顶级运动员受高温影响较小。大多数网球博彩市场似乎能准确地对气候风险进行定价，温度影响似乎并未提供可获利的套利机会。

papers.title: The Child Penalty Atlas
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven, Camille Landais, Gabriel Leite-Mariante
papers.abstract: This paper builds a world atlas of child penalties in employment based on micro data from 134 countries. The estimation of child penalties is based on pseudo-event studies of first child birth using cross-sectional data. The pseudo-event studies are validated against true event studies using panel data for a subset of countries. Most countries display clear and sizable child penalties: men and women follow parallel trends before parenthood, but diverge sharply and persistently after parenthood. While this pattern is pervasive, there is enormous variation in the magnitude of the effects across different regions of the world. The fraction of gender inequality explained by child penalties varies systematically with economic development and proxies for structural transformation. At low levels of development, child penalties represent a minuscule fraction of gender inequality. But as economies develop — incomes rise and the labor market transitions from subsistence agriculture to salaried work in industry and services — child penalties take over as the dominant driver of gender inequality. The relationship between child penalties and development is validated using historical data from current high-income countries, back to the 1700s for some countries. Finally, because parenthood is often tied to marriage, we also investigate the existence of marriage penalties in female employment. In general, women experience both marriage and child penalties, but their relative importance depends on the level of development. The development process is associated with a substitution from marriage penalties to child penalties, with the former gradually converging to zero.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LS, PE；JEL：D13, D30, J12, J13, J16, J21, J22, O12
papers.zh_title: 生育惩罚图谱
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于134个国家的微观数据，构建了一个全球就业领域生育惩罚图谱。生育惩罚的估计基于使用横截面数据对首次生育进行的伪事件研究。这些伪事件研究通过与部分国家使用面板数据进行的真实事件研究进行对比验证。大多数国家都显示出明显且规模可观的生育惩罚：男性和女性在成为父母之前遵循平行趋势，但在成为父母之后出现急剧且持续的分化。虽然这种模式普遍存在，但世界不同地区的影响程度存在巨大差异。由生育惩罚解释的性别不平等比例随经济发展和结构转型的代理指标系统性地变化。在低发展水平下，生育惩罚仅占性别不平等的极小部分。但随着经济发展——收入增加，劳动力市场从自给农业转向工业和服务业的受薪工作——生育惩罚成为性别不平等的主要驱动因素。生育惩罚与发展之间的关系已使用当前高收入国家的历史数据（部分国家可追溯至18世纪）得到验证。最后，由于为人父母通常与婚姻相关联，我们还研究了女性就业中是否存在婚姻惩罚。总体而言，女性同时经历婚姻惩罚和生育惩罚，但它们的相对重要性取决于发展水平。发展过程伴随着从婚姻惩罚向生育惩罚的替代，前者逐渐趋近于零。

papers.title: The Outlook for Long-Term Economic Growth
papers.authors: Charles I. Jones
papers.abstract: What are the prospects for economic growth in the United States and other advanced countries over the next several decades? U.S. growth for the past 150 years has been surprisingly stable at 2% per year. Growth theory reveals that in the long run, growth in living standards is determined by growth in the worldwide number of people searching for ideas. At the same time, a growth accounting exercise for the United States since the 1950s suggests that many other factors have temporarily contributed to growth, including rising educational attainment and a rising investment rate in ideas. But these forces are inherently temporary, implying that growth rates could slow in the future. This prediction is reinforced by declining population growth throughout the world. In contrast, other forces could potentially sustain or even increase growth. The emergence of countries such as China and India provides large numbers of people who could search for ideas. Improvements in the allocation of talent --- for example, the rise of women inventors --- and increased automation through artificial intelligence are other potential tailwinds.
papers.zh_title: 长期经济增长展望
papers.zh_abstract: 未来几十年，美国及其他发达国家的经济增长前景如何？过去150年间，美国经济增长出奇地稳定在每年2%。增长理论揭示，从长期来看，生活水平的增长取决于全球范围内寻找创意的人口数量的增长。同时，自20世纪50年代以来对美国的增长核算表明，许多其他因素暂时促进了增长，包括教育程度的提高和创意投资率的上升。但这些力量本质上是暂时的，意味着未来增长率可能会放缓。这一预测因全球人口增长下降而得到加强。相比之下，其他力量可能维持甚至提高增长。中国和印度等国家的崛起提供了大量可能寻找创意的人口。人才配置的改善——例如女性发明家的增加——以及通过人工智能实现的自动化程度提高，是其他潜在的有利因素。

papers.title: Stress Testing Structural Models of Unobserved Heterogeneity: Robust Inference on Optimal Nonlinear Pricing
papers.authors: Aaron L. Bodoh-Creed, Brent R. Hickman, John A. List, Ian Muir, Gregory K. Sun
papers.abstract: We propose a suite of tools for empirical market design in adverse-selection settings where point identification based on exogenous price variation is hampered by multi-dimensional unobserved heterogeneity. Despite significant data limitations, we are able to derive informative bounds on counterfactual consumer demand under out-of-sample price changes. These bounds arise because empirically plausible DGPs must respect the Law of Demand and the observed shift(s) in aggregate demand resulting from a known exogenous price change(s). The bounds facilitate robust policy prescriptions using rich, internal data sources similar to those available in many real- world settings, including our empirical application to rideshare demand. Our partial identification approach enables viable, welfare-improving, nonlinear pricing design while achieving robustness against worst-case deviations from baseline model assumptions. As a side benefit, our framework also provides novel insights into optimal experimental design for pricing RCTs.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：B4, C14, C51, C52, C93, D04, J02, L1, L5
papers.zh_title: 对未观测异质性结构模型的压力测试：最优非线性定价的稳健推断
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一套工具，用于在逆向选择环境下进行实证市场设计，在这种环境下，基于外生价格变动的点识别受到多维未观测异质性的阻碍。尽管存在显著的数据限制，我们仍能推导出在样本外价格变化下反事实消费者需求的信息性边界。这些边界之所以存在，是因为经验上合理的数据生成过程必须尊重需求定律以及由已知外生价格变化引起的观测到的总需求变化。这些边界有助于利用丰富的内部数据源（类似于许多现实世界环境中可用的数据，包括我们应用于网约车需求的实证案例）制定稳健的政策建议。我们的部分识别方法能够实现可行且福利改善的非线性定价设计，同时确保对基线模型假设的最坏情况偏离具有稳健性。作为附带好处，我们的框架还为定价随机对照试验的最优实验设计提供了新颖见解。

papers.title: Regulatory Arbitrage or Random Errors? Implications of Race Prediction Algorithms in Fair Lending Analysis
papers.authors: Daniel Greenwald, Sabrina T. Howell, Cangyuan Li, Emmanuel Yimfor
papers.abstract: When race is not directly observed, regulators and analysts commonly predict it using algorithms based on last name and address. In small business lending—where regulators assess fair lending law compliance using the Bayesian Improved Surname Geocoding (BISG) algorithm—we document large prediction errors among Black Americans. The errors bias measured racial disparities in loan approval rates downward by 43%, with greater bias for traditional vs. fintech lenders. Regulation using self-identified race would increase lending to Black borrowers, but also shift lending toward affluent areas because errors correlate with socioeconomics. Overall, using race proxies in policymaking and research presents challenges.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：C81, G21, G23, G28, J15
papers.zh_title: 监管套利还是随机误差？公平贷款分析中种族预测算法的含义
papers.zh_abstract: 当种族未被直接观测到时，监管者和分析师通常使用基于姓氏和地址的算法来预测种族。在小型企业贷款中——监管机构使用贝叶斯改进姓氏地理编码算法评估公平贷款法合规性——我们记录了美国黑人群体中存在巨大的预测误差。这些误差使贷款批准率中观测到的种族差异向下偏误了43%，对传统贷款机构而言偏误大于金融科技贷款机构。使用自我认定的种族进行监管将增加对黑人借款人的贷款，但由于误差与社会经济状况相关，也会将贷款转向富裕地区。总体而言，在政策制定和研究中使用种族代理变量带来了挑战。

papers.title: Committing to Grow: Privatizations and Firm Dynamics in East Germany
papers.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Harun Alp, André Diegmann, Nicolas Serrano-Velarde
papers.abstract: This paper investigates a unique policy designed to maintain employment during the privatization of East German firms after the fall of the Iron Curtain. The policy required new owners of the firms to commit to employment targets, with penalties for non-compliance. Using a dynamic model, we highlight three channels through which employment targets impact firms: distorted employment decisions, increased productivity, and higher exit rates. Our empirical analysis, using a novel dataset and instrumental variable approach, confirms these findings. We estimate a 22% points higher annual employment growth rate, a 14% points higher annual productivity growth, and a 3.6% points higher probability of exit for firms with binding employment targets. Our calibrated model further demonstrates that without these targets, aggregate employment would have been 15% lower after 10 years. Additionally, an alternative policy of productivity investment subsidies proved costly and less effective in the short term.
papers.zh_title: 承诺增长：东德私有化与企业动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一项旨在铁幕倒塌后东德企业私有化过程中维持就业的独特政策。该政策要求企业新所有者承诺就业目标，并对不遵守规定进行处罚。通过使用动态模型，我们强调了就业目标影响企业的三个渠道：扭曲的就业决策、生产率提高以及更高的退出率。我们的实证分析使用了一个新颖的数据集和工具变量方法，证实了这些发现。我们估计，对于有约束性就业目标的企业，年就业增长率高出22个百分点，年生产率增长率高出14个百分点，退出概率高出3.6个百分点。我们校准的模型进一步表明，如果没有这些目标，10年后的总就业人数将减少15%。此外，另一种替代政策——生产率投资补贴——成本高昂且在短期内效果较差。

papers.title: Keep Calm and Bank On: Panic-Driven Bank Runs and the Role of Public Communication
papers.authors: Damiano Sandri, Francesco Grigoli, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
papers.abstract: Using a survey with information treatments conducted in the aftermath of SVB’s collapse, we study households’ perspectives on bank stability, the potential for panic-driven bank runs, and the role of public communication. When informed about SVB’s collapse, households become more likely to withdraw deposits, due to both a higher perceived risk of bank failure and higher expected losses on deposits in case of bank failure. Leveraging hypothetical questions and the exogenous variation in beliefs generated by the information treatments, we show that households reallocate deposit withdrawals primarily into other banks and cash, with little passthrough into spending. Information about FDIC insurance and communication about bank stability by the Federal Reserve can reassure depositors, while communication from political leaders only influences their electoral base.
papers.zh_title: 保持冷静，继续存款：恐慌驱动的银行挤兑与公共沟通的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 利用在硅谷银行倒闭后进行的带有信息干预的问卷调查，我们研究了家庭对银行稳定性的看法、恐慌驱动银行挤兑的可能性以及公共沟通的作用。当被告知硅谷银行倒闭时，家庭更有可能提取存款，这既是因为感知到的银行倒闭风险更高，也是因为预期银行倒闭时存款损失更大。借助假设性问题以及信息干预产生的信念外生变化，我们表明家庭将提取的存款主要重新配置到其他银行和现金中，很少传导至支出。关于联邦存款保险公司保险的信息以及美联储关于银行稳定性的沟通可以安抚储户，而政治领导人的沟通仅影响其选举基础。

papers.title: Encouraging Preventative Care to Manage Chronic Disease at Scale
papers.authors: Claire E. Boone, Pablo A. Celhay, Paul Gertler, Tadeja Gracner
papers.abstract: We study how reminding high-risk patients with chronic disease of their upcoming primary care appointments impacts their health care and behaviors. We leverage a natural experiment in Chile’s public healthcare system that sent reminders before preventative care appointments to over 300,000 patients with type 2 diabetes and hypertension across 315 public primary care clinics between 2013 and 2018. Employing both a difference-in-differences and instrumental variables approach on national administrative patient-level data, we show that reminders increased preventative care visits, which led to more health screenings and improved medication adherence. In this at-scale program, we find substantial variation in implementation fidelity across clinics, which, once accounted for increases our estimates by over a third. Reminders also increased hospitalizations and reduced in-hospital mortality, suggesting an improvement in timely care-seeking behavior among high-risk patients. Our findings inform healthcare settings where patients must first visit their primary care provider for approval before undergoing tests, receiving medication prescriptions, or getting referrals to other specialists. Through intervening at the first step in the cascade of care, we find that a simple intervention like reminders can have large and meaningful downstream effects.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH, PE；JEL：I11, I12, I15
papers.zh_title: 大规模鼓励预防性护理以管理慢性病
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了提醒高风险慢性病患者即将到来的初级保健预约如何影响其医疗保健和行为。我们利用了智利公共医疗系统中的一个自然实验，该系统在2013年至2018年间向315家公共初级保健诊所的超过30万名2型糖尿病和高血压患者发送了预防性护理预约提醒。采用双重差分法和工具变量法，基于全国行政层面的患者数据，我们表明提醒增加了预防性护理就诊，这导致了更多的健康筛查和改善的药物依从性。在这个大规模项目中，我们发现各诊所的实施保真度存在显著差异，一旦考虑这一因素，我们的估计值提高了三分之一以上。提醒还增加了住院率并降低了院内死亡率，这表明高风险患者寻求及时护理的行为有所改善。我们的发现为那些患者必须首先就诊初级保健提供者以获得检查、药物处方或转诊至其他专科医生批准的医疗环境提供了信息。通过在护理级联的第一步进行干预，我们发现像提醒这样简单的干预措施可以产生巨大且有意义的后续影响。

papers.title: The Fast, the Slow, and the Congested: Urban Transportation in Rich and Poor Countries
papers.authors: Prottoy A. Akbar, Victor Couture, Gilles Duranton, Adam Storeygard
papers.abstract: We assemble a new global database on motor vehicle travel speed in over 1,200 large cities in 152 countries. We then estimate comparable city-level indices of travel speed and congestion. Most of the variation in urban travel speed is across countries, not within. National income per capita explains most of this cross-country variation in speed. In rich countries, urban travel is roughly 50% faster than in poor countries. To investigate the link between economic development and mobility, we develop an urban model with endogenous travel, road infrastructure, and land area. The model provides an exact decomposition of how city size, infrastructure, and topography contribute to explaining why urban travel is faster in richer countries. We find that richer countries are faster, mainly because their cities have more major roads and wider land areas. These effects operate by increasing uncongested speed, not by reducing congestion.
papers.zh_title: 快、慢与拥堵：富裕与贫穷国家的城市交通
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个新的全球数据库，涵盖152个国家超过1200个大城市的机动车行驶速度。随后，我们估算了可比较的城市层面的行驶速度与拥堵指数。城市行驶速度的差异主要存在于国家之间，而非国家内部。人均国民收入解释了这种跨国速度差异的大部分原因。在富裕国家，城市出行速度比贫穷国家大约快50%。为了探究经济发展与出行能力之间的联系，我们构建了一个包含内生出行、道路基础设施和土地面积的城市模型。该模型精确分解了城市规模、基础设施和地形如何共同解释为何富裕国家的城市出行更快。我们发现，富裕国家出行更快，主要是因为其城市拥有更多主干道和更广阔的土地面积。这些效应通过提高无拥堵速度来实现，而非通过减少拥堵。

papers.title: The Limits of Educational Attainment in Mitigating Occupational Segregation Between Black and White Workers
papers.authors: Ashley Jardina, Peter Q. Blair, Justin Heck, Papia Debroy
papers.abstract: Past work has documented significant occupational segregation between Black and white workers in the U.S. labor force. Little work, however, has examined racial occupational segregation in recent years or by levels of education and then at the intersection of education and race. In this paper, we contribute to this literature by calculating a dissimilarity index to examine racial occupational segregation between 1980 and 2019, comparing Black and white workers with and without bachelor’s degrees and by developing a Monte Carlo simulation, where we compare the observed levels of segregation to predicted levels of racial occupational segregation by education under race-neutral conditions. First, we find that considerable racial occupation segregation in the labor market persists today regardless of educational attainment and that observed segregation is substantially higher than would be expected at random, conditional on educational attainment, gender, and geography. We compare the types of occupations in which Black and white workers are disproportionately situated, and we show that this segregation has significant consequences for wage inequality between Black and white workers with and without four-year degrees. Overall, our results show that racial occupational desegregation has stalled in the past two decades despite rising educational attainment amongst Black workers.
papers.zh_title: 教育程度在缓解黑人与白人工人职业隔离中的局限性
papers.zh_abstract: 以往的研究记录了美国劳动力市场中黑人与白人工人之间存在显著的职业隔离。然而，很少有研究考察近年来的种族职业隔离，或按教育水平以及教育与种族的交叉点进行分析。在本文中，我们通过计算相异指数来考察1980年至2019年间的种族职业隔离，比较拥有和未拥有学士学位的黑人与白人工人，并开发了一个蒙特卡洛模拟，将观察到的隔离水平与种族中立条件下按教育程度预测的种族职业隔离水平进行比较。首先，我们发现，无论教育程度如何，劳动力市场中显著的种族职业隔离至今仍然存在，并且观察到的隔离程度远高于在给定教育程度、性别和地理位置条件下的随机预期。我们比较了黑人和白人工人不成比例地集中的职业类型，并表明这种隔离对拥有和未拥有四年制学位的黑人与白人工人之间的工资不平等具有显著影响。总体而言，我们的结果表明，尽管黑人工人的教育程度不断提高，但种族职业隔离在过去二十年中已陷入停滞。

papers.title: Target Date Funds as Asset Market Stabilizers: Evidence from the Pandemic
papers.authors: Jonathan A. Parker, Yang Sun
papers.abstract: Target Date Funds (TDFs) provide retirement investors, many of whom are unsophisticated or inattentive, with age-appropriate exposures to different asset classes like stocks and bonds. To maintain exposures, TDFs trade actively against market returns, buying stock funds when the stock market does poorly, and selling when the market does well (Parker, Schoar, and Sun, 2023). This paper shows that trading by TDFs was a significant stabilizing force in US equity markets during the unprecedented economic volatility of the COVID-19 pandemic period. Specifically, TDFs – now comprising a quarter of all 401(k) plan assets – caused significant contrarian investment flows across asset classes, flows that were not undone by enrollment of TDF investors or by discretionary actions by TDF managers. Mutual funds with large ownership by TDFs had more stable funding through the pandemic, and stocks that had greater indirect ownership by TDFs had lower co-movement with the market and lower volatility during the pandemic period.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EFG；JEL：G12, G23, G51, H55
papers.zh_title: 作为资产市场稳定器的目标日期基金：来自新冠疫情的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 目标日期基金（TDFs）为退休投资者（其中许多是不成熟或注意力不集中的投资者）提供与年龄相适应的不同资产类别（如股票和债券）的风险敞口。为了维持风险敞口，TDFs会针对市场回报进行积极交易：当股市表现不佳时买入股票基金，当市场表现良好时卖出（Parker, Schoar, and Sun, 2023）。本文表明，在COVID-19疫情期间前所未有的经济波动中，TDFs的交易是美国股票市场一个重要的稳定力量。具体来说，TDFs（目前占所有401(k)计划资产的四分之一）导致了跨资产类别的显著逆势投资流，这些资金流并未因TDF投资者的注册或TDF管理者的自由裁量行为而逆转。TDFs持有大量所有权的共同基金在疫情期间拥有更稳定的资金来源，而TDFs间接持有更多所有权的股票在疫情期间与市场的联动性更低，波动性也更低。

papers.title: Insuring those Who Bear the Risk: The Impact of Gender-inclusive Insurance in Kenya
papers.authors: Julian Arteaga, Michael Carter, Andrew Hobbs
papers.abstract: The novel insurance contracts for crop losses and livestock mortality that have been developed in low income countries typically protect against shocks in the traditionally male sphere of economic activity. Often overlooked are women, the particularities of their indirect exposure to this risk, and their socially constructed responsibility to manage family well-being. To fill this lacuna, this paper studies the effect of a low-cost intervention that reformulates a livestock insurance contract so that it directly addresses women’s risk and is sold in units that are commensurate with women’s expenditure responsibilities. We measure the effect of this contractual reformulation using a randomized trial amongst pastoralist communities in Kenya. Twenty-nine percent of previously subsidized households that received the novel contractual formulation purchased insurance (without subsidy), compared to only nineteen percent of previously subsidized households offered insurance under the standard malerisk formulation. Households that had not received prior insurance subsidies purchased no insurance, irrespective of the inclusivity of the insurance design. Protecting women, their assets, and those who depend on them will require a combination of smart subsidies and gender-inclusive insurance contract design.
papers.zh_title: 为承担风险者提供保险：肯尼亚性别包容性保险的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在低收入国家开发的针对作物损失和牲畜死亡的新型保险合同，通常保护的是传统上属于男性经济活动领域的冲击。女性、她们对此类风险的间接暴露的特殊性，以及她们在社会建构下管理家庭福祉的责任，往往被忽视。为填补这一空白，本文研究了一项低成本干预措施的效果，该措施重新设计了牲畜保险合同，使其直接应对女性的风险，并以与女性支出责任相称的单位进行销售。我们通过在肯尼亚牧民社区进行的一项随机试验来衡量这种合同重新设计的效果。在之前获得补贴的家庭中，收到新型合同设计的家庭中有29%购买了保险（无补贴），而相比之下，在标准男性风险合同设计下获得保险的家庭中，这一比例仅为19%。之前未获得保险补贴的家庭无论保险设计是否具有包容性，都没有购买任何保险。保护女性、她们的资产以及依赖她们的人，将需要结合明智的补贴和性别包容性的保险合同设计。

papers.title: The Value of Communication for Mental Health
papers.authors: Francis Annan, Belinda Archibong
papers.abstract: Mental health disorders account for a significant share of the overall global disease burden. The economic losses from such disorders are staggeringly large, particularly in low-income countries, where people are faced with several unexpected shocks. We test whether improved communication can mitigate such mental health disorders. Partnering with a major telecommunications company, we implement low-cost communication interventions that provide mobile calling credits to a nationally representative set of low-income adults in Ghana during the COVID-19 pandemic. Individuals’ inability to make unexpected calls, need to borrow SOS airtime, and to seek digital loans decreased significantly relative to a control group. As a result, the programs led to a significant decrease in mental distress (-9.8%), the likelihood of severe mental distress by -2.3 percentage points (a quarter of the mean prevalence), and domestic violence, with null impact on consumption expenditure. The effects are stronger for monthly mobile credits than a lump-sum. We present evidence that improvements in both business-related services and social inclusion and/or protection are relevant explanations. Simple cost-benefit analysis shows that providing communication credit to low-income adults is a cost-effective policy for improving mental health. Communication – the ability to stay connected – meaningfully improves mental well-being and interventions about communication are particularly valuable when implemented as many installments.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I12, I15, I38, L63, O12
papers.zh_title: 沟通对心理健康的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 心理健康障碍在全球疾病总负担中占很大比例。此类障碍造成的经济损失巨大，尤其是在低收入国家，那里的人们面临着若干意外冲击。我们检验了改善沟通是否可以减轻此类心理健康障碍。我们与一家大型电信公司合作，在COVID-19疫情期间，向加纳具有全国代表性的低收入成年人群体实施了低成本的沟通干预措施，即提供移动通话积分。与对照组相比，干预组个体无法进行意外通话、需要借用SOS通话时间以及寻求数字贷款的情况显著减少。因此，这些项目导致心理困扰显著降低（-9.8%），严重心理困扰的可能性降低了2.3个百分点（占平均患病率的四分之一），并减少了家庭暴力，而对消费支出没有影响。按月发放移动积分的效果比一次性发放更强。我们提供的证据表明，商业相关服务以及社会包容和/或保护的改善是相关的解释。简单的成本效益分析表明，向低收入成年人提供沟通积分是改善心理健康的一项具有成本效益的政策。沟通——保持联系的能力——能显著改善心理健康，而关于沟通的干预措施在分期实施时尤其有价值。

papers.title: Prison Labor: The Price of Prisons and the Lasting Effects of Incarceration
papers.authors: Belinda Archibong, Nonso Obikili
papers.abstract: Institutions of justice, like prisons, can be used to serve economic and other extrajudicial interests, with lasting deleterious effects. We study the effects on incarceration when prisoners are primarily used as a source of labor using evidence from British colonial Nigeria.
