We digitized 65 years of archival records on prisons from 1920 to 1995 and provide new estimates on the value of colonial prison labor and the effects of labor demand shocks on incarceration. We find that prison labor was economically valuable to the colonial regime, making up a significant share of colonial public works expenditure. Positive economic shocks increased incarceration rates over the colonial period. This result is reversed in the postcolonial period, where prison labor is not a notable feature of state public finance. We document a significant reduction in present-day trust in legal institutions, such as the police, in areas with high historical exposure to colonial imprisonment; the resulting reduction in trust is specific to legal institutions.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：H5, J47, N37, O10, O43
papers.zh_title: 监狱劳动：监狱的代价与监禁的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 司法机构，如监狱，可以被用来服务于经济和其他法外利益，并产生持久的破坏性影响。我们利用英属殖民时期尼日利亚的证据，研究了当囚犯主要被用作劳动力来源时对监禁的影响。我们将1920年至1995年间65年的监狱档案记录数字化，并对殖民时期监狱劳动的价值以及劳动力需求冲击对监禁的影响提供了新的估计。我们发现，监狱劳动对殖民政权具有经济价值，占殖民公共工程支出的很大一部分。正向经济冲击在殖民时期增加了监禁率。这一结果在后殖民时期发生了逆转，在后殖民时期，监狱劳动不再是国家公共财政的一个显著特征。我们记录到，在历史上受殖民监禁影响较大的地区，当今对法律机构（如警察）的信任度显著降低；这种信任度的降低是专门针对法律机构的。

papers.title: Voting Choice
papers.authors: Andrey Malenko, Nadya Malenko
papers.abstract: Traditionally, fund managers cast votes on behalf of investors whose capital they manage. Recently, this system has come under intense debate given the growing concentration of voting power among a few asset managers and disagreements over environmental and social issues. Major fund managers now offer their investors a choice: delegate their votes to the fund or cast votes themselves ("voting choice"). This paper develops a theory of delegation of voting rights and studies the implications of voting choice for investor welfare. If the reason for offering voting choice is that investors have different preferences, then investors may retain their voting rights excessively, inefficiently prioritizing their private preferences over information. As a result, investors on aggregate are not always better off if voting choice is offered to them. In contrast, if the reason for offering voting choice is that investors have information about the proposal that the fund manager does not have, then voting choice is generally efficient, increasing investor welfare. However, if information collection is costly, voting choice may lead to coordination failure, resulting in less informed voting outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 投票选择
papers.zh_abstract: 传统上，基金经理代表其管理的资本的投资者进行投票。近年来，鉴于投票权在少数资产管理公司中日益集中，以及在环境和社会问题上的分歧，这一体系引发了激烈辩论。大型基金管理公司现在为其投资者提供选择：将投票权委托给基金，或者自己投票（“投票选择”）。本文发展了一个投票权委托理论，并研究了投票选择对投资者福利的影响。如果提供投票选择的原因是投资者有不同的偏好，那么投资者可能会过度保留其投票权，低效地将其私人偏好置于信息之上。因此，从总体上看，如果向投资者提供投票选择，他们的境况并不总是会变得更好。相反，如果提供投票选择的原因是投资者拥有基金经理所没有的关于提案的信息，那么投票选择通常是有效的，能够增加投资者福利。然而，如果信息收集是有成本的，投票选择可能导致协调失败，从而产生信息含量更低的投票结果。

papers.title: Judging Banks’ Risk by the Profits They Report
papers.authors: Ben S. Meiselman, Stefan Nagel, Amiyatosh Purnanandam
papers.abstract: In competitive capital markets, risky debt claims that offer high yields in good times have high systematic risk exposure in bad times. We apply this idea to bank risk measurement. We find that banks with high accounting return on equity (ROE) prior to a crisis have higher systematic tail risk exposure during the crisis. Proximate causes of crises differ, but the predictive power of ROE is pervasive, including during the financial crisis of 2007–2010 and the recent crisis triggered by the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank. ROE predicts systematic tail risk much better than conventional measures based on risk-weighted assets.
papers.zh_title: 通过报告利润判断银行风险
papers.zh_abstract: 在竞争性资本市场中，在经济景气时提供高收益的风险债务在景气不佳时具有高系统性风险暴露。我们将这一思想应用于银行风险度量。我们发现，在危机前拥有高会计股本回报率（ROE）的银行，在危机期间具有更高的系统性尾部风险暴露。危机的直接原因各不相同，但ROE的预测能力是普遍的，包括在2007-2010年金融危机以及最近由硅谷银行倒闭引发的危机期间。ROE对系统性尾部风险的预测能力远优于基于风险加权资产的传统度量方法。

papers.title: The Effect of Immigration Policy on Founding Location Choice: Evidence from Canada's Start-up Visa Program
papers.authors: Saerom (Ronnie) Lee, Britta Glennon
papers.abstract: To spur entrepreneurship and economic growth, an increasing number of countries have introduced immigration policies that provide visas to skilled entrepreneurs. This paper investigates whether these policies influence the founding location choice of immigrant founders, by leveraging the introduction of Canada's Start-up Visa Program in 2013. We demonstrate that this immigration policy increased the likelihood that U.S.-based immigrants have a start-up in Canada by 69%. Our results show that Asian immigrants (who have a higher representation in Canada than in the U.S.) are disproportionately more likely to migrate to Canada to start their businesses, whereas Hispanic immigrants (who have a smaller representation in Canada than in the U.S.) are less inclined to do so. We also find that this propensity varies with the size of co-ethnic immigrant communities in the origin location. Overall, our study unveils the importance of immigration policies in determining founding location choice and has important implications for countries competing for global talent.
papers.zh_title: 移民政策对创业地点选择的影响：来自加拿大创业签证计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 为了促进创业和经济增长，越来越多的国家推出了向技术型创业者提供签证的移民政策。本文利用加拿大2013年推出的创业签证计划，研究这些政策是否影响移民创始人的创业地点选择。我们证明，这项移民政策使美国移民在加拿大创办初创企业的可能性增加了69%。我们的结果显示，亚裔移民（在加拿大的代表性高于美国）更倾向于迁移到加拿大创业，而西班牙裔移民（在加拿大的代表性低于美国）则不太愿意这样做。我们还发现，这种倾向随原居住地同族移民社区的规模而变化。总体而言，我们的研究揭示了移民政策在决定创业地点选择中的重要性，并对争夺全球人才的国家具有重要启示。

papers.title: Corporate Social Responsibility and Voting over Public Goods
papers.authors: Andrew A. Samwick, Sophie Wang
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the impact of corporate social responsibility (CSR) on the total provision of public goods in a framework in which consumers who may make such voluntary contributions to public goods via CSR are also voters who decide on the level of taxes to finance publicly provided public goods. The main result indicates that, relative to an economy in which all public goods are publicly financed, the introduction of CSR lowers the total amount of public goods, as voters rationally anticipate that higher CSR will partially offset the consequences of lower public funding. The results offer a cautionary tale about the promotion of CSR in an economy with heterogeneous preferences for the public good.
papers.zh_title: 企业社会责任与公共品投票
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在一个框架中分析了企业社会责任对公共品总供给的影响，该框架中，可能通过企业社会责任自愿为公共品做出贡献的消费者，同时也是决定税收水平以资助公共提供的公共品的选民。主要结果表明，与所有公共品均由公共资助的经济体相比，企业社会责任的引入降低了公共品总量，因为选民理性地预期更高的企业社会责任将部分抵消公共资金减少的后果。这些结果对在公共品偏好异质性的经济体中推广企业社会责任提出了警示。

papers.title: Hidden Figures: Uncovering Quantities Behind Zeros with Econometrics
papers.authors: Anirban Basu
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews the econometric approaches typically used to deal with the spike of zeros when modeling non-negative outcomes such as expenditures, income, or consumption.
papers.zh_title: 隐藏的数字：用计量经济学揭示零背后的数量
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了在建模非负结果（如支出、收入或消费）时，通常用于处理零值堆积的计量经济学方法。

papers.title: How People Use Statistics
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, John J. Conlon, Nicola Gennaioli, Spencer Yongwook Kwon, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: We document two new facts about the distributions of answers in famous statistical problems: they are i) multi-modal and ii) unstable with respect to irrelevant changes in the problem. We offer a model in which, when solving a problem, people represent each hypothesis by attending “bottom up” to its salient features while neglecting other, potentially more relevant, ones. Only the statistics associated with salient features are used, others are neglected. The model unifies biases in judgments about i.i.d. draws, such as the Gambler’s Fallacy and insensitivity to sample size, with biases in inference such as under- and overreaction and insensitivity to the weight of evidence. The model makes predictions about how changes in the salience of specific features should jointly shape the prevalence of these biases and measured attention to features, but also create entirely new biases. We test and confirm these predictions experimentally. Bottom-up attention to features emerges as a unifying framework for biases conventionally explained using a variety of stable heuristics or distortions of the Bayes rule.
papers.zh_title: 人们如何使用统计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了著名统计问题中答案分布的两个新事实：它们是(i)多峰的，并且(ii)对问题中无关的变化不稳定。我们提出了一个模型，在该模型中，当解决问题时，人们通过“自下而上”地关注每个假设的显著特征，同时忽略其他可能更相关的特征来表征每个假设。只有与显著特征相关的统计信息被使用，其他则被忽略。该模型统一了关于独立同分布抽样的判断偏差（如赌徒谬误和对样本大小的不敏感）与推理偏差（如反应不足和过度反应以及对证据权重的不敏感）。该模型预测了特定特征显著性的变化应如何共同塑造这些偏差的普遍性和对特征的测量注意力，同时也会产生全新的偏差。我们通过实验测试并证实了这些预测。对特征的“自下而上”注意力作为一个统一框架出现，用于解释通常使用各种稳定启发式或贝叶斯规则扭曲来解释的偏差。

papers.title: Show Me the Money! Incentives and Nudges to Shift Electric Vehicle Charge Timing
papers.authors: Megan R. Bailey, David P. Brown, Blake C. Shaffer, Frank A. Wolak
papers.abstract: We use a field experiment to measure the effectiveness of financial incentives and moral suasion “nudges” to shift the timing of electric vehicle (EV) charging. We find EV owners respond strongly to financial incentives, while nudges have no statistically discernible effect. When financial incentives are removed, charge timing reverts to pre-intervention behavior, showing no evidence of habit formation and reinforcing our finding that “money matters”. Our charge price responsiveness estimate is an order of magnitude larger than typical household electricity consumption elasticities. This result highlights the greater flexibility of EV charging over other forms of residential electricity demand.
papers.zh_title: 给我钱！改变电动汽车充电时间的激励与助推
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项实地实验来衡量经济激励和道德劝说的“助推”在改变电动汽车充电时间方面的有效性。我们发现电动汽车车主对经济激励反应强烈，而助推则没有统计上显著的效果。当经济激励被取消时，充电时间恢复到干预前的行为，没有显示出习惯形成的证据，这强化了我们的发现，即“金钱很重要”。我们的充电价格响应度估计值比典型的家庭用电需求弹性大一个数量级。这一结果凸显了电动汽车充电相对于其他形式的住宅电力需求具有更大的灵活性。

papers.title: Welfare Estimates of Shifting Peak Travel
papers.authors: Robert W. Hahn, Robert D. Metcalfe, Eddy Tam
papers.abstract: We develop novel estimates of peak and off-peak price elasticities for urban mass transit demand in San Francisco using a large natural experiment with 3.6 million trip sessions and a natural field experiment that both have exogenous price subsidies. We then estimate the welfare impacts for these price subsidies using a sufficient statistics approach. Our analysis suggests that off-peak subsidies can increase welfare, but the positive effects are reduced when consumers take the decisions of others into account compared to when they do not. We also find a large variation in the welfare impacts of shifting travel to different periods, which is explained by differences in demand and congestion characteristics. Finally, we show that the targeting of subsidies can increase welfare, but need not do so if the regulator does not have accurate information on demand.
papers.zh_title: 转移高峰出行的福利估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含360万次出行会话的大型自然实验和一个具有外生价格补贴的自然实地实验，为旧金山城市公共交通需求开发了新的高峰和非高峰价格弹性估计。然后，我们使用充分统计量方法估计这些价格补贴的福利影响。我们的分析表明，非高峰补贴可以提高福利，但当消费者考虑他人的决策时，其积极影响会降低，相比之下，当消费者不考虑他人决策时影响更大。我们还发现，将出行转移到不同时段的福利影响存在很大差异，这可以通过需求和拥堵特征的差异来解释。最后，我们表明，补贴的定向可以提高福利，但如果监管者没有准确的需求信息，则不一定如此。

papers.title: Retirement Consumption and Pension Design
papers.authors: Jonas Kolsrud, Camille Landais, Daniel Reck, Johannes Spinnewijn
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes consumption to evaluate the distributional effects of pension reforms. Using Swedish administrative data, we show that on average workers who retire earlier consume less while retired and experience larger drops in consumption around retirement. Interpreted via a theoretical model, these findings imply that reforms incentivizing later retirement incur a substantial consumption-smoothing cost. Turning to other features of pension policy, we find that reforms that redistribute based on early-career labor supply would have opposite-signed redistributive effects, while differentiating on wealth may help to target pension benefits toward those who are vulnerable to larger drops in consumption around retirement.
papers.zh_title: 退休消费与养老金设计
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过分析消费来评估养老金改革的分配效应。利用瑞典的行政数据，我们表明，平均而言，较早退休的工人在退休后消费更少，并且在退休前后消费下降幅度更大。通过理论模型解释，这些发现意味着激励延迟退休的改革会带来显著的消费平滑成本。转向养老金政策的其他特征，我们发现，基于早期职业生涯劳动供给进行再分配的改革会产生相反符号的再分配效应，而根据财富进行区分可能有助于将养老金福利瞄准那些在退休前后容易遭受较大消费下降的人群。

papers.title: Are Software Automation and Teleworkers Substitutes? Preliminary Evidence from Japan
papers.authors: Richard Baldwin, Toshihiro Okubo
papers.abstract: Digital technology is reshaping workplaces by enabling spatial separation of offices, known as telework, or remote intelligence (RI), and by facilitating automation of service sector tasks via artificial intelligence (AI). This paper is a first attempt to empirically investigate whether AI and RI are complements or substitutes in the service sector. It uses a worker-level panel of surveys collected from around 10,000 workers from pre-COVID-19 pandemic to late 2022, we find preliminary evidence that suggests that AI and RI are complements rather than substitutes. The evidence comes first from the positive correlation of investments in AI-promoting and RI-promoting software at the firm and worker level, and second from the positive correlation of workers' expectations regarding telework and software automation. The evidence is far from definitive but suggests that the complement-substitution question is a fruitful line for future research.
papers.zh_title: 软件自动化与远程工作者是替代品吗？来自日本的初步证据
papers.zh_abstract: 数字技术正在重塑工作场所，它通过实现办公室的空间分离（即远程工作或远程智能）以及通过人工智能促进服务部门任务的自动化。本文是首次尝试实证研究服务业中人工智能与远程智能是互补品还是替代品。它利用从新冠疫情前到2022年底收集的约10,000名工人的工人层面面板调查数据，我们发现了初步证据，表明人工智能和远程智能是互补品而非替代品。证据首先来自企业和工人层面促进人工智能和促进远程智能的软件投资的正相关关系，其次来自工人对远程工作和软件自动化的期望的正相关关系。证据远非确定，但表明互补-替代问题是未来研究的一个富有成果的方向。

papers.title: Do PCI Facility Openings Differentially Affect AMI Patients by Individual Race and Community Segregation?
papers.authors: Renee Y. Hsia, Yu-Chu Shen
papers.abstract: Percutaneous coronary intervention facility openings may have differential effects on treatment and health outcomes for Black versus White patients in residentially segregated versus integrated communities. This study looked at changes in patient treatment and health outcomes (same-day PCI, PCI during hospitalization, 30-day mortality, and 1-year mortality) after the opening of a PCI facility within a 15-minute drive of a community. Findings show that Black patients in integrated communities experienced the greatest benefits after a PCI opening for every outcome examined. Healthcare stakeholders may be able to use this data to prioritize PCI openings in communities that will derive the greatest benefits
papers.zh_title: PCI设施开设是否因个体种族和社区隔离对AMI患者产生差异化影响？
papers.zh_abstract: 经皮冠状动脉介入治疗（PCI）设施的开设，可能对居住在不同种族隔离或融合社区中的黑人与白人患者的治疗和健康结果产生差异化影响。本研究考察了在社区15分钟车程内开设PCI设施后，患者治疗和健康结果（包括当日PCI、住院期间PCI、30天死亡率和1年死亡率）的变化。结果显示，在融合社区中的黑人患者在PCI设施开设后，每项考察结果均获得了最大益处。医疗保健利益相关者可以利用这些数据，优先在将获得最大收益的社区开设PCI设施。

papers.title: Supporting Women’s Livelihoods at Scale: Evidence from a Nationwide Multi-Faceted Program
papers.authors: Ioana Botea, Andrew Brudevold-Newman, Markus Goldstein, Corinne Low, Gareth Roberts
papers.abstract: The success of multi-faceted “graduation” programs in reducing poverty raises three questions: Can their impacts be replicated when implemented by governments at scale? Can these bundled programs be streamlined for broader reach? And, do positive effects risk being offset by negative spillovers? This study examines a nationwide livelihood program implemented by the Zambian government and finds large, sustained increases in consumption and earnings—comparable to those of the most effective multi-faceted programs—without negative economic spillovers on non-beneficiaries. A treatment arm providing only financial capital achieved similar gains, consistent with evidence on the welfare impacts of direct cash transfers but with the added advantage of persistent income generation effects. These results point to a middle-ground approach between simple capital infusions, which often lack long-term impact, and complex graduation models that may be challenging for governments to implement at scale, offering a scalable and sustainable strategy for poverty alleviation.
papers.zh_title: 大规模支持女性生计：来自全国性多层面项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 多层面“毕业”项目在减贫方面的成功引发了三个问题：当由政府大规模实施时，其影响能否被复制？这些捆绑式项目能否简化以扩大覆盖范围？积极影响是否可能被负面溢出效应所抵消？本研究考察了由赞比亚政府实施的一项全国性生计项目，发现消费和收入出现了大规模、持续的增长——与最有效的多层面项目相当——且未对非受益者产生负面经济溢出效应。仅提供金融资本的治疗组也取得了类似的收益，这与直接现金转移对福利影响的证据一致，但额外具有持续的收入生成效应。这些结果表明，在通常缺乏长期影响的简单资本注入与政府可能难以大规模实施的复杂毕业模式之间，存在一种中间路径，为减贫提供了一种可扩展且可持续的策略。

papers.title: Sex, Power, and Adolescence: Intimate Partner Violence and Sexual Behaviors
papers.authors: Manisha Shah, Jennifer Seager, Joao Montalvao, Markus Goldstein
papers.abstract: Adolescents in Sub-Saharan Africa have some of the highest rates of intimate partner violence across the globe. This paper evaluates the impact of a randomized controlled trial that offers females a goal setting activity to improve their sexual and reproductive health outcomes and offers their male partners a soccer intervention, which educates and inspires young men to make better sexual and reproductive health choices. Both interventions reduce female reports of intimate partner violence. Impacts are larger among females who were already sexually active at baseline. We develop a model to understand the mechanisms at play. The soccer intervention improves male attitudes around violence and risky sexual behaviors. Females in the goal setting arm take more control of their sexual and reproductive health by exiting violent relationships. Both of these mechanisms drive reductions in IPV.
papers.zh_title: 性、权力与青春期：亲密伴侣暴力与性行为
papers.zh_abstract: 撒哈拉以南非洲的青少年拥有全球最高的亲密伴侣暴力发生率之一。本文评估了一项随机对照试验的影响，该试验为女性提供目标设定活动以改善其性健康和生殖健康结果，并为她们的男性伴侣提供足球干预，以教育和激励年轻男性做出更好的性健康和生殖健康选择。两项干预措施均减少了女性报告的亲密伴侣暴力。在基线时已有性行为的女性中，影响更大。我们构建了一个模型来理解其中的机制。足球干预改善了男性对暴力和危险性行为的看法。目标设定组的女性通过退出暴力关系，更多地掌控了自己的性健康和生殖健康。这两种机制共同推动了亲密伴侣暴力的减少。

papers.title: Which Mexicans Are White? Enumerator-Assigned Race in the 1930 Census and the Socioeconomic Integration of Mexican Americans
papers.authors: Brian Duncan, Stephen J. Trejo
papers.abstract: The authors explore unique complete-count data from the 1930 Census in which a respondent’s race was assigned by enumerators and “Mexican” was one of the possible responses. Census enumerators frequently and selectively assigned a non-Mexican race—predominantly “white”—to U.S.-born individuals of Mexican ancestry. As a result, using enumerator-assigned race to identify Mexican Americans misses a sizeable fraction of the relevant population and significantly understates this group’s socioeconomic attainment. The propensity for Census enumerators to identify Mexican Americans as white varied enormously across U.S. counties, and this variation is strongly associated with both the educational attainment of U.S.-born Mexican Americans observed in the 1940 Census and the amount of return migration by Mexican immigrants during the 1930s. As such, this variation may help to identify local environments that were more favorable for the integration of Mexican Americans.
papers.zh_title: 哪些墨西哥人是白人？1930年人口普查中普查员指定的种族与墨西哥裔美国人的社会经济融合
papers.zh_abstract: 作者们探索了1930年人口普查中独特的完整计数数据，其中受访者的种族由普查员指定，而“墨西哥人”是可能的回答之一。人口普查员经常且有选择性地将非墨西哥种族——主要是“白人”——指定给在美国出生的墨西哥裔个体。因此，使用普查员指定的种族来识别墨西哥裔美国人会遗漏相当大比例的相关人口，并显著低估该群体的社会经济成就。普查员将墨西哥裔美国人识别为白人的倾向在美国各县之间差异巨大，这种差异与1940年人口普查中观察到的美国出生墨西哥裔美国人的教育程度以及1930年代墨西哥移民的回流数量密切相关。因此，这种差异可能有助于识别对墨西哥裔美国人融合更有利的当地环境。

papers.title: Innovation Market Failures and the Design of New Climate Policy Instruments
papers.authors: Sarah C. Armitage, Noël Bakhtian, Adam B. Jaffe
papers.abstract: Moving beyond the combination of adoption subsidies, standards, and (albeit limited) attempts at carbon pricing that largely characterized US climate policy over the past decade, recent climate-related legislation has transformed not only the scale of US climate activities but also the policy mechanisms adopted. Newly scaled policy instruments—including demonstration projects, loan guarantees, green banks, and regional technology hubs—are motivated not only by unpriced carbon externalities but also by innovation market failures. This paper maps the economics literature on innovation market failures and other frictions to the stated goals of these policy instruments, with the goal of focusing discussions about how to implement these policies as effectively as possible. The paper also discusses how program evaluation can help to illuminate which market failures are most relevant in a particular context and which policy instruments are most targeted to them.
papers.zh_title: 创新市场失灵与新气候政策工具的设计
papers.zh_abstract: 超越过去十年美国气候政策主要特征的采用补贴、标准以及（尽管有限）碳定价尝试的组合，近期与气候相关的立法不仅改变了美国气候活动的规模，也改变了所采用的政策机制。新近扩大的政策工具——包括示范项目、贷款担保、绿色银行和区域技术中心——其动机不仅来自未定价的碳外部性，也来自创新市场失灵。本文将关于创新市场失灵和其他摩擦的经济学文献与这些政策工具的既定目标进行映射，旨在聚焦关于如何尽可能有效地实施这些政策的讨论。本文还讨论了项目评估如何有助于揭示在特定背景下哪些市场失灵最为相关，以及哪些政策工具最具针对性。

papers.title: Tax Credits for Clean Electricity: The Distributional Impacts of Supply-Push Policies in the Power Sector
papers.authors: Maxwell L. Brown, Jon M. Becker, Jared Carbone, Teagan Goforth, James McFarland, Destenie Nock, Kristina Pitman, Daniel C. Steinberg
papers.abstract: We evaluate distributional and efficiency consequences of the bulk power clean electricity tax credits authorized by the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act. To do so, we link detailed electricity capacity expansion, computable general equilibrium, data-rich microsimulation, and air pollution models to estimate the policy incidence in terms of economic welfare and health impacts across a wide range of demographic groups. We evaluate the tradeoff between policy efficiency and income progressivity by comparing the tax credits to cap-and-trade policies that vary revenue recycling approaches. Under the scenarios analyzed the bulk power tax credits lead to increased clean electricity technology deployment resulting in a reallocation of capital from elsewhere in the economy, higher prices for capital and other goods, lower power prices, and lower emissions. The tax credits yield progressive outcomes for both economic welfare and health impacts. The health benefits exceed total policy costs and provide greater benefits for low-income and historically-marginalized households given the coincidence of household and emission source locations.
papers.zh_title: 清洁电力税收抵免：电力部门供给推动政策的分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了2022年《通胀削减法案》授权的电力批发清洁电力税收抵免的分配和效率后果。为此，我们链接了详细的电力容量扩展模型、可计算一般均衡模型、数据丰富的微观模拟模型和空气污染模型，以估计该政策在广泛人口群体中的经济福利和健康影响方面的政策归宿。我们通过将税收抵免与采用不同收入循环方式的限额与交易政策进行比较，评估了政策效率与收入累进性之间的权衡。在所分析的场景下，电力批发税收抵免导致清洁电力技术部署增加，导致资本从经济其他部门重新配置，资本和其他商品价格上涨，电力价格下降，以及排放减少。税收抵免在经济福利和健康影响方面均产生了累进性结果。健康收益超过了总政策成本，并且由于家庭和排放源位置的重合，为低收入和历史边缘化家庭带来了更大的收益。

papers.title: What Predicts the Growth of Small Firms? Evidence from Tanzanian Commercial Loan Data
papers.authors: Mia Ellis, Cynthia Kinnan, Margaret S. McMillan, Sarah Shaukat
papers.abstract: Not all firms have equal capacity to absorb productive credit. Identifying those with higher potential may have large consequences for productivity. We collect detailed survey data on small- and medium-sized Tanzanian firms who borrow from a large commercial bank, which in turn raises funds via international capital markets. Using machine learning methods to identify predictors of loan growth, we document, first, that we achieve high rates of predictive power. Second, “soft” information (entrepreneurs’ motivations for entrepreneurship and constraints faced) has predictive power over and above administrative data (sector, age, etc.). Third, there is a different and larger set of predictors for women than men, consistent with greater barriers to efficient capital allocation among female entrepreneurs.
papers.zh_title: 什么预测了小企业的增长？来自坦桑尼亚商业贷款数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 并非所有企业都具有同等的吸收生产性信贷的能力。识别具有更高潜力的企业可能对生产率产生重大影响。我们收集了来自一家大型商业银行借款的坦桑尼亚中小企业的详细调查数据，该银行通过国际资本市场筹集资金。使用机器学习方法识别贷款增长的预测因素，我们首先发现，我们实现了较高的预测能力。其次，“软”信息（企业家的创业动机和面临的约束）具有超越行政数据（行业、年龄等）的预测能力。第三，女性的预测因素与男性不同且更多，这与女性企业家在有效资本配置方面面临更大障碍的证据一致。

papers.title: From Retributive to Restorative: An Alternative Approach to Justice in Schools
papers.authors: Anjali Adukia, Benjamin Feigenberg, Fatemeh Momeni
papers.abstract: School districts historically approached conflict-resolution from the perspective that suspending disruptive students was necessary to protect their classmates, even if this caused harm to perceived offenders. Restorative practices (RP) – focused on reparation, accountability, and shared ownership of disciplinary justice – are designed to address undesirable behavior without harming students. We study Chicago Public Schools’ adoption of RP and find that suspensions and arrests decreased, driven by effects for Black students. We find null effects on test-score value added, ruling out meaningful average declines. We estimate a 15% decrease in out-of-school arrests, consistent with RP substantively changing student behavior.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：I0, I20, I21, I24, J0, J01, J08, J18, K39
papers.zh_title: 从惩罚到修复：学校正义的替代路径
papers.zh_abstract: 学区历来以这样的视角处理冲突：认为停学处分扰乱秩序的学生对于保护其同学是必要的，即使这会对被视为违规者造成伤害。修复性实践（RP）——聚焦于赔偿、问责以及对纪律正义的共同拥有——旨在在不伤害学生的情况下解决不良行为。我们研究了芝加哥公立学校对RP的采纳，发现停学和逮捕数量有所下降，这一效应主要由黑人学生驱动。我们发现对考试成绩增值的影响为零，排除了有意义的平均下降。我们估计校外逮捕减少了15%，这与RP实质性改变学生行为的结果一致。

papers.title: Economic Decision-Making Skill Predicts Income in Two Countries
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, David J. Deming, Søren Leth-Petersen, Ben Weidmann
papers.abstract: Jobs increasingly require good decision-making. Workers are valued not only for how much they can do, but also for their ability to decide what to do. In this paper we measure the ability to make good decisions about resource allocation, which we call economic decision-making skill. Our assessment requires an intuitive understanding of comparative advantage and is motivated by a model where decision-makers strategically acquire information about factor productivity under time and effort constraints. Economic decision-making skill strongly predicts labor earnings in representative samples of full-time workers in the U.S. and Denmark, conditional on education, IQ, numeracy, and other covariates. Economic decision-making skill is more valuable in management and other decision-intensive occupations.
papers.zh_title: 经济决策技能预测两个国家的收入
papers.zh_abstract: 工作越来越需要良好的决策能力。员工的价值不仅取决于他们能完成多少工作，还取决于他们决定做什么的能力。在本文中，我们衡量了关于资源分配做出良好决策的能力，我们称之为经济决策技能。我们的评估要求对比较优势有直观理解，并受一个模型的启发，在该模型中，决策者在时间和精力约束下策略性地获取关于要素生产率的信息。在针对美国和丹麦全职工作者的代表性样本中，经济决策技能在控制教育、智商、计算能力及其他协变量的情况下，强烈预测劳动收入。经济决策技能在管理和其他决策密集型职业中更具价值。

papers.title: Externalities from Medical Innovation: Evidence from Organ Transplantation
papers.authors: Kevin Callison, Michael E. Darden, Keith F. Teltser
papers.abstract: We evaluate the introduction of direct-acting antiviral (DAA) therapy for Hepatitis C (HCV) on liver transplant allocation in the United States. We develop a model of listing and organ acceptance behavior for patients with both HCV-positive and HCV-negative end-stage liver disease. In the model, DAAs obviate the need for transplant for some HCV-positive patients, which shortens the waiting list, potentially benefiting HCV-negative registrants and inducing marginal HCV-negative patients to list. Using data from the universe of transplants between 2005 and 2019, we find that DAA availability resulted in an additional 5,682 liver transplants to HCV-negative recipients between 2014 and 2019, driven in part by a 37% average annual increase in HCV-negative waiting list registrations. Our estimates imply that DAAs generated $7.52 billion in positive externalities for HCV-negative patients during this period.
papers.zh_title: 医疗创新的外部性：来自器官移植的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了针对丙型肝炎（HCV）的直接抗病毒（DAA）疗法引入对美国肝移植分配的影响。我们为HCV阳性和HCV阴性终末期肝病患者建立了一个关于登记和器官接受行为的模型。在该模型中，DAA使部分HCV阳性患者无需移植，从而缩短了等待名单，可能使HCV阴性登记人受益，并诱导边缘HCV阴性患者登记。利用2005年至2019年间所有移植数据，我们发现DAA的可及性在2014年至2019年间为HCV阴性受者额外带来了5682例肝移植，部分原因是HCV阴性等待名单登记人数年均增长37%。我们的估计表明，在此期间，DAA为HCV阴性患者产生了75.2亿美元的正外部性。

papers.title: Households' Response to the Wealth Effects of Inflation
papers.authors: Philip Schnorpfeil, Michael Weber, Andreas Hackethal
papers.abstract: We study the redistributive effects of inflation combining administrative bank data with an information provision experiment during an episode of historic inflation. On average, households are well-informed about prevailing inflation and are concerned about its impact on their wealth; yet, while many households know about inflation eroding nominal assets, most are unaware of nominal-debt erosion. Once they receive information on the debt-erosion channel, households update upwards their beliefs about nominal debt and their own real net wealth. These changes in beliefs causally affect actual consumption and hypothetical debt decisions. Our findings suggest that real wealth mediates the sensitivity of consumption to inflation once households are aware of the wealth effects of inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D14, D83, D84, E21, E31, E52
papers.zh_title: 家庭对通货膨胀财富效应的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们结合行政银行数据与一次历史性通胀时期的信息提供实验，研究了通胀的再分配效应。平均而言，家庭对当前通胀了解充分，并担忧其对自身财富的影响；然而，尽管许多家庭知道通胀侵蚀名义资产，但大多数人不知道名义债务被侵蚀。一旦他们收到关于债务侵蚀渠道的信息，家庭会向上更新他们对名义债务和自身实际净财富的信念。这些信念的变化因果性地影响了实际消费和假设的债务决策。我们的发现表明，一旦家庭意识到通胀的财富效应，实际财富会调节消费对通胀的敏感性。

papers.title: Breakthroughs in Historical Record Linking Using Genealogy Data: The Census Tree Project
papers.authors: Kasey Buckles, Adrian Haws, Joseph Price, Haley E.B. Wilbert
papers.abstract: The Census Tree is the largest-ever database of record links among the historical U.S. censuses, with over 700 million links for people living in the United States between 1850 and 1940. These high-quality links allow researchers in the social sciences and other disciplines to construct a longitudinal dataset that is highly representative of the population. In this paper, we describe our process for creating the Census Tree, beginning with a collection of links contributed by the users of a free online genealogy platform. We then use these links as training data for a machine learning algorithm to make new matches and incorporate other recent efforts to link the historical U.S. censuses. Finally, we introduce a procedure for filtering the links and adjudicating disagreements. Our complete Census Tree achieves match rates between adjacent censuses that are between 69 and 86% for men, and between 58 and 79% for women. To demonstrate the advantages of the Census Tree, we extend the work of Abramitzky, Boustan, Jácome, and Pérez (2021) to include intergenerational mobility estimates for additional immigrant nationalities and for women.
papers.zh_title: 利用家谱数据实现历史记录链接的突破：人口普查树项目
papers.zh_abstract: 人口普查树是有史以来最大的历史美国人口普查记录链接数据库，包含超过7亿个链接，涵盖1850年至1940年间居住在美国的人口。这些高质量的链接使社会科学及其他学科的研究人员能够构建一个高度代表人口的面板数据集。在本文中，我们描述了创建人口普查树的过程，首先从免费在线家谱平台的用户贡献的链接集合开始。然后，我们使用这些链接作为机器学习算法的训练数据，以进行新的匹配，并整合其他近期链接历史美国人口普查的努力。最后，我们引入了一个过滤链接和裁决分歧的程序。我们完整的人口普查树在相邻普查之间的匹配率，男性为69%至86%，女性为58%至79%。为展示人口普查树的优势，我们扩展了Abramitzky、Boustan、Jácome和Pérez（2021）的工作，纳入了更多移民国籍和女性的代际流动性估计。

papers.title: The Digital Welfare of Nations: New Measures of Welfare Gains and Inequality
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Avinash Collis, Asad Liaqat, Daley Kutzman, Haritz Garro, Daniel Deisenroth, Nils Wernerfelt, Jae Joon Lee
papers.abstract: Digital goods can generate large benefits for consumers, but these benefits are largely unmeasured in the national accounts, including GDP and productivity. In this paper, we measure welfare gains from 10 popular digital goods across 13 countries by conducting large-scale incentivized online choice experiments on representative samples of nearly 40,000 people. We estimate that these goods—many of which are free to users—generate over $2.5 trillion in aggregate consumer welfare across these countries per year, which is roughly equivalent to 6% of their combined GDP. We find that lower-income individuals and lower-income countries obtain relatively larger welfare gains from these goods compared to higher-income individuals and countries. This suggests that digital goods may reduce inequality in welfare within and across countries by disproportionately benefiting lower-income groups.
papers.zh_title: 国家的数字福利：福利增益与不平等的新度量
papers.zh_abstract: 数字商品可以为消费者带来巨大收益，但这些收益在国民账户（包括GDP和生产率）中基本未被衡量。在本文中，我们通过对近4万人的代表性样本进行大规模激励性在线选择实验，衡量了13个国家中10种流行数字商品的福利增益。我们估计，这些商品——其中许多对用户免费——每年在这些国家产生超过2.5万亿美元的消费者总福利，大致相当于其GDP总和的6%。我们发现，与高收入个人和高收入国家相比，低收入个人和低收入国家从这些商品中获得的相对福利增益更大。这表明，数字商品可能通过不成比例地惠及低收入群体，减少国家内部和国家之间的福利不平等。

papers.title: The Intergenerational Transmission of Housing Wealth
papers.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, Michael F. Lovenheim, David N. Wasser
papers.abstract: Rising wealth inequality has spurred an increased interest in understanding how and why wealth is correlated across generations. We exploit plausibly exogenous variation in housing wealth driven by home price changes in different areas to isolate the causal impact of parental housing wealth during different childhood periods on children’s long-run wealth accumulation. Using population-level Danish administrative data, we find that 27% and 25% of each Krone of parental housing wealth change during early-childhood is transmitted to children’s overall and housing wealth in adulthood, respectively. The corresponding transmission rates for parental housing wealth changes during middle-childhood are 25% and 15%, with a transmission to non-housing wealth of 10%. There is little evidence of transmission of parental housing wealth changes that occur during the teenage years. Examining mechanisms, we find that parental housing wealth changes in early and middle-childhood lead to modest increases in adult children’s home ownership, educational attainment, and earnings. However, earnings and education can explain only 20-30% of the intergenerational transmission of parental wealth gains during these periods. We argue that the transmission of parental housing wealth changes in childhood are driven in large part by changes to unobserved household environment and parental behaviors that are passed on to children and shape their savings behavior in adulthood.
papers.zh_title: 住房财富的代际传递
papers.zh_abstract: 财富不平等加剧激发了对理解财富为何以及如何在代际间相关的兴趣。我们利用不同地区房价变动所驱动的住房财富外生变化，来隔离不同童年时期父母住房财富对子女长期财富积累的因果影响。使用丹麦人口层面的行政数据，我们发现，父母在儿童早期住房财富变化的27%和25%分别传递给了子女成年后的总财富和住房财富。父母在儿童中期住房财富变化的相应传递率为25%和15%，其中对非住房财富的传递率为10%。几乎没有证据表明青少年时期父母住房财富变化存在传递。在考察机制时，我们发现父母在儿童早期和中期住房财富变化导致成年子女的住房拥有率、教育程度和收入适度增加。然而，收入和受教育程度只能解释这些时期父母财富收益代际传递的20-30%。我们认为，童年时期父母住房财富变化的传递在很大程度上是由未观测到的家庭环境和父母行为的变化驱动的，这些变化传递给子女并塑造了他们成年后的储蓄行为。

papers.title: Incentivizing Innovation in Open Source: Evidence from the GitHub Sponsors Program
papers.authors: Annamaria Conti, Vansh Gupta, Jorge Guzman, Maria P. Roche
papers.abstract: Open source is key to innovation, but we know little about how to incentivize it. In this paper, we examine the impact of a program providing monetary incentives to motivate innovators to contribute to open source. The Sponsors program was introduced by GitHub in May 2019 and enabled organizations and individuals alike to reward developers for their open source work on the platform. To study this program, we collect fine-grained data on about 100,000 GitHub users, their activities, and sponsorship events. Using a difference-in-differences approach, we document two main effects. The first is that developers who opted into the program, which does not entail receiving a financial reward, increased their output after the program’s launch. The second is that the actual receipt of sponsorship has a long-lasting negative effect on innovation, as measured by new repository creation, regardless of the amount of money received. We estimate a similar decline in other community-oriented tasks, but not in coding effort. While the program’s net effect on users’ innovative output appears to be positive, our study shows that receiving an extrinsic reward may crowd out developers’ intrinsic motivation, diverting their effort away from community and service-oriented activities on open source.
papers.zh_title: 激励开源创新：来自GitHub赞助者计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 开源是创新的关键，但我们对其激励方式知之甚少。在本文中，我们考察了一个为激励创新者为开源做贡献而提供货币激励的计划的影响。GitHub于2019年5月推出了赞助者计划，使组织和个人都能奖励开发者在平台上的开源工作。为研究该计划，我们收集了约10万GitHub用户、其活动及赞助事件的细粒度数据。使用双重差分方法，我们记录了两个主要效应。第一，选择加入该计划（这并不涉及获得财务奖励）的开发者在计划启动后增加了产出。第二，实际获得赞助对创新（以新仓库创建衡量）产生了持久的负面影响，无论收到的金额多少。我们估计在其他面向社区的任务中也出现了类似的下降，但在编码努力方面没有。尽管该计划对用户创新产出的净效应似乎是正的，但我们的研究表明，接受外在奖励可能会挤出开发者的内在动机，将他们的努力从开源社区和服务导向的活动转移开。

papers.title: Ending Pay for PBM Performance: Consequences for Prescription Drug Prices, Utilization, and Government Spending
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Proposed “delinking” legislation would prohibit Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs) from being remunerated based on the rebates and discounts they negotiate for drug insurance plans serving Medicare beneficiaries. This policy would significantly change drug pricing and utilization and shift billions of dollars annually from patients and taxpayers to drug manufacturers and retail pharmacy companies. Annual federal spending on Medicare Part D premiums would increase $3 billion to $10 billion plus any concomitant increase in Medicare subsidies for out-of-pocket expenses. All of these consequences stem from the fact that PBMs are hired to obtain rebates and discounts but would no longer be compensated based on their results. The quantitative estimates utilize a large body of economic research showing how much “pay for performance” matters for economic outcomes. The price-theoretic models also account for various market frictions and imperfections including market power, coordination costs, tax distortions, and incomplete innovation incentives.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE；JEL：D43, D71, I13, J24, L14, L51
papers.zh_title: 终止按绩效支付药品福利管理：对处方药价格、使用及政府支出的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 拟议的“脱钩”立法将禁止药品福利管理公司（PBM）根据其为服务医疗保险受益人的药品保险计划协商的返利和折扣获得报酬。这项政策将显著改变药品定价和使用模式，并每年将数十亿美元从患者和纳税人转移至药品制造商和零售药房公司。联邦在医疗保险D部分保费上的年度支出将增加30亿至100亿美元，同时医疗保险对自付费用的补贴也可能随之增加。所有这些后果源于一个事实：PBM被雇佣来获取返利和折扣，但将不再根据其业绩获得报酬。定量估计利用了大量经济研究，这些研究表明“按绩效付费”对经济结果的重要性。价格理论模型还考虑了各种市场摩擦和不完善因素，包括市场势力、协调成本、税收扭曲和不完全的创新激励。

papers.title: How Credible is the Credibility Revolution?
papers.authors: Kevin Lang
papers.abstract: When economists analyze a well-conducted RCT or natural experiment and find a statistically significant effect, they conclude the null of no effect is unlikely to be true. But how frequently is this conclusion warranted? The answer depends on the proportion of tested nulls that are true and the power of the tests. I model the distribution of t-statistics in leading economics journals. Using my preferred model, 65% of narrowly rejected null hypotheses and 41% of all rejected null hypotheses with |t|<10 are likely to be false rejections. For the null to have only a .05 probability of being true requires a t of 5.48.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：A10, C12
papers.zh_title: 可信性革命有多可信？
papers.zh_abstract: 当经济学家分析一项设计良好的随机对照试验或自然实验并发现统计显著效应时，他们得出结论认为无效应原假设不太可能成立。但这一结论在多大程度上是合理的？答案取决于被检验的原假设中真实的比例以及检验的统计功效。我对顶级经济学期刊中t统计量的分布进行了建模。使用我偏好的模型，65%的勉强拒绝的原假设和41%的所有被拒绝且|t|<10的原假设很可能是错误拒绝。要使原假设为真的概率仅为0.05，需要t值达到5.48。

papers.title: Wage and Earnings Inequality Between and Within Occupations: The Role of Labor Supply
papers.authors: Andrés Erosa, Luisa Fuster, Gueorgui Kambourov, Richard Rogerson
papers.abstract: We document systematic differences in wage and earnings inequality between and within occupations and show that these differences are intimately related to systematic differences in labor supply across occupations. We then develop a variant of a Roy model in which earnings are a non-linear function of hours, with the extent of this non-linearity differing across occupations. In our theory, the interplay between heterogeneity in tastes for leisure and occupational differences in non-linearities affects the sorting of workers. Moreover, this interplay is crucial to account for the facts on the distributions of hours, wages, and earnings within and across occupations.
papers.zh_title: 职业间与职业内的工资和收入不平等：劳动供给的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了职业间和职业内工资与收入不平等的系统性差异，并表明这些差异与职业间劳动供给的系统性差异密切相关。然后，我们开发了一个罗伊模型的变体，其中收入是工时的非线性函数，且这种非线性程度在不同职业间存在差异。在我们的理论中，休闲偏好的异质性与职业间非线性的差异相互作用，影响了工人的分类。此外，这种相互作用对于解释职业内部和跨职业的工时、工资和收入分布的事实至关重要。

papers.title: Portfolio Management in Private Equity
papers.authors: Gregory W. Brown, Celine Yue Fei, David T. Robinson
papers.abstract: General Partners (GPs) in private equity face a trade-off between focusing their skills and effort on fewer investments to earn higher returns, or investing more broadly to reduce risk through diversification. Using a novel, deal-level dataset of 5,925 global investments from 1999 to 2016, we show that these portfolio considerations are important for understanding fund-level private equity returns. The largest investments in PE funds typically have the lowest returns on average, but are also the least risky. Returns and risk are both increasing in industry or geographic concentration. And while GP-specific return variation (e.g., skill) only accounts for 4%-6% of the total return variation of a typical investment, it accounts for around 40% of the return variation at the fund level. These findings show that GPs use portfolio construction, and not just deal selection, to seek risk-adjusted fund-level returns.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：G10, G11, G2, G20, G24
papers.zh_title: 私募股权中的投资组合管理
papers.zh_abstract: 私募股权中的普通合伙人（GP）面临一个权衡：是将技能和精力集中在更少的投资上以获取更高回报，还是通过多元化投资更广泛地分散风险。利用1999年至2016年5925笔全球投资的新颖交易层面数据集，我们表明这些投资组合考虑因素对于理解基金层面的私募股权回报至关重要。私募股权基金中最大的投资通常平均回报最低，但风险也最小。回报和风险都随着行业或地理集中度的提高而增加。虽然GP特定的回报变异（例如技能）仅占典型投资总回报变异的4%-6%，但它却占基金层面回报变异的约40%。这些发现表明，GP不仅通过交易选择，还通过投资组合构建来寻求风险调整后的基金层面回报。

papers.title: Zero-Sum Environments, the Evolution of Effort-Suppressing Beliefs, and Economic Development
papers.authors: Augustin Bergeron, Jean-Paul Carvalho, Joseph Henrich, Nathan Nunn, Jonathan L. Weigel
papers.abstract: We study the evolution of belief systems that suppress productive effort, such as beliefs about envy, witchcraft, the importance of luck for success, or disdain for competitive effort. In our framework, demotivating beliefs evolve when interactions are zero-sum, i.e., where one person’s gain comes at others’ expense. They improve material welfare but reduce subjective well-being. The model delivers testable predictions about the relationship between the degree of zero-sumness, demotivating beliefs, material welfare, subjective well-being, and long-run economic development. We find that the predictions are supported by data from two samples in the Democratic Republic of Congo, as well as global evidence from the World Values Survey and the European Values Study.
papers.zh_title: 零和博弈环境、抑制努力的信念的演化与经济发展
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了抑制生产性努力的信念体系（例如关于嫉妒、巫术、运气对成功重要性的信念，或对竞争性努力的蔑视）的演化。在我们的框架中，当互动是零和博弈（即一方的收益以他人为代价）时，消极信念会演化。它们改善了物质福利，但降低了主观幸福感。该模型提供了关于零和程度、消极信念、物质福利、主观幸福感与长期经济发展之间关系的可检验预测。我们发现，这些预测得到了来自刚果民主共和国两个样本的数据以及世界价值观调查和欧洲价值观研究的全球证据的支持。

papers.title: A Theory of Trade Policy Transitions
papers.authors: Renee Bowen, J. Lawrence Broz, B. Peter Rosendorff
papers.abstract: Trade policy is set by domestic political bargaining between globalists and protectionists, representing owners of factors specific to export and import-competing sectors respectively. Consistent with the post-Civil War Era of Restriction, protectionists implement high tariffs when status quo tariffs are low. When status quo tariffs are high, reciprocal free trade combined with domestic transfers to protectionists are implemented, explaining the 1930s Era of Reciprocity with Re- distribution. Consensus emerges for Retreat from free trade when imports are high and domestic transfers are low, suggesting that US protectionist turn in the late 2010s was in part due to low levels of social transfers.
papers.zh_title: 贸易政策转型理论
papers.zh_abstract: 贸易政策由国内全球主义者和保护主义者之间的政治博弈决定，他们分别代表出口和进口竞争部门的特定要素所有者。与内战后限制时代一致，当现状关税较低时，保护主义者实施高关税。当现状关税较高时，则实施互惠自由贸易并辅以对保护主义者的国内转移支付，这解释了1930年代伴随再分配的互惠时代。当进口高而国内转移支付低时，会出现从自由贸易退却的共识，这表明2010年代末美国保护主义转向部分是由于社会转移支付水平较低。

papers.title: Global Supply Chains: The Looming “Great Reallocation”
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Davin Chor
papers.abstract: Global supply chains have come under unprecedented stress as a result of US-China trade tensions, the Covid-19 pandemic, and geopolitical shocks. We document shifts in the pattern of US participation in global value chains over the last four decades, in terms of partner countries, products, and modes, with a focus on the last five years (2017-2022). The available data point to a looming “great reallocation” in supply chain activity: Direct US sourcing from China has decreased, with low-wage locations (principally: Vietnam) and nearshoring/friendshoring alternatives (notably: Mexico) gaining in import share. The production line positioning of the US’ imports has also become more upstream, which is indicative of some reshoring of production stages. We sound several cautionary notes over the policies that have set this reallocation in motion: It is unclear if these measures will reduce US dependence on supply chains linked to China, and there are moreover already signs that prices of imports from Vietnam and Mexico are on the rise.
papers.zh_title: 全球供应链：迫在眉睫的“大重新配置”
papers.zh_abstract: 由于美中贸易紧张、新冠疫情和地缘政治冲击，全球供应链面临前所未有的压力。我们记录了美国过去四十年参与全球价值链模式的变化，涉及伙伴国、产品和模式，重点关注最近五年（2017-2022年）。现有数据表明，供应链活动正面临一场迫在眉睫的“大重新配置”：美国从中国的直接采购减少，低工资地区（主要是越南）以及近岸/友岸外包替代方案（尤其是墨西哥）的进口份额增加。美国进口的生产线定位也变得更加上游，这暗示了某些生产阶段的回流。我们对推动这一重新配置的政策提出了几点警示：尚不清楚这些措施是否会减少美国对与中国相关供应链的依赖，而且已有迹象表明从越南和墨西哥进口的价格正在上涨。

papers.title: Limits to Competition: Strategies for Promoting Jurisdictional Cooperation
papers.authors: David R. Agrawal
papers.abstract: Inefficiencies from tax competition may result in governments seeking to limit fiscal competition via tax treaties, harmonization, minimum tax rates, or interjurisdictional cooperation. I propose a general model applicable to studying many types of taxing instruments, which allows for the comparison of various policy responses to promote jurisdictional cooperation. Comparing across policies, the model suggests a clear revenue dominance of partial harmonization among a subset of jurisdictions. Minimum tax rates revenue-dominate complete harmonization, but fail to raise revenues as much as partial harmonization. A selective review of the empirical literature identifies evidence consistent with the predictions of the theoretical model. The framework sketched in this paper can be further enriched by researchers seeking to determine the welfare effects of policy responses to interjurisdictional competition.
papers.zh_title: 竞争的局限：促进辖区合作的策略
papers.zh_abstract: 税收竞争导致的低效率可能促使政府通过税收协定、协调、最低税率或辖区间合作来限制财政竞争。我提出了一个适用于研究多种税收工具类型的通用模型，该模型允许比较各种促进辖区合作的政策应对措施。跨政策比较表明，在部分辖区间进行部分协调具有明显的收入优势。最低税率在收入上优于完全协调，但未能像部分协调那样提高收入。对实证文献的选择性回顾发现了与理论模型预测一致的证据。本文勾勒的框架可供研究人员进一步丰富，以确定应对辖区间竞争的政策措施的福利效应。

papers.title: Large Shocks Travel Fast
papers.authors: Alberto Cavallo, Francesco Lippi, Ken Miyahara
papers.abstract: We leverage the inflation upswing of 2022 and various granular datasets to identify robust price-setting patterns following a large supply shock. We show that the frequency of price changes increases dramatically after a large shock. We set up a parsimonious New Keynesian model and calibrate it to fit the steady-state data before the shock. The model features a significant component of state-dependent decisions, implying that large cost shocks incite firms to react more swiftly than usual, resulting in a rapid pass-through to prices -- large shocks travel fast. Understanding this feature is crucial for interpreting recent inflation dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 大冲击传播迅速
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2022年的通胀上升以及各种细粒度数据集，来识别在大型供给冲击后稳健的价格设定模式。我们表明，在大型冲击发生后，价格调整的频率会急剧增加。我们建立了一个简约的新凯恩斯主义模型，并根据冲击前的稳态数据对其进行校准。该模型包含一个显著的状态依赖决策成分，这意味着大型成本冲击会促使企业比平时更快地做出反应，从而导致价格快速传导——大型冲击传播迅速。理解这一特征对于解释近期的通胀动态至关重要。

papers.title: Quantifying Climate Change Loss and Damage Consistent with a Social Cost of Greenhouse Gases
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Mustafa Zahid, Noah Diffenbaugh, Solomon M. Hsiang
papers.abstract: Climate change is generating demonstrable harm around the world. Political and legal efforts have sought to associate climate impacts with specific emissions, including in recent international policy discussion of Loss and Damage (L&D). However, no quantitative definition of L&D exists, nor does there exist a framework for linking specific emissions to specific damages. Here we develop such a framework, linking it explicitly to recent efforts to calculate the social cost of carbon dioxide (SC-CO2), and demonstrate its use in a variety of applications. We calculate that future damages from past emissions, one component of L&D, are at least an order of magnitude larger than historical damages from the same emissions, a more commonly discussed component of L&D: 1 ton of CO2 emitted in 1990 causes $4 in global cumulative discounted damages by 2020 and an additional $327 in discounted damages through 2100 (2% discount rate). These estimates of past and future damages from marginal emissions can be used to calculate L&D for a range of specific emitting activities: for instance, an individual taking one long-haul flight every year for the past decade will generate ~$5500 in damages through 2100, the emissions associated with multiple oil majors between 1988-2015 have already caused $50-200B of cumulative global economic damage by 2020, and CO2 emissions in the US since 1990 have caused ~$2T in global damage through 2020, with India ($293B) and Brazil ($167B) being harmed the most. Carbon removal offers an alternative to transfer payments for settling L&D, but we show that it becomes increasingly ineffective in limiting damages as the delay between emission and recapture increases.
papers.zh_title: 量化与温室气体社会成本一致的气候变化损失与损害
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化正在全球范围内造成明显的危害。政治和法律努力试图将气候影响与特定排放联系起来，包括在近期关于损失与损害的国际政策讨论中。然而，目前既不存在损失与损害的定量定义，也不存在将特定排放与特定损害联系起来的框架。在此，我们开发了这样一个框架，将其与近期计算二氧化碳社会成本的努力明确联系起来，并展示了其在多种应用中的用途。我们计算出，过去排放造成的未来损害（损失与损害的一个组成部分）至少比同一排放造成的已发生损害（损失与损害中更常被讨论的组成部分）大一个数量级：1990年排放的1吨二氧化碳到2020年造成全球累计贴现损害4美元，并通过2100年额外造成贴现损害327美元（贴现率为2%）。这些对边际排放造成的过去和未来损害的估计可用于计算一系列特定排放活动的损失与损害：例如，过去十年每年乘坐一次长途航班的个人将在2100年前产生约5500美元的损害；1988年至2015年间多家大型石油公司的相关排放到2020年已造成500亿至2000亿美元的全球累计经济损失；美国自1990年以来的二氧化碳排放到2020年已造成约2万亿美元的全球损害，其中印度（2930亿美元）和巴西（1670亿美元）受害最严重。碳移除为通过转移支付解决损失与损害提供了替代方案，但我们表明，随着排放与重新捕获之间的延迟增加，碳移除在限制损害方面的效果会越来越差。

papers.title: Climate Change, Directed Innovation, and Energy Transition: The Long-run Consequences of the Shale Gas Revolution
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Philippe Aghion, Lint Barrage, David Hémous
papers.abstract: We investigate the short- and long-term effects of a natural gas boom in an economy where energy can be produced with coal, natural gas, or clean sources and the direction of technology is endogenous. In the short run, a natural gas boom reduces carbon emissions by inducing substitution away from coal. Yet, the natural gas boom discourages innovation directed at clean energy, which delays and can even permanently prevent the energy transition to zero carbon. We formalize and quantitatively evaluate these forces using a benchmark model of directed technical change for the energy sector. Quantitatively, the technology response to the shale gas boom results in a significant increase in emissions as the US economy is pushed into a “fossil-fuel trap” where long-run innovations shift away from renewables. Overall, the shale gas boom reduces our measure of social welfare under laissez-faire, whereas, combined with carbon taxes and more generous green subsidies, it could have increased welfare substantially.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, PR；JEL：O30, O41, O44, Q33, Q43, Q54, Q55
papers.zh_title: 气候变化、定向创新与能源转型：页岩气革命的长期后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在一个能源可由煤炭、天然气或清洁能源生产且技术方向是内生的经济体中，天然气繁荣的短期和长期影响。短期内，天然气繁荣通过促使从煤炭转向替代而减少碳排放。然而，天然气繁荣抑制了针对清洁能源的创新，这可能会延迟甚至永久阻止向零碳的能源转型。我们使用一个针对能源部门的定向技术变革基准模型，对这些力量进行了形式化和定量评估。从定量角度看，对页岩气繁荣的技术反应导致排放显著增加，因为美国经济被推入一个“化石燃料陷阱”，长期创新从可再生能源转移开。总体而言，在自由放任政策下，页岩气繁荣降低了我们的社会福利衡量指标；而如果与碳税和更慷慨的绿色补贴相结合，它本可以大幅提高福利。

papers.title: Composite Sorting
papers.authors: Job Boerma, Aleh Tsyvinski, Ruodu Wang, Zhenyuan Zhang
papers.abstract: We propose a new sorting framework: composite sorting. Composite sorting comprises of (1) distinct worker types assigned to the same occupation, and (2) a given worker type simultaneously being part of both positive and negative sorting. Composite sorting arises when fixed investments mitigate variable costs of mismatch. We completely characterize optimal sorting and additionally show it is more positive when mismatch costs are less concave. We then characterize equilibrium wages. Wages have a regional hierarchical structure − relative wages depend solely on sorting within skill groups. Quantitatively, composite sorting can generate a sizable portion of within-occupations wage dispersion in the US.
papers.zh_title: 复合分类
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个新的分类框架：复合分类。复合分类包括：（1）不同的工人类型被分配到同一职业，以及（2）给定的工人类型同时参与正向和负向分类。当固定投资减轻了错配的可变成本时，复合分类就会出现。我们完全刻画了最优分类，并进一步表明，当错配成本不那么凹时，分类更倾向于正向。然后我们刻画了均衡工资。工资具有区域层级结构——相对工资仅取决于技能组内的分类。从定量角度看，复合分类可以解释美国职业内工资差异的相当大一部分。

papers.title: 'We Are Not Guinea Pigs’: The Effects of Disclosure of Medical Misconduct on Vaccine Compliance
papers.authors: Belinda Archibong, Francis Annan
papers.abstract: In 1996, following an epidemic, Pfizer tested a new drug on 200 children in Muslim Nigeria. 11 children died while others were disabled. We study the effects of the disclosure, in 2000, of the deaths of Muslim children in the Pfizer trials on vaccine compliance among Muslim mothers. Muslim mothers reduced routine vaccination of children born after the 2000 disclosure. The effect was stronger for educated mothers and mothers residing in minority Muslim neighborhoods. The disclosure did not affect other health-seeking behavior of mothers. The results illustrate the potential spillover effects of perceived medical malpractice on future vaccine hesitancy.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH；JEL：D83, I12, I14, I18, O12, Z12
papers.zh_title: “我们不是豚鼠”：医疗不当行为披露对疫苗依从性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 1996年，在一次疫情之后，辉瑞公司在尼日利亚穆斯林地区的200名儿童身上测试了一种新药。11名儿童死亡，其他儿童致残。我们研究了2000年辉瑞试验中穆斯林儿童死亡事件被披露后，对穆斯林母亲疫苗依从性的影响。穆斯林母亲减少了在2000年披露后出生的儿童的常规疫苗接种。这种影响在受过教育的母亲和居住在穆斯林少数族裔社区的母亲中更为强烈。该披露并未影响母亲的其他健康寻求行为。这些结果说明了感知到的医疗不当行为对未来疫苗犹豫的潜在溢出效应。

papers.title: The Importance of Sound Monetary Policy: Some Lessons for Today from Canada’s Experience with Floating Exchange Rates Since 1950
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Pierre Siklos
papers.abstract: In this paper we revisit the Canadian experience with floating exchange rates since 1950. Canada was a pioneer in successfully adopting a floating exchange rate during the Bretton Woods pegged exchange rate regime. Since then, most advanced countries have followed the Canadian example.\nA key finding of our paper based on historical narrative and econometric analysis is that economic performance under floating depended on its monetary policy performance as Milton Friedman originally argued in his seminal 1953 article. Canadian monetary policy achieved low and stable inflation once it adopted inflation targeting as a nominal anchor. Also, as Friedman argued, Canada’s floating exchange rate provided it with a modicum of insulation from external shocks, especially commodity price shocks that influenced both the level and volatility of the real exchange rate over the past three decades. The Canadian experience with floating (along with that of other small open economies such as Australia, New Zealand and Sweden) and inflation targeting became a model for the conduct of monetary policy in emerging countries.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E52, F31, F32, N1
papers.zh_title: 稳健货币政策的重要性：从加拿大自1950年以来浮动汇率经验中汲取的今日教训
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们重新审视了加拿大自1950年以来的浮动汇率经验。加拿大是在布雷顿森林体系固定汇率制度下成功采用浮动汇率的先驱。此后，大多数发达国家都效仿了加拿大的做法。基于历史叙述和计量经济学分析，我们论文的一个关键发现是，正如米尔顿·弗里德曼在其1953年的开创性文章中所论证的，浮动汇率下的经济表现取决于其货币政策表现。一旦加拿大采用通胀目标作为名义锚，其货币政策就实现了低且稳定的通胀。此外，正如弗里德曼所论证的，加拿大的浮动汇率为其提供了一定程度的外部冲击隔离，特别是影响了过去三十年实际汇率水平和波动性的商品价格冲击。加拿大的浮动汇率经验（以及澳大利亚、新西兰和瑞典等其他小型开放经济体的经验）和通胀目标制成为了新兴国家货币政策操作的典范。

papers.title: Contexts of Convenience: Generalizing from Published Evaluations of School Finance Policies
papers.authors: Danielle V. Handel, Eric A. Hanushek
papers.abstract: Recent attention to the causal identification of spending impacts provides improved estimates of spending outcomes in a variety of circumstances, but the estimates are substantially different across studies. Half of the variation in estimated funding impact on test scores and over three-quarters of the variation of impacts on school attainment reflect differences in the true parameters across study contexts. Unfortunately, inability to describe the circumstances underlying effective school spending impedes any attempts to generalize from the extant results to new policy situations. The evidence indicates that how funds are used is crucial to the outcomes but such factors as targeting of funds or court interventions fail to explain the existing pattern of results.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H4, I22, J24
papers.zh_title: 便利情境：从已发表的学校财政政策评估中进行概括
papers.zh_abstract: 近期对支出影响因果识别的关注，提供了在各种情况下改进的支出结果估计，但这些估计在不同研究中存在显著差异。估计的资助对考试成绩影响的一半变异，以及资助对学业完成影响的超过四分之三的变异，反映了不同研究情境下真实参数的差异。不幸的是，无法描述有效学校支出所依据的情境，阻碍了任何从现有结果向新政策情境进行概括的尝试。证据表明，资金如何使用对结果至关重要，但诸如资金定向或法院干预等因素无法解释现有的结果模式。

papers.title: Price Discrimination and Mortgage Choice
papers.authors: Jamie Coen, Anil K Kashyap, May Rostom
papers.abstract: We characterize the large number of mortgage offers for which people qualify in the United Kingdom. Very few pick the cheapest option, nonetheless the one selected is not usually noticeably more expensive. A few borrowers make very expensive choices. These are most common when the menu they face has many expensive options, and are most likely for high loan-to-value and loan-to-income borrowers. Young people and first-time buyers are more prone to making expensive choices. The dispersion in the mortgage menu is consistent with banks price discriminating for borrowers who might pick poorly, while competing for others who shop more effectively.
papers.zh_title: 价格歧视与抵押贷款选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了英国人们有资格获得的大量抵押贷款报价。很少有人选择最便宜的选项，但所选选项通常不会明显更贵。少数借款人做出了非常昂贵的选择。当借款人面临的菜单包含许多昂贵选项时，这种情况最为常见，并且最可能发生在高贷款价值比和高贷款收入比的借款人身上。年轻人和首次购房者更容易做出昂贵的选择。抵押贷款菜单的分散性与银行对那些可能做出糟糕选择的借款人进行价格歧视，同时为其他更有效购物的借款人进行竞争是一致的。

papers.title: A Cognitive View of Policing
papers.authors: Oeindrila Dube, Sandy Jo MacArthur, Anuj K. Shah
papers.abstract: What causes adverse policing outcomes, such as excessive uses of force and unnecessary arrests? Prevailing explanations focus on problematic officers or deficient regulations and oversight. Here, we introduce a new, overlooked perspective. We suggest that the cognitive demands inherent in policing can undermine officer decision-making. Unless officers are prepared for these demands, they may jump to conclusions too quickly without fully considering alternative ways of seeing a situation. This can lead to adverse policing outcomes. To test this perspective, we created a new training that teaches officers to more deliberately consider different ways of interpreting the situations they encounter. We evaluated this training using a randomized controlled trial with 2,070 officers from the Chicago Police Department. In a series of lab assessments, we find that treated officers were significantly more likely to consider a wider range of evidence and develop more explanations for subjects' actions. Critically, we also find that training affected officer performance in the field, leading to reductions in uses of force, discretionary arrests, and arrests of Black civilians. Meanwhile, officer activity levels remained unchanged, and trained officers were less likely to be injured on duty. Our results highlight the value of considering the cognitive aspects of policing and demonstrate the power of using behaviorally informed approaches to improve officer decision-making and policing outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, POL；JEL：C91, C93, D03, D91, J08, K40, K42
papers.zh_title: 警务工作的认知视角
papers.zh_abstract: 是什么导致了不良的警务结果，例如过度使用武力和不必要的逮捕？主流的解释聚焦于有问题的警官或监管与监督的不足。在此，我们引入一个被忽视的新视角。我们认为，警务工作固有的认知需求可能损害警官的决策能力。除非警官对这些需求有所准备，否则他们可能在没有充分考虑理解情境的其他方式的情况下，过快地下结论。这可能导致不良的警务结果。为了检验这一视角，我们创建了一项新的培训，教导警官更审慎地考虑解读他们所遇到情境的不同方式。我们通过一项随机对照试验评估了这项培训，试验对象为来自芝加哥警察局的2070名警官。在一系列实验室评估中，我们发现接受培训的警官更有可能考虑更广泛的证据，并对受试者的行为提出更多解释。关键的是，我们还发现培训影响了警官在现场的表现，导致使用武力、酌情逮捕以及逮捕黑人平民的情况减少。与此同时，警官的活动水平保持不变，且接受培训的警官在执勤时受伤的可能性更低。我们的结果凸显了考虑警务认知方面的价值，并展示了使用行为知情方法来改善警官决策和警务结果的力量。

papers.title: Moral Boundaries
papers.authors: Benjamin Enke
papers.abstract: This article reviews the growing economics literature that studies the politico-economic impacts of heterogeneity in moral boundaries across individuals and cultures. The so-called universalism-versus-particularism cleavage has emerged as a main organizing principle behind various salient features of contemporary political competition, including individual-level and spatial variation in voting, the realignment of rich liberals and poor conservatives, the internal structure of ideology, and the moral content of political messaging. A recurring theme is that the explanatory power of universalism for left-wing policy views and voting is considerably larger than that of traditional economic variables. Looking at the origins of heterogeneity in universalism, an emerging consensus is that cross-group variation is partly economically functional and reflects that morality evolved to support cooperation in economic production. This insight organizes much work on how kinship systems, market exposure, political institutions and ecology have shaped universalism through their impacts on the relative benefits of localized and impersonal interactions.
papers.zh_title: 道德边界
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了日益增长的经济学文献，这些文献研究了个体和跨文化道德边界异质性的政治经济影响。所谓的普遍主义与特殊主义分歧已成为当代政治竞争各种显著特征背后的主要组织原则，包括个体层面和空间层面的投票差异、富裕自由派与贫穷保守派的重组、意识形态的内部结构以及政治信息的道德内容。一个反复出现的主题是，普遍主义对左翼政策观点和投票的解释力远大于传统经济变量。审视普遍主义异质性的起源，一个正在形成的共识是，跨群体差异部分具有经济功能性，并反映了道德为支持经济生产中的合作而演化。这一见解组织了大量关于亲属制度、市场暴露、政治制度和生态如何通过影响本地化与去个人化互动的相对收益来塑造普遍主义的研究。

papers.title: Reluctant Entrepreneurs: Evidence from China’s SOE Reform
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Ming Li, Zenan Wu, Yapei Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the impact of state-owned enterprises (SOEs) on the quality of entrepreneurship in China. Using long series of firm registration and performance data, we document that the massive SOE downsizing in the late 1990s significantly improved the quality of entrepreneur- ship. Compared with entrepreneurs in other time periods, firms founded by the reluctant entrepreneurs induced by the SOE layoffs have better performances. To explain these results, we present a simple model of occupational choices where high-skilled individuals obtain a higher value than low-skilled individuals from the benefits offered by SOE jobs, leading them to select into the SOE sector in the pre SOE reform era. When the SOE sector was downsized, some high-skilled SOE employees were reluctantly unleashed into entrepreneurship. We also provide corroborating evidence for other implications of the model.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：J08, J28, J68, L26
papers.zh_title: 不情愿的企业家：来自中国国企改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了国有企业对创业质量的影响。利用长期的企业注册和绩效数据序列，我们记录了20世纪90年代末大规模的国企裁员显著提高了创业质量。与其他时期的企业家相比，由国企裁员引发的“不情愿的企业家”所创立的企业表现更好。为了解释这些结果，我们提出了一个简单的职业选择模型，其中高技能个体从国企工作提供的福利中获得比低技能个体更高的价值，导致他们在国企改革前选择进入国企部门。当国企部门被裁减时，一些高技能国企员工不情愿地被释放到创业领域。我们还为模型的其他含义提供了佐证证据。

papers.title: The Effect of Multitasking on Educational Outcomes and Academic Dishonesty
papers.authors: Victor Lavy
papers.abstract: School authorities, universities, and employers often schedule multiple tests on the same day or week, causing overlapping exam preparation and a dense testing schedule. This multitask learning can be intense, under pressure, and challenge the student’s mental and physical perseverance. As a result, it can compromise performance relative to a more ‘relaxed’ schedule. This paper examines the consequences of multitasking for test scores and cheating in exams and its implications for the ability and gender cognitive gap. The empirical context is high-stakes exit exams in Israel, done at the end of high school. I leverage the empirical setting on two natural experiments to estimate the causal effect of this multitasking learning. The first exploits random variation in the number of weekly tests—the second hinges on days with multiple exams versus days with a single exam. The results show several important regularities. First, the number of exams in a day or a week harms test performance. Second, these effects are evidenced for high- and low-ability students, both boys and girls. They are much more extensive for immigrants than natives. Third, the harm of such multitasking is larger in tests later in the schedule, daily or weekly. Fourth, these effects are larger in tests of STEM subjects. Fifth, dense exam schedules increase the likelihood of students behaving dishonestly in exams.
papers.zh_title: 多任务处理对教育成果与学术不端行为的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 学校当局、大学和雇主经常在同一天或同一周安排多场考试，导致备考时间重叠和考试日程密集。这种多任务学习可能强度大、压力高，考验学生的身心毅力。因此，与更“宽松”的日程相比，它可能损害表现。本文考察了多任务处理对考试成绩和考试作弊的影响，及其对能力和性别认知差距的含义。实证背景是以色列高中结束时进行的高风险毕业考试。我利用两个自然实验的实证设定来估计这种多任务学习的因果效应。第一个实验利用了每周考试次数的随机变化，第二个实验则基于多科考试日与单科考试日的对比。结果显示了几个重要的规律性。首先，一天或一周内的考试次数会损害考试表现。其次，这些效应在高能力和低能力学生、男生和女生中均有体现，且对移民的影响远大于本地学生。第三，这种多任务处理的损害在每日或每周日程中较晚进行的考试中更大。第四，这些效应在STEM科目的考试中更大。第五，密集的考试日程增加了学生在考试中行为不诚实的可能性。

papers.title: Monetary Policy and Innovation
papers.authors: Yueran Ma, Kaspar Zimmermann
papers.abstract: We document that monetary policy has a substantial impact on innovation activities. After a tightening shock of 100 basis points, research and development (R&D) spending declines by about 1 to 3 percent and venture capital (VC) investment declines by about 25 percent in the following 1 to 3 years. Patenting in important technologies, as well as a patent-based aggregate innovation index, declines by up to 9 percent in the following 2 to 4 years. Based on previous estimates of the sensitivity of output to innovation activities, these magnitudes imply that output could be 1 percent lower after another 5 years. Monetary policy can influence innovation activities by changing aggregate demand and correspondingly the profitability of innovation, and by changing financial market conditions. Both channels appear relevant in the data. Our findings suggest that monetary policy may affect the productive capacity of the economy in the longer term, in addition to the well-recognized near-term effects on economic outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：E2, E5, G31, O3
papers.zh_title: 货币政策与创新
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了货币政策对创新活动具有显著影响。在100个基点的紧缩冲击之后，研发支出在随后1至3年内下降约1%至3%，风险投资在随后1至3年内下降约25%。重要技术领域的专利申请以及基于专利的综合创新指数在随后2至4年内下降高达9%。根据先前关于产出对创新活动敏感性的估计，这些幅度意味着产出可能在再经过5年后降低1%。货币政策可以通过改变总需求并相应改变创新的盈利能力，以及通过改变金融市场状况来影响创新活动。这两个渠道在数据中似乎都相关。我们的发现表明，除了公认的对经济结果的短期影响外，货币政策还可能影响经济的长期生产能力。

papers.title: You Can Lead a Horse to Water: Spatial Learning and Path Dependence in Consumer Search
papers.authors: Charles Hodgson, Gregory Lewis
papers.abstract: We develop and estimate a model of consumer search with spatial learning. Consumers make inferences from previously searched objects to unsearched objects that are nearby in attribute space, generating path dependence in search sequences. The estimated model rationalizes patterns in data on online consumer search paths: search tends to converge to the chosen product in attribute space, and consumers take larger steps away from rarely purchased products. Eliminating spatial learning reduces consumer welfare by 13%: cross-product inferences allow consumers to locate better products in a shorter time. Spatial learning has important implications for product recommendations on retail platforms. We show that consumer welfare can be reduced by unrepresentative product recommendations and that consumer-optimal product recommendations depend both on consumer learning and competition between platforms.
papers.zh_title: 你可以把马牵到水边：空间学习与消费者搜索中的路径依赖
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发并估计了一个包含空间学习的消费者搜索模型。消费者从先前搜索过的对象推断属性空间中附近未搜索对象的信息，从而在搜索序列中产生路径依赖。估计模型合理化了在线消费者搜索路径数据中的模式：搜索在属性空间中趋向于收敛到所选产品，并且消费者会从很少购买的产品处迈出更大的步伐。消除空间学习会使消费者福利降低13%：跨产品推断使消费者能够在更短时间内定位到更好的产品。空间学习对零售平台上的产品推荐具有重要影响。我们表明，不具代表性的产品推荐会降低消费者福利，并且消费者最优的产品推荐既取决于消费者学习，也取决于平台之间的竞争。

papers.title: Mobile Money, Interoperability, and Financial Inclusion
papers.authors: Markus K. Brunnermeier, Nicola Limodio, Lorenzo Spadavecchia
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the tradeoff between competition and financial inclusion resulting from the vertical integration between mobile network and money operators. Joining newly assembled data on mobile money fees through the WayBack machine, with sources on network coverage and financials, we examine the staggering across African operators and countries of platform interoperability – a policy that promotes transactions and competition across mobile money operators. Our results show that interoperability benefits users by lowering mobile money fees and their dispersion across operators. However, these positive effects are offset by a decrease in mobile towers and network coverage, especially in rural and poor districts, which, in turn, leads to a lower financial inclusion. We note that combining interoperability with subsidies for rural telecommunications delivers lower fees without hurting coverage.
papers.zh_title: 移动货币、互操作性及金融包容性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了移动网络运营商与移动货币运营商之间垂直整合所导致的竞争与金融包容性之间的权衡。通过结合利用WayBack机器收集的移动货币费用新汇编数据，以及网络覆盖和财务数据来源，我们考察了平台互操作性（一项促进移动货币运营商之间交易和竞争的政策）在非洲各运营商和国家间的显著差异。我们的结果表明，互操作性通过降低移动货币费用及其在运营商之间的离散度使用户受益。然而，这些积极效应被移动基站和网络覆盖的减少所抵消，尤其是在农村和贫困地区，这进而导致金融包容性降低。我们注意到，将互操作性与农村电信补贴相结合，可以在不损害覆盖范围的情况下降低费用。

papers.title: Intergenerational Mobility of Daughters and Marital Sorting: New Evidence from Imperial China
papers.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Carol H. Shiue
papers.abstract: We study the role of marriage for women's intergenerational mobility during the Ming-Qing (1368-1911) period. Using status information based on the timing of marriage from family histories in Central China, already in the early 1500s it is the case that daughters from rich families attain higher status over their lifetime than daughters from poorer families. This intergenerational status persistence is partly due to marital sorting because daughters from high-status families tend to become the wives of sons who themselves come from rich families. Quantitatively, the correlation of 0.6 between the status of biological and in-law families means that marriage accounts for more than one third of total intergenerational status transmission, while not accounting for marriage overestimates mobility by more than 20 percent. Further underscoring the importance of marriage, typically the status of the in-law family plays a larger role for intergenerational status transmission than the child's biological grandparents. Over the period 1500 to 1900, the degree of marital sorting falls, as does intergenerational persistence. Lower investments in the marriage market to find a good match for a daughter go hand in hand with the fall in the returns to son education due to the decline of China's civil service examination.
papers.zh_title: 女儿的代际流动性与婚姻匹配：来自中华帝国的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了明清时期（1368-1911年）婚姻对女性代际流动性的作用。利用中国中部家族史中基于婚姻时机的地位信息，早在16世纪初，富裕家庭的女儿一生中获得的地位就高于贫困家庭的女儿。这种代际地位持续性部分归因于婚姻匹配，因为高地位家庭的女儿往往成为同样来自富裕家庭的儿子的妻子。从数量上看，生身家庭与姻亲家庭地位之间0.6的相关性意味着，婚姻占代际地位总传递的三分之一以上，而不考虑婚姻会高估流动性超过20%。进一步凸显婚姻重要性的是，通常姻亲家庭的地位对代际地位传递的作用大于孩子的生身祖父母。在1500年至1900年期间，婚姻匹配程度下降，代际持续性也随之下降。为女儿在婚姻市场上寻找良配的投资减少，与科举制度衰落导致儿子教育回报下降是同步发生的。

papers.title: High-Quality Early-Childhood Education at Scale: Evidence from a Multisite Randomized Trial
papers.authors: William R. Dougan, Jorge Luis García, Illia Polovnikov
papers.abstract: We offer a new analysis of a large-scale trial of an early-childhood education program that targeted premature, low-birthweight children. This targeting heavily oversampled twins, whose outcomes differed significantly from singletons’. Singletons’ gains in short-term cognition and age-18 non-cognitive skills were comparable to those of the Perry Preschool and Carolina Abecedarian Projects, supporting those programs’ scalability. For twins, however, the program generated smaller positive short-term gains and negative age-18 impacts. These outcome differences arise from differences in parents’ response to the program. A household production model suggests that the possibility of jointly supplying parenting to twins helps explain those differences.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：C93, H83, I28, J13
papers.zh_title: 大规模高质量早期儿童教育：来自多地点随机试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对一项针对早产、低出生体重儿童的大规模早期儿童教育项目进行了新的分析。这种针对性抽样严重过度代表了双胞胎，其结果与单胞胎存在显著差异。单胞胎在短期认知能力和18岁时非认知能力方面的收益与佩里学前项目和卡罗来纳初学者项目相当，支持了这些项目的可扩展性。然而，对于双胞胎，该项目产生了较小的短期正向收益和18岁时的负向影响。这些结果差异源于父母对该项目反应的差异。一个家庭生产模型表明，共同为双胞胎提供养育的可能性有助于解释这些差异。

papers.title: The Reserve Supply Channel of Unconventional Monetary Policy
papers.authors: William F. Diamond, Zhengyang Jiang, Yiming Ma
papers.abstract: We find that central bank reserves injected by QE crowd out bank lending. We estimate a structural model with cross-sectional instrumental variables for deposit and loan demand. Our results are determined by the elasticity of loan demand and the impact of reserve holdings on the cost of supplying loans. The reserves injected by QE raise loan rates by 8.2 basis points, and each dollar of reserves reduces bank lending by 8.1 cents. Our results imply that a large injection of central bank reserves has the unintended consequence of crowding out bank loans because of bank balance sheet costs.
papers.zh_title: 非常规货币政策的准备金供给渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现，量化宽松注入的中央银行准备金挤出了银行贷款。我们使用存款和贷款需求的横截面工具变量估计了一个结构模型。我们的结果由贷款需求的弹性以及准备金持有对贷款供给成本的影响决定。量化宽松注入的准备金使贷款利率提高了8.2个基点，每1美元准备金使银行贷款减少8.1美分。我们的结果表明，由于银行资产负债表成本，大量注入中央银行准备金会产生挤出银行贷款的意外后果。

papers.title: Consumer Surveillance and Financial Fraud
papers.authors: Bo Bian, Michaela Pagel, Huan Tang, Devesh Raval
papers.abstract: In today’s digital economy, firms continuously collect, store, share, and sell personal data, exposing customers to risks of financial fraud. Leveraging Apple’s App Tracking Transparency policy as a natural experiment, we show that restricting data tracking and sharing significantly reduces consumer fraud complaints, particularly those involving personal information misuse. Effects are stronger in areas dominated by firms with risky data practices and coincide with a decline in dark web discussions and higher prices for sensitive data. By tracing effects along the fraud supply chain, our findings suggest that data regulation can reduce a consumer harm that firms may not fully internalize.
papers.zh_title: 消费者监控与金融欺诈
papers.zh_abstract: 在当今的数字经济中，企业持续收集、存储、共享和出售个人数据，使客户面临金融欺诈风险。利用苹果公司的应用跟踪透明度政策作为自然实验，我们表明限制数据跟踪和共享显著减少了消费者欺诈投诉，特别是涉及个人信息滥用的投诉。在由具有高风险数据实践的企业主导的地区，效应更强，并且与暗网讨论减少和敏感数据价格上涨同时发生。通过追踪欺诈供应链上的效应，我们的发现表明，数据监管可以减少企业可能未完全内部化的消费者损害。

papers.title: Provider Payment Incentives: Evidence From The U.S. Hospice Industry
papers.authors: Norma Coe, David A. Rosenkranz
papers.abstract: Moral hazard and provider-induced demand may contribute to overutilization of scarce health care resources. The U.S. health care system includes several compensatory cost-containment mechanisms, but their effects depend on how patients and providers respond. We investigate hospice programs’ responses to a cap in the Medicare hospice benefit on their average annual payments per patient. We estimate their intensive margin responses to the cap by leveraging variation in cap-related financial incentives generated by the policy’s nonlinear design and the transition between fiscal years. We find that programs on track to exceed the cap in the last three months of a fiscal year raise their enrollment rates by 5.7% and their live discharge rates by 4.3% on average, reducing their cap liabilities. The marginal enrollees have longer average remaining lifetimes and are less likely to have been recently hospitalized. Their hospice spells are also more likely to be fragmented by subsequent live discharges. On the extensive margin, we find that cap liabilities are associated with terminations of Medicare provider certification numbers, suggesting that the cap impacts market structure. Current policy discussions about reducing the cap should consider its potential effect on market structure.
papers.zh_title: 医疗服务提供者支付激励：来自美国临终关怀行业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 道德风险和提供者诱导需求可能导致稀缺医疗资源的过度利用。美国医疗体系包含若干补偿性成本控制机制，但其效果取决于患者和提供者的反应。我们研究了临终关怀项目对医疗保险临终关怀福利中每位患者年均支付上限的应对行为。通过利用政策非线性设计及财政年度过渡所产生的与上限相关的财务激励差异，我们估计了项目在集约边际上的反应。研究发现，在财政年度最后三个月内预计将超出上限的项目，其平均入院率提高5.7%，活体出院率提高4.3%，从而减少了其上限负债。边际入院患者的平均剩余寿命更长，且近期住院的可能性更低。他们的临终关怀期也更可能因随后的活体出院而变得碎片化。在广延边际上，我们发现上限负债与医疗保险提供者认证编号的终止相关，表明上限影响了市场结构。当前关于降低上限的政策讨论应考虑其对市场结构的潜在影响。

papers.title: Can Patience Account for Subnational Differences in Student Achievement? Regional Analysis with Facebook Interests
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Lavinia Kinne, Pietro Sancassani, Ludger Woessmann
papers.abstract: Decisions to invest in human capital depend on people’s time preferences. We show that differences in patience are closely related to substantial subnational differences in educational achievement, leading to new perspectives on longstanding within-country disparities. We use social-media data – Facebook interests – to construct novel regional measures of patience within Italy and the United States. Patience is strongly positively associated with student achievement in both countries, accounting for two-thirds of the achievement variation across Italian regions and one-third across U.S. states. Results also hold for six other countries with more limited regional achievement data.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I21, J24, Z10
papers.zh_title: 耐心能否解释学生成绩的次国家差异？基于Facebook兴趣的区域分析
papers.zh_abstract: 人力资本投资决策取决于人们的时间偏好。我们表明，耐心程度的差异与教育成就的显著次国家差异密切相关，从而为长期存在的国内差异提供了新视角。我们利用社交媒体数据——Facebook兴趣——构建了意大利和美国境内耐心的新型区域度量指标。在这两个国家，耐心与学生成绩呈强烈正相关，分别解释了意大利各地区成绩变动的三分之二和美国各州成绩变动的三分之一。对于其他六个拥有有限区域成绩数据的国家，结果同样成立。

papers.title: Complexity in Factor Pricing Models
papers.authors: Antoine Didisheim, Shikun (Barry) Ke, Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud
papers.abstract: We theoretically characterize the behavior of machine learning asset pricing models. We prove that expected out-of-sample model performance—in terms of SDF Sharpe ratio and test asset pricing errors—is improving in model parameterization (or “complexity”). Our empirical findings verify the theoretically predicted “virtue of complexity” in the cross-section of stock returns. Models with an extremely large number of factors (more than the number of training observations or base assets) outperform simpler alternatives by a large margin.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C1, C4, C58, G1, G10, G12, G14, G17
papers.zh_title: 因子定价模型中的复杂性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从理论上刻画了机器学习资产定价模型的行为。我们证明，预期的样本外模型表现——以随机贴现因子夏普比率和测试资产定价误差衡量——随模型参数化程度（或“复杂性”）而改善。我们的实证结果验证了股票收益率横截面上理论上预测的“复杂性美德”。具有极大量因子（超过训练观测值或基础资产数量）的模型以较大优势优于更简单的替代模型。

papers.title: Zero-sum Thinking and the Roots of US Political Differences
papers.authors: Sahil Chinoy, Nathan Nunn, Sandra Sequeira, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: We investigate the origins and implications of zero-sum thinking: the belief that gains for one individual or group tend to come at the cost of others. Using a new survey of 20,400 U.S. residents, we measure zero-sum thinking, political preferences, policy views, and a rich array of ancestral information spanning four generations.
