To do so, we leverage year-to-year household variation from a universal and unconditional cash transfer, the Alaska Permanent Fund Dividend (PFD). Using linked individual-level administrative data on PFD payments and child maltreatment referrals, we show that an additional $1,000 to families in the first few months of a child's life reduces the likelihood that a child is referred to Child Protective Services by age three by 2.0 percentage points, or 10 percent, on average. Estimates indicate that additional cash transfers also reduce child mortality.
papers.zh_title: 普遍无条件现金转移支付对儿童虐待和忽视的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了现金转移支付对一项严重的儿童福利指标——虐待——的影响。为此，我们利用了来自一项普遍无条件现金转移支付——阿拉斯加永久基金分红（PFD）——的家庭年度间变化。通过使用关联的个人层面关于PFD支付和儿童虐待转介的行政数据，我们表明，在儿童生命最初几个月内，家庭每额外获得1000美元，该儿童在三岁前被转介至儿童保护服务机构的可能性平均降低2.0个百分点，即10%。估计还表明，额外的现金转移支付也降低了儿童死亡率。

papers.title: Investigator Racial Diversity and Clinical Trial Participation
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Romaine A. Campbell, Lukas Leister, Ayotomiwa Ojo
papers.abstract: We investigate whether increased racial diversity of clinical trial principal investigators could increase the enrollment of Black patients, which currently lags population and disease-burden shares. We conducted a survey experiment in which respondents were shown a photo of a current NIH investigator in which race (Black/White) was randomized. Sex was also randomized as a relevant benchmark. Black respondents reported 0.35 standard deviation units higher interest in participating in a clinical study led by a race concordant investigator (a 12.6% increase). Sex concordance had no effect. Further analyses indicate that perceived trustworthiness and attractiveness are the most important factors explaining these results.
papers.zh_title: 研究者种族多样性与临床试验参与
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了临床试验主要研究者的种族多样性增加是否能提高黑人患者的入组率，目前黑人患者的入组率落后于其人口和疾病负担占比。我们进行了一项调查实验，向受访者展示一位现任NIH研究者的照片，其中种族（黑人/白人）是随机分配的。性别也作为相关基准进行了随机分配。黑人受访者报告称，他们对由种族一致的研究者领导的临床研究的参与兴趣高出0.35个标准差单位（增加12.6%）。性别一致性没有影响。进一步分析表明，感知可信度和吸引力是解释这些结果的最重要因素。

papers.title: Unregulated Contaminants in Drinking Water: Evidence from PFAS and Housing Prices
papers.authors: Michelle M. Marcus, Rosie Mueller
papers.abstract: Our understanding of individuals’ response to information about unregulated contaminants is limited. We leverage the highly publicized social discovery of unregulated PFAS (per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) contamination in public drinking water to study the impact of information about unregulated contaminants on housing prices. Using residential property transaction data, we employ a difference-in-differences research design and show that high profile media coverage about PFAS contamination significantly decreased property values of affected homes. We also find suggestive evidence of residential sorting that may have worsened environmental inequality.
papers.zh_title: 饮用水中的未受管制污染物：来自PFAS和房价的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对个体如何回应关于未受管制污染物信息的理解有限。我们利用公众高度关注的公共饮用水中未受管制的PFAS（全氟和多氟烷基物质）污染的社会发现，来研究关于未受管制污染物的信息对房价的影响。使用住宅物业交易数据，我们采用双重差分研究设计，并表明关于PFAS污染的高调媒体报道显著降低了受影响房屋的房产价值。我们还发现了可能加剧环境不平等的居住分层的提示性证据。

papers.title: The Refugee Advantage: English-Language Attainment in the Early Twentieth Century
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Peter Catron, Dylan Connor, Rob Voigt
papers.abstract: The United States has admitted more than 3 million refugees since 1980 through official refugee resettlement programs. Scholars attribute the success of refugee groups to governmental programs on assimilation and integration. Before 1948, however, refugees arrived without formal selection processes or federal support. We examine the integration of historical refugees using a large archive of recorded oral history interviews to understand linguistic attainment of migrants who arrived in the early twentieth century. Using fine-grained measures of vocabulary, syntax and accented speech, we find that refugee migrants achieved a greater depth of English vocabulary than did economic/family migrants, a finding that holds even when comparing migrants from the same country of origin or religious group. Our findings are consistent with the hypothesis that refugees had greater exposure to English or more incentive to learn, due to the conditions of their arrival and their inability to immediately return to their origin country.
papers.zh_title: 难民优势：二十世纪初的英语水平提升
papers.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，美国通过官方难民安置计划接收了超过300万难民。学者将难民群体的成功归因于政府在同化和融合方面的项目。然而，在1948年之前，难民是在没有正式筛选程序或联邦支持的情况下抵达的。我们利用大量存档的口述历史访谈录音来研究历史难民的融合情况，以理解二十世纪初抵达的移民的语言水平。通过使用词汇、句法和口音的精细测量，我们发现难民移民比经济/家庭移民达到了更深的英语词汇水平，即使在比较来自同一原籍国或宗教群体的移民时，这一发现仍然成立。我们的发现与以下假设一致：由于难民抵达时的条件以及他们无法立即返回原籍国，他们接触英语的机会更多或学习英语的动力更强。

papers.title: Inequality and Business Cycles
papers.authors: Florin O. Bilbiie, Giorgio Primiceri, Andrea Tambalotti
papers.abstract: We quantify the connection between inequality and business cycles in a medium-scale New Keynesian model with tractable household heterogeneity, estimated with aggregate and cross-sectional data. We find that inequality substantially amplifies cyclical fluctuations. The primary source of this amplification is cyclical precautionary saving behavior. Savers reduce their consumption to insure themselves against the idiosyncratic risk of large income drops, which rises in recessions.
papers.zh_title: 不平等与经济周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有可处理家庭异质性的中等规模新凯恩斯模型中，量化了不平等与经济周期之间的联系，该模型使用总量和横截面数据进行了估计。我们发现不平等显著放大了周期性波动。这种放大的主要来源是周期性预防性储蓄行为。储蓄者减少消费以抵御收入大幅下降的异质性风险，而这种风险在经济衰退期间会上升。

papers.title: The Hidden Cost of Firearm Violence on Infants in Utero
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Bahadir Dursun, Michael Hatch, Erdal Tekin
papers.abstract: Firearm violence is a critical public health crisis in the U.S., marked by a significant number of homicides involving firearms, including indiscriminate shootings in public spaces. This study investigates the largely unexplored impact of such violence on newborn health. We adopt two approaches. First, we analyze the 2002 'beltway sniper' attacks in the Washington DC metropolitan area, using administrative birth records with maternal residential addresses in Virginia. The beltway sniper attacks, a series of random shootings in the Washington DC metropolitan area, caused widespread terror and disruption over three weeks. Leveraging both spatial and temporal variation, we compare outcomes of children exposed to the attacks in utero due to timing or having a residential address near a shooting location to those who were not exposed. Second, we investigate the impact of in-utero exposure to mass shootings on infant health using restricted-access U.S. Vital Statistics Natality records between 2006 and 2019 and leveraging variation in the timing of mass shootings in counties with at least one shooting. We document substantial, previously overlooked costs on pregnant women and infants. Exposure to the beltway sniper attacks during pregnancy increased the likelihood of very low birthweight and very premature birth by 25%. The analysis of national mass shootings confirms these findings with slightly smaller effect sizes. These results emphasize the need to consider the broader impact of violence on vulnerable populations when assessing the cost of firearm violence. The estimates suggest additional costs of $155 million (2023 dollars) for the beltway sniper attacks and $75 million annually for mass shootings.
papers.zh_title: 枪支暴力对子宫内婴儿的隐性成本
papers.zh_abstract: 枪支暴力是美国一个严重的公共卫生危机，其特点是涉及枪支的凶杀案数量巨大，包括在公共场所的无差别枪击。本研究调查了此类暴力对新生儿健康这一很大程度上未被探索的影响。我们采用两种方法。首先，我们分析了2002年华盛顿特区大都会区的“环城狙击手”袭击事件，使用了弗吉尼亚州包含母亲居住地址的行政出生记录。环城狙击手袭击是华盛顿特区大都会区一系列随机枪击事件，在三周内造成了广泛的恐怖和混乱。利用空间和时间变化，我们将因时间或居住地址靠近枪击地点而在子宫内暴露于袭击的儿童与未暴露的儿童的结果进行比较。其次，我们利用2006年至2019年间受限访问的美国生命统计出生记录，并利用至少发生一次枪击的县中大规模枪击事件的时间变化，研究了子宫内暴露于大规模枪击事件对婴儿健康的影响。我们记录了先前被忽视的、对孕妇和婴儿的巨大成本。怀孕期间暴露于环城狙击手袭击使极低出生体重和极早产的可能性增加了25%。对全国大规模枪击事件的分析证实了这些发现，但效应大小略小。这些结果强调，在评估枪支暴力成本时，需要考虑暴力对弱势群体的更广泛影响。估算表明，环城狙击手袭击带来了1.55亿美元（2023年美元）的额外成本，而大规模枪击事件每年带来7500万美元的额外成本。

papers.title: Labor Market Impacts of Reducing Felony Convictions
papers.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Andrew Garin, Dmitri K. Koustas, Alexandre Mas, Crystal Yang
papers.abstract: We study the labor market impacts of retroactively reducing felonies to misdemeanors in San Joaquin County, CA, where criminal justice agencies implemented Proposition 47 reductions in a quasi-random order, without requiring input or action from affected individuals. Linking records of reductions to administrative tax data, we find employment benefits for individuals who (likely) requested their reduction, consistent with selection, but no benefits among the larger subset of individuals whose records were reduced proactively. A field experiment notifying a subset of individuals about their proactive reduction also shows null results, implying that lack of awareness is unlikely to explain our findings.
papers.zh_title: 减少重罪定罪对劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在加州圣华金县将重罪追溯性减为轻罪对劳动力市场的影响，该县的刑事司法机构以准随机顺序实施了第47号提案的减刑，无需受影响个人的意见或行动。将减刑记录与行政税收数据相关联，我们发现，对于（可能）主动申请减刑的个人，存在就业收益，这与选择效应一致；但在更大范围的、被主动减刑的个人中，没有发现收益。一项针对部分被主动减刑个人的实地实验通知也显示出零结果，这意味着缺乏认知不太可能解释我们的发现。

papers.title: Contagion Effects of the Silicon Valley Bank Run
papers.authors: Dong Beom Choi, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Tanju Yorulmazer
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the contagion effects associated with the failure of Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) and identifies bank-specific vulnerabilities contributing to the subsequent declines in banks’ stock returns. We find that uninsured deposits, unrealized losses in held-to-maturity securities, bank size, and cash holdings had a significant impact, while better-quality assets or holdings of liquid securities did not help mitigate the negative spillovers. Interestingly, banks whose stocks performed worse post-SVB also experienced lower returns in the previous year, following Federal Reserve interest rate hikes. Stock investors appeared to anticipate risks associated with uninsured deposit reliance, but did not foresee the realization of implied losses. While mid-sized banks experienced particular stress immediately after the SVB failure, over time negative spillovers became widespread except for the largest banks.
papers.zh_title: 硅谷银行挤兑的传染效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了与硅谷银行（SVB）倒闭相关的传染效应，并识别了导致随后银行股票回报下降的银行特定脆弱性。我们发现，未保险存款、持有至到期证券的未实现损失、银行规模和现金持有量具有显著影响，而更优质的资产或流动性证券的持有并未有助于缓解负面溢出效应。有趣的是，在SVB倒闭后股票表现较差的银行，在之前一年美联储加息后也经历了较低的回报。股票投资者似乎预见到了与未保险存款依赖相关的风险，但未能预见到隐含损失的实现。虽然中型银行在SVB倒闭后立即经历了特别压力，但随着时间的推移，除最大银行外，负面溢出效应变得普遍。

papers.title: When Product Markets Become Collective Traps: The Case of Social Media
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Benjamin R. Handel, Rafael Jimenez, Christopher Roth
papers.abstract: Individuals might experience negative utility from not consuming a popular product. With such externalities to non-users, standard consumer surplus measures, which take aggregate consumption as given, fail to appropriately capture consumer welfare. We propose an approach to account for these externalities and apply it to estimate consumer welfare from two social media platforms: TikTok and Instagram. Incentivized experiments with college students indicate positive welfare based on the standard measure, but negative welfare when accounting for these non-user externalities. Our findings highlight the existence of product market traps, where large shares of active users prefer each platform not to exist.
papers.zh_title: 当产品市场成为集体陷阱：以社交媒体为例
papers.zh_abstract: 个人可能会因不消费一种流行产品而经历负效用。在这种对非用户的负外部性下，将总消费视为给定的标准消费者剩余衡量指标无法恰当捕捉消费者福利。我们提出了一种考虑这些外部性的方法，并将其应用于估算来自两个社交媒体平台（TikTok和Instagram）的消费者福利。对大学生进行的激励实验表明，基于标准衡量指标，福利为正；但在考虑这些非用户外部性时，福利为负。我们的发现凸显了产品市场陷阱的存在，即大量活跃用户更希望每个平台不存在。

papers.title: The Labor Demand and Labor Supply Channels of Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Sebastian Graves, Christopher K. Huckfeldt, Eric T. Swanson
papers.abstract: Monetary policy is conventionally understood to influence labor demand, with little effect on labor supply. We estimate the response of labor market flows to high-frequency changes in interest rates around FOMC announcements and Fed Chair speeches and find evidence that, in contrast to the consensus view, a contractionary monetary policy shock leads to a significant increase in labor supply: workers reduce the rate at which they quit jobs to nonemployment, and non-employed individuals increase their job-seeking behavior. These effects are quantitatively important: holding supply-driven labor market flows constant, the decline in employment from a contractionary monetary policy shock would be twice as large. To interpret our findings, we estimate a heterogeneous agent model with frictional labor markets and an active labor supply margin. The model rationalizes existing estimates of small labor supply responses to idiosyncratic transfers with our new evidence of a large labor supply response to an aggregate shock.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E32, E52, J22, J23, J64
papers.zh_title: 货币政策的劳动力需求与劳动力供给渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为货币政策影响劳动力需求，而对劳动力供给影响甚微。我们估算了在联邦公开市场委员会公告和美联储主席演讲前后，劳动力市场流动对利率高频变化的反应，并发现证据表明，与共识相反，紧缩性货币政策冲击会导致劳动力供给显著增加：工人减少离职至非就业状态的比率，非就业个体增加求职行为。这些效应在数量上很重要：在保持供给驱动的劳动力市场流动不变的情况下，紧缩性货币政策冲击导致的就业下降幅度将是原来的两倍。为解释我们的发现，我们估计了一个包含摩擦性劳动力市场和活跃劳动力供给边际的异质性主体模型。该模型将现有关于劳动力供给对个体转移支付反应较小的估计，与我们关于劳动力供给对总体冲击反应较大的新证据进行了合理化解释。

papers.title: The Environmental Cost of Easy Credit: The Housing Channel
papers.authors: Manuel Adelino, David T. Robinson
papers.abstract: Heating, cooling, and powering the residential housing stock accounts for about one-fifth of total annual greenhouse gas emissions in the US. Home size is a key determinant of energy intensity. The average newly built single-family home is 50% larger than in the 1950s. Using distinct identification strategies spanning the last four decades of banking history, we show that more abundant credit increases average new home size. It also facilitates more construction but does not produce offsetting increases in home quality or durability. These results highlight potential environmental costs associated with monetary policies that expand access to credit.
papers.zh_title: 宽松信贷的环境成本：住房渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 住宅供暖、制冷和供电约占美国年度温室气体排放总量的五分之一。房屋面积是能源强度的关键决定因素。新建独栋住宅的平均面积比20世纪50年代大50%。利用跨越过去四十年银行业历史的不同识别策略，我们表明更充裕的信贷会增加新建住宅的平均面积。它还促进了更多的建设，但并未带来房屋质量或耐久性的补偿性提升。这些结果凸显了与扩大信贷获取渠道的货币政策相关的潜在环境成本。

papers.title: Institutions, Comparative Advantage, and the Environment
papers.authors: Joseph S. Shapiro
papers.abstract: This paper proposes that strong financial, judicial, and labor market institutions provide comparative advantage in clean industries, and thereby improve a country's environmental quality. Five complementary tests support this hypothesis. First, industries that depend on institutions are disproportionately clean. Second, strong institutions increase relative exports in clean industries, even conditional on environmental regulation and factor endowments. Third, an industry's complexity helps explain the link between institutions and clean goods. Fourth, a quantitative general equilibrium model indicates that strengthening a country's institutions decreases its pollution through relocating dirty industries abroad, though increases pollution in other countries. Fifth, cross-country differences in the composition of output between clean and dirty industries explain more of the global distribution of emissions than differences in the techniques used for production do. The comparative advantage that strong institutions provide in clean industries gives one under-explored reason why developing countries have relatively high pollution levels.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：F18, F55, F6, F64, H23, O4, O44, P48, Q50, Q56
papers.zh_title: 制度、比较优势与环境
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出，强大的金融、司法和劳动力市场制度为清洁行业提供了比较优势，从而改善了一国的环境质量。五项互补性检验支持了这一假说。第一，依赖制度的行业不成比例地属于清洁行业。第二，强大的制度增加了清洁行业的相对出口，即使在控制了环境规制和要素禀赋之后也是如此。第三，行业的复杂性有助于解释制度与清洁产品之间的联系。第四，一个定量的一般均衡模型表明，加强一国制度会通过将污染行业转移到国外来减少其污染，但会增加其他国家的污染。第五，各国清洁与污染行业产出构成的差异，比生产所用技术的差异更能解释全球排放分布。强大制度在清洁行业提供的比较优势，是解释发展中国家污染水平相对较高的一个未被充分探讨的原因。

papers.title: The Turing Transformation: Artificial Intelligence, Intelligence Augmentation, and Skill Premiums
papers.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
papers.abstract: We ask whether a technical objective of using human performance of tasks as a benchmark for AI performance will result in the negative outcomes highlighted in prior work in terms of jobs and inequality. Instead, we argue that task automation, especially when driven by AI advances, can enhance job prospects and potentially widen the scope for employment of many workers. The neglected mechanism we highlight is the potential for changes in the skill premium where AI automation of tasks exogenously improves the value of the skills of many workers, expands the pool of available workers to perform other tasks, and, in the process, increases labor income and potentially reduces inequality. We label this possibility the “Turing Transformation.” As such, we argue that AI researchers and policymakers should not focus on the technical aspects of AI applications and whether they are directed at automating human-performed tasks or not and, instead, focus on the outcomes of AI research. In so doing, our goal is not to diminish human-centric AI research as a laudable goal. Instead, we want to note that AI research that uses a human-task template with a goal to automate that task can often augment human performance of other tasks and whole jobs. The distributional effects of technology depend more on which workers have tasks that get automated than on the fact of automation per se.
papers.zh_title: 图灵转型：人工智能、智能增强与技能溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探究以人类任务表现作为人工智能性能基准的技术目标，是否会导致先前研究中强调的关于就业和不平等的负面结果。相反，我们认为任务自动化，尤其是由人工智能进步驱动的自动化，可以改善就业前景，并可能扩大许多工人的就业范围。我们强调的被忽视的机制是技能溢价变化的潜力：人工智能对任务的自动化外生地提升了许多工人技能的价值，扩大了可用于执行其他任务的工人池，并在此过程中增加了劳动收入，可能减少不平等。我们将这种可能性称为“图灵转型”。因此，我们认为人工智能研究人员和政策制定者不应关注人工智能应用的技术方面以及它们是否旨在自动化人类执行的任务，而应关注人工智能研究的结果。这样做，我们的目标不是贬低以人为中心的人工智能研究这一值得称赞的目标。相反，我们想指出，使用人类任务模板并以自动化该任务为目标的人工智能研究，通常可以增强人类执行其他任务和整体工作的能力。技术的分配效应更多地取决于哪些工人的任务被自动化，而不是自动化本身这一事实。

papers.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Inequality: Maternal Endowments, Investments, and Birth Outcomes
papers.authors: Sadegh Eshaghnia, James J. Heckman
papers.abstract: Newborn health is an important component in the chain of intergenerational transmission of disadvantage. This paper contributes to the literature on the determinants of health at birth in two ways. First, we analyze the role of maternal endowments and investments (education and smoking in pregnancy) on the probability of having a baby who is small for gestational age (SGA). We estimate both the total impact of maternal endowments on birth outcomes, and we also decompose it into a direct, “biological” effect and a “choice” effect, mediated by maternal behaviors. Second, we estimate the causal effects of maternal education and smoking in pregnancy, and investigate whether women endowed with different traits have different returns. We find that maternal cognition affects birth outcomes primarily through maternal education, that personality traits mainly operate by changing maternal smoking, and that the physical fitness of the mother has a direct, “biological” effect on SGA. We find significant heterogeneity in the effects of education and smoking along the distribution of maternal physical traits, suggesting that women with less healthy physical constitutions should be the primary target of prenatal interventions.
papers.zh_title: 不平等的代际传递：母亲禀赋、投资与出生结局
papers.zh_abstract: 新生儿健康是劣势代际传递链条中的一个重要组成部分。本文从两个方面对出生健康决定因素的文献做出了贡献。首先，我们分析了母亲禀赋和投资（教育和孕期吸烟）对生出小于胎龄儿概率的作用。我们估计了母亲禀赋对出生结局的总影响，并将其分解为直接的“生物”效应和由母亲行为中介的“选择”效应。其次，我们估计了母亲教育和孕期吸烟的因果效应，并探究具有不同特质的女性是否具有不同的回报。我们发现母亲认知主要通过母亲教育影响出生结局，人格特质主要通过改变母亲吸烟行为起作用，而母亲的身体健康对小于胎龄儿有直接的“生物”效应。我们发现教育和吸烟的效应在母亲身体特质分布上存在显著异质性，这表明体质较弱的女性应成为产前干预的主要目标。

papers.title: Dynamics of the Long Term Housing Yield: Evidence from Natural Experiments
papers.authors: Verónica Bäcker-Peral, Jonathon Hazell, Atif R. Mian
papers.abstract: Every month, a fraction of UK property leases are extended for another 90 years or more. We build a new dataset of thousands of these natural experiments from 2000 onwards to estimate the expected long term housing yield, y*. Starting from a level of 5.3%, y* starts to fall during the Great Recession, reaching a low of 2.8% in 2023. Real time data shows y* has not risen since 2021, despite rising shorter term yields. Cross-sectional estimates show that y* is higher in areas with more housing risk, and falls by more in areas with more inelastic housing supply.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, E40, E5, G5
papers.zh_title: 长期住房收益率的动态：来自自然实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 每个月，英国一部分房产租约会被延长90年或更久。我们构建了一个包含自2000年以来数千个此类自然实验的新数据集，以估计预期的长期住房收益率y*。从5.3%的水平开始，y*在大衰退期间开始下降，到2023年达到2.8%的低点。实时数据显示，尽管短期收益率上升，但自2021年以来y*并未上升。横截面估计表明，在住房风险较高的地区y*更高，而在住房供给缺乏弹性的地区y*下降得更多。

papers.title: The Effect of Childhood Environment on Political Behavior: Evidence from Young U.S. Movers, 1992–2021
papers.authors: Jacob R. Brown, Enrico Cantoni, Sahil Chinoy, Martin Koenen, Vincent Pons
papers.abstract: We ask how childhood environment shapes political behavior. We measure young voters’ participation and party affiliation in nationally comprehensive voter files and reconstruct their childhood location histories based on their parents’ addresses. We compare outcomes of individuals who moved between the same origin and destination counties but at different ages. Those who spend more time in the destination are more influenced by it: Growing up in a county where their peers are 10 percentage points more likely to become Republicans makes them 4.7 percentage points more likely to become Republican themselves upon entering the electorate. The effects are of similar magnitude for Democratic partisanship and turnout. These exposure effects are primarily driven by teenage years, and they persist but decay after the first election. They reflect both state-level factors and factors varying at a smaller scale such as peer effects.
papers.zh_title: 童年环境对政治行为的影响：来自1992-2021年美国年轻迁移者的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探究童年环境如何塑造政治行为。我们从全国综合性的选民档案中测量年轻选民的参与度和党派归属，并根据其父母的地址重建他们的童年地点历史。我们比较了在相同起点和终点县之间迁移但迁移年龄不同的个体的结果。那些在目的地花费更多时间的人受其影响更大：在一个同龄人成为共和党人的概率高出10个百分点的县长大，会使他们自己在进入选民群体时成为共和党人的概率高出4.7个百分点。这些效应对民主党倾向和投票率的影响幅度相似。这些暴露效应主要由青少年时期驱动，并且在第一次选举后持续存在但逐渐衰减。它们既反映了州层面的因素，也反映了在更小尺度上变化的因素，如同伴效应。

papers.title: One Giant Leap: Emancipation and Aggregate Economic Gains
papers.authors: Richard Hornbeck, Trevon Logan
papers.abstract: We re-characterize American slavery as inefficient, whereby emancipation generated substantial aggregate economic gains. Coercive labor markets were severely distorted, with the social marginal cost of labor substantially above its marginal benefit. Production during enslavement came at immense costs imposed upon enslaved people that reduced aggregate economic surplus, or the total value of output minus total costs incurred. The costs of enslavement are inherently difficult to quantify, which leads to a wide range of quantitative estimates, but we calculate that emancipation generated aggregate economic gains worth the equivalent of a 4% to 35% increase in US aggregate productivity (7 to 60 years of technological innovation). Emancipation decreased output but sparked dramatic aggregate economic gains by decreasing costs substantially more, illustrating the substantial potential for aggregate economic gains in the presence of severe misallocation.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, LE, LS, PR；JEL：J47, N31
papers.zh_title: 巨大飞跃：解放与总体经济收益
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将美国奴隶制重新定性为低效的，因此解放产生了巨大的总体经济收益。强制性劳动力市场存在严重扭曲，劳动力的社会边际成本远高于其边际收益。奴役期间的生产以强加给被奴役者的巨大成本为代价，这减少了总体经济剩余，即总产出价值减去总成本。奴役成本本质上难以量化，导致定量估计范围很广，但我们计算出解放产生的总体经济收益相当于美国总体生产率提高4%至35%（相当于7到60年的技术创新）。解放减少了产出，但通过更大幅度地降低成本引发了巨大的总体经济收益，这说明了在存在严重错配的情况下总体经济收益的巨大潜力。

papers.title: Managing to Learn
papers.authors: Sabrin A. Beg, Anne E. Fitzpatrick, Adrienne Lucas
papers.abstract: To improve public services at scale, public sector managers must encourage reticent civil servants to enact effective reforms. We show through a randomized controlled trial that when existing school managers have the tools to act as leaders, they can improve school management, student learning, and reduce teacher turnover. Additional management training differentially improved management but not student test scores. Managerial enhancements and student test score gains persisted. Our findings resolve conflicting results regarding the role of management in public sector productivity and demonstrate how public sector managers can signal reform effectiveness through personal effort, acting as leaders.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H40, I25, I28, M53, M54, O15, O43
papers.zh_title: 管理即学习
papers.zh_abstract: 为了大规模改善公共服务，公共部门管理者必须鼓励沉默寡言的公务员实施有效的改革。我们通过一项随机对照试验表明，当现有的学校管理者拥有作为领导者行事的工具时，他们能够改善学校管理、提高学生学习成绩并降低教师离职率。额外的管理培训在管理方面带来了差异化的改善，但并未提高学生的考试成绩。管理方面的改进和学生考试成绩的提升均具有持续性。我们的研究结果调和了关于管理在公共部门生产率中作用的相互矛盾的结论，并展示了公共部门管理者如何通过个人努力来传递改革有效性信号，从而发挥领导作用。

papers.title: Why Choose Career Technical Education? Disentangling Student Preferences from Program Availability
papers.authors: Brian A. Jacob, Michael D. Ricks
papers.abstract: This paper presents the first evidence of how students make career technical education (CTE) course-taking decisions. Among the universe of Michigan high-schoolers we find large disparities in CTE access and participation by gender, race, and income. We decompose participation gaps between supply (access) and demand (preferences) with a simple discrete choice model. We find that student preferences for CTE content drive participation gaps by gender, inequities in access drive gaps by income, and school-level supply and demand factors combine to create the gaps by race. Policy simulations highlight the importance of accessible CTE delivery models within comprehensive high schools.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I0, I20, I21, I28, J01, J08
papers.zh_title: 为何选择职业技术教育？区分学生偏好与项目可及性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文首次提供了关于学生如何做出职业技术教育课程选择决策的证据。在密歇根州所有高中生中，我们发现职业技术教育的获取和参与在性别、种族和收入方面存在巨大差异。我们通过一个简单的离散选择模型，将参与差距分解为供给（可及性）和需求（偏好）两部分。我们发现，学生对职业技术教育内容的偏好驱动了性别参与差距，可及性的不平等驱动了收入参与差距，而学校层面的供给和需求因素共同导致了种族参与差距。政策模拟凸显了在综合性高中内提供可及的职业技术教育交付模式的重要性。

papers.title: Fiscal Federalism and the Role of the Income Tax
papers.authors: Roger H. Gordon
papers.abstract: This paper rethinks the design of the income tax by assuming that the objective of the tax is not to redistribute from rich to poor but instead to provide some insurance to individuals against the uncertainties they face in their future earnings, a motivation for the tax proposed in Buchanan (1976). The income tax provides insurance by collecting money on net from individuals to the extent they end up doing well to finance net transfers to them when they end up doing badly. Individuals differ in the amount of future risks they face. These heterogeneous tastes for insurance provide a rationale for states to offer heterogeneous tax/transfer programs, each state attracting a different clientele in the population. Given the ease of household migration, state tax policies generate fiscal externalities to other states. The paper explores as well possible Federal interventions to improve on the equilibrium choices states make for their tax policies.
papers.zh_title: 财政联邦主义与所得税的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文重新思考了所得税的设计，假设税收的目标不是从富人向穷人进行再分配，而是为个人应对未来收入面临的不确定性提供某种保险，这是布坎南（1976）提出的税收动机。所得税通过以下方式提供保险：从最终表现良好的个人那里净收取资金，用于在最终表现不佳时向他们提供净转移支付。个人面临的未来风险大小各不相同。这些对保险的异质性偏好为各州提供异质性的税收/转移支付计划提供了理由，每个州吸引人口中不同的客户群体。鉴于家庭迁移的便利性，各州的税收政策会对其他州产生财政外部性。本文还探讨了联邦政府可能采取的干预措施，以改善各州在税收政策选择上的均衡结果。

papers.title: Carbon Taxes: Many Strengths but Key Weaknesses
papers.authors: Roger H. Gordon
papers.abstract: There is a consensus among economists that a carbon tax is the best approach for addressing the effects of CO2 emissions on the global climate. However, past international agreements on climate change instead specify caps on emissions (a quantity target) for each country. This paper explores several advantages of such use of quantity targets. For one, if a country were to impose a carbon tax at a rate high enough to correct for global externalities, this rate would far exceed the rate in that country’s own self-interest. The result is an incentive to make use of other domestic government policies to encourage greater emissions, undercutting the intended abatement under a carbon tax. A quantity target instead by construction caps emissions. Second, the paper argues that a quantity target can better insure that global warming remains below two degrees Celsius, given the uncertainties faced regarding the response to any given carbon tax rate. Third, the set of quantity targets set for each country can more flexibly be adjusted to ensure that most countries benefit from participating in a global accord, while still allowing efficient patterns of abatement by giving countries credit for cross-border abatement efforts.
papers.zh_title: 碳税：诸多优势但关键弱点
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家们普遍认为碳税是应对二氧化碳排放对全球气候影响的最佳方法。然而，以往关于气候变化的国际协议却为每个国家规定了排放上限（数量目标）。本文探讨了使用此类数量目标的几个优势。首先，如果一个国家征收的碳税率高到足以纠正全球外部性，那么这个税率将远远超过该国自身利益所决定的税率。结果会导致该国利用其他国内政策来鼓励更多排放，从而削弱碳税预期的减排效果。而数量目标则通过设计直接限制了排放上限。其次，本文认为，考虑到对任何给定碳税率反应的未知性，数量目标能更好地确保全球变暖控制在2摄氏度以内。第三，为每个国家设定的数量目标集可以更灵活地调整，以确保大多数国家从参与全球协议中受益，同时通过为国家的跨境减排努力提供信用，允许高效的减排模式。

papers.title: No Revenge for Nerds? Evaluating the Careers of Ivy League Athletes
papers.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Paul Gompers, George Hu, Will Levinson, Vladimir Mukharlyamov
papers.abstract: This paper compares the careers of Ivy League athletes to those of their non-athlete classmates. Combining team-level information on all Ivy League athletes from 1970 to 2021 with resume data for all Ivy League graduates, we examine both post-graduate education and career choices as well as career outcomes. In terms of industry choice, athletes are far more likely to go into business and Finance related jobs than their non-athlete classmates. In terms of advanced degrees, Ivy League athletes are more likely to get an MBA and to receive it from an elite program, although they are less likely to pursue an M.D., a Ph.D., or an advanced STEM degree. In terms of career outcomes, we find that Ivy League athletes outperform their non-athlete counterparts in the labor market. Athletes attain higher terminal wages and earn cumulatively more than non-athletes over the course of their careers controlling for school, graduation year, major, and first job. In addition, they attain more senior positions in the organizations they join. We also find that athletes from more socioeconomically diverse sports teams and from teams that have lower academic admissions thresholds have higher career outcomes than non-athletes. Collectively, our results suggest that non-academic human capital developed through athletic participation is valued in the labor market and may support the role that prior athletic achievement plays in admissions at elite colleges.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：J0, J01, J08, J24, J30, J32, J38
papers.zh_title: 书呆子无复仇？评估常春藤联盟运动员的职业生涯
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将常春藤联盟运动员的职业生涯与其非运动员同学进行了比较。结合1970年至2021年所有常春藤联盟运动员的团队层面信息以及所有常春藤联盟毕业生的简历数据，我们考察了他们的研究生教育、职业选择以及职业成果。在行业选择方面，运动员比非运动员同学更有可能进入商业和金融相关领域工作。在高级学位方面，常春藤联盟运动员更有可能获得MBA学位，并且更有可能从精英项目获得该学位，尽管他们攻读医学博士、哲学博士或高级STEM学位的可能性较低。在职业成果方面，我们发现常春藤联盟运动员在劳动力市场上的表现优于非运动员同学。在控制了学校、毕业年份、专业和第一份工作后，运动员在职业生涯中获得了更高的最终工资，并且累计收入高于非运动员。此外，他们在所加入的组织中获得了更高级别的职位。我们还发现，来自社会经济背景更多样化的运动队以及来自学术录取门槛较低的运动队的运动员，其职业成果高于非运动员。总体而言，我们的结果表明，通过参与体育运动发展起来的非学术人力资本在劳动力市场上受到重视，并可能支持了先前体育成就精英大学录取中所起的作用。

papers.title: Optimal Income Taxation and Charitable Giving
papers.authors: Louis Kaplow
papers.abstract: The philanthropic sector is highly consequential, particularly in the United States, and the most important policies directed toward this sector are tax policies. Yet most economic analysis of the optimal tax treatment of charitable giving is ad hoc, treating it as a subject unto itself. This article advances a different approach: integrating the tax treatment of charitable giving into the optimal income tax framework that has been developed over the past half century. The results supplement or overturn conventional wisdom. Notably, the analysis of revenue effects and the purported efficiency of subsidies to charitable giving is recast, focusing on the pertinent externalities rather than the direct revenue costs, which themselves are irrelevant in the basic case. Distributive concerns regarding donors are also misplaced because distributive effects can be offset by tax rate adjustments to the broader income tax and transfer system. These ideas are developed systematically, with an emphasis on intuition rather than technical formalism. The analysis also broadens and deepens the assessment of externalities from charitable giving, which are more numerous and heterogeneous than is generally recognized. Finally, refocusing our understanding of the optimal tax treatment of charitable giving identifies important subjects requiring further research.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D64, H21, H22, H24, H41, K34, L38
papers.zh_title: 最优所得税与慈善捐赠
papers.zh_abstract: 慈善领域影响深远，尤其是在美国，而针对该领域最重要的政策是税收政策。然而，大多数关于慈善捐赠最优税收待遇的经济分析都是临时性的，将其视为一个独立主题。本文提出了一种不同的方法：将慈善捐赠的税收待遇整合到过去半个世纪发展起来的最优所得税框架中。研究结果补充或推翻了传统观点。值得注意的是，对收入效应和所谓补贴慈善捐赠效率的分析被重新审视，重点放在了相关的外部性上，而非直接的收入成本，后者在基本情况下本身是无关紧要的。关于捐赠者的分配关切也是不恰当的，因为分配效应可以通过调整更广泛的所得税和转移支付体系的税率来抵消。这些观点得到了系统性的阐述，侧重于直觉而非技术形式主义。该分析还拓宽并深化了对慈善捐赠外部性的评估，这些外部性比通常认识到的更多样化和异质化。最后，重新聚焦我们对慈善捐赠最优税收待遇的理解，确定了需要进一步研究的重要课题。

papers.title: Estimating Impact with Surveys versus Digital Traces: Evidence from Randomized Cash Transfers in Togo
papers.authors: Emily Aiken, Suzanne Bellue, Joshua Blumenstock, Dean Karlan, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: Do non-traditional digital trace data and traditional survey data yield similar estimates of the impact of a cash transfer program? In a randomized controlled trial of Togo’s COVID-19 Novissi program, endline survey data indicate positive treatment effects on beneficiary food security, mental health, and self-perceived economic status. However, impact estimates based on mobile phone data – processed with machine learning to predict beneficiary welfare – do not yield similar results, even though related data and methods do accurately predict wealth and consumption in prior cross-sectional analysis in Togo. This limitation likely arises from the underlying difficulty of using mobile phone data to predict short-term changes in wellbeing within a rural population with fairly homogeneous baseline levels of poverty. We discuss the implications of these results for using new digital data sources in impact evaluation.
papers.zh_title: 通过调查与数字痕迹评估影响：来自多哥随机现金转移支付的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 非传统的数字痕迹数据和传统的调查数据是否会对现金转移支付项目的影响得出相似的估计？在多哥COVID-19 Novissi项目的随机对照试验中，终线调查数据显示，该项目对受益者的粮食安全、心理健康和自我感知经济状况产生了积极的处理效应。然而，基于手机数据（通过机器学习处理以预测受益者福利）的影响估计并未得出相似的结果，尽管在先前多哥的横截面分析中，相关的数据和方法确实能准确预测财富和消费。这种局限性很可能源于使用手机数据预测农村人口（其贫困基线水平相对同质）短期福利变化的根本性困难。我们讨论了这些结果对于在影响评估中使用新型数字数据源的意义。

papers.title: Preparing for an Aging Africa: Data-Driven Priorities for Economic Research and Policy
papers.authors: Madeline E. Duhon, Edward Miguel, Amos Njuguna, Daniela Pinto Veizaga, Michael W. Walker
papers.abstract: The over-60 population in Sub-Saharan Africa is expected to grow rapidly in the coming decades, tripling between 2020 and 2050. Despite this explosive projected growth, few countries in the region have implemented policies designed to support older populations. Further, little research in economics has specifically examined aging in Sub-Saharan Africa, though many opportunities exist for economists to generate research evidence to inform the design of effective policies in this area. This paper combines insights from a cross-disciplinary review with original data analysis to characterize the challenges and opportunities facing older Sub-Saharan Africans in domains such as health and financial security. Informed by these findings, the paper identifies directions for future economic research and discusses how research evidence can inform the design of health care systems, pensions, and other public support programs to prepare for an aging Africa.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DEV；JEL：H51, H55, J14, O10, O55
papers.zh_title: 为老龄化非洲做准备：经济研究与政策的数据驱动优先事项
papers.zh_abstract: 撒哈拉以南非洲地区60岁以上人口预计将在未来几十年快速增长，到2020年至2050年间将增加两倍。尽管预计增长迅猛，但该地区很少有国家实施了旨在支持老年人口的政策。此外，经济学研究中很少有专门考察撒哈拉以南非洲老龄化问题的，尽管经济学家有很多机会产生研究证据，为这一领域有效政策的设计提供信息。本文结合跨学科综述的见解与原始数据分析，描述了撒哈拉以南非洲老年人在健康和财务安全等领域面临的挑战与机遇。基于这些发现，本文指出了未来经济学研究的方向，并讨论了研究证据如何为医疗保健系统、养老金及其他公共支持项目的设计提供信息，以应对非洲的老龄化问题。

papers.title: Geographic Variation in Healthcare Utilization: The Role of Physicians
papers.authors: Ivan Badinski, Amy Finkelstein, Matthew Gentzkow, Peter Hull
papers.abstract: We study the role of physicians in driving geographic variation of US healthcare utilization. We estimate a model that separates variation in average utilization of Medicare beneficiaries due to physicians, non-physician supply side factors, and patient demand. The model is identified by migration of patients and physicians across areas, as well as by variation in within-area matching. We find that physicians vary greatly in the intensity with which they treat otherwise similar patients, and that at least a third of geographic differences in healthcare utilization can be explained by differences in average physician treatment intensity. Conservatively, physicians are three times as important as non-physician supply-side factors in explaining geographic variation. Around three-fifths of physicians’ role comes from differences across areas in physician practice styles within the same specialty, while the other two-fifths reflects differences across areas in physician specialty mix.
papers.zh_title: 医疗利用的地理差异：医生的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了医生在推动美国医疗利用地理差异中的作用。我们估计了一个模型，该模型将医疗保险受益人的平均医疗利用差异分解为医生因素、非医生供给侧因素和患者需求因素。该模型通过患者和医生在不同地区间的迁移以及地区内匹配的差异来识别。我们发现，医生在治疗相似患者时的强度存在巨大差异，并且至少三分之一的医疗利用地理差异可以用医生平均治疗强度的差异来解释。保守估计，在解释地理差异方面，医生的作用是非医生供给侧因素的三倍。大约五分之三的医生作用源于同一专科内医生执业风格在不同地区的差异，而另外五分之二则反映了不同地区医生专科构成的差异。

papers.title: Global Natural Rates in the Long Run: Postwar Macro Trends and the Market-Implied r* in 10 Advanced Economies
papers.authors: Josh Davis, Cristian Fuenzalida, Leon Huetsch, Benjamin Mills, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: Benchmark finance and macroeconomic models appear to deliver conflicting estimates of the natural rate and bond risk premia. This natural rate puzzle applies not only in the U.S. but across many advanced economies. We use a unified no-arbitrage macro- finance model with two trend factors to estimate the natural rate r* for 10 advanced economies. We cover a longer and wider sample than previous studies and draw on new sources to construct yield curves and excess returns. The two-trend model improves the explanatory power of yield regressions and return forecasts. Most variation in yields is due to the macro trends r* and π*, and not bond risk premia. Global components of unexpected bond returns are influential, while the local components of natural rates are large. Our r* estimates covary with growth and demographic variables in a manner consistent with theory and previous findings.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C13, C32, E43, E44, E47, G12
papers.zh_title: 长期全球自然利率：战后宏观趋势与10个发达经济体的市场隐含r*
papers.zh_abstract: 基准金融和宏观经济模型似乎对自然利率和债券风险溢价给出了相互矛盾的估计。这种自然利率之谜不仅存在于美国，也存在于许多发达经济体。我们使用一个包含两个趋势因子的统一无套利宏观金融模型，估算了10个发达经济体的自然利率r*。与以往研究相比，我们覆盖了更长、更广泛的样本，并利用新来源构建了收益率曲线和超额收益。双趋势模型提高了收益率回归和回报预测的解释力。收益率的大部分变动归因于宏观趋势r*和π*，而非债券风险溢价。意外债券回报的全球成分具有影响力，而自然利率的本地成分则很大。我们的r*估计值与增长和人口统计变量的协动关系与理论及以往发现一致。

papers.title: Crime can be a Giffen Good: The Role of Need in Criminal Labor Supply
papers.authors: W. Bentley MacLeod
papers.abstract: Building upon the Becker (1968)-Ehrlich (1973) model of crime, this paper shows that under the appropriate conditions crime is a Giffen good: increasing deterrence can lead to an increase in crime. This result relies upon two conditions. The first is that individuals are choosing between how much time to allocate between leisure and crime as an income earning activity. Second, in the absence of income from criminal activity, individuals do not have access to sufficient resources to fund necessary consumption. Evidence consistent with this hypothesis is discussed. This in turn may provide an additional reason why crime reduction is so challenging. The optimal policy is derived, and it is shown that it entails a combination of redistribution and an appropriately set level of deterrence that varies with the level of social inequality.
papers.zh_title: 犯罪可以是吉芬商品：需求在犯罪劳动供给中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于Becker (1968)-Ehrlich (1973)的犯罪模型，表明在适当条件下，犯罪是一种吉芬商品：增加威慑可能导致犯罪增加。这一结果依赖于两个条件。首先，个体在休闲和作为创收活动的犯罪之间分配时间。其次，在没有犯罪活动收入的情况下，个体无法获得足够资源来资助必要消费。本文讨论了与此假说一致的证据。这反过来可能为犯罪减少为何如此具有挑战性提供了一个额外原因。本文推导出最优政策，并表明该政策需要结合再分配和适当设定的威慑水平，且该水平随社会不平等程度而变化。

papers.title: The Effect of Organizations on Physician Prescribing: The Case of Opioids
papers.authors: M. Kate Bundorf, Daniel Kessler, Sahil Lalwani
papers.abstract: In theory, there are several reasons why physician organizational form might affect the price, quantity, and quality of physician services. In this paper, we examine the association between three aspects of physician organizational form and opioid prescribing: solo versus group practice; integration with a hospital versus independent practice; and the average age of the other physicians in the physician’s group. We present three key findings. First, physicians who switch from solo to group practice, particularly large-group practice, significantly reduce their prescribing relative to those who stay in solo practice. Conversely, physicians who switch from group to solo practice significantly increase their prescribing by approximately the same amount. Second, physicians who switch from independent to hospital-integrated practice (and those who switch from integrated to independent practice) generally do not significantly change their prescribing. Third, among group-practice physicians, there are significant differences in prescribing by the average of age of physicians in the group, holding constant the physician’s own age and other characteristics of the group, the physician, and the physician’s patients. Physicians in groups with a higher average age (excluding the index physician) prescribe more intensively and are more likely to write inappropriate opioid prescriptions than physicians in younger groups – holding other factors constant.
papers.zh_title: 组织对医生处方的影响：以阿片类药物为例
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，医生组织形式可能影响医生服务的价格、数量和质量有几个原因。在本文中，我们研究了医生组织形式的三个方面对阿片类药物处方的影响：医生所在团体的医生数量（如果有的话）；医生与医院或医院系统的整合或雇佣关系；以及医生团体中其他医生的平均年龄。我们提出三个关键发现。首先，在其他条件不变的情况下，团体医生开出的阿片类药物远少于独立执业医生，并且处方更合理。其次，尽管受雇于医院或在医院所属团体执业的医生开出的阿片类药物少于独立医生，但有证据表明，这种差异可能源于医院整合型医生的其他特征差异，而非因果效应。第三，我们发现阿片类药物处方存在显著的同伴效应。在平均年龄较高（不包括医生本人）的团体中，医生比在较年轻团体中的医生开药强度更大，并且更可能开出不当的阿片类药物处方——在控制医生自身年龄及其团体其他特征的情况下。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Effects of UI Extensions at Short and Long Durations
papers.authors: Miguel Acosta, Andreas I. Mueller, Emi Nakamura, Jón Steinsson
papers.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of unemployment insurance (UI) benefit extensions in the United States at short and long durations. To do this, we develop a new state level dataset on trigger variables for UI extensions and a “UI Benefits Calculator” based on detailed legislative and administrative sources spanning five decades. Our identification approach exploits variation across states in the options governing the Extended Benefits program. We find that UI extensions during time periods when UI benefit durations are already long—such as in the Great Recession—have minimal effects. However, UI extensions at shorter initial durations have substantial effects on the unemployment rate and the number of people receiving UI, with larger estimates during Covid. We relate our estimates to microeconomic estimates of the effects of UI extensions through the lens of partial and general equilibrium models.
papers.zh_title: 短期和长期失业保险延长的宏观经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国短期和长期失业保险（UI）福利延长对宏观经济的影响。为此，我们基于跨越五十年的详细立法和行政资料，开发了一个关于UI延长触发变量的新州级数据集和一个“UI福利计算器”。我们的识别方法利用了各州在扩展福利计划选项上的差异。我们发现，在UI福利期限已经很长的时间段（例如大衰退期间）延长UI，其影响微乎其微。然而，在初始期限较短时延长UI，对失业率和领取UI人数有显著影响，且在新冠疫情期间估计值更大。我们通过局部和一般均衡模型的视角，将我们的估计与UI延长影响的微观经济估计联系起来。

papers.title: The Shifting Reasons for Beveridge-Curve Shifts
papers.authors: Gadi Barlevy, R. Jason Faberman, Bart Hobijn, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: We discuss how the relative importance of factors that contribute to movements of the U.S. Beveridge curve has changed from 1960 to 2023. We review these factors in the context of a simple flow analogy used to capture the main insights of search and matching theories of the labor market. Changes in inflow rates, related to demographics, accounted for Beveridge curve shifts between 1960 and 2000. A reduction in matching efficiency, that depressed unemployment outflows, shifted the curve outwards in the wake of the Great Recession. In contrast, the most recent shifts in the Beveridge curve appear driven by changes in the eagerness of workers to switch jobs. We argue that, while the Beveridge curve is a useful tool for relating unemployment and vacancies to inflation, the link between these labor market indicators and inflation depends on whether and why the Beveridge curve shifted. Therefore, a careful examination of the factors underlying movements in the Beveridge curve is essential for drawing policy conclusions from the joint behavior of unemployment and job openings.
papers.zh_title: 贝弗里奇曲线移动的变迁原因
papers.zh_abstract: 我们讨论了从1960年到2023年，导致美国贝弗里奇曲线移动的各因素的相对重要性如何变化。我们在一个简单的流量类比背景下回顾了这些因素，该类比用于捕捉劳动力市场搜索和匹配理论的主要见解。与人口结构相关的流入率变化解释了1960年至2000年间的贝弗里奇曲线移动。在大衰退之后，匹配效率的降低抑制了失业流出，使曲线向外移动。相比之下，贝弗里奇曲线最近的移动似乎是由工人换工作意愿的变化驱动的。我们认为，虽然贝弗里奇曲线是将失业和职位空缺与通货膨胀联系起来的有用工具，但这些劳动力市场指标与通货膨胀之间的联系取决于贝弗里奇曲线是否移动以及为何移动。因此，仔细考察贝弗里奇曲线移动背后的因素，对于从失业和职位空缺的联合行为中得出政策结论至关重要。

papers.title: The Role of Repugnance in Markets: How the Jared Fogle Scandal Affected Patronage of Subway
papers.authors: John Cawley, Julia Eddelbuettel, Scott Cunningham, Matthew D. Eisenberg, Alan D. Mathios, Rosemary J. Avery
papers.abstract: Economics has long studied how consumers respond to the disclosure of information about firms. We study a case in which the disclosed information is unrelated to the product or firm leadership, but which could still potentially affect consumer patronage through the mechanism of repugnance, as described in Roth (2007). The information in this case concerns the arrest of Jared Fogle, the advertising pitchman for the Subway sandwich franchise, who was arrested in 2015 on charges of sex with a minor and child pornography. We study how the disclosure of this information, which was widely covered in the media, affected patronage of Subway. We estimate synthetic control models using data from a large nationwide survey of consumers regarding the restaurants they patronize. Despite the close and long-standing association of Jared Fogle with Subway, and heavy publicity of his crimes, we consistently fail to detect any effect of the Jared Fogle scandal on the probability of visiting a Subway restaurant. These results contrast with past studies of negative information disclosure, which tend to find negative impacts on sales, revenue, or stock price of the relevant companies. The absence of an effect in this case suggests that repugnance did not drive demand, and that consumers largely separated the offenses of a symbol of the firm from the products of the firm.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, IO；JEL：D1, D22, D80, D83, I1, J1, K42, L2, L83, M2, M3, M5
papers.zh_title: 厌恶在市场中的作用：Jared Fogle丑闻如何影响赛百味的光顾
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学长期以来一直在研究消费者如何应对企业信息的披露。我们研究了一个案例，其中披露的信息与产品或企业领导层无关，但根据Roth (2007)的描述，仍可能通过厌恶机制潜在地影响消费者光顾。本案中的信息涉及赛百味三明治连锁店的广告代言人Jared Fogle的被捕，他于2015年因与未成年人发生性关系和儿童色情制品指控被捕。我们研究了这一被媒体广泛报道的信息披露如何影响赛百味的光顾。我们利用一项关于消费者光顾餐厅的大型全国性调查数据，估计了合成控制模型。尽管Jared Fogle与赛百味关系密切且历史悠久，且其罪行受到大量宣传，但我们始终未能检测到Jared Fogle丑闻对光顾赛百味餐厅概率的任何影响。这些结果与以往关于负面信息披露的研究形成对比，后者往往发现对相关公司的销售额、收入或股价产生负面影响。本案中缺乏效应表明，厌恶并未驱动需求，消费者在很大程度上将企业象征人物的犯罪行为与企业的产品区分开来。

papers.title: The Political Economy of a “Miracle Cure”: The Case of Nebulized Ibuprofen and its Diffusion in Argentina
papers.authors: Sebastian Calónico, Rafael Di Tella, Juan Cruz Lopez del Valle
papers.abstract: We study the diffusion of a clinically unproven treatment for COVID-19 in Argentina. As the pandemic spread, nebulized ibuprofen reached thousands of patients, even some seriously ill, despite warnings by the regulator and medical societies. We use daily data on drug deliveries for all towns in one of the largest provinces to study diffusion patterns and find a role for learning. An experimental survey is also consistent with learning. A key dimension affecting diffusion is ideology: towns and subjects classified as “right-wing” are more likely to adopt and to learn.
papers.zh_title: “神奇疗法”的政治经济学：雾化布洛芬案例及其在阿根廷的扩散
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种临床未经证实的COVID-19治疗方法在阿根廷的扩散。随着疫情蔓延，尽管监管机构和医学协会发出警告，雾化布洛芬仍被用于数千名患者，甚至包括一些重症患者。我们利用阿根廷最大省份之一所有城镇的每日药物配送数据来研究扩散模式，并发现了学习的作用。一项实验性调查也与学习效应一致。影响扩散的一个关键维度是意识形态：被归类为“右翼”的城镇和受试者更有可能采纳和学习。

papers.title: Harmonizing the Yin and Yang: Gender Disparities in Subjective Well-Being after Retirement in China
papers.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Shin-Yi Chou, Han Yu
papers.abstract: China’s distinctive demographic landscape, early retirement policies, and deeply ingrained gender norms provide a unique backdrop for investigating gender disparities in retirement and subjective well-being. Drawing upon data from the China Family Panel Studies and leveraging the variation around the pensionable age cutoff, we find substantial increases in retirement rates, surging by 19 percentage points for males and 13 percentage points for females in proximity to this age threshold. Notably, retirement manifests significant gender heterogeneity in its influence on life satisfaction, leading to an enhancement among males while not yielding statistically significant improvements among females. Furthermore, this study probes multiple dimensions of subjective well-being and objective health behaviors, laying bare gender disparities in health, behaviors, perceptions of income and social status, and confidence about the future. Males showcase improvements in healthy behaviors, report enhanced self-perceived health, perceive higher relative income and social status, and exude greater confidence about their future. In stark contrast, females show no statistically significant changes along these dimensions. In fact, they tend to engage in health-compromising behaviors, such as increased smoking, and exhibit higher rates of obesity. These findings underscore the imperative of recognizing gender disparities in the consequences of retirement on subjective well-being. They highlight the need for targeted policies aimed at enhancing social and economic opportunities for women, ultimately striving for greater gender equality in the post-retirement phase.
papers.zh_title: 调和阴阳：中国退休后主观幸福感的性别差异
papers.zh_abstract: 中国独特的人口结构、提前退休政策和根深蒂固的性别规范，为研究退休与主观幸福感中的性别差异提供了独特背景。利用中国家庭追踪调查数据，并利用法定退休年龄临界点附近的变异，我们发现退休率显著增加，在接近该年龄阈值时，男性增加19个百分点，女性增加13个百分点。值得注意的是，退休对生活满意度的影响表现出显著的性别异质性，导致男性生活满意度提升，而对女性则未产生统计上显著的改善。此外，本研究探讨了主观幸福感和客观健康行为的多个维度，揭示了健康、行为、收入和社会地位感知以及对未来信心方面的性别差异。男性在健康行为方面有所改善，自我感知健康水平提高，感知相对收入和社会地位更高，并对未来表现出更强的信心。与此形成鲜明对比的是，女性在这些维度上均未显示出统计上显著的变化。事实上，她们倾向于从事损害健康的行为，例如吸烟增加，并且肥胖率更高。这些发现强调了认识退休对主观幸福感影响的性别差异的紧迫性。它们凸显了制定旨在增强女性社会和经济机会的针对性政策的必要性，最终力求在退休后阶段实现更大的性别平等。

papers.title: Loans for the "Little Fellow:" Credit, Crisis, and Recovery in the Great Depression
papers.authors: Sarah Quincy
papers.abstract: This paper identifies how bank branching benefited local economies during the Great Depression. Using archival data and narrative evidence, I show how Bank of America’s branch network in 1930s California created an internal capital market that diversified away local liquidity shortfalls, allowing the bank to maintain 49 percent higher credit growth from 1929 to 1933 than competing banks. The bank’s presence mitigated cites’ property value contractions and strengthened their recovery through 1940. Linked individual data show that the bank’s proximity to workers hastened the transition from agricultural employment to human-capital-intensive sectors in the 1930s, generating structural change and higher wages.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ME；JEL：E44, G01, G21, N22, R23
papers.zh_title: “小人物”贷款：大萧条时期的信贷、危机与复苏
papers.zh_abstract: 本文揭示了银行分支网络在大萧条时期如何惠及地方经济。利用档案数据和叙事证据，我展示了20世纪30年代加州美国银行的分支网络如何构建了一个内部资本市场，分散了地方流动性短缺，使该银行在1929年至1933年间保持了比竞争银行高出49%的信贷增长。该银行的存在缓解了城市房产价值的收缩，并通过1940年加强了经济复苏。关联的个人数据显示，银行与工人的邻近性加速了20世纪30年代从农业就业向人力资本密集型产业的转型，带来了结构性变化和更高的工资。

papers.title: Why Do Index Funds Have Market Power? Quantifying Frictions in the Index Fund Market
papers.authors: Zach Y. Brown, Mark L. Egan, Jihye Jeon, Chuqing Jin, Alex A. Wu
papers.abstract: The number of index funds increased drastically from 2000 to 2020, driven in part by the emergence of exchange-traded funds. Yet, despite the proliferation of near-identical products, fee dispersion remains large and persistent, implying substantial market power. Motivated by evidence of strong inertia and other demand-side frictions, we develop a dynamic model of demand and supply for index funds that incorporates inertia, information frictions, and heterogeneous preferences. Using a new identification strategy that leverages fund-level new-sales data, we estimate that only 3–5% of households update their index holdings each month. However, counterfactual simulations show that while eliminating inertia alone reduces average fees by only 20%, eliminating both information frictions and inertia cuts them by 80%. This highlights that high information frictions—and their interaction with inertia—are the primary barriers to reallocation. Finally, we show that while ETF entry reduced expense ratios through both lower costs and additional product-market competition, demand-side frictions substantially dampened this competitive effect.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO；JEL：G11, G2, G5, L0
papers.zh_title: 指数基金为何拥有市场势力？量化指数基金市场中的摩擦
papers.zh_abstract: 从2000年到2020年，指数基金的数量急剧增加，部分原因是交易所交易基金的出现。然而，尽管近乎相同的产品大量涌现，费率差异仍然很大且持续存在，这表明存在显著的市场势力。基于存在强烈惯性和其他需求侧摩擦的证据，我们开发了一个包含惯性、信息摩擦和异质性偏好的指数基金需求与供给动态模型。利用一种基于基金层面新销售数据的新识别策略，我们估计每月只有3%至5%的家庭更新其指数持有量。然而，反事实模拟显示，虽然仅消除惯性只能使平均费率降低20%，但同时消除信息摩擦和惯性则能使费率降低80%。这凸显了高信息摩擦及其与惯性的相互作用是重新配置的主要障碍。最后，我们表明，虽然ETF的进入通过降低成本和增加产品市场竞争降低了费用率，但需求侧摩擦显著抑制了这种竞争效应。

papers.title: Living Up to Expectations: Central Bank Credibility, the Effectiveness of Forward Guidance, and Inflation Dynamics Post-Global Financial Crisis
papers.authors: Stephen Cole, Enrique Martinez-Garcia, Eric R. Sims
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effectiveness of forward guidance when central banks have imperfect credibility. Exploiting unique survey-based measures of expected inflation, output growth, and interest rates, we estimate a small-scale New Keynesian model for the United States and other G7 countries plus Spain allowing for deviations from full information rational expectations. In our model, the key parameter that aggregates heterogeneous expectations captures the central bank's credibility and affects the overall effectiveness of forward guidance. We find that the central banks of the U.S., the U.K., Germany, and other major advanced economies have similar levels of credibility (albeit far from full credibility); however, Japan's central bank credibility is much lower. For each country, our measure of credibility has declined over time, making forward guidance less effective. In a counterfactual analysis, we document that inflation would have been significantly higher, and the zero lower bound on short-term interest rates much less of an issue, in the wake of the Global Financial Crisis had the public perceived central bank forward guidance statements to be perfectly credible. Moreover, inflation would have declined more, and somewhat faster, with perfect credibility in the wake of the inflation surge post-COVID-19.
papers.zh_title: 不负众望：央行可信度、前瞻指引的有效性及全球金融危机后的通胀动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当央行具有不完全可信度时前瞻指引的有效性。利用基于调查的预期通胀、产出增长和利率的独特衡量指标，我们为美国、其他七国集团国家以及西班牙估计了一个允许偏离完全信息理性预期的小型新凯恩斯模型。在我们的模型中，汇总异质性预期的关键参数捕捉了央行的可信度，并影响前瞻指引的整体有效性。我们发现，美国、英国、德国和其他主要发达经济体的央行具有相似的可信度水平（尽管远非完全可信）；然而，日本央行的可信度要低得多。对于每个国家，我们的可信度指标都随时间下降，使得前瞻指引效果减弱。在一项反事实分析中，我们证明，如果公众认为央行的前瞻指引声明完全可信，那么在全球金融危机之后，通胀本会显著更高，短期利率的零下限问题也会小得多。此外，在新冠疫情后通胀飙升的情况下，如果具有完全可信度，通胀本会下降得更多且更快。

papers.title: Is There Really an Inflation Tax? Not For the Middle Class and the Ultra-Wealthy
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: One hallmark of U.S. monetary policy since the early 1980s has been moderation in inflation (at least, until recently). How has this affected household well-being? The paper first develops a new model to address this issue. The inflation tax on income is defined as the difference between the nominal and real growth in income. This term is always negative (as long as inflation is positive). The inflation gain on household wealth is the revaluation resulting from asset price changes directly linked to inflation. This term can be positive or negative. The net inflation gain is the difference between the two, which can also be positive or negative. The empirical analysis covers years 1983 to 2019 on the basis of the Federal Reserve Board’s Survey of Consumer Finances (SCF) and historical inflation rates. It also looks at the sensitivity of the results to alternative inflation rates, and considers the effects of inflation on real wealth growth, wealth inequality, and the racial wealth gap. The results show that inflation boosted the real income of the middle wealth quintile by a staggering two thirds. In contrast, the bottom two wealth quintiles got clobbered by inflation, losing almost half of their real income. Inflation also boosted mean and especially median real wealth growth, reduced wealth inequality, and lowered the racial and ethnic wealth gap. Both the income and wealth results are magnified at higher (simulated) rates of inflation.
papers.zh_title: 真的存在通胀税吗？对中产阶级和超级富豪而言并非如此
papers.zh_abstract: 自20世纪80年代初以来，美国货币政策的一个标志是通胀温和（至少直到最近）。这如何影响了家庭福祉？本文首先开发了一个新模型来解决这个问题。收入通胀税被定义为名义收入增长与实际收入增长之间的差额。只要通胀为正，这一项始终为负。家庭财富的通胀收益是指由直接与通胀相关的资产价格变动引起的重估。这一项可正可负。净通胀收益是两者之差，也可正可负。实证分析基于美联储消费者金融调查（SCF）和历史通胀率，覆盖1983年至2019年。本文还考察了结果对替代通胀率的敏感性，并考虑了通胀对实际财富增长、财富不平等和种族财富差距的影响。结果表明，通胀使中等财富五分位群体的实际收入惊人地提高了三分之二。相比之下，最低的两个财富五分位群体受到通胀的严重打击，实际收入损失了近一半。通胀还提高了平均尤其是中位实际财富增长，降低了财富不平等，并缩小了种族和民族财富差距。在更高的（模拟）通胀率下，收入和财富结果均被放大。

papers.title: Laffer's Day in Court: The Revenue Effects of Criminal Justice Fees and Fines
papers.authors: Samuel Norris, Evan K. Rose
papers.abstract: Many jurisdictions levy sizable fines and fees (legal financial obligations, or LFOs) on criminal defendants. Proponents argue LFOs are a “tax on crime” that funds courts and provides deterrence; opponents argue they do neither. We examine the fiscal implications of lowering LFOs. Incentives to default generate a “Laffer” curve with revenue eventually decreasing in LFOs. Using detailed administrative data, however, we find few defendants demonstrably on the right-hand side of the curve. Those who are tend to be poor, Black, and charged with felonies. As a result, decreasing LFOs for the average defendant would come at substantial cost to governments.
papers.zh_title: 拉弗曲线在法庭上：刑事司法费用和罚款的收入效应
papers.zh_abstract: 许多司法管辖区对刑事被告征收高额罚款和费用。支持者认为这些费用是对犯罪的征税，为法院提供资金并起到威慑作用；反对者则认为两者都未实现。我们研究了降低这些费用的财政影响。违约激励产生了一条“拉弗”曲线，收入最终随费用增加而减少。然而，利用详细的行政数据，我们发现很少有被告明显处于曲线的右侧。那些处于右侧的往往是穷人、黑人以及被指控犯有重罪的人。因此，对普通被告降低费用将给政府带来巨大成本。

papers.title: Racial Disparities in the Income Tax Treatment of Marriage
papers.authors: Janet Holtzblatt, Swati Joshi, Nora R. Cahill, William Gale
papers.abstract: Although it is generally blind with respect to race, the federal individual income tax can create racial disparities when factors that affect tax liability are associated with race. We provide new evidence on racial differences in marriage penalties and bonuses in the income tax, using data from eight waves of the Survey of Consumer Finances. Our results support Brown’s (2021) hypothesis that, controlling for income, penalties are more frequent and larger for Black couples than white couples. We link these results to racial differences in relative spousal earnings, the presence of dependents, and the level of income. We show that marriage rates are much higher among white adults than Black adults, which implies that two policy reforms we examine end up benefiting a greater share of white adults than Black adults.
papers.zh_title: 婚姻所得税处理中的种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管联邦个人所得税通常不考虑种族因素，但当影响纳税义务的因素与种族相关时，它可能产生种族差异。我们利用消费者金融调查的八轮数据，提供了关于所得税中婚姻惩罚和奖励存在种族差异的新证据。我们的结果支持布朗的假设，即在控制收入的情况下，黑人夫妇比白人夫妇更频繁地面临更大规模的婚姻惩罚。我们将这些结果与配偶相对收入、受抚养人存在以及收入水平方面的种族差异联系起来。我们表明，白人成年人的结婚率远高于黑人成年人，这意味着我们考察的两项政策改革最终惠及的白人成年人比例高于黑人成年人。

papers.title: The Effects of Mandatory Profit-Sharing on Workers and Firms: Evidence from France
papers.authors: Elio Nimier-David, David Sraer, David Thesmar
papers.abstract: Since 1967, all French firms with more than 100 employees have been required to share a fraction of their excess profits with their employees. Through this scheme, firms with excess profits distribute, on average, 10.5% of their pre-tax income to workers. In 1990, the eligibility threshold was reduced to 50 employees. We exploit this regulatory change to identify the effects of mandated profit-sharing on firms and their employees. The cost of mandated profit-sharing for firms is evident in the significant bunching at the 100-employee threshold observed prior to the reform, which completely disappears post-reform. Using a difference-in-difference strategy, we find that, at the firm level, mandated profit-sharing (a) increases the labor share by 1.8 percentage points, (b) reduces the profit share by 1.4 percentage points, and (c) has no significant effect on investment and productivity. At the employee level, mandated profit-sharing increases low-skill workers’ total compensation and leaves high-skill workers’ total compensation unchanged. Overall, mandated profit-sharing redistributes excess profits to lower-skill workers in the firm without generating significant distortions or productivity effects.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G3, H20, J01, J30
papers.zh_title: 强制性利润分享对工人和企业的影响：来自法国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自1967年以来，所有员工超过100人的法国企业都被要求将其超额利润的一部分与员工分享。通过这一机制，拥有超额利润的企业平均将其税前收入的10.5%分配给工人。1990年，适用门槛降至50名员工。我们利用这一监管变化来识别强制性利润分享对企业及其员工的影响。强制性利润分享对企业的成本在改革前观察到的100名员工门槛处的显著聚集现象中显而易见，而这一现象在改革后完全消失。采用双重差分策略，我们发现，在企业层面，强制性利润分享（a）使劳动收入份额增加1.8个百分点，（b）使利润份额减少1.4个百分点，（c）对投资和生产率没有显著影响。在员工层面，强制性利润分享增加了低技能工人的总报酬，而对高技能工人的总报酬没有影响。总体而言，强制性利润分享将超额利润重新分配给企业中的低技能工人，而不会产生显著的扭曲或生产率效应。

papers.title: An Economic View of Corporate Social Impact
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Giovanni Montanari, Bora Ozaltun, Brandon Tan
papers.abstract: The growing discussions of impact investing and stakeholder capitalism have increased interest in measuring companies’ social impact. We conceptualize corporate social impact as the welfare loss that would be caused by a firm’s exit. To illustrate, we quantify the social impacts of 74 firms in 12 industries using a new survey measuring consumer and worker substitution patterns combined with models of product and labor markets. We find that consumer surplus is the primary component of social impact (dwarfing profits, worker surplus, and externalities), suggesting that consumer impacts deserve more attention from impact investors. Existing ESG and social impact ratings are essentially unrelated to our economically grounded measures.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, IO；JEL：D6, J23, L13, L62, L66, L71, L81, L93, M14, Q54
papers.zh_title: 企业社会影响的经济学视角
papers.zh_abstract: 关于影响力投资和利益相关者资本主义的讨论日益增多，这提高了衡量企业社会影响的兴趣。我们将企业社会影响概念化为企业退出所导致的福利损失。为了说明这一点，我们利用一项衡量消费者和工人替代模式的新调查，结合产品和劳动力市场模型，量化了12个行业中74家企业的社会影响。我们发现，消费者剩余是社会影响的主要组成部分（远超利润、工人剩余和外部性），这表明消费者影响值得影响力投资者更多关注。现有的ESG和社会影响评级与我们基于经济学的衡量标准基本无关。

papers.title: Double and Single Descent in Causal Inference with an Application to High-Dimensional Synthetic Control
papers.authors: Jann Spiess, Guido Imbens, Amar Venugopal
papers.abstract: Motivated by a recent literature on the double-descent phenomenon in machine learning, we consider highly over-parameterized models in causal inference, including synthetic control with many control units. In such models, there may be so many free parameters that the model fits the training data perfectly. We first investigate high-dimensional linear regression for imputing wage data and estimating average treatment effects, where we find that models with many more covariates than sample size can outperform simple ones. We then document the performance of high-dimensional synthetic control estimators with many control units. We find that adding control units can help improve imputation performance even beyond the point where the pre-treatment fit is perfect. We provide a unified theoretical perspective on the performance of these high-dimensional models. Specifically, we show that more complex models can be interpreted as model-averaging estimators over simpler ones, which we link to an improvement in average performance. This perspective yields concrete insights into the use of synthetic control when control units are many relative to the number of pre-treatment periods.
papers.zh_title: 因果推断中的双重下降与单一下降：以高维合成控制法为例
papers.zh_abstract: 受近期关于机器学习中双重下降现象文献的启发，我们考虑了因果推断中高度过参数化的模型，包括包含许多对照单元的合成控制法。在此类模型中，自由参数可能过多，以至于模型能完美拟合训练数据。我们首先研究了用于插补工资数据和估计平均处理效应的高维线性回归，发现协变量数量远多于样本量的模型可以优于简单模型。然后，我们记录了包含许多对照单元的高维合成控制估计量的表现。我们发现，即使在预处理拟合达到完美之后，添加对照单元仍有助于提高插补性能。我们为这些高维模型的性能提供了一个统一的理论视角。具体而言，我们表明，更复杂的模型可以解释为对更简单模型的模型平均估计量，我们将其与平均性能的改善联系起来。这一视角为在对照单元数量相对于预处理期数量较多时使用合成控制法提供了具体见解。

papers.title: Does Paid Sick Leave Facilitate Reproductive Choice?
papers.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega, Ioana Popovici, Christopher J. Ruhm
papers.abstract: The U.S. does not have a federal paid sick leave (PSL) policy; however, multiple states have adopted PSL mandates which compel employers to provide employees with, on average, seven days of PSL per year. PSL can facilitate healthcare use among women of child-bearing ages, including use of family planning services. We combine administrative, health insurance claims, and survey data with difference-in-differences methods to shed light on these possibilities. Our findings indicate that state PSL mandates reduce birth rates, potentially through increased use of contraceptive services, and changes in employment and marital status post-mandate.
papers.zh_title: 带薪病假是否促进了生育选择？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国没有联邦层面的带薪病假政策；然而，多个州已通过带薪病假强制令，要求雇主每年为员工提供平均七天的带薪病假。带薪病假可以促进育龄女性使用医疗服务，包括计划生育服务。我们结合行政数据、健康保险索赔数据和调查数据，采用双重差分方法来阐明这些可能性。我们的研究结果表明，州级带薪病假强制令降低了生育率，这可能是通过增加避孕服务的使用以及强制令实施后就业和婚姻状况的变化来实现的。

papers.title: Pension Reform, Incentives to Retire and Retirement Behavior: Empirical Evidence from Swedish Micro-data
papers.authors: Lisa Laun, Mårten Palme
papers.abstract: This paper investigates to what extent the 1998 reform of Sweden’s public old-age pension system contributed to the increase in extensive margin labor supply among older workers seen in the country in recent decades. We use a large data set containing all males and females born in Sweden between 1927 and 1950 and observe their retirement behavior during 1991–2012. The data show that the reform changed the incentives to remain in the labor force ambiguously: although it induced an income effect towards later retirement through lower replacement levels, it also implied a lower price on leaving the labor market under some assumptions. We use an econometric model in which the economic incentives to stay in the labor market are measured by Social Security Wealth, defined at each hypothetical retirement age, and a variable measuring the implicit tax, imposed by the income security system, on staying in the labor force. The point estimates from our econometric model, which should be interpreted with caution, suggest that at most a small part of the increase in labor force participation of the elderly can be attributed to the pension reform.
papers.zh_title: 养老金改革、退休激励与退休行为：来自瑞典微观数据的经验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了瑞典1998年公共养老金制度改革在多大程度上导致了近几十年来该国老年工人广泛边际劳动供给的增加。我们使用一个包含1927年至1950年间在瑞典出生的所有男性和女性的大型数据集，观察他们在1991年至2012年间的退休行为。数据显示，改革以模糊的方式改变了留在劳动力市场的激励：虽然它通过降低替代率产生了延迟退休的收入效应，但在某些假设下，它也意味着降低了离开劳动力市场的代价。我们使用一个计量经济学模型，其中留在劳动力市场的经济激励由社会保障财富（在每个假设的退休年龄定义）和一个衡量收入保障体系对留在劳动力市场施加的隐性税收的变量来衡量。我们计量模型得出的点估计（应谨慎解释）表明，老年人劳动参与率的增加最多只有一小部分可归因于养老金改革。

papers.title: Structural Estimation Under Misspecification: Theory and Implications for Practice
papers.authors: Isaiah Andrews, Nano Barahona, Matthew Gentzkow, Ashesh Rambachan, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: A researcher can use a tightly parameterized structural model to obtain internally consistent estimates of a wide range of economically interesting targets. We ask how reliable these estimates are when the researcher’s model may be misspecified. We focus on the case of multivariate, potentially nonlinear models where the causal variable of interest is endogenous. Reliable estimates require that the researcher’s model is flexible enough to describe the effects of the endogenous variable approximately correctly. Reliable estimates do not require that the researcher has correctly specified the role of the exogenous controls in the model. However, if the role of the controls is misspecified, reliable estimates require a property we call strong exclusion. Strong exclusion depends on having sufficiently many instruments that are unrelated to the controls. We discuss how practitioners can achieve strong exclusion, and illustrate our findings with an application to a differentiated goods model of demand for beer.
papers.zh_title: 误设下的结构估计：理论及对实践的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 研究者可以使用一个参数化严格的结构模型来获得一系列广泛的经济学感兴趣目标的内在一致估计。我们探讨当研究者的模型可能被误设时，这些估计的可靠性如何。我们关注多变量、可能非线性的模型，其中感兴趣的因果变量是内生的。可靠的估计要求研究者的模型足够灵活，以近似正确地描述内生变量的效应。可靠的估计不要求研究者正确指定模型中外生控制变量的作用。然而，如果控制变量的作用被误设，可靠的估计需要一个我们称之为强排除的性质。强排除依赖于拥有足够多的与控制变量无关的工具变量。我们讨论了实践者如何实现强排除，并通过一个啤酒需求的差异化产品模型应用来说明我们的发现。

papers.title: Deadwood Labor? The Effects of Eliminating Employment Protection for Older Workers
papers.authors: Emmanuel Saez, Benjamin Schoefer, David G. Seim
papers.abstract: We analyze mandatory retirement in Sweden which eliminates entirely employment protection at age 67. Employment falls by about 10 percent and total average earnings by about 20 percent immediately at age 67. 8 percent of jobs separate immediately due to loss of protection, with effects stemming from jobs with stronger initial employment protection (long tenure, firms subject to “last in, first out” rules), and those in the public sector. We examine effects on continuing jobs. While wages appear rigid, we uncover novel, sizable intensive-margin hours reductions, resulting in an 8 percent drop in earnings conditional on staying on the job.
papers.zh_title: 枯木劳动力？取消老年工人就业保护的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了瑞典的强制退休制度，该制度在67岁时完全取消了就业保护。就业在67岁时立即下降约10%，总平均收入下降约20%。8%的工作因失去保护而立即终止，其影响源于初始就业保护较强的工作（长期任职、适用“后进先出”规则的企业）以及公共部门的工作。我们考察了对持续工作的影响。虽然工资似乎具有刚性，但我们发现了新颖的、规模可观的集约边际工时减少，导致在继续工作的情况下收入下降8%。

papers.title: Strategic Inattention, Inflation Dynamics, and the Non-Neutrality of Money
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi
papers.abstract: This paper studies how competition affects firms’ expectations in a new dynamic general equilibrium model with rational inattention and oligopolistic competition where firms acquire information about their competitors’ beliefs. In the model, firms with fewer competitors are less attentive to aggregate variables—a novel prediction supported by survey evidence. A calibrated version of the model matches the relationship between firms’ numbers of competitors and their uncertainty about aggregate inflation as a non-targeted moment. A quantitative exercise reveals that firms’ strategic inattention to aggregates significantly amplifies monetary non-neutrality and shifts output response disproportionately towards less competitive oligopolies by distorting relative prices.
papers.zh_title: 战略性忽视、通胀动态与货币非中性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在一个新的动态一般均衡模型中研究竞争如何影响企业的预期，该模型包含理性忽视和寡头竞争，其中企业获取关于其竞争对手信念的信息。在该模型中，竞争对手较少的企业对总体变量的关注度较低——这一新颖的预测得到了调查证据的支持。模型的校准版本匹配了企业竞争对手数量与其对总体通胀不确定性之间的关系，作为一个非目标化矩。一项定量分析表明，企业对总体变量的战略性忽视显著放大了货币非中性，并通过扭曲相对价格，使产出反应不成比例地转向竞争较弱的寡头企业。

papers.title: “Compensate the Losers?” Economic Policy and the Origins of U.S. Partisan Realignment
papers.authors: Ilyana Kuziemko, Nicolas Longuet-Marx, Suresh Naidu
papers.abstract: We argue that the Democratic Party’s evolution on economic policy helps explain partisan realignment by education. First, we document that educated Americans differentially oppose “predistribution” (e.g., job guarantees, higher minimum wages, protectionism, and stronger unions), while the educational gradient for redistribution (taxes and transfers) is close to zero. These relationships have been largely unchanged since the 1940s. Second, focusing on politicians and donors as key party actors, we show that the Democratic Party has moved away from predistribution since the 1970s. The number of predistribution bills introduced by Democratic House Speakers has declined by half since the 1970s. Unions—the traditional lobbying force for predistribution—see their share of Democratic Party PAC donations decline from ninety to forty percent from 1968 to 1980, following 1970s legislation that facilitated corporate PAC donations. From 1980 onward, the Democrats rely increasingly on individual contributions from educated donors relative to the Republicans. We show the increased reliance on corporate PACs and educated donors is driven by the rise of a self-described “New Democrat” faction particularly conservative on pre-distribution and social issues. Finally, we trace out the reaction of voters to these changes in the Democratic Party. Less-educated Americans begin to leave the party in the 1970s, after decades of serving as its base. We also show that in the crucial transition period of the 1970s through 1990s, New Democrat candidates out-perform other Democrats among more-educated voters in both survey questions and actual Congressional elections. As the New Democrats are more socially conservative than other Democrats, their success with educated voters suggests that social issues alone cannot explain educational realignment.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H20, J0, P0
papers.zh_title: “补偿失败者？”经济政策与美国党派重组起源
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，民主党在经济政策上的演变有助于解释按教育程度划分的党派重组。首先，我们证明受过教育的美国人更倾向于反对“预分配”（例如，工作保障、更高最低工资、保护主义和更强大的工会），而再分配（税收和转移支付）的教育梯度接近于零。这些关系自1940年代以来基本未变。其次，以政治家和捐赠者作为关键政党行为者，我们表明自1970年代以来民主党已远离预分配。自1970年代以来，民主党众议院议长提出的预分配法案数量减少了一半。工会——传统上支持预分配的游说力量——其在民主党政治行动委员会捐款中的份额从1968年的90%下降到1980年的40%，这发生在1970年代促进企业政治行动委员会捐款的立法之后。从1980年起，与共和党相比，民主党越来越依赖受过教育的捐赠者的个人捐款。我们表明，对企业政治行动委员会和受过教育捐赠者的日益依赖，是由一个自称“新民主党”的派系崛起所驱动的，该派系在预分配和社会问题上尤为保守。最后，我们追溯了选民对民主党这些变化的反应。受教育程度较低的美国人在1970年代开始离开该党，而此前数十年他们一直是其基础选民。我们还表明，在1970年代至1990年代的关键转型期，新民主党候选人在调查问题和实际国会选举中，在受教育程度较高的选民中表现优于其他民主党人。由于新民主党人在社会问题上比其他民主党人更保守，他们在受教育选民中的成功表明，仅凭社会问题无法解释教育程度上的重组。

papers.title: Informal Fiscal Systems in Developing Countries
papers.authors: Shan Aman-Rana, Clement Minaudier, Sandip Sukhtankar
papers.abstract: Governments in developing countries have low fiscal capacity yet face pressures to provide public goods and services, leading them to rely on various unusual fiscal arrangements. We document one such - hitherto unexplored - arrangement: informal fiscal systems that rely on local bureaucrats to fund the delivery of public goods and services. Using survey data and government accounts from Pakistan, we show that public officials are expected to cover funding gaps in public services and they do so, at least partially, through extracted bribes. We propose a model of bureaucratic agency to explore when governments benefit from sustaining such systems and investigate welfare implications. Informal fiscal systems are more likely to arise when monitoring corruption is difficult relative to monitoring the provision of public services, and politically-important groups of citizens do not bear the full cost of corruption. The existence of such systems can distort the effective incidence of the tax burden, reduce the incentives of government to fight corruption, and legitimize bribe-taking.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE；JEL：D73, H20, H40, H70, O17, O23
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家的非正式财政体系
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的政府财政能力较低，却面临提供公共产品与服务的压力，这导致它们依赖各种不寻常的财政安排。我们记录了一种迄今未被探索的安排：依赖地方官僚为公共产品与服务提供资金的非正式财政体系。利用巴基斯坦的调查数据和政府账目，我们表明，公共官员被期望填补公共服务的资金缺口，并且他们至少部分地通过索取的贿赂来做到这一点。我们提出了一个官僚代理模型，以探讨政府何时从维持此类体系中受益，并研究其福利影响。当相对于监督公共服务提供而言，监督腐败更为困难，并且政治上重要的公民群体不承担腐败的全部成本时，非正式财政体系更有可能出现。此类体系的存在可能会扭曲税收负担的实际归宿，降低政府打击腐败的激励，并使索贿行为合法化。

papers.title: Household Carbon Dioxide Emissions Engel Curve Dynamics
papers.authors: Robert Huang, Matthew E. Kahn
papers.abstract: Household carbon dioxide emissions have been an increasing function of income and distance from the city. Richer suburbanites drive more and consume more electricity and natural gas at home. In recent years, richer people in California have been more likely to buy electric vehicles and to install solar panels in their homes. The electricity grid has become less carbon intensive over time. Using several California datasets, we document that these ongoing shifts in consumer behavior have flattened household transportation carbon dioxide Engel curves over the years 2018 to 2022. While household electricity emissions as a function of income have flattened, the natural gas Engel curves have not. We explore the political economy implications of the ongoing decarbonization of the private vehicle fleet. Based on voting data from California, we document that communities tend to support higher fuel taxes when their vehicle fleet is more fuel efficient.
papers.zh_title: 家庭二氧化碳排放恩格尔曲线动态
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭二氧化碳排放量一直是收入和离城市距离的增函数。较富裕的郊区居民驾驶更多，并在家中消耗更多电力和天然气。近年来，加利福尼亚州的较富裕人群更有可能购买电动汽车并在家中安装太阳能电池板。电网的碳强度随时间推移而降低。利用多个加利福尼亚州数据集，我们记录了这些持续的消费者行为转变，使得2018年至2022年间家庭交通二氧化碳恩格尔曲线趋于平缓。虽然作为收入函数的家庭电力排放曲线已经平缓，但天然气恩格尔曲线并未如此。我们探讨了私家车车队持续脱碳的政治经济学含义。基于加利福尼亚州的投票数据，我们证明，当社区的车队燃油效率更高时，它们往往更支持更高的燃油税。

papers.title: Divestment and Engagement: The Effect of Green Investors on Corporate Carbon Emissions
papers.authors: Matthew E. Kahn, John Matsusaka, Chong Shu
papers.abstract: This paper investigates whether green investors can influence corporate greenhouse gas emissions through capital markets, and if so, whether the effect is larger from divesting polluters’ stock in order to limit their access to capital, or acquiring polluters’ stock and engaging with management as owners. We focus on public pension funds, classifying them as green or nongreen based on which political party controlled the fund. To isolate the causal effects of green ownership, we use exogenous variation caused by state-level politics that shifted control of the funds, and portfolio rebalancing in response to returns from non-equity investment. Our main finding is that companies reduced their greenhouse gas emissions when stock ownership by green funds increased and did not alter or increased their emissions when ownership by nongreen funds increased. Other evidence based on proxy voting, shareholder proposals, and activist pension funds suggests that ownership mattered because of active engagement by green investors, and through attempts to persuade more than voting pressure. We do not find that companies with green investors were more likely to sell off their high-emission facilities (greenwashing).
