These investors span all income levels, with most dollars coming from high-income individuals, similar to equity investors. High past crypto returns and personal income shocks lead to increased cryptocurrency investments. Higher household-level inflation expectations also correlate with greater crypto investments, aligning with hedging motives. For most U.S. households, cryptocurrencies are treated like traditional assets.
papers.zh_title: 谁投资加密货币？财富、金融约束与风险态度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们首次探讨了家庭加密货币投资的驱动因素。通过分析数百万美国家庭的消费者交易数据，我们发现，除了高收入的早期采用者外，加密货币投资者与普通人群相似。这些投资者涵盖所有收入水平，但大部分资金来自高收入个人，这与股票投资者类似。较高的过去加密货币回报和个人收入冲击导致加密货币投资增加。较高的家庭层面通胀预期也与加密货币投资增加相关，这与对冲动机一致。对于大多数美国家庭而言，加密货币被视为传统资产。

papers.title: Safety Reviews on Airbnb: An Information Tale
papers.authors: Aron Culotta, Ginger Zhe Jin, Yidan Sun, Liad Wagman
papers.abstract: Consumer reviews, especially those expressing concerns of product quality, are crucial for the credibility of online platforms. However, reviews that criticize a product or service may also dissuade buyers from using the platform, creating a potential incentive to blur the visibility of critical reviews. Using Airbnb and official crime data in ﬁve major US cities, we ﬁnd that both reviews and personal experiences concerning the safety of a listing’s vicinity decrease guest bookings on the platform. Counterfactual simulations suggest that a complete removal of vicinity safety reviews (VSR) could hurt guests if they do not adjust their beliefs accordingly, and such removal can increase revenues from reservations on Airbnb, with positive sorting toward listings formerly with VSR. Conversely, highlighting VSR would generate opposite effects. However, the incentive to suppress VSR can be mitigated if guests have a rational expectation of average vicinity risk after all VSR are removed or if guests can learn from their own vicinity safety experience for a long enough time. Because VSR are more closely correlated with official crime statistics in low-income and minority neighborhoods, our ﬁndings suggest that suppressing or highlighting VSR would have different effects on different neighborhoods.
papers.zh_title: Airbnb上的安全评论：一个信息故事
papers.zh_abstract: 消费者评论，尤其是表达对产品质量担忧的评论，对在线平台的可信度至关重要。然而，批评产品或服务的评论也可能劝阻买家使用平台，从而产生模糊关键评论可见性的潜在动机。利用Airbnb和美国五个主要城市的官方犯罪数据，我们发现，关于房源周边安全的评论和个人经历都会减少平台上的客人预订。反事实模拟表明，如果客人不相应调整信念，完全移除周边安全评论（VSR）可能会损害客人利益，并且这种移除可以增加Airbnb上的预订收入，并导致对先前有VSR房源的正面选择。相反，突出显示VSR会产生相反的效果。然而，如果客人在所有VSR被移除后对平均周边风险有理性预期，或者客人能够通过自己的周边安全经验学习足够长的时间，那么抑制VSR的动机可能会减弱。由于VSR与低收入和少数族裔社区的官方犯罪统计数据相关性更强，我们的发现表明，抑制或突出显示VSR将对不同社区产生不同影响。

papers.title: Perspectives on the Labor Share
papers.authors: Loukas Karabarbounis
papers.abstract: As of 2022, the share of U.S. income accruing to labor is at its lowest level since the Great Depression. Updating previous studies with more recent observations, I document the continuing decline of the labor share for the United States, other countries, and various industries. I discuss how changes in technology and product, labor, and capital markets affect the trend of the labor share. I also examine its relationship with other macroeconomic trends, such as rising markups, higher concentration of economic activity, and globalization. I conclude by offering some perspectives on the economic and policy implications of the labor share decline.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS；JEL：D2, D33, E0, J2
papers.zh_title: 劳动份额的视角
papers.zh_abstract: 截至2022年，美国收入中劳动所占份额处于大萧条以来的最低水平。通过用更近期的观察更新先前的研究，我记录了美国、其他国家以及各行业劳动份额的持续下降。我讨论了技术、产品市场、劳动力市场和资本市场的变化如何影响劳动份额的趋势。我还考察了其与其他宏观经济趋势的关系，例如加价上升、经济活动集中度提高以及全球化。最后，我就劳动份额下降的经济和政策影响提供了一些视角。

papers.title: A Year of Desirable Difficulties: The Impact of Interleaving Math Practice in Nigeria
papers.authors: Michael Kremer, Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Joost de Laat, Lotte van der Haar
papers.abstract: This paper tests whether increasing students’ exposure to “desirable difficulties” improves learning in real classrooms. In a year-long field experiment in Nigerian primary schools, interleaved math practice raised short-term test performance by 0.28 standard deviations but had no effect on cumulative end-of-year assessments. Gains were concentrated among lower-achieving students, while higher-achieving students saw little or no benefit. The results suggest that strategies that make learning more effortful can boost short-term mastery but may not produce durable improvements, highlighting the limits of applying laboratory-based cognitive interventions at scale.
papers.zh_title: 一年期的“理想困难”：尼日利亚数学交错练习的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文检验了增加学生对“理想困难”的接触是否能在真实课堂中改善学习。在尼日利亚小学进行的一项为期一年的实地实验中，交错数学练习将短期测试成绩提高了0.28个标准差，但对累积的年末评估没有影响。收益集中在成绩较低的学生中，而成绩较高的学生几乎没有受益。结果表明，使学习更加费力的策略可以提升短期掌握程度，但可能不会产生持久的改善，这凸显了将实验室认知干预大规模应用的局限性。

papers.title: A Framework for Geoeconomics
papers.authors: Christopher Clayton, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: Governments use their countries’ economic strength from financial and trade relationships to achieve geopolitical and economic goals. We provide a model of the sources of geoeconomic power and how it is wielded. The source of this power is the ability of a hegemonic country to coordinate threats across disparate economic relationships as a mean of enforcement on foreign entities. The hegemon wields this power to demand costly actions out of the targeted entities, including mark-ups, import restrictions, tariffs, and political concessions. The hegemon uses its power to change targeted entities’ activities to manipulate the global equilibrium in its favor and increase its power. A sector is strategic either in helping the hegemon form threats or in manipulating the world equilibrium via input-output amplification. The hegemon acts a global enforcer, thus adding value to the world economy, but destroys value by distorting the equilibrium in its favor.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME, POL；JEL：F02, F10, F5
papers.zh_title: 地缘经济学框架
papers.zh_abstract: 政府利用其国家在金融和贸易关系中的经济实力来实现地缘政治和经济目标。我们提供了一个模型，用以说明地缘经济权力的来源及其行使方式。这种权力的来源在于霸权国家能够协调跨越不同经济关系的威胁，以此作为对外国实体执行的手段。霸权国家运用这种权力要求目标实体采取代价高昂的行动，包括加价、进口限制、关税和政治让步。霸权国家利用其权力改变目标实体的活动，以操纵全球均衡使其自身受益并增强其权力。一个部门之所以具有战略性，要么是因为它有助于霸权国家形成威胁，要么是通过投入产出放大效应来操纵世界均衡。霸权国家充当全球执行者，从而为世界经济增加价值，但也通过扭曲均衡使其自身受益而破坏价值。

papers.title: Implications of Asset Market Data for Equilibrium Models of Exchange Rates
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Hanno Lustig, Jialu Sun
papers.abstract: We characterize the cyclicality and predictability of exchange rates without committing to a specific model of preferences, endowment or menu of traded assets. When investors can trade home and foreign currency risk-free bonds without frictions, the exchange rate conditionally appreciates in states of the world that are worse for home investors than foreign investors. We show that its unconditional counterpart can only be overturned if the deviations from U.I.P. are large and exchange rates are highly predictable, conditions that do not hold in the data. Thus, without frictions in bond markets, it is impossible to match the empirical exchange rate cyclicality (the Backus- Smith puzzle) and the deviations from U.I.P. (the Fama puzzle) as well as the lack of predictability (the Meese-Rogoff puzzle). To relax this trade-off, we need small Euler equation wedges consistent with a home currency bias, home bond convenience yields, or financial repression, but we do not need market segmentation.
papers.zh_title: 资产市场数据对汇率均衡模型的含义
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在不承诺特定偏好、禀赋或可交易资产菜单模型的情况下，刻画了汇率的周期性和可预测性。当投资者可以在无摩擦条件下交易本币和外币无风险债券时，汇率会在对本币投资者比对外币投资者更差的世界状态下条件性升值。我们表明，只有当无抛补利率平价偏离很大且汇率高度可预测时，其无条件对应关系才可能被推翻，而这些条件在数据中并不成立。因此，在没有债券市场摩擦的情况下，不可能同时匹配经验汇率周期性（巴克斯-史密斯之谜）、无抛补利率平价偏离（法玛之谜）以及缺乏可预测性（米斯-罗戈夫之谜）。为了放松这种权衡，我们需要与本国货币偏好、本国债券便利收益率或金融压抑相一致的小型欧拉方程楔子，但我们不需要市场分割。

papers.title: What about Japan?
papers.authors: Yi-Li Chien, Harold L. Cole, Hanno Lustig
papers.abstract: Over the last decade, the Japanese public sector has primarily borrowed at floating rates while investing in longer-duration risky assets, earning an annual return exceeding 6% of GDP above its funding costs. We quantify the impact of Japan’s low-rate policies on its government and households. The government duration mismatch expands fiscal space when real rates fall, helping the government fulfill promises to older households. A typical younger Japanese household does not have enough duration in its portfolio to continue to finance its spending plan and will be worse off. Low-rate policies tend to tax younger and less financially sophisticated households.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E63, F30
papers.zh_title: 日本呢？
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，日本公共部门主要以浮动利率借款，同时投资于期限更长的风险资产，其年化回报率超过其融资成本的6%的GDP。我们量化了日本低利率政策对其政府和家庭的影响。当实际利率下降时，政府的期限错配扩大了财政空间，帮助政府履行对老年家庭的承诺。一个典型的日本年轻家庭在其投资组合中没有足够的久期来继续为其支出计划提供资金，因此将变得更糟。低利率政策倾向于对年轻和金融知识较少的家庭征税。

papers.title: Policymakers' Uncertainty
papers.authors: Anna Cieslak, Stephen Hansen, Michael McMahon, Song Xiao
papers.abstract: Uncertainty is a ubiquitous concern emphasized by policymakers. We study how uncertainty affects decision-making by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC). We distinguish between the notion of Fed-managed uncertainty vis-a-vis uncertainty that emanates from within the economy and which the Fed takes as given. A simple theoretical framework illustrates how Fed-managed uncertainty introduces a wedge between the standard Taylor-type policy rule and the optimal decision. Using private Fed deliberations, we quantify the types of uncertainty the FOMC perceives and their effects on its policy stance. The FOMC's expressed inflation uncertainty strongly predicts a more hawkish policy stance that is not explained either by the Fed's macroeconomic forecasts or by public uncertainty proxies. We rationalize these results with a model of inflation tail risks and argue that the effect of uncertainty on the FOMC's decisions reflects policymakers' concern with maintaining credibility for the inflation anchor.
papers.zh_title: 政策制定者的不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 不确定性是政策制定者强调的一个普遍关注点。我们研究不确定性如何影响联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）的决策。我们区分了美联储管理的不确定性与源自经济内部且美联储视为给定的不确定性。一个简单的理论框架说明了美联储管理的不确定性如何在标准的泰勒型政策规则与最优决策之间引入一个楔子。利用美联储内部的审议记录，我们量化了FOMC感知到的不确定性类型及其对其政策立场的影响。FOMC表达的通货膨胀不确定性强烈预示着更鹰派的政策立场，而这种立场既不能用美联储的宏观经济预测来解释，也不能用公众不确定性代理变量来解释。我们用一个通胀尾部风险模型来合理化这些结果，并认为不确定性对FOMC决策的影响反映了政策制定者对维持通胀锚定可信度的担忧。

papers.title: The Active Role of the Natural Rate of Unemployment
papers.authors: Robert E. Hall, Marianna Kudlyak
papers.abstract: We propose that the natural rate of unemployment may have an active role in the business cycle, in contrast to a widespread view that the rate is fairly smooth and at most only weakly cyclical. We demonstrate that the tendency to treat the natural rate as near-constant would explain the surprisingly low slope of the Phillips curve. We observe that evidence is weak about this basic point—the evidence neither comes close to rejecting the conventional view nor does it reject a very different view in which fluctuations in the natural rate are associated with a substantial fraction of cyclical volatility. We show that the natural rate may have closely tracked the actual rate during the long recovery that began in 2009 and ended in 2019. We explain how the common finding of research in the Phillips-curve framework of low—often extremely low—response of inflation to unemployment could be the result of fairly close tracking of the natural rate and the actual rate in recoveries. Our interpretation of the data contrasts to that of many Phillips-curve studies, that conclude that inflation has little relation to unemployment.
papers.zh_title: 自然失业率的主动作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出自然失业率可能在商业周期中发挥主动作用，这与普遍认为该比率相当平滑且最多只有弱周期性的观点形成对比。我们证明，将自然失业率视为近乎恒定的趋势可以解释菲利普斯曲线斜率出奇地低的现象。我们观察到，关于这一基本点的证据很薄弱——这些证据既远未否定传统观点，也未否定一种截然不同的观点，即自然失业率的波动与周期性波动的很大一部分相关。我们表明，在始于2009年、结束于2019年的漫长复苏期间，自然失业率可能密切跟踪了实际失业率。我们解释了菲利普斯曲线框架研究中常见的发现——即通胀对失业的反应很低（通常极低）——可能是复苏期间自然失业率与实际失业率相当接近跟踪的结果。我们对数据的解释与许多菲利普斯曲线研究形成对比，后者得出结论认为通胀与失业关系不大。

papers.title: Spillover Effects at School: How Black Teachers affect their White Peers’ Racial Competency
papers.authors: Seth Gershenson, Constance A. Lindsay, Nicholas W. Papageorge, Romaine A. Campbell, Jessica H. Rendon
papers.abstract: Do white teachers learn racial competency from their Black peers? We answer this question using a mixed-methods approach. Longitudinal administrative data from North Carolina show that having a Black same-grade peer significantly improves the achievement and reduces the suspension rates of white teachers’ Black students. Open-ended interviews of North Carolina public school teachers reaffirm these findings. Broadly, our findings suggest that the positive impact of Black teachers’ ability to successfully teach Black students is not limited to their direct interaction with Black students but is augmented by spillover effects on early-career white teachers, likely through peer learning.
papers.zh_title: 学校的溢出效应：黑人教师如何影响其白人同行的种族能力
papers.zh_abstract: 白人教师是否从他们的黑人同行那里学习种族能力？我们使用混合方法回答这个问题。来自北卡罗来纳州的纵向行政数据显示，拥有一位同年级的黑人同行显著提高了白人教师所教黑人学生的成绩，并降低了其停学率。对北卡罗来纳州公立学校教师的开放式访谈再次证实了这些发现。总的来说，我们的发现表明，黑人教师成功教授黑人学生的能力的积极影响不仅限于他们与黑人学生的直接互动，而且通过对早期职业白人教师的溢出效应（可能通过同行学习）得到增强。

papers.title: Technology and Labor Displacement: Evidence from Linking Patents with Worker-Level Data
papers.authors: Leonid Kogan, Dimitris Papanikolaou, Lawrence D.W. Schmidt, Bryan Seegmiller
papers.abstract: We develop measures of labor-saving and labor-augmenting technology exposure using textual analysis of patents and job tasks. Using US administrative data, we show that exposure to labor-saving technologies negatively affects the earnings of exposed workers. This negative effect is pervasive across both blue- and white-collar workers and across workers of different ages or earnings relative to their peers. In contrast, labor-augmenting technologies have a heterogeneous impact on exposed workers. While the wage bill paid to affected groups rises, this increase is driven primarily by an increase in employment, while earnings rise for new entrants but decline for incumbent workers. This decline is primarily present among white-collar, older, and higher-paid workers, highlighting the importance of vintage-specific human capital. Last, we find positive spillovers of both types of innovation at the industry level, benefiting other workers in the same industry who are not directly exposed to these innovations.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E0, E01, J01, J23, J24, O3, O4
papers.zh_title: 技术与劳动力替代：来自将专利与工人层面数据关联的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用专利和工作任务的文本分析，开发了劳动节约型和劳动增强型技术暴露的衡量指标。利用美国行政数据，我们表明暴露于劳动节约型技术会对受影响工人的收入产生负面影响。这种负面影响在蓝领和白领工人中，以及在不同年龄或相对于同行的收入水平的工人中普遍存在。相比之下，劳动增强型技术对受影响工人产生异质性影响。虽然受影响群体的工资总额上升，但这种增长主要由就业增加驱动，而新进入者的收入上升，但现有工人的收入下降。这种下降主要存在于白领、年龄较大和收入较高的工人中，凸显了特定年份人力资本的重要性。最后，我们发现这两种类型的创新在行业层面都存在正向溢出效应，使同一行业中未直接暴露于这些创新的其他工人受益。

papers.title: Differences in How and Why Social Comparison and Real-Time Feedback Impact Resource Use: Evidence from a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Mark A. Andor, Lorenz Goette, Michael K. Price, Anna Schulze Tilling, Lukas Tomberg
papers.abstract: We compare the behavior and welfare effects of two popular interventions for resource conservation. The first intervention is social comparison reports (SC), which primarily provide consumers with information motivating behavioral change. The second intervention is real-time feedback (RTF), which primarily provides consumers with information facilitating behavioral change. In a field experiment with around 1,000 participants, we directly observe the interventions’ effects on participants’ behavior. Further, we elicit participants’ willingness to pay for receiving the interventions, both before and after having experienced them for one month. We find that SC leads to a reduction in water use per shower by 9.4%, RTF by 28.8%, and the combination (BOTH) by 35.0%. Our willingness to pay results show that all interventions are highly valued by participants and that willingness to pay for RTF and BOTH is significantly higher than for SC. Furthermore, we find that the valuation of the interventions do not change following one-month experience. Our results suggest that while both interventions improve welfare, providing consumers with information facilitating behavioral change achieves a higher impact and a slightly higher welfare increase than providing consumers with information motivating behavioral change.
papers.zh_title: 社会比较与实时反馈影响资源使用的差异：来自实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较了两种常见资源节约干预措施的行为和福利效应。第一种干预措施是社会比较报告（SC），主要向消费者提供激励行为改变的信息。第二种干预措施是实时反馈（RTF），主要向消费者提供促进行为改变的信息。在一项约有1000名参与者的实地实验中，我们直接观察了干预措施对参与者行为的影响。此外，我们还在参与者体验干预措施一个月前后，分别询问了他们为接受干预措施而支付的意愿。我们发现，SC使每次淋浴的用水量减少了9.4%，RTF减少了28.8%，两者结合（BOTH）减少了35.0%。我们的支付意愿结果显示，所有干预措施都受到参与者的高度重视，且对RTF和BOTH的支付意愿显著高于SC。此外，我们发现，经过一个月的体验后，参与者对干预措施的估值并未发生变化。我们的结果表明，虽然两种干预措施都改善了福利，但向消费者提供促进行为改变的信息比提供激励行为改变的信息能产生更大的影响和略高的福利提升。

papers.title: Do Two Wrongs Make a Right? Measuring the Effect of Publications on Science Careers
papers.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Carlos Zambrana, Patricia Oslund, Wan-Ying Chang
papers.abstract: This paper examines whether publication data matched to the Survey of Doctorate Recipients can be used for research purposes. We use Gold Standard data created to validate the publication match quality and compare these measures to publications assigned by a machine-learning algorithm developed by Thomson Reuters (now Clarivate). Our econometric model demonstrates that publications likely suffer from non-classical measurement error. Using horse race and instrumental variable models, we confirm that the Gold Standard data are relatively free from measurement error but show that the Clarivate data suffer from non-classical measurement error. We employ a variety of methods to adjust the Clarivate data for false negatives and false positives and demonstrate that with these adjustments the data produce estimates very similar to the Gold Standard. However, these adjustments are not as useful when publications are used as a dependent variable. We recommend using subsamples of the data that have better match quality when using the Clarivate data as a dependent variable.
papers.zh_title: 两个错误能否构成一个正确？衡量出版物对科学职业生涯的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了将出版物数据与博士获得者调查匹配后是否可用于研究目的。我们使用为验证出版物匹配质量而创建的金标准数据，并将这些指标与汤森路透（现科睿唯安）开发的机器学习算法分配的出版物进行比较。我们的计量经济学模型表明，出版物可能存在非经典测量误差。通过赛马模型和工具变量模型，我们确认金标准数据相对无测量误差，但显示科睿唯安数据存在非经典测量误差。我们采用多种方法调整科睿唯安数据中的假阴性和假阳性，并证明经过这些调整后，数据产生的估计值与金标准非常相似。然而，当出版物被用作因变量时，这些调整并不那么有用。我们建议在使用科睿唯安数据作为因变量时，使用匹配质量更好的数据子样本。

papers.title: Life and Death at the Margins of Society: The Mortality of the U.S. Homeless Population
papers.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Angela Wyse, Ilina Logani
papers.abstract: This paper examines the relationship between extreme socioeconomic disadvantage and poor health by providing the first detailed and accurate picture of mortality patterns among people experiencing homelessness in the U.S. Our analyses center on 140,000 people who were sheltered or unsheltered homeless during the 2010 Census, by far the largest sample ever used to study this population and the only sample designed to be nationally representative. These individuals, along with housed comparison groups, are linked to Social Security Administration data on all-cause mortality from 2010-2022 to estimate the magnitude of health disparities associated with homelessness. We find that non-elderly people experiencing homelessness have 3.5 times the mortality risk of those who are housed, accounting for differences in demographic characteristics and geography, and that a 40-year-old homeless person faces a similar mortality risk to a housed person nearly twenty years older. Our results reveal notable patterns in relative mortality risk by age, race, gender, and Hispanic ethnicity and suggest that within the homeless population, employment, higher incomes, and more extensive observed family connections are associated with lower mortality. The mortality hazard of homeless individuals rose by 33 percent during the COVID-19 pandemic, an increase that, while similar in proportional terms to the increase for the housed population, affected a much larger share of the homeless population due to their substantially elevated baseline mortality rate. These findings elucidate the persistent hardships associated with homelessness and show that the well-documented gradient between health and poverty persists into the extreme lower tail of socioeconomic disadvantage.
papers.zh_title: 社会边缘的生死：美国无家可归人口的死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过首次提供美国无家可归人群死亡率模式的详细准确描述，考察了极端社会经济劣势与健康状况不佳之间的关系。我们的分析聚焦于2010年人口普查期间约14万名有庇护或无庇护的无家可归者，这是迄今为止用于研究该人群的最大样本，也是唯一旨在具有全国代表性的样本。这些个体以及有住房的对照组，与社保管理局2010-2022年全因死亡率数据相关联，以估计与无家可归相关的健康差距程度。我们发现，在考虑人口特征和地理差异后，非老年无家可归者的死亡风险是有住房者的3.5倍，且一名40岁的无家可归者面临的死亡风险与一名年长近20岁的有住房者相似。我们的结果揭示了按年龄、种族、性别和西班牙裔划分的相对死亡风险的显著模式，并表明在无家可归人群中，就业、更高收入和更广泛的已知家庭联系与较低的死亡率相关。在COVID-19大流行期间，无家可归者的死亡风险上升了33%，这一比例增长虽然与有住房人群的比例增长相似，但由于无家可归者基线死亡率显著更高，因此影响了该人群中更大比例的人。这些发现阐明了与无家可归相关的持续困境，并表明健康与贫困之间已充分记录的梯度关系延伸到了社会经济劣势的极端低端。

papers.title: Designing Difference in Difference Studies With Staggered Treatment Adoption: Key Concepts and Practical Guidelines
papers.authors: Seth M. Freedman, Alex Hollingsworth, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing, Madeline Yozwiak
papers.abstract: Difference-in-Difference (DID) estimators are a valuable method for identifying causal effects in the public health researcher’s toolkit. A growing methods literature points out potential problems with DID estimators when treatment is staggered in adoption and varies with time. Despite this, no practical guide exists for addressing these new critiques in public health research. We illustrate these new DID concepts with step-by-step examples, code, and a checklist. We draw insights by comparing the simple 2 × 2 DID design (single treatment group, single control group, two time periods) with more complex cases: additional treated groups, additional time periods of treatment, and with treatment effects possibly varying over time. We outline newly uncovered threats to causal interpretation of DID estimates and the solutions the literature has proposed, relying on a decomposition that shows how the more complex DID are an average of simpler 2X2 DID sub-experiments.
papers.zh_title: 设计具有交错处理采纳的双重差分研究：关键概念与实践指南
papers.zh_abstract: 双重差分（DID）估计量是公共卫生研究人员工具箱中识别因果效应的宝贵方法。日益增长的方法学文献指出了当处理采纳交错且随时间变化时DID估计量的潜在问题。尽管如此，在公共卫生研究中尚无解决这些新批评的实用指南。我们通过逐步示例、代码和清单来说明这些新的DID概念。我们通过比较简单的2×2 DID设计（单一处理组、单一对照组、两个时间段）与更复杂的情况（额外的处理组、额外的处理时间段以及处理效应可能随时间变化）来获取见解。我们概述了新发现的DID估计因果解释的威胁以及文献提出的解决方案，这依赖于一个分解，该分解显示更复杂的DID是更简单的2×2 DID子实验的平均值。

papers.title: The Debauchery of Currency and Inflation: Chile, 1970-1973
papers.authors: Sebastian Edwards
papers.abstract: In this essay, I analyze Salvador Allende’s economic policies in Chile during the early 1970s. I argue that the explosion of inflation during his administration (above 1,500% on a six-month annualized measure) was predictable, and that the government’s response to it, through massive and strict price controls, generated acute macroeconomic imbalances. I postulate that the combination of runaway inflation, shortages, and black markets generated major disaffection among the middle class and that that unhappiness reduced the support for the Unidad Popular government.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：E31, E40, E52, F38, F42
papers.zh_title: 货币与通胀的堕落：智利，1970-1973
papers.zh_abstract: 在这篇文章中，我分析了萨尔瓦多·阿连德在20世纪70年代初期的智利经济政策。我认为，他执政期间通胀的爆发（按六个月年化衡量超过1500%）是可以预测的，而政府通过大规模且严格的价格管制对此做出的反应，导致了严重的宏观经济失衡。我假设，失控的通胀、短缺和黑市相结合，在中产阶级中引发了重大不满，这种不满情绪削弱了对人民团结政府（Unidad Popular）的支持。

papers.title: Long-term Care in Denmark
papers.authors: Mette Gørtz, Bent Jesper Christensen, Nabanita Datta Gupta
papers.abstract: The population is aging in Denmark, as in many other countries, due to increasing life expectancy and a low total fertility rate. This potentially puts the Danish welfare state under pressure. This paper discusses the demographic and socioeconomic situation of the elderly in Denmark, focusing on the health status and financial situation of the elderly, and the provision of long-term care (LTC). We rely on a combination of survey data, mainly from the Survey of Health and Retirement in Europe (SHARE), and high-quality register data covering the entire Danish population. We find that a large fraction of the elderly is in good health, but that those in the older age group, 85+, face considerably more functional limitations in daily living. One in three of the elderly receives some form of long-term care, and more than half the 85+ group. The paper further identifies a number of current challenges regarding organization of the long-term care sector, including recruitment of personnel for health care and LTC. Finally, the paper sheds light on the extent of informal care provided by family and friends. While informal care is offered voluntarily and is generally unpaid, it represents a substantial opportunity cost to society.
papers.zh_title: 丹麦的长期护理
papers.zh_abstract: 与许多其他国家一样，由于预期寿命延长和低总和生育率，丹麦人口正在老龄化。这可能给丹麦福利国家带来压力。本文讨论了丹麦老年人的人口和社会经济状况，重点关注老年人的健康状况、财务状况以及长期护理（LTC）的提供。我们依赖于调查数据（主要来自欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE））以及覆盖整个丹麦人口的高质量登记数据的组合。我们发现，很大一部分老年人健康状况良好，但85岁及以上的高龄群体在日常生活中的功能限制明显更多。三分之一的老年人接受某种形式的长期护理，而85岁及以上群体中这一比例超过一半。本文进一步指出了长期护理部门组织方面当前面临的若干挑战，包括医疗保健和长期护理人员的招聘。最后，本文揭示了家人和朋友提供的非正式护理的程度。虽然非正式护理是自愿提供且通常是无偿的，但它对社会构成了巨大的机会成本。

papers.title: Heterogeneous and Racialized Impacts of State Incarceration Policies on Birth Outcomes in the U.S.
papers.authors: Courtney Boen, Elizabeth Bair, Hedwig Lee, Atheendar Venkataramani
papers.abstract: While state incarceration policies have received much attention in research on the causes of mass incarceration in the U.S., their roles in shaping population health and health disparities remain largely unknown. We examine the impacts of two signature state incarceration policies adopted during the “tough on crime” era of the 1990s—three strikes and truth in sentencing—on Black and White birth outcomes. Using a difference-in-differences event study research design that models the dynamic impacts of these policies over time, we find that these policies had opposing effects on birth outcomes. We find that birth weight outcomes—including mean birth weight and low birth weight—for Black infants worsened markedly in the year three strikes policies were adopted. By contrast, birth outcomes for Black and White infants gradually improved after truth in sentencing policies were adopted. The discordant findings point to distinct, countervailing mechanisms by which sentencing policies can affect population health. We provide suggestive evidence that three strikes policies adversely impacted Black birth outcomes through affective mechanisms, by inducing highly racialized, stigmatizing public discourse around the time of policy adoption, while truth in sentencing likely impacted birth outcomes via material mechanisms, namely gradually reductions in community incarceration and crime rates. Altogether, these findings point to the need to further interrogate state criminal legal system policies for their impacts on population health, considering whether, how, and for whom these policies result in health impacts.
papers.zh_title: 美国州级监禁政策对出生结局的异质性和种族化影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管州级监禁政策在关于美国大规模监禁原因的研究中受到广泛关注，但它们在塑造人口健康和健康差异方面的作用仍然很大程度上未知。我们考察了20世纪90年代“严打犯罪”时代通过的两项标志性州级监禁政策——“三振出局法”和“真实量刑”——对黑人和白人出生结局的影响。使用一种模拟这些政策随时间动态影响的双重差分事件研究设计，我们发现这些政策对出生结局产生了相反的影响。我们发现，在“三振出局法”通过的那一年，黑人婴儿的出生体重结局——包括平均出生体重和低出生体重——显著恶化。相比之下，在“真实量刑”政策通过后，黑人和白人婴儿的出生结局逐渐改善。这些不一致的发现指向了量刑政策影响人口健康的独特且相互抵消的机制。我们提供了提示性证据，表明“三振出局法”通过情感机制对黑人出生结局产生了不利影响，即在政策通过前后引发了高度种族化、污名化的公共话语；而“真实量刑”可能通过物质机制影响出生结局，即社区监禁率和犯罪率逐渐降低。总的来说，这些发现表明，需要进一步审视州刑事法律体系政策对人口健康的影响，考虑这些政策是否、如何以及为谁带来了健康影响。

papers.title: Pandemic-Era Inflation Drivers and Global Spillovers
papers.authors: Julian di Giovanni, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Alvaro Silva, Muhammed A. Yildirim
papers.abstract: We develop a multi-country, multi-sector New Keynesian model to examine the drivers of global inflation during the pandemic and recovery periods. The model incorporates both country-sector-specific and aggregate shocks that propagate through international trade and production networks, leading to global demand-supply imbalances. Production complementarities raise non-labor costs, resulting in widespread sectoral cost-push inflation, even though the original negative labor supply shock is heterogeneous across country-sectors. Flexible exchange rate regimes absorb cross-country monetary policy differences, curbing global demand reallocation and the inflationary spillovers relative to fixed-rate regimes. The interaction of sectoral supply and aggregate demand shocks is the key to match the inflation experience of several countries, as the sectoral shocks spread through the global production network.
papers.zh_title: 疫情时期的通胀驱动因素与全球溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个多国、多部门的新凯恩斯模型，以考察疫情期间和复苏时期全球通胀的驱动因素。该模型包含了国家-部门特定的冲击和总体冲击，这些冲击通过国际贸易和生产网络传播，导致全球供需失衡。生产互补性提高了非劳动力成本，导致广泛的部门成本推动型通胀，尽管最初的负劳动力供给冲击在不同国家-部门间是异质的。与固定汇率制度相比，浮动汇率制度吸收了跨国货币政策差异，抑制了全球需求再配置和通胀溢出效应。部门供给冲击与总需求冲击的相互作用是匹配多个国家通胀经历的关键，因为部门冲击通过全球生产网络传播。

papers.title: The Extent of the Market for Early American Bank Notes
papers.authors: Howard Bodenhorn
papers.abstract: How far did antebellum bank notes travel? Up to now, we did not know. Using previously overlooked data on interbank holdings of bank notes and the records of a small-time note broker, I find that most bank notes circulated within about 50 miles of the issuing banks. Few notes were observed from as far as 200 miles away. Several studies of secondary markets for privately issued currencies assume that notes moved across vast geographic space, but these new findings suggest that we may need new models of bank note pricing and the efficiency of relatively unfettered markets in private currencies.
papers.zh_title: 美国早期银行券的市场范围
papers.zh_abstract: 内战前的银行券流通范围有多广？到目前为止，我们并不清楚。利用之前被忽视的银行间银行券持有数据以及一位小型票据经纪人的记录，我发现大多数银行券在距发行银行约50英里的范围内流通。很少有票据在远达200英里的地方被观察到。几项关于私人发行货币二级市场的研究假设票据跨越广阔的地理空间流动，但这些新发现表明，我们可能需要关于银行券定价以及相对不受约束的私人货币市场效率的新模型。

papers.title: Importing the Opioid Crisis? International Trade and Fentanyl Overdoses
papers.authors: Timothy J. Moore, William W. Olney, Benjamin Hansen
papers.abstract: The U.S. opioid crisis is now driven by fentanyl, a powerful synthetic opioid that currently accounts for 90% of all opioid deaths. Fentanyl is smuggled from abroad, with little evidence of how this happens. We find a positive relationship between state-level imports and drug overdoses, which is consistent with fentanyl smuggling occurring via legal trade flows. This relationship accounts for 14,000-20,000 deaths per year, and is not explained by geographic differences in “deaths of despair,” general demand for opioids, or import competition. Our results suggest that fentanyl smuggling via imports is pervasive and a key determinant of recent opioid problems.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, ITI, LE, PE；JEL：F1, F6, I1, K4
papers.zh_title: 进口阿片危机？国际贸易与芬太尼过量致死
papers.zh_abstract: 美国阿片危机目前由芬太尼驱动，这种强效合成阿片类药物目前占所有阿片类药物死亡人数的90%。芬太尼从国外走私入境，但关于其如何发生的证据很少。我们发现州级进口与药物过量之间存在正相关关系，这与芬太尼通过合法贸易流进行走私的情况一致。这种关系每年导致14,000至20,000人死亡，并且不能用“绝望之死”、对阿片类药物的普遍需求或进口竞争的地理差异来解释。我们的结果表明，通过进口走私芬太尼是普遍现象，并且是近期阿片问题的一个关键决定因素。

papers.title: Insurance Coverage and Provision of Opioid Treatment: Evidence from Medicare
papers.authors: Denis Agniel, Jonathan H. Cantor, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Kosali I. Simon, Erin Taylor
papers.abstract: Opioid overdose deaths in older adults increased substantially over the past two decades. This increase occurred despite the availability of effective treatments. Methadone, one of three medications approved for opioid use disorder (OUD) treatment, was not covered by Medicare — the primary insurer of older Americans — for OUD until 2020. We study the response of opioid treatment programs (OTPs), the only healthcare providers that can dispense methadone for OUD in the U.S., to this policy change using administrative data and a difference-in-differences framework. We examine provider acceptance of Medicare payment and the number of treatment episodes, before and after the policy change, in OTPs relative to other substance use disorder treatment facilities. Our findings show a surge in Medicare acceptance by OTPs and an increase in the number of treatment episodes post-policy, signalling the importance of insurance for OUD treatment provision.
papers.zh_title: 保险覆盖与阿片类药物治疗的提供：来自医疗保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，老年人因阿片类药物过量死亡的人数大幅增加。尽管存在有效的治疗方法，这一增长仍然发生。美沙酮是获批用于治疗阿片类药物使用障碍的三种药物之一，但直到2020年，医疗保险——美国老年人的主要保险机构——才将其纳入阿片类药物使用障碍治疗的覆盖范围。我们利用行政数据和双重差分框架，研究了阿片类药物治疗项目——美国唯一可以配发美沙酮用于治疗阿片类药物使用障碍的医疗服务提供者——对这一政策变化的反应。我们考察了在政策变化前后，阿片类药物治疗项目相对于其他物质使用障碍治疗机构，在提供者接受医疗保险支付以及治疗次数方面的变化。我们的研究结果显示，政策实施后，阿片类药物治疗项目接受医疗保险的比例激增，治疗次数也有所增加，这表明保险对于阿片类药物使用障碍治疗的提供至关重要。

papers.title: Ten Facts about Son Preference in India
papers.authors: Seema Jayachandran
papers.abstract: This article discusses son preference in India, including both greater investment in sons and the fertility preference for sons. Regarding differential investment, I focus on child health and show that gender gaps in inputs and outcomes have narrowed in recent years. Nonetheless, girls remain disadvantaged in important ways, and making health services free is unlikely to be enough to close these remaining gaps. In addition to gender gaps, there are also stark health gaps between eldest sons, whom parents favor, and other sons. Fertility preferences likewise center on eldest sons. The desire to have at least one son — who can fill that eldest son role in the family — drives the skewed sex ratio, and this preference shows little sign of abating. In fact, the downward trend in family size is exacerbating how the desire for a son translates into sex-selection. Families’ quest for a son also imposes collateral damage on sisters’ health. The policy challenge, particularly around reducing the desire for sons, is large. Empowering women is not a panacea, and offering financial incentives to have daughters risks further concentrating girls in poorer families. While we do not know which policies will erase the disadvantages girls face, some that might advance this goal are public pensions as an alternative to old-age support from sons, increased delivery of health services through schools, and norm-change interventions that aim to increase the intrinsic value that Indian families place on girls.
papers.zh_title: 关于印度重男轻女偏好的十个事实
papers.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了印度的重男轻女偏好，包括对儿子更多的投资以及对儿子的生育偏好。关于差异化投资，我重点关注儿童健康，并表明投入和结果方面的性别差距近年来已经缩小。尽管如此，女孩在某些重要方面仍然处于不利地位，而让医疗服务免费不太可能足以弥合这些剩余的差距。除了性别差距之外，父母偏爱的长子与其他儿子之间也存在明显的健康差距。生育偏好同样集中在长子身上。拥有至少一个儿子——能够承担家庭中长子角色的儿子——的愿望导致了失衡的性别比例，而且这种偏好几乎没有减弱的迹象。事实上，家庭规模下降的趋势正在加剧生儿子的愿望如何转化为性别选择。家庭对儿子的追求也对姐妹的健康造成了附带损害。政策挑战，特别是在减少生儿子愿望方面，是巨大的。赋予女性权力并非万能药，而为生女儿提供经济激励则有风险，会使女孩进一步集中在较贫困的家庭。虽然我们不知道哪些政策能够消除女孩面临的不利因素，但一些可能推进这一目标的政策包括：提供公共养老金作为儿子赡养父母的替代方案，通过学校增加提供医疗服务，以及旨在提高印度家庭对女孩内在价值的规范改变干预措施。

papers.title: Long-term Care Around the World
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Kathleen M. McGarry, Charles Hanzel
papers.abstract: The developed world is in the midst of an enormous demographic transition, with life expectancy increasing and fertility falling, leading to a rapid aging of the population. This trend has critical implications for long-term care around the world. This paper serves as the introduction to a volume that brings together experts from ten countries to compare long term care systems. We find a number of important similarities: only a minority of those elderly receiving assistance rely solely on formal care (i.e. care in an institution or through paid home care) while the majority of care is provided informally by family or other unpaid caregivers; without public support, the cost of long-term care would be beyond the financial means of a large fraction of the elderly in each country, particularly for the oldest and most disabled; and the public sector bears the majority of the costs of formal long-term care in every country. There are, however, important differences across countries, particularly in the extent to which formal care is delivered in institutions or at home, and in the division between the use of formal and informal care. Given the importance of informal care across all countries studied, we conclude that any estimate of the social costs of long-term care must account for the implicit costs of informal care. In undertaking such an evaluation of informal care, we find that it comprises at least one-third of all long-term care spending for all countries studied, with an average portion of nearly fifty percent.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：H4, I10, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 全球长期照护
papers.zh_abstract: 发达国家正处于一场巨大的人口结构转型之中，预期寿命延长而生育率下降，导致人口迅速老龄化。这一趋势对全球长期照护具有关键影响。本文作为一本汇集了来自十个国家的专家以比较长期照护体系的著作的引言。我们发现了一些重要的相似之处：在接受援助的老年人中，只有少数人完全依赖正式照护（即在机构中照护或通过付费家庭照护），而大多数照护是由家人或其他无偿照护者提供的非正式照护；如果没有公共支持，长期照护的费用将超出每个国家大部分老年人的经济能力，尤其是最年长和残疾程度最重的人群；在每个国家，公共部门承担了正式长期照护的大部分费用。然而，各国之间存在重要差异，特别是在正式照护是在机构中还是在家庭中提供的程度，以及正式照护与非正式照护使用之间的划分方面。鉴于非正式照护在所有被研究国家中的重要性，我们得出结论，任何对长期照护社会成本的估算都必须考虑非正式照护的隐性成本。在对非正式照护进行此类评估时，我们发现，在所有被研究国家中，它至少占长期照护总支出的三分之一，平均比例接近百分之五十。

papers.title: Long-term Care in the United States
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Kathleen M. McGarry
papers.abstract: The population of the United States, as with the rest of the world, is aging rapidly, with the most rapid growth occurring among the age 85 and older population, those who rely most on long-term care. In this chapter, we review the delivery and financing of long-term care in the U.S. We show that the resources of most elderly in the U.S. are insufficient to finance these ongoing long-term care needs and the public sector finances the majority of long-term care spending. At the same time, informal care plays a critical role, with the elderly at every age and every disability level receiving informal care more frequently than formal care. Indeed, when properly valued, informal care accounts for more than one-third of the nearly 2 percent of U.S. GDP devoted to long-term care.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：H4, H50, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 美国的长期照护
papers.zh_abstract: 美国人口与世界其他地区一样正在迅速老龄化，增长最快的是85岁及以上人口，他们是最依赖长期照护的群体。在本章中，我们回顾了美国长期照护的提供和融资情况。我们表明，美国大多数老年人的资源不足以支付这些持续的长期照护需求，而公共部门为大部分长期照护支出提供了资金。同时，非正式照护发挥着关键作用，每个年龄和每个残疾水平的老年人接受非正式照护的频率都高于正式照护。事实上，如果进行适当估值，非正式照护占美国GDP近2%的长期照护支出的三分之一以上。

papers.title: The Power of Proximity to Coworkers
papers.authors: Natalia Emanuel, Emma Harrington, Amanda Pallais
papers.abstract: How does proximity to coworkers affect training and productivity? We study software engineers at a Fortune 500 firm from 2019 to 2024, leveraging two shocks to proximity: (i) the office closures in 2020 and (ii) the subsequent return-to-office mandates in 2022 and 2023. In both cases, co-located teams experienced bigger changes in proximity than distributed ones, facilitating difference-in-differences designs. We find that sitting near teammates increases coding feedback by 18.3% and improves code quality. Gains are concentrated among less-tenured and younger employees, who are building human capital. However, there is a tradeoff: experienced engineers write less code when sitting near teammates. In national US data, we find evidence that the rise of remote work has had scarring effects on young college graduates. In remotable jobs, young graduates’ unemployment rate increased relative to older graduates’ post-pandemic (2022−2024) compared to pre-pandemic (2017−2019), a pattern we do not observe in non-remotable jobs.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：J16, J24, M15, M53, M54, O33, R23
papers.zh_title: 与同事邻近的力量
papers.zh_abstract: 与同事的邻近程度如何影响培训和生产力？我们研究了2019年至2024年间一家财富500强公司的软件工程师。我们利用了两次对同地办公的冲击：（i）2020年的办公室关闭和（ii）随后的重返办公室要求。在这两种情况下，同地办公的团队比分散的团队经历了更大的邻近性变化，这有助于进行双重差分设计。我们发现，坐在队友附近可使编码反馈增加18.3%，并提高代码质量。收益集中在资历较浅和较年轻的员工身上，他们正在积累人力资本。然而，存在一个权衡：经验丰富的工程师在坐在同事附近时编写的代码较少。在全美数据中，我们发现了暗示性证据，表明远程工作的兴起对年轻大学毕业生产生了疤痕效应：在可远程的工作中，他们的失业率相对于年长毕业生仍然较高，而这种模式在不可远程的工作中并未出现。

papers.title: Supply and Demand and the Term Structure of Interest Rates
papers.authors: Robin Greenwood, Samuel Hanson, Dimitri Vayanos
papers.abstract: We survey the growing literature emphasizing the role that supply-and-demand forces play in shaping the term structure of interest rates. Our starting point is the Vayanos and Vila (2009, 2021) model of the term structure of default-free bond yields, which we present in both discrete and continuous time. The key friction in the model is that the bond market is partially segmented from other financial markets: the prices of short-rate and bond supply risk are set by specialized bond arbitrageurs who must absorb shocks to the supply and demand for bonds from other “preferred-habitat” agents. We discuss extensions of this model in the context of default-free bonds and other asset classes.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, E40, E49, E52, E7, G02, G1, G10, G11, G12
papers.zh_title: 供给与需求及利率期限结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们综述了日益增长的文献，这些文献强调了供需力量在塑造利率期限结构中的作用。我们的出发点是Vayanos和Vila（2009, 2021）的无违约债券收益率期限结构模型，我们以离散时间和连续时间两种形式呈现该模型。模型中的关键摩擦在于债券市场与其他金融市场部分分割：短期利率和债券供给风险的价格由专门的债券套利者设定，他们必须吸收来自其他“偏好栖息地”代理人的债券供给和需求冲击。我们讨论了该模型在无违约债券和其他资产类别背景下的扩展。

papers.title: Recent Developments in Financial Risk and the Real Economy
papers.authors: Ian Dew-Becker, Stefano Giglio
papers.abstract: This paper reviews recent developments in macro and finance on the relationship between financial risk and the real economy. We focus on three specific topics: the term structure of uncertainty, time variation - and specifically the long-term decline - in the variance risk premium, and time variation in conditional skewness. We also introduce two new data series: implied volatility from one-day options on grains for the period 1906-1936, and on cliquet options, which provide insurance against single-day crashes on the S&P 500, both of which give some context to the recent rise in trade in extremely short-dated options. Finally, we discuss new avenues for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DAE, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E10, G10, G12, G13, N1, N2
papers.zh_title: 金融风险与实体经济的最新发展
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了宏观经济学和金融学中关于金融风险与实体经济关系的最新发展。我们关注三个具体主题：不确定性的期限结构、方差风险溢价的时间变化——特别是长期下降，以及条件偏度的时间变化。我们还介绍了两个新的数据序列：1906年至1936年期间谷物一日期权的隐含波动率，以及为标普500指数单日暴跌提供保险的棘轮期权的隐含波动率，这两者都为近期极短期期权交易的兴起提供了一些背景。最后，我们讨论了未来研究的新方向。

papers.title: Combinatorial Discrete Choice: Theory and Application to Multinational Production
papers.authors: Costas Arkolakis, Fabian Eckert, Rowan Shi
papers.abstract: Discrete choice problems with complementarities among options quickly grow infeasible to solve, since they generically require evaluating all combinations of choices. We develop a solution method that applies whenever choices are weakly complementary or substitutable, using the implied choice monotonicity to discard suboptimal combinations without computing their payoff. It is orders of magnitude faster than existing approaches, finds the global solution, and extends to heterogeneous-agent settings. Using our method, we calibrate a general equilibrium model of multinational firms selecting global production locations to show that complementarities among locations can amplify, dampen, or even reverse the welfare gains from multinational production.
papers.zh_title: 组合离散选择：理论与跨国生产应用
papers.zh_abstract: 具有选项间互补性的离散选择问题会迅速变得难以求解，因为通常需要评估所有选择组合。我们开发了一种适用于选项呈弱互补或弱替代关系的求解方法，利用隐含的选择单调性来剔除次优组合，而无需计算其收益。该方法比现有方法快数个数量级，能够找到全局最优解，并可扩展至异质性主体设定。利用该方法，我们校准了一个跨国企业选择全球生产地点的一般均衡模型，以展示地点间的互补性可能放大、减弱甚至逆转跨国生产带来的福利收益。

papers.title: International Trade Responses to Labor Market Regulations
papers.authors: Mathilde Muñoz
papers.abstract: This paper studies how differences in labor market regulations shape countries' comparative advantage in the cross-border provision of labor-intensive services, using administrative data in Europe for the last two decades. I exploit exogenous variation in labor taxes and minimum wages faced by exporting firms engaged in a large European trade program. Firms from different countries compete to supply the same physical service in the same location but their employees are subject to different payroll taxes and minimum wages. These rules varied across countries, sectors, and over time. Reduced-form country case-studies as well as model-implied gravity estimates show evidence of large trade responses to lower labor taxes and minimum wages, with an elasticity that is around one. The Bolkestein directive, by exempting foreign firms from all labor regulations in the destination country, would have doubled exports of physical services from Eastern European countries, rationalizing the wave of protests in high-wage countries that led to the withdrawal of the proposal.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：F14, H25, J23, J31, J8
papers.zh_title: 国际贸易对劳动力市场规制的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用欧洲过去二十年的行政数据，研究劳动力市场规制的差异如何塑造各国在跨境提供劳动密集型服务方面的比较优势。我利用参与大型欧洲贸易计划的出口企业所面临的劳动税和最低工资的外生变化。来自不同国家的企业在同一地点竞争提供相同的实体服务，但其雇员需遵守不同的工资税和最低工资标准。这些规则因国家、行业和时间而异。简化形式的国别案例研究以及模型隐含的引力估计显示，贸易对较低的劳动税和最低工资有显著反应，弹性约为1。博尔克斯坦指令通过豁免外国企业在目的地国的所有劳动法规，将使东欧国家的实体服务出口翻倍，这解释了高工资国家导致该提案撤回的抗议浪潮。

papers.title: The Economics of Long-Term Care in Canada
papers.authors: Kevin S. Milligan, Tammy Schirle
papers.abstract: This paper contributes a broad overview of the Canadian long-term care system. Taking an economist’s viewpoint, we bring together supply and demand factors to provide an economic analysis of the current and future path for long-term care. Like other OECD countries, the coming demographic wave of older baby boomers will put tremendous stress on the existing financial, organizational, and physical structures of the long-term care system. Unlike other OECD countries, Canada’s system is organized almost entirely at the subnational level, with provinces and territories having by far the largest role in financing and regulating long-term care. We provide institutional and empirical details on the evolution and future of Canada's long-term care system.
papers.zh_title: 加拿大长期护理的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对加拿大长期护理体系进行了广泛概述。从经济学家的视角出发，我们整合供需因素，对长期护理的现状和未来路径进行经济分析。与其他经合组织国家一样，即将到来的婴儿潮一代老龄化浪潮将给长期护理体系现有的财务、组织和物理结构带来巨大压力。与其他经合组织国家不同，加拿大的体系几乎完全在次国家级层面组织，各省和地区在长期护理的融资和监管中扮演着迄今为止最重要的角色。我们提供了关于加拿大长期护理体系演变和未来的制度与实证细节。

papers.title: Late Bloomers: The Aggregate Implications of Getting Education Later in Life
papers.authors: Zsófia L. Bárány, Moshe Buchinsky, Pauline Corblet
papers.abstract: It is generally agreed upon that most individuals who acquire a college degree do so in their early 20s. Despite this consensus, we show that in the US from the 1930 birth cohort onwards a large fraction – around 20% – of college graduates obtained their degree after age 30. We explore the implications of this phenomenon. First, we show that these so-called late bloomers have significantly contributed to the narrowing of gender and racial gaps in the college share, despite the general widening of the racial gap. Second, late bloomers are responsible for more than half of the increase in the aggregate college share from 1960 onwards. Finally, we show that the returns to having a college degree vary depending on the age at graduation. Ignoring the existence of late bloomers therefore leads to a significant underestimation of the returns to college education for those finishing college in their early 20s.
papers.zh_title: 大器晚成者：晚年接受教育的总体影响
papers.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为，大多数获得大学学位的人是在20岁出头完成的。尽管存在这一共识，我们表明，在美国从1930年出生队列开始，很大一部分——约20%——的大学毕业生在30岁之后才获得学位。我们探讨了这一现象的影响。首先，我们表明，这些所谓的大器晚成者显著促进了大学学历占比中性别和种族差距的缩小，尽管种族差距总体上在扩大。其次，大器晚成者贡献了自1960年以来大学学历占比总增长的一半以上。最后，我们表明，拥有大学学位的回报因毕业年龄而异。因此，忽视大器晚成者的存在会导致严重低估那些在20岁出头完成大学教育者的大学教育回报。

papers.title: The Environmental Impacts of Protected Area Policy
papers.authors: Mathias Reynaert, Eduardo A. Souza-Rodrigues, Arthur A. van Benthem
papers.abstract: The world has pledged to protect 30 percent of its land and waters by 2030 to halt the rapid deterioration of critical ecosystems. We summarize the state of knowledge about the impacts of protected area policies, with a focus on deforestation and vegetation cover. We discuss critical issues around data and measurement, identify the most commonly-used empirical methods, and summarize empirical evidence across multiple regions of the world. In most cases, protection has had at most a modest impact on forest cover, with stronger effects in areas that face pressure of economic development. We then identify several open areas for research to advance our understanding of the effectiveness of protected area policies: the use of promising recent econometric advancements, shifting focus to direct measures of biodiversity, filling the knowledge gap on the effect of protected area policy in advanced economies, investigating the long-run impacts of protection, and understanding its equilibrium effects.
papers.zh_title: 保护区政策的环境影响
papers.zh_abstract: 世界已承诺到2030年保护其30%的陆地和水域，以遏制关键生态系统的快速退化。我们总结了关于保护区政策影响的知识现状，重点关注森林砍伐和植被覆盖。我们讨论了围绕数据和测量的关键问题，识别了最常用的实证方法，并总结了全球多个地区的实证证据。在大多数情况下，保护对森林覆盖的影响最多是适度的，在面临经济发展压力的地区效果更强。然后，我们确定了几个开放的研究领域，以增进我们对保护区政策有效性的理解：利用有前景的最新计量经济学进展，将重点转向生物多样性的直接衡量，填补保护区政策在发达经济体效果的认知空白，研究保护的长期影响，以及理解其均衡效应。

papers.title: A Model of Behavioral Manipulation
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Ali Makhdoumi, Azarakhsh Malekian, Asuman Ozdaglar
papers.abstract: We build a model of online behavioral manipulation driven by AI advances. A platform dynamically offers one of n products to a user who slowly learns product quality. User learning depends on a product’s “glossiness,’ which captures attributes that make products appear more attractive than they are. AI tools enable platforms to learn glossiness and engage in behavioral manipulation. We establish that AI benefits consumers when glossiness is short-lived. In contrast, when glossiness is long-lived, users suffer because of behavioral manipulation. Finally, as the number of products increases, the platform can intensify behavioral manipulation by presenting more low-quality, glossy products.
papers.zh_title: 行为操纵模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个由人工智能进步驱动的在线行为操纵模型。一个平台动态地向一个缓慢学习产品质量的用户提供n种产品中的一种。用户学习取决于产品的“光泽度”，这捕捉了使产品看起来比实际更具吸引力的属性。人工智能工具使平台能够学习光泽度并进行行为操纵。我们确定，当光泽度是短期存在时，人工智能对消费者有利。相反，当光泽度长期存在时，用户因行为操纵而遭受损失。最后，随着产品数量的增加，平台可以通过呈现更多低质量、高光泽度的产品来加强行为操纵。

papers.title: Geographic Variation in Cesarean Sections in the United States: Trends, Correlates, and Other Interesting Facts
papers.authors: Sarah Robinson, Heather Royer, David Silver
papers.abstract: Analyzing data spanning three decades covering the near universe of births, we study county-level differences in Cesarean section (C-section) rates among first-time mothers of singleton births. Our research reveals persistent geographic variation in C- section rates for both low- and high-risk groups. Counties with elevated C-section rates consistently perform more C-sections across mothers at all levels of appropriateness for the procedure. These elevated rates of C-section in high C-section counties are associated with reduced maternal and infant morbidity. We also find that C-section decisions are less responsive to underlying risks for Black mothers relative to white mothers, suggesting potential welfare-reducing disparities.
papers.zh_title: 美国剖宫产率的地理差异：趋势、相关因素及其他有趣事实
papers.zh_abstract: 通过分析涵盖近三十年、覆盖几乎所有出生人口的数据，我们研究了首次单胎分娩母亲中剖宫产率的县级差异。我们的研究揭示了低风险和高风险群体中剖宫产率持续存在的地理差异。剖宫产率较高的县，在所有手术适宜性水平的母亲中，始终进行更多的剖宫产。这些高剖宫产率县中较高的剖宫产率与较低的母婴发病率相关。我们还发现，相对于白人母亲，黑人母亲的剖宫产决策对潜在风险的响应程度较低，这表明存在可能降低福利的差异。

papers.title: Automation: Theory, Evidence, and Outlook
papers.authors: Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: This article reviews the literature on automation and its impact on labor markets, wages, factor shares, and productivity. I first introduce the task model and explain why this framework offers a compelling way to think about recent labor market trends and the effects of automation technologies. The task model clarifies that automation technologies operate by substituting capital for labor in a widening range of tasks. This substitution reduces costs, creating a positive productivity effect, but also reduces employment opportunities for workers displaced from automated tasks, creating a negative displacement effect. I survey the empirical literature and conclude that there is wide qualitative support for the implications of task models and the displacement effects of automation. I conclude by discussing shortcomings of the existing literature and avenues for future research.
papers.zh_title: 自动化：理论、证据与展望
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于自动化及其对劳动力市场、工资、要素份额和生产率影响的文献。我首先介绍了任务模型，并解释了为什么该框架为思考近期劳动力市场趋势和自动化技术的影响提供了一种令人信服的方式。任务模型阐明，自动化技术通过在一系列日益扩大的任务中用资本替代劳动来运作。这种替代降低了成本，产生了正面的生产率效应，但也减少了从自动化任务中流离失所的工人的就业机会，产生了负面的替代效应。我调查了实证文献，并得出结论，任务模型的含义和自动化的替代效应得到了广泛的定性支持。最后，我讨论了现有文献的不足之处和未来研究的途径。

papers.title: Contingent Credit Under Stress
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Maximilian Jager, Sascha Steffen
papers.abstract: Over the past two decades, banks have increasingly focused on offering contingent credit in the form of credit lines as a primary means of corporate borrowing. We review the existing body of research regarding the rationales for banks’ provision of liquidity insurance in the form of credit lines, their significance in managing corporate liquidity, and the reasons and circumstances under which firms opt to utilize them. We emphasize that the options for firms to both draw down and repay credit lines are put options issued by banks, which are exercised by firms in a correlated manner during periods of widespread stress, with adverse affects on bank intermediation thereafter. We discuss the bank capital and the bank funding channels that can drive these effects, contrasting their roles during the Global Financial Crisis and the Covid-19 outbreak. We conclude by discussing the increasing extension of bank credit lines to non-bank financial intermediaries, as well as the role of stress tests and monetary policy in managing the risks of contingent credit under stress.
papers.zh_title: 压力下的应急信贷
papers.zh_abstract: 过去二十年中，银行日益将提供信贷额度形式的应急信贷作为企业借贷的主要手段。我们回顾了现有研究，涉及银行以信贷额度形式提供流动性保险的理由、其在管理企业流动性中的重要性，以及企业选择使用信贷额度的原因和情境。我们强调，企业提取和偿还信贷额度的选择权是银行发行的看跌期权，在广泛压力时期企业会以相关方式行使这些期权，随后对银行中介产生不利影响。我们讨论了可能导致这些影响的银行资本和银行融资渠道，对比了它们在全球金融危机和新冠疫情爆发期间的作用。最后，我们讨论了银行信贷额度向非银行金融中介的日益扩展，以及压力测试和货币政策在管理压力下应急信贷风险中的作用。

papers.title: Cost-Sharing in Medical Care Can Increase Adult Mortality: Evidence from Colombia
papers.authors: Giancarlo Buitrago, Javier Amaya-Nieto, Grant Miller, Marcos Vera-Hernández
papers.abstract: There is substantial evidence that cost-sharing in medical care constrains total health spending. However, there is relatively little (and unclear) evidence on its health effects, particularly in low- and middle-income countries. This paper re-evaluates the link between outpatient cost-sharing and health, studying Colombia’s entire formal sector workforce observed monthly between 2011 and 2018 with individual-level health care utilization records linked to payroll data and vital statistics. Because Colombia’s national health system imposes discrete breaks in outpatient cost-sharing requirements across the earnings distribution, we estimate a dynamic regression discontinuity model, finding that greater outpatient cost-sharing initially reduces use of outpatient care (including consultations and drugs), resulting in fewer diagnoses of common chronic diseases – and over time, increases the prevalence and severity of chronic diseases as well as use of inpatient care. Ultimately, greater outpatient cost-sharing measurably increases mortality, raising 8-year mortality by 4 deaths per 10,000 individuals. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first to show a relationship between cost-sharing and adult mortality risk in a low- or middle-income country, a relationship important to incorporate into social welfare analyses of cost-sharing policies.
papers.zh_title: 医疗费用分摊可能增加成人死亡率：来自哥伦比亚的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 有大量证据表明，医疗费用分摊会限制总医疗支出。然而，关于其对健康影响的证据相对较少且不明确，尤其是在中低收入国家。本文重新评估了门诊费用分摊与健康之间的联系，研究了2011年至2018年间每月观察到的哥伦比亚整个正规部门劳动力，并将个人层面的医疗保健利用记录与工资数据和生命统计数据相关联。由于哥伦比亚的国家卫生系统在收入分布上对门诊费用分摊要求设置了离散断点，我们估计了一个动态断点回归模型，发现更高的门诊费用分摊最初会减少门诊护理的使用（包括咨询和药物），导致常见慢性病的诊断减少——随着时间的推移，慢性病的患病率和严重程度以及住院护理的使用都会增加。最终，更高的门诊费用分摊显著增加了死亡率，使8年死亡率每万人增加4例。据我们所知，这项研究首次显示了中低收入国家费用分摊与成人死亡风险之间的关系，这一关系对于将费用分摊政策纳入社会福利分析至关重要。

papers.title: Risk-On Risk-Off: A Multifaceted Approach to Measuring Global Investor Risk Aversion
papers.authors: Anusha Chari, Karlye Dilts Stedman, Christian Lundblad
papers.abstract: This paper defines risk-on risk-off (RORO), an elusive terminology in pervasive use, as the variation in global investor risk aversion. Our high-frequency RORO index captures time-varying investor risk appetite across multiple dimensions: advanced economy credit risk, equity market volatility, funding conditions, and currency dynamics. The index exhibits risk-off skewness and pronounced fat tails, suggesting its amplifying potential for extreme, destabilizing events. Compared with the conventional VIX measure, the RORO index reflects the multifaceted nature of risk, underscoring the diverse provenance of investor risk sentiment. Practical applications of the RORO index highlight its significance for international portfolio reallocation and return predictability.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：F21, F31, F36, G11, G15, G17
papers.zh_title: 风险偏好切换：衡量全球投资者风险厌恶的多维度方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将广泛使用但难以捉摸的术语“风险偏好切换”（RORO）定义为全球投资者风险厌恶程度的变化。我们的高频RORO指数从多个维度捕捉投资者风险偏好的时变特征：发达经济体信用风险、股票市场波动性、融资条件和货币动态。该指数表现出风险规避偏态和显著的厚尾特征，表明其具有放大极端、不稳定事件的潜力。与传统的VIX指标相比，RORO指数反映了风险的多面性，强调了投资者风险情绪来源的多样性。RORO指数的实际应用凸显了其对国际投资组合再配置和回报可预测性的重要意义。

papers.title: Human Capital Consequences of Expanding the Supply of Higher Education Institutions in a Developing Country
papers.authors: Noemí Katzkowicz, Victor Lavy, Martina Querejeta, Tatiana Rosá
papers.abstract: Limited post-secondary education infrastructure and opportunities partly explain low higher education attainment in developing countries. This paper estimates the effect of a program that expanded higher education by constructing numerous university campuses across Uruguay. Exploiting temporal and geographic variation in the program’s rollout, we use a dynamic two-way fixed-effects design and comprehensive administrative records to estimate the program’s causal impact. By reducing the distance to the nearest campus, the program increased university enrollment by 34 percent relative to baseline, with especially large gains among less-privileged, first-generation students. Spillovers extend up to 30 kilometers from new campuses, with effects concentrated among students from less-educated families, thereby reducing spatial inequality. We also find that university expansion increased secondary-school enrollment and completion, a relevant result given that low secondary school completion rates remain one of the main barriers to higher education. These improvements occurred without lowering tertiary completion rates. A cost-effectiveness analysis reveals substantial private and social returns, with costs comparable to those of a scholarship program, while reducing spatial inequalities. Overall, the findings suggest that place-based expansion of higher education can reduce spatial inequalities and foster intergenerational mobility in developing countries cost-effectively.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：D63, I23, I28, J16

papers.title: New Views Of Structural Transformation: Insights From Recent Literature
papers.authors: Douglas Gollin, Joseph P. Kaboski
papers.abstract: This paper describes an emerging literature in economics that aims to merge macro issues of structural change and growth with micro data and analysis. This literature focuses on a set of related patterns of change that accompany the processes of growth and development. Traditionally, the focus has been on industrialization – and more broadly the reallocation of employment and economic activity from agriculture to manufacturing and services. The new literature considers a broader set of transformations: from rural to urban, from home to market (and from market to home), from informal to formal, and from self-employment to wage work. Drawing on new data sources, including micro data and administrative records, the literature tries to understand the complex interactions of a broad set of market failures, policy distortions, and impediments to the growth process. In broadening the understanding of structural transformation – to encompass processes beyond industrialization – this literature opens the door to a richer understanding of the processes of growth and a wider set of potential levers for policy.
papers.zh_title: 结构转型的新视角：来自近期文献的见解
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了经济学中一个新兴的文献领域，旨在将结构变化和增长的宏观问题与微观数据和分析相结合。该文献关注伴随增长和发展过程的一系列相关变化模式。传统上，重点一直放在工业化上——更广泛地说，是就业和经济活动从农业向制造业和服务业的重新配置。新文献考虑了一系列更广泛的转型：从农村到城市、从家庭到市场（以及从市场到家庭）、从非正规到正规、以及从自雇到工资工作。利用新的数据来源，包括微观数据和行政记录，该文献试图理解一系列市场失灵、政策扭曲和增长过程障碍的复杂相互作用。通过拓宽对结构转型的理解——涵盖工业化之外的过程——该文献为更丰富地理解增长过程和更广泛的潜在政策杠杆打开了大门。

papers.title: Sequential Search for Corporate Bonds
papers.authors: Mahyar Kargar, Benjamin Lester, Sébastien Plante, Pierre-Olivier Weill
papers.abstract: In over-the-counter (OTC) markets, customers must find a counterparty to trade. Little is known about this process, however, because existing data is comprised of transaction records, which are only informative about the end of a search. Leveraging data from the leading trading platform for corporate bonds, we study the search process: we analyze customers’ repeated attempts to trade (successful and unsuccessful). We estimate that it takes two to three days to complete a transaction after an unsuccessful attempt, with substantial variation across trade and customer characteristics. Our analysis offers insights into the sources of trading delays in OTC markets.
papers.zh_title: 公司债券的序贯搜索
papers.zh_abstract: 在场外交易市场中，客户必须找到交易对手方才能进行交易。然而，由于现有数据由交易记录组成，这些记录仅能提供搜索结束时的信息，因此人们对这一过程知之甚少。利用领先的公司债券交易平台的数据，我们研究了搜索过程：我们分析了客户反复尝试交易（成功和失败）的情况。我们估计，在尝试失败后，完成一笔交易需要两到三天，且不同交易和客户特征之间存在显著差异。我们的分析为场外市场交易延迟的来源提供了见解。

papers.title: One-Sided Limited Commitment and Aggregate Risk
papers.authors: Yoshiki Ando, Dirk Krueger, Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: In this paper we study the neoclassical growth model with idiosyncratic income risk and aggregate risk in which risk sharing is endogenously constrained by one-sided limited commitment. Households can trade a full set of contingent claims that pay off depending on both idiosyncratic and aggregate risk, but limited commitment rules out that households sell these assets short. The model results, under suitable restrictions of the parameters of the model, in partial consumption insurance in equilibrium. With log-utility and idiosyncratic income shocks taking two values one of which is zero (e.g., employment and unemployment) we show that the equilibrium can be characterized in closed form, despite the fact that it features a non-degenerate consumption- and wealth distribution. We use the tractability of the model to study, analytically, inequality over the business cycle and asset pricing, and derive conditions under which our model has identical, as well as conditions under which it has lower/higher risk premia than the corresponding representative agent version of the model.
papers.zh_title: 单边有限承诺与总体风险
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们研究了具有异质性收入风险和总体风险的新古典增长模型，其中风险分担受到单边有限承诺的内生约束。家庭可以交易一套完整的或有债权，这些债权的偿付取决于异质性风险和总体风险，但有限承诺排除了家庭卖空这些资产的可能性。在模型参数的适当限制下，该模型导致均衡中的部分消费保险。对于对数效用和取两个值（其中一个为零）的异质性收入冲击（例如就业和失业），我们表明，尽管均衡具有非退化的消费和财富分布，但可以以闭式解形式刻画。我们利用模型的可处理性，从分析上研究了经济周期中的不平等和资产定价，并推导了我们的模型与相应的代表性代理人版本相比具有相同风险溢价的条件，以及具有更低/更高风险溢价的条件。

papers.title: Optimal Subsidies for Green Hydrogen Production
papers.authors: Harrison Fell, Stephen P. Holland, Andrew J. Yates
papers.abstract: Green hydrogen may decarbonize sectors which are difficult to electrify, and the recent Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) provides tax credits to encourage hydrogen production. We analyze a model in which hydrogen produced using electricity replaces natural gas. The electricity may be procured from dedicated renewables or from the grid with and without offsetting. In the absence of Pigouvian taxation, optimal hydrogen subsidies are positive if the unpriced externality from avoided natural gas is larger than the unpriced externality from electricity. With optimally differentiated subsidies, offsetting increases welfare. With undifferentiated subsidies, offsetting can decrease welfare, unless it is restricted to regions with higher unpriced electricity externalities. Short-run parameterization shows that the IRA's subsidy of $3/kg-H2 is rationalized: i) by hydrogen production from dedicated renewables if the social cost of carbon (SCC) is $500 or ii) by hydrogen production from the (relatively clean) grid in California with renewables offsetting (relatively dirty) electricity in the non-RGGI East if the SCC is $185. Allowing offsetting of production in California with renewables in any region does not reduce welfare, but the reverse does not hold.
papers.zh_title: 绿色氢气生产的最优补贴
papers.zh_abstract: 绿色氢气可能使难以电气化的行业脱碳，最近的《通胀削减法案》提供了税收抵免以鼓励氢气生产。我们分析了一个模型，其中使用电力生产的氢气替代天然气。电力可以从专用可再生能源获取，也可以从电网获取，无论是否进行抵消。在没有庇古税的情况下，如果避免使用天然气带来的未定价外部性大于电力带来的未定价外部性，则最优氢气补贴为正。在最优差异化补贴下，抵消会增加福利。在无差异化补贴下，除非抵消仅限于电力未定价外部性较高的地区，否则抵消可能降低福利。短期参数化表明，《通胀削减法案》每公斤3美元的补贴是合理的：(i) 如果社会碳成本为500美元，则通过专用可再生能源生产氢气；或 (ii) 如果社会碳成本为185美元，则通过加利福尼亚州（相对清洁的）电网生产氢气，并用可再生能源抵消（相对肮脏的）非RGGI东部地区的电力。允许用任何地区的可再生能源抵消加利福尼亚州的产量不会降低福利，但反之则不成立。

papers.title: The High Frequency Effects of Dollar Swap Lines
papers.authors: Rohan Kekre, Moritz Lenel
papers.abstract: We study the effects of dollar swap lines using high frequency responses in asset prices around policy announcements. News about expanded dollar swap lines causes a reduction in liquidity premia, compression of deviations from covered interest parity (CIP), and depreciation of the dollar. Equity prices rise and the VIX falls, while the response of long-term government bond prices is mixed. The cross-section of high frequency responses implies that swap lines affect the dollar factor or the price of risk. Our findings are qualitatively consistent with models relating the supply of dollar liquidity to the broader economy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, F31, G15
papers.zh_title: 美元互换额度的高频效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用政策公告前后资产价格的高频反应来研究美元互换额度的效应。关于扩大美元互换额度的消息导致流动性溢价下降、抛补利率平价偏离收窄以及美元贬值。股票价格上涨，VIX指数下跌，而长期政府债券价格的反应则喜忧参半。高频反应的横截面分析表明，互换额度影响了美元因子或风险价格。我们的发现与将美元流动性供给与更广泛经济联系起来的模型在定性上是一致的。

papers.title: Evaluating Tax Harmonization
papers.authors: James R. Hines Jr.
papers.abstract: Tax harmonization entails a uniform rate that may not suit all governments. Harmonization can advance collective governmental objectives only if the standard deviation of tax rates is less than the average downward effect of tax competition on rates. Since an efficient harmonized tax rate undoes the effect of competition, an efficient rate equals or exceeds the sum of the observed average tax rate and the standard deviation of rates. In 2020, the mean world corporate tax rate was 25.9%, and the standard deviation 4.5%, so if there is an efficient harmonized world tax rate, it must be 30.4% or higher.
papers.zh_title: 评估税收协调
papers.zh_abstract: 税收协调意味着一个统一的税率，这可能不适合所有政府。只有当税率的标准差小于税收竞争对税率的平均压低效应时，协调才能推进集体的政府目标。由于一个有效的协调税率抵消了竞争的影响，因此有效税率等于或大于观察到的平均税率与税率标准差之和。2020年，世界平均公司税率为25.9%，标准差为4.5%，因此如果存在一个有效的世界协调税率，它必须达到30.4%或更高。

papers.title: The Effect of Public Science on Corporate R&D
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Larisa C. Cioaca, Lia Sheer, Hansen Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the relationships between corporate R&D and three components of public science: knowledge, human capital, and invention. We identify the relationships through firm-specific exposure to changes in federal agency R\\&D budgets that are driven by the political composition of congressional appropriations subcommittees. Our results indicate that R&D by established firms, which account for more than three-quarters of business R&D, is affected by scientific knowledge produced by universities only when the latter is embodied in inventions or PhD scientists. Human capital trained by universities fosters innovation in firms. However, inventions from universities and public research institutes substitute for corporate inventions and reduce the demand for internal research by corporations, perhaps reflecting downstream competition from startups that commercialize university inventions. Moreover, abstract knowledge advances per se elicit little or no response. Our findings question the belief that public science represents a non-rival public good that feeds into corporate R&D through knowledge spillovers.
papers.zh_title: 公共科学对企业研发的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业研发与公共科学的三个组成部分——知识、人力资本和发明——之间的关系。我们通过企业特定的、由国会拨款小组委员会政治构成驱动的联邦机构研发预算变化暴露度来识别这些关系。我们的结果表明，占企业研发四分之三以上的成熟企业的研发，只有在大学产生的科学知识体现在发明或博士科学家身上时才会受到影响。大学培训的人力资本促进了企业的创新。然而，来自大学和公共研究机构的发明替代了企业发明，并减少了对企业内部研究的需求，这或许反映了将大学发明商业化的初创企业的下游竞争。此外，抽象知识本身的进步几乎没有或根本没有引起反应。我们的发现质疑了公共科学代表一种非竞争性公共产品、通过知识溢出进入企业研发的观点。

papers.title: What Do Impact Investors Do Differently?
papers.authors: Shawn Cole, Leslie Jeng, Josh Lerner, Natalia Rigol, Benjamin N. Roth
papers.abstract: In recent years, impact investors – private investors who seek to generate simultaneously financial and social returns – have attracted intense interest and controversy. We analyze a novel, comprehensive data set of impact and traditional investors to assess how the non-financial characteristics of impact portfolios differ from their traditional counterparts. First, we document that they are more likely to invest in disadvantaged areas and nascent industries and exhibit more risk tolerance and patience. We then examine the degree to which impact investors expand the financing frontier, versus investing in companies that could have attracted traditional private financing. Utilizing a variety of network theoretic and event study analyses, we find limited support for the assertion that impact investors expand the financing frontier, either in the deal-selection stage or the post-investment stage.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：G11, G23, G24, H41, M14
papers.zh_title: 影响力投资者有何不同？
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，影响力投资者——那些寻求同时产生财务和社会回报的私人投资者——引起了强烈的兴趣和争议。我们分析了一个新颖、全面的影响力投资者和传统投资者数据集，以评估影响力投资组合的非财务特征与传统投资组合的差异。首先，我们记录到他们更有可能投资于弱势地区和新兴行业，并表现出更高的风险容忍度和耐心。然后，我们考察了影响力投资者在多大程度上扩展了融资边界，而不是投资于那些本可以吸引传统私人融资的公司。利用各种网络理论和事件研究分析，我们发现有限的支持证据表明影响力投资者在交易选择阶段或投资后阶段扩展了融资边界。

papers.title: Learning by Investing: Entrepreneurial Spillovers from Venture Capital
papers.authors: Josh Lerner, Jinlin Li, Tong Liu
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：D83, G23, G24, L25, L26

papers.title: Who Bears the Costs of Inflation? Euro Area Households and the 2021–2023 Shock
papers.authors: Filippo Pallotti, Gonzalo Paz-Pardo, Jiri Slacalek, Oreste Tristani, Giovanni L. Violante
papers.abstract: We measure the heterogeneous first-order welfare effects of the recent inflation surge across households in the euro area. A simple framework illustrating the numerous transmission channels of surprise inflation to household welfare guides our empirical exercise. By combining micro data and aggregate time series, we conclude that: (i) country-level average welfare costs –expressed as a share of triennial income– were sizable and heterogeneous: around 3% in France and Spain, 7% in Germany, and 9% in Italy; (ii) this inflation episode resembles an age-dependent tax, with the retirees losing up to 14%, and roughly half of the 25–44 year-old winning; (iii) losses were quite uniform across consumption quantiles because rigid rents served as a hedge for the poor; (iv) nominal net positions were the key driver of heterogeneity across-households; (v) the rise in energy prices generated vast variation in individual-level inflation rates, but unconventional fiscal policies helped shield households. The counterpart of this household-sector loss is a significant gain for the government.
papers.zh_title: 谁承担了通胀的成本？欧元区家庭与2021-2023年冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了近期通胀飙升对欧元区各家庭产生的异质性一阶福利效应。一个说明意外通胀对家庭福利的众多传导渠道的简单框架指导了我们的实证工作。通过结合微观数据和总量时间序列，我们得出结论：（i）国家层面的平均福利成本——以三年期收入份额表示——是相当大的且异质的：法国和西班牙约为3%，德国约为7%，意大利约为9%；（ii）这次通胀事件类似于一种与年龄相关的税收，退休人员损失高达14%，而大约一半的25-44岁人群获益；（iii）由于刚性租金为穷人提供了对冲，各消费分位数的损失相当均匀；（iv）名义净头寸是家庭间异质性的关键驱动因素；（v）能源价格上涨导致了个人层面通胀率的巨大差异，但非常规财政政策帮助保护了家庭。家庭部门这一损失的对立面是政府的显著收益。

papers.title: The Impact of Commercial Real Estate Regulations on U.S. Output
papers.authors: Fil Babalievsky, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Lee E. Ohanian, Edward C. Prescott
papers.abstract: Commercial real estate accounts for roughly 20% of the U.S. fixed asset stock, and commercial land use is highly regulated. However, little is known about the quantitative impact of these regulations on economic activity or consumer welfare. This paper develops a spatial general equilibrium model of the U.S. economy that includes commercial real estate regulations and congestion effects, the latter of which provide a rationale for such regulations. The model is tailored to exploit the near-universe of CoreLogic's commercial, parcel-level, property tax records to construct a quantitative index of commercial real estate regulations for nearly every commercial property. We use the model to evaluate the positive and normative impacts of commercial land use deregulations. Moderately relaxing commercial regulations across all U.S. cities yields large allocative efficiency effects, with output gains of about 3 percent to 6 percent and welfare gains of about 3 percent to 9 percent of lifetime consumption. We also find significant positive and normative gains from deregulation with 40 percent of the labor force working remotely.
papers.zh_title: 商业地产监管对美国产出的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 商业地产约占美国固定资产存量的20%，且商业用地受到高度监管。然而，人们对这些监管对经济活动或消费者福利的量化影响知之甚少。本文构建了一个包含商业地产监管和拥堵效应的美国经济空间一般均衡模型，后者为这类监管提供了理由。该模型旨在利用CoreLogic近乎全量的商业、地块级财产税记录，为几乎每一处商业地产构建一个商业地产监管的量化指数。我们利用该模型评估商业用地放松管制的正面和规范影响。在所有美国城市适度放松商业监管会产生巨大的配置效率效应，产出增长约3%至6%，福利增长约为终身消费的3%至9%。我们还发现，在40%的劳动力远程工作的情况下，放松管制也能带来显著的正面和规范收益。

papers.title: How Do Households Respond to Income Shocks?
papers.authors: Dirk Krueger, Egor Malkov, Fabrizio Perri
papers.abstract: We use panel data from the Italian Survey of Household Income and Wealth from 1991 to 2016 to document empirically what components of the household budget constraint change in response to shocks to household labor income, both over shorter and over longer horizons. We show that shocks to labor income are associated with negligible changes in transfers and non-labor income components, modest changes in consumption expenditures, and large changes in wealth. We then split the sample in households which do not own business or real estate wealth, and households who do. For the first group, we find that consumption responses are more substantial (and increasing with the horizon of the income shock) and wealth responses are much smaller. We show that, for this group, a version of the standard PIH framework that allows for partial insurance against even permanent income shocks can explain well the consumption and wealth responses, both at short and long horizons. For the second group the standard framework cannot explain the large changes in wealth associated with income shocks. We conclude that models which include shocks to the value of household wealth are necessary to fully evaluate the sources and the consequences of household resource risk.
papers.zh_title: 家庭如何应对收入冲击？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用1991年至2016年意大利家庭收入和财富调查的面板数据，实证记录了家庭预算约束的哪些组成部分会因家庭劳动收入冲击而变化，无论是在较短还是较长的时期内。我们表明，劳动收入冲击与转移支付和非劳动收入组成部分的微小变化、消费支出的适度变化以及财富的大幅变化相关。然后，我们将样本分为不拥有企业或房地产财富的家庭和拥有这些财富的家庭。对于第一组，我们发现消费反应更为显著（并随收入冲击的期限而增加），而财富反应则小得多。我们表明，对于这一组，一个允许对甚至永久性收入冲击进行部分保险的标准持久收入假说框架，可以很好地解释短期和长期的消费和财富反应。对于第二组，标准框架无法解释与收入冲击相关的财富大幅变化。我们得出结论，包含家庭财富价值冲击的模型对于全面评估家庭资源风险的来源和后果是必要的。

papers.title: What to do when you can't use '1.96' Confidence Intervals for IV
papers.authors: David S. Lee, Justin McCrary, Marcelo J. Moreira, Jack R. Porter, Luther Yap
papers.abstract: To address the well-established large-sample invalidity of the +/-1.96 critical values for the t-ratio in the single variable just-identified IV model, applied research typically qualifies the inference based on the first-stage-F (Staiger and Stock (1997) and Stock and Yogo (2005)). We fully extend this F-based approach to its logical conclusion by presenting new critical values for the t-ratio to additionally accommodate values of F that do not meet existing thresholds needed for validity. These new t-ratio critical values simultaneously fix the main problem of over-rejection (invalidity) and the under-appreciated possibility of under-rejection (conservativeness) that can occur when relying solely on the usual 1.96 critical value. We show that the corresponding new confidence intervals are generally expected to be substantially shorter than competing “robust to weak instrument” intervals, including those from the recommended benchmark of Anderson and Rubin (1949) (AR). In a sample of 89 specifications from 10 recent empirical studies drawn from five general interest journals, the new “VtF” intervals are shorter than AR intervals 100 percent of the time, and even more likely to produce statistically significant results than the usual +/-1.96 procedure.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C01, C26, J0
papers.zh_title: 当无法使用“1.96”置信区间进行工具变量估计时该怎么办
papers.zh_abstract: 为了解决单一变量恰好识别IV模型中t比率±1.96临界值在大量样本中失效的公认问题，应用研究通常基于第一阶段F统计量（Staiger和Stock（1997），Stock和Yogo（2005））来限定推断。我们通过为t比率提出新的临界值，将这种基于F的方法完全扩展到其逻辑终点，以额外适应那些不满足现有有效性阈值的F值。这些新的t比率临界值同时解决了过度拒绝（无效性）这一主要问题，以及仅依赖通常的1.96临界值时可能出现的被低估的拒绝不足（保守性）问题。我们表明，相应的新置信区间通常预计将比竞争性的“对弱工具稳健”区间（包括来自Anderson和Rubin（1949）（AR）推荐基准的区间）短得多。在来自10项近期实证研究（选自五种综合兴趣期刊）的89个规格样本中，新的“VtF”区间在100%的情况下比AR区间更短，并且比通常的±1.96程序更有可能产生统计显著的结果。

papers.title: The Voting Premium
papers.authors: Doron Y. Levit, Nadya Malenko, Ernst G. Maug
papers.abstract: This paper develops a unified theory of blockholder governance and the voting premium, in a setting without takeovers and controlling shareholders. A voting premium emerges when a minority blockholder tries to influence the composition of the shareholder base by accumulating votes and buying shares from dissenting shareholders. Empirical measures of the voting premium do not reflect the value of voting rights or voting power. A negative voting premium results from free-riding by dispersed shareholders on the blockholder’s trades. Conflicts between dispersed shareholders and the blockholder endogenously increase the liquidity of voting shares, but do not necessarily increase the voting premium.
papers.zh_title: 投票溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在没有收购和控股股东的情况下，发展了一个关于大股东治理和投票溢价的统一理论。当少数大股东试图通过积累投票权并从持异议股东手中购买股份来影响股东基础构成时，投票溢价就会出现。投票溢价的实证衡量并不反映投票权或投票力的价值。负的投票溢价源于分散股东对大股东交易的搭便车行为。分散股东与大股东之间的冲突内生地增加了投票股份的流动性，但并不一定增加投票溢价。

papers.title: Corporate Debt Structure with Home and International Currency Bias
papers.authors: Matteo Maggiori, Brent Neiman, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: We explore the consequences of global capital market segmentation by currency for the optimal currency composition of borrowing by firms. Global bond portfolios are driven by the currency of denomination of assets as investors prefer to lend in their home currency or the international currency, the US Dollar. Larger and more productive firms select into foreign currency issuance. International segmentation results in a quantity-dimension of the exorbitant privilege whereby US firms that only issue in the domestic currency benefit from being able to more easily borrow from global investors.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F3, G15
papers.zh_title: 具有本币和国际货币偏好的公司债务结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了全球资本市场按货币分割对企业最优借款货币构成的影响。全球债券组合由资产的计价货币驱动，因为投资者倾向于以其本币或国际货币（美元）进行贷款。规模更大、生产率更高的企业选择发行外币债券。国际分割导致了一种数量维度的“过高特权”，即仅以本币发行的美国企业能够更容易地从全球投资者那里借款。
