papers.title: The Impact of AI and Cross-Border Data Regulation on International Trade in Digital Services: A Large Language Model
papers.authors: Ruiqi Sun, Daniel Trefler
papers.abstract: The rise of artificial intelligence (AI) and of cross-border restrictions on data flows has created a host of new questions and related policy dilemmas. This paper addresses two questions: How is digital service trade shaped by (1) AI algorithms and (2) by the interplay between AI algorithms and cross-border restrictions on data flows? Answers lie in the palm of your hand: From London to Lagos, mobile app users trigger international transactions when they open AI-powered foreign apps. We have 2015-2020 usage data for the most popular 35,575 mobile apps and, to quantify the AI deployed in each of these apps, we use a large language model (LLM) to link each app to each of the app developer's AI patents. (This linkage of specific products to specific patents is a methodological innovation.) Armed with data on app usage by country, with AI deployed in each app, and with an instrument for AI (a Heckscher-Ohlin cost-shifter), we answer our two questions. (1) On average, AI causally raises an app's number of foreign users by 2.67 log points or by more than 10-fold. (2) The impact of AI on foreign users is halved if the foreign users are in a country with strong restrictions on cross-border data flows. These countries are usually autocracies. We also provide a new way of measuring AI knowledge spillovers across firms and find large spillovers. Finally, our work suggests numerous ways in which LLMs such as ChatGPT can be used in other applications.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与跨境数据监管对数字服务国际贸易的影响：一项大语言模型研究
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能（AI）的兴起以及跨境数据流动限制的增多，引发了一系列新问题及相关政策困境。本文探讨两个问题：（1）AI算法如何塑造数字服务贸易？（2）AI算法与跨境数据流动限制之间的相互作用如何影响数字服务贸易？答案尽在掌握之中：从伦敦到拉各斯，移动应用用户在打开由AI驱动的外国应用时，便会触发国际交易。我们拥有2015年至2020年间最受欢迎的35,575款移动应用的使用数据，并且为了量化每款应用中部署的AI，我们使用一个大语言模型（LLM）将每款应用与该应用开发者的每项AI专利关联起来。（这种将特定产品与特定专利关联起来的方法是一项方法论创新。）凭借按国家划分的应用使用数据、每款应用中部署的AI情况以及一个AI的工具变量（一个赫克歇尔-俄林成本变动因素），我们回答了上述两个问题。（1）平均而言，AI因果性地使一款应用的外国用户数量增加了2.67个对数点，即超过10倍。（2）如果外国用户所在国对跨境数据流动有严格限制，那么AI对外国用户的影响会减半。这些国家通常是威权国家。我们还提供了一种衡量企业间AI知识溢出的新方法，并发现了显著的溢出效应。最后，我们的工作指出了诸如ChatGPT这类大语言模型可在其他应用中使用的多种方式。

papers.title: Can Socially-Minded Governance Control the AGI Beast?
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper robustly concludes that it cannot. A model is constructed under idealised conditions that presume the risks associated with artificial general intelligence (AGI) are real, that safe AGI products are possible, and that there exist socially-minded funders who are interested in funding safe AGI even if this does not maximise profits. It is demonstrated that a socially-minded entity formed by such funders would not be able to minimise harm from AGI that might be created by unrestricted products released by for-profit firms. The reason is that a socially-minded entity has neither the incentive nor ability to minimise the use of unrestricted AGI products in ex post competition with for-profit firms and cannot preempt the AGI developed by for-profit firms ex ante.
papers.zh_title: 具有社会意识的治理能否控制通用人工智能这头猛兽？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文得出的稳健结论是：不能。我们在理想化条件下构建了一个模型，这些条件假设与通用人工智能（AGI）相关的风险是真实存在的，安全的AGI产品是可能的，并且存在具有社会意识的资助者，他们即使在不追求利润最大化的情况下也有兴趣资助安全的AGI。我们证明，由这类资助者组建的具有社会意识的实体，将无法最大限度地减少由营利性公司发布的不受限制的产品可能造成的AGI危害。原因在于，具有社会意识的实体在与营利性公司的事后竞争中，既没有激励也没有能力去最小化不受限制的AGI产品的使用，并且也无法在事前抢占营利性公司开发的AGI。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Announcement Premium
papers.authors: Hengjie Ai, Ravi Bansal, Hongye Guo
papers.abstract: The paper reviews the evidence on the macroeconomic announcement premium and its implications on equilibrium asset pricing models. Empirically, a large fraction of the equity market risk premium is realized on a small number of trading days with significant macroeconomic announcements. We review the literature that demonstrates that the existence of the macroeconomic announcement premium implies that investors’ preferences must satisfy generalized risk sensitivity. We show how this conclusion generalizes to environments with heterogeneous investors and demonstrate how incorporating generalized risk sensitivity affects economic analysis in dynamic setups with uncertainty.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM；JEL：A0, E0, E37, E40
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济公告溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于宏观经济公告溢价的证据及其对均衡资产定价模型的影响。实证上，股票市场风险溢价的很大一部分是在少数几个有重大宏观经济公告的交易日内实现的。我们回顾了相关文献，这些文献表明，宏观经济公告溢价的存在意味着投资者的偏好必须满足广义风险敏感性。我们展示了这一结论如何推广到存在异质性投资者的环境中，并论证了在具有不确定性的动态设定中，纳入广义风险敏感性会如何影响经济分析。

papers.title: Winners and Losers from the U.S.-China Trade War
papers.authors: Alicia H. Dang, Kala Krishna, Yingyan Zhao
papers.abstract: We investigate the phenomenon of trade re-allocations across countries as a result of the U.S.- China trade war. Using quarterly data on U.S. imports, we find evidence, as do others, of trade diversion in a range of industries and products, including products not targeted by U.S. tariffs on China. We are however the first to ask what seems to drive these trade reallocation activities. First, we show that they seem to be driven by differences in comparative advantage across countries: countries with a greater revealed comparative advantage in a product benefit (in terms of exports to the U.S.) more from U.S. tariffs on China. Second, we show that there is evidence of spillovers to similar non-targeted products: products in similar industries (as defined by their HS codes) are also similarly affected. This is consistent with the colocation effects. Third, our findings also suggest that bystander countries with greater capital abundance are more heavily impacted in capital-intensive industries, suggesting that a higher proportion of more flexible or transferable assets provides flexibility to alter production to respond to new trade opportunities. Finally, we show that the countries that export more to the U.S. as a result of the tariffs on China also export more to other countries. This suggests that firms are entering these countries and once there, export not just to the U.S. but everywhere.
papers.zh_title: 中美贸易战的赢家与输家
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中美贸易战导致的跨国贸易再分配现象。利用美国进口的季度数据，我们与其他研究一样，发现了在多个行业和产品（包括未受美国对华关税影响的产品）中存在贸易转移的证据。然而，我们是首个探究这些贸易再分配活动驱动因素的研究。首先，我们表明，这些活动似乎是由各国比较优势的差异驱动的：在一个产品上具有更大显性比较优势的国家，从美国对华关税中获益更多（就其对美出口而言）。其次，我们发现有证据表明存在向类似的非目标产品的溢出效应：相似行业（根据其HS编码定义）的产品也受到类似影响。这与协同定位效应一致。第三，我们的发现还表明，资本更充裕的旁观国在资本密集型行业中受到的影响更大，这表明更高比例更灵活或可转移的资产为调整生产以应对新贸易机会提供了灵活性。最后，我们表明，因美国对华关税而增加对美出口的国家，其对其他国家的出口也增加了。这表明企业正在进入这些国家，并且一旦进入，不仅向美国出口，还向所有地方出口。

papers.title: Regulating Artificial Intelligence
papers.authors: Joao Guerreiro, Sergio Rebelo, Pedro Teles
papers.abstract: Advances in AI offer substantial benefits but also pose societal risks. We analyze optimal regulation under uncertainty about societal costs, differing expectations regarding risks, and opportunities to reduce uncertainty through beta testing. Pigouvian taxes fail to achieve the first-best outcome due to heterogeneous beliefs about risks and the regulator’s inability to observe developers’ expectations. We propose a two-stage optimal policy: first, deciding between immediate release or sandbox experimentation; second, using gathered information to determine whether to publicly release or withdraw the algorithm. This approach achieves the socially optimal outcome.
papers.zh_title: 监管人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能的进步带来了巨大收益，但也带来了社会风险。我们分析了在关于社会成本存在不确定性、对风险的预期存在差异以及通过测试版测试降低不确定性的机会下，最优的监管政策。由于对风险的信念存在异质性，且监管者无法观察开发者的预期，庇古税无法实现最优结果。我们提出一个两阶段最优政策：首先，决定是立即发布还是在沙盒中进行实验；其次，利用收集到的信息来决定是公开发布还是撤回算法。这种方法能够实现社会最优结果。

papers.title: How Much Are the Poor Losing From Tax Competition?
papers.authors: Mathilde Muñoz
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies the unequal welfare effects of tax competition. I derive the optimal tax and transfer schedules in a free mobility union composed of countries that can either compete or set a uniform federal tax rate. In the absence of fiscal coordination, governments internalize that any decentralized tax reform can lead to the out-migration of taxpayers at the top of the income distribution while increasing the in-migration of transfer recipients. As a result, the optimal level of redistribution is always lower in the tax competition equilibrium. Numerical calibrations show that being in a competition union rather than in a federal union decreases poorer individuals’ welfare by up to -20 percent. In contrast, the rich experience higher welfare in the tax competition equilibrium due to lower tax rates.
papers.zh_title: 穷人在税收竞争中损失了多少？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文量化了税收竞争的不平等福利效应。我在一个由各国组成的自由流动联盟中推导出最优的税收和转移支付计划，这些国家可以选择相互竞争，也可以设定统一的联邦税率。在缺乏财政协调的情况下，政府会内化这样一个事实：任何分散化的税收改革都可能导致收入分配顶端的纳税人外迁，同时增加转移支付领取者的迁入。因此，在税收竞争均衡中，最优的再分配水平总是更低。数值校准显示，与处于联邦联盟相比，处于竞争联盟会使较贫困个体的福利下降高达-20%。相比之下，由于税率较低，富人在税收竞争均衡中享有更高的福利。

papers.title: Browsers Don’t Lie? Gender Differences in the Effects of the Indian COVID-19 Lockdown on Digital Activity and Time Use
papers.authors: Amalia R. Miller, Kamalini Ramdas, Alp Sungu
papers.abstract: We measure the impact of the initial Indian national COVID-19 lockdown on digital activity using browser histories of 1,094 individuals, spanning over 31.5 million website visits on computers and mobile devices. Reflecting the predicted increase in the value of online activity, both men and women in our sample dramatically increased their internet browsing during the lockdown. However, men’s browsing increased by significantly more, causing gender gaps overall and in key browsing categories, and in browsing on mobile devices. Our browser data showed significant relative reductions in women’s online job search, corroborated in aggregate data obtained from a major Indian online job platform, indicating potentially persistent harms to women’s employment. Consistent with increased childcare obligations driving the observed gender gaps, we find that gaps were greatest among parents. Men and women in our sample had similar browsing levels and trends pre-pandemic, which diverged during the lockdown. Our primary findings therefore shed new light on determinants of digital time use, while also highlighting the importance of considering both extensive and intensive margins of digital activity to track the digital divide. In our secondary analysis of time devoted to childcare, we find conflicting survey responses between fathers (who report an increase relative to mothers) and mothers (who report no such increase). While our data cannot directly resolve this conflict, they do show fathers having larger increases in time spent online, with no relative increase in childcare-related browsing. This secondary result demonstrates the value of complementing survey data with digital trace data.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LE, LS, PR；JEL：I18, J13, J16, J22, J24, K39, O15, O33
papers.zh_title: 浏览器不会说谎？印度新冠疫情封锁对数字活动和时间使用的性别差异影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用1094名个体的浏览器历史记录（涵盖计算机和移动设备上超过3150万次网站访问）来衡量印度首次全国新冠疫情封锁对数字活动的影响。反映了在线活动价值的预期增长，我们样本中的男性和女性在封锁期间都大幅增加了互联网浏览。然而，男性的浏览增长显著更多，导致在总体浏览、关键浏览类别以及移动设备浏览方面出现性别差距。我们的浏览器数据显示，女性在线求职搜索出现显著相对减少，这从印度一家主要在线求职平台获得的汇总数据中得到证实，表明这可能对女性就业造成持续性损害。与增加的育儿责任导致观察到的性别差距相一致，我们发现这种差距在父母中最大。我们样本中的男性和女性在疫情前具有相似的浏览水平和趋势，但在封锁期间出现分化。因此，我们的主要发现为数字时间使用的决定因素提供了新见解，同时也强调了同时考虑数字活动的广延边际和集约边际以追踪数字鸿沟的重要性。在我们对育儿时间的次要分析中，我们发现父亲（报告相对于母亲有所增加）和母亲（报告没有此类增加）之间存在相互矛盾的调查回应。虽然我们的数据无法直接解决这一矛盾，但它们确实显示父亲上网时间增加幅度更大，而与育儿相关的浏览没有相对增加。这一次要结果证明了用数字追踪数据补充调查数据的价值。

papers.title: Family Trees and Falling Apples: Historical Intergenerational Mobility Estimates for Women and Men
papers.authors: Kasey Buckles, Joseph Price, Zachary Ward, Haley E.B. Wilbert
papers.abstract: Efforts to document long-term trends in socioeconomic mobility in the US have been hindered by the lack of large, representative datasets linking parents to adult children, a challenge especially acute for women due to surname changes. We use a new dataset, the Census Tree, which incorporates genealogy data to link tens of millions of fathers to their sons and daughters in historical US censuses. We find that relative mobility was remarkably similar across sons and daughters in the 1835 to 1915 birth cohorts. Additionally, assortative mating was much stronger than previously estimated, as daughters married husbands with very similar backgrounds.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS；JEL：I30, J0, N0, N01
papers.zh_title: 家谱与落下的苹果：女性和男性的历史代际流动性估计
papers.zh_abstract: 由于缺乏将父母与成年子女联系起来的大型、具有代表性的数据集（由于姓氏变更，这对女性而言尤为困难），记录美国社会经济流动性长期趋势的努力一直受到阻碍。我们使用一个新的数据集——人口普查家谱树，该数据集整合了家谱数据，将历史美国人口普查中数千万父亲与其儿子和女儿联系起来。我们发现，在1835年至1915年的出生队列中，儿子和女儿的相对流动性惊人地相似。此外，择偶匹配比先前估计的要强得多，因为女儿嫁给了背景非常相似的丈夫。

papers.title: Age and Suicide Impulsivity: Evidence from Handgun Purchase Delay Laws
papers.authors: John J. Donohue, Samuel V. Cai, Arjun Ravi
papers.abstract: We provide the first quasi-experimental estimates of variation in suicide impulsivity by age by examining the impact of firearm purchase delay laws by age. Prior studies of firearm purchase delay laws use traditional two-way-fixed-effects estimation, but we demonstrate that bias due to heterogenous treatment effects may have inflated previous estimates relative to our stacked-regression approach. We also develop a triple-difference stacked-regression estimator to confirm the robustness of our results. We find that purchase delay laws reduce firearm suicide for the overall adult population, but this effect is largely driven by a 6.1 percent reduction in firearm suicides for young adults ages 21-34. We demonstrate that the relationship between purchase delay laws and firearm suicide reduction weakens with age and is not driven by gun ownership rates. We argue that this is due to the impulsiveness of young adults in committing suicide, indicating that removing firearm access for young adults may provide a critical deterrent to suicide.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：H0, I0, I18, K0, K32
papers.zh_title: 年龄与自杀冲动性：来自手枪购买延迟法的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过考察枪支购买延迟法在不同年龄群体中的影响，首次提供了关于自杀冲动性随年龄变化的准实验估计。先前关于枪支购买延迟法的研究使用了传统的双向固定效应估计，但我们证明，相对于我们的堆叠回归方法，异质性处理效应导致的偏差可能夸大了先前的估计。我们还开发了一个三重差分堆叠回归估计量，以确认我们结果的稳健性。我们发现，购买延迟法降低了整体成年人口的枪支自杀率，但这种效应主要由21-34岁年轻成年人的枪支自杀率下降6.1%所驱动。我们证明，购买延迟法与枪支自杀率下降之间的关系随年龄增长而减弱，并且并非由枪支拥有率驱动。我们认为，这是由于年轻成年人在自杀时的冲动性，表明消除年轻成年人的枪支获取途径可能为预防自杀提供关键威慑。

papers.title: The Outlook for Women's Employment and Labor Force Participation
papers.authors: Stefania Albanesi
papers.abstract: Employment and participation rates for US prime age women rose steadily during the second half of the 20th century. In the last 30 years, however, those rates stagnated, even as employment and participation rates for women in other industrialized countries continued to rise. I discuss the role of changes in the earnings structure and persistent institutional barriers, such as limited investment in family policies, that may be holding back employment among American women today. The COVID-19 pandemic reduced employment more for women than for men and raised the barriers to female participation due to the increase in childcare responsibilities during this period. Yet, the diffusion of remote and hybrid work arrangements in its aftermath may be beneficial for women's participation in the long run, even if both men's and women's post-pandemic employment growth so far are strongly associated with access to remote work options.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E20, E6, H2, H31, H4, H52, J16, J21, J22, J30, J31, J33
papers.zh_title: 女性就业与劳动参与的前景
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪下半叶，美国黄金年龄女性的就业率和劳动参与率稳步上升。然而，在过去30年中，这些比率停滞不前，而其他工业化国家女性的就业率和参与率却持续上升。我讨论了收入结构变化和持续存在的制度障碍（例如对家庭政策的有限投资）所起的作用，这些因素可能正在阻碍当今美国女性的就业。COVID-19大流行对女性就业的减少程度大于男性，并且由于在此期间育儿责任的增加，提高了女性参与的障碍。然而，从长远来看，其后远程和混合工作安排的普及可能有利于女性的参与，即使迄今为止大流行后男性和女性的就业增长都与获得远程工作选择密切相关。

papers.title: Federal Reserve Structure and the Production of Monetary Policy Ideas
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Edward S. Prescott
papers.abstract: We evaluate the decentralized structure of the Federal Reserve System as a mechanism for generating and processing new ideas on monetary policy over the 1960 - 2000 period. We document the introduction of monetarism, rational expectations, credibility, transparency, and other monetary policy ideas by Reserve Banks into the Federal Reserve System. We argue that the Reserve Banks were willing to support and develop new ideas due to internal reforms to the FOMC that Chairman William McChesney Martin implemented in the 1950s and the increased ties with academia that developed in this period. Furthermore, the Reserve Banks were able to succeed at this because of their private-public governance structure. We illustrate this with a time-consistency model in which a decentralized organization is better at producing new ideas than a centralized one. We argue that this role of the Reserve Banks is an important benefit of the Federal Reserve’s decentralized structure by allowing for more competition in formulating ideas and by reducing groupthink.
papers.zh_title: 美联储结构与货币政策思想的产生
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了美联储系统的分散化结构作为在1960年至2000年期间产生和处理货币政策新思想的机制。我们记录了储备银行将货币主义、理性预期、可信度、透明度以及其他货币政策思想引入美联储系统的过程。我们认为，由于主席威廉·麦克切斯尼·马丁在1950年代实施的联邦公开市场委员会内部改革以及这一时期与学术界联系的加强，储备银行愿意支持和发展新思想。此外，储备银行之所以能够成功做到这一点，是因为它们的公私治理结构。我们用一个时间一致性模型来说明这一点，在该模型中，分散化组织比集中化组织更擅长产生新思想。我们认为，储备银行的这一角色是美联储分散化结构的一个重要优势，因为它允许在制定思想方面有更多竞争，并减少群体思维。

papers.title: The Wealth of Working Nations
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Gustavo Ventura, Wen Yao
papers.abstract: Due to aging populations, the gap between GDP growth per capita and GDP growth per working-age adult (or per hour worked) has widened in many advanced economies. Countries like Japan, which have shown lackluster GDP growth per capita, have performed surprisingly well in terms of GDP growth per working-age adult (or per hour worked). Many advanced economies are also following similar balanced growth paths per working-age adult despite significant differences in the levels of GDP per working-age adult. We calibrate a standard neoclassical growth model to reflect changes in the working-age population for each economy. This model aligns more closely with the data for all the economies in our sample when we match GDP growth per working-age adult rather than when we match GDP growth per capita, the “canonical” calibration target.
papers.zh_title: 工作国家的财富
papers.zh_abstract: 由于人口老龄化，许多发达经济体的人均GDP增长率与每个劳动年龄成年人（或每小时工作）的GDP增长率之间的差距已经扩大。像日本这样人均GDP增长乏力的国家，在每劳动年龄成年人（或每小时工作）的GDP增长方面却表现得出奇地好。尽管每劳动年龄成年人GDP水平存在显著差异，但许多发达经济体也遵循着相似的每劳动年龄成年人平衡增长路径。我们校准了一个标准的新古典增长模型，以反映每个经济体劳动年龄人口的变化。当我们匹配每劳动年龄成年人的GDP增长，而不是匹配人均GDP增长（即“经典”校准目标）时，该模型与我们样本中所有经济体的数据更为吻合。

papers.title: Polarizing Corporations: Does Talent Flow to "Good" Firms?
papers.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Timothy McQuade, Gabriel Ramos, Thomas Rauter, Olivia Xiong
papers.abstract: We conduct a field experiment in partnership with the largest job platform in Brazil to study how environmental, social, and governance (ESG) practices of firms affect talent allocation. We find both an average job-seeker’s preference for ESG and a large degree of heterogeneity across sociodemographic groups, with the strongest preference displayed by highly educated, white, and politically liberal individuals. We combine our experimental estimates with matched employer-employee administrative microdata and estimate an equilibrium model of the labor market. Counterfactual analyses suggest ESG practices increase labor market efficiency and worker welfare, while increasing the wage gap between skilled and unskilled workers.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, LS, POL, PR；JEL：D2, G0, G3, G4, J0, O10, P0
papers.zh_title: 两极分化的企业：人才会流向“好”企业吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们与巴西最大的就业平台合作进行了一项实地实验，以研究企业的环境、社会和治理实践如何影响人才配置。我们发现，平均求职者偏好ESG，并且不同社会人口群体之间存在很大程度的异质性，其中受过高等教育、白人和政治自由派人士表现出最强的偏好。我们将实验估计值与匹配的雇主-雇员行政微观数据相结合，并估计了一个劳动力市场均衡模型。反事实分析表明，ESG实践提高了劳动力市场效率和工人福利，同时扩大了技能工人与非技能工人之间的工资差距。

papers.title: Distributional Tax Analysis in Theory and Practice: Harberger Meets Diamond-Mirrlees
papers.authors: Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a new framework to study the distribution of current taxes and the effects of tax reforms. For current taxes, labor taxes are assigned to the corresponding workers, capital taxes to the corresponding asset owners, and consumption taxes to the corresponding consumers. Current taxes capture the wedges between pre-tax prices (relevant for production) and after-tax prices (relevant for the work, saving, and consumption decisions of households) as well as the direct equity effects of taxes while being silent about efficiency. Our method does not require structural assumptions, is internally consistent, and maximizes the comparability of tax progressivity and inequality over time and across countries. Applying this methodology to the United States, we find that the effective tax rate of the top 1% has declined from about 50% in the early 1950s to 32% in 2021. It is through the corporate tax that a high degree of tax progressivity was achieved in the middle of the 20th century. To analyze the distributional effects of tax reforms, mechanical changes in tax liability by income groups and aggregate revenue effects due to household (but not firms') behavioral responses are sufficient statistics in the neoclassical optimal tax model of Diamond and Mirrlees (1971). The effects of taxes on pre-tax prices at the heart of classical tax incidence analysis are normatively irrelevant.
papers.zh_title: 税收分配分析的理论与实践：哈伯格遇见戴蒙德-米尔利斯
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个新的框架来研究当前税收的分配以及税收改革的影响。对于当前税收，劳动税分配给相应的工人，资本税分配给相应的资产所有者，消费税分配给相应的消费者。当前税收捕捉了税前价格（与生产相关）和税后价格（与家庭的工作、储蓄和消费决策相关）之间的楔子，以及税收的直接公平效应，但对效率问题保持沉默。我们的方法不需要结构性假设，具有内部一致性，并最大限度地提高了税收累进性和不平等性在时间和国家之间的可比性。将这种方法应用于美国，我们发现，最富有的1%人群的有效税率已从1950年代初的约50%下降到2021年的32%。正是通过公司税，在20世纪中期实现了高度的税收累进性。为了分析税收改革的分配效应，在戴蒙德和米尔利斯（1971）的新古典最优税收模型中，按收入组划分的税收负担的机械变化以及由于家庭（而非企业）行为反应而产生的总财政收入效应是充分的统计量。税收对税前价格的影响是经典税收归宿分析的核心，但在规范上无关紧要。

papers.title: The Intergenerational Effects of Parental Leave: Exploiting Forty Years of U.S. Policy Variation
papers.authors: Andrea M. Flores, George-Levi Gayle, Andrés Hincapié
papers.abstract: We study the effects of job-protected leave policies on intergenerational mobility, long-run child outcomes, and parental decisions (labor market, investments in children, and fertility). We merge rich sources of historical information on family leave policies across the United States since 1973 with over 40 years of survey data covering two generations of individuals. Exploiting variation in the timing of job-protected leave policies introduced in a large set of 18 states and the District of Columbia before the enactment of the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) in 1993, we find that the pre-FMLA protected leave policies had a level effect and a mobility effect. The level effect yields from overall improvements in education and wages for the children born under these policies. The mobility effect, chiefly an increase in intergenerational mobility in education, stems from heterogeneity in the effects of the policies: children of mothers with fewer years of education benefit more. As a potential mechanism, we find that the policies increased mothers’ time investments in children and the likelihood of the households having childcare expenses. Finally, consistent with the tradeoffs of policy design, we find that the policies exacerbated the motherhood penalty in labor market outcomes and that they affected fertility choices, increasing the likelihood of having a first child and decreasing the likelihood of having subsequent children.
papers.zh_title: 育儿假的代际效应：利用美国四十年的政策变化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了带薪休假政策对代际流动性、儿童长期结果以及父母决策（劳动力市场、对子女的投资和生育）的影响。我们将自1973年以来美国各地关于育儿假政策的丰富历史信息来源与涵盖两代人的40多年调查数据相结合。利用1993年《家庭与医疗休假法》颁布之前在18个州和哥伦比亚特区引入的带薪休假政策时间上的变化，我们发现，FMLA之前的带薪休假政策具有水平效应和流动性效应。水平效应源于在这些政策下出生的儿童在教育程度和工资方面的整体改善。流动性效应，主要是教育代际流动性的提高，源于政策效应的异质性：母亲受教育年限较少的儿童受益更多。作为一个潜在机制，我们发现这些政策增加了母亲对子女的时间投入以及家庭有育儿支出的可能性。最后，与政策设计的权衡一致，我们发现这些政策加剧了劳动力市场结果中的母亲惩罚，并影响了生育选择，增加了生育第一个孩子的可能性，同时降低了生育后续孩子的可能性。

papers.title: Occupational Hazard? An Analysis of Birth Outcomes Among Physician Mothers
papers.authors: Anupam Jena, David Slusky, Lilly Springer
papers.abstract: Are birth outcomes of physician mothers affected by their long work hours and physically demanding job? Using Texas birth data from 2007-2014, we compared birth outcomes between physicians and another highly educated group, lawyers, and between surgeons and non-surgeon physicians. Further, using a difference-in-differences framework, we examine whether a 2011 duty hour reform impacted the physician birth outcomes. We find that physicians have an increased incidence of low birthweight and small for gestational age infants, with the results driven by surgeons. We find evidence that duty hour reforms were associated with improved birth outcomes for younger physicians.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS；JEL：I12, J13, J44, K32
papers.zh_title: 职业危害？医生母亲生育结局分析
papers.zh_abstract: 医生母亲的工作时间长且体力要求高，是否会影响其生育结局？利用2007-2014年德克萨斯州的出生数据，我们将医生与另一高学历群体——律师的生育结局进行比较，并比较外科医生与非外科医生的生育结局。此外，我们采用双重差分框架，考察2011年值班时间改革是否影响了医生的生育结局。研究发现，医生生育低出生体重和小于胎龄儿的概率增加，这一结果主要由外科医生驱动。我们发现有证据表明，值班时间改革与年轻医生生育结局的改善相关。

papers.title: Time Use and Macroeconomic Uncertainty
papers.authors: Matteo Cacciatore, Daniela Hauser, Stefano Gnocchi
papers.abstract: We study the effects of uncertainty on time use and their macroeconomic implications. Employing data from the American Time Use Survey and the Bureau of Labor Statistics, we document that heightened uncertainty increases housework and reduces market work hours, mildly impacting leisure. We then propose a model that quantitatively accounts for these estimates. We show that substitution between market and housework provides self-insurance to households, weakening precautionary savings. However, it also reduces aggregate demand, ultimately amplifying uncertainty's recessionary impact. Time reallocation can lead to higher inflation, particularly when uncertainty couples with policies redirecting time use towards housework (e.g., lockdown restrictions).
papers.zh_title: 时间利用与宏观经济不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不确定性对时间利用的影响及其宏观经济含义。利用美国时间利用调查和劳工统计局的数据，我们记录到不确定性增加会加大家庭劳动时间，减少市场工作时间，对休闲时间影响较小。随后，我们提出了一个能够定量解释这些估计结果的模型。研究表明，市场劳动与家庭劳动之间的替代为家庭提供了自我保险，削弱了预防性储蓄动机。然而，这也减少了总需求，最终放大了不确定性的衰退效应。时间重新分配可能导致更高的通胀，尤其当不确定性伴随着将时间利用转向家庭劳动的政策（如封锁限制）时。

papers.title: Fiscal Federalism and Monetary Unions
papers.authors: Rafael Berriel, Eugenia Gonzalez-Aguado, Patrick J. Kehoe, Elena Pastorino
papers.abstract: We apply ideas from fiscal federalism to reassess how fiscal authority should be delegated within a monetary union. In a real-economy model with no fiscal externalities, in which local fiscal authorities have an informational advantage about the preferences of their citizens for public spending relative to a fiscal union, a natural generalization of the classic decentralization result by Oates (1972) applies. Namely, a decentralized fiscal regime dominates a fiscal union, and the degree of dominance increases as the information of the fiscal union worsens in quality. In the presence of direct fiscal externalities across countries, however, a decentralized regime is optimal for small federations of countries, whereas a centralized regime is optimal for large ones. We then consider a monetary-economy model, in which governments finance their expenditures with nominal debt and inflation has a negative impact on aggregate productivity. If the monetary authority can commit to an inflation policy, then a version of Oates (1972)’s decentralization result holds. By contrast, when the monetary authority lacks commitment power, the resulting time-inconsistency problem generates an indirect endogenous fiscal externality. In this case, when a country-level fiscal authority chooses a higher level of nominal debt, it induces the monetary authority to inflate more to reduce the level of distortionary taxes needed to finance the higher debt. Because country-level fiscal authorities do not take into account the costs to other countries of the inflation that their fiscal policies induce, a negative fiscal externality arises. This externality naturally becomes more severe as the number of countries in the monetary union increases. Hence, as in the real-economy model, a decentralized fiscal regime is optimal for small monetary unions, whereas a fiscal union is optimal for sufficiently large ones. Our key result is that as the size of a monetary union increases, it becomes relatively more desirable to centralize fiscal authority. We conclude by discussing the implications of our results for the debate on the integration of fiscal policy within the EU and its enlargement.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E61, E63, F34, F42, F45
papers.zh_title: 财政联邦主义与货币联盟
papers.zh_abstract: 我们运用财政联邦主义的思想，重新评估货币联盟内财政权力应如何下放。在一个无财政外部性的实体经济模型中，地方财政当局相对于财政联盟在了解其公民对公共支出偏好方面具有信息优势，此时Oates（1972）的经典分权结果自然适用。即，分散的财政体制优于财政联盟，且随着财政联盟信息质量的下降，这种优势程度增加。然而，在存在跨国直接财政外部性的情况下，对于小型国家联邦，分散体制是最优的；而对于大型国家联邦，集中体制是最优的。随后，我们考虑一个货币经济模型，其中政府以名义债务为支出融资，通货膨胀对总生产率产生负面影响。如果货币当局能够承诺通胀政策，则Oates（1972）的分权结果成立。相反，当货币当局缺乏承诺能力时，由此产生的时间不一致问题会引致间接的内生财政外部性。在这种情况下，当国家层面的财政当局选择更高的名义债务水平时，会诱使货币当局增加通胀，以减少为偿还更高债务所需的扭曲性税收。由于国家层面的财政当局未考虑其财政政策所引致的通胀对其他国家的成本，因此产生了负的财政外部性。这种外部性随着货币联盟国家数量的增加而自然加剧。因此，与实体经济模型一样，对于小型货币联盟，分散的财政体制是最优的；而对于足够大的货币联盟，财政联盟是最优的。我们的关键结果是，随着货币联盟规模的扩大，集中财政权力的相对可取性增加。最后，我们讨论了研究结果对欧盟内部财政政策整合及其扩大的辩论的启示。

papers.title: On the Economics of Extinction and Mass Extinctions
papers.authors: M. Scott Taylor, Rolf Weder
papers.abstract: Human beings' domination of the planet has not been kind to many species worldwide. This is to be expected. Humans have radically altered natural landscapes, harvested heavily from the ocean, and altered the climate in an unprecedented way. Recent concerns over the extent and rate of biodiversity loss have led to renewed interest in extinction outcomes and speculation concerning humans' potential role in any future mass extinction. In this paper, we discuss the economic causes of extinction in two high-profile cases - Sharks and the North American Buffalo - and then extend our framework to allow for multiple species and the possibility of mass extinction. Throughout, we present evidence drawn from authoritative data sources with a focus on shark populations to ground our analysis. Despite large gaps in our data, the available evidence suggests extinction risks are rising for many species and policy is slow to react.
papers.zh_title: 论灭绝与大规模灭绝的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 人类对地球的主宰对全球许多物种并不友好。这在意料之中。人类以前所未有的方式彻底改变了自然景观，从海洋中大量捕捞，并改变了气候。近期对生物多样性丧失程度和速度的担忧，重新引发了人们对灭绝结果的关注，以及关于人类在未来任何大规模灭绝中潜在角色的猜测。本文中，我们讨论了两种备受关注的案例——鲨鱼和北美野牛——中灭绝的经济原因，然后将我们的框架扩展到多物种及大规模灭绝的可能性。在整个分析中，我们以鲨鱼种群为重点，展示了来自权威数据源的证据。尽管数据存在巨大缺口，但现有证据表明，许多物种的灭绝风险正在上升，而政策反应迟缓。

papers.title: Neoclassical Growth in an Interdependent World
papers.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding, Motohiro Yogo
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable, multi-country, open-economy model of neoclassical growth. We use this quantitative framework to study the determinants of growth and convergence (as a central issue in macroeconomics) and the welfare effects of international integration or disintegration (as a central issue in international economics). Trade and capital market frictions interact to determine steady-state outcomes, growth along the transition path, and welfare. Capital accumulation is a key margin through which both frictions affect welfare. Speeds of convergence for assets and capital differ and are jointly determined. Unexpected shocks have valuation effects that depend on bilateral gross capital positions.
papers.zh_title: 相互依存世界中的新古典增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个易于处理的多国开放经济新古典增长模型。我们利用这一量化框架研究增长与趋同的决定因素（作为宏观经济学的核心问题），以及国际一体化或分裂的福利效应（作为国际经济学的核心问题）。贸易和资本市场摩擦相互作用，共同决定稳态结果、转型路径上的增长以及福利。资本积累是这两种摩擦影响福利的关键渠道。资产和资本的趋同速度不同，且共同决定。意外冲击会产生估值效应，该效应取决于双边总资本头寸。

papers.title: Geopolitical Shocks And Commodity Market Dynamics: New Evidence From The Russian-Ukraine Conflict
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Robert Lindahl, David Stenvall, Gazi Salah Uddin
papers.abstract: We investigate the event-based geopolitical shocks from the Russian invasion of Ukraine on agricultural and energy commodities using daily event-based structural vector autoregression (SVAR). We find that the geopolitical shock affects the markets of wheat (2%), corn (1%) and European natural gas (7.5%). However, substantial heterogeneity is observed among the agricultural and energy markets. Geopolitical risk stemming from the Russia-Ukraine conflict affects the European natural gas market more strongly than the US and Asian markets. The regional segment of natural gas markets could explain this. Finally, our analysis explores how geopolitical news affects the dynamics of stock, currency, and bond markets.
papers.zh_title: 地缘政治冲击与大宗商品市场动态：来自俄乌冲突的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用基于日度事件的结构向量自回归模型，研究了俄罗斯入侵乌克兰这一事件性地缘政治冲击对农产品和能源大宗商品的影响。我们发现，地缘政治冲击影响了小麦（2%）、玉米（1%）和欧洲天然气（7.5%）市场。然而，农产品和能源市场之间存在显著的异质性。源于俄乌冲突的地缘政治风险对欧洲天然气市场的影响强于对美国和亚洲市场的影响。天然气市场的区域分割可以解释这一点。最后，我们的分析探讨了地缘政治新闻如何影响股票、货币和债券市场的动态。

papers.title: Natural and Neutral Real Interest Rates: Past and Future
papers.authors: Maurice Obstfeld
papers.abstract: Monetary theory posits a critical real rate of interest below which the monetary policy setting is inflationary and above which it is deflationary. For roughly a decade after the Great Financial Crisis (GFC), many economists linked deflationary pressures to the difficulty central banks encountered in attaining sufficiently low policy interest rates after decades of global decline in real market rates. In contrast, some ascribe the recent global upsurge in inflation to central banks’ tardiness in raising real policy rates high enough to place a sharp brake on demand. This paper surveys the decline in real interest rates in advanced and emerging economies over the past several decades, linking that process to a range of global factors that have operated with different force in different periods. The paper argues that estimates of the long-run equilibrium real rate, which I call the natural rate (r̄), may not always furnish an accurate guide to the rate appropriate for short-term monetary policy, which I call the neutral rate (r ⃰). It suggests that monetary policymakers should consider not only equilibrium in the market for domestic goods, but also the current account balance, financial conditions (including gross capital flows), and imperfect policy credibility. According to market indicators, expected long-term real interest rates have now risen to around the levels that prevailed just before the GFC. However, some of the main underlying factors that pushed real interest rates down after the 1980s and 1990s (notably demographic shifts, lower productivity growth, corporate market power, and safe asset demand relative to supply) may remain relevant. The big open question is whether recent developments including geopolitical tensions, bigger government deficits, deglobalization, and possible productivity gains from generative AI will overpower other ongoing trends to produce a further durable rise in global real interest rates. If not, low equilibrium interest rates may well continue periodically to bedevil monetary policy and financial stability. But if so, fiscal crises become a bigger risk.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E52, F36, N10
papers.zh_title: 自然利率与中性利率：过去与未来
papers.zh_abstract: 货币理论设定了一个关键的实际利率，低于该利率的货币政策设定具有通胀性，高于该利率则具有通缩性。在大金融危机后的约十年间，许多经济学家将通缩压力与央行在经历全球实际市场利率数十年下降后难以达到足够低的政策利率联系起来。相反，一些人将近期全球通胀飙升归因于央行未能及时提高实际政策利率以强力抑制需求。本文调查了过去几十年发达经济体和新兴经济体实际利率的下降，将这一过程与在不同时期以不同力度发挥作用的一系列全球因素联系起来。本文认为，长期均衡实际利率（我称之为自然利率r̄）的估计值可能并不总是为短期货币政策（我称之为中性利率r*）提供准确指导。它建议货币政策制定者不仅应考虑国内商品市场的均衡，还应考虑经常账户余额、金融状况（包括总资本流动）以及不完善的政策可信度。根据市场指标，预期长期实际利率现已升至大金融危机前左右的水平。然而，一些在1980年代和1990年代后推动实际利率下降的主要潜在因素（尤其是人口结构变化、生产率增长放缓、企业市场势力以及相对于供给的安全资产需求）可能仍然相关。一个重大的悬而未决的问题是，近期的发展，包括地缘政治紧张局势、更大的政府赤字、去全球化以及生成式人工智能可能带来的生产率提升，是否会压倒其他持续趋势，导致全球实际利率进一步持久上升。如果不是，低均衡利率很可能继续周期性地困扰货币政策和金融稳定。但如果是，财政危机将成为更大的风险。

papers.title: The World’s Rust Belts: The Heterogeneous Effects of Deindustrialization on 1,993 Cities in Six Countries
papers.authors: Luisa Gagliardi, Enrico Moretti, Michel Serafinelli
papers.abstract: We investigate the employment consequences of deindustrialization for 1,993 cities in France, Germany, Great Britain, Italy, Japan, and the United States. In all six countries we find a strong negative relationship between a city's share of manufacturing employment in the year of its country’s manufacturing peak and the subsequent change in total employment, reflecting the fact that cities where manufacturing was initially more important experienced larger negative labor demand shocks. But in a significant number of cases, total employment fully recovered and even exceeded initial levels, despite the loss of manufacturing jobs. Overall, 34% of former manufacturing hubs--defined as cities with an initial manufacturing employment share in the top tercile--experienced employment growth faster than their country's mean, suggesting that a surprisingly large number of cities was able to adapt to the negative shock caused by deindustrialization. The U.S. has the lowest share, indicating that the U.S. Rust Belt communities have fared relatively worse compared to their peers in the other countries. We then seek to understand why some former manufacturing hubs recovered while others didn't. We find that deindustrialization had different effects on local employment depending on the initial share of college-educated workers in the labor force. While in the two decades before the manufacturing peak, cities with a high college share experienced a rate of employment growth similar to those with a low college share, in the decades after the manufacturing peak, the employment trends diverged: cities with a high college share experienced significantly faster employment growth. The divergence grows over time at an accelerating rate. Using an instrumental variable based on the driving distance to historical colleges and universities, we estimate that a one standard deviation increase in local college share results in a rate of employment growth per decade that is 9.1 percentage points higher. This effect is in part explained by faster growth in human capital-intensive services, which more than offsets the loss of manufacturing jobs.
papers.zh_title: 世界锈带：去工业化对六国1993个城市的异质性影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了去工业化对法国、德国、英国、意大利、日本和美国1993个城市的就业影响。在所有六个国家中，我们发现，一个城市在其国家制造业峰值年份的制造业就业份额与随后总就业变化之间存在强烈的负相关关系，这反映出制造业最初更重要的城市经历了更大的负面劳动力需求冲击。但在相当多的情况下，尽管制造业岗位流失，总就业完全恢复甚至超过了初始水平。总体而言，34%的前制造业中心——定义为初始制造业就业份额处于前三分之一的城市——经历了快于国家平均水平的就业增长，这表明数量惊人的城市能够适应去工业化造成的负面冲击。美国的这一比例最低，表明美国锈带社区与其他国家的同类社区相比表现相对较差。然后，我们试图理解为什么一些前制造业中心得以恢复而另一些则没有。我们发现，去工业化对当地就业的影响取决于劳动力中受过大学教育的工人的初始份额。在制造业峰值前的二十年里，大学份额高的城市与大学份额低的城市经历了相似的就业增长率；但在制造业峰值后的几十年里，就业趋势出现分化：大学份额高的城市经历了显著更快的就业增长。这种分化随着时间的推移以加速的速度扩大。使用基于到历史高校驾车距离的工具变量，我们估计当地大学份额每增加一个标准差，每十年的就业增长率就会提高9.1个百分点。这种效应部分由人力资本密集型服务的更快增长解释，这足以抵消制造业岗位的损失。

papers.title: Market Design and Maintenance
papers.authors: Alvin E. Roth
papers.abstract: Because no marketplace operates in isolation from the larger world, marketplace designs may need to adapt to changes in the larger environments. I discuss such changes in connection with the labor markets for new doctors, new Ph.D. economists, and for kidney exchange transplants. But while practical market design presents a host of challenges, it also offers many rewards. Among the rewards to market designers themselves is the opportunity to become intimately familiar with markets that shape the lives and careers of their participants.
papers.zh_title: 市场设计与维护
papers.zh_abstract: 由于没有哪个市场在脱离更大世界的情况下独立运行，市场设计可能需要适应更大环境的变化。我结合新医生、新经济学博士以及肾脏交换移植的劳动力市场讨论了这些变化。但是，尽管实际市场设计带来了诸多挑战，它也提供了许多回报。对市场设计者自身而言，回报之一是有机会深入了解那些塑造参与者生活和职业生涯的市场。

papers.title: An Empirical Analysis of the Interconnection Queue
papers.authors: Sarah Johnston, Yifei Liu, Chenyu Yang
papers.abstract: Generators applying to connect to the U.S. power grid go through an interconnection queue. Most wind and solar generators that begin the process do not complete it. Using new data, we find that a long queue increases the average waiting time, and high interconnection costs are a key factor in a generator’s decision to withdraw. We develop and estimate a dynamic model of the queue and quantify the effects of policy reforms. Our simulations indicate that reducing waiting times can significantly increase completions. An alternative queuing mechanism can therefore increase completed capacity by removing certain generators to reduce congestion. A flat entry fee has a similar effect. We also quantify the effects of reforming how interconnection costs are assessed. These policy reforms lead to a substantial reduction in carbon emissions.
papers.zh_title: 并网队列的实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 申请接入美国电网的发电机组需要经过并网队列。大多数开始这一过程的风能和太阳能发电机组并未完成。利用新数据，我们发现长队列增加了平均等待时间，而高并网成本是发电机组决定退出的关键因素。我们开发并估计了一个队列动态模型，并量化了政策改革的效果。我们的模拟表明，减少等待时间可以显著增加完成数量。因此，一种替代性的队列机制可以通过移除某些发电机组以减少拥堵来增加完成的容量。固定入场费具有类似效果。我们还量化了改革并网成本评估方式的效果。这些政策改革导致碳排放大幅减少。

papers.title: Econometric Causality: The Central Role of Thought Experiments
papers.authors: James J. Heckman, Rodrigo Pinto
papers.abstract: This paper examines the econometric causal model and the interpretation of empirical evidence based on thought experiments that was developed by Ragnar Frisch and Trygve Haavelmo. We compare the econometric causal model with two currently popular causal frameworks: the Neyman-Rubin causal model and the Do-Calculus. The Neyman-Rubin causal model is based on the language of potential outcomes and was largely developed by statisticians. Instead of being based on thought experiments, it takes statistical experiments as its foundation. The Do-Calculus, developed by Judea Pearl and co-authors, relies on Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) and is a popular causal framework in computer science and applied mathematics. We make the case that economists who uncritically use these frameworks often discard the substantial benefits of the econometric causal model to the detriment of more informative analyses. We illustrate the versatility and capabilities of the econometric framework using causal models developed in economics.
papers.zh_title: 计量经济学因果性：思想实验的核心作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了由拉格纳·弗里希和特里格夫·哈维尔莫发展的、基于思想实验的计量经济学因果模型及对经验证据的解释。我们将计量经济学因果模型与当前两种流行的因果框架——内曼-鲁宾因果模型和Do-Calculus——进行比较。内曼-鲁宾因果模型基于潜在结果的语言，主要由统计学家发展而来。它不以思想实验为基础，而是以统计实验为基础。由朱迪亚·珀尔及其合著者发展的Do-Calculus依赖于有向无环图，是计算机科学和应用数学中流行的因果框架。我们论证，不加批判地使用这些框架的经济学家往往丢弃了计量经济学因果模型的实质性益处，从而损害了更具信息量的分析。我们使用经济学中发展的因果模型来说明计量经济学框架的多样性和能力。

papers.title: Rising Income Tax Complexity
papers.authors: Youssef Benzarti, Luisa Wallossek
papers.abstract: This paper provides novel estimates on the cost of filing taxes over time and in different countries. First, we ran a survey of US taxpayers. We find that taxpayers perceive that tax complexity and filing costs have been increasing and that the majority would be willing to pay for simplifying the tax system and adopting pre-populated tax returns. Second, we use word counts of the tax codes in several countries dating as far back as the early 1980’s as a proxy for tax compliance costs. This measure shows that compliance costs have been steadily increasing.
papers.zh_title: 不断上升的所得税复杂性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于不同时期和不同国家报税成本的新估计。首先，我们对美国纳税人进行了一项调查。我们发现，纳税人认为税收复杂性和报税成本一直在增加，并且大多数人愿意为简化税制和采用预填纳税申报表而付费。其次，我们使用可追溯到20世纪80年代初的多个国家税法文本的字数作为税收遵从成本的代理指标。这一指标显示，遵从成本一直在稳步上升。

papers.title: Causal Models for Longitudinal and Panel Data: A Survey
papers.authors: Dmitry Arkhangelsky, Guido Imbens
papers.abstract: In this survey we discuss the recent causal panel data literature. This recent literature has focused on credibly estimating causal effects of binary interventions in settings with longitudinal data, emphasizing practical advice for empirical researchers. It pays particular attention to heterogeneity in the causal effects, often in situations where few units are treated and with particular structures on the assignment pattern. The literature has extended earlier work on difference-in-differences or two-way-fixed-effect estimators. It has more generally incorporated factor models or interactive fixed effects. It has also developed novel methods using synthetic control approaches.
papers.zh_title: 纵向和面板数据的因果模型：综述
papers.zh_abstract: 在本综述中，我们讨论了最近的因果面板数据文献。这一近期文献专注于在纵向数据背景下可信地估计二元干预的因果效应，强调为实证研究者提供实用建议。它特别关注因果效应的异质性，通常是在少数单位受到处理且分配模式具有特定结构的情况下。该文献扩展了早期关于双重差分或双向固定效应估计量的工作。它更普遍地纳入了因子模型或交互固定效应。它还使用合成控制方法发展了新颖的方法。

papers.title: Influencing Policy and Transforming Institutions: Lessons from Kidney/Liver Exchange
papers.authors: Tayfun Sönmez, M. Utku Ünver
papers.abstract: Kidney exchange emerges as a pioneering application in the early stages of market design. In contrast to most other successful applications in the field, where design economists primarily serve as consultants to decision-makers, in the context of kidney exchange, they assumed the role of outsider critics, ultimately succeeding in shaping real-life practices and institutions. This paper delves into the strategies that facilitated this influential role. Drawing on our two-decade involvement in shaping kidney and liver exchange clearinghouses in the United States and Turkey, we provide insights into factors pivotal for the effectiveness of market design research in shaping policy. Building upon these experiences and incorporating lessons from school choice reforms in the 2000s, Sönmez (2023) introduces a novel institutional design paradigm termed "minimalist market design." Recent years have witnessed tangible outcomes resulting from integrated research and policy efforts employing this framework, notably contributing to the 2021 reform of the US Army's cadet branching system and the establishment of reserve systems during the Covid-19 pandemic for vaccine and therapy allocation across multiple states.
papers.zh_title: 影响政策与变革制度：来自肾脏/肝脏交换的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 肾脏交换是市场设计早期阶段的一项开创性应用。与该领域大多数其他成功的应用不同——在这些应用中，设计经济学家主要作为决策者的顾问——在肾脏交换的背景下，他们扮演了外部批评者的角色，并最终成功塑造了现实中的实践和制度。本文深入探讨了促成这一影响角色的策略。基于我们二十年来参与塑造美国和土耳其肾脏及肝脏交换清算所的经验，我们提供了对市场设计研究在塑造政策方面有效性至关重要的因素的见解。基于这些经验并借鉴2000年代择校改革的教训，Sönmez（2023）引入了一种称为“极简主义市场设计”的新型制度设计范式。近年来，采用这一框架的综合研究和政策努力已产生切实成果，尤其促成了2021年美国陆军军官分支系统的改革，以及在新冠疫情期间为多个州的疫苗和疗法分配建立储备系统。

papers.title: Updating about Yourself by Learning about the Market: The Dynamics of Beliefs and Expectations in Job Search
papers.authors: Qiwei He, Philipp Kircher
papers.abstract: This study documents how job seekers update perceived job-finding prospects by unemployment duration and by learning about aggregate unemployment. We find that job seekers perceive an 18% decline in their job-finding probability for each additional month of unemployment, but perceive a higher job-finding probability when the aggregate unemployment rate is unexpectedly low. We develop a job search model with learning and updating to quantify the impact of perceived aggregate unemployment on subjective job-finding probabilities, revealing an overreaction to news about aggregate conditions. These beliefs can potentially offset a non-trivial part of the negative consequences of moral hazard in job search.
papers.zh_title: 通过了解市场来更新自我认知：求职中信念与预期的动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究记录了求职者如何根据失业持续时间以及了解总体失业率来更新其感知的求职前景。我们发现，求职者认为每多失业一个月，其找到工作的概率就会下降18%，但当总体失业率意外偏低时，他们感知到的求职概率会更高。我们开发了一个包含学习和更新的求职模型，以量化感知到的总体失业率对主观求职概率的影响，揭示出对总体状况新闻的过度反应。这些信念有可能抵消求职中道德风险负面后果的相当一部分。

papers.title: Impacts of the Jones Act on U.S. Petroleum Markets
papers.authors: Ryan Kellogg, Richard L. Sweeney
papers.abstract: We study how the Jones Act — a 100-year-old U.S. regulation that constrains domestic waterborne shipping — affects U.S. markets for crude oil and petroleum products. We collect data on U.S. Gulf Coast and East Coast fuel prices, movements, and consumption, and we estimate domestic non-Jones shipping costs using freight rates for Gulf Coast exports. We then model counterfactual prices and product movements absent the Jones Act, allowing shippers to arbitrage price differences between the Gulf and East Coasts when they exceed transport costs. Eliminating the Jones Act would have reduced average East Coast gasoline, jet fuel, and diesel prices by $0.63, $0.80, and $0.82 per barrel, respectively, during 2018–2019, with the largest price decreases occurring in the Lower Atlantic. The Gulf Coast gasoline price would increase by $0.30 per barrel. U.S. consumers’ surplus would increase by $769 million per year, and producers’ surplus would decrease by $367 million per year.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, ITI, LE, PE；JEL：F13, K33, L72, Q37
papers.zh_title: 《琼斯法案》对美国石油市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了《琼斯法案》——一项已有百年历史、限制美国国内水运的法规——如何影响美国的原油和石油产品市场。我们收集了美国墨西哥湾沿岸和东海岸的燃料价格、运输量和消费数据，并利用墨西哥湾沿岸出口的运费率估算了国内非琼斯法案船舶的运输成本。接着，我们模拟了在没有《琼斯法案》情况下的反事实价格和产品流动，允许托运人在价差超过运输成本时，通过套利行为消除墨西哥湾沿岸与东海岸之间的价格差异。在2018-2019年期间，废除《琼斯法案》将使东海岸的汽油、航空燃油和柴油价格平均每桶分别降低0.63美元、0.80美元和0.82美元，其中价格降幅最大的地区是南大西洋沿岸。墨西哥湾沿岸的汽油价格将每桶上涨0.30美元。美国消费者剩余每年将增加7.69亿美元，而生产者剩余每年将减少3.67亿美元。

papers.title: Dollar Shortages, CIP Deviations, and the Safe Haven Role of the Dollar
papers.authors: Philippe Bacchetta, J. Scott Davis, Eric van Wincoop
papers.abstract: Since 2007, an increase in risk or risk aversion has resulted in a US dollar appreciation and greater deviations from covered interest parity (CIP). In contrast, prior to 2007, risk had no impact on the dollar, and CIP held. To explain these phenomena, we develop a two-country model featuring (i) market segmentation, (ii) limited CIP arbitrage (since 2007), (iii) global dollar dominance. During periods of heightened global financial stress, dollar shortages in the offshore market emerge, leading to increased CIP deviations and a dollar appreciation. The appreciation occurs even in the absence of global dollar demand shocks. Central bank swap lines mitigate these effects.
papers.zh_title: 美元短缺、抛补利率平价偏离与美元的避险角色
papers.zh_abstract: 自2007年以来，风险或风险厌恶程度的上升导致了美元升值和抛补利率平价（CIP）出现更大程度的偏离。相比之下，在2007年之前，风险对美元没有影响，且抛补利率平价成立。为了解释这些现象，我们构建了一个两国模型，其特点包括：(i) 市场分割，(ii) 有限的抛补利率平价套利（自2007年起），(iii) 美元的全球主导地位。在全球金融压力加剧时期，离岸市场出现美元短缺，导致抛补利率平价偏离扩大和美元升值。即使没有全球美元需求冲击，这种升值也会发生。中央银行之间的货币互换额度缓解了这些影响。

papers.title: Security Analysis and the Collection of Hard and Soft Information
papers.authors: Azi Ben-Rephael, Bruce I. Carlin, Zhi Da, Ryan D. Israelsen
papers.abstract: We use minute-by-minute Bloomberg online status microdata during 2017-2021 to directly study how hard and soft information collection affects equity analyst performance. Collection of hard information, proxied by office workday length, is positively associated with the quantity and timeliness of analyst reports. Soft information collection, as proxied by propensity to travel, is positively correlated with the market’s reaction to recommendation changes and the likelihood of becoming a star analyst. Both hard and soft information collection improve forecast precision, a causal result that we confirm using the COVID lockdown as an instrument.
papers.zh_title: 证券分析与硬信息和软信息的收集
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2017-2021年间每分钟级别的彭博在线状态微观数据，直接研究了硬信息和软信息的收集如何影响股票分析师的表现。以工作日工作时长衡量的硬信息收集，与分析报告的产出数量及及时性呈正相关。以出差倾向衡量的软信息收集，与市场对分析师推荐调整的反应强度以及分析师成为明星分析师的可能性呈正相关。硬信息和软信息的收集都能提高预测精度，我们利用新冠疫情封锁作为工具变量，确认了这一因果关系。

papers.title: American Disclosure Options
papers.authors: Kerry Back, Bruce I. Carlin, Seyed Mohammad Kazempour, Chloe L. Xie
papers.abstract: We study strategic disclosure timing by correlated firms in the presence of risk-averse investors. Firms delay disclosures in the hope that positively correlated firms will announce especially good news and lift their own price. Risk premia rise before disclosures, drop when disclosures occur, and then rise again. Conditional risk premia can be much larger than unconditional risk premia. Disclosures are always good news, but disclosures that are only moderately good news induce clustering of disclosures by other positively correlated firms. We present evidence of strategic behavior in earnings announcement timing as predicted by the model.
papers.zh_title: 美国式信息披露选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在风险厌恶投资者的情况下，具有相关性的公司如何进行战略性信息披露时机选择。公司会延迟信息披露，期望正相关的公司会公布特别好的消息，从而推高自身股价。风险溢价在信息披露前上升，在信息披露时下降，之后再次上升。条件风险溢价可能远大于无条件风险溢价。信息披露总是好消息，但仅仅是中等程度的好消息会引发其他正相关公司集中进行信息披露。我们提供了证据，表明盈利公告的时机选择存在符合模型预测的战略性行为。

papers.title: An Evaluation of Protected Area Policies in the European Union
papers.authors: Tristan Grupp, Prakash Mishra, Mathias Reynaert, Arthur A. van Benthem
papers.abstract: The European Union designates 26% of its landmass as a protected area, limiting economic development to favor biodiversity. This paper uses the staggered introduction of protected-area policies between 1985 and 2020 to study the selection of land for protection and the causal effect of protection on vegetation cover and nightlights. Our results reveal protection did not affect the outcomes in any meaningful way across four decades, all countries, protection cohorts, and a wide range of land and climate attributes. We conclude that European conservation efforts lack ambition because policymakers select land for protection not threatened by development.
papers.zh_title: 欧盟保护区政策评估
papers.zh_abstract: 欧盟将其26%的陆地面积划定为保护区，限制经济发展以促进生物多样性。本文利用1985年至2020年间保护区政策的分阶段引入，研究了保护区的选址以及保护政策对植被覆盖率和夜间灯光强度的因果效应。我们的研究结果显示，在长达四十年的时间里，跨越所有国家、不同保护批次以及广泛的地类和气候属性，保护政策并未对相关结果产生任何有意义的影响。我们得出结论，欧洲的保护努力缺乏雄心，因为政策制定者选择的保护土地并非面临发展威胁的区域。

papers.title: Optimal Exchange Rate Policy
papers.authors: Oleg Itskhoki, Dmitry Mukhin
papers.abstract: We develop a general policy analysis framework for an open economy that features nominal rigidities and financial frictions giving rise to endogenous PPP and UIP deviations. The efficient allocation can be implemented with monetary policy closing the output gap and FX interventions eliminating UIP deviations. When the “natural” real exchange rate is stable, both goals can be achieved solely by monetary policy that fixes the exchange rate — an open-economy divine coincidence. More generally, optimal policy features a managed float/crawling peg complemented with FX forward guidance and macroprudential accumulation of FX reserves, in line with the “fear of floating” observed in the data. Capital controls are not necessary to achieve the frictionless allocation, but they facilitate the extraction of rents in the currency market. Constrained unilateral policies are not optimal from the global perspective, and international cooperation features a complementary use of FX interventions across countries.
papers.zh_title: 最优汇率政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为一个开放经济体构建了一个通用的政策分析框架，该经济体具有名义刚性和金融摩擦，这些摩擦导致了内生的购买力平价（PPP）和未抛补利率平价（UIP）偏离。有效的资源配置可以通过货币政策来弥合产出缺口，并通过外汇干预来消除未抛补利率平价偏离来实现。当“自然”实际汇率稳定时，这两个目标可以仅通过固定汇率的货币政策来实现——这是一种开放经济体的“神圣巧合”。更一般地，最优政策表现为有管理的浮动汇率/爬行钉住，辅以外汇远期指引和宏观审慎的外汇储备积累，这与数据中观察到的“浮动恐惧”现象一致。资本管制对于实现无摩擦的资源配置并非必需，但它们有助于在货币市场中获取租金。从全球视角看，受约束的单边政策并非最优，而国际合作则体现为各国在外汇干预上的互补性运用。

papers.title: Revisiting the Eswaran-Kotwal Model of Tenancy
papers.authors: Maitreesh Ghatak, Dilip Mookherjee
papers.abstract: Persistence of sharecropping tenancy and increases in farm productivity following regulations protecting tenant rights have been observed in many developing countries. This paper examines if these can be explained by alternative models of sharecropping with two sided efforts/investments, namely, complete contract models either without wealth constraints (Eswaran-Kotwal (1985)), or with a wealth constrained tenant (Mookherjee (1997), Banerjee-Gertler-Ghatak (2002)); and incomplete contract holdup models without wealth constraints (Grossman-Hart (1986)). In the absence of wealth constraints the complete contract model always results in (incentive constrained) surplus-maximizing productivity, so there can be no scope for tenancy regulations to raise productivity. In the incomplete contract model, tenancy regulations would raise productivity only if the tenant's investments are more important than the landlord's investment. But in that case sharecropping tenancy would not persist in the absence of wealth constraints as the tenant would have purchased the land right ex ante from the landlord. The model with wealth constraints helps explain both the persistence of tenancy and productivity/surplus enhancing effects of tenancy regulations.
papers.zh_title: 重访埃斯瓦兰-科特瓦尔租佃模型
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多发展中国家，观察到分成租佃制的持续存在以及保护佃农权利法规实施后农业生产率的提高。本文考察了这些现象是否可以通过考虑双边努力/投资的替代性分成租佃模型来解释，具体包括：无财富约束的完全契约模型（Eswaran-Kotwal (1985)）、存在财富约束佃农的完全契约模型（Mookherjee (1997), Banerjee-Gertler-Ghatak (2002)），以及无财富约束的不完全契约“敲竹杠”模型（Grossman-Hart (1986)）。在无财富约束的情况下，完全契约模型总能实现（受激励约束的）剩余最大化生产率，因此租佃法规没有提升生产率的空间。在不完全契约模型中，只有当佃农的投资比地主的投资更重要时，租佃法规才能提高生产率。但若如此，在无财富约束的情况下，分成租佃制将无法持续，因为佃农本可以事先从地主那里购买土地所有权。而包含财富约束的模型则有助于解释租佃制的持续存在以及租佃法规对生产率/剩余提升的促进作用。

papers.title: The Power to Conserve: A Field Experiment on Electricity Use in Qatar
papers.authors: Omar Al-Ubaydli, Alecia W. Cassidy, Anomitro Chatterjee, Ahmed Khalifa, Michael K. Price
papers.abstract: High resource users often have the strongest response to behavioral interventions promoting conservation. Yet, litlle is known about how to motivate them. We implement a field experiment in Qatar, where residential customers have some of the highest energy use per capita in the world. Our dataset consists of 207,325 monthly electricity meter readings from a panel of 6,096 customers. We employ two normative treatments priming identity - a religious message quoting the Qur’an, and a national message reminding households that Qatar prioritizes energy conservation. The treatments reduce electricity use by 3.8% and both messages are equally effective. Using machine learning methods on supplemental survey data, we elucidate how agency, motivation, and responsibility activate conservation responses to our identity primes.
papers.zh_title: 节约的力量：卡塔尔用电行为的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 高资源使用者通常对促进节约的行为干预反应最为强烈。然而，关于如何激励他们却知之甚少。我们在卡塔尔进行了一项实地实验，该国的居民人均能源使用量位居世界前列。我们的数据集包含来自6096名客户面板数据的207,325个月度电表读数。我们采用了两种规范性的处理方式，以激发身份认同——一种是引用《古兰经》的宗教信息，另一种是提醒家庭卡塔尔优先考虑节能的国家信息。这些处理措施使用电量减少了3.8%，且两种信息的效果相当。利用补充调查数据中的机器学习方法，我们阐明了能动性、动机和责任感如何激活对身份认同提示的节约响应。

papers.title: Eliciting Willingness-to-Pay to Decompose Beliefs and Preferences that Determine Selection into Competition in Lab Experiments
papers.authors: Yvonne Jie Chen, Deniz Dutz, Li Li, Sarah Moon, Edward J. Vytlacil, Songfa Zhong
papers.abstract: This paper develops a partial-identification methodology for analyzing self-selection into alternative compensation schemes in a laboratory environment. We formulate a model of self-selection in which individuals select the compensation scheme with the largest expected valuation, which depends on individual- and scheme-specific beliefs and non-monetary preferences. We characterize the resulting sharp identified sets for individual-specific willingness-to-pay, subjective beliefs, and preferences, and develop conditions on the experimental design under which these identified sets are informative. We apply our methods to examine gender differences in preference for winner-take-all compensation schemes. We find that what has commonly been attributed to a gender difference in preference for performing in a competition is instead explained by men being more confident than women in their probability of winning a future (though not necessarily a past) competition.
papers.zh_title: 在实验室实验中通过引致支付意愿来分解决定竞争选择的信念与偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种部分识别方法，用于分析实验室环境中个体对替代薪酬方案的自选择行为。我们构建了一个自选择模型，其中个体选择预期估值最大的薪酬方案，该估值取决于个体和方案特定的信念以及非货币偏好。我们刻画了由此产生的个体特定支付意愿、主观信念和偏好的尖锐识别集，并发展了实验设计条件，在这些条件下这些识别集具有信息量。我们将方法应用于检验性别在赢家通吃薪酬方案偏好上的差异。我们发现，通常被归因于性别在竞争表现偏好上的差异，实际上是由男性比女性更自信于赢得未来（但不一定是过去）竞争的概率所解释的。

papers.title: The Labor Market Effects of Legal Restrictions on Worker Mobility
papers.authors: Matthew S. Johnson, Kurt J. Lavetti, Michael Lipsitz
papers.abstract: We analyze how the legal enforceability of noncompete agreements (NCAs) affects labor markets. Using newly-constructed panel data, we find that higher NCA enforceability diminishes workers’ earnings and job mobility, with larger effects among workers most likely to sign NCAs. These effects are far-reaching: increasing enforceability imposes externalities on workers across state borders, suggesting broad effects on labor market dynamism. We show enforceability affects wages by reducing outside options and preventing workers from leveraging tight labor markets to increase earnings. We motivate these findings with a model of search and bargaining. Finally, higher NCA enforceability exacerbates gender and racial earnings gaps.
papers.zh_title: 限制工人流动的法律对劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了竞业禁止协议的法律可执行性如何影响劳动力市场。利用新构建的面板数据，我们发现更高的竞业禁止协议可执行性降低了工人的收入和职业流动性，对最可能签署竞业禁止协议的工人影响更大。这些影响是深远的：提高可执行性对跨州界的工人施加了外部性，表明对劳动力市场活力产生了广泛影响。我们表明可执行性通过减少外部选择机会和阻止工人利用紧张劳动力市场增加收入来影响工资。我们通过一个搜索与讨价还价模型来激发这些发现。最后，更高的竞业禁止协议可执行性加剧了性别和种族收入差距。

papers.title: One Hundred Years of Exchange Rate Economics at The University of Chicago: 1892-1992
papers.authors: Sebastian Edwards
papers.abstract: In this paper I analyze the work on exchange rates and external imbalances by University of Chicago faculty members during the university’s first hundred years, 1892-1992. Many people associate Chicago’s views with Milton Friedman’s advocacy for flexible exchange rates. But, of course, there was much more than that, including the work of J. Laurence Laughlin on bimetallism, Jacob Viner on the balance of payments, Lloyd Metzler on transfers, Harry Johnson on trade and currencies, Lloyd Mints on exchange rate regimes, Robert Mundell on optimal currency areas, and Arnold Harberger on shadow exchange rates, among other. The analysis shows that, although different scholars emphasized different issues, there was a common thread in this research, anchored on the role of relative prices’ changes during the adjustment process.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME, POL；JEL：B22, E52, E58, F31, F33
papers.zh_title: 芝加哥大学汇率经济学一百年：1892-1992
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我分析了芝加哥大学教职员工在1892年至1992年大学第一个百年期间关于汇率和外部失衡的研究。许多人将芝加哥的观点与米尔顿·弗里德曼对浮动汇率的倡导联系起来。但当然，远不止于此，还包括J.劳伦斯·劳克林关于双本位制的研究、雅各布·维纳关于国际收支的研究、劳埃德·梅茨勒关于转移问题的研究、哈里·约翰逊关于贸易与货币的研究、劳埃德·明茨关于汇率制度的研究、罗伯特·蒙代尔关于最优货币区的研究，以及阿诺德·哈伯格关于影子汇率的研究等。分析表明，尽管不同学者强调不同问题，但这项研究有一条共同主线，即锚定于调整过程中相对价格变化的作用。

papers.title: Information Leakage from Short Sellers
papers.authors: Fernando D. Chague, Bruno Giovannetti, Bernard Herskovic
papers.abstract: Using granular data on the entire Brazilian securities lending market merged with all trades in the centralized stock exchange, we identify information leakage from short sellers. Our identification strategy explores trading execution mismatches between short sellers’ selling activity in the centralized exchange and borrowing activity in the over-the-counter securities lending market. We document that brokers learn about informed directional bets by intermediating securities lending agreements and leak that information to their clients. We find evidence that the information leakage is intentional and that brokers, clients and short sellers benefit from it. We also study leakage effects on stock prices.
papers.zh_title: 卖空者的信息泄露
papers.zh_abstract: 利用覆盖整个巴西证券借贷市场并与集中式证券交易所所有交易合并的细粒度数据，我们识别出卖空者的信息泄露。我们的识别策略探索了卖空者在集中式交易所的卖出活动与在场外证券借贷市场的借入活动之间的交易执行错配。我们记录了经纪商通过中介证券借贷协议了解知情方向性押注，并将该信息泄露给其客户。我们发现有证据表明信息泄露是故意的，并且经纪商、客户和卖空者都从中受益。我们还研究了泄露对股票价格的影响。

papers.title: The Semblance of Success in Nudging Consumers to Pay Down Credit Card Debt
papers.authors: Benedict Guttman-Kenney, Paul D. Adams, Stefan Hunt, David Laibson, Neil Stewart, Jesse Leary
papers.abstract: We run a field experiment and a survey experiment to study an active choice nudge. Our nudge is designed to reduce the anchoring of credit card payments to the minimum payment. In our field experiment, the nudge reduces enrollment in Autopaying the minimum from 36.9% to 9.6%. However, the nudge does not reduce credit card debt after seven payment cycles. Nudged cardholders tend to choose Autopay amounts that are only slightly higher than the minimum payment. The nudge lowers Autopay enrollment resulting in increasing missed payments. Finally, the nudge reduces manual payments by cardholders enrolled in Autopay.
papers.zh_title: 推动消费者偿还信用卡债务的表面成功
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项现场实验和一项调查实验，以研究一种主动选择助推。该助推旨在减少信用卡支付对最低还款额的锚定。在我们的现场实验中，该助推将自动最低还款的注册率从36.9%降至9.6%。然而，经过七个支付周期后，该助推并未减少信用卡债务。受到助推的持卡人倾向于选择仅略高于最低还款额的自动还款金额。该助推降低了自动还款注册率，导致逾期还款增加。最后，该助推减少了已注册自动还款的持卡人的手动还款。

papers.title: Accessing the Safety Net: How Medicaid Affects Health and Recidivism
papers.authors: Analisa Packham, David Slusky
papers.abstract: We estimate the causal impact of access to means-tested public health insurance coverage (Medicaid) on health outcomes and recidivism for those recently released from incarceration. To do so, we leverage a policy change in South Carolina that allowed simplified Medicaid enrollment for previously incarcerated eligible individuals. Using linked administrative data on criminal convictions and health insurance claims, we find that reducing barriers in access to Medicaid for vulnerable populations increases enrollment and utilization of some health care services. However, we do not find that this improved health care insurance access reduces 1-year or 3-year recidivism, suggesting that effectiveness of such policies is context dependent.
papers.zh_title: 获取安全网：医疗补助如何影响健康与再犯
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了获得按经济状况调查确定的公共健康保险覆盖（医疗补助）对近期获释囚犯健康结果和再犯率的因果影响。为此，我们利用了南卡罗来纳州的一项政策变化，该政策允许符合条件的既往被监禁者简化医疗补助注册流程。通过使用关联的刑事定罪和健康保险索赔行政数据，我们发现，为弱势群体减少获取医疗补助的障碍，提高了注册率和对某些医疗服务的利用率。然而，我们并未发现这种改善的健康保险获取能降低一年期或三年期再犯率，这表明此类政策的有效性取决于具体情境。

papers.title: Monetary Tightening, Commercial Real Estate Distress, and US Bank Fragility
papers.authors: Erica Xuewei Jiang, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: We analyze the impact of credit risk and higher interest rates on U.S. bank solvency, expanding on the work of Jiang et al. (2023). Our variation of their bank-run model demonstrates how credit losses and asset declines from higher interest rates can trigger self-fulfilling solvency runs, even when banks hold fully liquid assets. Banks with high credit losses, greater exposure to interest rate increases, low capital, and high uninsured leverage are particularly vulnerable. Focusing on 2022’s monetary tightening, we assess banks’ exposure to commercial real estate (CRE) loans, which represent about 25% of average bank assets, totaling $2.7 trillion. Loan-level data shows that, after property value declines from rising rates and the shift to hybrid work, 14% of all CRE loans and 44% of office loans are in negative equity (i.e., property values are below outstanding debt). Additionally, 43% of all CRE loans and 64% of office loans may face cash flow and refinancing issues. A 10% (20%) default rate on CRE loans could lead to $80 billion ($160 billion) in additional bank losses. Had CRE distress occurred in early 2022, when the 10-year Treasury yield was around 2%, no banks would have faced failure, even in pessimistic scenarios. However, by 2024, after substantial asset declines, CRE distress could put dozens to over 300 smaller regional banks at risk of solvency runs. We also find evidence that banks, particularly those facing higher solvency risks and lenient state oversight, have concealed credit losses through “extend-and-pretend” practices. Overall, given the composition of bank balance sheets in Q1 2022, higher interest rates pose a greater threat to U.S. banks than credit risk, potentially constraining monetary policy.
papers.zh_title: 货币紧缩、商业地产困境与美国银行脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了信用风险和高利率对美国银行偿付能力的影响，扩展了Jiang等人（2023）的研究。我们对他们的银行挤兑模型进行了变体，展示了即使银行持有完全流动资产，来自高利率的信用损失和资产下降如何可能引发自我实现的偿付能力挤兑。信用损失高、利率上升风险敞口大、资本金低且未保险杠杆率高的银行尤其脆弱。聚焦于2022年的货币紧缩，我们评估了银行对商业地产贷款的风险敞口，这些贷款约占银行平均资产的25%，总额达2.7万亿美元。贷款层面数据显示，在利率上升和转向混合办公模式导致房产价值下降后，14%的商业地产贷款和44%的写字楼贷款处于负资产状态（即房产价值低于未偿债务）。此外，43%的商业地产贷款和64%的写字楼贷款可能面临现金流和再融资问题。商业地产贷款10%（20%）的违约率可能导致银行额外损失800亿美元（1600亿美元）。如果商业地产困境发生在2022年初（当时10年期国债收益率约为2%），即使在悲观情景下，也没有银行会面临倒闭。然而，到2024年，在资产大幅缩水后，商业地产困境可能使数十家到超过300家小型区域银行面临偿付能力挤兑风险。我们还发现证据表明，银行，尤其是那些偿付能力风险较高且州监管宽松的银行，通过“展期和假装”的做法掩盖了信用损失。总体而言，鉴于2022年第一季度银行资产负债表的构成，高利率对美国银行构成的威胁大于信用风险，并可能制约货币政策。

papers.title: Inflation, War Bonds, and the Rise of Republicans in the 1950s
papers.authors: Gillian Brunet, Eric Hilt, Matthew S. Jaremski
papers.abstract: We study the role of war bonds and inflation in the presidential elections of the 1950s. During World War II, the federal government conducted aggressive campaigns to convince Americans to invest their savings in wartime savings bonds. Although the bonds were nonnegotiable and protected from interest rate fluctuations, two major inflationary episodes after the war, in 1946-48 and 1950-51, eroded the real value of their returns, contributing to a political backlash against the incumbent Democrats. In a difference-in-differences framework, we find that counties with higher war bond purchases shifted their votes towards the Republican party in the postwar elections, relative to the elections of the late 1930s and early 1940s. To address concerns related to the endogeneity of war bond purchases, we instrument for WWII bond subscriptions using participation rates from the World War I liberty bonds, and find similar results. Our results indicate that the promotion of savings bonds made Americans more sensitive to the high inflation that prevailed after the war, contributing to Republicans’ victories in the 1950s.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：E20, E31, H6, N1, N22, N42
papers.zh_title: 通货膨胀、战争债券与1950年代共和党的崛起
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了战争债券和通货膨胀在1950年代总统选举中的作用。二战期间，联邦政府开展了积极的宣传活动，说服美国人将储蓄投资于战时储蓄债券。尽管这些债券不可转让且不受利率波动影响，但战后的两次重大通胀事件（1946-48年和1950-51年）侵蚀了其实际回报价值，导致了对在任民主党人的政治反弹。在一个双重差分框架中，我们发现，与1930年代末和1940年代初的选举相比，战争债券购买量更高的县在战后选举中将选票转向了共和党。为了解决战争债券购买内生性的问题，我们使用第一次世界大战自由债券的参与率作为二战债券认购的工具变量，并得到了类似的结果。我们的结果表明，储蓄债券的推广使美国人对战后盛行的高通胀更加敏感，从而促成了共和党在1950年代的胜利。

papers.title: Time-Varying Risk Premia and Heterogeneous Labor Market Dynamics
papers.authors: Maarten Meeuwis, Dimitris Papanikolaou, Jonathan L. Rothbaum, Lawrence D.W. Schmidt
papers.abstract: Using U.S. administrative data on worker earnings, we show that increases in risk premia lead to lower labor earnings, particularly for lower-paid workers. These declines are primarily driven by job separations. We build an equilibrium model of labor market search that quantitatively replicates the observed heterogeneity in labor market dynamics across worker earnings levels. Our findings underscore the role of time-varying risk premia as a key driver of labor market fluctuations and highlight the importance of both the job creation and the job destruction margins in understanding the heterogeneity in worker outcomes over the business cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：E3, E40, G1, J20, J30
papers.zh_title: 时变风险溢价与异质性劳动力市场动态
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国工人收入的行政数据，我们表明风险溢价的上升会导致劳动收入下降，尤其是对低收入工人而言。这些下降主要由工作分离驱动。我们构建了一个劳动力市场搜寻的均衡模型，该模型定量地复制了不同收入水平工人之间劳动力市场动态的观察异质性。我们的发现强调了时变风险溢价作为劳动力市场波动关键驱动因素的作用，并突出了工作创造和工作破坏两个边际在理解商业周期中工人结果异质性的重要性。

papers.title: Do Firms Mitigate Climate Impact on Employment? Evidence from US Heat Shocks
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Abhishek Bhardwaj, Tuomas Tomunen
papers.abstract: Using establishment-level data, we show that firms operating in multiple counties in the United States respond to heat-related damages by reallocating employment from affected to unaffected locations. This reallocation is also observed as an increase in job postings in unaffected locations, and at the extensive margin as opening of new establishments. The reallocation response intensifies with heat-related damage severity being acute, chronic and compound (with other natural disasters), and is especially pronounced among larger, financially stable firms with ESG-oriented investors. This firm-driven reallocation affects how heat shocks impact aggregate outcomes at the county level, including employment growth, wage growth, labor force participation, and establishment entry rate. Specifically, mitigation behavior by multi-establishment firms acts as a “heat insulator” for the economy, reducing the impact of heat shocks on aggregate employment and wage growth while redistributing economic activity across locations.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, IO, LS；JEL：D22, E24, G31, J21, L23, Q54
papers.zh_title: 企业能否缓解气候对就业的影响？来自美国热冲击的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用企业层面的数据，我们表明在美国多个县运营的企业通过将就业从受影响的地区重新分配到未受影响的地区来应对与高温相关的损害。这种重新分配也表现为未受影响地区职位发布的增加，以及在集约边际上开设新机构。重新分配反应随着高温相关损害的严重程度（急性、慢性和与其他自然灾害复合）而加剧，并且在规模较大、财务稳定且拥有ESG导向投资者的企业中尤为明显。这种由企业驱动的重新分配影响了热冲击在县级层面对总体结果的影响，包括就业增长、工资增长、劳动力参与率和机构进入率。具体来说，多机构企业的缓解行为起到了经济的“热绝缘体”作用，减少了热冲击对总体就业和工资增长的影响，同时在经济活动在不同地点之间进行了重新分配。

papers.title: Does Political Partisanship Affect Housing Supply? Evidence from US Cities
papers.authors: Fernando V. Ferreira, Joseph Gyourko
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between housing supply and political partisanship in US cities using a new database of mayoral elections combined with local housing permits since 1980. Endogeneity of which party holds the mayoral office is addressed via a regression discontinuity design that relies on closely contested races between Republicans and Democrats. We find that partisanship has no effect on the supply of single and multifamily housing despite recent increases in extreme partisanship, corroborating that US cities follow the median voter. This indicates that solutions to housing affordability will not be dependent upon the political party in power at the local level.
papers.zh_title: 政治党派偏见是否影响住房供应？来自美国城市的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个新的市长选举数据库，结合自1980年以来的地方住房许可数据，研究了美国城市住房供应与政治党派偏见之间的关系。通过一个依赖于共和党与民主党之间激烈竞争的断点回归设计，我们解决了哪个政党占据市长职位的内生性问题。我们发现，尽管近年来极端党派偏见有所增加，但党派偏见对单户和多户住房供应没有影响，这证实了美国城市遵循中间选民模型。这表明，住房可负担性问题的解决方案将不依赖于地方层面的执政党。

papers.title: Dynamic Monopsony with Granular Firms
papers.authors: Axel Gottfries, Gregor Jarosch
papers.abstract: This paper extends the “dynamic monopsony” Burdett-Mortensen model of wage posting and on-the-job search to a granular setting with a finite number of large employers. Firms operate a decreasing-returns-to-scale technology, which endogenizes firm size and aggregate employment. We provide a complete analytical characterization of the resulting equilibrium and show how to allow for firm heterogeneity, additional inputs, and product market power. As an application, we study noncompete agreements theoretically and quantitatively. A US ban would yield wage gains typically in the range of 0.8 − 3% depending on local conditions, with a baseline estimate of 0.9%, but these come with higher worker turnover and a mild decline in aggregate welfare.
papers.zh_title: 具有颗粒型企业的动态买方垄断
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将工资设定和在职搜寻的“动态买方垄断”Burdett-Mortensen模型扩展到一个具有有限数量大型雇主的颗粒型环境。企业采用规模报酬递减的技术，这使得企业规模和总就业内生化。我们提供了对所得均衡的完整分析刻画，并展示了如何允许企业异质性、额外投入和产品市场势力。作为一个应用，我们从理论和定量角度研究了竞业禁止协议。美国的一项禁令将根据当地条件带来通常在0.8%至3%范围内的工资收益，基线估计为0.9%，但这些收益伴随着更高的工人流动率和总体福利的轻微下降。

papers.title: Experiments about Institutions
papers.authors: Michael Callen, Jonathan L. Weigel, Noam Yuchtman
papers.abstract: We review an emerging experimental literature studying institutional change. Institutions are a key determinant of economic growth, but the “critical junctures” in which institutions can change are not precisely defined. For example, such junctures are often identified ex post, raising methodological problems: selection on the outcome of institutional change; an inability to study beliefs, central to coordination and thus the process of institutional change; and an in- ability to conduct experiments to identify causal effects. We argue that critical junctures are identifiable in real-time as moments when there exists deep uncertainty about future institutions. Consistent with this conception, the papers reviewed: (i) examine changes to institutions, i.e., the “fundamental rules of the game”; (ii) are real-time studies of plausible critical junctures; and, (iii) use field experiments to achieve causal identification. Substantively, this literature examines institutional changes in state capacity and legitimacy, political inclusion, and political accountability. We also advocate more systematic measurement of beliefs about future institutions to identify critical junctures as they happen and provide an empirical proof of concept. Such work is urgent given contemporary critical junctures arising from democratic backsliding, state fragility, climate change, and conflicts over the rights of the marginalized.
papers.zh_title: 关于制度的实验研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了一个新兴的实验文献，该文献研究制度变迁。制度是经济增长的关键决定因素，但制度可能发生变化的“关键节点”并未被精确定义。例如，这些节点通常是在事后被识别出来的，这引发了方法论问题：根据制度变迁的结果进行选择；无法研究信念——信念对于协调以及由此产生的制度变迁过程至关重要；以及无法进行实验来识别因果效应。我们认为，关键节点可以在实时中被识别为对未来制度存在深度不确定性的时刻。与这一概念一致，所回顾的论文：(i) 考察对制度的改变，即“游戏的基本规则”；(ii) 是对可能的关键节点的实时研究；以及 (iii) 使用实地实验来实现因果识别。实质上，该文献考察了国家能力与合法性、政治包容性和政治问责制方面的制度变迁。我们还主张更系统地测量关于未来制度的信念，以便在关键节点发生时识别它们，并提供一个实证概念验证。鉴于当代由民主倒退、国家脆弱性、气候变化以及关于边缘群体权利的冲突所引发的关键节点，此类工作十分紧迫。

papers.title: Rethinking the Informal Economy and the Hugo Effect
papers.authors: Francesco Pappadà, Kenneth S. Rogoff
papers.abstract: This paper offers a new approach to measuring the size of the informal economy based on VAT data for the European Union. Although data intensive, our EVADE measure is simpler and more transparent than existing measures. EVADE also shows more variation across countries of Europe than earlier measures, including higher informality in Greece, Italy and Spain, for example. Moreover, we find considerably higher variation within countries across time; in a cross-country time series regression, controlling for tax rates, we confirm that the informal economy grows significantly in recessions and decreases in booms, which we term the “Hugo effect”.
papers.zh_title: 重新思考非正规经济与雨果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于欧盟的增值税数据，提供了一种衡量非正规经济规模的新方法。尽管数据密集，但我们的EVADE衡量指标比现有指标更简单、更透明。EVADE在欧洲各国之间也显示出比早期指标更大的差异，例如，在希腊、意大利和西班牙显示出更高的非正规性。此外，我们发现各国在不同时期内的差异要大得多；在跨国时间序列回归中，在控制税率的情况下，我们证实非正规经济在经济衰退时期显著增长，在经济繁荣时期则下降，我们将其称为“雨果效应”。

papers.title: Does Wealth Inhibit Criminal Behavior? Evidence from Swedish Lottery Winners and Their Children
papers.authors: David Cesarini, Erik Lindqvist, Robert Östling, Christofer Schroeder
papers.abstract: There is a well-established negative gradient between economic status and crime, but its underlying causal mechanisms are not well understood. We use data on four Swedish lotteries matched to data on criminal convictions to gauge the causal effect of financial windfalls on player’s own crime and their children’s delinquency. We
papers.zh_title: 财富会抑制犯罪行为吗？来自瑞典彩票中奖者及其子女的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 经济地位与犯罪之间存在一个公认的负梯度，但其背后的因果机制尚不明确。我们利用匹配了刑事定罪数据的四项瑞典彩票数据，来评估意外之财对中奖者自身犯罪及其子女违法行为的影响。我们

papers.title: The Traveling Trucker Problem
papers.authors: Treb Allen, David Atkin, Santiago Cantillo Cleves, Carlos Eduardo Hernandez
papers.abstract: This paper documents three new stylized facts showing that truckers in Colombia frequently choose to make complex chains of shipments in a single trip before returning home. It then provides a newmodel of optimal trucker trip-chaining with a general geography that is consistent with these facts.
papers.zh_title: 流动卡车司机问题
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了三个新的典型事实，表明哥伦比亚的卡车司机经常选择在一次返家前的行程中完成复杂的货物运输链。随后，本文提供了一个与这些事实相符的、适用于一般地理环境的最优卡车司机行程链新模型。

papers.title: The Cost of Climate Policy to Capital: Evidence from Renewable Portfolio Standards
papers.authors: Harrison Hong, Jeffrey D. Kubik, Edward P. Shore
papers.abstract: Many US states have set ambitious renewable portfolio standards (RPS) that require utilities to switch from fossil fuels toward renewables. RPS increases the renewables capacity, bond issuance, maturity, and yield spreads of investor-owned utilities compared to municipal producers that are exempted from this climate policy. Contrary to stranded-asset concerns, the hit to overall firm financial health is moderate. Falling cost of renewables and passthrough of these costs to consumers mitigate the burden of RPS on firms.
